meaning: vt. vi. 散发，流露；发出 (光、辐射等) vi. 呈辐射状发散 (或伸展)
example: The fireflies radiate a soft green light at night.
exampleChinese: 萤火虫在夜里散发出柔和的绿色光芒。

meaning: adj. 容光焕发的；灿烂的；辐射的
example: She looked radiant in her graduation dress.
exampleChinese: 她穿着毕业礼服，看上去容光焕发。

meaning: adj. 根本的，彻底的；激进的 n. 激进分⼦；游离基
example: The city needs a radical change in public transport.
exampleChinese: 这座城市需要对公共交通进行彻底改革。

meaning: n. 物体，物品；⽬标；对象；宾语 vi. 不同意，反对 vt. 提出…作为反对的理由
example: The main object of the game is to score points.
exampleChinese: 这个游戏的主要目标是得分。

meaning: n. ⽬标，⽬的 adj. 客观的，不带个⼈感情的
example: Our objective is to finish the project by Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们的目标是星期五前完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 反对，异议，反对的理由
example: He had no objection to the new rule.
exampleChinese: 他对这条新规定没有异议。

meaning: n. 义务，责任
example: It is your obligation to return the library books on time.
exampleChinese: 按时还图书馆的书是你的义务。

meaning: vt. (因法律或义务) 强迫，迫使 vi. vt. 帮忙，效劳
example: Could you oblige me by opening the window?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我打开窗户吗？

meaning: adj. 鲜为⼈知的；难以理解的 vt. 掩盖，使模糊，使隐晦
example: The old map used an obscure symbol.
exampleChinese: 那张旧地图上用了一个晦涩难懂的符号。

meaning: n. 观察，观测；评论，评述
example: Her observation helped us solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 她的观察帮助我们解决了这个问题。

meaning: vt. vi. 观察，注视 vt. 注意到；遵守；庆祝；评论
example: We observe the Spring Festival with a big dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们用一顿丰盛的晚餐来庆祝春节。

meaning: n. 痴迷，着魔
example: His obsession with winning made him train every day.
exampleChinese: 他对获胜的痴迷让他每天都训练。

meaning: adj. 淘汰的，废弃的，过时的
example: The factory's obsolete machines were replaced last year.
exampleChinese: 去年工厂里那些过时的机器被更换了。

meaning: vt. 获得，实现 vi. 存在，流⾏
example: You can obtain a library card with your student ID.
exampleChinese: 你可以用学生证获得一张图书馆卡。

meaning: adj. 明显的，显然的；⽆新意的
example: The answer was obvious to everyone in the class.
exampleChinese: 这个答案对班里每个人来说都很明显。

meaning: adj. 理想的，最佳的 n. 理想；理想典范，完美典型
example: This room is ideal for quiet study.
exampleChinese: 这个房间非常适合安静学习。

meaning: n. 思想体系，意识形态
example: Her ideology shaped the party's policies.
exampleChinese: 她的思想体系影响了这个政党的政策。

meaning: adj. 完全相同的，同样的
example: The two watches are identical in every detail.
exampleChinese: 这两块手表在每个细节上都完全相同。

meaning: n. 确认，识别；⾝份证明；确定
example: The guard checked my identification.
exampleChinese: 警卫检查了我的身份识别信息。

meaning: vt. 认出，确认，识别；发现，查明 vt. 显⽰⾝份
example: We used fingerprints to identify the suspect.
exampleChinese: 我们用指纹来确认嫌疑人。

meaning: n. ⾝份，本体；特性，个性；相同
example: Please protect your identity online.
exampleChinese: 请保护你在网上的身份。

meaning: n. 期刊，杂志；报纸；⽇志，⽇记
example: She wrote about the school trip in her journal.
exampleChinese: 她把学校旅行写进了日记。

meaning: n. 记者，新闻⼯作者
example: The journalist asked many questions at the press conference.
exampleChinese: 那位新闻工作者在新闻发布会上问了很多问题。

meaning: n. 旅⾏，旅程 vi. (⻓途) 旅⾏
example: Our train journey to Beijing started early in the morning.
exampleChinese: 我们去北京的火车旅程一大早就开始了。

meaning: n. 法官；裁判员；鉴定⼈ vi. vt. 判断；担任裁判；评价，指责 vt. 估计，猜测；审理，判决
example: You should judge the result by the facts.
exampleChinese: 你应该根据事实来判断结果。

meaning: n. 看法，评价；判断⼒；判决
example: In my judgement, this is the best choice.
exampleChinese: 依我看，这是最好的选择。

meaning: adj. 审判的，司法的，法庭的
example: The court followed the judicial process carefully.
exampleChinese: 法院认真遵循了司法程序。

meaning: n. 陪审团；裁判委员会
example: The jury reached a decision after hours of discussion.
exampleChinese: 陪审团经过数小时讨论后作出了决定。

meaning: n. 司法权，管辖权；管辖区域
example: This case falls under the court's jurisdiction.
exampleChinese: 这个案件属于法院的管辖权范围。

meaning: n. 公平，正义；法官；司法制度
example: The judge spoke about justice.
exampleChinese: 法官谈到了司法公正。

meaning: vt. 证明…有理；为…辩解
example: He tried to justify his late arrival.
exampleChinese: 他试图为自己迟到辩解。

meaning: n. 标签，标牌；(不恰当的) 称谓 vt. 给…贴标签；(不公地) 把…称为
example: Please label each box with its name.
exampleChinese: 请给每个箱子贴上它的名称标签。

meaning: vi. 落后，滞后，缓慢移动 n. (两个事件) 相隔的时间
example: Our progress will lag if we stop practicing.
exampleChinese: 如果我们停止练习，进度就会落后。

meaning: adv. 在很⼤程度上，主要地，⼤半地
example: The project was largely successful.
exampleChinese: 这个项目在很大程度上是成功的。

meaning: adj. 侧⾯的，横向的，侧向的
example: The bridge has a lateral support beam.
exampleChinese: 这座桥有一根横向支撑梁。

meaning: adj. 后者的；后期的
example: I like the latter choice better.
exampleChinese: 我更喜欢后者。

meaning: n. 法律，法规；法学；警⽅；法则
example: Everyone must follow the law.
exampleChinese: 每个人都必须遵守法律。

meaning: n. 诉讼，官司
example: They filed a lawsuit against the company.
exampleChinese: 他们对这家公司提起了诉讼。

meaning: n. 巨⼤，重要性；星等；震级
example: The magnitude of the earthquake shocked everyone.
exampleChinese: 这场地震的震级震惊了所有人。

meaning: vt. 放⼤；使(问题等)加重；夸⼤
example: Do not magnify the problem before the exam.
exampleChinese: 考试前不要夸大这个问题。

meaning: adj. 宏伟的，令⼈印象深刻的
example: The palace looked magnificent at sunset.
exampleChinese: 那座宫殿在日落时看起来宏伟壮观。

meaning: vt. 维持；维修，保养；坚称；供养
example: We must maintain a clean classroom.
exampleChinese: 我们必须保持教室整洁。

meaning: n. 维护，养护；维持；赡养费
example: Regular maintenance keeps the car safe.
exampleChinese: 定期维护能让汽车保持安全。

meaning: adj. 主要的，重要的，⼤的；⼤调的 n. 少校；专业；…专业的学⽣ vi. 主修
example: She chose biology as her major in college.
exampleChinese: 她在大学选择了生物学作为专业。

meaning: n. ⼤部分，⼤多数；多数票
example: The majority of the class voted for the trip.
exampleChinese: 班上大多数人投票支持这次旅行。

meaning: vt. 做；出产；引发；使得；强迫 vlink. 成为；合计 n. 牌⼦，品牌
example: We make bread at home on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 我们星期天在家做面包。

meaning: n. 主题；主旋律；主题⾳乐 adj. 有特定主题的
example: The theme of our class project is clean energy.
exampleChinese: 我们班级项目的主题是清洁能源。

meaning: n. 理论，学说；理论基础；观点
example: Her theory explains why the plant grew so fast.
exampleChinese: 她的理论解释了这株植物为什么长得这么快。

meaning: adj. 理论的；理论上的，假设性的
example: Her idea is still only theoretical.
exampleChinese: 她的想法目前仍然只是理论上的。

meaning: n. 疗法，治疗；⼼理治疗
example: She began therapy to deal with her anxiety.
exampleChinese: 她开始接受治疗来缓解焦虑。

meaning: n. 资格证，学历；资历；合格，资格
example: She has the right qualification for the job.
exampleChinese: 她具备这份工作的合格资格。

meaning: vt. 使合格，使具备资格 vi. 取得资格 (或学历)，合格 vi. vt. (使) 有资格，(使) 有权；配得上
example: You must qualify for the exam before you can apply.
exampleChinese: 你必须先取得考试资格，才能申请。

meaning: n. 质量，品质；优质；品德；特质 adj. 优质的，⾼质量的
example: The quality of this bag is very good.
exampleChinese: 这个包的质量很好。

meaning: adj. 质量的，定性的，性质的
example: The report includes qualitative data from interviews.
exampleChinese: 这份报告包含访谈得出的定性数据。

meaning: vt. vi. 保护，保障，捍卫 n. 安全设施，保护措施
example: We added a fence to safeguard the garden.
exampleChinese: 我们加了栅栏来保护花园。

meaning: n. 安全；安全场所；保险栓
example: Road safety is important for children.
exampleChinese: 道路安全对孩子们很重要。

meaning: adj. 凶恶的；猛烈抨击的；野蛮的 n. 野蛮⼈；残暴的⼈ vt. 凶猛地攻击；激烈抨击
example: The savage wolf scared the hikers.
exampleChinese: 那只凶猛的狼吓坏了徒步旅行者。

meaning: vt. 救，救助；收集；保留；避免 vi. vt. 储蓄；节省；保存 prep. conj. 除了 n. (守⻔员的) 救球
example: We should save water every day.
exampleChinese: 我们应该每天节约用水。

meaning: n. 存款；节省下来的钱 (或物)
example: She saved her monthly saving in a bank account.
exampleChinese: 她把每月存下来的钱存进了银行账户。

meaning: n. 规模；等级；刻度；秤；鳞⽚ n. ⽐例尺；⾳阶 vt. 攀登；去鳞；改变…的⼤⼩
example: The map was drawn on a large scale.
exampleChinese: 这张地图是按大比例绘制的。

meaning: n. 现场；场⾯；景⾊；圈⼦
example: That scene in the movie made everyone laugh.
exampleChinese: 电影里的那个镜头让大家都笑了。

meaning: n. ⻛景，景⾊；舞台布景
example: We stopped to enjoy the scenery.
exampleChinese: 我们停下来欣赏风景。

meaning: n. (移动) 速度；步伐，节奏；⼀步 vi. vt. 来回踱步，⾛来⾛去 vt. 调整⾃⼰的⼯作节奏
example: He walked at a slow pace across the yard.
exampleChinese: 他以缓慢的步子穿过院子。

meaning: n. 专⻔⼩组；镶板；仪表盘 n. (⻋⾝的) ⾦属板 vt. (⽤镶板、玻璃等) 镶嵌
example: A panel of teachers chose the winner.
exampleChinese: 一个教师评审小组选出了获胜者。

meaning: n. 全景，全景图；全貌，概述
example: From the hill, we saw a panorama of the city.
exampleChinese: 从山上我们看到了城市的全景。

meaning: vt. 证明，证实；展现 vlink. 证明是，被发现是 vi. 发酵
example: Can you prove that this answer is correct?
exampleChinese: 你能证明这个答案是正确的吗？

meaning: vt. 提供；规定
example: The school will provide free lunch today.
exampleChinese: 学校今天将提供免费午餐。

meaning: conj. 如果，只要，在…条件下
example: You can go out provided you finish your homework first.
exampleChinese: 只要你先完成作业，就可以出去。

meaning: vt. vi. 调停，调解，斡旋 vt. 找到解决⽅法；调节，影响
example: The teacher will mediate the dispute between the two students.
exampleChinese: 老师会调解这两名学生之间的争执。

meaning: n. 冥想，默想；沉思，感想
example: He used meditation to calm his mind.
exampleChinese: 他通过冥想让自己平静下来。

meaning: adj. 中等的，中号的 n. 传播媒介；⼿段，⼯具；培养基
example: Radio was once a popular medium for news.
exampleChinese: 广播曾经是传播新闻的常用媒介。

meaning: n. 媒体，传播媒介
example: The media reported the news quickly.
exampleChinese: 媒体很快报道了这条新闻。

meaning: adj. 复杂的，详尽的，精⼼制作的 vi. vt. 详尽说明，详细阐述
example: She gave an elaborate explanation of the plan.
exampleChinese: 她对这个计划作了详尽的说明。

meaning: adj. 优雅的，雅致的；简洁巧妙的
example: She wore an elegant black dress.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条优雅的黑色连衣裙。

meaning: n. 要素，基本部分；元素；少量
example: Honesty is an important element of trust.
exampleChinese: 诚实是信任的重要要素。

meaning: adj. 基本的；初级的；⼩学的
example: We are learning elementary math this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期我们在学习基础数学。

meaning: vt. 消除，清除；淘汰；消灭，⼲掉
example: We must eliminate waste in the factory.
exampleChinese: 我们必须消除工厂里的浪费。

meaning: vt. 废⽌，取消
example: The government decided to abolish the old law.
exampleChinese: 政府决定废除这项旧法律。

meaning: n. 缺席，缺勤；不存在，缺乏
example: Her absence made the class feel quiet.
exampleChinese: 她的缺席让教室安静了下来。

meaning: adj. 缺席的；缺少的；⼼不在焉的 vt. 缺席，不在场 prep. 没有
example: She was absent from school yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天缺席了学校的课程。

meaning: adv. 在国外，去国外；⼴为流传地
example: Her sister studies abroad in Canada.
exampleChinese: 她姐姐在加拿大留学。

meaning: adj. 绝对的；⽆疑的；不受约束的 n. 绝对真理
example: Her confidence is absolute.
exampleChinese: 她的信心是绝对的。

meaning: vt. 吸收；理解，掌握；吞并；缓冲 vt. 吸引 (注意⼒)；承受，承担
example: Sponges absorb water quickly.
exampleChinese: 海绵会很快吸收水分。

meaning: adj. 抽象的；抽象派的 n. 摘要，梗概；抽象派艺术作品 vt. 提取，抽取；写…的摘要
example: Please read the abstract before the full report.
exampleChinese: 请先阅读摘要，再看完整报告。

meaning: n. 禁⽌，禁令 vt. 禁⽌，取缔；禁⽌ (某⼈) 做某事
example: The school will ban phones during class.
exampleChinese: 学校将禁止上课时使用手机。

meaning: n. 酒吧；吧台；⼩馆；棒；律师界 vt. 闩上 (⻔或窗)；阻挡；禁⽌ prep. 除…之外
example: This road is closed, bar emergency vehicles.
exampleChinese: 这条路封闭了，救护车等紧急车辆除外。

meaning: adj. ⾚裸的；荒芜的；基本的；空的 vt. 使暴露
example: The tree was bare in winter.
exampleChinese: 这棵树在冬天光秃秃的。

meaning: adv. 勉强才能；⼏乎不；仅仅；刚刚
example: I barely had time to eat breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我勉强有时间吃早餐。

meaning: n. 便宜货；协议，协定 vi. 讨价还价，洽谈，谈条件
example: We made a bargain for the last bike.
exampleChinese: 我们就最后一辆自行车讨价还价。

meaning: adj. 能做…的；能⼒强的，能⼲的
example: She is capable of solving the problem alone.
exampleChinese: 她有能力独自解决这个问题。

meaning: n. 容量；能⼒；职责；⽣产量
example: The room has a capacity of 50 people.
exampleChinese: 这个房间的容量是50人。

meaning: n. ⾸都；资本，资⾦；⼤写字⺟ adj. 死刑的；⼤写的
example: Beijing is the capital of China.
exampleChinese: 北京是中国的首都。

meaning: adj. 被关押的；⾮⾃愿的 n. 俘虏，囚徒
example: The bird was kept in a captive state.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟被圈养着，处于被困状态。

meaning: vt. 抓住，俘虏，捕捉；攻占，夺取 n. 捕获，攻占，夺取
example: The police capture the thief after a short chase.
exampleChinese: 警察在短暂追赶后抓住了小偷。

meaning: n. 职业，事业；职业⽣涯 vi. (失控地) 猛冲，疾驶
example: She chose teaching as her career.
exampleChinese: 她选择了教书作为自己的职业。

meaning: adj. ⼩⼼谨慎的；细⼼的，周密的
example: Be careful when you cross the street.
exampleChinese: 过马路时要小心。

meaning: n. 情况，事例；案件；论据；箱，盒
example: This case shows why practice is important.
exampleChinese: 这个事例说明了练习为什么重要。

meaning: vt. 扔，抛；向…投以；投射；选⻆ vt. 投 (票)；浇铸 vi. vt. 投 (钓线)，抛 (钓钩) n. 全体演员；铸造品；⽯膏绷带
example: She cast the ball into the basket.
exampleChinese: 她把球投进了篮里。

meaning: adj. 随意的；⾮正式的；临时的 n. 便装，便鞋；临时⼯
example: He likes casual clothes on weekends.
exampleChinese: 他周末喜欢穿休闲服。

meaning: n. 伤亡⼈员；受害者；急诊室
example: The ambulance took the casualty to the hospital.
exampleChinese: 救护车把伤员送到了医院。

meaning: vt. 接住，抓住；逮捕；赶上；得病 vi. vt. 被绊住；烧着 n. 接 (球等)；总捕获量；扣件
example: Can you catch the ball for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我接住这个球吗？

meaning: n. 种类，类别
example: This book fits into one category.
exampleChinese: 这本书属于一个类别。

meaning: vi. vt. 提供饮⻝，承办酒席 vi. 满⾜，迎合
example: The school will cater to students' needs during lunch.
exampleChinese: 学校会在午餐时满足学生的需求。

meaning: n. 原因；理由；事业；诉讼案 vt. 导致，使发⽣
example: Too much rain can cause flooding.
exampleChinese: 过多的雨水会引起洪水。

meaning: n. ⼩⼼，谨慎；警告，告诫 vi. vt. 警告，告诫，提醒
example: Please use caution when crossing the road.
exampleChinese: 过马路时请小心。

meaning: adj. 谨慎的，慎重的，⼩⼼的
example: Be cautious when you cross the busy street.
exampleChinese: 过繁忙的街道时要谨慎。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 停⽌
example: Please cease talking during the lesson.
exampleChinese: 请在上课时停止讲话。

meaning: vi. vt. 祝贺，庆贺 vt. 主持 (宗教仪式)；颂扬，赞美
example: We will celebrate her birthday tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们今晚要庆祝她的生日。

meaning: n. 名⼈，明星；名声，名⽓
example: The celebrity signed autographs for fans.
exampleChinese: 这位名人为粉丝们签了名。

meaning: n. 仪式，典礼；礼数，客套
example: The ceremony began at ten o'clock.
exampleChinese: 典礼在十点开始。

meaning: adj. 必然的；确信的；某个；⼀点 pron. 某些
example: A certain student left this notebook here.
exampleChinese: 某个学生把这本笔记本落在这里了。

meaning: n. 确实，确定性；必然的事
example: There is no certainty that the train will arrive on time.
exampleChinese: 火车是否会准时到达，没有确定性。

meaning: n. 证明，证书；结业证书
example: The school will certificate the course completion.
exampleChinese: 学校将发给这门课程的结业证书。

meaning: vt. 证明，证实；授予专业合格证书
example: The school will certify that she completed the course.
exampleChinese: 学校将证明她完成了这门课程。

meaning: n. 下降，减少；衰退，恶化 vi. 下降，减少；衰退，恶化 vi. vt. 婉拒，谢绝
example: There was a decline in train delays this month.
exampleChinese: 本月火车晚点有所下降。

meaning: vi. vt. 减少，降低 n. 减少，降低
example: There was a sharp decrease in sales last month.
exampleChinese: 上个月销售额大幅下降。

meaning: n. 法令，政令；判决，裁定 vt. vi. 判决，颁布
example: The king issued a decree to lower taxes.
exampleChinese: 国王颁布了一项减税的法令。

meaning: vt. 认为，视为，相信
example: We deem the plan safe and practical.
exampleChinese: 我们认为这个计划安全可行。

meaning: vt. 献⾝，致⼒于；将 (书等) 献给
example: She decided to dedicate her life to teaching.
exampleChinese: 她决定献身于教育事业。

meaning: vt. 推断，推理，演绎
example: From these clues, we can deduce the answer.
exampleChinese: 根据这些线索，我们可以推断出答案。

meaning: vt. (从总量中) 扣除，减去
example: The store will deduct the discount from your bill.
exampleChinese: 商店会从你的账单中扣除折扣金额。

meaning: n. 时尚；流⾏款式；时装业；⽅式 vt. 制作，塑造
example: This dress is out of fashion now.
exampleChinese: 这条裙子现在不流行了。

meaning: adj. 流⾏的，时尚的；有钱⼈光顾的
example: Her dress looked very fashionable at the party.
exampleChinese: 她在聚会上穿的连衣裙很时尚。

meaning: n. 帮助，恩惠；赞同，⽀持；偏爱 vt. 更喜欢；偏爱；有利于
example: She has a favour for quiet music.
exampleChinese: 她偏爱安静的音乐。

meaning: adj. 赞成的；讨⼈喜欢的；有利的
example: The new park received favourable reviews from local families.
exampleChinese: 这个新公园得到了当地家庭的好评。

meaning: adj. 最喜欢的，最喜爱的 n. 最喜欢的⼈或物；受宠的⼈
example: This is my favourite book of all.
exampleChinese: 这是我最喜欢的一本书。

meaning: vi. 坐；坐落在，被放在；担任 vt. 使坐，使就座 vt. vi. 参加考试
example: Please sit by the window.
exampleChinese: 请坐在窗边。

meaning: n. 场所，地点；⼯地；⽹站 vt. 使坐落于，为…选址
example: The new library site is near the river.
exampleChinese: 新图书馆的选址在河边附近。

meaning: vt. 使坐落于，使位于；将…置于
example: The company will situate its office in the city center.
exampleChinese: 公司将把办公室设在市中心。

meaning: n. 情况，形势；位置，环境；⼯作
example: I do not understand the situation yet.
exampleChinese: 我还不明白这种情况。

meaning: n. ⻣骼；(建筑等的) 框架；梗概
example: The skeleton of the old bridge still stood after the fire.
exampleChinese: 大火过后，旧桥的骨架仍然矗立着。

meaning: adj. 表⽰怀疑的，持怀疑态度的
example: She was skeptical about the new plan.
exampleChinese: 她对这个新计划持怀疑态度。

meaning: n. 素描，草图；简报，概述；⼩品 vt. vi. 画素描，画速写 vt. 概述，简述
example: He made a quick sketch of the house.
exampleChinese: 他给这栋房子画了一张速写。

meaning: vi. vt. 拥抱 vt. 欣然接受；包括 n. 拥抱；接受，信奉
example: She gave her son a quick embrace before he left.
exampleChinese: 在他离开前，她快速拥抱了儿子一下。

meaning: vt. 使…嵌⼊；派遣 (战地记者)
example: The report will embed the photos in the text.
exampleChinese: 这份报告会把照片嵌入正文中。

meaning: vt. 使具体化，体现；收录，包括
example: Her actions embody the school’s values.
exampleChinese: 她的行为体现了这所学校的价值观。

meaning: n. 胚胎
example: The embryo began to form after the egg was fertilized.
exampleChinese: 受精后，胚胎开始形成。

meaning: vt. 引出，诱出，套出
example: The teacher asked a question to elicit a clear answer.
exampleChinese: 老师提了一个问题，以引出明确的回答。

meaning: n. 精英，上层⼈⼠ adj. 精英的，精锐的
example: Only the elite students were chosen for the science team.
exampleChinese: 只有精英学生被选入科学队。

meaning: adv. 在别处，去别处
example: We may have to eat lunch elsewhere today.
exampleChinese: 我们今天可能得在别处吃午饭。

meaning: n. ⼝渴；渴求 vi. 渴求
example: He has a thirst for knowledge.
exampleChinese: 他对知识有强烈的渴望。

meaning: adj. 全⾯的，彻底的；(⼈) 仔细的
example: Please read the instructions carefully and be thorough.
exampleChinese: 请仔细阅读说明，并做到彻底。

meaning: conj. 尽管，虽然 conj. adv. 可是，然⽽
example: The coat is old, though it still looks nice.
exampleChinese: 这件外套虽然旧了，可是看起来仍然不错。

meaning: n. 想法，主意；⼼思；思考；关⼼
example: That thought made me smile.
exampleChinese: 那个想法让我笑了。

meaning: adj. 沉思的；体贴的；深思熟虑的
example: She gave me a thoughtful reply to my letter.
exampleChinese: 她对我的来信给出了一个深思熟虑的回复。

meaning: n. 威胁；坏事发⽣的可能
example: The storm is a threat to boats near the coast.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴对海岸附近的船只构成威胁。

meaning: vt. 威胁；危害到 vi. vt. (坏事) 可能发⽣，可能引发
example: Dark clouds threaten rain before sunset.
exampleChinese: 乌云使日落前有下雨的可能。

meaning: vt. 更新，升级；提供最新消息 n. 更新，升级；最新消息
example: The city needs an update to its old roads.
exampleChinese: 这座城市需要对老旧道路进行现代化改造。

meaning: vt. 升级；提拔 n. 改善，升级
example: The school will upgrade its computer lab this year.
exampleChinese: 学校今年将升级电脑实验室。

meaning: vt. ⽀持，维护；维持 (原判)
example: The court decided to uphold the original ruling.
exampleChinese: 法院决定维持原判。

meaning: adj. 难过的，⼼烦的；肠胃不适的 vt. 使烦恼；打乱；使 (肠胃) 不适 n. 意外结果，冷⻔；肠胃病；苦恼
example: She felt upset after losing her keys.
exampleChinese: 丢了钥匙后，她感到很苦恼。

meaning: adj. 新式的；掌握最新信息的
example: Please check the up-to-date news before the meeting.
exampleChinese: 开会前请查看最新消息。

meaning: vt. 使…通⻛；公开表达，公开讨论
example: Open the window to ventilate the room.
exampleChinese: 打开窗户给房间通风。

meaning: n. (有⻛险的) 投资活动，企业 vi. 冒险去某地 vt. 试探地说 (或做)
example: He made a small venture into online selling.
exampleChinese: 他尝试着做了一项在线销售的小生意。

meaning: adj. 普遍的，⼴泛的
example: The disease is now widespread in the region.
exampleChinese: 这种疾病现在在该地区很普遍。

meaning: vi. vt. 赢，获胜 vt. 赢得，获得 n. 赢，胜利
example: Our team hopes to win the final game.
exampleChinese: 我们队希望赢得最后一场比赛。

meaning: n. 机智⻛趣 (的⼈)；头脑；明智
example: The speaker answered the question with wit.
exampleChinese: 演讲者机智地回答了这个问题。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 撤回，撤离；(使) 退出 vt. 收回，撤销；取 (款)；停⽌供应 vi. 不与⼈交往
example: The soldiers had to withdraw before nightfall.
exampleChinese: 士兵们不得不在天黑前撤退。

meaning: n. ⽬击者；(出庭的) 证⼈；⻅证⼈ vt. ⽬击，⽬睹；⻅证；连署
example: She was a witness to the accident.
exampleChinese: 她是那起事故的目击者。

meaning: vt. 使正式就任；为…举⾏落成仪式 vt. 开创
example: They will inaugurate the new library next Monday.
exampleChinese: 他们将于下周一为新图书馆举行落成仪式。

meaning: n. 激励，动机，刺激
example: A good grade can be an incentive to study harder.
exampleChinese: 好成绩可以成为更努力学习的激励。

meaning: n. 发⽣ (率)
example: The incidence of colds rises in winter.
exampleChinese: 感冒的发生率在冬天会上升。

meaning: n. 事件；(两国间的) 冲突
example: The fire was a serious incident.
exampleChinese: 那场火灾是一起严重的事件。

meaning: adv. 顺便提⼀下；偶然地，附带地
example: Incidentally, I saw your sister at the station.
exampleChinese: 顺便提一下，我在车站看见你姐姐了。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 倾向；(使) 倾斜 vt. 点 (头) n. 斜坡，斜⾯
example: I incline to agree with your idea.
exampleChinese: 我倾向于同意你的想法。

meaning: adj. 学术的；纯理论的；学习好的 n. 学者，⼤学教师
example: She is an academic who teaches history.
exampleChinese: 她是一位教授历史的大学教师。

meaning: n. 学院；学会，研究院
example: My sister studies at an academy.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐在一所学院学习。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 加快 vi. (⻋辆等) 加速
example: The engine will accelerate the car quickly.
exampleChinese: 发动机会让汽车迅速加速。

meaning: vi. vt. 接受，同意 vt. 认可；承担；容忍；接纳
example: He was happy to accept the gift.
exampleChinese: 他很高兴接受这份礼物。

meaning: n. 接受；认可，赞同；接纳
example: Her acceptance into the club made her very happy.
exampleChinese: 她被俱乐部接纳让她非常高兴。

meaning: n. 进⼊ (权)，通道；使⽤权 vt. 访问，存取；进⼊
example: Students can access the library with their cards.
exampleChinese: 学生可以用卡进入图书馆。

meaning: n. 配件，附属品；配饰；帮凶
example: This phone accessory is very useful.
exampleChinese: 这个手机配件很有用。

meaning: vi. vt. 开始
example: The class will begin at eight o'clock.
exampleChinese: 八点钟开始上课。

meaning: n. 开头，开始部分；起源，初期
example: The beginning of the movie was very exciting.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的开头非常精彩。

meaning: n. 代表 (某⼈)；为了…的利益
example: She spoke on behalf of her class.
exampleChinese: 她代表全班发言。

meaning: vi. 表现；产⽣⾃然反应，发⽣作⽤ vi. vt. 举⽌得体，有礼貌 vt. 表现得…的
example: Please behave well in the library.
exampleChinese: 请在图书馆里表现得规矩一些。

meaning: n. ⾏为，举⽌；表现⽅式
example: Good behaviour is important at school.
exampleChinese: 在学校里，良好的行为很重要。

meaning: n. 信念；信任；信仰
example: She has a strong belief in hard work.
exampleChinese: 她坚信努力工作。

meaning: vt. 相信 vi. vt. 认为 vi. 有宗教信仰
example: I believe my best friend.
exampleChinese: 我信任我最好的朋友。

meaning: vi. 属于；应在 (某处)；能适应
example: This blue bag does not belong to me.
exampleChinese: 这个蓝色的包不属于我。

meaning: adj. 有益的，有利的
example: Regular exercise is beneficial to our health.
exampleChinese: 经常锻炼对我们的健康是有益的。

meaning: n. 好处；救济⾦；福利；慈善活动 vt. vi. 使受益，得益于
example: Exercise can benefit your health.
exampleChinese: 锻炼能有益于你的健康。

meaning: adj. 仁慈的，慈爱的
example: The benevolent doctor treated every patient with kindness.
exampleChinese: 那位仁慈的医生善待每一位病人。

meaning: adj. 和善的；良性的；⽆害的；宜⼈的
example: The doctor said the tumor was benign.
exampleChinese: 医生说这个肿瘤是良性的。

meaning: n. 挑战，艰巨任务；质疑 vt. 质疑；向…发出挑战
example: Climbing the mountain was a real challenge.
exampleChinese: 爬这座山是真正的挑战。

meaning: n. 机会；可能性；⻛险；偶然 vt. 冒险，拿…去冒⻛险 vi. 偶然发⽣，碰巧
example: This job gives me a chance to learn new skills.
exampleChinese: 这份工作给了我学习新技能的机会。

meaning: vi. 改变，变化 vt. vi. (使) 变换；换⾐服；换乘 vt. 使不同；转换；替代；互换 n. 改变，变化；替代；零钱
example: A new haircut can change your look.
exampleChinese: 一个新发型可以改变你的样子。

meaning: n. 频道；途径，渠道；海峡；⽔渠 vt. 为…输送 (资⾦等)；输送，传送
example: The teacher tried to channel her energy into study.
exampleChinese: 老师试着把她的精力引导到学习上。

meaning: n. 性格；⻆⾊；特点；字符；名誉
example: Her kind character makes everyone trust her.
exampleChinese: 她善良的性格让大家都信任她。

meaning: vt. 是…的特征；描绘，描述，刻画
example: The author characterise the hero as calm and brave.
exampleChinese: 作者把这位英雄刻画得冷静而勇敢。

meaning: n. 特⾊，特点 adj. 典型的，独特的，特有的
example: Patience is a characteristic of a good teacher.
exampleChinese: 耐心是好老师的一个特征。

meaning: vt. vi. 防御，保卫；防守；为被告辩护 vt. 为…辩护；卫冕
example: We must defend the park from pollution.
exampleChinese: 我们必须保护这个公园免受污染。

meaning: vt. 给…下定义；阐明，界定
example: Can you define this word for me?
exampleChinese: 你能给我给这个词下个定义吗？

meaning: adj. 确定的；清楚的；肯定的 n. 确定的事 (或⼈)
example: I am almost definite about the meeting time.
exampleChinese: 我对会议时间几乎是肯定的。

meaning: n. 定义，释义；清晰，分明
example: The definition of the term was clear and simple.
exampleChinese: 这个术语的定义清楚而简单。

meaning: vt. 违抗，违反；难以 (描述、解释等)
example: Some students defy the school rules.
exampleChinese: 有些学生违抗校规。

meaning: n. 度；程度；学位
example: Water freezes at zero degree Celsius.
exampleChinese: 水在零摄氏度结冰。

meaning: n. 延误，耽搁的时间；延期，延迟 vi. vt. 推迟，使延期 vt. 使延误，使耽搁
example: Please delay the meeting until Friday.
exampleChinese: 请把会议延期到周五。

meaning: adj. 故意的；(动作) 从容的 vi. vt. 慎重考虑
example: She made a deliberate decision to stay home.
exampleChinese: 她故意作出了留在家里的决定。

meaning: adj. 微妙的；易受损的；精美的 adj. (仪器等) 精密的；柔弱的
example: The teacher asked a delicate question.
exampleChinese: 老师问了一个微妙的问题。

meaning: vt. vi. 递送，传送；履⾏，兑现 vt. 发表 (讲话)；交与；接⽣；分娩
example: We will deliver the package this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我们今天下午会投递这个包裹。

meaning: n. 递送 (之物)；分娩；发⾔⽅式
example: The delivery arrived on time this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上送来的货准时到了。

meaning: n. ⼩说；虚构之事，幻想
example: She likes reading historical fiction at night.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢在晚上读历史小说。

meaning: n. ⽥，地；领域；运动场；实地 vi. 担任守队 (队员) vt. 使参加竞选；处理，应付
example: She wants to work in the medical field.
exampleChinese: 她想在医疗领域工作。

meaning: adj. 凶猛的；激烈的；(天⽓) 猛烈的
example: The fierce dog barked at the gate.
exampleChinese: 那只凶猛的狗在大门口叫。

meaning: vt. vi. 战⽃；打架；⽃争；努⼒争取 vi. 争辩；奋⼒抵抗，还击 n. 打架；⽃争；竞赛；争吵
example: The two boys started a fight over the ball.
exampleChinese: 那两个男孩因为球打了起来。

meaning: n. 数字；算术；⼈物；⼈影；⾝材 n. 塑像；(书中的) 图表 vt. 认为，以为；计算 vt. vi. 弄懂，弄清楚
example: I can't figure the answer without a calculator.
exampleChinese: 没有计算器，我算不出答案。

meaning: n. 财政，⾦融；资⾦；财务状况 vt. 给…提供资⾦，资助
example: My parents finance my college education.
exampleChinese: 我的父母负担我的大学教育费用。

meaning: adj. 财政的，⾦融的，财务的
example: The company faced serious financial trouble.
exampleChinese: 这家公司面临严重的财政问题。

meaning: n. 研究结果，发现；判决
example: The new finding surprised the researchers.
exampleChinese: 这项新发现让研究人员感到惊讶。

meaning: adj. 有尽的，有限的
example: Our supply of water is finite.
exampleChinese: 我们的水资源是有限的。

meaning: n. 公司，商⾏，事务所 adj. 坚硬的；牢固的；坚定的 vt. 使强壮，使坚固 vi. 回升，稳步上涨
example: He works for a small law firm downtown.
exampleChinese: 他在市中心一家小律师事务所工作。

meaning: det. ord. 第⼀；最重要的，⾸要的 adv. ⾸先，第⼀；⾸次，第⼀次 n. 第⼀个⼈ (或事)；空前的成就
example: Wash your hands first.
exampleChinese: 先洗手。

meaning: vi. vt. 适合，合⾝；可容纳；符合 vt. 试穿；安装；使适合 (某⼯作) adj. 健壮的，健康的；适合的 n. (癫痫等的)发作；⼀阵；匹配
example: This key does not fit the door.
exampleChinese: 这把钥匙打不开这扇门。

meaning: adj. 全球的；全⾯的，整体的
example: The disease has become a global problem.
exampleChinese: 这种疾病已经成了全球性问题。

meaning: n. 地球，世界；地球仪；球状物
example: The globe showed every country in the world.
exampleChinese: 这个地球仪展示了世界上的每个国家。

meaning: vt. 放弃；抛弃；沉湎于 n. 放任，放纵
example: The family had to abandon the old house.
exampleChinese: 这家人不得不放弃那座旧房子。

meaning: vi. 遵守，遵从；逗留，居住 vt. 忍受，忍耐
example: We must abide by the class rules.
exampleChinese: 我们必须遵守课堂规则。

meaning: n. 能⼒；才能，本领
example: Her ability to draw surprised us.
exampleChinese: 她的绘画能力让我们很惊讶。

meaning: adj. 能做…的；有才⼲的
example: She is able to swim well.
exampleChinese: 她会游泳，而且游得很好。

meaning: adj. 不正常的，反常的
example: The doctor said the test result was abnormal.
exampleChinese: 医生说这个检测结果是反常的。

meaning: n. 背景；后景；背景⾳；底⾊
example: The mountains look beautiful in the background.
exampleChinese: 背景中的群山看起来很美。

meaning: n. 平衡，均衡；余额；债务余款 vi. vt. (使) 保持平衡；相抵，抵消 vt. 使均衡；权衡；结平 (账⽬)
example: She tried to balance the box on her head.
exampleChinese: 她试着把盒子稳稳地顶在头上。

meaning: n. 底部；基础，根据；基地；垒；碱 vt. 以…为基地；以…为基础 adj. 卑鄙的，⽆耻的
example: A good diet is the base of health.
exampleChinese: 良好的饮食是健康的基础。

meaning: n. 地下室
example: The old boxes are stored in the basement.
exampleChinese: 这些旧盒子存放在地下室里。

meaning: adj. 基本的；最简单的；最重要的
example: We learned the basic rules first.
exampleChinese: 我们先学了基本规则。

meaning: n. 基础，要素；⽅式；根据，依据
example: Practice is the basis of good writing.
exampleChinese: 练习是写好文章的基础。

meaning: vt. 计算，核算；预测，推测
example: Can you calculate the total cost for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我计算一下总费用吗？

meaning: vt. 把…称为；认为…是；打电话叫 vi. vt. ⼤声呼叫；召唤；给…打电话 n. 通话；叫喊；短暂拜访；呼吁
example: Please call me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家时请给我打电话。

meaning: adj. 平静的；⻛平浪静的；⽆⻛的 vt. 使平静，使镇静 n. 平静，宁静；冷静
example: She stayed calm during the test.
exampleChinese: 考试时她保持镇定。

meaning: n. (社会、政治) 运动，活动；战役 vi. vt. 发起运动，开展活动
example: The students will campaign for cleaner parks.
exampleChinese: 学生们将参加清洁公园的活动。

meaning: n. 候选⼈，申请⼈；考⽣
example: The candidate answered every question clearly.
exampleChinese: 候选人清楚地回答了每个问题。

meaning: n. 资料，数据
example: The data show a clear increase in sales.
exampleChinese: 数据表明销售额明显增长。

meaning: n. 数据库
example: The teacher stored the grades in a database.
exampleChinese: 老师把成绩存储在数据库里。

meaning: n. ⽇期；时候；约会 (对象)；海枣 vt. 写上⽇期；确定年代 vt. vi. 与 (某⼈) 谈恋爱
example: Please write the date at the top of the page.
exampleChinese: 请把日期写在页面顶部。

meaning: vt. vi. (强光) 使⽬眩，使眼花 vt. 使倾倒，使惊叹 n. 令⼈赞叹的东西 (或品质)
example: The bright lights dazzle my eyes.
exampleChinese: 明亮的灯光使我的眼睛发花。

meaning: n. ⼤量，很多；交易，协议；待遇 vi. 处理，对付；与…做⽣意；涉及 vi. vt. 发牌；⾮法买卖毒品，贩毒
example: I can deal with this problem myself.
exampleChinese: 我可以自己处理这个问题。

meaning: n. 商⼈；毒品贩⼦；发牌⼈
example: The dealer sold us a used bike.
exampleChinese: 那个商人卖给了我们一辆二手自行车。

meaning: n. 辩论，讨论，争论 vt. vi. 辩论，讨论，争论；考虑，盘算
example: The students will debate the issue tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 学生们明天将就这个问题进行辩论。

meaning: n. ⼗年
example: A decade passed before the town changed.
exampleChinese: 十年过去了，这个镇才发生变化。

meaning: vt. vi. 决定；裁定 vt. 使…下定决⼼
example: We need to decide before Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在星期五之前决定。

meaning: n. 决定；决断⼒；作出决定
example: It was a hard decision to leave home.
exampleChinese: 离开家是一个很难的决定。

meaning: adj. 决定性的，关键的；果断的
example: Her quick answer was decisive.
exampleChinese: 她迅速的回答是关键性的。

meaning: vt. 装饰；装修；授予…勋章
example: We decorate the classroom with paper flowers.
exampleChinese: 我们用纸花装饰教室。

meaning: adj. 经济的；有利可图的
example: The country needs more economic growth.
exampleChinese: 这个国家需要更多的经济增长。

meaning: adj. 经济的，省钱的，节约的
example: This car is very economical to run.
exampleChinese: 这辆车的使用成本很低，很省钱。

meaning: n. 经济学；经济状况
example: He is studying economics at university.
exampleChinese: 他正在大学里学习经济学。

meaning: n. 经济；经济体；节约
example: The local economy is improving slowly.
exampleChinese: 当地经济正在缓慢改善。

meaning: vt. 教育；教导，培养
example: Good teachers educate students with patience.
exampleChinese: 好老师耐心地教育学生。

meaning: n. 教育，培训；教育学
example: Good education can change a child's future.
exampleChinese: 良好的教育可以改变孩子的未来。

meaning: n. 影响，结果；特效，效果；财产 vt. 引起，使发⽣
example: The new bridge had a big effect on traffic.
exampleChinese: 这座新桥对交通有很大影响。

meaning: adj. 有效的；⽣效的；实际的
example: This medicine is effective against the flu.
exampleChinese: 这种药对流感很有效。

meaning: adj. 效率⾼的
example: Our new printer is more efficient than the old one.
exampleChinese: 我们的新打印机比旧的更高效。

meaning: n. 效率，效能
example: Good efficiency helps the team finish work on time.
exampleChinese: 高效率有助于团队按时完成工作。

meaning: n. 努⼒，⼒⽓；特别⾏动
example: Your effort will bring good results.
exampleChinese: 你的努力会带来好结果。

meaning: n. 织物，布料；结构，构造
example: Her dress is made of soft blue fabric.
exampleChinese: 她的连衣裙是用柔软的蓝色布料做的。

meaning: vt. 捏造，编造；制造，⽣产
example: They did not fabricate the story.
exampleChinese: 他们没有捏造这个故事。

meaning: n. 脸；⾯部表情；表⾯；钟⾯ vt. vi. ⾯对，⾯向 vt. ⾯临；正视；对付
example: The windows face the park.
exampleChinese: 这些窗户朝向公园。

example: We discussed every facet of the problem.
exampleChinese: 我们讨论了这个问题的每个方面。

meaning: n. 因素，要素；因⼦，因数；倍数 vt. 把…因素包括进去
example: Price is only one factor in this choice.
exampleChinese: 价格只是这个选择中的一个因素。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 褪⾊，(使) 变暗淡 vi. 逐渐消失
example: The colors on the old poster fade in the sun.
exampleChinese: 那张旧海报上的颜色在阳光下褪色了。

meaning: vi. vt. 失败；不及格 vi. 未做；出故障；衰退；倒闭 vt. 使失望，有负于 n. 不及格
example: Don't fail the test because of carelessness.
exampleChinese: 不要因为粗心而考试不及格。

meaning: n. 失败；失败者；未做；故障
example: Her failure taught her to try again.
exampleChinese: 她的失败教会了她再次尝试。

meaning: adj. 公平的；相当⼤的；不错的 adj. 浅⾊的；晴朗的；美丽的 n. 展销会；露天游乐场；集市 adv. 按照规则，公平合理地
example: Our teacher is fair to every student.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师对每个学生都很公平。

meaning: adv. 相当地；公正地；简直
example: She was fairly tired after the trip.
exampleChinese: 旅行后她相当累。

meaning: vi. 落下；跌倒；下跌；沦陷；发⽣ n. 下落；减少；沦陷；瀑布；秋季
example: Leaves fall from the trees in autumn.
exampleChinese: 秋天树叶从树上落下。

meaning: n. 粉丝，狂热爱好者；⻛扇；扇⼦ vt. 扇 (⻛)；煽起，激起
example: My sister is a big fan of that actor.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是那位演员的忠实粉丝。

meaning: adj. 花哨的；精致的；奢华的 vt. 想要，想做；爱慕；⾃负；认为 vi. vt. 真没想到，竟然 n. 想象；想要，爱好
example: I fancy a quiet walk after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我想象着去安静地散步。

meaning: vt. vi. 使着迷，迷住
example: The old castle can fascinate visitors for hours.
exampleChinese: 这座古堡能让游客着迷几个小时。

meaning: vt. 获得，赢得；增加；到达 vt. vi. 受益；增值 n. 增加；好处；利润
example: She worked hard to gain confidence before the speech.
exampleChinese: 她在演讲前努力获得自信。

meaning: vi. vt. 赌博；冒险，以…为赌注 n. 冒险，赌博
example: He will not gamble with his health.
exampleChinese: 他不会拿自己的健康冒险。

meaning: n. 缝隙；(时间) 间隔；差距；漏洞
example: There is a wide gap between the two scores.
exampleChinese: 这两个分数之间有很大的差距。

meaning: n. 基因
example: This gene helps determine eye color.
exampleChinese: 这个基因有助于决定眼睛的颜色。

meaning: adj. 普遍的，总的；通常的；⼤概的 adj. 泛的；⾸席的，总管的 n. 将军
example: This is a general answer to a common question.
exampleChinese: 这是对一个常见问题的一般回答。

meaning: vi. 概括，归纳 vt. 普及，扩⼤…的运⽤
example: From these results, we can generalize a simple rule.
exampleChinese: 根据这些结果，我们可以归纳出一条简单的规则。

meaning: n. 习惯；(对毒品、烟酒的) 瘾
example: Reading every day is a good habit.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读是一个好习惯。

meaning: n. 栖息地，⽣⻓地
example: The panda's natural habitat is the bamboo forest.
exampleChinese: 熊猫的自然栖息地是竹林。

meaning: vt. 妨碍，阻碍 n. ⻝品盒；脏⾐篓
example: Strong winds can hamper rescue work.
exampleChinese: 强风会妨碍救援工作。

meaning: n. ⽣理缺陷，残疾；障碍，阻碍 vt. 妨碍，阻碍
example: The injury became a handicap in daily life.
exampleChinese: 这次受伤成了日常生活中的一个障碍。

meaning: n. 盾牌；掩护物；护罩；盾形奖牌 vt. 保护
example: A helmet can shield your head from injury.
exampleChinese: 头盔可以保护你的头部免受伤害。

meaning: vi. vt. 转移，挪动；换 (挡) vi. (情况等) 改变 vt. 改变观点 (态度等)；推卸 (责任) n. 改变，转变；轮班 (职⼯)
example: We will shift the desks to the other side of the room.
exampleChinese: 我们会把桌子搬到教室的另一边。

meaning: n. 肩膀；⾐肩；⼭肩；路肩 vt. 承担，负担；背，扛 vt. vi. 挤，闯
example: She carried the bag on her shoulder.
exampleChinese: 她把包扛在肩膀上。

meaning: vt. 出⽰；表明；教，演⽰；带领 vi. vt. 流露出；露出；展览，上映 vi. 出现，露⾯ n. 演出；电视节⽬；展览会；假象
example: These numbers show the result clearly.
exampleChinese: 这些数字清楚地显示了结果。

meaning: n. 浴室，淋浴器；淋浴；阵⾬ vi. (洗) 淋浴 vt. ⼤量地给
example: I take a shower every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上都洗淋浴。

meaning: n. 魅⼒，吸引⼒
example: The old movie still has a lot of glamour.
exampleChinese: 这部老电影仍然很有魅力。

meaning: vt. 产⽣，引起；发电，产⽣ (能量)
example: These panels generate electricity from sunlight.
exampleChinese: 这些面板利用阳光发电。

meaning: n. ⼀代；产⽣
example: My grandmother's generation lived through hard times.
exampleChinese: 我祖母那一代人经历过艰难岁月。

meaning: n. 发电机；发⽣器，⽣成器
example: The generator kept the lights on during the blackout.
exampleChinese: 停电时，发电机让灯继续亮着。

meaning: adj. 慷慨的；⼤量的；宽宏⼤量的
example: She was generous and shared her lunch with me.
exampleChinese: 她很大方，把午饭分给了我。

meaning: n. 天才⼈物；天才，天赋；本领
example: She is a genius at solving math problems.
exampleChinese: 她在解决数学题方面是个天才。

meaning: n. 礼物；天赋，才能 vt. 赠送
example: This gift is for your birthday.
exampleChinese: 这份礼物是送给你生日的。

meaning: n. (⽂学、艺术作品的) 类型，体裁
example: This novel belongs to the detective genre.
exampleChinese: 这部小说属于侦探题材。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，伟⼤的 n. 巨⼈，巨兽；⼤公司；伟⼈
example: The giant tree stood in the middle of the yard.
exampleChinese: 这棵巨树矗立在院子中央。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，庞⼤的
example: The museum has a gigantic dinosaur model.
exampleChinese: 博物馆里有一个巨大的恐龙模型。

meaning: vt. 给；提供；⽀付；举办；使产⽣ vt. vi. 赠送；捐赠
example: I want to give my teacher a thank-you card.
exampleChinese: 我想送给老师一张感谢卡。

meaning: vi. 发⽣，出现 vlink. 碰巧，恰好
example: Accidents can happen at any time.
exampleChinese: 事故可能在任何时候发生。

meaning: n. 伤害，损害 vt. 伤害，损害
example: The fall caused no harm.
exampleChinese: 这次摔倒没有造成伤害。

meaning: n. 融洽，和睦；和声；和谐，协调
example: Good communication brings harmony to a team.
exampleChinese: 良好的沟通能给团队带来协调。

meaning: adj. 严厉的；恶劣的；刺⽿的
example: The teacher gave us a harsh warning.
exampleChinese: 老师严厉地警告了我们。

meaning: n. ⽆知，愚昧
example: His ignorance of the rules caused trouble.
exampleChinese: 他对规则的无知引起了麻烦。

meaning: adj. ⽆知的，愚昧的，不知情的
example: Do not be ignorant of the safety rules.
exampleChinese: 不要对安全规则一无所知。

meaning: vt. 不理，忽视
example: The judge may ignore the case if it lacks evidence.
exampleChinese: 如果缺乏证据，法官可能会驳回这起诉讼。

meaning: adj. 患病的，不适的；坏的，有害的 adv. 恶劣地；差劲地 n. 问题，弊端，疾病
example: He stayed home because he was ill.
exampleChinese: 他因为生病而待在家里。

meaning: n. 病，疾病，患病期
example: His illness kept him in bed.
exampleChinese: 他的病让他卧床不起。

meaning: n. 错觉，幻想，错误观念；假象
example: It was only an illusion, not real magic.
exampleChinese: 那只是错觉，不是真正的魔法。

meaning: vt. 说明，阐明；给…加插图；表明
example: The picture can illustrate the main idea clearly.
exampleChinese: 这幅图可以清楚地阐明中心思想。

meaning: n. 插图；例证，实例；说明，图解
example: The chart is a useful illustration of the process.
exampleChinese: 这张图表很好地说明了这个过程。

meaning: n. 图像；画像；形象；印象
example: The artist drew an image of the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 这位画家画了一座旧桥的图像。

meaning: vt. vi. 想象；猜想，猜测 vt. 胡思乱想，误以为
example: Can you imagine life without the internet?
exampleChinese: 你能想像没有互联网的生活吗？

meaning: adj. 想象中的，虚构的
example: The story was about an imaginary friend.
exampleChinese: 这个故事是关于一个想象中的朋友的。

meaning: n. 想象⼒；想象，幻想；创造⼒
example: Children use imagination to create new games.
exampleChinese: 孩子们用想象力来创造新游戏。

meaning: adj. 有想象⼒的，有独创性的
example: Her imaginative idea solved the problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 她有创造性的想法很快解决了问题。

meaning: vt. (为逗乐) 模仿；仿效，模拟
example: The monkey seemed to imitate the man's walk.
exampleChinese: 那只猴子似乎在模仿那个人走路。

meaning: n. 模仿，效仿；仿制品；滑稽模仿
example: The toy is only an imitation of the real one.
exampleChinese: 这个玩具只是仿制真品。

meaning: vt. vi. 带路；领导；通往；处于⾸位 vi. 导致，造成 (后果) vt. 使得出 (观点)；过 (某种⽣活) n. 铅；领先地位；超前量；范例
example: She took the lead in the class project.
exampleChinese: 她在班级项目中起了带头作用。

meaning: n. 领导地位；领导才能；领导层
example: Good leadership can help a team stay united.
exampleChinese: 良好的领导才能可以帮助团队保持团结。

meaning: adj. 最重要的，最好的；领先的
example: She played a leading role in the school drama.
exampleChinese: 她在学校戏剧中扮演了一个主要角色。

meaning: adj. 法律的，法律⽅⾯的；合法的
example: Is this action legal in your country?
exampleChinese: 这种行为在你的国家合法吗？

meaning: n. 法律，法规；⽴法
example: The new legislation will protect workers better.
exampleChinese: 这项新法规将更好地保护工人。

meaning: adj. 合法的；正当的；婚⽣的 vt. 使合法化，使合理化
example: The court said the contract was legitimate.
exampleChinese: 法院说这份合同是合法的。

meaning: n. 闲暇，空闲
example: We can relax and read during our leisure time.
exampleChinese: 我们可以在闲暇时间放松并阅读。

meaning: n. ⽔平；级别；⽔平⾼度；楼层 adj. 平的；等⾼的，地位相同的 vt. 使平坦；摧毁，夷平；瞄准 vt. vi. 使相等，使平等
example: The water level rose after the rain.
exampleChinese: 下雨后水位上升了。

meaning: n. 操纵杆；杠杆，撬棒；施压⼿段 vt. 撬起，撬动
example: He used a lever to move the heavy rock.
exampleChinese: 他用杠杆移动那块沉重的石头。

meaning: n. 征收额，(尤指) 税款 vt. 征收，征 (税)
example: The city will levy a tax on large homes.
exampleChinese: 这座城市将对大房子征税。

meaning: vt. vi. 经营，管理；成功做到 vi. 勉强维持⽣活 vt. 合理使⽤ (资源)
example: She can manage a small shop by herself.
exampleChinese: 她能独自管理一家小商店。

meaning: n. 管理；管理层
example: Good management keeps the company organized.
exampleChinese: 良好的管理让公司井井有条。

meaning: n. 授权；授权令，命令；任期 vt. 强制执⾏；授权
example: The school received a mandate to improve safety.
exampleChinese: 学校收到了改进安全工作的授权令。

meaning: vt. 显现，表明 adj. 明显的 n. 载货单，旅客名单
example: His worry became manifest on his face.
exampleChinese: 他的担忧明显地表现在脸上。

meaning: vt. (暗中) 操纵；(熟练地) 操作
example: Some apps can manipulate photos easily.
exampleChinese: 有些应用可以轻松编辑照片。

meaning: n. ⽅式；态度，举⽌；礼貌，礼仪
example: He spoke in a calm manner.
exampleChinese: 他说话的方式很平静。

meaning: n. ⻚边空⽩处；差额；利润；余地
example: Write the answer in the margin of the page.
exampleChinese: 把答案写在这一页的页边空白处。

meaning: adj. 微不⾜道的；⻚边的；边缘的
example: The profit this month was only marginal.
exampleChinese: 这个月的利润微不足道。

meaning: n. 团，块；⼤量；群众；质量 adj. ⼤量的，⼤批的 vi. vt. 集结，聚集
example: A mass of clouds covered the sky.
exampleChinese: 一大团云遮住了天空。

meaning: adj. ⼤⽽重的；巨⼤的，严重的
example: The storm caused massive damage to the town.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴给小镇造成了巨大的破坏。

meaning: n. ⼤屠杀 vt. 屠杀
example: The war led to a terrible massacre.
exampleChinese: 这场战争导致了一场可怕的大屠杀。

meaning: n. 职业；占领；居住，占⽤；消遣
example: Her occupation is a nurse.
exampleChinese: 她的职业是护士。

meaning: vt. 占⽤；占领；使忙于；担任
example: The army tried to occupy the city.
exampleChinese: 军队试图占领这座城市。

meaning: vi. (意外地) 发⽣；存在，出现
example: Accidents often occur on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 事故经常在下雨天发生。

meaning: n. 发⽣的事，事件；发⽣，存在
example: This rainstorm was a rare occurrence in summer.
exampleChinese: 这场暴雨是夏天里少见的事件。

meaning: vt. vi. 冒犯，得罪 vt. 令⼈不适 vi. 违反 (法规、原则等)；犯罪
example: I did not mean to offend anyone.
exampleChinese: 我并不是故意冒犯任何人。

meaning: vt. vi. 主动提出，⾃愿给予 vt. 提供，供应 n. 提议；出价，报价；特价
example: They offer free water at the station.
exampleChinese: 他们在车站提供免费饮用水。

meaning: vt. 抵消，弥补
example: The extra gift will offset the shipping cost.
exampleChinese: 额外的礼物会抵消运费。

meaning: n. ⼦⼥，后代；幼崽，幼苗
example: Birds build nests to protect their offspring.
exampleChinese: 鸟类筑巢是为了保护它们的后代。

meaning: n. 段落，节
example: Please write a short paragraph about your school.
exampleChinese: 请写一段关于你学校的简短段落。

meaning: vt. 使瘫痪；使不能正常运作
example: The injury can paralyse a player's leg.
exampleChinese: 这种伤害会使球员的腿瘫痪。

meaning: adj. 平⾏的；相似的，同时发⽣的 n. 很相似的⼈ (情况等)；相似之处 vt. 与…相似，与…同时发⽣
example: These two roads run parallel to each other.
exampleChinese: 这两条路彼此平行。

meaning: n. 部分；成员；零件；区域；⻆⾊ vi. 离开，分别 vt. 分离，分开 adv. 在⼀定程度上，部分地
example: This part of the book is easy to understand.
exampleChinese: 这本书的这一部分很容易理解。

meaning: adj. 部分的；偏袒的；钟爱的
example: The report gives only a partial answer.
exampleChinese: 这份报告只给出了部分答案。

meaning: n. 参与者，参加者
example: Every participant wore a name tag.
exampleChinese: 每位参与者都戴着名牌。

meaning: vi. 参与，参加
example: Students can participate in the school science fair.
exampleChinese: 学生可以参加学校的科学展览会。

meaning: n. 微粒；粒⼦；⼩品词
example: A dust particle floated in the sunlight.
exampleChinese: 一粒尘埃在阳光下飘浮着。

meaning: adj. 特定的；格外的；挑剔的 n. 细节，详情
example: Is there any particular book you want to borrow?
exampleChinese: 你有想借的某一本特定的书吗？

meaning: adv. 部分地，在某种程度上
example: The work was partly finished by noon.
exampleChinese: 这项工作到中午时只完成了一部分。

meaning: n. 伙伴；配偶，伴侣；合伙⼈ vt. 做搭档
example: I will partner with Mia for the class game.
exampleChinese: 我要和米娅搭档参加班级游戏。

meaning: n. 热情，激情；热恋；热衷的爱好
example: She spoke with passion about her dream.
exampleChinese: 她满怀激情地谈论自己的梦想。

meaning: adj. 被动的，消极的；被动语态的 n. 被动语态，被动式
example: He gave a passive answer and said little.
exampleChinese: 他回答得很被动，几乎没说什么。

meaning: adj. 快的；敏捷的；⽴竿⻅影的
example: We took a quick walk after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们快步走了一会儿。

meaning: vi. vt. 辞去 (⼯作)；停⽌；退出；离开
example: He decided to quit his job last month.
exampleChinese: 他上个月决定辞职。

meaning: n. 探索，寻找，追求 vi. 探索，探求
example: They went on a quest for the lost city.
exampleChinese: 他们踏上了寻找失落城市的旅程。

meaning: n. 调查问卷，调查表
example: Please fill out the questionnaire.
exampleChinese: 请填写这份问卷。

meaning: vt. vi. 引⽤，引述 vt. 举例说明；开价，报价 n. 引⽂，引语；报价，估价；引号
example: Can you quote the teacher's exact words?
exampleChinese: 你能引用老师的原话吗？

meaning: n. 持续时间；范围；跨度；宽度 vt. 持续，贯穿；包括，涵盖；横跨
example: The bridge will span the wide river.
exampleChinese: 这座桥将横跨宽阔的河流。

meaning: adj. 闲置的；备⽤的；空闲的 vt. 留出；免去；放过；吝惜 n. 备⽤品，备胎；零件，备件
example: Can you spare ten minutes to help me?
exampleChinese: 你能抽出十分钟来帮我吗？

meaning: n. ⽇程表；时刻表；节⽬表 vt. 为…安排时间
example: Please schedule the exam for next Friday.
exampleChinese: 请把考试安排在下周五。

meaning: n. 计划，⽅案；阴谋，诡计 vi. vt. 密谋，秘密策划
example: The team will scheme to win the game.
exampleChinese: 这个团队会密谋赢得比赛。

meaning: n. 科学；理科；学科
example: Science helps us understand the world.
exampleChinese: 科学帮助我们理解世界。

meaning: adj. 科学的；细致严谨的
example: The report is based on scientific research.
exampleChinese: 这份报告以科学研究为基础。

meaning: n. 科学家
example: The scientist worked late in the lab.
exampleChinese: 那位科学家在实验室工作到很晚。

meaning: n. ⼩块，斑点；补丁；⼩块地；眼罩 vt. 打补丁
example: Please patch the hole in my jacket.
exampleChinese: 请把我夹克上的破洞补好。

meaning: n. 专利权 adj. 专利的；明显的 vt. 得到…的专利权
example: The company will patent its new device next year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司明年将为它的新设备申请专利。

meaning: n. 模式，⽅式；图案；典范；样板 vt. 使形成 (某⾏为模式)
example: The teacher showed us a clear pattern in the numbers.
exampleChinese: 老师给我们展示了数字中的一个清晰模式。

meaning: vt. vi. 付费，付酬；受益，划算 vt. 交纳，偿还 vi. 付出代价；盈利，创收 n. ⼯资，薪⽔
example: I need to pay for my lunch.
exampleChinese: 我得付我的午餐钱。

meaning: n. 付款；付款额；报答，报应
example: You must make the payment by Friday.
exampleChinese: 你必须在星期五前付款。

meaning: adj. 古怪的；特有的；有点不舒服的
example: This soup has a peculiar smell.
exampleChinese: 这汤有一种奇怪的气味。

meaning: n. 同龄⼈，同辈；(英国的) 贵族 vi. 端详，费⼒地看
example: The child began to peer through the window.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子开始费力地透过窗户张望。

meaning: prep. 每，每⼀
example: The price is five dollars per person.
exampleChinese: 价格是每人五美元。

meaning: vt. 看待，视为；注意到，察觉
example: We can perceive the change in her voice.
exampleChinese: 我们能察觉到她声音里的变化。

meaning: n. 百分⽐，百分率；提成
example: Only a small percentage of the class was absent.
exampleChinese: 班里只有很小一部分人缺席了。

meaning: adj. 完美的；完全的 vt. 使完善，使完美
example: The sky was a perfect blue.
exampleChinese: 天空是完美的蓝色。

meaning: n. 铁路；铁轨；栏杆，扶⼿ vi. vt. 怒斥，责骂
example: The train moved slowly along the rail.
exampleChinese: 火车沿着铁轨慢慢行驶。

meaning: n. 铁路，铁路系统
example: The railway connects the two cities.
exampleChinese: 这条铁路连接着这两座城市。

meaning: vt. 举起；提⾼；筹募；提及；抚养 vt. 引起；饲养 n. 加薪，⼯资增⻓
example: We should raise our hands before speaking.
exampleChinese: 我们发言前应该举手。

meaning: n. 公众集会；拉⼒赛；⽌跌回升 vi. vt. 召集，集合 vi. 复原，恢复健康；⽌跌回升
example: The crowd gathered to rally after the storm.
exampleChinese: 风暴过后，人群聚集起来重振精神。

meaning: adj. 随机的；不认识的；出⼈意料的
example: We picked a random number for the game.
exampleChinese: 我们为游戏随便选了一个随机数。

meaning: n. ⼀系列；范围；射程；⼭脉 vi. (在⼀定的范围内) 变化；包括 vt. (按⼀定顺序) 排列 vi. vt. 徘徊，漫步
example: The price range for the shoes is very wide.
exampleChinese: 这双鞋的价格范围很大。

meaning: n. 级别，地位；军衔；成员，⾏列 vt. vi. 把…分等级，属于某等级 adj. 难闻的，恶臭的；糟糕的
example: The teacher asked us to rank the books by size.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们按大小排列这些书。

meaning: n. 主⼈；⼤师；硕⼠学位；男教师 vt. 精通，掌握；控制 adj. 熟练的；最重要的
example: She worked hard to master English grammar.
exampleChinese: 她努力掌握英语语法。

meaning: n. 杰作，代表作
example: This painting is a true masterpiece.
exampleChinese: 这幅画是一件真正的杰作。

meaning: n. 朋友，伙伴；⽼兄；同伴；伴侣 vi. (动物) 交配
example: My best mate helped me with my homework.
exampleChinese: 我的好伙伴帮我做了作业。

meaning: n. 材料；布料；素材 adj. 物质的
example: Wood is a common building material.
exampleChinese: 木材是常见的建筑材料。

meaning: adj. 数学的
example: The teacher explained the mathematical formula on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师在黑板上讲解了这个数学公式。

meaning: adj. 成熟的；已酿熟的 vi. 成熟；到期 vi. vt. 酿成，发酵成熟
example: She became more mature after the trip.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行后，她变得更成熟了。

meaning: adj. 最⼤数量的，最⾼限度的 n. 最⼤量，最⾼程度，最⼤限度
example: This is the maximum number of students allowed.
exampleChinese: 这是允许的学生最大人数。

meaning: vt. 意思是；打算；对某⼈重要 adj. ⼩⽓的；刻薄的；平均的 n. 平均数
example: What does this sign mean?
exampleChinese: 这个标志表示什么意思？

meaning: n. 意思；意义
example: I don't know the meaning of this word.
exampleChinese: 我不知道这个单词的意思。

meaning: n. ⽅法，途径；财富，钱财
example: What does this sign means?
exampleChinese: 这个标志是什么意思？

meaning: adv. 在此期间，与此同时 n. (在此) 期间，其间
example: In the meantime, please wait here for the bus.
exampleChinese: 在此期间，请在这里等公交车。

meaning: adv. 在此期间；与此同时
example: I was cooking; meanwhile, my brother set the table.
exampleChinese: 我在做饭；与此同时，我哥哥在摆桌子。

meaning: vt. 测量；估量，判定 vlink. (尺⼨、数量) 量度为 n. 措施，⽅法；度量单位；提案
example: We used a ruler to measure the desk.
exampleChinese: 我们用尺子测量了书桌。

meaning: n. 开幕式；缺⼝；空缺；开放 adj. 开篇的，开头的
example: The opening of the play was very moving.
exampleChinese: 这出戏的开始非常感人。

meaning: n. 歌剧；歌剧院
example: We watched an opera at the city theater.
exampleChinese: 我们在市剧院看了一场歌剧。

meaning: vt. 操作，使运⾏ vi. 运转，⼯作；动⼿术；经营 vi. vt. (被) 使⽤，(使) 运转
example: The doctors had to operate at once.
exampleChinese: 医生们不得不立刻动手术。

meaning: n. ⼿术；运转，操作；⾏动；业务
example: The safe operation of the machine is important.
exampleChinese: 机器的安全操作很重要。

meaning: adj. 可运转的；运营的；军事⾏动的
example: The new machine is now fully operational.
exampleChinese: 这台新机器现在已经完全可以运转了。

meaning: n. 操作员，技⼯；接线员；经营者
example: The operator runs a small family hotel.
exampleChinese: 这位经营者经营着一家小型家庭旅馆。

meaning: n. 看法，观点；舆论；专家意⻅
example: In my opinion, this book is very helpful.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这本书很有帮助。

meaning: n. 机会，时机
example: This job is a good opportunity to learn.
exampleChinese: 这份工作是一个学习的好机会。

meaning: n. 对⼿，竞争者；反对者
example: Her opponent trained hard for the final match.
exampleChinese: 她的对手为决赛刻苦训练。

meaning: vt. 反对，阻挠
example: Many people oppose unfair rules.
exampleChinese: 许多人反对不公平的规则。

meaning: adj. 对⾯的，另⼀边的；相反的 n. 对⽴的⼈ (或物) prep. 与…相对；与…合演 adv. 在对⾯
example: The bank is opposite the post office.
exampleChinese: 银行在邮局对面。

meaning: vt. 压迫，欺压；压抑，使烦恼
example: No one has the right to oppress others.
exampleChinese: 任何人都没有权利压迫他人。

meaning: n. 范围；余地，机会；…镜 vt. 查清，探明
example: We have a wide scope for future study.
exampleChinese: 我们未来的研究范围很广。

meaning: n. 得分，分数；乐谱；⼆⼗；⼤量 vt. vi. 得分；获得胜利 vt. 评分；分值是；划下痕迹
example: Our team got a high score in the game.
exampleChinese: 我们队在比赛中得了高分。

meaning: n. 轻蔑，鄙视 vt. 轻蔑，鄙视
example: He treated the unfair rule with scorn.
exampleChinese: 他对这条不公平的规则表示轻蔑。

meaning: adj. 安全的；牢靠的；安⼼的 vt. 获得，确保；固定；保卫
example: Keep your passport in a secure place.
exampleChinese: 把你的护照放在安全的地方。

meaning: n. 安全，保障；安保措施；保安部⻔ n. 抵押品；证券
example: Security at the airport was very strict.
exampleChinese: 机场的安全检查非常严格。

meaning: vt. vi. 看⻅；明⽩；弄清；考虑 vi. 看得⻅ vt. 观看；参⻅；看望；交往；认为
example: I can see the mountains from my window.
exampleChinese: 我从窗户能看见群山。

meaning: vt. vi. 寻找；寻求，谋求 vt. (向⼈) 请求，寻求
example: Many students seek better ways to study.
exampleChinese: 许多学生寻找更好的学习方法。

meaning: vlink. 似乎，看来
example: He doesn't seem tired today.
exampleChinese: 他今天似乎不累。

meaning: adv. 貌似，看似
example: She was seemingly calm before the exam.
exampleChinese: 她在考试前看起来似乎很镇定。

meaning: n. 节约，节俭；海⽯⽵
example: Thrift can help a family save more money.
exampleChinese: 节俭可以帮助一个家庭省下更多钱。

meaning: n. 兴奋感，激动；⼀阵强烈的感觉 vt. 使⾮常兴奋
example: She felt a thrill when the concert began.
exampleChinese: 音乐会开始时，她感到一阵兴奋。

meaning: vi. 兴旺，繁荣，欣欣向荣
example: Small businesses can thrive with good planning.
exampleChinese: 小企业如果规划得好，就能兴旺发展。

meaning: prep. 穿过；⾃始⾄终；直⾄；凭借 adv. 通过；从头到尾；直达 adj. 直达的；完成的，结束的
example: We walked through the park at noon.
exampleChinese: 中午我们穿过了公园。

meaning: prep. 遍及；⾃始⾄终，从头到尾 adv. ⾃始⾄终，从头到尾
example: The rain fell throughout the night.
exampleChinese: 雨下了一整夜。

meaning: n. 建议，窍⻔；⼩费；尖端；密报 vi. vt. (使) 倾斜，侧倾；给⼩费 vt. 倾倒，倒出；轻触；预⾔…获胜
example: Please tip the waiter after dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭后给服务员小费。

meaning: n. 标题，名称；称号，头衔；职称 vt. 加标题，命名
example: She won the title in the school chess contest.
exampleChinese: 她在学校象棋比赛中赢得了冠军。

meaning: adj. 城市的，城镇的；都市⾳乐的
example: More people are moving to urban areas.
exampleChinese: 越来越多的人正在迁往城市地区。

meaning: vt. 敦促，强烈要求；驱赶，鞭策 n. 冲动，强烈的欲望
example: I urge you to read the rules carefully.
exampleChinese: 我劝你仔细阅读规则。

meaning: adj. 紧迫的，紧急的；急切的
example: We need an urgent answer before noon.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在中午前得到一个紧急答复。

meaning: vt. 利⽤，使⽤
example: We can utilize old boxes to store books.
exampleChinese: 我们可以利用旧盒子来装书。

meaning: adj. 完全的，彻底的 vt. 发出 (声⾳)，说
example: That was an utter mistake.
exampleChinese: 那是一个完全的错误。

meaning: vt. vi. 想知道；感到诧异 vt. (礼貌地提问或请⼈做事时说) n. 奇迹，奇观；惊讶，惊奇；奇才
example: I wonder why the bus is late.
exampleChinese: 我想知道公交车为什么晚了。

meaning: n. (对神的) 敬奉；崇拜；阁下 vt. 崇拜，景仰 vt. vi. 敬奉 (神)
example: Many people worship the hero for his courage.
exampleChinese: 许多人因他的勇气而崇拜这位英雄。

meaning: adj. 价值…的；值得…的 n. 价值…的东西；价值，意义
example: This book is worth reading twice.
exampleChinese: 这本书值得读两遍。

meaning: adj. 有价值的，值得的
example: It was worthwhile to wait for the bus.
exampleChinese: 等公交车是值得的。

meaning: adj. 值得 (或应得)…的；值得尊敬的 n. 要⼈，知名⼈⼠
example: It was a worthy goal to help the poor.
exampleChinese: 帮助穷人是一个值得的目标。

meaning: vt. vi. 写字；写作，作曲；写信；写道
example: I write in my diary every night.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上写日记。

meaning: n. 作家，作者；写…的⼈
example: My sister wants to be a writer one day.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹希望有一天成为一名作者。

meaning: vt. 牵引，拖，拉 (⻋或船) n. (⻋或船的) 牵引，拖，拉
example: Can you tow my car to the repair shop?
exampleChinese: 你能把我的车拖到修理厂吗？

meaning: prep. 向；趋于；将近；对于；⽤于
example: She walked towards the school gate.
exampleChinese: 她朝学校大门走去。

meaning: vt. 拿；带去；做；接受；乘坐 vt. vi. 花费 n. 镜头；收⼊额；看法，意⻅
example: Please take an umbrella with you.
exampleChinese: 请随身带一把伞。

meaning: n. 天资，天赋；有才能的⼈
example: Music is her greatest talent.
exampleChinese: 音乐是她最大的天资。

meaning: n. ⽬标，指标；攻击对象；靶⼦ vt. 把…作为攻击⽬标；⾯向，针对
example: Our target is to finish the project by Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们的目标是周五前完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 味道；味觉；品味；⼀⼝；爱好 vlink. 有…味道 vt. 尝出 (味道)；尝，品；吃，喝
example: The soup has a rich taste.
exampleChinese: 这汤味道很浓。

meaning: adj. 技术的；技巧的；专业的
example: This machine needs technical support.
exampleChinese: 这台机器需要技术支持。

meaning: n. 技术员，技师
example: The technician fixed the printer in ten minutes.
exampleChinese: 那位技术员十分钟内修好了打印机。

meaning: n. 技巧，⼯艺；技艺，技能
example: Practice improved her drawing technique.
exampleChinese: 练习提高了她的绘画技巧。

meaning: n. 科技，技术
example: Technology changes our lives quickly.
exampleChinese: 技术迅速改变着我们的生活。

meaning: n. (13到19岁的) ⻘少年
example: The teenager rides his bike to school every day.
exampleChinese: 那个十几岁的少年每天骑自行车去上学。

meaning: n. 脾⽓；怒⽓；⼼情 vt. 使缓和；使 (⾦属) 回⽕
example: Try to temper your anger before you speak.
exampleChinese: 说话前尽量缓和一下你的怒气。

meaning: n. 温度，⽓温；体温
example: The temperature dropped last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚气温下降了。

meaning: adj. 时间的；世俗的；太阳⽳的
example: The temporal parts of the plan are still changing.
exampleChinese: 这个计划的时间部分仍在变化。

meaning: adj. 暂时的，临时的
example: This is only a temporary job for the summer.
exampleChinese: 这只是一份夏天的临时工作。

meaning: vt. 引诱，怂恿
example: Don't tempt me with another piece of cake.
exampleChinese: 别再用一块蛋糕来引诱我了。

meaning: n. 引诱，诱惑，诱惑⼈的事物
example: He resisted the temptation to lie.
exampleChinese: 他抵住了说谎的诱惑。

meaning: vi. 往往会；倾向于 vt. vi. 照顾，照料 vt. 管理，打点 (商店、酒吧等)
example: These flowers tend to grow in the shade.
exampleChinese: 这些花往往长在阴凉处。

meaning: n. 倾向；趋势
example: She has a tendency to arrive early.
exampleChinese: 她有早到的倾向。

meaning: adj. 暂定的，不确定的；犹豫不定的
example: We made a tentative plan for Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们为周六做了一个暂定的计划。

meaning: n. 术语；学期；期限 n. 条款；措辞；关系 vt. 把…称为
example: This term is common in science books.
exampleChinese: 这个术语在科学书中很常见。

meaning: n. 终点站；航站楼；终端 adj. (疾病) 晚期的；末端的
example: The train is waiting at the terminal.
exampleChinese: 火车正在终点站等候。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 结束，(使) 终⽌ vi. 到达终点
example: The meeting will terminate at noon.
exampleChinese: 会议将在中午结束。

meaning: vi. vt. (出庭) 作证；证实，证明
example: Several witnesses will testify in court tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 几位证人明天会在法庭上作证。

meaning: vt. 追踪；追溯；追述…的历史 n. 痕迹，踪迹；微量，少许；追踪
example: The detective can trace the footprints to the back door.
exampleChinese: 侦探可以追踪这些脚印到后门。

meaning: n. ⼩径；踪迹；轨道；跑道；路线 n. 站台；⽥径；歌曲；⾳轨 vt. 跟踪，追踪；留下⾜迹
example: The train moved slowly along the track.
exampleChinese: 火车沿着轨道缓缓行驶。

meaning: n. 传统
example: It is a family tradition to eat together on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 周日全家一起吃饭是个传统。

meaning: adj. 最终的，终极的；极度的；根本的 n. 极致，极限，最⾼典范
example: This painting is the ultimate prize in the contest.
exampleChinese: 这幅画是比赛中的终极奖品。

meaning: vt. 低估，轻视 n. 低估，轻视
example: Never underestimate the power of a good book.
exampleChinese: 永远不要低估一本好书的力量。

meaning: vt. 经历，经受，遭受
example: She had to undergo surgery last winter.
exampleChinese: 她去年冬天不得不接受手术。

meaning: vt. 构成…的基础，作为…的原因
example: Honesty often underlie a strong friendship.
exampleChinese: 真诚常常是牢固友谊的基础。

meaning: adj. 深层的，潜在的；表⾯以下的
example: The underlying problem is poor sleep.
exampleChinese: 潜在的问题是睡眠不足。

meaning: vt. 在…下画线；强调，突出
example: Please underline the key words in your notebook.
exampleChinese: 请在笔记本里把关键词划出来。

meaning: vt. vi. 理解，懂得；认识到；体谅 vt. 得知，获悉
example: I understand your question now.
exampleChinese: 我现在懂你的问题了。

meaning: n. 了解；协议；理解；看法 adj. 善解⼈意的，体谅⼈的
example: We finally reached an understanding after talking for hours.
exampleChinese: 我们谈了几个小时后，终于达成了谅解。

meaning: vt. 承担，着⼿做；承诺，保证
example: I will undertake the project this month.
exampleChinese: 我这个月将承担这个项目。

meaning: adj. 不安的，不⾃在的；不稳定的
example: He felt uneasy before the speech.
exampleChinese: 演讲前他感到不安。

meaning: n. 失业⼈数；失业状态；失业救济
example: Unemployment rose after the factory closed.
exampleChinese: 工厂关闭后，失业率上升了。

meaning: adj. 出乎意料的，意想不到的
example: The school got an unexpected day off.
exampleChinese: 学校意外放了一天假。

meaning: vt. vi. 使统⼀，使成⼀体
example: This song can unify people from many places.
exampleChinese: 这首歌可以让来自许多地方的人们团结起来。

meaning: n. ⼯会；协会；联盟；联合
example: The two clubs formed a union.
exampleChinese: 这两个俱乐部组成了一个联盟。

meaning: adj. 独⼀⽆⼆的；独特的；特有的
example: This park has a unique lake shaped like a star.
exampleChinese: 这个公园有一个形状像星星的独特湖泊。

meaning: adj. 普遍的，全体的，共同的 n. 普遍看法，普遍特征
example: Water is universal in every country.
exampleChinese: 水在每个国家都普遍存在。

meaning: n. 宇宙；领域，范围
example: The universe is full of stars and planets.
exampleChinese: 宇宙中充满了恒星和行星。

meaning: prep. 与…不同，不像；⾮…的特征 adj. 不同的，不相似的
example: Unlike her brother, she likes quiet music.
exampleChinese: 和她哥哥不同，她喜欢安静的音乐。

meaning: adj. 不太可能的；不可信的 adj. 不合适的
example: It is unlikely that the bus will arrive on time.
exampleChinese: 公交车不太可能准时到达。

meaning: adj. 不寻常的，特别的
example: It is unusual to see snow in April here.
exampleChinese: 在这里四月见到雪是不平常的。

meaning: adj. 模糊的；含糊的，笼统的
example: His explanation was too vague to understand.
exampleChinese: 他的解释太模糊了，无法理解。

meaning: adj. 徒劳的；⾃负的，虚荣的
example: All his hard work was in vain.
exampleChinese: 他所有的努力都白费了。

meaning: adj. (法律上) 有效的；正当合理的
example: Your ticket is still valid today.
exampleChinese: 你的票今天仍然有效。

meaning: adj. 有价值的，珍贵的；值钱的
example: This ring is very valuable.
exampleChinese: 这枚戒指非常贵重。

meaning: n. 价值；划算程度；⽤处；价值观 vt. 重视；给…估价
example: The value of this old coin is high.
exampleChinese: 这枚旧硬币的价值很高。

meaning: vi. 突然消失；消亡，灭绝
example: The smoke seemed to vanish in the wind.
exampleChinese: 烟雾似乎在风中消失了。

meaning: adj. 多变的；可变的 n. 变量，可变因素
example: The weather here is very variable in spring.
exampleChinese: 这里春天的天气变化很大。

meaning: n. 变化幅度，差额
example: There was a small variance in the test scores.
exampleChinese: 考试分数有一点差异。

meaning: n. 变化，差异；变体，变种；变奏
example: The teacher explained a variation of the game.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了这个游戏的一种变体。

meaning: n. 各种各样；多样化；种类，品种
example: This store has a great variety of fruit.
exampleChinese: 这家商店有各种各样的水果。

meaning: adj. 各种各样的，不同的
example: There are various ways to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 解决这个问题有各种各样的方法。

meaning: vi. 不同，有差异；(根据情况) 变化 vt. 改变，使多样化
example: Prices vary from store to store.
exampleChinese: 不同商店的价格各不相同。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼴阔的
example: We crossed a vast desert.
exampleChinese: 我们穿过了一片广阔的沙漠。

meaning: n. ⼯资，⼯钱 vt. 发动，进⾏ (运动或战争)
example: The workers will wage a long strike.
exampleChinese: 工人们将发起一场长时间的罢工。

meaning: vi. vt. 闲逛，游荡 vi. 偏离 (正道)，⾛失；⾛神 n. 闲逛，游荡
example: The child began to wander around the park.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子开始在公园里徘徊。

meaning: vt. 想，想要；需要；缺少，缺乏 n. 需要的东西；缺少；贫穷
example: These plants want more sunlight.
exampleChinese: 这些植物需要更多阳光。

meaning: n. ⽅式，⽅法；作⻛；路；⽅向 adv. 很远；⾮常
example: This is a simple way to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 这是解决这个问题的一个简单方法。

meaning: adj. 弱的；不牢固的；淡的
example: After the long run, my legs felt weak.
exampleChinese: 长跑后，我的腿感觉很无力。

meaning: vt. 穿，戴；留 (头发)；流露 vi. vt. 磨损，消耗 n. ⾐着；磨损，⽤坏
example: I usually wear a hat in summer.
exampleChinese: 我夏天通常戴一顶帽子。

meaning: adj. 疲劳的，厌倦的；使⼈疲劳的 vt. 使疲劳，使疲倦 vi. 变得不耐烦，感到厌倦
example: The long trip made everyone weary.
exampleChinese: 长途旅行让每个人都感到疲惫。

meaning: vlink. 有…重，重量是… vt. 称重量，量体重；考虑，权衡 vi. 有影响，有重要性
example: We must weigh the risks first.
exampleChinese: 我们必须先权衡风险。

meaning: n. 重量，体重；重物；重担；秤锤 vt. 在…上加重量
example: The box was light in weight.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子重量很轻。

meaning: adj. 古怪的，奇异的
example: That is a weird sound from the empty house.
exampleChinese: 那是空屋里传来的奇怪声音。

meaning: n. 幸福；社会福利；社会保障⾦
example: Good schools improve children's welfare.
exampleChinese: 好学校能改善孩子们的福利。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 旋转，(使) 打转 vi. (思绪) 混乱，恍惚 n. 旋转，回旋；接连不断的活动
example: The wheels whirl as the bike speeds downhill.
exampleChinese: 自行车快速下坡时，车轮飞快旋转。

meaning: vi. vt. ⽿语，⼩声说 vt. 私下说，秘密告诉 vi. (叶⼦、⻛等) 沙沙作响 n. ⽿语 (声)；轻柔的声⾳；传闻
example: Please whisper in the reading room.
exampleChinese: 在阅览室里请低声说话。

meaning: vt. 出产；产⽣；放弃，缴出 vi. 屈服，让步；给 (⻋辆) 让路 n. 产量，产出；(投资的) 收益
example: The farm can yield a large harvest this year.
exampleChinese: 这座农场今年可以产出一大批收成。

meaning: n. ⻘年时期；年轻⼈；⻘春，朝⽓
example: Many youth joined the community clean-up.
exampleChinese: 许多青年参加了社区清洁活动。

meaning: n. 锯⻮形线条，之字形 adj. 之字形的，锯⻮形的，曲折的 vi. 曲折前进
example: The path will zigzag up the hill.
exampleChinese: 这条小路会弯弯曲曲地通向山上。

meaning: n. 地带，区域 vt. 将…划为某项⽤途的区域
example: This area is a quiet zone.
exampleChinese: 这个地区是安静地带。

meaning: vi. 快速移动；飙升，猛涨 n. 变焦镜头；⻋辆疾⾏的声⾳
example: The company’s profits saw a zoom this year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司今年的利润急速上升。

meaning: n. 钥匙；关键；键；答案 vt. ⽤键盘输⼊ adj. 主要的，关键的
example: Trust is key to good teamwork.
exampleChinese: 信任是良好团队合作的关键。

meaning: vt. vi. 编织，针织；(使) 紧密结合 n. 编织的⾐服，针织衫
example: Grandma likes to knit scarves in the evening.
exampleChinese: 奶奶喜欢在晚上织围巾。

meaning: adj. 轻快的；⿇利的；凉爽的 adj. 兴隆的
example: We took a brisk walk after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们轻快地散了会儿步。

meaning: adj. 短暂的；简洁的 n. 任务简介；案情摘要；辩护状 vt. 向 (某⼈) 介绍情况
example: Please give me a brief answer.
exampleChinese: 请简短地回答我。

meaning: vi. vt. (在商店) 随便看看；浏览，翻阅 vi. (动物) 吃草 n. 随便看看
example: I like to browse the books before I buy one.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢先随便翻翻这些书再买。

meaning: vt. 加重，使恶化；激怒，使恼⽕
example: Lack of sleep can aggravate a headache.
exampleChinese: 睡眠不足会加重头痛。

meaning: n. 总数，集合体；⻣料 adj. 总数的，合计的 vt. 总计达到，使聚集
example: The total aggregate of the scores was 180.
exampleChinese: 分数总数合计是180分。

meaning: adj. 好⽃的，有侵略性的；进取的
example: The dog became aggressive when strangers came close.
exampleChinese: 陌生人靠近时，那只狗变得很有攻击性。

meaning: vi. vt. ⿎动，煽动 vt. 激怒，使不安；搅动 ，摇动
example: The loud noise can agitate the baby.
exampleChinese: 刺耳的噪音会让婴儿不安。

meaning: adj. 令⼈愉快的；乐意的；可接受的
example: It was an agreeable meeting for everyone.
exampleChinese: 那是一次让所有人都感到愉快的会议。

meaning: n. 援助，救援物资；辅助 (设备) vt. vi. 帮助，援助
example: The nurse came quickly to aid the old man.
exampleChinese: 护士很快赶来帮助那位老人。

meaning: n. ⽬的，⽬标；瞄准 vi. vt. ⼒求达到；瞄准 vt. 旨在；针对
example: Aim at the basket before you throw the ball.
exampleChinese: 投球前先瞄准篮筐。

meaning: n. 警报器；警报；闹钟；惊恐 vt. 使惊恐，使忧虑；给…装警报器
example: The alarm woke me at six o'clock.
exampleChinese: 闹钟在六点把我叫醒了。

meaning: n. 外星⽣物；外国⼈，侨⺠ adj. 陌⽣的；外国的；与…不相容的 adj. 外星的
example: The law treated him as an alien in that country.
exampleChinese: 在那个国家，法律把他视为外国人。

meaning: vt. 使疏远，使不友好；使格格不⼊
example: His rude words can alienate his friends.
exampleChinese: 他无礼的话会使朋友疏远他。

meaning: vt. 分配，划拨
example: The manager will allocate more time for practice.
exampleChinese: 经理会分配更多时间用于练习。

meaning: vt. 允许，听任；使可能；留出
example: My parents allow me to ride my bike to school.
exampleChinese: 我父母允许我骑自行车上学。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 变化，(使) 改变 vt. 改动 (⾐服使其更合⾝)
example: We can alter the plan if it rains.
exampleChinese: 如果下雨，我们可以改变计划。

meaning: adj. 交替的；每隔…的；可替代的 vi. vt. (使) 轮流，(使) 交替 n. 替补者
example: Day and night alternate in a regular cycle.
exampleChinese: 白天和黑夜按规律交替出现。

meaning: adj. 可替代的，其他的；⾮传统的 n. 可供选择的事物
example: Walking to school is one alternative to taking the bus.
exampleChinese: 步行上学是乘坐公交车的一个替代选择。

meaning: adj. 有可⽐性的，类似的
example: Her story was comparable to mine.
exampleChinese: 她的经历和我的有可比性。

meaning: adj. ⽐较的；相对的；⽐较级的 n. (形容词或副词的) ⽐较级
example: The comparative form of.
exampleChinese: 形容词 good 的比较级是 better。

meaning: vt. ⽐较，对⽐；将…⽐作 vi. (与…) 相⽐
example: It is hard to compare the two paintings.
exampleChinese: 很难比较这两幅画。

meaning: n. ⽐较，对⽐
example: There is no comparison between the two cars.
exampleChinese: 这两辆车没有可比性。

meaning: vt. 强迫，逼迫
example: The rules compel us to wear uniforms.
exampleChinese: 这些规定强迫我们穿校服。

meaning: vi. 弥补，补偿 vt. 给…赔偿
example: The company will compensate you for the lost book.
exampleChinese: 公司会赔偿你丢失书本的损失。

meaning: vi. 竞争，对抗；参加⽐赛
example: Our team will compete in the final.
exampleChinese: 我们队将参加决赛。

meaning: n. 竞争；⽐赛；竞争对⼿
example: The two teams are in strong competition for first place.
exampleChinese: 这两支队伍正在激烈竞争第一名。

meaning: adj. 竞争的；有竞争⼒的；好胜的
example: This is a highly competitive market.
exampleChinese: 这是一个竞争非常激烈的市场。

meaning: adj. 能胜任的；还⾏的；有法定权的
example: She is competent to do the job well.
exampleChinese: 她能胜任这份工作。

meaning: vt. 汇编，编纂；编译
example: They compile the report every Friday.
exampleChinese: 他们每周五汇编这份报告。

meaning: vi. vt. 抱怨，投诉，发牢骚
example: Don't complain about the weather all day.
exampleChinese: 不要整天抱怨天气。

meaning: n. 抱怨，投诉；使⼈不满的事；疾病
example: He filed a complaint about the noise.
exampleChinese: 他就噪音问题提出了投诉。

meaning: vt. 补充，补⾜，使完美 n. 补充物，补⾜物；⾜额；补语
example: Good lighting can complement the room.
exampleChinese: 好的照明可以让房间更完美。

meaning: adj. 完全的；全部的；完成的；包括 vt. 完成，结束；填 (表格)；使完整
example: Please complete your homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前完成你的作业。

meaning: adj. 复杂的，难懂的 n. 综合建筑群；复合体；情结
example: The machine has a complex design.
exampleChinese: 这台机器的设计很复杂。

meaning: vt. 使难以理解，使复杂化
example: Too many steps can complicate the task.
exampleChinese: 步骤太多会使任务复杂化。

meaning: adj. 复杂的，难懂的
example: The instructions are complicated but useful.
exampleChinese: 这些说明很复杂，但很有用。

meaning: vi. 服从，遵守
example: You must comply with the school rules.
exampleChinese: 你必须遵守校规。

meaning: n. 称赞，赞美的话；致意，致敬 vt. 称赞，赞美
example: She gave me a nice compliment after the show.
exampleChinese: 演出结束后，她夸了我一句。

meaning: vi. 相异，不同；持不同看法
example: The two reports differ in one important detail.
exampleChinese: 这两份报告在一个重要细节上不一致。

meaning: n. 差异；差额；分歧
example: I can see the difference now.
exampleChinese: 我现在能看出差异了。

meaning: vt. vi. 扩散，渗透；传播，散布 vt. 舒缓，减弱，平息 adj. 扩散的，分散的；冗⻓的
example: The smoke will diffuse quickly in the open air.
exampleChinese: 烟雾在空旷的空气中会迅速扩散。

meaning: n. 重视，重点，强调；重读
example: The teacher put emphasis on reading every day.
exampleChinese: 老师强调要每天阅读。

meaning: vt. 强调，重视；重读；使突出
example: We should emphasize honesty in daily life.
exampleChinese: 我们应该在日常生活中强调诚实。

meaning: vt. 雇⽤，雇佣；使⽤，运⽤
example: We employ bright colors in this poster.
exampleChinese: 我们在这张海报中采用鲜艳的颜色。

meaning: n. 雇员
example: Each employee gets a lunch break.
exampleChinese: 每个雇员都有午休时间。

meaning: n. 雇主
example: The employer paid the workers on Friday.
exampleChinese: 雇主在星期五给工人发了工资。

meaning: n. 在职；就业 (机会)；雇⽤；使⽤
example: Good employment can help a family live better.
exampleChinese: 良好的就业能帮助一个家庭过上更好的生活。

meaning: vt. 使能够，使可能
example: The app will enable students to learn faster.
exampleChinese: 这款应用将使学生学得更快。

meaning: vt. 遭遇；偶遇 n. 偶遇；冲突；经历
example: We had a surprise encounter with an old friend.
exampleChinese: 我们偶然遇到了一位老朋友。

meaning: vt. ⿎励；劝告，怂恿；促进，刺激
example: Her teacher will encourage her to try again.
exampleChinese: 她的老师会鼓励她再试一次。

meaning: n. 结局，结尾；末端；结束；⽬标 vi. vt. 结束，终⽌
example: The movie will end at nine.
exampleChinese: 电影将在九点结束。

meaning: vi. 努⼒，尽⼒ n. 努⼒，尝试
example: He made an endeavour to finish the race.
exampleChinese: 他努力完成了比赛。

meaning: vt. 公开⽀持；为…代⾔；签名
example: Many parents endorse the new safety plan.
exampleChinese: 许多家长公开支持这项新的安全计划。

meaning: vt. 表明，暗⽰；指向，指⽰；代表
example: The map can indicate the safest road to school.
exampleChinese: 这张地图可以指出去学校最安全的路。

meaning: n. 表明，迹象，象征
example: There is no indication of rain today.
exampleChinese: 今天没有下雨的迹象。

meaning: adj. 表明的，表⽰的，暗⽰的
example: Dark clouds are indicative of a storm.
exampleChinese: 乌云表明暴风雨要来了。

meaning: n. 愤怒，愤慨；暴⾏ vt. 使震怒，激怒
example: The speaker's rude joke caused outrage.
exampleChinese: 演讲者粗鲁的玩笑引起了愤怒。

meaning: n. 开始，起始
example: At the outset, we set clear goals.
exampleChinese: 一开始，我们就设定了明确的目标。

meaning: adv. 在外⾯，向外⾯ prep. 在…外；不属于；除了 adj. 外部的，向外的；不属于…的 n. 外部，外观
example: The kids are playing outside now.
exampleChinese: 孩子们现在正在外面玩。

meaning: adj. 外表的，表⾯上的；向外的 adv. 向外，朝外
example: The door opened outward.
exampleChinese: 门向外打开。

meaning: adj. 特殊的；格外重要的；专⻔的 n. 特别活动，特制产品；特价
example: Today is a special day for our class.
exampleChinese: 今天对我们班来说是特别的一天。

meaning: n. 专家；专科医⽣ adj. 专业的
example: She asked a specialist for advice.
exampleChinese: 她向一位专家寻求建议。

meaning: vi. 专⻔从事，专⻔研究
example: She wants to specialize in computer science.
exampleChinese: 她想专门研究计算机科学。

meaning: n. 专业，专⻓；特产，特⾊菜
example: Noodles are the restaurant's speciality.
exampleChinese: 面条是这家餐馆的特色菜。

meaning: n. 物种，种
example: Lions are a species that live in groups.
exampleChinese: 狮子是一种群居物种。

meaning: adj. 明确具体的；特定的；特有的 n. 细节，详情
example: The teacher asked for a specific example.
exampleChinese: 老师要求举一个特定的例子。

meaning: n. 规格，具体要求
example: Please read the specification before you build it.
exampleChinese: 请在制作之前阅读规格说明。

meaning: vt. 具体指明，明确说明
example: Please specify your address on the form.
exampleChinese: 请在表格上具体注明你的地址。

meaning: vi. vt. 推测，猜想 vi. 做投机买卖
example: Experts speculate that the weather will improve tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 专家推测明天的天气会转好。

meaning: vt. 赞扬，公开称赞 n. 赞扬，公开称赞
example: The new film won acclaim from critics and audiences.
exampleChinese: 这部新电影赢得了评论家和观众的赞扬。

meaning: vt. 容纳；为…提供住宿；迎合 vi. vt. (调整以) 适应
example: The hotel can accommodate two hundred guests.
exampleChinese: 这家酒店可以容纳两百位客人。

meaning: n. 住宿，住处；和解，调解
example: The hotel offers cheap accommodation near the beach.
exampleChinese: 这家酒店在海滩附近提供便宜的住处。

meaning: vt. 陪伴，陪同；伴随；为…伴奏
example: My sister will accompany me to the doctor.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹会陪我去看医生。

meaning: vt. 完成，达成
example: We worked hard to accomplish our goal on time.
exampleChinese: 我们努力工作，按时完成了目标。

meaning: n. 账⼾；账⽬；叙述；解释，说明 vt. 认为是，视为
example: I forgot my account password.
exampleChinese: 我忘记了我的账户密码。

meaning: n. 会计，会计师
example: The accountant checked the numbers twice.
exampleChinese: 会计师把数字检查了两遍。

meaning: n. 偏⻅，偏袒；偏好 vt. 使有偏⻅，使偏⼼
example: The teacher tried to avoid bias when grading the papers.
exampleChinese: 老师批改试卷时努力避免偏见。

meaning: vi. vt. 出价；叫牌 vi. 投标；努⼒争取 vt. 向…表⽰问候，向…告别；吩咐 n. 出价；投标；争取，尝试；叫牌
example: The company will bid for the new bridge project.
exampleChinese: 这家公司将为新桥项目投标。

meaning: n. 账单；议案；钞票；节⽬单；喙 vt. 开账单；把…宣传为
example: The bill was passed after a long debate.
exampleChinese: 这项法案经过长时间辩论后获得通过。

meaning: num. ⼗亿；数以⼗亿计，⼤量
example: The company made a billion dollars last year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司去年赚了十亿美元。

meaning: n. 出⽣，分娩；诞⽣，起源；出⾝
example: The family celebrated the birth of the baby.
exampleChinese: 这家人庆祝这个婴儿的出生。

meaning: n. 费⽤；指控；指责；掌管；电荷 vt. vi. 要价，收费；猛冲，猛攻，冲锋 vt. 指控；记在账上；指责；充电 vi. 向…⽅向冲去
example: The phone charge is very low now.
exampleChinese: 这部手机现在电量很低。

meaning: n. 魅⼒，吸引⼒；⼩挂件；咒语 vt. vi. 吸引，迷住 vt. ⽤魔法控制
example: The little shop has a special charm.
exampleChinese: 这家小店有一种特别的魅力。

meaning: vt. vi. 追逐，追赶；追求，求爱 vt. 争取得到；催促 vi. 急奔，急赶，匆忙地⾛ n. 追逐，追赶；争取得到
example: The police chase the thief through the market.
exampleChinese: 警察穿过市场追捕那个小偷。

meaning: n. 要求；需求 vt. 要求；需要
example: Students demand a quiet place to study.
exampleChinese: 学生们要求有一个安静的学习场所。

meaning: n. ⺠主，⺠主制；⺠主国家
example: Democracy gives people a voice in government.
exampleChinese: 民主让人们在政府中有发言权。

meaning: adj. ⺠主的
example: The class elected a democratic student leader.
exampleChinese: 这个班级选出了一位民主的学生领袖。

meaning: adj. ⼈⼝ (学) 的 n. ⼈⼝统计数据；⼈群，群体
example: The survey collected demographic data about age and income.
exampleChinese: 这项调查收集了有关年龄和收入的人口统计数据。

meaning: vt. 表明，证明；⽰范，演⽰；展露 vi. ⽰威，游⾏
example: The test can demonstrate how the machine works.
exampleChinese: 这个测试可以演示这台机器是如何工作的。

meaning: vt. (符号等) 代表；表⽰，意指
example: The letter **A** on the map can denote a school.
exampleChinese: 地图上的字母“A”可以表示一所学校。

meaning: n. 否认；拒绝，拒绝给予
example: His silence gave no denial of the rumor.
exampleChinese: 他的沉默并没有否认这个传闻。

meaning: vt. 否认；拒绝接受；拒绝给予
example: She did not deny the mistake.
exampleChinese: 她没有否认这个错误。

meaning: n. 部⻔，科，系
example: He works in the sales department.
exampleChinese: 他在销售部工作。

meaning: vi. 取决于；依靠，信赖；确信
example: Many plants depend on sunlight to grow.
exampleChinese: 许多植物依靠阳光生长。

meaning: adj. 依赖的；有瘾的；取决于…的 n. 受抚养者
example: The price of the trip is dependent on the season.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行的价格取决于季节。

meaning: n. 存款；订⾦；押⾦；沉积物 vt. 存⼊银⾏；放下，放置；使沉积
example: He made a small deposit at the bank.
exampleChinese: 他在银行存了一小笔钱。

meaning: vt. 使沮丧；降低 (价格等)；按下
example: The bad news can depress anyone.
exampleChinese: 这个坏消息会让任何人沮丧。

meaning: vi. 出现，浮现；开始为⼈所知 vi. vt. (事实) 显露，暴露 vi. (从困境中) 摆脱出来
example: A smile began to emerge on her face.
exampleChinese: 她脸上开始浮现出笑容。

meaning: n. 紧急事件，意外事件
example: Call for help in an emergency.
exampleChinese: 遇到紧急情况时要呼救。

meaning: adj. 杰出的，著名的
example: The city is home to an eminent scientist.
exampleChinese: 这座城市有一位杰出的科学家。

meaning: n. 情感，情绪
example: Her voice was full of emotion.
exampleChinese: 她的声音充满了感情。

meaning: n. 害怕，惧怕，担忧 vt. 害怕，惧怕 vt. vi. 担⼼，担忧 vi. 恐怕
example: His fear of dogs slowly faded.
exampleChinese: 他对狗的害怕慢慢消失了。

meaning: adj. 害怕的；可怕的；极坏的
example: He felt fearful in the dark room.
exampleChinese: 他在黑暗的房间里感到害怕。

meaning: n. 特征，特点；特写，专题；五官 vt. 以…为特⾊ vi. 起重要作⽤
example: A large window is a key feature of the house.
exampleChinese: 大窗户是这座房子的一个主要特色。

meaning: adj. 联邦制的；联邦政府的
example: The federal law applies to all states.
exampleChinese: 这项联邦法律适用于所有州。

meaning: n. 联盟，联合会；联邦制国家
example: The federation includes five small countries.
exampleChinese: 这个联盟包括五个小国家。

meaning: vt. 喂养；养活；施肥；灌输 vt. 将…塞进机器；满⾜；供给 vi. (婴⼉或动物) 进⻝ n. (婴⼉或动物) ⼀餐；饲料，肥料
example: I feed the fish every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上喂鱼。

meaning: n. 反馈
example: We asked for feedback after the class.
exampleChinese: 我们在课后征求了反馈。

meaning: n. 情绪，感情；(⾝体) 感觉；看法
example: I had a strange feeling before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前我有一种奇怪的感觉。

meaning: adj. 肥沃的；能⽣育的；主意多的
example: The fertile soil helped the crops grow quickly.
exampleChinese: 肥沃的土壤帮助庄稼迅速生长。

meaning: n. ⽬标；进球得分；球⻔
example: My goal is to learn English well.
exampleChinese: 我的目标是学好英语。

meaning: n. 商品，货物；私⼈财产
example: These goods are sold at a low price.
exampleChinese: 这些商品以低价出售。

meaning: vt. vi. 统治，治理 vt. ⽀配，控制，影响
example: Good leaders govern with wisdom and care.
exampleChinese: 好的领导者用智慧和关怀来管理。

meaning: n. 政府；政体；治理，统治
example: The government built a new bridge here.
exampleChinese: 政府在这里建了一座新桥。

meaning: n. 州⻓，省⻓；总督；董事；主管
example: The governor visited the new school yesterday.
exampleChinese: 州长昨天参观了这所新学校。

meaning: adj. 逐渐的，逐步的；(斜坡) 平缓的
example: Her English improved in a gradual way over time.
exampleChinese: 她的英语随着时间推移逐渐提高了。

meaning: n. 毕业⽣ vi. vt. 毕业 vt. 授予 (某⼈) 学位 vi. 逐渐发展
example: She will graduate from college next year.
exampleChinese: 她明年将从大学毕业。

meaning: adj. 壮丽的；宏伟的；极好的 n. ⼀千英镑 (或美元)；三⻆钢琴
example: The grand hall was full of bright lights and music.
exampleChinese: 这座宏伟的大厅里充满了灯光和音乐。

meaning: vt. 批准，准予，给予；承认 n. 拨款，补助⾦
example: The school will grant her a scholarship.
exampleChinese: 学校将给她发放奖学金。

meaning: n. (凌乱的) ⼀堆；许多；破旧的⻋ vt. 堆放；对…⼤加赞扬 (或批评)
example: There was a heap of books on the desk.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有一堆书。

meaning: vi. vt. 治愈；结束 (冲突)，修复 (关系)
example: Time and rest can heal a broken heart.
exampleChinese: 时间和休息可以治愈一颗受伤的心。

meaning: n. 健康状况；健康；医疗保健
example: Fresh air and sleep are important for health.
exampleChinese: 新鲜空气和睡眠对健康很重要。

meaning: adj. 健康的；有益健康的；合情理的
example: He eats healthy food every day.
exampleChinese: 他每天吃健康的食物。

meaning: vi. vt. 犹豫，迟疑 vi. (因有顾虑⽽) 不愿意 (做某事)
example: Please hesitate if you need more time.
exampleChinese: 如果你需要更多时间，请先犹豫一下。

meaning: vt. 强调，突出；⽤彩笔做标记 n. 最突出 (精彩) 的部分
example: The teacher used red ink to highlight the key words.
exampleChinese: 老师用红笔突出标出了关键词。

meaning: adv. ⾮常；⾼⽔平地；赞许地
example: She was highly praised for her hard work.
exampleChinese: 她因勤奋工作而受到高度赞扬。

meaning: adj. ⽴即的；当前的；最接近的 adj. 直系的；直接的
example: We need an immediate answer.
exampleChinese: 我们需要立即得到答复。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，极⼤的
example: They stood in front of an immense building.
exampleChinese: 他们站在一座巨大的建筑前。

meaning: vt. 使浸没于；(使) 深陷于，沉浸在
example: Students can immerse themselves in English every day.
exampleChinese: 学生们可以每天沉浸在英语中。

meaning: n. (外来) 移⺠，侨⺠
example: The immigrant found a job in the city.
exampleChinese: 这名移民在城里找到了一份工作。

meaning: adj. 即将发⽣的，逼近的
example: A storm is imminent, so we should go home now.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨即将来临，所以我们现在该回家了。

meaning: adj. 免疫的；不受影响的；被豁免的
example: This vaccine makes children immune to the disease.
exampleChinese: 这种疫苗使孩子们对这种疾病有免疫力。

meaning: adj. 可能的；合适的 adv. ⼤概，很可能
example: It is likely to rain this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 今天下午很可能会下雨。

meaning: n. 可能性，可能的事
example: There is a good likelihood of rain tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚很有可能会下雨。

meaning: adv. 同样地，相似地；我也⼀样
example: She likes math, and likewise I enjoy science.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢数学，同样我也喜欢科学。

meaning: n. 本来⾯⽬；⾃我；私⼼；⾃⼰ pref. 靠⾃⼰的；独⾃的，(对) ⾃⾝的
example: Each student should do the work by self.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都应该自己完成这项工作。

meaning: adj. ⾃私的
example: It was selfish of him to take all the candy.
exampleChinese: 他把所有糖果都拿走，太自私了。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 窒息，噎住；使哽咽 vt. 掐死，勒死；阻塞，塞满 vi. (因紧张⽽) 失败，发挥失常 n. 窒息，哽噎声
example: He began to choke on the spicy food.
exampleChinese: 他开始被辛辣的食物呛住了。

meaning: vt. 切碎，砍，劈；(⼤幅度地) 削减 n. 猪 (或⽺等) 排；砍，劈；掌劈
example: Please chop the carrots into small pieces.
exampleChinese: 请把胡萝卜切成小块。

meaning: n. 情况，情形；⽣活状况；客观环境
example: We had to leave early because of the weather circumstance.
exampleChinese: 由于天气情况，我们不得不提前离开。

meaning: vt. 引⽤ (例⼦)；引述；传讯
example: The article will cite a famous study.
exampleChinese: 这篇文章将引用一项著名研究。

meaning: vt. 声称；要求拥有，认领；获得 vt. 夺去 (⽣命) vt. vi. 索要，索取 n. 声称；所有权；要求，索赔
example: The company will claim the old trademark.
exampleChinese: 这家公司将主张拥有那个旧商标。

meaning: adj. 清楚的；明显的；⽆疑的 vt. 清理，清除，移⾛；使⼈离开 vi. 变晴朗，变清澈；散去，消失 vt. vi. 兑现 (⽀票)；获利，净赚
example: Her answer was clear and simple.
exampleChinese: 她的回答清楚而简单。

meaning: n. 边界，国界；镶边；狭⻓花坛 vt. 与…接壤；沿…的边
example: The farm is close to the border.
exampleChinese: 那个农场靠近边界。

meaning: vt. 使厌烦 vi. vt. 钻 (孔)，挖 (洞) vi. 盯着看 n. ⽆趣的⼈；⽆聊的事；孔，⼝径
example: The long lecture began to bore the students.
exampleChinese: 这场冗长的讲座开始让学生们感到厌烦。

meaning: vt. 出⽣，出世；出现，形成 adj. 天⽣的
example: She was born in May.
exampleChinese: 她出生在五月。

meaning: vt. 使…烦恼；打扰 vi. vt. 费⼼，费⼒，⿇烦 n. ⿇烦，困难；令⼈烦恼的情况
example: Sorry to bother you during dinner.
exampleChinese: 对不起，在你吃晚饭时打扰你了。

meaning: vt. 获得 (技能、习惯等)；购得，得到
example: Children acquire new words quickly.
exampleChinese: 孩子们学会新词很快。

meaning: n. 获得，习得；收购 (物)；购得物
example: The museum's new acquisition is a rare painting.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆新获得的藏品是一幅罕见的画作。

meaning: n. ⾏为；法案；装样⼦；⼀幕 vi. ⾏动；表现得；假装；充当 vt. vi. 扮演
example: Please act like an adult in class.
exampleChinese: 请在课堂上表现得像个大人。

meaning: n. ⾏动，措施；⾏为；诉讼；战⽃
example: The teacher asked us to take action at once.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们立刻采取行动。

meaning: vt. 激活，启动
example: Please activate the alarm before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前启动警报器。

meaning: adj. 活跃的；积极的；有效的
example: She is active in class and asks many questions.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上很积极，还会问很多问题。

meaning: n. 活动；活跃
example: Drawing is my favorite classroom activity.
exampleChinese: 画画是我最喜欢的课堂活动。

meaning: adj. 真实的，实际的
example: The actual cost was lower than we expected.
exampleChinese: 实际费用比我们预期的低。

meaning: adj. 严重的，剧烈的；(疾病) 急性的 adj. (感官) 灵敏的；敏锐的；锐⻆的
example: She needs urgent care for an acute pain in her leg.
exampleChinese: 她腿部的急性疼痛需要紧急治疗。

meaning: vt. 鄙视，蔑视
example: You should not despise people who make mistakes.
exampleChinese: 你不应该鄙视犯错的人。

meaning: prep. 尽管，虽然
example: Despite the rain, they went to the park.
exampleChinese: 尽管下雨了，他们还是去了公园。

meaning: adj. (⼈) 充满活⼒的；(活动) 剧烈的
example: She is always energetic in class.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上总是精力充沛。

meaning: n. ⼒⽓，活⼒；能源；精⼒；能量
example: Plants get energy from sunlight.
exampleChinese: 植物从阳光中获得能量。

meaning: vt. 强制执⾏；迫使
example: The school must enforce the rules fairly.
exampleChinese: 学校必须公平地执行这些规定。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 从事，参加；与…交战 vt. 吸引；聘⽤ vi. 与…建⽴密切关系
example: The club will engage more students in science projects.
exampleChinese: 这个社团将让更多学生参与科学项目。

meaning: n. 订婚；约定；交战；参加，卷⼊
example: Their engagement was announced at dinner last night.
exampleChinese: 他们的订婚消息是在昨晚的晚餐上宣布的。

meaning: vt. vi. 折叠，对折；包，裹 vi. 倒闭，停演 n. 褶，褶层；褶痕；⽺圈 suff. 由…部分组成的；倍
example: Please fold the paper in half.
exampleChinese: 请把这张纸对折。

meaning: n. ⼈们；各位；家属；⺠间⾳乐 adj. ⺠间的，⺠俗的；流传⺠间的
example: The folk song was easy to sing.
exampleChinese: 这首民歌很容易唱。

meaning: vt. vi. 跟随；在…后发⽣；理解，明⽩ vt. 沿着；遵循，听从；追随；关注
example: The little dog likes to follow me home.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗喜欢跟着我回家。

meaning: adj. (时间上) 接着的；下述的 n. 拥护者，追随者；下述，下列 prep. 在…之后，由于
example: Read the following sentence carefully.
exampleChinese: 仔细阅读下面这句话。

meaning: n. 武⼒；⼒；影响⼤的事物；部队 vt. 强迫，迫使；强⾏移动；使发⽣
example: Good habits can force change over time.
exampleChinese: 好习惯随着时间推移能促成改变。

meaning: adj. 在前部的，在头部的 adv. 向 (或在) 船头，向 (或在) 机头
example: The captain stood at the fore of the ship.
exampleChinese: 船长站在船头。

meaning: n. 预测，预报 vt. 预测，预报
example: The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 天气预报说明天会下雨。

meaning: vt. 预⻅，预知，预料
example: No one can foresee the future exactly.
exampleChinese: 没有人能准确预见未来。
