meaning: vt. 缔造，建⽴；伪造；锻造，制作 vi. 稳步前进 n. 铁匠铺；锻造炉，锻造⻋间
example: The two cities hope to forge a strong trade link.
exampleChinese: 这两个城市希望建立牢固的贸易联系。

meaning: adj. 严肃的；令⼈沮丧的；阴森的
example: The room felt grim after the bad news arrived.
exampleChinese: 坏消息传来后，房间里的气氛很压抑。

meaning: vt. 抓紧；理解；急忙抓住 (机会) n. 紧抓，控制；理解 (⼒)
example: She used both hands to grasp the rope tightly.
exampleChinese: 她用双手紧紧抓住绳子。

meaning: n. 紧握，紧抓；掌控，控制；理解 vi. vt. 紧握，紧抓 vt. 使感兴趣；对…具有强烈影响
example: She held the rope with a firm grip.
exampleChinese: 她紧紧握住了绳子。

meaning: adj. 总的；严重的；令⼈恶⼼的 adv. 总共，全部 vt. (税前) 总收⼊为 n. (影⽚的) 总收⼊
example: The gross cost of the trip was higher than we expected.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行的总费用比我们预期的更高。

meaning: n. 地，⼟地；开阔地；领域；根据 vt. vi. (使) 搁浅 vt. 使停⻜，阻⽌…起⻜ adj. (⻝物) 磨细的，剁碎的
example: The ball rolled across the ground.
exampleChinese: 球从地面上滚了过去。

meaning: n. 组，群；集团；乐队，组合 vt. vi. (使) 成群，(使) 成组 vt. 把…分组
example: Our group meets after school every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们小组每周五放学后见面。

meaning: vt. 担保，确保；提供保修 n. 保证；保修单；保证⾦
example: This medicine has a safety guarantee.
exampleChinese: 这种药有安全保证。

meaning: n. 卫兵，看守；警戒，保卫；后卫 vt. 守卫，保卫；看守；提防
example: Two dogs guard the farm at night.
exampleChinese: 两只狗在夜里守卫农场。

meaning: vt. 包括；使成为…的⼀部分
example: The price include tax and service.
exampleChinese: 这个价格包含税和服务费。

meaning: adj. 费⽤全包的，包括的；包容性强的
example: The ticket price is inclusive of lunch and drinks.
exampleChinese: 票价包含午餐和饮料。

meaning: n. 收⼊，所得，收益
example: Their income helps pay for school and food.
exampleChinese: 他们的收入帮助支付学费和食物。

meaning: vt. 把…并⼊，包含；使组成公司
example: We can incorporate your idea into the final plan.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把你的想法纳入最终计划。

meaning: vi. vt. 增加，增多，增⻓ n. 增加，增多，增⻓
example: The price will increase next month.
exampleChinese: 价格下个月会上涨。

meaning: adv. 越来越多地
example: More people are increasingly using public transport.
exampleChinese: 越来越多的人在使用公共交通。

meaning: adj. 极好的，极⼤的；难以置信的
example: The view from the mountain was incredible.
exampleChinese: 山上的景色令人难以置信地美。

meaning: vt. 招致，引起，蒙受
example: If you arrive late, you may incur a fine.
exampleChinese: 如果你迟到，可能会招致罚款。

meaning: n. 联系；纽带；链接；交通路线 vt. 把…连接起来；使…相关联
example: This bridge will link the two towns.
exampleChinese: 这座桥将把这两个城镇连接起来。

meaning: n. 名单，清单 vt. (按某次序) 把…列表；列举 vi. vt. (被) 列⼊销售清单，列⼊价⽬表 vi. (船) (向⼀侧) 倾斜
example: Her name is first on the list.
exampleChinese: 她的名字在名单上的第一个。

meaning: adv. 字⾯上地；确实地；简直
example: He was literally shaking with fear.
exampleChinese: 他简直吓得发抖。

meaning: adj. ⽂学的；从事写作的
example: She enjoys reading literary novels.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢读文学小说。

meaning: n. ⽂学 (作品)；⽂献，资料
example: He wants to study literature in college.
exampleChinese: 他想在大学里学习文学。

meaning: n. 备忘录，公务便条
example: Please leave a memo on my desk.
exampleChinese: 请在我的桌上留一张备忘录。

meaning: n. 纪念碑；(追忆逝者的) 纪念物 adj. (对逝者) 纪念的
example: We left flowers at the memorial for the soldiers.
exampleChinese: 我们在纪念碑前为士兵献了花。

meaning: n. 记忆⼒；回忆；内存
example: She has a good memory for names.
exampleChinese: 她对名字记忆力很好。

meaning: adj. 精神上的；智⼒的；疯狂的
example: The exam caused her a lot of mental stress.
exampleChinese: 这次考试给她带来了很大的精神压力。

meaning: vt. 提及，说起 n. 提及，说起
example: She did not mention the change in plans.
exampleChinese: 她没有提到计划的变动。

meaning: n. 导师，指导者 vt. 指导，辅导
example: My mentor gave me useful advice before the exam.
exampleChinese: 我的导师在考试前给了我有用的建议。

meaning: adj. pron. 其他的，另外的；相反⽅向的
example: One shoe is black, and the other is brown.
exampleChinese: 一只鞋是黑色的，另一只是棕色的。

meaning: adv. 否则；除此以外；以其他⽅式 adj. 不同的
example: Hurry up, otherwise we will miss the bus.
exampleChinese: 快点，否则我们会错过公交车。

meaning: n. 结果，后果
example: The final outcome was better than we expected.
exampleChinese: 最终结果比我们预期的要好。

meaning: n. 迹象，征兆；标牌，标志；⼿势 vt. vi. 签 (名)，签字；和…签约
example: Please sign your name at the bottom.
exampleChinese: 请在底部签上你的名字。

meaning: n. 签名，署名；签署；鲜明特征
example: She wrote her signature at the bottom of the form.
exampleChinese: 她在表格底部写下了署名。

meaning: n. 信号；标志；信号灯 vi. vt. 发信号，⽰意 vt. 标志，预⽰；表达，显⽰
example: The red signal told the cars to stop.
exampleChinese: 红色信号示意汽车停下。

meaning: n. 重要性，意义；意思，含义
example: The teacher explained the significance of the event.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了这件事的重要意义。

meaning: adj. 重要的；数量⼤的；意味深⻓的
example: This report shows a significant improvement in scores.
exampleChinese: 这份报告显示成绩有了显著提高。

meaning: vt. 表⽰，意味着；表达，表明 vi. 具有重要性，要紧
example: The red light will signify that the room is in use.
exampleChinese: 红灯将表示这个房间正在使用中。

meaning: adj. 相像的，类似的
example: Your bag looks similar to mine.
exampleChinese: 你的包看起来和我的很相似。

meaning: adj. 简单的；简朴的；普通的 adj. (⽤于强调) 纯粹的
example: This math problem is simple to solve.
exampleChinese: 这道数学题很容易解决。

meaning: n. 简单，容易；质朴，朴素
example: The simplicity of the design makes it easy to use.
exampleChinese: 这个设计的简洁让它很容易使用。

meaning: vt. 简化，使简洁
example: We can simplify the problem with a chart.
exampleChinese: 我们可以用图表来简化这个问题。

meaning: adv. 仅仅；简直；简单地；简朴地
example: She simply smiled and said nothing.
exampleChinese: 她只是简单地笑了笑，什么也没说。

meaning: adj. 松弛的；萧条的；懈怠的 n. (绳索的) 松弛部分 vi. 懈怠，偷懒
example: The slack rope made the tent unstable.
exampleChinese: 松弛的绳子让帐篷不稳。

meaning: n. 瘾君⼦；对…⼊迷的⼈
example: He is a phone addict and checks it all day.
exampleChinese: 他是个手机瘾君子，一整天都在看手机。

meaning: vi. vt. 增加，相加 vt. 补充说，继续说；添加 (特⾊)
example: Add some sugar to the tea.
exampleChinese: 在茶里加一些糖。

meaning: n. 增添；添加物；加法；增建部分
example: We need an addition to the list.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在名单上再添加一项。

meaning: adj. 附加的，额外的
example: We need additional chairs for the meeting.
exampleChinese: 我们开会还需要额外的椅子。

meaning: n. 地址；⽹址；演讲；称呼 (⽅式) vt. 寄往；对…讲话；称呼；处理
example: Please write your address on this form.
exampleChinese: 请把你的地址写在这张表上。

meaning: adj. ⾜够的，满⾜要求的
example: The food was adequate for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这些食物对全班来说是足够的。

meaning: vt. 调整，调节；整理 (⾐着) vi. vt. (使) 适应
example: Please adjust your seat so you can see the screen.
exampleChinese: 请调整一下你的座位，这样你就能看清屏幕。

meaning: n. 管理，⾏政；政府，管理部⻔
example: The new administration improved the city park.
exampleChinese: 新管理层改善了城市公园。

meaning: vt. 钦佩，仰慕；欣赏，观赏
example: I admire my teacher for her patience.
exampleChinese: 我钦佩老师的耐心。

meaning: n. 准许加⼊；承认，招认；⻔票钱
example: Her admission that she was wrong surprised everyone.
exampleChinese: 她承认自己错了，这让所有人都很惊讶。

meaning: vi. vt. 承认 vt. 准许…进⼊；准许…加⼊；收治
example: I admit I forgot my homework.
exampleChinese: 我承认我忘带作业了。

meaning: vi. vt. 适应 vt. 改造 (以适应新情况)；改编
example: Children can adapt quickly to a new school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们能很快适应新学校。

meaning: vt. 采纳，采⽤；正式通过 vi. vt. 收养，领养
example: The school will adopt a new reading plan.
exampleChinese: 学校将采用一个新的阅读计划。

meaning: n. 成年⼈；成年动物 adj. 成年的，成熟的；成⼈的
example: An adult must sign this form.
exampleChinese: 这张表格必须由成年人签字。

meaning: n. ⽀架；⽛箍；背带 vt. 防备，做准备；顶住，抵住
example: The workers will brace the door before the storm.
exampleChinese: 工人们会在暴风雨来临前加固这扇门。

meaning: n. ⼤脑；智⼒；⾮常聪明的⼈
example: Regular reading is good for the brain.
exampleChinese: 经常阅读对大脑有好处。

meaning: n. 树枝；分部；分⽀机构；分⽀ vi. (路或河) 分岔
example: The road branch into two paths.
exampleChinese: 这条路分成了两条小路。

meaning: n. 品牌；⼀种，⼀类；烙印 vt. 加污名于；(给牲畜)打烙印
example: The teacher will brand each folder with the class name.
exampleChinese: 老师会在每个文件夹上标记班级名称。

meaning: vt. 扔，掷，抛；甩 (以⽰愤怒) vi. vt. (使) 摇摆，颠簸；掷硬币决定 n. 掷硬币决定；猛仰头；投掷
example: Please toss me the ball.
exampleChinese: 请把球扔给我。

meaning: adj. 全部的，总计的；完全的 n. 总数，合计 vt. 总计为；计算…的总和
example: The total cost was fifty dollars.
exampleChinese: 总费用是五十美元。

meaning: vt. 触摸；移动；使感动；影响 vi. vt. 接触，触及 n. 触觉；触摸；润⾊；⼿法；少许
example: Do not touch the wet paint.
exampleChinese: 不要碰湿油漆。

meaning: adj. 艰难的；严厉的，强硬的 adj. 坚强的；剽悍的；结实的 n. 暴徒，恶棍 v. 坚持，捱过
example: The hike was tough, but we finished it.
exampleChinese: 这次徒步很艰苦，但我们完成了。

meaning: vt. 对待；治疗；处理；款待 n. 款待
example: Please treat your classmates with respect.
exampleChinese: 请尊重地对待你的同学。

meaning: n. 条约，协定
example: The two countries signed a peace treaty.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家签署了一项和平条约。

meaning: n. 趋势，倾向 vi. 趋向；在社交媒体上引起热议
example: Many stores trend toward online sales now.
exampleChinese: 现在许多商店都趋向于在线销售。

meaning: n. 恶习；(⻩赌毒等) 罪⾏；⽼虎钳 pref. 副的，次的
example: A bad vice can hurt a person's health.
exampleChinese: 坏习惯会损害一个人的健康。

meaning: adj. 残暴的，凶猛的 adj. 恶毒的；恶性的，严重的
example: The dog gave me a vicious bite.
exampleChinese: 那只狗凶狠地咬了我一口。

meaning: n. 受害者，患者；祭品
example: The victim called the police for help.
exampleChinese: 受害人打电话向警察求助。

meaning: vi. vt. 发出咔嗒声；点击 vi. 恍然⼤悟；(与某⼈) 合得来 n. 咔嗒声；点击
example: Please click the button to start.
exampleChinese: 请点击按钮开始。

meaning: n. 客⼾，顾客，当事⼈，委托⼈
example: Our client asked for a quick reply.
exampleChinese: 我们的客户要求尽快回复。

meaning: vi. 紧紧抓住；粘住；依恋；坚守
example: She will cling to her dream.
exampleChinese: 她会紧紧坚持自己的梦想。

meaning: vt. vi. 关闭；不开放；停业；(使) 结束 vt. 合上，合拢；(使) 缩⼩，接近 adj. 接近的；可能的；亲密的 adv. 接近，靠近，紧挨着
example: Please close the window before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把窗户关上。

meaning: n. 贮藏室，壁橱，⾐柜 adj. 隐藏 (⾝份等) 的 vt. 把…关在房间⾥
example: The old coats are in the closet.
exampleChinese: 旧外套在壁橱里。

meaning: n. 密码，代码；⾏为准则，法规 vt. 给…编号；编程，编码
example: The computer can code simple tasks.
exampleChinese: 这台电脑可以编写简单的任务代码。

meaning: adj. 个⼈的，私⼈的；亲⾃的
example: Please keep your personal diary private.
exampleChinese: 请把你的私人日记保密。

meaning: n. 性格；魅⼒，⽓质；名⼈；特⾊
example: Her personality makes her easy to remember.
exampleChinese: 她的性格让人很容易记住她。

meaning: n. ⼈员，员⼯；⼈事部⻔
example: The personnel office hired two new workers.
exampleChinese: 人事部门雇了两名新员工。

meaning: n. 类型；形式；表格；形状；体能 vi. vt. (使) 出现；(使) 形成；建⽴ vt. (使) 成形，组成；塑造 (性格)
example: Clouds form over the hills in the evening.
exampleChinese: 傍晚时云在山丘上方形成。

meaning: adj. 正式的，正规的
example: He wore a formal suit to the dinner.
exampleChinese: 他穿着正式的西装去参加晚宴。

meaning: n. 版式，格式，形式 vt. 格式化；安排版式
example: Please save the file in PDF format.
exampleChinese: 请把文件保存为 PDF 格式。

meaning: n. 形成，产⽣；组成物；编队
example: The formation of ice took several hours.
exampleChinese: 冰的形成花了几个小时。

meaning: adj. 以前的；前者的
example: My former teacher still sends me postcards.
exampleChinese: 我从前的老师还会给我寄明信片。

meaning: adj. 令⼈敬畏的，难对付的
example: That mountain is a formidable challenge.
exampleChinese: 那座山是一个令人畏惧的挑战。

meaning: n. 公式；分⼦式；⽅案；配⽅
example: This formula can solve the problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 这个公式可以快速解决这个问题。

meaning: vt. 规划，策划，构想；确切表达
example: The team will formulate a new plan.
exampleChinese: 这个团队会制定一个新计划。

meaning: adj. 幸运的
example: We were fortunate to catch the last bus.
exampleChinese: 我们很幸运赶上了末班车。

meaning: n. 运⽓；时运；命运；巨款
example: He made a fortune by selling computers.
exampleChinese: 他靠卖电脑赚了一大笔财富。

meaning: n. 指南；导游；有指导意义的事物 vt. 给…领路；指导，影响
example: This guide explains how to use the app.
exampleChinese: 这本指南说明了如何使用这个应用。

meaning: n. 指导，引导；制导，导航
example: The teacher gave me guidance on my project.
exampleChinese: 老师就我的项目给了我指导。

meaning: n. 指导⽅针，准则；参考
example: Follow the safety guideline at all times.
exampleChinese: 任何时候都要遵守安全指导方针。

meaning: n. (同⼀⼯作、兴趣或⽬标的) 协会
example: The guild meets every Friday night.
exampleChinese: 这个协会每周五晚上开会。

meaning: n. 内疚，悔恨；犯罪，罪⾏
example: He felt guilt after telling a lie.
exampleChinese: 他说谎后感到内疚。

meaning: adj. 内疚的；有罪的，有过失的
example: He felt guilty about lying to his friend.
exampleChinese: 他因为对朋友撒谎而感到内疚。

meaning: n. 认出，识别；承认，认可；赞赏
example: Her performance earned her recognition.
exampleChinese: 她的表现为她赢得了认可。

meaning: vt. 认出；承认；公认；表彰
example: I recognize her voice right away.
exampleChinese: 我一下子就认出了她的声音。

meaning: vt. 推荐；建议；使受欢迎
example: Can you recommend a good book for me?
exampleChinese: 你能给我推荐一本好书吗？

meaning: vi. 恢复，复原；康复，痊愈 vt. 恢复 (知觉等)；全额收回；找回
example: He needs time to recover after the long illness.
exampleChinese: 他在长时间生病后需要时间恢复。

meaning: n. 康复，痊愈；恢复，复苏；收回
example: Her recovery was faster than expected.
exampleChinese: 她的康复比预期更快。

meaning: vt. vi. 招收，招聘，征召 n. 新兵；新成员
example: The school will recruit ten new volunteers this month.
exampleChinese: 学校这个月将招收十名新志愿者。

meaning: vt. vi. 卖，出售 vt. 推荐，⾃荐 n. 销售品
example: They sell fresh fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 他们在市场卖新鲜水果。

meaning: vt. 寄，发送；传达；派遣；使得
example: I will send the letter tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天会寄这封信。

meaning: adj. 级别⾼的；成⼈的；⽼年的 adj. 中学的；毕业年级的 n. 年⻓者；毕业班学⽣
example: My senior asked me to finish the report today.
exampleChinese: 我的上司让我今天完成报告。

meaning: adj. 聪明的；⾐冠楚楚的；光鲜的 adj. 智能的 vi. 感到剧烈刺痛；因批评等难过
example: The smart student solved the math problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个聪明的学生很快解出了这道数学题。

meaning: vi. 有…⽓味；散发着臭⽓ vt. 闻到；嗅；觉察出 n. ⽓味；嗅觉；臭味；嗅
example: I could smell fresh bread in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 我能闻出厨房里新鲜面包的气味。

meaning: vt. vi. 浸泡，湿透 vt. 使湿透，把…浸湿；宰客 n. 浸泡，湿透；泡澡
example: Please soak the beans in water overnight.
exampleChinese: 请把豆子在水里浸泡一整夜。

meaning: vi. 升空；猛增；翱翔；耸⽴；⾼涨
example: The plane began to soar above the clouds.
exampleChinese: 飞机开始在云层上方飞翔。

meaning: adj. 喜欢交际的，合群的
example: She is sociable and easily makes new friends.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢交际，很容易交到新朋友。

meaning: adj. 社会的；社交的；群居的
example: She is very social at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校里很善于交际。

meaning: n. 社会主义
example: She studied the history of socialism in school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校学习了社会主义的历史。

meaning: n. 社会；社团；上流社会；交往
example: Books can help us understand society better.
exampleChinese: 书籍能帮助我们更好地理解社会。

meaning: n. 社会学
example: I am studying sociology at university.
exampleChinese: 我正在大学学习社会学。

meaning: adj. 可溶解的；(问题) 可解决的
example: This sugar is soluble in hot water.
exampleChinese: 这种糖可以溶解在热水中。

meaning: n. 解决办法；谜底，答案；溶液
example: We need a simple solution to this problem.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一个解决这个问题的简单办法。

meaning: vt. 解决，解答
example: We need to solve this math problem first.
exampleChinese: 我们需要先解决这道数学题。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 分开，脱离，拆卸 vt. 摆脱，离开；派遣
example: You can detach the camera from the phone.
exampleChinese: 你可以把相机从手机上拆下来。

meaning: n. 细节；详情；资料信息；⼩分队 vt. 详细列举，详述；派遣
example: The teacher gave a detail of the plan.
exampleChinese: 老师详细说明了这个计划。

meaning: vt. 拘留，扣押；耽搁
example: The police may detain the suspect for questioning.
exampleChinese: 警察可能会拘留嫌疑人进行询问。

meaning: n. 阴影；阴暗处；少许 vt. 跟踪，盯梢；跟随…实地学习 adj. 影⼦内阁的
example: The tree cast a long shadow.
exampleChinese: 那棵树投下了长长的影子。

meaning: n. 阴凉处；灯罩；⾊度；细微差别 vt. 给…遮挡光线；加灯罩；画阴影
example: We sat in the shade of a big tree.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在一棵大树的树荫下。

meaning: n. 种类，类别；分类，排序 vt. 分类，整理；妥善处理
example: What sort of music do you like?
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪种音乐？

meaning: n. 灵魂；精神，精髓；某种⼈
example: Music can touch the soul.
exampleChinese: 音乐可以触动灵魂。

meaning: n. 声⾳，声响 vt. vi. 听起来；鸣警报 adj. 合理的，正确的；完好的，健康的 adj. 透彻的，全⾯的；酣畅的
example: I heard a strange sound outside.
exampleChinese: 我听到外面有一种奇怪的声音。

meaning: adj. 酸的；馊的；(⼈) 阴郁的 vi. vt. (关系、态度) 变坏；变味，变馊
example: The lemon tastes very sour.
exampleChinese: 这个柠檬吃起来很酸。

meaning: n. 来源，出处；消息来源；根源 vt. (从…) 获得
example: This article gives the source of the rumor.
exampleChinese: 这篇文章说明了谣言的来源。

meaning: n. 前进；进步，发展；预付款；上涨 vi. vt. 前进；进步，发展 vt. 促进；预付；提议；提前 adj. 预先的，事先的；先⾏的
example: The company plans to advance next year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划在明年发展。

meaning: adj. 先进的；(课程) ⾼级的；晚期的
example: The class uses advanced computers for training.
exampleChinese: 这门课程使用先进的计算机进行训练。

meaning: n. 优点，有利条件，优势 vt. 使处于有利地位
example: One advantage of walking is that it is free.
exampleChinese: 步行的一个优点是它不花钱。

meaning: n. 建议，忠告
example: Thank you for your advice.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你的建议。

meaning: vi. vt. 建议，忠告；提供专业咨询 vt. 正式通知
example: I advise you to check your answer again.
exampleChinese: 我建议你再检查一遍答案。

meaning: adj. 明智的，可取的
example: It is advisable to wear a coat today.
exampleChinese: 今天穿外套是明智的。

meaning: vt. 提倡，主张 n. 拥护者，提倡者；辩护律师
example: Many parents advocate reading every day.
exampleChinese: 许多家长提倡每天阅读。

meaning: adj. 美学的，审美的 n. 美学，审美学；美感
example: The museum has an aesthetic design.
exampleChinese: 这座博物馆有很强的美学设计感。

meaning: n. 事务；私事；事情；暧昧关系
example: It was a serious affair for the whole family.
exampleChinese: 这对整个家庭来说是一件严肃的事情。

meaning: vt. 影响；(疾病) 侵袭；打动；假装
example: Cold weather can affect our mood.
exampleChinese: 寒冷的天气会影响我们的心情。

meaning: n. 喜爱，钟爱；爱情，爱慕
example: He showed great affection for his little sister.
exampleChinese: 他对小妹妹表现出很深的喜爱。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) ⾪属于，(使) 紧密联系 n. 分⽀机构，附属组织，分公司
example: Our company will affiliate with a local charity.
exampleChinese: 我们公司将与一家当地慈善机构建立附属关系。

meaning: vt. 证实，确认；断⾔，申明
example: The witness will affirm what she saw.
exampleChinese: 证人将证实她所看到的情况。

meaning: vt. 买得起；承担得起；提供，给予
example: This job can afford us more chances to learn.
exampleChinese: 这份工作能给我们提供更多学习的机会。

meaning: n. 违背，破坏；(关系) 中断；缺⼝ vt. 违反，违背；在…上打开缺⼝
example: Any breach of the rules will be punished.
exampleChinese: 任何违反规则的行为都将受到处罚。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 破，裂，碎；弄坏；暂停 vt. 违反；打破 (纪录)；弄破；中断 vi. 逃脱；开始，(⻛暴) 发作；透露 n. 休息，间歇；间断；终⽌，中断
example: Be careful not to break the glass.
exampleChinese: 小心不要把玻璃打破。

meaning: n. 故障；破裂；精神崩溃；明细
example: A power breakdown stopped the train.
exampleChinese: 电力故障使火车停了下来。

meaning: vi. (动物) 繁殖 vt. 饲养，培育；导致，酿成 n. 品种；(⼈或物的) 类型
example: Farmers breed sheep for wool.
exampleChinese: 农民饲养绵羊来获取羊毛。

meaning: n. 简洁；短暂
example: For brevity, she wrote only one short paragraph.
exampleChinese: 为了简洁，她只写了一个短段落。

meaning: vi. 同时发⽣；(想法等) 相同；重叠
example: Their opinions coincide on this issue.
exampleChinese: 他们在这个问题上的看法一致。

meaning: vi. 倒塌；昏倒；崩溃；暴跌 vi. vt. 折叠，可折叠；(肺或⾎管) 萎陷 n. 崩溃；倒塌；暴跌
example: The old bridge may collapse after the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 大雨过后，这座老桥可能会倒塌。

meaning: n. 同事，同僚
example: My colleague helped me finish the report.
exampleChinese: 我的同事帮我完成了这份报告。

meaning: vt. 收集；收藏；领取，收⾛；收账 vi. vt. 聚积，积累；募捐，募集；赢得 vi. 聚集，集合，汇集 adj. (电话) 由受话⼈付费的
example: I collect stamps from different countries.
exampleChinese: 我收集来自不同国家的邮票。

meaning: n. 收藏品；⼀群；取⾛；收集 n. 系列时装；作品集
example: The museum has a large collection of old coins.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆有一大批旧硬币的收藏。

meaning: adj. 集体的，共同的 n. 集体企业，合作农场
example: The team made a collective decision to study on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 全体成员共同决定周六学习。

meaning: vi. 碰撞，相撞；相冲突，相抵触
example: The two bikes collide if you do not watch the road.
exampleChinese: 如果你不看路，两辆自行车就会相撞。

meaning: n. 柱，柱状物；列；栏；专栏
example: Please turn to the column about science news.
exampleChinese: 请翻到科学新闻专栏。

meaning: n. 战⽃，搏⽃ vt. 与…作⽃争，打击，战⽃
example: We must combat pollution in our city.
exampleChinese: 我们必须与城市里的污染作斗争。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 结合，组合；合并，协⼒ vt. 兼备，使融合；同时做 n. 联合收割机；集团，联合企业
example: We can combine sugar and water in this cup.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把糖和水混合在这个杯子里。

meaning: n. 命令；指挥，管辖；掌握，精通 vt. 命令；应得，博得；掌握，掌管 vt. vi. 指挥，统率
example: The coach will command the team from the sidelines.
exampleChinese: 教练将在场边指挥这支队伍。

meaning: vt. 赞扬；推荐；把…托付给
example: The teacher will commend her for honest work.
exampleChinese: 老师会表扬她的诚实工作。

meaning: n. 评论，意⻅ vi. vt. 作出评论，发表意⻅
example: He refused to comment on the news.
exampleChinese: 他拒绝评论这则新闻。

meaning: n. 商业，贸易
example: Commerce brings new jobs to the town.
exampleChinese: 商业给这个小镇带来了新的工作岗位。

meaning: adj. 商业的；营利的；商业化的 n. (电视或电台) ⼴告
example: We saw a commercial on TV last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚在电视上看到了一个商业广告。

meaning: n. 委员会；佣⾦；⼿续费；委托 vt. 正式委托；任命…为军官
example: The city commission approved the new park plan.
exampleChinese: 市委员会批准了新的公园计划。

meaning: vt. 犯 (错或罪)；承诺；花费 vi. 忠于，全⼼全意投⼊
example: They can commit a crime if they ignore the law.
exampleChinese: 如果他们无视法律，就可能犯罪。

meaning: n. 委员会
example: The committee met to plan the school fair.
exampleChinese: 委员会开会筹划学校集市。

meaning: n. 商品，货物；有⽤的东西
example: Rice is a major commodity in many countries.
exampleChinese: 大米是许多国家的重要商品。

meaning: adj. 常⻅的，普通的；共有的
example: This is a common mistake for new students.
exampleChinese: 这对新学生来说是一个常见错误。

meaning: vi. vt. 交流，沟通；表达，传达
example: We communicate by email every week.
exampleChinese: 我们每周都通过电子邮件沟通。

meaning: n. 交流，沟通；通信；信息
example: Good communication helps a team work well.
exampleChinese: 良好的沟通能帮助团队顺利合作。

meaning: n. 共产主义
example: He studied the history of communism.
exampleChinese: 他研究了共产主义的历史。

meaning: n. 社区，群体；群落
example: Our community planted trees along the street.
exampleChinese: 我们社区在街道两旁种了树。

meaning: vt. 发现，察觉，测出
example: The test can detect tiny changes in the water.
exampleChinese: 这种测试可以发现水中的微小变化。

meaning: vt. vi. 威慑，制⽌，阻⽌
example: A strong fence can deter thieves.
exampleChinese: 坚固的围栏可以威慑小偷。

meaning: vi. 恶化，变坏，衰退
example: Without care, the patient's condition may deteriorate.
exampleChinese: 如果不加护理，病人的状况可能会恶化。

meaning: vt. 确定，查明；决定 vt. vi. 决意，下决⼼
example: We must determine our goal before we start.
exampleChinese: 我们必须在开始前下定目标。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 发展，成⻓；患 (病)；加强 vt. 开发，研制；修建；阐明；冲洗
example: The company plans to develop a new app.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划开发一款新应用。

meaning: n. 仪器，设备；⼿段；花招；炸弹
example: This device can measure temperature quickly.
exampleChinese: 这个设备可以快速测量温度。

meaning: vt. 想出，发明，设计
example: She will devise a new way to save water.
exampleChinese: 她会想出一种节水的新方法。

meaning: vt. 确保
example: We must ensure that everyone is safe.
exampleChinese: 我们必须确保每个人都安全。

meaning: vt. 牵涉，涉及，需要
example: The trip will entail extra costs.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行将需要额外费用。

meaning: adv. 确实，的确；真正地；其实
example: Indeed, the answer is correct.
exampleChinese: 的确，答案是对的。

example: The country values independence and self-reliance.
exampleChinese: 这个国家重视独立性和自立性。

meaning: adj. 独⽴的；⾃⽴的，⾃主的 n. ⽆党派议员
example: She became an independent adult.
exampleChinese: 她成了一名独立的成年人。

meaning: n. 索引；指数；标志，指标 vt. 为…编索引
example: You can find the topic in the index.
exampleChinese: 你可以在索引里找到这个主题。

meaning: adj. 仅仅，只不过；极⼩的，单单 n. ⼩湖，池塘
example: It was a mere misunderstanding.
exampleChinese: 那不过是个误会而已。

meaning: adv. 只不过，仅仅
example: This coat is merely a little too big for me.
exampleChinese: 这件外套对我来说只不过有点大。

meaning: adj. (说法) 貌似合理的；花⾔巧语的
example: Her excuse sounded plausible at first.
exampleChinese: 她的借口起初听起来似乎很合理。

meaning: n. 恳求；抗辩；(犯罪的) 借⼝
example: The student's plea for one more chance was sincere.
exampleChinese: 那个学生请求再给一次机会的恳求很真诚。

meaning: vi. vt. 恳求，央求；认罪，申辩；声援 vt. 陈述案情；以…为借⼝
example: She will plead for mercy before the judge.
exampleChinese: 她会在法官面前恳求宽恕。

meaning: n. 故事情节；阴谋；⼩块⼟地 vi. vt. 密谋，暗中策划 vt. 绘制
example: The plot of the movie was exciting.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的情节很精彩。

meaning: n. 政策；保险单；(处事) 原则
example: The school has a strict no-phone policy.
exampleChinese: 学校有严格的禁用手机政策。

meaning: adj. 有礼貌的，客⽓的
example: She was polite to the new student.
exampleChinese: 她对新同学很有礼貌。

meaning: adj. 政治的；政党的；关⼼政治的
example: The school held a political debate.
exampleChinese: 学校举办了一场政治辩论。

meaning: n. 从政者，政治家；玩弄权术者
example: The politician spoke to the crowd after the vote.
exampleChinese: 那位政治家在投票后对人群发表了讲话。

meaning: n. 政治；权⼒⽃争；政⻅；政治学
example: We learned about politics in history class.
exampleChinese: 我们在历史课上学习了政治。

meaning: n. ⺠意调查；投票，投票站 vt. 做⺠意调查 vt. vi. 获得 (票数)
example: A recent poll showed that most students want longer lunch breaks.
exampleChinese: 最近一次民意调查显示，大多数学生希望午休时间更长。

meaning: vi. vt. 沉思，考虑
example: I will ponder your advice before I decide.
exampleChinese: 我会在做决定前仔细考虑你的建议。

meaning: n. 光束，光线；横梁；平衡⽊ vi. vt. 眉开眼笑；照耀 vt. 发射 (信号)
example: A steel beam supports the roof.
exampleChinese: 一根钢横梁支撑着屋顶。

meaning: vlink. 成为，变得 vt. 适合，与…相称
example: She wants to become a doctor someday.
exampleChinese: 她想有一天成为一名医生。

meaning: vt. 剥夺，使不能享有
example: Poor sleep can deprive students of energy in class.
exampleChinese: 睡眠不足会使学生在课堂上失去精力。

meaning: vi. 起源于，来⾃ vt. 从…中获得
example: Many English words derive from Latin.
exampleChinese: 许多英语单词源自拉丁语。

meaning: vt. 描述，描写；形成…形状
example: Can you describe your new teacher?
exampleChinese: 你能描述一下你的新老师吗？

meaning: n. 描述，叙述；种类，类型
example: Her description of the park was very clear.
exampleChinese: 她对这个公园的描述非常清楚。

meaning: vt. 值得，应得，应受
example: You deserve a rest after hard work.
exampleChinese: 你努力工作后应该休息一下。

meaning: n. 设计；设计⽅案；花纹；意图 vt. 设计
example: She helped design the school website.
exampleChinese: 她帮忙设计了学校网站。

meaning: vt. 指定，选定；指派，任命；表⽰ adj. 尚未就职的
example: The teacher will designate Emma as the team leader.
exampleChinese: 老师将指定艾玛为小组组长。

meaning: adj. 理想的，值得拥有的；性感的
example: A good coat is desirable in cold weather.
exampleChinese: 在寒冷天气里，一件好外套是很值得拥有的。

meaning: n. 渴望，欲望 vt. 渴望，期望
example: She has a desire to learn more.
exampleChinese: 她有想学更多知识的欲望。

meaning: n. 瑕疵，缺点；错误；性格缺陷
example: There is a small flaw in the plan.
exampleChinese: 这个计划有一个小缺陷。

meaning: adj. 灵活的，可变通的；可弯曲的
example: The teacher gave us a flexible deadline for the project.
exampleChinese: 老师给了我们一个灵活的项目截止日期。

meaning: vt. 扔，掷；猛动 (⾝体) n. ⼀时的放纵；短暂的⻛流韵事
example: He will fling the ball across the yard.
exampleChinese: 他会把球猛地掷过院子。

meaning: vi. 繁荣，兴旺；茁壮成⻓ vt. (为引起注意) 挥舞，挥动 n. 夸张动作；华丽辞藻
example: The town can flourish when more jobs are created.
exampleChinese: 当创造更多工作岗位时，这个城镇就能繁荣起来。

meaning: vi. 成⻓；增加，扩⼤；逐渐开始 vi. vt. 种植，⽣⻓；(使) 留⻓ vt. 使扩⼤，使扩展 vlink. 逐渐变得，逐渐成为
example: The town will grow as more families move in.
exampleChinese: 随着更多家庭搬来，这个城镇会发展起来。

meaning: n. 成年⼈，⼤⼈ adj. 成年的，成⼈的；有成⼈特点的
example: The movie is aimed at grown-up viewers.
exampleChinese: 这部电影面向成年人观众。

meaning: n. 成⻓，⽣⻓；增加，增⻓，增强
example: The growth of the city is very fast.
exampleChinese: 这座城市的增长非常快。

meaning: vt. 阻碍，妨碍，阻⽌
example: Noise can hinder your concentration in class.
exampleChinese: 噪音会妨碍你在课堂上的专注力。

meaning: n. 暗⽰，提⽰；迹象；少许；建议 vt. vi. 暗⽰，提⽰
example: She gave a hint that the test would be easy.
exampleChinese: 她暗示这次测试会很容易。

meaning: adv. 迄今，到 (某时) 为⽌
example: Hitherto, the experiment had shown no clear result.
exampleChinese: 迄今为止，这个实验还没有显示出明确的结果。

meaning: n. 影响；撞击，碰撞 vi. vt. 影响；撞击，碰撞
example: The new bridge had a huge impact on travel time.
exampleChinese: 这座新桥对出行时间产生了巨大影响。

meaning: vt. 削弱，损伤
example: Too much screen time can impair your eyesight.
exampleChinese: 过多的屏幕时间会损害你的视力。

meaning: vt. 传达，传授；赋予…特定品质
example: A good teacher can impart confidence to students.
exampleChinese: 一位好老师能把自信传给学生。

meaning: vt. 履⾏，实施，贯彻 n. ⼯具，器具，⽤具
example: The school will implement the new rules next month.
exampleChinese: 学校下个月将实施新规定。

meaning: n. 可能的影响；暗⽰，含意；牵连
example: The report mentioned the implication of higher costs.
exampleChinese: 这份报告提到了成本上升的潜在影响。

meaning: adj. 含蓄的，不⾔明的；内含的 adj. 绝对的
example: Her smile gave an implicit answer.
exampleChinese: 她的微笑给出了含蓄的回答。

meaning: vt. 暗⽰，暗指；意味着，表明
example: His tone can imply that he is upset.
exampleChinese: 他的语气可以暗示他生气了。

meaning: vt. 进⼝，引进；导⼊，输⼊ n. 进⼝ (货)；舶来品；重要性，意义
example: Our country will import more oil this year.
exampleChinese: 我国今年将进口更多石油。

meaning: n. 重要性
example: The teacher explained the importance of sleep.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了睡眠的重要性。

meaning: adj. 重要的，重⼤的，有影响⼒的
example: It is important to get enough sleep.
exampleChinese: 保证充足睡眠很重要。

meaning: vt. 强制实⾏；将…强加于；使承受 vi. 给…添⿇烦
example: The school will impose stricter rules next month.
exampleChinese: 学校下个月将强制实行更严格的规定。

meaning: vt. vi. 使印象深刻，使钦佩 vt. 使…谨记
example: Her hard work will impress the teacher.
exampleChinese: 她的努力学习会给老师留下深刻印象。

meaning: n. 印象；印象画；滑稽模仿；假象
example: The interview made a good impression on her.
exampleChinese: 这次面试给她留下了好印象。

meaning: adj. 使⼈印象深刻的，令⼈敬佩的
example: The tall bridge was impressive at sunset.
exampleChinese: 那座高桥在日落时分令人印象深刻。

meaning: vi. vt. 改进，改善，提⾼
example: Reading every day can improve your English.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读可以提高你的英语水平。

meaning: n. 冲动；脉冲；推动⼒
example: I had an impulse to call my grandmother.
exampleChinese: 我有一种想给奶奶打电话的冲动。

meaning: n. 限制，限度，极限；界限，范围 vt. 限制，限定；限量
example: The school has a strict limit on phone use.
exampleChinese: 学校对手机使用有严格限制。

meaning: n. 限制，制约；限制规则；局限
example: The main limitation of this app is battery life.
exampleChinese: 这个应用的主要局限是电池续航。

meaning: adj. 有限的，限量的
example: Our trip was limited to three days.
exampleChinese: 我们的旅行只有三天。

meaning: n. 源头，起因；出⾝
example: No one knows the origin of the old song.
exampleChinese: 没有人知道这首老歌的起源。

meaning: adj. 起初的；原创的；原作的 n. 原件，原⽂
example: This is the original painting, not a copy.
exampleChinese: 这是原作，不是复制品。

meaning: vi. 起源，发源 vt. 创始，发起
example: This custom can originate from an old festival.
exampleChinese: 这一习俗可以起源于一个古老的节日。

meaning: n. 请愿书；申诉书 vi. vt. 请愿；(向法庭) 申请；祈祷
example: The students signed a petition for longer library hours.
exampleChinese: 学生们签署了要求延长图书馆开放时间的请愿书。

meaning: n. 阶段，时期；(⽉亮的) 盈亏 vt. 分阶段进⾏，逐步做
example: We studied each phase of the science project.
exampleChinese: 我们研究了这个科学项目的每个阶段。

meaning: n. 现象；⾮凡的⼈或事
example: The rainbow was a beautiful phenomenon after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨后出现的彩虹是一种美丽的现象。

meaning: n. 哲学家
example: The philosopher asked deep questions about life and truth.
exampleChinese: 这位哲学家提出了关于生命和真理的深刻问题。

meaning: n. 哲学；哲学体系；信条
example: Her philosophy is to work hard and stay kind.
exampleChinese: 她的信条是努力工作并保持善良。

meaning: n. 短语，词组；成语，习语；乐句 vt. (以某种⽅式) 表达
example: This phrase appears in many English books.
exampleChinese: 这个短语出现在很多英语书里。

meaning: adj. ⾝体的；物质的；物理学的 n. 体检
example: He needs a physical before he joins the team.
exampleChinese: 他加入队伍前需要做一次体格检查。

meaning: n. (内科) 医⽣
example: The physician examined the patient carefully.
exampleChinese: 这位医师仔细检查了病人。

meaning: vt. vi. 刺⼊；(光、声等) 穿透；突破
example: Be careful not to pierce the bag with your pen.
exampleChinese: 小心别用你的笔把袋子刺破了。

meaning: adj. 公司的；全体的，团体的
example: The company offered corporate training for new employees.
exampleChinese: 这家公司为新员工提供了公司培训。

meaning: n. ⼤公司，⼤企业
example: The corporation opened a new office in Shanghai.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在上海开设了一家新办事处。

meaning: n. 原因；正当理由；理智；道理 vt. vi. 推理，推断 vi. 思考，理解
example: The main reason for the delay was heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 延误的主要原因是大雨。

meaning: adj. 合理的；理智的，讲道理的 adj. (价钱) 公道的；还⾏的
example: It is reasonable to ask for help when you are stuck.
exampleChinese: 当你遇到困难时，寻求帮助是合理的。

meaning: adj. 近来的，最新的
example: Her recent trip to Beijing was exciting.
exampleChinese: 她最近的北京之行很令人兴奋。

meaning: vt. vi. 服务；提供，端上；担任；发球 vt. 对…有⽤；供应；服刑 vi. 可⽤作；产⽣…效果 n. 发球
example: These buses serve the whole town.
exampleChinese: 这些公交车为整个城镇服务。

meaning: n. 仆⼈；政府雇员；受制于…的⼈
example: The old servant opened the front door quietly.
exampleChinese: 那位老仆人轻轻地打开了前门。

meaning: n. 服务 vt. 维护，保养；提供服务
example: The hotel offers friendly service to every guest.
exampleChinese: 这家酒店为每位客人提供友好的服务。

meaning: vt. 使处于；设置；开创；布置 vi. 凝固；落 (下) n. ⼀套，⼀副；电视机；布景；集 adj. 处于…的；固定的；很可能的
example: She set the cup on the table carefully.
exampleChinese: 她小心地把杯子放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 挫折，阻碍
example: The team faced a setback, but they kept trying.
exampleChinese: 团队遇到了挫折，但他们仍然继续努力。

meaning: n. 环境，背景；设置，档
example: The movie's setting is a small town by the sea.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的背景设定在海边的一个小镇。

meaning: vt. vi. 解决，和解；定居；(使) 平静 vt. 确定，决定；把…放好 vi. 降落，停留
example: We will settle the problem after class.
exampleChinese: 我们会在下课后解决这个问题。

meaning: n. 协议，和解；偿付；定居点
example: The settlement ended the long argument.
exampleChinese: 这个解决办法结束了这场长期争论。

meaning: det. pron. ⼏个，⼀些 adj. 各⾃的，分别的
example: Several students stayed after class.
exampleChinese: 几个学生课后留了下来。

meaning: adj. 严重的；严厉的；严峻的
example: The test was severe, so many students felt nervous.
exampleChinese: 考试很严峻，所以很多学生都感到紧张。

meaning: n. 形状；模糊的影⼦；状况 vt. 使成…形状；塑造，影响…发展
example: The cloud has the shape of a heart.
exampleChinese: 那朵云有心形的形状。

meaning: vt. vi. 分享；分担 vt. 分配，分摊 n. (分得或承担的) ⼀份；股份
example: Please share your notes with me after class.
exampleChinese: 请在课后和我分享你的笔记。

meaning: adj. 锋利的；急剧的；清晰的 adj. 敏锐的；尖刻的；剧烈的 adv. …点整 n. 升半⾳；锐利的东西
example: Prices rose at a sharp rate this year.
exampleChinese: 今年物价急剧上涨。

meaning: n. 住处；庇护；避难处，收容所 vt. 保护，掩蔽 vi. 躲避
example: The tree gave us shelter from the wind.
exampleChinese: 那棵树为我们挡住了风。

meaning: adj. 精密的，复杂的 adj. ⻅多识⼴的；⽼练的
example: The phone has a sophisticated camera system.
exampleChinese: 这部手机有一套精密的相机系统。

meaning: n. 君主，元⾸；⾦镑 adj. (国家) 有主权的；⾄⾼⽆上的
example: The sovereign signed the new law yesterday.
exampleChinese: 君主昨天签署了这项新法律。

meaning: vt. vi. 播种，种；灌输，散布，煽动 n. ⺟猪
example: Farmers sow seeds in spring.
exampleChinese: 农民在春天播种。

meaning: n. 伤亡⼈数；严重后果；通⾏费 vi. vt. (尤指) 鸣 (丧钟)
example: The accident caused a heavy toll on the local community.
exampleChinese: 这起事故给当地社区造成了沉重的伤亡和影响。

meaning: n. 语⽓；⾳⾊；⻛格；⾊调 n. 健壮度 vt. 使更健壮，使更结实
example: Please lower your tone and speak calmly.
exampleChinese: 请放低语气，平静地说话。

meaning: n. 话题，主题，议题
example: Our teacher gave us a new topic to discuss.
exampleChinese: 老师给了我们一个新的话题来讨论。

meaning: vt. vi. 演出，表演 vt. 执⾏，履⾏ vi. 表现，运⾏
example: We must perform every step with care.
exampleChinese: 我们必须认真完成每一个步骤。

meaning: n. 表演，演出；表现，性能；执⾏
example: The new phone has better performance.
exampleChinese: 这部新手机的性能更好。

meaning: n. ⼀段时间，阶段；经期；句号 adv. (⽤于句末) 到此为⽌
example: The rainy period lasted for three days.
exampleChinese: 这段下雨期持续了三天。

meaning: n. (尤指学术) 期刊 adj. 周期性的，定期的
example: This periodical publishes science articles every month.
exampleChinese: 这本期刊每月刊登科学文章。

meaning: vi. 死亡；湮灭，毁灭 vi. vt. (使橡㬵等) ⽼化
example: Many ancient cities perish in wars or natural disasters.
exampleChinese: 许多古代城市会在战争或自然灾害中毁灭。

meaning: adj. 不间断的，⻓久的；没完没了的
example: The company faced perpetual delays during the project.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在项目期间面临不断的延误。

meaning: vt. 使困惑，使茫然
example: The confusing map may perplex new students.
exampleChinese: 这张令人困惑的地图可能会使新学生感到茫然。

meaning: n. 视⻆，观点；判断⼒；透视法
example: From my perspective, the plan is practical and fair.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这个计划既实用又公平。

meaning: adj. 悲观的
example: She felt pessimistic about the weather report.
exampleChinese: 她对天气预报感到悲观。

meaning: adj. 乐观的
example: She felt optimistic about her test results.
exampleChinese: 她对自己的考试结果感到乐观。

meaning: adj. 最佳的，最适宜的 n. 最佳条件，最佳⽔平
example: The classroom has the optimum temperature for studying.
exampleChinese: 这间教室有最适合学习的温度。

meaning: n. 选择 (权)；选修课；选项；期权 vt. 购买 (或出售)…的选择权
example: You can choose the free lunch option today.
exampleChinese: 你今天可以选择免费的午餐选项。

meaning: adj. 可选择的，⾮强制的
example: The art class is optional this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期美术课是可选择的。

meaning: n. 器官；管⻛琴；机构，机关
example: The heart is an important organ.
exampleChinese: 心脏是一个重要的器官。

meaning: adj. 有机的；器官的；演进的
example: We bought organic vegetables from the farm.
exampleChinese: 我们从农场买了有机蔬菜。

meaning: n. ⽣物，有机体；有机体系
example: A living organism needs water and food.
exampleChinese: 生物体需要水和食物。

meaning: n. 组织，机构；安排；结构；条理
example: Our organization helps children learn to read.
exampleChinese: 我们的组织帮助孩子学习阅读。

meaning: vt. 组织，筹备；整理，使有条理 vt. vi. 成⽴ (联盟、党派等)
example: We need to organize the books on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 我们需要整理书架上的书。

meaning: vt. 提⾼，增加，改进，改善
example: Good lighting can enhance your reading experience.
exampleChinese: 良好的照明可以提升你的阅读体验。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 增⼤，扩⼤ vt. 放⼤
example: We need to enlarge the photo for the poster.
exampleChinese: 我们需要把这张照片放大做海报。

meaning: vt. 启发，开导，教化
example: The teacher tried to enlighten the class about honesty.
exampleChinese: 老师试图启发全班学生理解诚实的重要性。

meaning: n. 耙⼦，耙状⼯具 vt. vi. 耙，梳理 vi. 搜寻，搜索
example: He used a rake to clear the leaves.
exampleChinese: 他用耙子清理树叶。

meaning: adj. 少⻅的；珍稀的；(⾁类) 半熟的
example: Snow is rare in this city.
exampleChinese: 这个城市很少下雪。

meaning: adv. 难得地，少⻅地
example: We rarely eat fast food at home.
exampleChinese: 我们在家里很少吃快餐。

meaning: n. ⽐率，率；速度；费⽤ vt. vi. 评估，评价 vt. 划分等级
example: Experts rate this book very highly.
exampleChinese: 专家们对这本书评价很高。

example: The ratio of boys to girls is nearly equal.
exampleChinese: 男孩和女孩的比例几乎相等。

meaning: adj. 合理的，理性的；(⼈) 理智的
example: A rational decision should be based on facts.
exampleChinese: 理性的决定应该建立在事实之上。

meaning: vt. 到达；增加到；实现；联系 vi. vt. 伸⼿；够得着；⾜够达到 n. ⼿臂展开的⻓度；影响范围
example: Our school hopes to reach 1,000 students next year.
exampleChinese: 我们学校希望明年达到1000名学生。

meaning: vi. (作出) 反应；过敏；起化学反应
example: How did you react to the good news?
exampleChinese: 你对这个好消息有什么反应？

meaning: adj. 现实的；能实现的；逼真的
example: We need a realistic plan for this project.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一个对这个项目来说现实的计划。

meaning: n. 现实；现实的东西；真⼈秀
example: In reality, the test was easier than we expected.
exampleChinese: 实际上，这次测试比我们预期的更容易。

meaning: vt. vi. 意识到 vt. 实现；(担⼼的事) 发⽣；挣得
example: I did not realize the store was closed.
exampleChinese: 我没有认识到那家商店已经关门了。

meaning: vt. 选择，挑选 adj. 精选的；⾼级的
example: Please select the best answer.
exampleChinese: 请挑选最好的答案。

meaning: n. 挑选；⼊选者；可供选择的范围
example: She was chosen for the final selection.
exampleChinese: 她被选入最终名单。

meaning: n. 感官；感觉；理解⼒；意思 vt. 意识到，觉察出
example: I had a strange sense that someone was behind me.
exampleChinese: 我有一种奇怪的感觉，好像有人在我身后。

meaning: n. 知觉，感觉能⼒；直觉；轰动
example: The loud noise caused a sensation in the hall.
exampleChinese: 巨大的噪声在大厅里引起了轰动。

meaning: adj. 明智的；实⽤的；意识到…的
example: It is sensible to bring an umbrella.
exampleChinese: 带把伞是明智的。

meaning: adj. 体贴的；敏感的；灵敏的
example: He is sensitive to loud noise.
exampleChinese: 他对大声噪音很敏感。

meaning: adj. 单独的，分开的；不同的 vt. vi. (使) 分开 vt. 隔开，阻隔；区分 vi. 分居
example: Please separate the red cards from the blue ones.
exampleChinese: 请把红色卡片和蓝色卡片分开。

meaning: n. ⼀系列，⼀连串；顺序，次序 vt. 按顺序排列；测定…的序列
example: Please follow the correct sequence of steps.
exampleChinese: 请按照正确的步骤顺序进行。

meaning: n. (电视或⼴播) 连续剧，连载故事 adj. (尤指犯罪) 连续的；顺序排列的
example: We watched a serial on TV every night.
exampleChinese: 我们每天晚上都看一部电视连续剧。

meaning: n. ⼀系列；系列节⽬；系列⽐赛
example: This TV series is popular with students.
exampleChinese: 这部电视系列节目很受学生欢迎。

meaning: adj. 严重的；严肃的；⼤量的
example: This is a serious problem for our team.
exampleChinese: 这对我们团队来说是一个严重的问题。

meaning: n. 烤⾯包⽚，吐司；⼲杯，祝酒 vt. 为…举杯敬酒 vt. vi. 烤 (尤指⾯包)，把…烤得焦⻩
example: I ate eggs and toast for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了鸡蛋和吐司。

meaning: adv. ⼀起，同时；结合起来；在⼀起
example: We walked to school together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走路去学校。

meaning: n. 代币；象征，标志；代⾦券 adj. 象征性的
example: Each student got a token for lunch.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都得到了一张午餐代币。

meaning: n. 宽容，容忍；忍耐⼒；公差
example: We should show tolerance to different opinions.
exampleChinese: 我们应该对不同的意见表现出宽容。

meaning: adj. 宽容的，容忍的；能耐…的
example: She is tolerant of other people's mistakes.
exampleChinese: 她对别人的错误很宽容。

meaning: vt. 容许；忍耐；对…有耐受性
example: We must tolerate small mistakes when we learn.
exampleChinese: 当我们学习时，必须忍受小错误。

meaning: vt. 积累，积聚 vi. 累积，逐渐增加
example: Leaves accumulate on the ground in autumn.
exampleChinese: 秋天，树叶会在地上堆积起来。

meaning: n. 准确性，精确性
example: Accuracy matters in math tests.
exampleChinese: 在数学考试中，精确度很重要。

meaning: adj. 准确的，精确的
example: The map must be accurate for the hike.
exampleChinese: 这张地图必须准确，适合徒步。

meaning: vt. 指责，指控，控告
example: The driver will accuse the company of cheating.
exampleChinese: 这位司机将指控这家公司作弊。

meaning: vt. 达到，获得，完成 vi. 成功
example: She worked hard to achieve her goal.
exampleChinese: 她努力工作以取得自己的目标。

meaning: vt. 承认，认可；感谢 vt. 告知收到 (信件或信息等)
example: She nodded to acknowledge his help.
exampleChinese: 她点头以表示对他帮助的答谢。

meaning: n. 欢呼声；欢乐的⽓氛 vi. vt. 欢呼，加油 vt. ⿎励，⿎舞；(使) 振奋起来
example: The fans cheer for their team.
exampleChinese: 球迷们为他们的球队欢呼。

meaning: adj. 化学的，与化学有关的 n. 化学品，化学制品
example: This chemical is used to clean metal.
exampleChinese: 这种化学制品用于清洁金属。

meaning: vt. 珍爱，珍惜；怀有 (希望等)
example: I will cherish this old photo forever.
exampleChinese: 我会永远珍藏这张老照片。

meaning: n. 薯条，薯⽚；芯⽚；缺⼝；碎屑 vt. vi. 打破，弄缺；打 (或踢) ⾼球 vt. 削下，凿下
example: A small chip fell from the edge of the cup.
exampleChinese: 杯口边缘掉下了一小块碎片。

meaning: n. 选择，挑选；选择权；⼊选者 adj. 精选的，上等的
example: It was a hard choice between the two books.
exampleChinese: 在这两本书之间做选择很难。

meaning: vi. vt. 选择，挑选
example: You can choose a book from this box.
exampleChinese: 你可以从这个箱子里选一本书。

meaning: n. ⽊板，板；董事会；膳⻝ vi. vt. 上船 (或⻜机等) vi. 让乘客上船 (或登机)；在校寄宿
example: We will board the train at noon.
exampleChinese: 我们将在中午上火车。

meaning: vi. vt. ⾃吹⾃擂，⾃夸 vt. 有 (值得⾃豪的事物) n. ⾃吹⾃擂，⾃夸
example: He likes to boast about his new bike.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢吹嘘他的新自行车。

meaning: n. 奖⾦，红利；额外的好处
example: She received a bonus for her hard work.
exampleChinese: 她因为努力工作而得到了一笔奖金。

meaning: n. 繁荣，激增；⻛靡的时期；轰鸣 vi. 轰鸣，轰响；繁荣，迅速发展 vt. vi. 以低沉有⼒的声⾳说话
example: A small online shop can boom after a few good reviews.
exampleChinese: 一家小网店在几条好评后就可能兴旺起来。

meaning: vt. 使增⻓，推动；偷窃 n. 激励；增加；向上⼀推
example: The new plan will boost sales this year.
exampleChinese: 这个新计划将会推动今年的销售增长。

meaning: adj. ⼝头的；⾔辞的；动词的
example: Please give a verbal answer in class.
exampleChinese: 请在课堂上口头回答。

meaning: n. 裁决，裁定；意⻅，决定
example: The judge announced the verdict at noon.
exampleChinese: 法官在中午宣布了裁决。

meaning: vt. 证明，核实，查证
example: We need to verify the facts before we act.
exampleChinese: 我们在行动前需要核实这些事实。

meaning: n. 诗；诗节；(《圣经》等中的) 节
example: The poem has four lines in each verse.
exampleChinese: 这首诗每一节有四行。

meaning: n. 版本；描述，说法
example: This app has a new version with better tools.
exampleChinese: 这个应用有一个带来更好工具的新版本。

meaning: n. 舰，轮船；容器，器⽫；⾎管
example: The ship is a large vessel at sea.
exampleChinese: 这艘船是一艘海上的大船。

meaning: adj. 与上帝有关的，神圣的；虔诚的
example: We lit a candle in the holy chapel.
exampleChinese: 我们在神圣的小礼拜堂里点了一支蜡烛。

meaning: n. 荣幸；荣誉；荣誉称号；道义 vt. 尊敬 (某⼈)；表彰；信守 (承诺)
example: It is an honour to meet her.
exampleChinese: 见到她是我的荣幸。

meaning: adj. 值得尊敬的；正直的；体⾯的
example: She is an honourable teacher and friend.
exampleChinese: 她是一位值得尊敬的老师和朋友。

meaning: n. 地平线；范围，眼界，⻅识
example: New ideas opened a wider horizon for him.
exampleChinese: 新想法为他打开了更广阔的视野。

meaning: adj. ⽔平的，横的 n. ⽔平位置；⽔平线，⽔平⾯
example: Draw a horizontal line across the page.
exampleChinese: 在纸上画一条水平线。

meaning: adj. 精巧的，巧妙的；善于创造的
example: The box has an ingenious locking system.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子有一个巧妙的锁定系统。

meaning: n. 配料，成分；因素
example: Flour is an important ingredient in bread.
exampleChinese: 面粉是面包的重要配料。

meaning: adj. 开始的，最初的 n. (名字的) ⾸字⺟ vt. ⽤姓名的⾸字⺟签名于
example: The initial idea was simple and clear.
exampleChinese: 最初的想法简单而清晰。

meaning: vt. 开始，发起；使初步了解；接纳 n. 新⼊会的⼈
example: The club will initiate a new reading program.
exampleChinese: 这个俱乐部将发起一个新的阅读项目。

meaning: n. 主动性；倡议，新⽅案；主动权
example: She showed great initiative in solving the problem.
exampleChinese: 她在解决问题时表现出了很强的主动性。

meaning: adj. 当地的，本地的；(⾝体) 局部的 n. 本地⼈；住处附近的酒吧
example: We bought fresh fruit from the local market.
exampleChinese: 我们从当地市场买了新鲜水果。

meaning: n. 地区，区域
example: Our locality has many small parks.
exampleChinese: 我们这个地区有许多小公园。

meaning: vt. 确定…的位置；使位于 vi. (公司) 落⼾于
example: The police can locate the missing bike quickly.
exampleChinese: 警方可以很快确定那辆丢失自行车的位置。

meaning: n. 地点，位置；外景拍摄地；定位
example: This location is perfect for a small bookstore.
exampleChinese: 这个地点非常适合开一家小书店。

meaning: vt. 疏忽，忽略；未做 (某事) n. 疏忽，(被) 忽略
example: He began to neglect his homework after he joined the club.
exampleChinese: 自从参加俱乐部后，他开始忽略作业。

meaning: adj. 微不⾜道的，不值⼀提的
example: The cost of the repair is negligible.
exampleChinese: 这次维修的费用微不足道。

meaning: vt. 开 (药、处⽅)；规定
example: The doctor will prescribe medicine for her cough.
exampleChinese: 医生会给她的咳嗽开药。

meaning: n. 处⽅；处⽅药；对策
example: The doctor gave me a prescription for medicine.
exampleChinese: 医生给我开了一张药方。

meaning: n. 在场，出席；存在，出现；仪态
example: Her presence made the meeting feel more serious.
exampleChinese: 她在场让会议显得更严肃。

meaning: adj. 当前的；在场的；存在的 n. 礼物；⽬前，现在；现在时 vt. 授予；提交；展现；使经历
example: She is present at every class meeting.
exampleChinese: 她每次班会都在场。

meaning: adv. ⽬前，现在；⻢上，随即
example: He will arrive presently.
exampleChinese: 他马上就到。

meaning: vt. 维护，保护；保持；保存 (⻝物) n. 专⻔领域；蜜饯，果酱；保护区
example: We must preserve the old trees.
exampleChinese: 我们必须保护这些老树。

meaning: vi. 主持，负责 (会议等)
example: She will preside over the discussion tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 她明天将主持这次讨论。

meaning: n. 报刊；新闻界；印刷机；出版社 vt. vi. 压，按 vt. 把…按⼊；敦促；把…压平 vi. 拥挤着移动
example: Press the green button to start the machine.
exampleChinese: 按下绿色按钮来启动机器。

meaning: n. 压⼒；挤压；液压，⽓压 vt. 对…施压，逼迫
example: Too much pressure can make people tired.
exampleChinese: 太大的压力会让人疲惫。

meaning: n. 威信，声望 adj. 令⼈敬仰的，受尊重的；名贵的
example: That school has great prestige.
exampleChinese: 那所学校很有声望。

meaning: adv. 很可能，据推测
example: The train is presumably late because of the snow.
exampleChinese: 火车很可能因为下雪而晚点了。

meaning: vi. vt. 推测，猜测 vt. (尤指法庭上) 推定，假定；假设 vi. 妄⾏，越权⾏事
example: I presume he is busy now.
exampleChinese: 我推测他现在很忙。

meaning: vt. 防⽌，预防，阻⽌
example: Warm clothes help prevent colds in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天穿暖和的衣服有助于预防感冒。

meaning: adj. 先前的；(时间或顺序上) 稍前的
example: She read the previous chapter again before the test.
exampleChinese: 她在考试前又读了一遍前一章。

meaning: n. 猎物；受害者 vi. 捕⻝；坑骗
example: The lion caught its prey in the grass.
exampleChinese: 狮子在草丛里抓住了猎物。

meaning: adj. 可信赖的，可依靠的
example: Our teacher is very reliable.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师非常可靠。

meaning: n. 依赖，依靠
example: We should not rely too much on reliance on luck.
exampleChinese: 我们不应该过分依赖运气。

meaning: n. 宗教信仰；宗教
example: Many families celebrate their religion in different ways.
exampleChinese: 许多家庭以不同的方式庆祝他们的宗教。

meaning: adj. 宗教的；虔诚的，笃信宗教的
example: My grandfather is very religious.
exampleChinese: 我祖父非常虔诚。

meaning: vi. 依靠；信任
example: You can rely on your team.
exampleChinese: 你可以依靠你的团队。

meaning: adv. 笔直地；直接；正，直；坦率地 adj. 直的；连续的；准的；坦率的 n. 直道
example: The road is straight for two miles.
exampleChinese: 这条路笔直地延伸了两英里。

meaning: adj. 简单易懂的；坦率的，率直的
example: The instructions were straightforward and easy to follow.
exampleChinese: 说明很简单，也很容易照着做。

meaning: n. 压⼒；劳损，拉伤；品种 vt. 拉伤，扭伤，劳损；过度使⽤ vt. vi. 尽⼒，使劲 vi. ⽤⼒推 (或拉)，拉紧
example: Too much screen time can strain your eyes.
exampleChinese: 看屏幕太久会使眼睛疲劳。

meaning: n. 战略，策略；战略学
example: Our strategy helped us win the game.
exampleChinese: 我们的策略帮助我们赢得了比赛。

meaning: n. ⼒量；实⼒；优势；强度
example: She used all her strength to lift the box.
exampleChinese: 她用尽全力把箱子抬了起来。

meaning: vi. vt. 加强，加固
example: Regular practice can strengthen your memory.
exampleChinese: 经常练习可以加强你的记忆力。

meaning: adj. 费⼒的，繁重的；竭尽全⼒的
example: The hike was strenuous, but everyone finished it.
exampleChinese: 这次徒步很费力，但大家都完成了。

meaning: n. 交易，业务；(业务) 办理
example: He completed the transaction in a few minutes.
exampleChinese: 他几分钟内就完成了这笔交易。

meaning: vi. vt. 转移，调动；移交；转存；换乘 vt. 转账；转让；传染 n. 转移，调动；转会；换乘
example: Please transfer the file to my phone.
exampleChinese: 请把这个文件转存到我的手机上。

meaning: vt. 转换，改变，改造
example: Heat can transform ice into water.
exampleChinese: 热量可以把冰变成水。

meaning: adj. 短暂的；流动的，临时的 n. 暂住者，流浪者
example: Their stay in the city was transient.
exampleChinese: 他们在这座城市的停留是短暂的。

meaning: n. 翻译，译⽂
example: Her translation was clear and accurate.
exampleChinese: 她的翻译清晰而准确。

meaning: n. 建筑师；发起者，创⽴者
example: The architect designed a modern school building.
exampleChinese: 这位建筑师设计了一座现代化的校舍。

meaning: n. 建筑学；建筑⻛格；结构
example: She studies architecture at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学学习建筑学。

meaning: n. 档案，档案馆 vt. 把 (⽂档等) 存档
example: The office will archive all the old reports.
exampleChinese: 办公室会把所有旧报告存档。

meaning: n. 区域，地区；⾯积；部位；领域
example: This area is quiet at night.
exampleChinese: 这个地区在晚上很安静。

meaning: n. 竞技场，剧场；活动场地
example: The concert will be held in a large arena.
exampleChinese: 音乐会将在一个大型竞技场举行。

meaning: vi. 争吵，争论 vi. vt. 论证，主张 vt. 证明，表明
example: Don't argue over small things.
exampleChinese: 不要为小事争吵。

meaning: n. 争论；论据，理由；争议，异议
example: The argument was supported by several facts.
exampleChinese: 这个论证有几个事实支持。

meaning: vi. 发⽣，出现；由…引起；起⾝
example: New questions will arise in the discussion.
exampleChinese: 讨论中会出现新的问题。

meaning: vt. 引起，激起，激发；唤醒
example: Loud music can arouse excitement in a crowd.
exampleChinese: 响亮的音乐能激起人群的兴奋。

meaning: n. ⼀⼤批；数列；⼀整套 (设备) vt. 布阵，部署；给…盛装打扮
example: The table shows an array of fresh fruit.
exampleChinese: 桌子上摆着一大批新鲜水果。

meaning: adj. 可⻅的；明显的
example: The moon was still visible in the morning sky.
exampleChinese: 月亮在清晨的天空中仍然可见。

meaning: n. 视⼒，视野；设想；幻象；远⻅
example: Her vision for the school was clear and simple.
exampleChinese: 她对这所学校的设想清晰而简单。

meaning: adj. 视觉的，视⼒的，可⻅的 n. 视觉材料
example: The chart gives a clear visual summary of the results.
exampleChinese: 这张图表清楚地给出了结果的视觉总结。

meaning: adj. 极其重要的；维持⽣命所必需的 adj. 充满活⼒的，⽣机勃勃的
example: Sleep is vital for good health.
exampleChinese: 睡眠对健康至关重要。

meaning: adj. ⽣动的，清晰的；鲜艳的
example: Her vivid story made us feel like we were there.
exampleChinese: 她生动的故事让我们感觉仿佛身临其境。

meaning: n. 空⽩，空虚感 adj. (合同) ⽆效的；缺乏…的；空的 vt. 使…作废；排泄
example: The contract is void without both signatures.
exampleChinese: 没有双方签字，这份合同就是无效的。

meaning: n. 体积，容积；量；⾳量；卷，册
example: The bottle holds two liters of volume.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子的容积是两升。

meaning: n. 结果，后果；重要性，价值
example: Missing the bus was a bad consequence.
exampleChinese: 错过公交车是一个不好的结果。

meaning: adv. 结果，因此，所以
example: The road was icy; consequently, school was closed.
exampleChinese: 路面结冰了，因此学校停课了。

meaning: n. 保护；节约，保存
example: The park’s conservation program protects local birds.
exampleChinese: 公园的保存计划保护了当地的鸟类。

meaning: adj. 保守的；保守党的 n. 保守党党员；保守的⼈
example: My grandfather is quite conservative about change.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷对变化相当保守。

meaning: vi. vt. 考虑，斟酌 vt. 认为；体谅；端详
example: Please consider my idea before you decide.
exampleChinese: 请在你决定之前考虑一下我的想法。

meaning: adj. 相当多的，相当⼤的
example: We spent a considerable amount of time on the project.
exampleChinese: 我们在这个项目上花了相当多的时间。

meaning: adj. 体贴的，考虑周到的
example: It was considerate of him to call first.
exampleChinese: 他先打电话来，真体贴。

meaning: vt. 消耗，耗费；吃，喝；使充满…
example: These machines consume a lot of electricity.
exampleChinese: 这些机器消耗很多电。

meaning: n. 消耗 (量)；⻝⽤ (量)；消费
example: Energy consumption rises in hot summer months.
exampleChinese: 在炎热的夏季，能源消耗会上升。

meaning: n. 争论，争端 vt. 对…表⽰异议，对…表⽰质疑 vt. vi. 就…争论，就…争执
example: The two cities are in dispute over the border.
exampleChinese: 这两座城市在边界问题上存在争端。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 溶解；消除，(使) 消散 vt. 解除，终⽌，解散 vi. 禁不住 (笑起来或哭起来等)
example: The sugar will dissolve in warm water.
exampleChinese: 糖会在温水中溶解。

meaning: n. 交换，交流；交谈；兑换；互访 vt. 交换，交流；兑换，交易
example: We exchange gifts at the New Year party.
exampleChinese: 我们在新年聚会上交换礼物。

meaning: vt. 将…排斥在外；不包括；排除
example: The rules exclude students without ID cards.
exampleChinese: 这些规定把没有学生证的学生排除在外。

meaning: adj. 独占的；⾼档的；排斥的 adj. 不包括…的 n. 独家新闻，独家报道
example: This magazine published an exclusive interview with the singer.
exampleChinese: 这本杂志刊登了一篇与这位歌手的独家采访。

meaning: vt. 限制，使…局限于；监禁，关押
example: Try not to confine your ideas to one example.
exampleChinese: 尽量不要把你的想法局限在一个例子上。

meaning: vt. 证实，证明；确认 (安排)；批准
example: Please confirm your name before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前确认你的名字。

meaning: n. 冲突，争执；⽭盾 vi. 相互⽭盾，冲突
example: There is a conflict between the two schedules.
exampleChinese: 这两个时间安排之间有冲突。

meaning: n. 信⼼，信任；⾃信；把握；秘密
example: She spoke with confidence during the presentation.
exampleChinese: 她在演讲中说得很自信。

meaning: adj. ⾃信的；有把握的，确信的
example: She felt confident before the speech.
exampleChinese: 她在演讲前感到很自信。

meaning: adj. 机密的；(讲话) 悄悄的
example: The report is confidential and must not be shared.
exampleChinese: 这份报告是机密的，不能外传。

meaning: n. 布局，构造；配置
example: The engineer checked the configuration of the new computer.
exampleChinese: 工程师检查了新电脑的配置。

meaning: n. 痕迹，踪迹；(乡间) ⼩路；路线 vt. vi. (被) 拖，拉；落后，失利 vi. (尤指跟在他⼈后⾯) 疲惫地⾛ vt. 跟踪，追踪
example: We followed a narrow trail through the forest.
exampleChinese: 我们沿着一条狭窄的小路穿过森林。

meaning: n. ⽕⻋，列⻋；队列；⼀系列 vt. vi. (接受) 训练，(被) 培训 vt. 教育，培养…的能⼒
example: We took the train to Beijing.
exampleChinese: 我们坐火车去北京。

meaning: n. 培训，训练；体育训练，锻炼
example: The soccer training ends before dinner.
exampleChinese: 足球训练在晚饭前结束。

meaning: n. 特性，特质
example: Kindness is one trait I really admire.
exampleChinese: 善良是我非常欣赏的一种特质。

meaning: n. 看法；(思维) ⽅法；视野；景⾊ vt. 视为，看待；看，观看
example: In my view, this plan is simple and useful.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这个计划简单又实用。

meaning: n. 观点，看法；视⻆，⻆度
example: From my viewpoint, the plan is too risky.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这个计划风险太大。

meaning: n. 暴⼒，暴⾏；激烈，热烈
example: Violence should never be used to solve problems.
exampleChinese: 暴力绝不应用来解决问题。

meaning: adj. 暴⼒的；(情感) 强烈的；剧烈的
example: The movie contains some violent scenes.
exampleChinese: 这部电影包含一些暴力场面。

meaning: adj. ⼏乎…的，实际上的；虚拟的
example: Virtual classes let students learn from home.
exampleChinese: 虚拟课堂让学生可以在家学习。

meaning: n. 美德；优点，⻓处
example: Honesty is a virtue that everyone should value.
exampleChinese: 诚实是一种每个人都应珍视的美德。

meaning: adj. 显然的；表⾯上的，貌似的
example: It is apparent that she worked hard.
exampleChinese: 很显然，她努力学习了。

meaning: vi. 吸引；呼吁，恳求；上诉；打动 n. 上诉；吸引⼒，魅⼒；呼吁
example: She made an appeal for help after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，她发出了求助请求。

meaning: vi. 出现；起源；问世；演出；出庭 vlink. 似乎，好像
example: Stars appear in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 星星出现在夜空中。

meaning: n. 外观；公开露⾯；出现；问世
example: Her appearance changed a lot after the haircut.
exampleChinese: 她理发后外貌变化很大。

meaning: n. (家⽤) 电器，装置
example: This appliance saves energy in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 这台家用电器在厨房里很省电。

meaning: adj. 适合的，适⽤的
example: This rule is applicable to all students.
exampleChinese: 这条规则适用于所有学生。

meaning: n. 申请 (书)；运⽤；应⽤程序
example: This application helps students learn English.
exampleChinese: 这个应用帮助学生学习英语。

meaning: vt. 任命，指派；约定 (时间、地点)
example: They will appoint a new manager tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 他们明天将任命一位新经理。

meaning: n. 约定，预约；任命，指派；职位
example: I have a dentist appointment at three.
exampleChinese: 我三点有一个看牙医的预约。

meaning: vi. vt. 申请；(对…) 适⽤ vt. 应⽤，运⽤；涂抹；按，踩
example: I will apply for the scholarship tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天将申请这项奖学金。

meaning: vt. 欣赏；感激；理解，体会到 vi. 升值，增值
example: I appreciate your help with my homework.
exampleChinese: 我很感激你帮我做作业。

meaning: vi. 歧视，区别对待 vi. vt. 区分，辨别
example: We should not discriminate against anyone.
exampleChinese: 我们不应该歧视任何人。

meaning: vt. 讨论，谈论；论述，阐述
example: We will discuss the problem after class.
exampleChinese: 我们将在课后讨论这个问题。

meaning: n. 疾病；弊病，恶习
example: Doctors are working to stop the disease.
exampleChinese: 医生们正在努力阻止这种疾病。

meaning: vi. 逃跑；幸免于难；泄漏 vi. vt. 逃脱，摆脱 vt. 避免；被忘掉，被忽视 n. 逃跑；解脱；渗出 (量)
example: The bird made a quick escape through the window.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟迅速从窗户逃走了。

meaning: adv. 特别，尤其；特地；⾮常
example: I especially like this picture.
exampleChinese: 我特别喜欢这张图片。

meaning: n. ⽂章，论⽂；随笔，⼩品⽂ vt. 企图，尝试
example: I finished my history essay last night.
exampleChinese: 我昨晚写完了历史短文。

meaning: n. 本质，精髓；精油，⾹精
example: The essence of the story is friendship.
exampleChinese: 这个故事的本质是友谊。

meaning: adj. 必不可少的；基本的，本质的 n. 必需品；要素，要点
example: Water is essential for life.
exampleChinese: 水对生命是必不可少的。

meaning: vt. 建⽴，创⽴；使被认可；证实
example: The school plans to establish a new science club this year.
exampleChinese: 学校计划今年建立一个新的科学俱乐部。

meaning: vt. 估计，估算，估价 n. 估计，估算，估价
example: Can you estimate the cost of the trip?
exampleChinese: 你能估算一下这次旅行的费用吗？

meaning: n. 伦理；道德体系；伦理学
example: Honesty is an important ethic in our class.
exampleChinese: 诚实是我们班的一项重要道德准则。

meaning: adj. 种族的，⺠族的；有⺠族特⾊的 n. 少数⺠族的⼈
example: The museum displays ethnic costumes from different areas.
exampleChinese: 这座博物馆展示了来自不同地区的民族服饰。

meaning: vt. 评价，评估
example: We need to evaluate the results carefully.
exampleChinese: 我们需要仔细评价这些结果。

meaning: adj. ⼯业的；⼯业发达的 adj. ⼯业制造的，⼯业⽤的
example: The city has many industrial factories.
exampleChinese: 这座城市有许多工业工厂。

meaning: vt. vi. ⼯业化
example: Some countries try to industrialize quickly.
exampleChinese: 一些国家试图快速实现工业化。

meaning: n. ⼯业；⾏业，产业；勤奋
example: The fishing industry supports this town.
exampleChinese: 渔业支撑着这个小镇。

meaning: adj. 不可避免的，必然发⽣的
example: It is inevitable that mistakes will happen.
exampleChinese: 错误发生是不可避免的。

meaning: adj. 痛苦的；令⼈难受的；不友善的
example: He felt miserable after losing the game.
exampleChinese: 他输掉比赛后感到很痛苦。

meaning: n. 痛苦；穷困；不幸的事
example: The long wait became pure misery.
exampleChinese: 漫长的等待成了一种纯粹的痛苦。

meaning: vt. 误导，将…引⼊歧途
example: Do not mislead young children with false facts.
exampleChinese: 不要用错误的事实误导年幼的孩子。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 混合，掺和，融合 vt. 调配，配制 vi. 交往，相处，交际 n. 混合；配料；混录，混⾳
example: Mix the flour with water in a bowl.
exampleChinese: 把面粉和水在碗里混合。

meaning: n. 混合，混合体；混合物，混合料
example: The cake is a mixture of flour, eggs, and sugar.
exampleChinese: 这个蛋糕是面粉、鸡蛋和糖的混合物。

meaning: adj. 必需的，必要的；必然的
example: A map is necessary for this hike.
exampleChinese: 这次徒步旅行有地图是必要的。

meaning: vt. 使成为必需
example: This repair will necessitate a new part.
exampleChinese: 这次维修将使一个新零件成为必需。

meaning: n. 必要；必需品；不可避免的情况
example: A warm coat is a necessity in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天一件暖和的外套是必需品。

meaning: adj. 有害的；消极的；否定的 adj. 负的；阴性的 n. 否定词，否定；底⽚ vt. 否定，拒绝
example: He gave a negative answer to my question.
exampleChinese: 他对我的问题给出了否定的回答。

meaning: vi. 谈判，洽谈 vt. 商定，达成 (协议)；顺利通过
example: The two companies will negotiate the contract tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 两家公司明天将商议这份合同。

meaning: adj. 在外的，外⾯的；远离中⼼的
example: The outer wall of the house is painted blue.
exampleChinese: 房子的外墙漆成了蓝色。

meaning: n. 出⼝，发泄途径；经销店；折扣店 n. 媒体公司；插座；排放⼝
example: She found an outlet for her feelings in painting.
exampleChinese: 她通过绘画找到了宣泄情绪的途径。

meaning: n. 概要，梗概；轮廓，外形 vt. 概述，概括；勾勒
example: Please outline the main points of your report.
exampleChinese: 请概述一下你报告的要点。

meaning: n. 世界观，观点；前景；景⾊
example: His outlook on life is very positive.
exampleChinese: 他的生活观非常积极。

meaning: n. 产量，输出量；输出功率 vt. 输出
example: The factory will output more steel this month.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂这个月将输出更多钢材。

meaning: n. 贫穷，贫困；缺乏，短缺
example: Many families still live in poverty.
exampleChinese: 许多家庭仍生活在贫困中。

meaning: n. 政权；影响⼒；能⼒；权⼒ n. 实⼒；⼒量；能量；电⼒供应 vt. 驱动 (机器或⻋辆) vi. vt. (使) 迅猛移动
example: Knowledge is a powerful form of power.
exampleChinese: 知识是一种强大的力量。

meaning: adj. 实际的；切实可⾏的；务实的 adj. (东西) 实⽤的 n. 实习课，实践课
example: This is a practical way to save time.
exampleChinese: 这是一个节省时间的实际办法。

meaning: n. 练习，训练；实践；惯例，常规 vi. vt. 练习，训练 vt. 践⾏，信奉；从事 (医律等职业)
example: I practice the piano every evening.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上练习弹钢琴。

meaning: vi. vt. 练习，训练；(医⽣、律师) 执业 vt. 经常做，形成…的习惯
example: I practise the piano for twenty minutes every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天练习钢琴二十分钟。

meaning: n. 从业⼈员；实践者
example: The practitioner gave me clear advice.
exampleChinese: 这位从业人员给了我清晰的建议。

meaning: vi. vt. 讲道，布道；宣传，⿎吹 vi. 说教，唠叨
example: The priest will preach at the chapel on Sunday.
exampleChinese: 这位牧师将在周日去小礼拜堂布道。

meaning: vt. vi. 先于…(发⽣或存在) vt. ⾛在…之前
example: The teachers will precede the students into the hall.
exampleChinese: 老师们将走在学生前面进入大厅。

meaning: n. 预防措施，防备
example: Always wear a helmet as a precaution.
exampleChinese: 为了预防起见， همیشه要戴头盔。

meaning: n. 可援引的例⼦；先例；惯例
example: The new policy set a precedent for later cases.
exampleChinese: 这项新政策为后来的案件开了先例。

meaning: adj. 前⾯的，在先的
example: The preceding chapter explains the main idea.
exampleChinese: 前一章解释了主要观点。

meaning: adj. 珍贵的；珍稀的；被珍惜的 adv. (强调太少) ⾮常
example: Her help was precious to us.
exampleChinese: 她的帮助对我们很宝贵。

meaning: adj. 精确的；确切的；⼀丝不苟的
example: Please give me a precise answer.
exampleChinese: 请给我一个精确的答案。

meaning: n. 精确，精密 adj. 精确的，精密的
example: The engineer measured the parts with great precision.
exampleChinese: 这位工程师以极高的精确度测量零件。

meaning: n. 压⼒；重⾳；强调 vt. 强调；重读 vi. vt. (使) 焦虑不安
example: Good teachers stress the value of honest work.
exampleChinese: 好老师强调诚实劳动的价值。

meaning: vt. vi. 拉⻓，撑⼤；伸展；伸出 vi. (织物) 有弹性；绵延；延续 vt. 拉紧；消耗；使竭尽所能；滥⽤ n. ⼀段；⼀段时间；伸展；弹性
example: The road will stretch across the valley.
exampleChinese: 这条路将延伸穿过山谷。

meaning: adj. 偏远的，遥远的；久远的 adj. 微乎其微的；远程的；冷淡的 n. 遥控器
example: The village is too remote for a quick visit.
exampleChinese: 这个村子太偏远了，不适合短时间拜访。

meaning: vt. 移⾛；去除；脱掉；免除 (职位) n. 距离，差距
example: Please remove your shoes at the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门口把鞋子脱掉。

meaning: n. 移⾛，拿⾛；消除；免职；搬迁
example: The removal of the old tree made room for a bench.
exampleChinese: 那棵老树被移走后，腾出了放长椅的地方。

meaning: vlink. 保持，仍是 vi. 余下；尚待…；留下，逗留
example: Please remain quiet in the library.
exampleChinese: 请在图书馆里保持安静。

meaning: n. 剩余部分，剩余物；余数
example: You can keep the remainder of the cake.
exampleChinese: 你可以把蛋糕的剩余部分留下。

meaning: n. 残余，剩余物，遗迹；遗体
example: The remains of the castle are on the hill.
exampleChinese: 那座城堡的遗迹在山上。

meaning: n. 解决⽅法；药品，疗法 vt. 纠正，补救
example: This medicine can remedy the problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 这种药可以迅速缓解这个问题。

meaning: vt. vi. 记得，想起 vt. 记住 (去做某事)；纪念
example: Do you remember his name?
exampleChinese: 你记得他的名字吗？

meaning: vt. 提醒；使想起
example: This note will remind me to call Dad.
exampleChinese: 这张便条会提醒我给爸爸打电话。

meaning: vt. 使变得；给予，提供；表达；翻译
example: The teacher will render the poem into English.
exampleChinese: 老师将把这首诗翻译成英语。

meaning: adj. 当代的，现代的；同时代的 n. 同时期的⼈，同时代的⼈
example: My contemporary in college now works as a doctor.
exampleChinese: 我在大学时的同龄人现在当医生。

meaning: n. 鄙视，蔑视；藐视法庭
example: He looked at the rude remark with contempt.
exampleChinese: 他带着轻蔑看待那句无礼的话。

meaning: n. 内容；⽬录；所含之物；含量 adj. 满⾜的，满意的；愿意的 vt. 使满意，使满⾜
example: The book has a long content page at the front.
exampleChinese: 这本书在前面有一页很长的目录。

meaning: vt. 声称，主张 vi. 竞争，争夺；处理，对付
example: They contend that the rule is unfair.
exampleChinese: 他们声称这条规则不公平。

meaning: n. ⽐赛，竞赛；争夺，竞争 vt. 争辩，提出异议；争取赢得
example: She entered the contest to win a scholarship.
exampleChinese: 她参加这场比赛是为了赢得奖学金。

meaning: n. 背景，环境；上下⽂，语境
example: The context helped me understand the new word.
exampleChinese: 上下文帮助我理解了这个新单词。

meaning: n. 合同，合约，契约 vi. vt. (使) 缩⼩，收缩；签合同 vt. 患上 (疾病)
example: We signed a contract for the new apartment.
exampleChinese: 我们签了一份新公寓的合同。

meaning: vt. 反驳，否认；相⽭盾
example: I cannot contradict her without proof.
exampleChinese: 没有证据，我不能反驳她。

meaning: adj. 相对⽴的，相反的
example: His opinion was contrary to mine.
exampleChinese: 他的看法和我的相反。

meaning: n. 差异，差别；截然不同的事物 vt. 对照，对⽐ vi. 截然不同，有明显差异
example: The two colors contrast sharply on the page.
exampleChinese: 这两种颜色在页面上形成鲜明对比。

meaning: adj. 多样的，形形⾊⾊的
example: Our school has a diverse group of students.
exampleChinese: 我们学校有一个多样化的学生群体。

meaning: n. 转向，转移；令⼈分⼼的事物 n. 消遣，娱乐
example: The diversion kept the children busy during the rain.
exampleChinese: 这项消遣让孩子们在下雨时也很忙碌。

meaning: vt. 使转向；使分⼼；改变⽤途
example: The worker will divert the water into a new channel.
exampleChinese: 工人将把水引到一条新渠道里。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 分开，分成；除以，除 vt. 分配；使分离；使产⽣分歧 vi. (道路) 分岔 n. 不同，分歧；分⽔岭
example: Please divide the cake into six pieces.
exampleChinese: 请把蛋糕分成六块。

meaning: n. 红利，股息；被除数
example: The shareholders received a small dividend at the end of the year.
exampleChinese: 股东们在年底收到了一小笔股息。

meaning: n. 分开，分配；分歧；除法；部⻔
example: Six divided by two is a simple division problem.
exampleChinese: 六除以二是一个简单的除法问题。

meaning: n. ⽂件，⽂档，⽂献 vt. 记录，记载；⽤⽂献证明
example: Please sign this document before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前签署这份文件。

meaning: n. 纪录⽚，纪实节⽬ adj. 记录的，纪实的；⽂献的
example: We watched a documentary about pandas.
exampleChinese: 我们看了一部关于熊猫的纪录片。

meaning: vt. 将…处死；执⾏；创作；使⽣效
example: The judge will execute the sentence next week.
exampleChinese: 法官将于下周执行判决。

meaning: n. 经理，主管；⾏政部⻔ adj. 执⾏的，⾏政的；⾼级的
example: She is the executive in charge of sales.
exampleChinese: 她是负责销售的经理。

meaning: vt. 是…的典范；举例说明
example: This story can exemplify how courage changes lives.
exampleChinese: 这个故事可以说明勇气如何改变人生。

meaning: vt. 施加，运⽤，⾏使；努⼒，竭⼒
example: The coach told us to exert more effort in practice.
exampleChinese: 教练告诉我们在训练中要更加努力。

meaning: vt. 使…精疲⼒竭；耗尽；详尽探讨 n. (发动机排出的) 废⽓；排⽓管
example: The long hike will exhaust even the strongest runner.
exampleChinese: 这次长途徒步会让连最强壮的跑步者都筋疲力尽。

meaning: vi. 存在；⽣存
example: Fresh air helps plants exist and grow.
exampleChinese: 新鲜空气有助于植物生存和生长。

meaning: n. 现实存在；⽣存，⽣活
example: There is a clear existence of water on the planet.
exampleChinese: 这个星球上确实存在水。

meaning: adj. 异国⻛情的，外来的
example: We ate at an exotic restaurant near the harbor.
exampleChinese: 我们在港口附近的一家异国风味餐馆吃了饭。

meaning: adj. 道德的；出于道义的；有道德的 n. 品⾏，道德；寓意
example: It is a moral choice to tell the truth.
exampleChinese: 说实话是一个符合道德的选择。

meaning: n. 道德观，道德；道德性，正当性
example: The lesson focused on honesty and morality.
exampleChinese: 这节课重点讲了诚实和道德。

meaning: adv. ⽽且，此外
example: The work was hard; moreover, it took a long time.
exampleChinese: 这项工作很难，而且还花了很长时间。

meaning: adv. ⼏乎全部地，主要地，通常
example: The class was mostly quiet during the exam.
exampleChinese: 考试期间，教室里大部分时间都很安静。

meaning: adj. 先前的；优先的；在…前⾯的 n. 犯罪前科
example: I made a prior appointment with the dentist.
exampleChinese: 我已经提前和牙医约好了。

meaning: n. 当务之急；优先权；优先通⾏权
example: Homework is our top priority tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚作业是我们的首要任务。

meaning: n. 隐私；独处，清静
example: Everyone deserves privacy at home.
exampleChinese: 每个人在家里都应该享有隐私。

meaning: adj. 私⼈的；私下的；私营的 n. ⼆等兵，列兵；私处
example: This is a private room.
exampleChinese: 这是一个私人房间。

meaning: n. 特权；荣幸；权势 vt. 给予…特权，给予…优待
example: She had the privilege of meeting the writer.
exampleChinese: 她有幸见到了那位作家。

meaning: adj. 谨慎的，慎重的，精明的
example: It was prudent to bring an umbrella.
exampleChinese: 带把伞是很谨慎的。

meaning: vt. 提交，递呈；主张 vi. vt. 顺从，屈服，被迫接受
example: Please submit your homework before class.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前提交作业。

meaning: adj. 下级的， 从属的；次要的 n. 下级，下属 vt. 把…置于次要地位
example: He worked as a subordinate in the company.
exampleChinese: 他在公司里是一名下属。

meaning: vi. 订阅，订购；定期赞助；同意 vi. 申请，报名 vi. vt. 签署
example: I subscribe to a science magazine every month.
exampleChinese: 我每个月订阅一本科学杂志。

meaning: adj. 随后的，后来的
example: The subsequent report confirmed the teacher's concern.
exampleChinese: 随后的报告证实了老师的担忧。

meaning: n. 物质；根据；主旨；重要性
example: The substance of her speech was very clear.
exampleChinese: 她讲话的主旨非常清楚。

meaning: adj. ⼤量的，重⼤的，实质性的 adj. ⼤⽽坚固的
example: The hospital made a substantial improvement in care.
exampleChinese: 这家医院在护理方面有了重大改进。

meaning: n. 代替者，代替物；替补运动员 vi. vt. 替换，取代
example: Salt can be a good substitute for sugar in some recipes.
exampleChinese: 在某些食谱中，盐可以作为糖的替代品。

meaning: adj. 细微的，微妙的；含蓄的；巧妙的
example: There was a subtle change in his voice.
exampleChinese: 他的声音里有一丝微妙的变化。

meaning: vt. 联想，联系 vi. 与…为伍，混在⼀起 n. 同事，(⽣意) 伙伴 adj. (等级或头衔) 准的，副的
example: We often associate with our neighbors after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们常和邻居交往。

meaning: n. 协会，社团；联系，关联；联想
example: She joined the student association last term.
exampleChinese: 她上学期加入了学生协会。

meaning: vt. 修订 (法律、⽂件等)
example: The committee will amend the rules tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 委员会明天将修订规则。

meaning: prep. 在…中；在⼀群⼈或物之中
example: She sat among her friends.
exampleChinese: 她坐在朋友们中间。

meaning: n. 数量；⾦额 vi. 共计；等同于；发展成
example: The total amount was higher than we expected.
exampleChinese: 总额比我们预想的更高。

meaning: adj. ⼤量的，⾜够的；丰满的
example: We had ample time to finish the homework.
exampleChinese: 我们有充足的时间完成作业。

meaning: vt. 逗笑，逗乐；给…提供娱乐
example: The clown can amuse the children easily.
exampleChinese: 这个小丑很容易逗孩子们开心。

meaning: vt. vi. 刺⼊，插⼊；粘住 vt. 随⼿放置 vi. 卡住；被接受 n. 枝条；条状物；棍
example: Please stick the photo on the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把这张照片贴在墙上。

meaning: vt. 刺激；激发，激励；使活跃
example: The teacher used a game to stimulate the students' interest in science.
exampleChinese: 老师用一个游戏来激发学生对科学的兴趣。

meaning: vt. vi. 搅动，搅拌；(使) 微动 vt. 引起，造成，激起 vi. (情绪等) 开始出现 n. 激动，愤怒；搅动，搅拌
example: Please stir the soup slowly before dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭前请慢慢搅拌这锅汤。

meaning: vt. 规定，约定，明确要求
example: The contract stipulate that the rent must be paid on time.
exampleChinese: 合同规定租金必须按时支付。

meaning: vt. 推断，推论；暗⽰
example: From the evidence, we can infer that she arrived late.
exampleChinese: 根据这些证据，我们可以推断她来晚了。

meaning: n. 推论，推断的结果；推理，推断
example: His inference was correct after he read the full report.
exampleChinese: 在读完完整报告后，他的推论是正确的。

meaning: adj. 较差的，较次的；级别低的 n. 下级，下属
example: The old phone was inferior to the new model.
exampleChinese: 这部旧手机比新款差。

meaning: n. 影响 (⼒)；有影响的⼈ (或事物) vt. 影响，对…起作⽤
example: Her teacher had a strong influence on her future plans.
exampleChinese: 她的老师对她未来的计划有很大影响。

meaning: adj. 有影响⼒的，有权势的 n. 有影响⼒的⼈
example: She is an influential writer in modern literature.
exampleChinese: 她是现代文学中一位有影响力的作家。

meaning: vt. 通知，告知；了解；影响
example: Please inform me when the meeting starts.
exampleChinese: 请在会议开始时通知我。

meaning: n. 信息，情报；电话号码查询台
example: I found useful information on the school website.
exampleChinese: 我在学校网站上找到了有用的信息。

meaning: vi. vt. 接近，靠近 vt. 接洽，要求；处理，对付 n. ⽅法，态度；接近，靠近；路径
example: Our teacher showed us a new approach to solving the math problem.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师向我们展示了解决这道数学题的新方法。

meaning: adj. 适当的，恰当的 vt. 盗⽤，挪⽤；拨出 (款项)
example: This is the appropriate time to ask for help.
exampleChinese: 现在是寻求帮助的适当时机。

meaning: n. 赞成，同意；批准，许可
example: The teacher nodded in approval.
exampleChinese: 老师点头表示赞成。

meaning: vi. 同意，赞成，赞许 vt. 批准，通过；认证
example: The manager will approve the plan today.
exampleChinese: 经理今天会批准这个计划。

meaning: adj. 有…倾向的；恰当的；聪明的
example: He is apt to forget his keys when he is in a hurry.
exampleChinese: 他一着急就容易忘记带钥匙。

meaning: vi. 遵守；顺应⼤流；相⼀致
example: Students should conform to the school rules.
exampleChinese: 学生应该遵守校规。

meaning: vt. 直⾯，正视；使⾯对；对峙；对质
example: The police had to confront the driver after the accident.
exampleChinese: 事故发生后，警察不得不面对那名司机。

meaning: vt. 使困惑；将…混淆；使复杂化
example: The instructions confuse many new students.
exampleChinese: 这些说明让许多新生感到困惑。

meaning: n. 困惑；混淆；窘迫；混乱的局⾯
example: There was confusion in the classroom after the fire alarm rang.
exampleChinese: 火警响起后，教室里一片混乱。

meaning: n. 代表⼤会；国会
example: The congress met to discuss education policy.
exampleChinese: 代表大会召开讨论教育政策。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 连接，(使) 联结 vt. 把…联系起来；为…接通电话 vi. 衔接；与某⼈建⽴关系；击中
example: Please connect the printer to the computer.
exampleChinese: 请把打印机连接到电脑上。

meaning: n. 联系，关联；联结，连接；⼈脉
example: There is a strong connection between exercise and health.
exampleChinese: 锻炼和健康之间有紧密的联系。

meaning: adj. 意识到的；清醒的；有意的 suff. 注重…的，有…意识的
example: He was conscious of the noise outside the window.
exampleChinese: 他意识到了窗外的噪音。

meaning: adj. 不停的，⽆间断的；频繁的
example: There was continual rain all afternoon.
exampleChinese: 整个下午都在不停地下雨。

meaning: vi. vt. 继续
example: Please continue your story.
exampleChinese: 请继续讲你的故事。

meaning: adj. 持续的，连续的；进⾏式的
example: The machine ran on continuous power for six hours.
exampleChinese: 这台机器连续运转了六个小时。

meaning: vt. 不予考虑；解雇，开除；消除 vt. 解散，让 (某⼈) 离开；驳回
example: The teacher will dismiss the class at noon.
exampleChinese: 老师将在中午解散这堂课。

meaning: n. 失调，紊乱，疾病；混乱；动乱
example: The storm caused disorder in the city.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴给城市造成了混乱。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 扩散，(使) 散开
example: The smoke began to disperse in the wind.
exampleChinese: 烟开始在风中散开。

meaning: vt. 取代；迫使…离开家园；移⾛
example: The new factory will displace many local workers.
exampleChinese: 这家新工厂将迫使许多当地工人离开原来的岗位。

meaning: vt. 陈列，展⽰；显⽰，表现 n. 陈列；表演；显⽰，表现；显⽰器 vi. (为求偶⽽) 炫耀
example: The museum will display old photos next week.
exampleChinese: 博物馆下周将展览旧照片。

meaning: vt. 分发，分配；分销；使分布
example: We distribute the books to every student.
exampleChinese: 我们把书分发给每个学生。

meaning: vt. 使变形，使扭曲；歪曲，曲解
example: Do not distort the facts in your report.
exampleChinese: 不要在报告中歪曲事实。

meaning: vt. 分散 (注意⼒)，使分⼼
example: Loud music can distract me from my homework.
exampleChinese: 响亮的音乐会分散我做作业的注意力。

meaning: n. 进化；演变，发展
example: The evolution of cars has made travel safer.
exampleChinese: 汽车的演变让出行更安全了。

meaning: vi. vt. 进化；逐步发展
example: Scientists say species can evolve over millions of years.
exampleChinese: 科学家说，物种可以在数百万年里进化。

meaning: vi. vt. 夸张，夸⼤
example: He tends to exaggerate when he tells a story.
exampleChinese: 他讲故事时往往爱夸张。

meaning: vt. 仔细研究；仔细检查；测验
example: The doctor will examine your eyes.
exampleChinese: 医生将检查你的眼睛。

meaning: vt. vi. 嘲笑，(通过模仿) 取笑 vt. 不尊重，轻慢 adj. 假装的；模拟的 n. (英国) 模拟考试
example: The boys began to mock the new student.
exampleChinese: 那些男孩开始嘲笑那位新同学。

meaning: n. ⽅式，⻛格；模式，状态
example: The computer has a sleep mode to save power.
exampleChinese: 这台电脑有一个睡眠模式来节省电量。

meaning: n. 模型；模特⼉；样式；范例 vi. 做模特⼉ vt. 将…做成模型；模仿
example: Our science teacher showed us a model of the moon.
exampleChinese: 我们的科学老师给我们看了一个月球模型。

meaning: adj. 中等的；温和的；有节制的 vt. vi. 缓和，使适中，调节；主持 n. 持温和观点者
example: A moderate meal is better than a heavy one before class.
exampleChinese: 上课前吃一顿适量的饭比吃得太多更好。

meaning: adj. 现代的；新式的
example: The library has a modern design.
exampleChinese: 这座图书馆有现代的设计。

meaning: n. 现代化
example: The city saw rapid modernization after 2000.
exampleChinese: 这座城市在2000年后经历了快速现代化。

meaning: adj. 谦虚的；不太⼤的；端庄的
example: She is modest about her success.
exampleChinese: 她对自己的成功很谦虚。

meaning: vt. 修改，改进，调整；(语法) 修饰
example: You can modify the plan if the weather changes.
exampleChinese: 如果天气变化，你可以修改计划。

meaning: n. 前任，前辈；…的前⾝
example: My predecessor left clear notes for the new team.
exampleChinese: 我的前任为新团队留下了清晰的记录。

meaning: vt. 预⾔，预测，预告
example: No one can predict the future exactly.
exampleChinese: 没有人能准确预言未来。

meaning: n. (书的) 序⾔，前⾔，绪论 vt. 以…为开端，以…作为开场⽩
example: The author will preface the book with a short letter.
exampleChinese: 作者将以一封简短的信作为这本书的序言。

meaning: adj. 更好的，更可取的，更合适的
example: A train is preferable to a bus for this long trip.
exampleChinese: 对于这次长途旅行，坐火车比坐公交更合适。

meaning: n. 偏好；优惠，优待
example: She has a preference for tea over coffee.
exampleChinese: 她更偏爱茶而不是咖啡。

meaning: n. 偏⻅，成⻅ vt. 使有偏⻅；损害，危害
example: We should not judge people with prejudice.
exampleChinese: 我们不应该带着偏见去评判别人。

meaning: adj. 初步的，预备的，开始的 n. 初步⾏动，准备⼯作
example: The teacher gave us a preliminary test on Monday.
exampleChinese: 老师在星期一给我们做了一次初步测试。

meaning: adj. ⾸要的，最好的 n. 总理，⾸相
example: The premier opened the new hospital today.
exampleChinese: 总理今天为这家新医院揭幕。

meaning: n. 前提；房屋及⼟地，经营场所
example: The judge rejected the premise of the argument.
exampleChinese: 法官驳回了这个论点的前提。

meaning: n. 保险费；额外费⽤ adj. 优质的，⾼端的
example: This jacket is sold at a premium price.
exampleChinese: 这件夹克以高价出售。

meaning: n. 准备；准备⼯作；制剂
example: Good preparation helps you stay calm.
exampleChinese: 充分的预备能帮助你保持冷静。

meaning: vt. 映出 (影像)；反射；反映，显⽰ vi. vt. 认真思考
example: The windows reflect the bright sunlight.
exampleChinese: 窗户反射出明亮的阳光。

meaning: n. 映像；反射；反映；深思
example: The lake gave a clear reflection of the mountains.
exampleChinese: 湖水清晰地映出了群山的倒影。

meaning: n. 变⾰，改⾰，⾰新 vt. 变⾰，改⾰，⾰新 vi. vt. (使) 改过⾃新
example: The city plans to reform the public transport system.
exampleChinese: 这座城市计划改革公共交通系统。

meaning: vt. 拒绝接受；不录⽤；抛弃；排斥 n. 次品，不合格者
example: The company decided to reject the poor design.
exampleChinese: 公司决定拒绝这个糟糕的设计。

meaning: vi. vt. ⾮常⾼兴，深感欣喜
example: We rejoice when our team wins the final.
exampleChinese: 当我们的队伍赢得决赛时，我们非常高兴。

meaning: vt. vi. 联系，(使) 有关联 vt. 叙述，讲述 vi. 涉及，关于；理解，有共鸣
example: Can you relate the story in your own words?
exampleChinese: 你能用自己的话叙述这个故事吗？

meaning: n. 关系，交往；联系；亲戚
example: Trust is important in any relation.
exampleChinese: 信任在任何关系中都很重要。

meaning: n. 关系，联系；恋爱关系
example: They have a good relationship with their neighbors.
exampleChinese: 他们和邻居关系很好。

meaning: n. 亲戚，亲属 adj. 相对的；与…相⽐；关于…的
example: We visited a relative during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假期里我们拜访了一位亲属。

meaning: n. 相对论，相对性
example: The lesson introduced the relativity of time and motion.
exampleChinese: 这节课介绍了时间和运动的相对性。

meaning: adj. 有关的，切题的；有价值的
example: Your question is relevant to our project.
exampleChinese: 你的问题与我们的项目相关。

meaning: vt. 忽略，忽视；不计较；俯视
example: Don't overlook the small details.
exampleChinese: 不要忽略这些小细节。

meaning: adv. 在国外，在海外 adj. 国外的，海外的
example: My aunt works overseas for a year.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈在海外工作一年。

meaning: vi. 站⽴；处于；保持有效；达到 vt. 使直⽴；容忍；经受，经得起 n. ⽴场；保卫；货摊；架；看台
example: Please stand near the window.
exampleChinese: 请站在窗户旁边。

meaning: n. 标准，⽔平；道德⽔准；军旗 adj. 通常的，标准的；规范的
example: This product meets the safety standard.
exampleChinese: 这个产品符合安全标准。

meaning: n. ⽴场，观点，⻆度，⽴⾜点
example: From my standpoint, the rule is fair.
exampleChinese: 从我的立场来看，这条规则是公平的。

meaning: n. 态度，⽴场；(体育运动的) 站姿
example: Her stance on the issue surprised everyone.
exampleChinese: 她在这个问题上的立场让所有人都很惊讶。

meaning: vt. vi. 开始；发动；开办；以…起家 vi. 出发，启程；(从…) 开始 n. 开端；开始
example: Let's start the game after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后开始游戏吧。

meaning: vt. 使…吓⼀跳，使…⼤吃⼀惊
example: The loud noise can startle a sleeping baby.
exampleChinese: 那巨大的声音会把熟睡的婴儿吓一跳。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 挨饿，(使) 饿死 vi. 渴望，迫切需要
example: Without water, the plants will starve.
exampleChinese: 没有水，这些植物会饿死。

meaning: n. 状况；国家；州；政府 vt. 陈述，说明；规定 adj. 国家的；国事的；州的
example: Please state your name clearly.
exampleChinese: 请清楚地说出你的名字。

meaning: n. 声明；说法，陈述；报表
example: The company released a short statement this morning.
exampleChinese: 公司今天早上发布了一份简短的声明。

meaning: n. 政治家
example: The statesman spoke for peace.
exampleChinese: 这位政治家为和平发声。

meaning: n. 统计数字 (或资料)；统计学
example: The teacher checked the statistics carefully.
exampleChinese: 老师仔细检查了这些统计数据。

meaning: n. 雕像，雕塑
example: A statue stands in the middle of the park.
exampleChinese: 公园中央有一座雕像。

meaning: n. 地位，⾝份；状况，状态
example: His status changed after he won the prize.
exampleChinese: 他获奖后地位提高了。

meaning: n. 法令，法规
example: The new statute limits the use of plastic bags.
exampleChinese: 这项新法规限制使用塑料袋。

meaning: vi. 停留；保持；暂住 n. 停留，逗留
example: We stay at my grandma's house every winter.
exampleChinese: 我们每年冬天都住在我奶奶家。

meaning: adj. 稳步的；稳定的；(⼈) 可靠的 vt. vi. 稳住；恢复平稳；使平静 adv. 稳定地，持续地
example: The chair is steady on the floor.
exampleChinese: 这把椅子在地上很稳。

meaning: vt. vi. 驾驶 (船、汽⻋等)；(船等) ⾏驶 vt. 操纵，控制，引导；带领 n. 阉公⽜，⾁⽤公⽜
example: The captain will steer the boat through the narrow channel.
exampleChinese: 船长将驾驶小船通过狭窄的水道。

meaning: n. (植物的) 秆，茎；(烟⽃) 柄 vt. 阻⽌，遏制，制⽌ vi. 源于，由…造成
example: The report says the disease can stem from poor hygiene.
exampleChinese: 报告说，这种疾病可能源于卫生条件差。

meaning: n. 脚步；步骤，措施；阶段；台阶 vi. 迈步，踩，踏
example: Please step back from the door.
exampleChinese: 请从门边往后退一步。

meaning: adj. 严厉的，苛刻的；难对付的 n. 船尾
example: The teacher gave us a stern warning about cheating.
exampleChinese: 老师就作弊问题给了我们严厉的警告。

meaning: adj. 匿名的；没特⾊的
example: The witness asked to remain anonymous.
exampleChinese: 那位证人要求匿名。

meaning: n. 答复，回答；答案，解决⽅法 vi. vt. 答复，回答
example: Can you answer my question now?
exampleChinese: 你现在能回答我的问题吗？

meaning: vt. 预料；期待，期盼；先于…做
example: We anticipate a quick response from the company.
exampleChinese: 我们期待公司能迅速回复。

meaning: n. 忧虑，焦虑；渴望
example: She felt anxiety before the test.
exampleChinese: 她在考试前感到焦虑。

meaning: adj. 焦虑的；让⼈担忧的；渴望的
example: She felt anxious before the final exam.
exampleChinese: 期末考试前她感到很焦虑。

meaning: adv. 相距；分离；成碎⽚；除外
example: The two houses stand far apart.
exampleChinese: 那两栋房子相距很远。

meaning: vt. 暗杀，刺杀
example: The court found that the group tried to assassinate the leader.
exampleChinese: 法庭认定这个团伙企图暗杀那位领导人。

meaning: n. 攻击，袭击；攻坚；抨击 vt. 袭击，殴打；使…感到难受
example: A crowd began to assault the front gate.
exampleChinese: 一群人开始猛攻前门。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 集合，(使) 聚集 vt. 组装，装配
example: Please assemble the desk before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前把书桌组装好。

meaning: n. ⽴法机构，议会；集会；组装
example: The school held an assembly on Friday morning.
exampleChinese: 学校星期五早上举行了集会。

meaning: vt. 断⾔；坚持 (主张)；维护 (权威)
example: He will assert his right to speak.
exampleChinese: 他将坚持自己发言的权利。

meaning: n. 成分，部件，组成部分 adj. 组成的，构成的
example: The wheel has one broken component.
exampleChinese: 这个轮子有一个坏掉的部件。

meaning: vt. 组成；使平静 vt. vi. 作(曲)，写（信、诗等）
example: She can compose a short song on the piano.
exampleChinese: 她会用钢琴作一首短曲。

meaning: n. 构成，成分；构图 n. 作品；创作，作曲；作⽂
example: Our teacher asked us to write a composition about spring.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们写一篇关于春天的作文。

meaning: vi. vt. 理解，领悟
example: I cannot comprehend this math problem yet.
exampleChinese: 我还不能理解这道数学题。

meaning: n. 理解⼒；阅读 (听⼒) 理解测试
example: The reading test checked our comprehension.
exampleChinese: 这次阅读测试考查了我们的理解能力。

meaning: adj. 全⾯的，综合性的；综合教育的 n. (英国) 综合中学
example: The book gives a comprehensive view of the city.
exampleChinese: 这本书全面介绍了这座城市。

meaning: vt. 谴责；判处；使陷⼊ vt. (因安全等原因⽽) 封闭 (建筑)
example: Many people condemn violence.
exampleChinese: 许多人谴责暴力。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 凝结；(使) 浓缩，变浓稠 vt. 压缩，精简 (⽂章或讲话)
example: You can condense the notes into one page.
exampleChinese: 你可以把笔记浓缩成一页。

meaning: n. 状态；健康状况；疾病；条件 vt. 训练，使习惯于；影响；养护
example: A good condition for joining the team is regular practice.
exampleChinese: 加入这个队的一个好条件是定期训练。

meaning: vt. 实施，执⾏；表现；传导；引导 vi. vt. 指挥 (歌唱或演奏) n. ⾏为，举⽌；实施办法
example: Metal can conduct electricity.
exampleChinese: 金属可以导电。

meaning: n. 指挥；列⻋⻓；售票员；导体
example: Copper is a good conductor of electricity.
exampleChinese: 铜是良好的导体。

meaning: vt. 使伤残；使不能运转
example: A broken screen can disable the phone.
exampleChinese: 损坏的屏幕会让手机无法使用。

meaning: vi. 消失，不⻅；不复存在；失踪
example: The bird will disappear into the trees.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟会消失在树丛中。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 失望 vt. 使…破灭
example: I will not disappoint my team.
exampleChinese: 我不会让我的团队失望。

meaning: n. 纪律；训练⽅法；⾃制⼒；学科 vt. 处罚；训导，管教；⾃我控制
example: Good discipline helps students finish their work on time.
exampleChinese: 良好的纪律有助于学生按时完成作业。

meaning: vt. 透露，披露；使显露
example: The company refused to disclose the price.
exampleChinese: 公司拒绝透露价格。

meaning: vt. 发现；找到；了解到；发掘
example: We may discover a better way.
exampleChinese: 我们可能会发现一个更好的办法。

meaning: n. 发现；被发现的事物 (或⼈)
example: The discovery surprised the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这个发现让全班都很惊讶。

meaning: vt. 吊起，升起，提起 n. 吊⻋，起重机
example: We used a crane to hoist the box onto the truck.
exampleChinese: 我们用吊车把箱子吊上了卡车。
