meaning: vt. 拿着；保持；持有；举⾏；认为 vt. 拥抱；容纳，包含；担任 vt. vi. (打电话时) 不挂断 n. 拿，握；影响，控制；⽀撑点
example: Please hold my bag for a minute.
exampleChinese: 请帮我拿一下我的包。

meaning: n. 持有⼈；⽀托物
example: The holder keeps the candles steady.
exampleChinese: 这个支托物能把蜡烛固定住。

meaning: n. 家庭，⼀家⼈ adj. 家⽤的，家庭的；家喻⼾晓的
example: My household eats dinner together every night.
exampleChinese: 我家每晚都会一起吃晚饭。

meaning: adv. 不管多么；⽆论如何；然⽽
example: However tired he was, he finished his homework.
exampleChinese: 无论他多累，他还是完成了作业。

meaning: vi. 挤在⼀起；缩成⼀团 n. 拥挤的⼀群，杂乱的⼀堆
example: The children huddle under one umbrella.
exampleChinese: 孩子们挤在一把伞下。

meaning: n. 叙事；记叙，叙述 adj. 记叙的，叙述的
example: Her story has a strong narrative style.
exampleChinese: 她的故事有很强的叙事风格。

meaning: adj. 狭窄的；勉强的；狭义的 vi. vt. 使变窄，缩⼩
example: We walked through a narrow street near the station.
exampleChinese: 我们走过了车站附近一条狭窄的街道。

meaning: adj. 不友善的；糟糕的；严重的 adj. 下流的；危险的
example: The soup smells nasty.
exampleChinese: 这汤闻起来很难闻。

meaning: n. 国家，⺠族；(全体) 国⺠
example: China is a large nation.
exampleChinese: 中国是一个幅员辽阔的国家。

meaning: adj. 国家的，⺠族的；国有的 n. 国⺠，公⺠
example: The national flag is flying above the school.
exampleChinese: 国旗正在学校上空飘扬。

meaning: n. 国籍；⺠族，种族
example: She wrote her nationality on the form.
exampleChinese: 她在表格上写了自己的国籍。

meaning: adj. 出⽣地的；本地的；与⽣俱来的 n. 出⽣于某地的⼈；本地⼈；⼟著
example: She is a native speaker of English.
exampleChinese: 她以英语为母语。

meaning: adj. ⾃然的；正常的；天⽣的 n. 有天赋的⼈
example: Her smile looks natural in the photo.
exampleChinese: 她在照片里的笑容看起来很自然。

meaning: n. ⾃然；天性，性格；本质
example: We enjoyed the beauty of nature.
exampleChinese: 我们欣赏了大自然的美。

meaning: adj. 全⾯的，总体的 adv. 全部，总计；总体上 n. 连⾝⼯作服
example: Overall, the trip was a success.
exampleChinese: 总体上，这次旅行很成功。

meaning: vt. 克服；击败；对…产⽣极⼤影响
example: She worked hard to overcome her fear of public speaking.
exampleChinese: 她努力克服了公开演讲的恐惧。

meaning: vt. vi. (与…) 重叠；(时间等) 有重叠 n. 重叠部分
example: Their schedules overlap on Friday afternoon.
exampleChinese: 他们的日程在星期五下午有重叠。

meaning: n. 部分；(饭菜的) ⼀份 vt. 把…分成多份
example: Please eat a small portion of rice.
exampleChinese: 请吃一小份米饭。

meaning: n. 可能性；可能的事；机会
example: There is a possibility of rain tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 明天有下雨的可能性。

meaning: adj. 可能的；可能存在的；合理的
example: It is possible to finish today.
exampleChinese: 今天完成是可能的。

meaning: adj. 潜在的，可能的 n. 潜⼒，潜质；可能性；电势
example: She has the potential to become a great singer.
exampleChinese: 她有成为一名出色歌手的潜能。

meaning: vt. vi. 倾倒，倒出；下⼤⾬ vi. (液体、烟等) 涌流；不断涌向
example: Please pour some milk into the cup.
exampleChinese: 请往杯子里倒一些牛奶。

meaning: vt. 安慰，抚慰，慰藉 n. 控制台，仪表盘
example: She tried to console her friend after the bad news.
exampleChinese: 听到坏消息后，她努力安慰朋友。

meaning: vi. 由…组成；在于
example: Our breakfast usually consist of eggs and toast.
exampleChinese: 我们的早餐通常由鸡蛋和吐司组成。

meaning: adj. ⼀贯的；与…⼀致的；连续的
example: Her work has been consistent all year.
exampleChinese: 她一整年的表现都始终如一。

meaning: adj. 经常的，不断的；恒定的 n. 不变的事物，常数，常量
example: The temperature stayed constant all day.
exampleChinese: 气温一整天都保持不变。

meaning: n. 成分；选⺠ adj. 构成的，组成的
example: Water is a constituent of all living things.
exampleChinese: 水是所有生物的成分之一。

meaning: vlink. 构成，组成；相当于，可算作 vt. 设⽴，成⽴
example: These two ideas constitute the main point.
exampleChinese: 这两个想法构成了重点。

meaning: n. 宪法，章程；体质；构成，成分
example: The constitution protects people's rights.
exampleChinese: 宪法保护人民的权利。

meaning: vt. 限制，约束；强迫，迫使
example: Poor lighting can constrain the camera's performance.
exampleChinese: 昏暗的光线会限制相机的表现。

meaning: vt. 建造，修建；组成，构成；绘制 n. 构想，概念，观念
example: They will construct a new bridge here.
exampleChinese: 他们将在这里建造一座新桥。

meaning: adj. 截然不同的；清晰的；确实的
example: The two paintings are distinct in style.
exampleChinese: 这两幅画在风格上截然不同。

meaning: n. 差别，不同；卓越；特点；荣誉
example: There is a clear distinction between the two ideas.
exampleChinese: 这两个想法之间有明显的区别。

meaning: vi. vt. 区分，辨别，分清 vt. 使有别于；辨别出；使表现突出
example: It is hard to distinguish one twin from the other.
exampleChinese: 很难把一对双胞胎中的一个和另一个区分开来。

meaning: adj. 富有成效的；富饶的，多产的
example: The project was fruitful for both teams.
exampleChinese: 这个项目对两个团队都很有成效。

meaning: vt. 使灰⼼，使沮丧；阻⽌，挫败
example: It can frustrate students when the bus is late.
exampleChinese: 公交车晚点会让学生感到沮丧。

meaning: vt. 实现，达到；履⾏；使有成就感
example: He will fulfill his promise to help us.
exampleChinese: 他会履行帮助我们的承诺。

meaning: n. 功能，职能；宴会；函数 vi. 起作⽤，运转
example: This machine can function all day without a break.
exampleChinese: 这台机器可以连续运行一整天。

meaning: n. 基⾦，专款；资⾦；⼤量 vt. 资助，为…提供资⾦
example: The school raised a fund for new books.
exampleChinese: 学校筹集了一笔购买新书的资金。

meaning: adj. 根本的，最重要的；基础的 n. 根本，基础
example: A solid breakfast is fundamental to a busy school day.
exampleChinese: 一顿扎实的早餐对忙碌的上学日来说是基本的。

meaning: n. 证据，证明 vt. 证明，表明
example: The police found evidence at the scene.
exampleChinese: 警方在现场找到了证据。

meaning: adj. 明显的，显然的
example: It is evident that he studied hard.
exampleChinese: 很明显他很用功。

meaning: adj. 邪恶的，道德败坏的；恶魔的 n. 邪恶；弊端，坏处
example: The hero fought against evil.
exampleChinese: 这位英雄与邪恶作斗争。

meaning: n. ⽣活环境，周围状况；⾃然环境
example: We should protect the environment together.
exampleChinese: 我们应该一起保护环境。

meaning: n. 企业；项⽬，规划；进取⼼
example: The new enterprise hired twenty workers.
exampleChinese: 这家新企业雇用了二十名工人。

meaning: vt. vi. 使快乐，使有兴趣，娱乐；款待 vt. 怀有…想法 (或感受)
example: The clown can entertain the children for hours.
exampleChinese: 这个小丑能让孩子们开心几个小时。

meaning: n. 娱乐节⽬，娱乐活动；招待
example: The park offers free entertainment in summer.
exampleChinese: 这个公园在夏天提供免费的娱乐活动。

meaning: n. 垄断；垄断企业；⼤富翁 (游戏)
example: Our class played monopoly after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们班玩了《大富翁》。

meaning: adj. 单调乏味的，毫⽆变化的
example: The train ride felt monotonous.
exampleChinese: 这段火车旅程让人觉得单调乏味。

meaning: n. 情绪，⼼情；坏⼼情；⽓氛
example: She was in a good mood this morning.
exampleChinese: 她今天早上心情很好。

meaning: n. (数据的) 传输；传播；节⽬播送
example: The transmission of the signal was very clear.
exampleChinese: 信号的传输非常清晰。

meaning: vt. vi. 传送，发送 (信号、信息等) vt. 传播 (疾病)；传达 (思想)；传导
example: The radio can transmit signals over a long distance.
exampleChinese: 这台收音机可以远距离传送信号。

meaning: n. 移植；移植的器官 vt. 移植；移栽；使迁移
example: Doctors will transplant a healthy kidney into the patient.
exampleChinese: 医生将把一个健康的肾脏移植到病人体内。

meaning: n. 交通运输系统；交通⼯具；运输 vt. 运输；使…仿佛置⾝于
example: The transport of goods was delayed by rain.
exampleChinese: 货物运输因下雨而延误了。

meaning: n. 库存；储备物；股票；家畜 vt. (商店) 存货；贮存，贮备 adj. ⽼⼀套的；(商店) 库存的，常备的
example: The store has enough stock for the holiday rush.
exampleChinese: 这家商店有足够的库存应付节日高峰。

meaning: n. 商店，店铺；储备，贮存物 vt. 贮藏；(在计算机⾥) 存储
example: I bought milk at the store.
exampleChinese: 我在商店买了牛奶。

meaning: n. 储藏，贮存；(计算机) 存储
example: We need more storage for these files.
exampleChinese: 这些文件需要更多存储空间。

meaning: vi. ⼤步⾛，阔步⾏⾛ n. ⼤步；进展，进步；步伐
example: He stride across the stage with confidence.
exampleChinese: 他自信地大步走过舞台。

meaning: vt. 打，击；撞；突然想到；给…印象 vi. 罢⼯；⾏进 vi. vt. 袭击；侵袭；划 (⽕柴)；敲，鸣 n. 罢⼯；袭击；击，打；全中
example: The workers will strike if their pay does not increase.
exampleChinese: 如果工资不涨，工人们就会罢工。

meaning: adj. 显著的，惊⼈的；容貌出众的
example: The sunset created a striking scene over the lake.
exampleChinese: 落日为湖面增添了一幅惊人的景象。

meaning: n. 细绳，线；⼀串；⼀系列；弦 vt. 悬挂，系；把…连在⼀起 adj. 弦乐器的；线织的
example: She tied the bag with a piece of string.
exampleChinese: 她用一根细绳把袋子系上了。

meaning: n. 结构，构造；建筑物；精⼼组织 vt. 组织，安排
example: The bridge has a strong structure.
exampleChinese: 这座桥有坚固的结构。

meaning: vt. 使震惊；使昏迷；使印象深刻
example: The loud bang can stun the whole room.
exampleChinese: 那声巨响会让整个房间的人都震惊。

meaning: adj. ⾸要的，主要的；最早的；⼩学的 n. (美国的) 初选
example: Safety is our primary concern.
exampleChinese: 安全是我们最主要的考虑。

meaning: adj. ⾸要的；最好的；典型的 n. 盛年，⿍盛时期 vt. 准备；事先指点
example: This is the prime time to plant tomatoes.
exampleChinese: 现在是种番茄的最佳时机。

meaning: adj. 原始的；落后的；原始本能的 n. 原始派艺术家
example: The museum shows primitive tools from ancient times.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆展示了远古时代的原始工具。

meaning: adj. 主要的，最重要的 n. 校⻓；本⾦，资⾦；主⻆
example: The principal gave us a short speech in the hall.
exampleChinese: 校长在大厅里给我们作了简短讲话。

meaning: n. 原则；原理；定律
example: A good scientist follows the same principle every time.
exampleChinese: 一位优秀的科学家每次都遵循同样的原则。

meaning: n. 精神病学，精神病治疗
example: She wants to study psychiatry in college.
exampleChinese: 她想在大学里学习精神病学。

meaning: n. ⼼理学；⼼理，⼼理特点
example: She studied psychology at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学里学习心理学。

meaning: n. (法律上的) 责任；累赘；债务
example: Too much debt can become a heavy liability.
exampleChinese: 过多的债务会变成沉重的负担。

meaning: adj. 可能做…的；有责任的；易遭受…
example: The driver is liable for the damage.
exampleChinese: 司机要对损坏负责。

meaning: adj. 开明的；(政治) ⾃由的；通识的 adj. 慷慨的；不完全准确的 n. ⽀持变⾰的⼈；⾃由党成员
example: She has a liberal view on art.
exampleChinese: 她对艺术持开明的观点。

meaning: vt. 使⾃由，使解脱；解放
example: The army came to liberate the city.
exampleChinese: 军队来解放这座城市。

meaning: n. 许可证，执照；放肆，放纵 vt. 批准，许可
example: You need a license to drive a car.
exampleChinese: 开车需要驾驶执照。

meaning: adj. ⽆罪的；⽆辜受害的；纯真的 n. ⽆辜的⼈，天真的⼈
example: The innocent child told the truth.
exampleChinese: 那个天真的孩子说了实话。

meaning: n. 创新，⾰新；新事物，新⽅法
example: New innovation can make daily life easier.
exampleChinese: 新的创新可以让日常生活更轻松。

meaning: n. 极度痛苦
example: He felt anguish after hearing the bad news.
exampleChinese: 听到坏消息后，他感到极度痛苦。

meaning: vt. 使⽣⽓，使烦恼，烦扰
example: The loud music will annoy the neighbors.
exampleChinese: 这么吵的音乐会让邻居烦恼。

meaning: adj. ⼀年⼀次的；年度的 n. 年刊，年册；⼀年⽣植物
example: We buy a new calendar every annual.
exampleChinese: 我们每年都买一本新日历。

meaning: n. 锚；主持⼈；顶梁柱 vi. vt. 抛锚，使停泊；主持 (节⽬) vt. 使固定；使扎根
example: The ship dropped anchor near the shore.
exampleChinese: 这艘船在岸边抛锚了。

meaning: vt. 造成 (威胁、问题等)；提出 vi. 摆姿势；佯装，假扮 n. (为拍照等摆的) 姿势
example: This new rule may pose a problem for students.
exampleChinese: 这条新规定可能会给学生带来问题。

meaning: n. 位置；姿态，姿势；处境；⽴场 n. 地位；职位 vt. 安放，放置
example: Please position the chair near the window.
exampleChinese: 请把椅子安置在窗户旁边。

meaning: adj. 积极的；有益的；表⽰赞同的 adj. 确信的；阳性的 n. 优势，优点；阳性结果
example: She has a positive attitude toward life.
exampleChinese: 她对生活有积极的态度。

meaning: vt. 拥有；具有，具备；⽀配
example: Some people possess great courage.
exampleChinese: 有些人拥有极大的勇气。

meaning: n. 具有，拥有；个⼈财产；殖⺠地
example: The bike is now in my possession.
exampleChinese: 这辆自行车现在归我所有。

meaning: vt. 稀释，冲淡；削弱，降低 adj. 稀释了的，冲淡了的
example: You can dilute the juice with water.
exampleChinese: 你可以用水稀释果汁。

meaning: adj. 昏暗的；模糊的；迟钝的 adj. 前景黯淡的 vi. vt. (使) 变昏暗；(使) 变渺茫
example: The room was dim after the power went out.
exampleChinese: 停电后，房间里很昏暗。

meaning: vi. vt. 减少，降低，减弱 vt. 贬低，轻视
example: We should not diminish her hard work.
exampleChinese: 我们不该轻视她的努力。

meaning: n. 业余爱好者，外⾏ adj. ⾮职业的，业余的
example: He is an amateur photographer who takes pictures for fun.
exampleChinese: 他是一名业余摄影爱好者，拍照只是为了好玩。

meaning: vt. 使惊奇，使⼤吃⼀惊
example: The magic trick can amaze the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这个魔术能让全班同学都感到吃惊。

meaning: adj. 模棱两可的，含糊不清的
example: The instructions were ambiguous, so we asked for help.
exampleChinese: 说明很模糊，所以我们去寻求帮助。

meaning: n. 野⼼，抱负，理想
example: He has great ambition to become a doctor.
exampleChinese: 他有成为医生的远大雄心。

meaning: adj. 有野⼼的；规模宏⼤的，艰巨的
example: She is ambitious and wants to study abroad.
exampleChinese: 她很有野心，想去国外读书。

meaning: n. ⽓泡；肥皂泡；经济泡沫 vi. 起泡，冒泡；(情绪等) 涌动
example: A bubble rose to the surface of the water.
exampleChinese: 一个气泡浮到了水面上。

meaning: n. 预算；(政府的) 预算案 vi. vt. 把…计⼊预算；为…安排 (时间) adj. 低价的，低廉的
example: We set a small budget for the school trip.
exampleChinese: 我们为学校旅行设了一个小预算。

meaning: vt. vi. 建筑，建造 vt. 创建，开发 vi. (感觉) 逐渐增强 n. 体格，体形，⾝材
example: Workers will build a new bridge next year.
exampleChinese: 工人们明年将建造一座新桥。

meaning: n. 商业，⽣意；商务；企业；职责
example: Her family runs a small business.
exampleChinese: 她家经营一家小生意。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 压紧，压缩 vt. 精简 (⽂章等) n. (⽤以退烧、⽌痛的) 敷布，压布
example: You can compress the file to save space.
exampleChinese: 你可以把文件压缩一下以节省空间。

meaning: vt. 包括，由…组成；构成，组成
example: Three chapters comprise this short book.
exampleChinese: 这本短书由三章组成。

meaning: n. 折中，妥协；折中办法 vi. 妥协，让步 vi. vt. 违背 (原则)，达不到 (标准) vt. 危及，有损
example: We had to compromise to finish the project.
exampleChinese: 为了完成项目，我们不得不妥协。

meaning: vt. vi. 想象，想出，构想；怀孕
example: I can't conceive of a life without music.
exampleChinese: 我无法想象没有音乐的生活。

meaning: vi. vt. 全神贯注；(使) 集中 n. 浓缩液，浓缩物
example: Please concentrate on your homework for ten minutes.
exampleChinese: 请先全神贯注地做十分钟作业。

meaning: n. 概念，想法
example: She explained the concept with a simple drawing.
exampleChinese: 她用一幅简单的图画解释了这个观念。

meaning: n. 构思；概念；受孕
example: Her conception of success is very simple.
exampleChinese: 她对成功的理解非常简单。

meaning: n. 担⼼；关⼼；对…重要的事 vt. 关于；使…担⼼；涉及，影响
example: The new rule does not concern only teachers.
exampleChinese: 这条新规定不仅涉及老师。

meaning: adj. 简洁的，简明的
example: Please give me a concise answer.
exampleChinese: 请给我一个简洁的回答。

meaning: adj. 确实的，具体的；混凝⼟制的 n. 混凝⼟
example: They built the wall with concrete.
exampleChinese: 他们用混凝土砌了这堵墙。

meaning: vt. 推断出，作出结论；达成 (协议) vi. vt. (使) 结束，终⽌
example: From the evidence, we can conclude that he was there.
exampleChinese: 根据这些证据，我们可以推断他当时在那里。

meaning: n. 结论，推论；结束，结尾；签订
example: She reached a clear conclusion after reading the report.
exampleChinese: 她读完报告后得出了一个明确的结论。

meaning: adj. 并存的，同时发⽣的
example: The two meetings were concurrent.
exampleChinese: 这两个会议是同时进行的。

meaning: vt. 授予，赋予 vi. 商议，协商
example: The school will confer an award on him.
exampleChinese: 学校将授予他一个奖项。

meaning: n. 会议
example: The conference starts at nine in the main hall.
exampleChinese: 会议九点在主厅开始。

meaning: vi. vt. 供认，坦⽩；承认；忏悔
example: He decided to confess the truth.
exampleChinese: 他决定坦白真相。

meaning: n. 史诗；史诗般的电影或书；壮举 adj. 史诗般的；漫⻓艰难的；壮丽的
example: The movie is an epic about ancient heroes.
exampleChinese: 这部电影是一部关于古代英雄的史诗。

meaning: n. 流⾏病；泛滥，猖獗 adj. 泛滥的，猖獗的
example: The epidemic spread quickly through the city.
exampleChinese: 这场流行病在城市里迅速蔓延。

meaning: n. ⼀段经历，⼩插曲；⼀集
example: We watched the first episode together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起看了第一集。

meaning: n. 时代，纪元；(地质中的) 世
example: The discovery marked a new epoch in history.
exampleChinese: 这项发现标志着历史上的一个新时代。

meaning: adj. 不感兴趣的，冷淡的；⼀般的
example: She was indifferent to the results.
exampleChinese: 她对结果并不在意。

meaning: adj. 愤慨的，愤怒的
example: He was indignant at the unfair rule.
exampleChinese: 他对这条不公平的规定感到愤慨。

meaning: n. 愤慨，愤怒，义愤
example: Her face showed clear indignation.
exampleChinese: 她脸上流露出明显的愤慨。

meaning: adj. 必不可少的，不可或缺的
example: Water is indispensable to life.
exampleChinese: 水对生命是必不可少的。

meaning: adj. 单独的；个⼈的；独特的 n. 个⼈；有个性的⼈
example: Every individual has different needs.
exampleChinese: 每个人都有不同的需求。

meaning: n. 杂乱；⿇烦，困境；不整洁的⼈ vt. 使不整洁，弄乱
example: Your desk is in a mess again.
exampleChinese: 你的书桌又乱成一团了。

meaning: n. 信息，消息；要旨 vt. 给…发消息
example: Please message me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家后请给我报个信。

meaning: n. 送信者，通信员
example: The messenger brought a letter from my uncle.
exampleChinese: 送信人带来了一封我叔叔的信。

meaning: n. ⽅法，办法；条理
example: This method helps me learn new words faster.
exampleChinese: 这个方法帮助我更快地学习新单词。

meaning: adj. 好战的，激进的 n. 好战分⼦，激进分⼦
example: The militant group was arrested by police.
exampleChinese: 这个激进组织被警方逮捕了。

meaning: adj. 军事的，军队的，军⽤的 n. 军队，军⽅，军⼈
example: My father served in the military.
exampleChinese: 我父亲曾在军队服役。

meaning: n. 头脑，思维；⼼思 vt. vi. 介意 vt. 当⼼，注意
example: Do you mind if I open the window?
exampleChinese: 你介意我把窗户打开吗？

meaning: vt. 弥补；拯救；兑换；赎回 vt. 履⾏，遵守 (诺⾔)
example: You can redeem the coupon for a free drink.
exampleChinese: 你可以用这张优惠券兑换一杯免费饮料。

meaning: vt. 减少，缩⼩，降低 vt. vi. (使) 蒸发 vi. 减轻体重，节⻝
example: This rule will reduce waste.
exampleChinese: 这条规定会减少浪费。

meaning: n. 减少，缩⼩；脱氧
example: The school made a small reduction in lunch prices.
exampleChinese: 学校把午餐价格小幅下调了。

meaning: vi. 提及；指，关于；参考，查阅
example: Please refer to the map for directions.
exampleChinese: 请参考地图来找方向。

meaning: n. 提到；参考 (书⽬)；推荐信 vt. 查阅，参考
example: The teacher asked for a reference from my last school.
exampleChinese: 老师要了一封我上一所学校的推荐信。

meaning: n. 主题；学科；对象；主语；⾂⺠ adj. 易遭…的；取决于…的；受…⽀配 vt. 使⾂服，使顺从；使遭受
example: Math is my favorite subject at school.
exampleChinese: 数学是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

meaning: adj. 主观的；主语的
example: His opinion was too subjective for a fair debate.
exampleChinese: 他的观点太主观，不适合进行公平的辩论。

meaning: vt. 破坏，毁掉；宠坏，溺爱；善待 vi. (⻝物) 变质 n. 赃物，战利品
example: Too much sun can spoil the fruit.
exampleChinese: 阳光太强会把水果弄坏。

meaning: n. 赞助商，资助者；倡议者；保⼈ vt. 赞助，资助；举办；倡议 (法案)
example: A local business agreed to sponsor the school team.
exampleChinese: 一家当地企业同意赞助校队。

meaning: vt. 展开，摊开；伸开；使分散 vi. vt. 传播，散布；蔓延，扩散；涂 n. 传播，散布；区域；翼展
example: Please spread the map on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把地图展开在桌子上。

meaning: n. ⻢刺；鞭策，激励；⼭嘴 vt. 鞭策，激励；促进，加速
example: A good teacher can spur students to work harder.
exampleChinese: 一位好老师可以激励学生更加努力。

meaning: n. 间谍，密探 vi. 从事间谍活动，搜集情报 vt. 突然看⻅，发现
example: The spy hid the camera in a bag.
exampleChinese: 间谍把相机藏在包里。

meaning: n. 稳定，稳固
example: A strong bridge needs stability in high winds.
exampleChinese: 坚固的桥梁在大风中需要稳定性。

meaning: adj. 稳定的，稳固的；(⼈) 稳重的 n. ⻢厩；养⻢场 vt. 使 (⻢) ⼊厩
example: The stable horse stood quietly in its stall.
exampleChinese: 那匹马在马厩里安静地站着。

meaning: n. 全体职员；(学校) ⾏政⼈员 vt. 担当…职员，任职于
example: The school staff welcomed the new students.
exampleChinese: 学校的全体工作人员欢迎新生。

meaning: n. 阶段；步骤；舞台 vt. 上演，举办；组织，筹划
example: She waited behind the stage before the show.
exampleChinese: 演出前她在后台等候。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 弯曲变形；扭动；缠绕 vi. 曲折，蜿蜒 vt. 使弯曲；转动，旋转；扭伤；曲解 n. 转动，旋转；转折；急转弯处
example: She had to twist the lid open.
exampleChinese: 她不得不把盖子拧开。

meaning: adj. 琐碎的，微不⾜道的
example: It is trivial to lose one game in a long season.
exampleChinese: 在漫长的赛季中输掉一场比赛是微不足道的。

meaning: vi. vt. 试图，努⼒ vt. 试，试⽤；审讯，审判 n. 尝试，努⼒
example: I will try to finish my homework early.
exampleChinese: 我会努力早点完成作业。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 跌倒，滚落 vi. 倒塌；暴跌；仓促移动；翻跟头 n. 跌倒，暴跌；混乱的⼀堆
example: He will tumble down the hill if he runs too fast.
exampleChinese: 如果他跑得太快，就会从山坡上滚下来。

meaning: adj. 动荡的，混乱的；湍急的
example: The turbulent sea kept the boat near the shore.
exampleChinese: 汹涌的海面使船只停留在近岸处。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 旋转；转⾝；转弯；翻 (⻚) vt. 把…翻过来；(使) 松开；折起 vlink. (使) 变成，成为；到达 (年龄等) n. 旋转；(⻋) 转弯；机会；转变
example: Turn the key slowly.
exampleChinese: 慢慢转动钥匙。

meaning: n. 营业额；⼈员流动率；三⻆馅饼
example: The company reported a rise in turnover this year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司今年的营业额有所上升。

meaning: n. 类型，种类；某类⼈；印刷字体 vi. vt. 打 (字) vt. 确定…的类型，把…分类
example: What type of fruit do you like?
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪种水果？

meaning: adj. 典型的；⼀贯的；果不其然的
example: Her shoes are typical of the school uniform.
exampleChinese: 她的鞋子很典型，符合校服的样式。

meaning: adj. ⾃愿的；⽆偿的，志愿的
example: She did voluntary work at the animal shelter.
exampleChinese: 她在动物收容所做志愿工作。

meaning: n. 志愿者；⾃告奋勇者 vi. vt. ⾃愿做，⾃告奋勇 vt. 主动建议，主动提出 vi. ⾃愿参军
example: I volunteer at the animal shelter on Saturdays.
exampleChinese: 我每周六在动物收容所做志愿者。

meaning: vt. vi. 投票，表决，选举 vt. 选出，推举；表明，公认；提议 n. 选票；投票；投票权
example: I will vote for the class monitor today.
exampleChinese: 我今天会给班长投票。

meaning: adj. 粗俗的，俗⽓的；下流的
example: Vulgar jokes are not welcome in class.
exampleChinese: 课堂上不欢迎粗俗的笑话。

meaning: adj. 脆弱的，易受伤害的
example: Young plants are vulnerable to cold weather.
exampleChinese: 幼苗很容易受到寒冷天气的伤害。

meaning: n. 作者，作家；(计划等的) 筹划者 vt. 创作，写作，撰写
example: The author spoke about her new book.
exampleChinese: 这位作者谈到了她的新书。

meaning: n. 权威；权⼒；当权者，官⽅；授权
example: The manager has the authority to change the schedule.
exampleChinese: 经理有权力更改日程安排。

meaning: adj. 辅助的；备⽤的 n. 助动词
example: This phone has an auxiliary battery for emergencies.
exampleChinese: 这部手机有一个应急备用电池。

meaning: vi. vt. 有帮助，有⽤；利⽤ (机会等) n. 效⽤，帮助
example: Nothing I said could avail the angry crowd.
exampleChinese: 我说什么都对愤怒的人群没有帮助。

meaning: adj. 可获得的，可⽤的；有空的
example: Fresh bread is available at the bakery.
exampleChinese: 面包店有新鲜面包可买。

meaning: n. 评论家，批评家；批评者
example: The critic praised the film's strong ending.
exampleChinese: 这位评论家称赞了这部电影强有力的结尾。

meaning: adj. 批判的；关键的；危急的
example: It is critical to wear a helmet when riding a bike.
exampleChinese: 骑自行车时戴头盔至关重要。

meaning: n. 批评，指责；(对书等的) 评论
example: The book received criticism for its weak plot.
exampleChinese: 这本书因情节薄弱而受到批评。

meaning: vi. vt. 批评，指责，批判 vt. 评论，评价
example: It is easy to criticize others from the outside.
exampleChinese: 站在局外批评别人很容易。

meaning: adj. ⾄关重要的，关键性的
example: Clean water is crucial for every community.
exampleChinese: 清洁的水对每个社区都至关重要。

meaning: vi. 以…告终，达到…的顶点
example: The meeting will culminate in a final vote.
exampleChinese: 会议最终将以一次表决告终。

meaning: n. 罪犯，肇事者；问题的起因
example: The broken window was the culprit behind the cold room.
exampleChinese: 这扇破窗户是房间里寒冷的罪魁祸首。

meaning: vt. 开垦；种植；建⽴ (友谊)；培养
example: We cultivate vegetables in the school garden.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校花园里种植蔬菜。

meaning: n. ⽂化；种植，栽培
example: Our school celebrates local culture every spring.
exampleChinese: 我们学校每年春天都会庆祝当地文化。

meaning: adj. 双的，双重的，两部分的
example: The bike has a dual brake system for safety.
exampleChinese: 这辆自行车有一个双重刹车系统，很安全。

meaning: adj. 怀疑的；可疑的；不光彩的
example: I was dubious about the story he told us.
exampleChinese: 我对他告诉我们的故事表示怀疑。

meaning: adj. 由于；预期的；应给的；到期的 n. 应有的权利，应得的东西 adv. 正对着，正向
example: The bill is due today.
exampleChinese: 这张账单今天到期。

meaning: adj. 耐⽤的，持久的
example: This durable bag can last for years.
exampleChinese: 这个耐用的书包可以用好几年。

meaning: n. 持续时间，期间
example: The trip took two hours in duration.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行的持续时间是两个小时。

meaning: n. 责任，义务；职责；税
example: It is our duty to keep the classroom clean.
exampleChinese: 保持教室整洁是我们的责任。

meaning: adj. 充满活⼒的；动态的 n. 动态；⼒学，动⼒学
example: The app has a dynamic layout that changes with the screen.
exampleChinese: 这个应用有一个会随屏幕变化的动态布局。

meaning: adj. 已灭绝的，消失的；(⽕⼭) 死的
example: The dodo is an extinct bird.
exampleChinese: 渡渡鸟是一种已经灭绝的鸟。

meaning: vt. 熄灭，扑灭；毁灭，使破灭
example: Can you extinguish the candle before bed?
exampleChinese: 你睡觉前能把蜡烛熄灭吗？

meaning: vt. 介绍；使初次了解；推⾏；引⼊
example: Let me introduce my new classmate.
exampleChinese: 让我来介绍一下我的新同学。

meaning: n. 采⽤，引进；介绍；序⾔
example: His introduction was short and clear.
exampleChinese: 他的介绍简短而清楚。

meaning: vi. vt. 投资；投⼊ (时间等)；授 (权)
example: Many families invest in education for their children.
exampleChinese: 许多家庭把钱投入到孩子的教育中。

meaning: n. 投资；(时间、精⼒的) 投⼊
example: This small investment may bring big returns later.
exampleChinese: 这笔小投资以后可能带来很大的回报。

meaning: vi. vt. 调查，研究
example: The police will investigate the accident.
exampleChinese: 警方将调查这起事故。

meaning: adj. 相互的，彼此的；共有的
example: The two teams have a mutual respect.
exampleChinese: 这两支队伍彼此尊重。

meaning: adj. 神秘的；故弄⽞虚的
example: There was a mysterious light in the forest.
exampleChinese: 森林里有一道神秘的光。

meaning: n. 谜；神秘的⼈ (或物)；神秘性
example: The old box held a mystery for the children.
exampleChinese: 那个旧盒子对孩子们来说藏着一个秘密。

meaning: n. 神话；(很多⼈相信的) 错误看法
example: Many people believe the myth about eating carrots at night.
exampleChinese: 很多人相信晚上吃胡萝卜的错误说法。

meaning: adj. ⾼尚的；贵族的；壮观的 n. 贵族
example: She has a noble heart and helps everyone.
exampleChinese: 她心地高尚，总是帮助每个人。

meaning: n. 常态；规范，准则；平均⽔平
example: Getting eight hours of sleep is the norm for teenagers.
exampleChinese: 睡八个小时对青少年来说是常态。

meaning: adj. 正常的，平常的；⾝⼼健康的 n. 通常标准，常态
example: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.
exampleChinese: 考试前感到紧张是正常的。

meaning: n. 正常化
example: The normalization of the schedule took several weeks.
exampleChinese: 这个日程的正常化花了几周时间。

meaning: n. 笔记；便条；注释；纸币 n. ⾳符；感情⾊彩，调⼦ vt. 注意；指出，特别提到
example: I wrote a note after class.
exampleChinese: 我课后写了一则笔记。

meaning: n. 观念，理念，看法
example: She had a clear notion of what she wanted to study.
exampleChinese: 她对自己想学什么有清晰的想法。

meaning: adj. ⼤众的；公共的；政府的；公开的 n. 公众，⺠众
example: The park is open to the public on weekends.
exampleChinese: 这个公园周末向公众开放。

meaning: n. 出版，出版物；发表，公布
example: The publication of the report made the facts public.
exampleChinese: 这份报告的发表让事实公开了。

meaning: n. (媒体的) 关注，报道；宣传
example: The new movie got a lot of publicity online.
exampleChinese: 这部新电影在网上得到了很多宣传和报道。

meaning: vt. 出版；刊登；公布 vt. vi. 发表 (作品)
example: They will publish the book next month.
exampleChinese: 他们下个月将出版这本书。

meaning: n. 结果；得分，成绩；成果 vi. 由…引起；造成，导致
example: The test result made him smile.
exampleChinese: 测试结果让他笑了。

meaning: adj. 作为结果的，因⽽发⽣的
example: The resultant changes were easy to see.
exampleChinese: 由此产生的变化很容易看出来。

meaning: vt. vi. 继续，重新开始 vt. 恢复 (职位)，回到 (座位) n. 简历，履历；摘要，概述
example: We will resume the meeting after lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午饭后将继续会议。

meaning: vt. 揭⽰，揭露；展现，显露
example: The test results reveal a clear problem.
exampleChinese: 测试结果揭示了一个明显的问题。

meaning: n. 被揭⽰的真相；揭露 n. (上帝的) 启⽰
example: The diary held a shocking revelation.
exampleChinese: 这本日记里藏着一个令人震惊的真相。

meaning: n. 报复，报仇；雪耻 vt. 报复，报仇
example: He wanted revenge after the game.
exampleChinese: 比赛后，他想要报复。

meaning: n. 收⼊，财政收⼊，税收
example: The company's revenue rose after the new product launch.
exampleChinese: 新产品上市后，这家公司的收入增加了。

meaning: n. 供应量；补给；供给，供应 vt. 供给，供应
example: Trees supply shade in the summer.
exampleChinese: 树木在夏天提供阴凉。

meaning: vt. ⽀持；资助；养活；⽀撑；证实 n. ⽀持；资助；⽀撑物；证据
example: Strong walls support the roof.
exampleChinese: 坚固的墙支撑着屋顶。

meaning: vi. vt. 认为，猜想；(婉转表达) 要不 vt. 假定，假设
example: I suppose he will arrive after lunch.
exampleChinese: 我想他会在午饭后到。

meaning: vt. 镇压；压抑；封锁，隐瞒；抑制
example: The police can suppress the riot quickly.
exampleChinese: 警察可以迅速镇压骚乱。

meaning: n. 增补 (物)，补充 (物)；增刊 vt. 增补，补充
example: She added a supplement to her breakfast.
exampleChinese: 她早餐加了一份补充食品。

meaning: adj. ⾄⾼⽆上的；(程度上) 最⼤的
example: The team played at the supreme level of skill.
exampleChinese: 这支队伍发挥出了最高水平的技术。

meaning: n. 体系，制度；系统
example: The school system helps every child learn.
exampleChinese: 学校制度帮助每个孩子学习。

meaning: adj. 系统的，有条理的，有计划的
example: The team followed a systematic plan.
exampleChinese: 这个团队遵循了一个系统的计划。

meaning: n. 逻辑 (思维)；逻辑学；逻辑系统
example: Good logic helps us solve problems step by step.
exampleChinese: 良好的逻辑思维有助于我们一步一步解决问题。

meaning: adj. 合情合理的；合乎逻辑的
example: It is logical to finish your homework before you play.
exampleChinese: 先完成作业再去玩是合情合理的。

meaning: vt. 营救，救援 n. 营救，营救活动
example: Firefighters rushed in to rescue the child.
exampleChinese: 消防员冲进去营救那个孩子。

meaning: n. 研究，调查 vi. vt. 研究，调查
example: She is doing research on sea animals.
exampleChinese: 她在研究海洋动物。

meaning: vt. 怨恨，憎恶
example: He resent the unfair comment.
exampleChinese: 他对这句不公正的评论感到怨恨。

meaning: vt. 使恢复活⼒；翻新；使记起 vt. vi. 刷新 (⽹⻚)
example: Please refresh the page to see the latest news.
exampleChinese: 请刷新页面查看最新消息。

meaning: vt. 反驳，否认…的正确性
example: The scientist will refute the false claim with data.
exampleChinese: 这位科学家将用数据反驳那个错误说法。

meaning: n. 地区，区域；⾏政区；⾝体部位
example: This region has many small lakes.
exampleChinese: 这个地区有许多小湖泊。

meaning: adj. 有规律的；频繁的；通常的 n. 常客，⽼主顾；含铅汽油
example: The bus comes at regular times every day.
exampleChinese: 这辆公交车每天都按固定时间到。

meaning: vt. vi. (以规章) 管理，约束 vt. 调整，调节
example: The school can regulate the use of mobile phones.
exampleChinese: 学校可以管理手机的使用。

meaning: n. 规章，制度；调控，管理 adj. 规定的，正规的
example: The new regulation is for student safety.
exampleChinese: 这项新规定是为了学生安全。

meaning: vt. 替换；更换；把…放回原处
example: We need to replace the old chair.
exampleChinese: 我们需要把这把旧椅子换掉。

meaning: vi. vt. 回复，答复 vi. 作出回应 n. 答复，回应
example: She did not reply to my email.
exampleChinese: 她没有回复我的电子邮件。

meaning: vt. vi. 汇报，报告；报道，宣布 vt. 据说，传闻；举报，告发 vi. 报到 n. 报道；报告；传闻；成绩报告单
example: I finished my science report last night.
exampleChinese: 我昨晚完成了我的科学报告。

meaning: n. 记者
example: The reporter asked many questions at the press conference.
exampleChinese: 记者在新闻发布会上问了很多问题。

meaning: n. 名誉，名声
example: The school has a strong reputation.
exampleChinese: 这所学校有很好的名声。

meaning: n. 请求，要求；点播的歌曲 vt. 请求，要求
example: She sent a request for more time on the project.
exampleChinese: 她发出了延长项目时间的请求。

meaning: vt. 需要；要求，规定
example: This job will require more time.
exampleChinese: 这项工作将需要更多时间。

meaning: n. 需求，必需品；必要条件
example: The job has one important requirement.
exampleChinese: 这份工作有一个重要要求。

meaning: vt. 评估；估算
example: The teacher will assess our projects tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 老师明天会评定我们的项目。

meaning: vt. 吸收，接受，学习 vi. vt. (使) 同化，融⼊
example: Children often assimilate new words through reading.
exampleChinese: 孩子们常常通过阅读吸收新单词。

meaning: vi. vt. 帮助，协助 vt. 促进，有助于 n. 助攻
example: The coach will assist the new player.
exampleChinese: 教练会帮助这名新队员。

meaning: n. 帮助，援助，⽀持
example: We need your assistance with this project.
exampleChinese: 我们需要你在这个项目上的帮助。

meaning: n. 助⼿，助理；售货员 adj. 助理的，副的
example: My assistant helped me organize the files.
exampleChinese: 我的助手帮我整理了文件。

meaning: vt. 假设；承担，取得；呈现出；假装
example: We assume the store opens at nine.
exampleChinese: 我们假定这家商店九点开门。

meaning: n. 假设，臆断；(责任的) 承担
example: It is only an assumption, not a fact.
exampleChinese: 这只是一个假定，不是事实。

meaning: vt. vi. 捐赠，捐助；做贡献；撰稿 vi. 促使，是导致…的原因之⼀
example: Everyone can contribute to the class project.
exampleChinese: 每个人都可以为班级项目出力。

meaning: n. 贡献；捐献；定期缴款；稿件
example: Her contribution made the team stronger.
exampleChinese: 她的贡献让团队更强大。

meaning: adj. 有争议的，引发争论的
example: The new law is highly controversial.
exampleChinese: 这项新法律争议很大。

meaning: n. 争论，争议
example: There is much controversy over the new rule.
exampleChinese: 关于这条新规定有很多争议。

meaning: n. 控制，限制；开关 vt. 控制，限制
example: The driver lost control of the car.
exampleChinese: 司机失去了对汽车的控制。

meaning: vt. vi. 召集，召开，集合
example: The teacher will convene the class after lunch.
exampleChinese: 老师午饭后会召集全班同学。

meaning: n. 习俗，惯例；⼤会；公约，协定
example: By custom, we shake hands in this convention.
exampleChinese: 按照惯例，在这个传统中我们会握手。

meaning: vi. 相交；聚集；趋同
example: The two rivers converge near the city.
exampleChinese: 这两条河在城市附近汇合。

meaning: vt. 表达，传递，传达；运输，运送
example: Please convey my thanks to your teacher.
exampleChinese: 请代我向你的老师转达谢意。

meaning: n. 领域，范畴；领地；域
example: Physics is his favorite domain of study.
exampleChinese: 物理学是他最喜欢的研究领域。

meaning: adj. 国内的；家庭的；家养的 n. 佣⼈；家庭纠纷
example: My family eats domestic food whenever possible.
exampleChinese: 我们家尽可能吃国产食品。

meaning: adj. 占⽀配 (统治) 地位的；显性的
example: The sun is the dominant object in our solar system.
exampleChinese: 太阳是我们太阳系中占主导地位的天体。

meaning: vt. vi. 主宰，统治，⽀配 vt. ⾼耸，耸⽴
example: The giant rock formation dominate the valley.
exampleChinese: 那座巨大的岩石地貌俯视着山谷。

meaning: n. 厄运，死亡，毁灭 vt. 使…注定遭受 (不幸等)
example: One mistake can doom the whole project.
exampleChinese: 一个错误就可能毁掉整个项目。

meaning: adj. 两倍的，双重的；双⼈的 n. 两倍，两倍量 vi. vt. 是…的两倍，使加倍 vt. 把…对折
example: The new room is double the size of mine.
exampleChinese: 新房间的大小是我房间的两倍。

meaning: n. 怀疑，不确定 vt. 怀疑；不信任，对…没有信⼼
example: There is no doubt that he tried his best.
exampleChinese: 毫无疑问，他已经尽了全力。

meaning: vt. vi. 追问，探究，打探 vt. (⽤细⻓⼯具) 探查 n. 详细调查；航天探测器；探针
example: The doctor will probe the wound carefully.
exampleChinese: 医生会仔细探查伤口。

meaning: n. 步骤，程序；⼿术，治疗
example: Follow the procedure carefully.
exampleChinese: 请认真遵循这个程序。

meaning: vi. 继续做，接着做；⾏进，前往
example: We will proceed after the teacher explains the rules.
exampleChinese: 老师解释完规则后，我们将继续。

meaning: n. 诉讼；⼀系列⾏动；(会议) 记录
example: The court case is still in proceeding.
exampleChinese: 这起诉讼仍在进行中。

meaning: n. 过程，流程，⼯序 vt. 加⼯，处理；审阅，审核
example: The computer can process the file quickly.
exampleChinese: 这台电脑可以快速处理这个文件。

meaning: n. 队伍，⾏列，游⾏；⼀连串
example: A long procession moved slowly through the city center.
exampleChinese: 一支长长的队伍缓慢地穿过市中心。

meaning: vt. 宣布，声明；表明，显⽰
example: The mayor will proclaim the new park open today.
exampleChinese: 市长今天将宣布新公园开放。

meaning: vt. ⽣产，制作；出产；引起；制⽚ n. (⻝品等) 农产品
example: This farm can produce fresh milk every day.
exampleChinese: 这个农场每天都能生产新鲜牛奶。

meaning: n. 产品，制品；⽣成物；结果；积
example: This product is easy to use.
exampleChinese: 这个产品很容易使用。

meaning: n. ⽣产，制造；产量；产⽣，分泌 n. (电影等的) 制作
example: Her hard work led to excellent production.
exampleChinese: 她的努力带来了出色的成果。

meaning: adj. 多产的，⽣产的；有成效的
example: She is a productive student who finishes her work early.
exampleChinese: 她是一名高效的学生，总能很早完成作业。

meaning: n. ⽣产⼒，⽣产率
example: Good sleep can improve your productivity at school.
exampleChinese: 良好的睡眠可以提高你在学校的学习效率。

meaning: n. 职业；业界⼈⼠；公开，表明
example: She wants to choose medicine as her profession.
exampleChinese: 她想选择医学作为自己的职业。

meaning: adj. 职业的，专业的 n. 专业⼈⼠；职业运动员；内⾏
example: You should ask a professional for legal advice.
exampleChinese: 你应该向专业人员寻求法律建议。

meaning: vi. vt. 扩充，扩⼤；扩展 (业务) vi. 详谈，详述
example: The company plans to expand into new markets.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划扩展到新市场。

meaning: n. 扩张，扩充，扩⼤
example: The city planned a big expansion of the subway system.
exampleChinese: 这座城市计划大规模扩建地铁系统。

meaning: vt. 预计；盼望；要求，期望 vi. vt. 猜想
example: I expect good news from her soon.
exampleChinese: 我期待很快收到她的好消息。

meaning: n. 预料，预期；期望，指望
example: His expectation was that the team would win.
exampleChinese: 他期待球队会获胜。

meaning: n. 经验，阅历；(⼀次) 经历 vt. 经历；感受，体会
example: Experience taught him to be more careful.
exampleChinese: 经验教会了他要更加小心。

meaning: n. 实验，试验；尝试，实践 vi. (⽤…) 做实验；进⾏试验，试⽤
example: We did a simple experiment in science class.
exampleChinese: 我们在科学课上做了一个简单的实验。

meaning: n. 专家，⾏家 adj. 熟练的，专家的，内⾏的
example: She is an expert in computer coding.
exampleChinese: 她是计算机编程专家。

meaning: n. 专⻔技术，专⻔知识，专⻓
example: He has the expertise to fix the computer quickly.
exampleChinese: 他有能力很快修好这台电脑。

meaning: vi. (协议等) 到期，失效；死亡
example: Your ticket will expire at midnight.
exampleChinese: 你的票将在午夜到期。

meaning: n. 本能，天性；直觉
example: It was her instinct to help the lost child.
exampleChinese: 帮助那个迷路孩子是她的本能。

meaning: n. 机构，协会，研究院，学院 vt. 建⽴ (体系等)，制定 (规章等)
example: The school will institute a new rule.
exampleChinese: 学校将开始实行一项新规定。

meaning: n. 机构；收容机构；习俗，制度
example: Honesty is a basic institution of our school life.
exampleChinese: 诚实是我们学校生活中的一项基本制度。

meaning: n. 保险 (业)；保险费；预防措施
example: She bought insurance for her new bike.
exampleChinese: 她给新自行车买了保险。

meaning: vt. vi. (给…) 投保 vt. 承保，为…提供保险；确保
example: We must insure that every door is locked.
exampleChinese: 我们必须确保每扇门都上锁了。

meaning: adj. 必不可少的；作为组成部分的
example: A helmet is an integral part of safe riding.
exampleChinese: 头盔是安全骑行必不可少的一部分。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 合并；(使) 融⼊群体
example: The new students will integrate into the class soon.
exampleChinese: 新同学很快就会融入这个班级。

meaning: n. 正直，诚实；完整，完全
example: The judge praised the witness for her integrity.
exampleChinese: 法官称赞这位证人的正直。

meaning: adj. 好奇的；稀奇古怪的，不寻常的
example: The curious boy asked many questions about space.
exampleChinese: 那个好奇的男孩问了许多关于太空的问题。

meaning: n. 好奇⼼；奇物，珍品
example: Her curiosity led her to open the old box.
exampleChinese: 她的好奇心让她打开了那个旧盒子。

meaning: n. 通货，货币；通⽤，流传
example: You can pay for the book in local currency.
exampleChinese: 你可以用当地货币买这本书。

meaning: adj. 当前的，现在的，流⾏的 n. ⽔流，⽓流；电流；思潮
example: This is the current version of the app.
exampleChinese: 这是这个应用的当前版本。

meaning: vt. 切，割，剪；削减；删节 vi. 可切割；停⽌拍⽚ n. 伤⼝；开⼝；削减；理发；删节
example: Use these scissors to cut the paper.
exampleChinese: 用这把剪刀剪纸。

meaning: adj. 累加的，积累的
example: The cumulative cost of the trip was higher than expected.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行的累计费用比预期更高。

meaning: adj. 平均的；(数量) 中等的；普通的 n. 平均⽔平；平均数，均值 vt. 平均数是 vt. vi. 计算出…的平均数
example: The average score of the class was 85.
exampleChinese: 这个班的平均分是85分。

meaning: vt. 避免；回避；避免撞上
example: We leave early to avoid heavy traffic.
exampleChinese: 我们早点出发以避免交通拥堵。

meaning: adj. 醒着的，没睡着的 vi. vt. (使) 醒来；唤起 (情感或记忆)
example: I was still awake at midnight.
exampleChinese: 我在半夜时还醒着。

meaning: n. 奖，奖品；(赔偿) 裁定额 vt. 授予，奖励
example: She won an award for her painting.
exampleChinese: 她因自己的画作获得了一个奖。

meaning: adj. 知道的；注意到的；有…意识的
example: He was aware of the noise outside the window.
exampleChinese: 他意识到了窗外的噪音。

meaning: adj. 尴尬的；难处理的；笨拙的
example: It felt awkward to sit in silence.
exampleChinese: 安静地坐着让人觉得很尴尬。

meaning: adj. 奢侈的，铺张浪费的；离谱的
example: He bought an extravagant gift for his friend.
exampleChinese: 他给朋友买了一份奢侈的礼物。

meaning: adj. 极度的；严重的；偏激的 n. 极端，极度
example: The desert has extreme heat during the day.
exampleChinese: 沙漠里白天的温度极高。

meaning: adj. 看不⻅的，隐形的
example: The key was invisible in the dark room.
exampleChinese: 那把钥匙在黑暗的房间里看不见。

meaning: vt. 援引 (法律)；唤起；引⽤
example: The lawyer will invoke the new law in court.
exampleChinese: 律师将在法庭上援引这项新法律。

meaning: vt. 需要，包含；牵涉，涉及；使参与
example: This project will involve many students.
exampleChinese: 这个项目将涉及许多学生。

meaning: n. 议题；问题；⼀期，期号 vt. 宣布；发放，签发；出版；发⾏
example: The team discussed the main issue at the meeting.
exampleChinese: 团队在会议上讨论了这个主要议题。

meaning: n. ⼀件 (物品)；项⽬；⼀篇报道
example: Please check each item on the list.
exampleChinese: 请检查清单上的每一项。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 翻倒，打翻 vt. 推翻 (判决等)；颠覆 (政府等)
example: The truck can overturn on a sharp turn.
exampleChinese: 卡车在急转弯时可能会翻倒。

meaning: vt. 使不知所措；击败；压垮；淹没
example: The loud noise can overwhelm small children.
exampleChinese: 巨大的噪音会让小孩子不知所措。

meaning: vt. 购买，采购 n. 购买⾏为；所购之物；握紧
example: I made the purchase online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上完成了这笔购买。

meaning: vt. 追求，继续进⾏；追究；追赶
example: She will pursue her dream of becoming a doctor.
exampleChinese: 她将追求成为医生的梦想。

meaning: n. 追求；追赶；爱好，消遣
example: Chess is his favorite pursuit.
exampleChinese: 下棋是他最喜欢的消遣。

meaning: n. 谜，智⼒游戏；拼图；不解之谜 vt. 迷惑，使困惑
example: This puzzle helps us remember new shapes.
exampleChinese: 这个拼图帮助我们记住新的图形。

meaning: vt. 逆转，扭转；撤销，推翻；使反转 vi. vt. 倒⻋ n. 相反的情况；背⾯；倒挡；损失 adj. 相反的，反⾯的
example: The driver tried to reverse the car out of the garage.
exampleChinese: 司机试着把车倒出车库。

meaning: n. 评论；审查；回顾；复习 vt. 写评论；审查；回顾；复习
example: Before the test, I did a quick review of my notes.
exampleChinese: 考试前，我快速回顾了一下笔记。

meaning: vt. 改变 (想法)；修改，修订 vi. vt. 复习
example: Please revise your essay before you hand it in.
exampleChinese: 请在交上作文前修改一下。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 苏醒，(使) 复活 vt. 使…复兴；重新上演
example: The old song can revive happy memories.
exampleChinese: 这首老歌能唤起快乐的回忆。

meaning: n. 奖赏，回报；赏⾦ vt. 奖励，酬谢
example: Hard work will reward you in the end.
exampleChinese: 努力工作最终会给你回报。

meaning: adj. 富裕的；丰富多彩的；肥沃的 adj. ⼤量含有…的
example: He is rich, but he lives simply.
exampleChinese: 他很富有，但生活很朴素。

meaning: vi. 上升，提⾼；起床，起⽴；耸⽴ n. 上升，提⾼；加薪；增强
example: The sun will rise at about six tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 明天太阳大约六点升起。

meaning: n. ⻛险，危险；危险的事 (或⼈) vt. 使…冒⻛险；冒…的⻛险
example: We should not risk our safety.
exampleChinese: 我们不应该拿安全冒险。

meaning: n. 竞争者，对⼿ vt. 能与…媲美
example: No rival could match her speed on the track.
exampleChinese: 没有对手能在赛道上匹敌她的速度。

meaning: n. 作⽤，职能；⻆⾊
example: She played the role of a doctor in the play.
exampleChinese: 她在戏剧中扮演医生这个角色。

meaning: vi. vt. 翻滚；原地打转；翻⾝；移动 vt. 把…卷起来；使平坦；裹起来 n. 卷，卷轴；⼀管；⾯包条；名单
example: He will roll the carpet before moving.
exampleChinese: 他会在搬家前把地毯卷起来。

meaning: n. 根；根部；根源；起源 vi. vt. (使) ⽣根 vi. 翻找
example: The plant began to root in the wet soil.
exampleChinese: 这种植物开始在湿润的土壤里生根。

meaning: n. 路线，路途；途径，渠道 vt. 按某路线发送
example: We took a longer route to avoid traffic.
exampleChinese: 我们走了一条更长的路线来避开交通堵塞。

meaning: n. 惯例，常规；(演出的) ⼀套动作 adj. 常规的，例⾏公事的；乏味的
example: Brushing your teeth is part of your morning routine.
exampleChinese: 刷牙是你早晨日常程序的一部分。

meaning: n. ⼀排，⼀⾏，⼀列；吵架；争议 vi. vt. 划船
example: The students sat in the front row.
exampleChinese: 学生们坐在前排。

meaning: n. 规则；建议；定律；统治；常规 vt. vi. 控制，统治；裁定，判决 vt. ⽀配，操纵
example: The old king used to rule the country wisely.
exampleChinese: 那位老国王过去曾明智地统治这个国家。

meaning: n. 直尺，尺⼦；统治者
example: She drew a straight line with a ruler.
exampleChinese: 她用尺子画了一条直线。

meaning: n. 姓
example: Her surname is Li.
exampleChinese: 她的姓是李。

meaning: vt. 超过，胜过
example: Her hard work helped her surpass the class average.
exampleChinese: 她的努力帮助她超过了班级平均水平。

meaning: n. 过剩，过剩量；盈余，顺差 adj. 过剩的，剩余的
example: We have a surplus of apples this week.
exampleChinese: 我们这周有多余的苹果。

meaning: n. 意想不到的事情；惊奇 vt. 使惊奇，使感到意外
example: Her visit was a big surprise to us.
exampleChinese: 她的来访让我们非常惊讶。

meaning: n. 调查；勘测；概述 vt. 做调查；审视；勘测；概述
example: The students will survey the park this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 学生们今天下午将调查这个公园。

meaning: n. (对嫌疑⼈或犯罪场所的) 监视
example: The police kept the house under surveillance all night.
exampleChinese: 警察整夜监视着那栋房子。

meaning: n. 幸存，⽣存；残存物
example: Good survival skills helped them stay alive in the forest.
exampleChinese: 良好的生存技能帮助他们在森林里活了下来。

meaning: vi. vt. 幸存；艰难渡过 vi. 继续维持⽣活；保存下来 vt. ⽐…活得久
example: The rabbit tried to survive the cold winter.
exampleChinese: 这只兔子努力在寒冷的冬天活下来。

meaning: adj. 易受影响的，易患病的；敏感的
example: Young children are susceptible to colds.
exampleChinese: 年幼的孩子容易感冒。

meaning: vt. 暂停，中⽌；使停职或停学 vt. 延缓；悬，吊；悬浮
example: The school will suspend classes for one day.
exampleChinese: 学校将停课一天。

meaning: vt. vi. 怀疑，猜想 n. 嫌疑犯 adj. 骗⼈的，可疑的
example: The police suspect him of lying.
exampleChinese: 警方怀疑他在说谎。

meaning: n. 怀疑，嫌疑，猜疑；猜想，预感
example: They had no suspicion that the door was open.
exampleChinese: 他们没有怀疑门是开着的。

meaning: adj. 觉得可疑的；可疑的
example: The guard looked suspicious of the stranger.
exampleChinese: 警卫对那个陌生人看起来很警惕。

meaning: vt. 保持，维持；遭受；⽀撑；认可
example: We need to sustain our effort until the end.
exampleChinese: 我们需要把努力坚持到最后。

meaning: n. ⼀⼤群 (⻜⾍或⼈) vi. 成群移动，涌向，蜂拥
example: A swarm of bees flew past the garden.
exampleChinese: 一大群蜜蜂飞过花园。

meaning: vi. 咒骂，诅咒，说脏话 vt. 发誓要；肯定地说；使起誓 vi. vt. 发誓，郑重承诺
example: I swear I told the truth.
exampleChinese: 我发誓我说的是实话。

meaning: vi. 肿胀；变得更响亮；充满 (激情) vt. vi. (使) 增加，扩⼤ n. 海浪的涌动；隆起处；增加 adj. 很愉快的
example: My ankle may swell after the injury.
exampleChinese: 我的脚踝受伤后可能会肿起来。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 摆动；(使) 转弯；朝…打去 vi. vt. (使) 改变 (意⻅等) vt. (不正当地) 搞到，办成 n. 摆动；改变；秋千；挥杆动作
example: The swing in the park moves in the wind.
exampleChinese: 公园里的秋千在风中摇摆。

meaning: n. (电路的) 开关；骤变，突变 vt. vi. (使) 改变，转变，突变；调班 vt. 交换，对调
example: Please switch the light off before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前把灯关掉。

meaning: n. 项⽬，⽅案；专题研究；住宅区 vt. 规划；预测；投射；展现；投掷 vi. 突出，伸出
example: This lamp can project a bright circle on the wall.
exampleChinese: 这盏灯能把一个明亮的圆投射到墙上。

meaning: n. 利润，收益；益处，好处 vi. vt. 得益 (于)，对…有益
example: The company hopes to make a bigger profit this year.
exampleChinese: 公司希望今年获得更大的利润。

meaning: adj. 盈利的，有利润的；有益的
example: The small shop became profitable after a year.
exampleChinese: 这家小商店一年后开始盈利。

meaning: adj. 深远的；知识渊博的；⽞奥的
example: Her profound respect for nature shaped her career.
exampleChinese: 她对自然深深的敬意影响了她的职业选择。

meaning: n. 计划；程序；节⽬；课程 vt. vi. 编写程序 vt. 使…有倾向；预设
example: I checked the program before the show started.
exampleChinese: 演出开始前我看了节目单。

meaning: adj. 进步的；逐步发⽣的；进⾏式的 n. 进步⼈⼠，开明⼈⼠
example: The school supports a progressive plan for recycling.
exampleChinese: 这所学校支持一个循序渐进的回收计划。

meaning: vt. 禁⽌；使不可能
example: The school rules prohibit smoking on campus.
exampleChinese: 学校规定禁止在校园内吸烟。

meaning: vt. 延⻓，拖延
example: We should not prolong the meeting any longer.
exampleChinese: 我们不应该再把会议拖长了。

meaning: adj. 杰出的，重要的；显眼的
example: She is a prominent scientist in our city.
exampleChinese: 她是我们城市里一位杰出的科学家。

meaning: vt. vi. 承诺，保证 vt. 使很可能，预⽰ n. 诺⾔；前途，潜质；迹象
example: I promise to finish my homework tonight.
exampleChinese: 我答应今晚完成作业。

meaning: adj. ⼤有希望的，很有前途的
example: The team looks promising after three straight wins.
exampleChinese: 这支队伍在三连胜后看起来很有前途。

meaning: vt. 促进；推销；晋升；提倡
example: Exercise can promote good health.
exampleChinese: 运动可以促进健康。

meaning: vt. 促使；引起，激起；提⽰ adj. 迅速的，⽴即的；准时的 n. 提⽰符 adv. 准时地
example: Please prompt me if I forget the password.
exampleChinese: 如果我忘了密码，请提醒我。

meaning: n. 证据；证实；求证；校样 adj. 能防范的 suff. 防…的，抗…的 vt. 校对
example: This photo is strong proof of his story.
exampleChinese: 这张照片是他所说故事的有力证据。

meaning: n. 预订，预约；保留意⻅；保留地
example: I made a reservation for dinner at seven.
exampleChinese: 我预约了晚上七点的晚餐。

meaning: vt. 预订，预约；预留；保留 (权利) n. 储备 (量)；⾃然保护区；内向
example: We should reserve some water for the hike.
exampleChinese: 我们应该为徒步旅行留些水作储备。

meaning: vt. vi. 按捺，克制；抵抗，抵制；抵御 vt. 经得起，抗 (伤害)
example: She tried to resist the candy.
exampleChinese: 她努力抵抗糖果的诱惑。

meaning: n. 抵制；反抗；抵抗⼒；阻⼒
example: The body builds resistance after regular exercise.
exampleChinese: 身体在经常锻炼后会增强抵抗力。

meaning: adj. 有抵抗⼒的；反对的，抵制的 suff. 抗…的，耐…的
example: This phone case is resistant to water.
exampleChinese: 这个手机壳防水。

meaning: adj. 坚韧的，有适应⼒的；有弹性的
example: She stayed resilient after losing the game.
exampleChinese: 输掉比赛后，她依然坚韧。

meaning: n. 度假胜地；采⽤的⽅法 vi. 诉诸，求助
example: When the road was blocked, we had to resort to walking.
exampleChinese: 道路被堵住时，我们只好改为步行。

meaning: n. 资源，物⼒；资料；机敏 vt. 向…提供资⾦ (或设备)
example: The city has rich natural resource and good schools.
exampleChinese: 这座城市拥有丰富的自然资源和优质学校。

meaning: n. 尊敬，尊重；⽅⾯ vt. 尊敬，尊重；遵守
example: We should show respect to our parents and teachers.
exampleChinese: 我们应该尊敬父母和老师。

meaning: adj. 分别的，各⾃的
example: The two sisters have respective rooms.
exampleChinese: 这对姐妹各自有自己的房间。

meaning: vi. vt. 回复，回答 vi. 作出反应；有良好反应
example: I will respond after I read your message.
exampleChinese: 我看完你的消息后会回复。

meaning: n. 回答，答复；反应，回应
example: I sent a quick response to her message.
exampleChinese: 我很快回复了她的信息。

meaning: n. 责任
example: Helping others is a big responsibility.
exampleChinese: 帮助他人是一项重大的责任。

meaning: adj. 负责的；应担责的；作为原因的
example: He is responsible for cleaning the classroom.
exampleChinese: 他负责打扫教室。

meaning: vi. 成功 vi. vt. 接替，继任，继承；随后出现
example: If we keep trying, we will succeed.
exampleChinese: 如果我们继续努力，我们就会成功。

meaning: n. 成功，胜利；成功的⼈ (或事物)
example: Hard work is the key to success.
exampleChinese: 努力工作是成功的关键。

meaning: adj. 成功的，有成效的；有成就的
example: Our team was successful in the final match.
exampleChinese: 我们队在决赛中取得了成功。

meaning: n. ⼀连串；继承，继承权
example: A succession of storms damaged the coast.
exampleChinese: 一连串风暴损坏了海岸。

meaning: adj. 连续的，接连的，相继的
example: We had successive rainy days last week.
exampleChinese: 上周我们连续几天都在下雨。

meaning: n. 接任者，继承者
example: Her successor will continue the project.
exampleChinese: 她的继任者将继续这个项目。

meaning: vt. 吮，吸；抽 (空⽓等)；把…卷⼊ vi. vt. 含在嘴⾥吮 vi. 糟糕透顶，很差
example: The baby likes to suck a bottle.
exampleChinese: 这个婴儿喜欢吸奶瓶。

meaning: vt. vi. 控告，起诉 vi. (尤指在法庭上)提出请求
example: The workers will sue the company over unpaid wages.
exampleChinese: 工人们将因拖欠工资起诉这家公司。

meaning: vi. vt. 遭受，蒙受，受苦 vi. 变差，变糟
example: Many people suffer from the cold in winter.
exampleChinese: 很多人在冬天受寒冷之苦。

meaning: vi. ⾜够，充⾜
example: Two hours will suffice for the trip.
exampleChinese: 这趟行程两个小时就足够了。

meaning: adj. 充⾜的，⾜够的
example: We have sufficient time to finish the test.
exampleChinese: 我们有足够的时间完成考试。

meaning: vt. 提议，建议；推荐；表明；暗⽰
example: I suggest taking the early bus.
exampleChinese: 我建议坐早班公交车。

meaning: n. 建议，提议；迹象；微量；暗⽰
example: Thank you for your suggestion about the class trip.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你对班级旅行提出的建议。

meaning: n. ⾃杀；⾃杀性⾏为；⾃杀者
example: The news of his suicide shocked the whole class.
exampleChinese: 他自杀的消息震惊了整个班级。

meaning: n. 西服，套装；诉讼，起诉 vt. 适合；相配，合⾝
example: He wore a dark blue suit to the meeting.
exampleChinese: 他穿着一套深蓝色西装去参加会议。

meaning: adj. 合适的，适宜的
example: These shoes are suitable for a long walk.
exampleChinese: 这双鞋适合长时间步行。

meaning: adj. 极好的，很棒的 adv. ⾮常，格外 pref. 超级 n. (⼤楼的) 看管⼈
example: You did a super job on the poster.
exampleChinese: 你的海报做得极好。

meaning: adj. 极好的，卓越的
example: The cake tastes superb.
exampleChinese: 这蛋糕味道极好。

meaning: adj. 肤浅的；表⾯的；表⽪的
example: Her apology sounded superficial and insincere.
exampleChinese: 她的道歉听起来很肤浅，也不真诚。

meaning: adj. 过剩的，过多的，多余的
example: The report included a superfluous page of notes.
exampleChinese: 这份报告里有一页多余的笔记。

meaning: adj. 更好的；级别更⾼的；⾼傲的 n. 上级，上司
example: Her superior praised her careful work.
exampleChinese: 她的上级表扬了她细心的工作。

meaning: n. 优越，优势；优越感，骄傲⾃⼤
example: He spoke with a false sense of superiority.
exampleChinese: 他说话时带着一种虚假的优越感。

meaning: vt. vi. 监督，管理，指导，主管
example: The teacher will supervise the lab experiment.
exampleChinese: 老师将监督这次实验。

meaning: n. 扳机；触发器；起因，诱因 vt. 引起，触发
example: A loud noise can trigger a fire alarm.
exampleChinese: 一声巨响会触发火警报警器。

meaning: n. 成功，胜利；胜利的喜悦；典范 vi. 成功，获胜
example: Their team will triumph after months of practice.
exampleChinese: 他们的队伍经过几个月的训练后将会获胜。

meaning: vt. 向…保证；弄清楚；确保
example: Please assure me that the door is locked.
exampleChinese: 请向我保证门已经锁好了。

meaning: n. 担保，保证；把握；(⼈寿) 保险
example: Her calm assurance helped us relax.
exampleChinese: 她平静的保证让我们放松了下来。

meaning: vt. 使吃惊，使惊讶
example: The news astonish everyone in the classroom.
exampleChinese: 这个消息让教室里的每个人都很惊讶。

meaning: n. ⽓氛；⼤⽓层；空⽓；情调
example: The classroom had a quiet, friendly atmosphere.
exampleChinese: 教室里有一种安静而友好的气氛。

meaning: n. 地⽅议会；委员会
example: The council approved the new park plan.
exampleChinese: 地方议会批准了新的公园计划。

meaning: n. 忠告，建议；辩护律师 vt. 建议，劝告；提供专业咨询
example: The lawyer gave us good counsel before the meeting.
exampleChinese: 会面前，律师给了我们很好的建议。

meaning: n. 戏，剧，戏剧艺术；戏剧性事件
example: The school drama ended with loud applause.
exampleChinese: 这部学校戏剧以热烈的掌声结束。

meaning: adj. 急剧的；激动⼈⼼的；戏剧的
example: There was a dramatic change in the weather.
exampleChinese: 天气发生了戏剧性的变化。

meaning: vt. 剥削；利⽤；开采 n. 英勇的⾏为
example: We should exploit the new technology wisely.
exampleChinese: 我们应该明智地开发这项新技术。

meaning: vt. vi. 探索，探测 vt. 探究，探讨
example: We will explore the old castle tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我们明天要去探索那座古城堡。

meaning: adj. 智⼒的，脑⼒的；有才智的 n. 知识分⼦
example: She is an intellectual student who loves books.
exampleChinese: 她是一个热爱书籍的聪明学生。

meaning: n. 智⼒，理解⼒；情报，情报机构
example: Her intelligence helps her learn new things quickly.
exampleChinese: 她的智力帮助她很快学会新事物。

meaning: adj. 聪明的；有智⼒的；智能的
example: Our new robot is very intelligent.
exampleChinese: 我们的新机器人很智能。

meaning: adj. 可理解的，明⽩易懂的
example: His speech was clear and intelligible.
exampleChinese: 他的演讲清晰易懂。

meaning: vt. vi. 擦光，抛光 vt. 改善，润⾊ n. 抛光剂，亮光剂；抛光，擦亮
example: He will polish the shoes before the meeting.
exampleChinese: 他会在会议前把鞋子擦亮。

meaning: n. 观点；重点；特点；时刻；得分 n. 地点；尖端；意图，⽤处 vt. vi. 指向，瞄准 vi. 对着，朝向
example: He used a stick to point at the map.
exampleChinese: 他用一根棍子指着地图。

meaning: vt. 推动，激励；推进，推
example: The engine can propel the boat across the lake.
exampleChinese: 发动机可以推动小船穿过湖面。

meaning: adj. 恰当的；像样的；得体的
example: Wear proper shoes for gym class.
exampleChinese: 上体育课要穿合适的鞋。

meaning: n. 财产，所有物；房地产；特性
example: This house is my favorite property.
exampleChinese: 这栋房子是我最喜欢的财产。

meaning: n. 部分，份额；⽐例；匀称；规模
example: The red and blue squares are in proportion.
exampleChinese: 红色和蓝色方块的比例很协调。

meaning: n. 提议，提案；求婚
example: The manager reviewed the proposal before the meeting.
exampleChinese: 经理在会议前审阅了这份提议。

meaning: vt. 提议；打算；提出 (某观点等) vi. vt. 求婚
example: We propose a shorter route for the school trip.
exampleChinese: 我们提议学校旅行走一条更短的路线。

meaning: n. 提议；主张；待处理的问题 vt. 向…求欢
example: The committee discussed a new proposition for next term.
exampleChinese: 委员会讨论了下学期的一项新提议。

meaning: n. 可能性；展望；前景，前途 vi. 勘探，探矿
example: There is little prospect of rain this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 今天下午降雨的可能性不大。

meaning: adj. 潜在的；可能发⽣的，预期的
example: The company is looking for prospective employees.
exampleChinese: 这家公司正在寻找潜在员工。

meaning: n. 礼节，礼仪；协议；治疗⽅案
example: The team followed the correct protocol in the lab.
exampleChinese: 这个小组在实验室里遵守了正确的礼仪和规程。

meaning: adj. (原因) 直接的；最接近的
example: The proximate cause of the fire was a broken wire.
exampleChinese: 火灾的直接原因是一根电线断裂。

meaning: vt. 恢复；修复，使复原；归还
example: The workers will restore the old bridge next month.
exampleChinese: 工人们下个月将修复这座旧桥。

meaning: vt. 制⽌，阻⽌；克制，抑制
example: I had to restrain myself from laughing.
exampleChinese: 我不得不克制自己不要笑出来。

meaning: n. 克制，抑制；限制；安全装置
example: Her restraint helped calm the angry crowd.
exampleChinese: 她的克制帮助安抚了愤怒的人群。

meaning: vt. 限制，约束
example: The school may restrict phone use during class.
exampleChinese: 学校可能会限制上课时使用手机。

meaning: vt. 附上，系上，贴上；认为…具有 vi. vt. (使) 与…有关联
example: Please attach the label to the box.
exampleChinese: 请把标签系在盒子上。

meaning: n. 攻击，袭击；抨击；(疾病) 发作 vi. vt. 攻击，袭击 vt. 抨击；破坏，侵蚀；解决 (问题) vi. (在⾜球等⽐赛中) 进攻
example: The sudden attack scared the villagers.
exampleChinese: 这次突然的攻击吓坏了村民。

meaning: vt. 获得，赢得；达到
example: She worked hard to attain her goal.
exampleChinese: 她努力工作以实现自己的目标。

meaning: vt. 尝试，试图 n. 尝试，试图；谋杀企图
example: I will attempt the hard question first.
exampleChinese: 我会先尝试那道难题。

meaning: vi. vt. 出席，参加 vt. 去 (学校等)；陪同；伴随 vi. 注意，专⼼；照顾
example: I will attend the meeting after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我会出席会议。

meaning: n. 注意；关注；照料；殷勤；⽴正 int. 注意；⽴正
example: Please pay attention to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 请注意听老师讲课。

meaning: n. 态度，看法；我⾏我素的作⻛
example: His attitude to homework is very serious.
exampleChinese: 他对作业的态度很认真。

meaning: vt. 把…归因于；认为是…所作 n. 特性，属性
example: We attribute his success to hard work.
exampleChinese: 我们把他的成功归因于勤奋。

meaning: n. 法庭；出庭⼈员；球场；宫廷 vt. 讨好；试图获得；招致；求爱 vi. (男⼥) 恋爱
example: The court will hear the case tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 法院将于明天审理这个案件。

meaning: n. 谦恭有礼的举⽌，礼貌 adj. 可免费使⽤的
example: She answered with courtesy and a smile.
exampleChinese: 她礼貌地回答，并且面带微笑。

meaning: vt. 遮盖；覆盖；包括；够付；报道 vi. 遮掩，敷衍 n. 覆盖物；封⾯，封⽪
example: This book will cover the history of China.
exampleChinese: 这本书将包括中国的历史。

meaning: vt. 创造，创作，创建；授予，册封
example: Good teachers create a fun learning space.
exampleChinese: 好老师会创造一个有趣的学习环境。

meaning: adj. 创造性的，有创造⼒的 n. 创意⼈员，创作者
example: She gave a creative answer to the question.
exampleChinese: 她对这个问题给出了一个有创造性的回答。

meaning: n. 信贷；赞扬；信誉；学分；结余 vt. 把钱存⼊ (账⼾)；把…归功于
example: The teacher gave him credit for his honest answer.
exampleChinese: 老师对他诚实的回答表示信任。

meaning: n. 危机；病危期，危急关头
example: The city faced a financial crisis last year.
exampleChinese: 这个城市去年面临一场财政危机。

meaning: vi. vt. 开⻋，驾驶 vt. 驾⻋送 (⼈)；驱动；迫使；驱赶 n. 驱⻋旅⾏；⻋道；本能需求 n. (为达到某⽬的的) 努⼒，运动
example: My uncle will drive us to the station.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔会开车送我们去车站。

meaning: n. 毒品；药物 vt. 给…服⿇醉剂
example: The doctor gave him a drug for the pain.
exampleChinese: 医生给了他一种止痛药。

meaning: vt. vi. 出⼝，输出 n. 出⼝，输出；出⼝商品
example: The factory will export tea to five countries this year.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂今年将把茶叶出口到五个国家。

meaning: vt. 显露；揭露；使遭受；使体验
example: The report will expose the truth.
exampleChinese: 这份报告将揭露真相。

meaning: n. 暴露；揭露；接触；曝光
example: His skin had too much exposure to the sun.
exampleChinese: 他的皮肤长时间暴露在阳光下。

meaning: vt. 表达，表现；显⽽易⻅；代表 adj. 快速的，快递的；明确的 n. 特快列⻋；快递服务
example: It is hard to express my feelings in English.
exampleChinese: 用英语表达我的感受很难。

meaning: n. 表达；表情，神情；措词，说法
example: Her smile gave expression to her joy.
exampleChinese: 她的微笑表达了她的喜悦。

meaning: vt. 延⻓；扩⼤；舒展；提供 vi. 延伸，延续；适⽤于；使达到
example: Please extend the deadline by two days.
exampleChinese: 请把截止日期延长两天。

meaning: n. 扩⼤，延伸；扩建部分；延期 n. 电话分机
example: The company announced an extension of the deadline.
exampleChinese: 公司宣布延长截止日期。

meaning: adj. ⼴阔的，⼤量的；⼴泛的
example: The library has an extensive collection of books.
exampleChinese: 这座图书馆藏书很丰富。

meaning: n. 程度，地步；范围，⾯积
example: The extent of the damage was surprising.
exampleChinese: 损坏的程度令人吃惊。

meaning: n. ⼈，⼈类 adj. ⼈的，⼈类的；有⼈情味的
example: A human needs water to live.
exampleChinese: 人类生存需要水。

meaning: n. ⼈类；⼈性；⼈道；⼈⽂学科
example: Students should care about humanity and kindness.
exampleChinese: 学生应该关心人类和善良。

meaning: adj. 谦逊的；卑微的；不起眼的 vt. 使感到卑微；低声下⽓
example: He stayed humble after winning the prize.
exampleChinese: 他获奖后仍然保持谦逊。

meaning: vi. vt. 计划，打算，想要 vt. 意指，意思是
example: We intend to finish the project by Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们想要在周五前完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 意图，打算
example: Her intention was to help the new student.
exampleChinese: 她的意图是帮助那位新同学。

meaning: adj. 强烈的；紧张激烈的；热切的
example: The game became intense in the final minute.
exampleChinese: 比赛在最后一分钟变得非常激烈。

meaning: n. 强烈，剧烈；(光、声等的) 强度
example: The intensity of the heat made everyone seek shade.
exampleChinese: 酷热的强烈程度让每个人都去找阴凉处。

meaning: adj. 密集的，强化的；(农业) 集约的
example: This course offers intensive training in writing.
exampleChinese: 这门课程提供密集的写作训练。

meaning: vi. 互动，交流；相互作⽤
example: Children learn to interact with others at school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在学校学会与他人互动。

meaning: n. 性交；交流，交往，交际
example: They had regular intercourse by letter for years.
exampleChinese: 他们多年来一直通过书信保持交流。

meaning: n. 兴趣；趣味；爱好；利息；利益 vt. 使感兴趣，使关注
example: Music can interest young children.
exampleChinese: 音乐可以使小孩子感兴趣。

meaning: n. 内部；内地，内陆；内政 adj. 内部的
example: The interior of the house is bright and clean.
exampleChinese: 这所房子的内部明亮而整洁。

meaning: adj. 国内的；内部的；体内的
example: Internal problems can be harder to see from outside.
exampleChinese: 内部问题从外面看往往更难发现。

meaning: adj. 国际的 n. 国际体育⽐赛
example: The school has many international students.
exampleChinese: 这所学校有很多国际学生。

meaning: vt. 解释，说明；把…理解为 vi. vt. ⼝译
example: Can you interpret this sentence for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我解释这个句子吗？

meaning: vt. 丢失；丧失；被夺去；使不理解 vt. vi. 输掉 (⽐赛等)；(使) 失去
example: Be careful not to lose your keys.
exampleChinese: 小心别把钥匙弄丢了。

meaning: n. 丧失，损失；亏损；逝世；失利
example: The loss of sleep made him tired.
exampleChinese: 睡眠的减少让他感到疲倦。

meaning: adj. 低的；低声的；低等的 adv. 低；低于通常⽔平；低声地 n. 低点，低⽔平；低⾕
example: The shelf is too low for the books.
exampleChinese: 这个架子对这些书来说太低了。

meaning: adj. 下⾯的，下⽅的；在底部的 vt. 把…放低，使…降下 vt. vi. 减少，缩⼩，降低 vi. (天空或云) 变昏暗
example: Please lower the volume before the movie starts.
exampleChinese: 电影开始前请把音量调低。

meaning: adj. 获利多的，赚钱的
example: That app became a lucrative business in two years.
exampleChinese: 那个应用在两年内变成了一门赚钱的生意。

meaning: n. 神经；紧张，焦虑；勇⽓；厚颜
example: She could feel the nerve in her jaw after the hit.
exampleChinese: 她被击中后能感觉到下巴里的神经。

meaning: adj. 紧张的；易紧张的；神经系统的
example: I felt nervous before my speech.
exampleChinese: 演讲前我感到很紧张。

meaning: adv. 然⽽，尽管如此
example: The road was wet; nevertheless, we kept driving.
exampleChinese: 道路很湿，尽管如此，我们还是继续开车。

meaning: n. 先驱，先锋；开拓者，拓荒者 vt. 开创，倡导
example: She was a pioneer in computer science.
exampleChinese: 她是计算机科学领域的先锋。

meaning: n. 管⼦，管道；烟⽃；管乐器 vt. ⽤管道输送 vt. vi. ⽤管乐器演奏；尖声地说
example: Water flows through the pipe under the sink.
exampleChinese: 水从水槽下面的管子里流过。

meaning: n. 海盗；盗版者；⾮法⼴播者 vt. 盗版，侵犯版权
example: The pirate stole gold from passing ships.
exampleChinese: 那个海盗从过往船只上抢走了金子。

meaning: n. ⼿枪
example: The police found a pistol under the seat.
exampleChinese: 警察在座位下面发现了一把手枪。

meaning: n. 深坑；煤矿井；果核；乐池 vt. 使有凹陷
example: He fell into a pit while hiking in the dark.
exampleChinese: 他在黑暗中徒步时掉进了一个坑里。

meaning: n. 球场；⾳⾼；沥⻘；宣传论点 vt. ⽤⼒扔；搭 (帐篷)；定⾳⾼ vi. vt. 投球；推销 vi. 颠簸，上下飘荡
example: The coach will pitch the ball to the batter.
exampleChinese: 教练会把球投给击球手。

meaning: n. 剽窃 (作品)
example: The teacher warned us against plagiarism.
exampleChinese: 老师警告我们不要抄袭。

meaning: n. ⿏疫；瘟疫；灾害，祸患 vt. 困扰，折磨；纠缠，缠扰
example: A cold kept him in bed for a week, but the plague was worse.
exampleChinese: 感冒让他卧床一周，但那场瘟疫更严重。

meaning: adj. 清楚的；朴素的；坦率的 adj. 平凡的；纯⾊的 n. 平原 adv. 完全地，简直
example: We walked across the plain for hours.
exampleChinese: 我们走过这片平原走了好几个小时。

meaning: n. ⾏星；地球
example: Mars is the fourth planet from the sun.
exampleChinese: 火星是离太阳第四近的行星。

meaning: n. 植物；发电⼚，⼯⼚ vt. 栽种，种植
example: We plant tomatoes in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我们在春天种西红柿。

meaning: n. (热带) 种植园；林场，⼈造林
example: Workers picked fruit on the plantation at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 日出时，工人们在种植园里采摘水果。

meaning: vt. 放置；铺放；涂，敷；摆放餐具 vt. vi. 下 (蛋)，产 (卵) adj. 外⾏的，⾮专业的；在俗的
example: Please lay the book on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把书放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 层；层次，等级 vt. 分层放置
example: The cake has a thick layer of chocolate on top.
exampleChinese: 这块蛋糕上面有一层厚厚的巧克力。

meaning: n. 外⾏，⻔外汉；⾮神职⼈员
example: A layman may need simple words to understand the idea.
exampleChinese: 门外汉可能需要简单的词语才能理解这个想法。

meaning: n. 布局，设计
example: The room’s layout makes it easy to find the desk.
exampleChinese: 房间的布局让人很容易找到书桌。

meaning: n. ⻢拉松赛跑；⻢拉松式的活动 adj. ⻢拉松式的，耗时且累⼈的
example: She is training for a marathon this year.
exampleChinese: 她今年正在为马拉松长跑训练。

meaning: n. ⼤理⽯；弹珠；弹⼦游戏
example: The table is made of marble.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子是用大理石做的。

meaning: vi. vt. ⻬步⾛ vi. 前进；游⾏⽰威 vt. 使同⾏，强迫 (某⼈) ⼀起⾛ n. ⽰威游⾏；⾏军；推进；进⾏曲
example: The soldiers began to march at dawn.
exampleChinese: 士兵们在黎明时开始行军。

meaning: adj. 海洋的，海产的；海运的 n. 海军陆战队⼠兵
example: The marine animals live near the coral reef.
exampleChinese: 这些海洋动物生活在珊瑚礁附近。

meaning: adj. 婚姻的
example: They discussed the marital problems in private.
exampleChinese: 他们私下讨论了婚姻问题。

meaning: adj. 已婚的；婚姻的；献⾝于…的
example: My sister is married now.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐现在已经结婚了。

meaning: vt. 标记；标明；纪念；标志着 vt. vi. 留下痕迹，弄脏；评分 n. 污渍；斑点；记号；分数；标志
example: Please mark your name on the paper.
exampleChinese: 请在纸上标出你的名字。

meaning: adj. 绝妙的，⾮凡的，不可思议的
example: The sunset over the lake was marvellous.
exampleChinese: 湖上的落日美极了。

meaning: n. ⻢克思主义者 adj. ⻢克思主义的
example: He joined a Marxist study group at school.
exampleChinese: 他在学校参加了一个马克思主义学习小组。

meaning: n. ⾯具，⾯罩，⼝罩；⾯膜；伪装 vt. 掩饰，掩藏
example: She wore a mask at the costume party.
exampleChinese: 她在化装舞会上戴了一个面具。

meaning: adj. 海军的
example: The naval base is near the harbor.
exampleChinese: 海军基地就在港口附近。

meaning: n. 领航，导航；航⾏
example: Good navigation helps ships avoid dangerous rocks.
exampleChinese: 良好的导航能帮助船只避开危险的礁石。

meaning: n. 海军；藏⻘⾊
example: My brother joined the navy after high school.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥高中毕业后加入了海军。

meaning: adj. 附近的，临近的，近处的 adv. 在附近，在近处
example: There is a nearby shop that sells snacks.
exampleChinese: 附近有一家卖零食的商店。

meaning: adv. ⼏乎，差不多
example: I am nearly ready to leave.
exampleChinese: 我差不多准备好要出发了。

meaning: adj. 整洁的；⼩巧优雅的；巧妙的 adj. 很好的，很棒的；(酒) 未掺⽔的
example: Her handwriting is neat and easy to read.
exampleChinese: 她的字写得很灵巧，也很容易辨认。

meaning: n. 项链
example: She wore a silver necklace to the party.
exampleChinese: 她戴着一条银项链去参加派对。

meaning: n. 针；编织针；针头；指针；松针 vt. (⽤话) 刺激，激怒
example: Please pass me the needle and thread.
exampleChinese: 请把针和线递给我。

meaning: n. 居住区，街坊邻居；周边地区
example: Our neighbourhood has a new library.
exampleChinese: 我们邻近地区有一个新图书馆。

meaning: adj. 奇怪的；同性恋的 (冒犯性) n. 同性恋者 (冒犯性)
example: The plan sounded queer to everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 这个计划让房间里每个人都觉得很奇怪。

meaning: n. 疑问，询问，查询 vt. 质疑，对…表⽰疑问；询问
example: I will query the database for the missing record.
exampleChinese: 我将查询数据库中的缺失记录。

meaning: n. 队，⾏列 vi. 排队 (等候)
example: We had to queue outside the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们不得不在博物馆外面排队。

meaning: vi. 颤抖，哆嗦 n. 颤抖，哆嗦；箭袋，箭筒
example: Her hands began to quiver in the cold wind.
exampleChinese: 她的手在寒风中开始发抖。

meaning: n. ⼩测验；智⼒竞赛 vt. 询问，盘问；测验 (某⼈)
example: The teacher gave us a short quiz.
exampleChinese: 老师给我们做了一次简短的考查。

meaning: n. 限额，配额；定额，指标
example: The store reached its quota before noon.
exampleChinese: 这家商店在中午前就达到了配额。

meaning: vt. vi. 记起，回忆起 vt. 召回；收回 (残次品)；使想起 n. 记忆⼒；召回
example: I recall the teacher’s words very clearly.
exampleChinese: 我清楚地记得老师的话。

meaning: vt. vi. 记起，回忆起
example: I can recollect the day we moved here.
exampleChinese: 我记得我们搬到这里的那一天。

meaning: vt. 使和谐⼀致；使和好；妥协
example: They tried to reconcile the two teams after the argument.
exampleChinese: 争吵后，他们努力让两队和解。

meaning: vi. 再次发⽣，再次出现
example: The same error may recur if you ignore the warning.
exampleChinese: 如果你忽视警告，同样的错误可能会再次出现。

meaning: n. 休闲，娱乐；再现
example: The park is a good place for recreation.
exampleChinese: 这个公园是一个休闲娱乐的好地方。

meaning: vt. 回收利⽤，循环利⽤
example: We recycle paper and bottles at home.
exampleChinese: 我们在家回收利用纸张和瓶子。

meaning: vt. 纠正，矫正
example: Please rectify the mistake before you submit the form.
exampleChinese: 请在提交表格前纠正这个错误。

meaning: adj. 多余的，累赘的；被裁员的
example: The report had a few redundant sentences.
exampleChinese: 这份报告里有几句多余的话。

meaning: n. 芦苇；簧⽚
example: A reed bent in the breeze by the river.
exampleChinese: 一根芦苇在河边的微风中弯了下来。

meaning: n. 卷轴，⼀卷㬵卷；⾥尔舞 vi. 踉跄；感到震惊；仿佛天旋地转
example: The boat gave a sudden reel in the rough water.
exampleChinese: 小船在波涛中突然摇晃起来。

meaning: adj. …之重、之⼤；纯粹的，完全的 adj. 陡峭的；(织物) 薄⽽透明的 adv. 陡峭地，垂直地
example: She climbed the sheer cliff with great care.
exampleChinese: 她非常小心地攀爬那座陡峭的悬崖。

meaning: n. 床单，被单；⼀张；薄⽚，薄板
example: He wrote the answer on a sheet of paper.
exampleChinese: 他把答案写在一张纸上。

meaning: n. 牧⽺⼈ vt. 带领，护送
example: The shepherd led the sheep down the hill.
exampleChinese: 牧羊人把羊群带下山去。

meaning: adj. 精明的，敏锐的
example: She made a shrewd choice and saved money.
exampleChinese: 她做出了精明的选择，省下了钱。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 缩⽔；(使) 缩⼩，减少 vi. 退缩，畏缩 n. 精神病学家，⼼理学家
example: Wet clothes shrink in the dryer.
exampleChinese: 湿衣服在烘干机里会收缩。

meaning: vt. vi. 关闭，关上；(使) 停⽌营业 adj. 关闭的，合拢的；停业的
example: Please shut the door before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把门关上。

meaning: n. 百叶窗；快⻔ vt. 打烊，停业
example: We closed the shop and pulled down the shutter.
exampleChinese: 我们关了店，拉下了百叶窗。

meaning: n. 航天⻜机；穿梭航班 (班⻋)；梭 vi. 穿梭往返 vt. 短程往返运送
example: The shuttle carried astronauts into space.
exampleChinese: 航天飞机把宇航员送入了太空。

meaning: adj. 害羞的；怕⼈的；犹豫的；不⾜的 vi. (⻢) 受惊，吓退
example: The shy girl spoke very softly.
exampleChinese: 那个害羞的女孩说话声音很轻。

meaning: n. 剧场；电影院；戏剧；戏剧⾏业
example: We saw a play at the theatre last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚我们在剧场看了一场戏。

meaning: n. 盗窃 (罪)
example: Police are investigating the theft.
exampleChinese: 警方正在调查这起盗窃案。

meaning: adj. 热的，热量的；保暖的；温热的 n. 保暖内⾐裤；上升的热⽓流
example: This jacket has thermal lining for cold days.
exampleChinese: 这件夹克有保暖内衬，适合寒冷天气。

meaning: n. 温度计
example: The thermometer showed 38 degrees.
exampleChinese: 温度计显示是38度。

meaning: n. 论⽂，学位论⽂；命题，论点
example: Her thesis focuses on online learning.
exampleChinese: 她的论文聚焦于在线学习。

meaning: adj. 厚的，粗的；浓密的；浓的 adv. 厚厚地
example: This book is quite thick.
exampleChinese: 这本书相当厚。

meaning: n. ⼤腿；(⻝⽤禽类的) 腿
example: He hurt his thigh during the game.
exampleChinese: 他在比赛中弄伤了大腿。

meaning: n. (植物茎上的) 刺；荆棘
example: A thorn scratched my hand.
exampleChinese: 一根刺划伤了我的手。

meaning: num. ⼀千
example: A thousand stars filled the sky.
exampleChinese: 一千颗星星布满了天空。

meaning: prep. 经由，经过；通过，凭借
example: You can submit the form via email.
exampleChinese: 你可以通过电子邮件提交表格。

meaning: adj. 可⾏的，可实施的；可存活的
example: The plan is viable if we get enough support.
exampleChinese: 如果我们得到足够的支持，这个计划就是可行的。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 振动，(使) 颤动
example: The machine will vibrate when it starts.
exampleChinese: 机器启动时会振动。

meaning: n. 周围地区，邻近地区，附近
example: There is a small park in the vicinity.
exampleChinese: 附近有一个小公园。

meaning: n. 影像，视频；录像；录像带 vt. 录像，把…录下
example: I watched a short video online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上看了一个短视频。

meaning: vt. 违反，违背；侵犯，搅扰；亵渎
example: You must not violate the rules.
exampleChinese: 你不能违反规则。

meaning: adj. 破旧的；⾐衫褴褛的；不公平的
example: He lived in a shabby house near the station.
exampleChinese: 他住在车站附近一间破旧的房子里。

meaning: n. 电梯井，竖井；杆，柄；⼀束 vt. 亏待，欺骗
example: The old shaft was too dark to enter.
exampleChinese: 那个旧竖井太黑了，不能进去。

meaning: vi. vt. 摇动，(使) 颤动 vt. 摇头；握⼿；使⾮常震惊；摆脱 vi. 颤抖，哆嗦；(嗓⾳) 颤抖 n. 摇动，颤动；奶昔
example: Shake the bottle before you drink the juice.
exampleChinese: 喝果汁前先摇一摇瓶子。

meaning: adj. 浅的；肤浅的；(呼吸) 微弱的
example: The water in the lake is very shallow near the shore.
exampleChinese: 湖边的水很浅。

meaning: n. 羞耻，惭愧；让⼈遗憾的事 vt. 使羞愧 (或惭愧)；使丢脸
example: He felt shame after telling a lie.
exampleChinese: 撒谎后他感到羞愧。

meaning: n. 洗发露，洗涤剂；洗头 vt. ⽤洗发露洗，⽤洗涤剂洗
example: I use this shampoo every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天都用这种洗发剂。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 破碎；使 (希望等) 破灭 vt. 使…极为惊愕难过
example: The crash could shatter the glass door.
exampleChinese: 撞击可能会把玻璃门震碎。

meaning: vi. vt. 刮胡⼦，刮脸 vt. (少量地) 削减，调低，降低 n. 刮胡⼦，刮脸
example: He will shave before the interview.
exampleChinese: 他会在面试前刮胡子。

meaning: vt. 给⽺剪⽑；给⼈剪发；剥夺 n. ⼤剪⼑
example: We will shear the wool from the sheep.
exampleChinese: 我们将给羊剪毛。

meaning: n. 棚屋；⼚房；牲⼝棚 vt. 去除；使落下；蜕；流 (泪、⾎)
example: Please shed your wet coat by the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门口把湿外套脱下。

meaning: adj. 可怕的，糟糕的；⼗⾜的
example: The weather was terrible yesterday.
exampleChinese: 昨天天气很可怕。

meaning: adj. 极好的；极⼤的，巨⼤的
example: It was a terrific day for a picnic.
exampleChinese: 那是非常适合野餐的一天。

meaning: vt. 使害怕，使恐惧
example: The loud noise can terrify small children.
exampleChinese: 巨大的噪音会吓坏小孩子。

meaning: n. 领⼟，领地；(特定) 地区；领域
example: The lake marks the border of the territory.
exampleChinese: 这片湖标志着该领土的边界。

meaning: n. 恐惧；可怕的⼈或事；恐怖活动
example: The sudden noise filled the room with terror.
exampleChinese: 突如其来的噪音让房间里充满了恐怖。

meaning: n. 织物，纺织品；纺织业
example: Cotton is a common textile.
exampleChinese: 棉花是一种常见的纺织品。

meaning: n. 质感；⼝感；(作品的) 韵味
example: The soup has a smooth texture.
exampleChinese: 这汤的口感很顺滑。

meaning: vt. 洗，洗涤 vi. vt. 洗澡，洗脸，洗⼿；(⽔) 冲向 n. 洗；薄涂层；肥皂液
example: This shirt needs a quick wash.
exampleChinese: 这件衬衫需要快洗一下。

meaning: vt. 浪费，滥⽤ n. 浪费；废料，垃圾；粪便；荒原 adj. 荒芜的；废弃的
example: Food waste is a big problem.
exampleChinese: 食物浪费是一个大问题。

meaning: vt. vi. 看，注视，观看 vt. 照看，看护；当⼼，留意 n. 表；注视；守夜 (⼈)
example: I like to watch the rain from my window.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢从窗边看雨。

meaning: adv. 向前⾯，在前⾯；提前；领先
example: The car is parked ahead of the school.
exampleChinese: 汽车停在学校前面。

meaning: n. 空调系统
example: Open the window and let in some fresh air.
exampleChinese: 打开窗户，让一些新鲜空气进来。

meaning: n. ⻜机，⻜⾏器，航空器
example: The aircraft landed safely at the airport.
exampleChinese: 飞机安全地降落在机场。

meaning: n. 过道，⾛道
example: Please walk down the aisle to your seat.
exampleChinese: 请沿着过道走到你的座位。

meaning: adj. 警觉的，警惕的 vt. 使警觉；使意识到 n. 警戒 (状态)；警报
example: Stay alert while you cross the busy street.
exampleChinese: 穿过繁忙的街道时要保持警觉。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 成直线，(使) 对⻬ vt. 使⼀致；公开⽀持，与…结盟
example: Please align the pictures with the top edge of the page.
exampleChinese: 请把这些图片和页面顶部对齐。

meaning: adj. 相同的，相似的 adv. 相像地，相似地；同样地
example: The two brothers look alike.
exampleChinese: 这两个兄弟看起来很相似。

meaning: adj. 活着的；继续存在的
example: The fish was still alive in the bucket.
exampleChinese: 那条鱼在桶里还活着。

meaning: n. 算法
example: The app uses an algorithm to sort the names quickly.
exampleChinese: 这个应用使用一种算法快速对姓名排序。

meaning: vt. 欺骗，蒙骗 vi. 作弊，舞弊；对 (配偶) 不忠 n. 骗⼦，作弊者；欺骗⾏为
example: Do not cheat in the exam.
exampleChinese: 考试时不要作弊。

meaning: n. ⽀票
example: She wrote the cheque for the rent.
exampleChinese: 她开了这张房租支票。

meaning: n. 胸部，胸膛；⼤箱⼦
example: He put his hand on his chest and took a deep breath.
exampleChinese: 他把手放在胸口，深吸了一口气。

meaning: vi. vt. 咀嚼，嚼碎 n. ⼝⾹糖
example: You should chew your food slowly.
exampleChinese: 你应该慢慢咀嚼食物。

meaning: adj. ⾸要的；⾸席的；为⾸的 n. ⾸领，最⾼领导⼈；酋⻓，族⻓
example: The chief gave the team clear instructions.
exampleChinese: 首领给了团队明确的指示。

meaning: n. 童年，⼉童时期
example: She spent her childhood in a small town.
exampleChinese: 她在一个小镇度过了童年时期。

meaning: n. 寒冷，寒意；着凉；害怕的感觉 vt. 使寒冷，使冰冷；使恐惧，恐吓 vi. vt. 冷却，冷藏；冷静；放松，休息 adj. 寒冷的，阴冷的
example: A cool breeze brought a chill into the room.
exampleChinese: 一阵凉风给房间带来了一丝寒意。

meaning: n. 副歌；合唱团；合唱曲；⻬声 vt. 合唱，⻬声说
example: The school chorus sang at the winter concert.
exampleChinese: 学校合唱队在冬季音乐会上演唱。

meaning: adj. 慢性的，⻓期的；积习难改的
example: She has chronic back pain after the accident.
exampleChinese: 事故后，她有慢性背痛。

meaning: n. 厚块；⼤量，⼤部分；语块
example: He broke the cookie into a chunk and shared it.
exampleChinese: 他把饼干掰成一大块分给大家。

meaning: n. ⼤头针，别针；胸针 vt. (⽤⼤头针) 钉住，固定；按住
example: Please pin the note to the board.
exampleChinese: 请把这张便条别在公告板上。

meaning: vt. 捏，掐；⾏窃；逮捕 vi. vt. 夹 (脚)，夹痛 n. 捏，掐；⼀撮
example: Can you pinch the paper clip for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我捏一下这个回形针吗？

meaning: n. 品脱；⼀品脱啤酒
example: Please buy a pint of milk on your way home.
exampleChinese: 请你回家路上买一品脱牛奶。

meaning: n. 代表，(尤指) 会议代表 vi. vt. 授 (权)，把 (职责等) 委托给某⼈ vt. 选派 (某⼈做某项⼯作)
example: Our class will delegate one student to speak for us.
exampleChinese: 我们班将选派一名学生作为代表发言。

meaning: vt. 删除，删去
example: Please delete this file.
exampleChinese: 请删除这个文件。

meaning: adj. 美味的，可⼝的；令⼈愉快的
example: This soup is delicious on a cold day.
exampleChinese: 这汤在寒冷的日子里喝起来很美味。

meaning: n. ⾼兴，愉快；令⼈⾼兴的事 (⼈) vt. 使⾼兴，使愉快
example: The good news filled her with delight.
exampleChinese: 这个好消息让她非常高兴。

meaning: vt. 选举，推选；选择 (做) adj. 已当选但未就任的
example: They will elect a new class president tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 他们明天将选举一位新的班长。

meaning: adj. ⽤电的，发电的；紧张刺激的 n. 供电，电⼒
example: My family uses an electric stove at home.
exampleChinese: 我家在家里使用电炉。

meaning: adj. 电的，供电的，⽤电的
example: Electrical wires run behind the wall.
exampleChinese: 电线从墙后穿过。

meaning: n. 电⼯，电⽓技师
example: The electrician fixed the broken light in the hall.
exampleChinese: 电工修好了走廊里坏掉的灯。

meaning: vt. 提拔，提升；举起；提⾼；⿎舞
example: The teacher will elevate the discussion with a better question.
exampleChinese: 老师会用一个更好的问题来提升这次讨论。

meaning: n. 电梯；⾕仓；升降机
example: We took the elevator to the tenth floor.
exampleChinese: 我们乘电梯到了十楼。

meaning: adj. 有资格的；适合作为结婚对象的
example: Only students with good grades are eligible for the prize.
exampleChinese: 只有成绩好的学生才有资格获得这个奖项。

meaning: adj. 雄辩的，有⼝才的；传神的
example: The speaker gave an eloquent speech about helping others.
exampleChinese: 演讲者就帮助他人发表了一场雄辩的演讲。

meaning: vi. vt. 登船，登机 vi. 从事，着⼿，开始做
example: We will embark on a new science project next week.
exampleChinese: 我们下周将开始一个新的科学项目。

meaning: vt. 使尴尬，使难堪
example: Please do not embarrass me in front of the class.
exampleChinese: 请不要在全班面前让我难堪。

meaning: vi. 移居国外，移⺠
example: My uncle plans to emigrate to Canada next year.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔计划明年移居加拿大。

meaning: vt. 发出，散发 (热、光等)；发 (声)
example: The fireflies emit a soft green light at night.
exampleChinese: 萤火虫在夜晚发出柔和的绿光。

meaning: n. 帝国；企业集团
example: The old empire ruled a large area.
exampleChinese: 那个古老的帝国统治着大片地区。

meaning: adj. 以实验 (或经验) 为依据的
example: The report is based on empirical evidence from the survey.
exampleChinese: 这份报告基于调查得到的实证证据。

meaning: adj. 空的；空洞的；空虚的 vt. 倒空，腾空；把…撤出，撤离 vi. 变空；流⼊，涌进
example: The bottle is empty now.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子现在是空的。

meaning: n. 同情，同感，同理⼼
example: She showed empathy when her friend lost the game.
exampleChinese: 朋友输掉比赛时，她表现出了同理心。

meaning: n. 费⽤
example: The museum charged a small fee for entry.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆收取了一小笔入场费用。

meaning: adj. 虚弱⽆⼒的；⽆效的，牵强的
example: The old dog looked feeble after the long winter.
exampleChinese: 这只老狗在漫长的冬天后看起来很虚弱。

meaning: n. 悲伤；伤⼼事；担⼼，忧虑
example: News of the accident brought great grief to the family.
exampleChinese: 事故的消息给这个家庭带来了巨大的悲伤。

meaning: vi. vt. (因某⼈去世⽽) 悲伤，悲痛 vt. 使难过，使悲伤
example: It is hard not to grieve when a pet dies.
exampleChinese: 宠物去世时，很难不感到悲痛。

meaning: vi. vt. 露⻮⽽笑，咧嘴⼤笑 n. 露⻮的笑，咧嘴的笑
example: She gave a big grin when she saw her friends.
exampleChinese: 当她看到朋友们时，她露出了灿烂的笑容。

meaning: vt. 磨碎，碾碎；绞碎；把…磨锋利 vi. vt. 摩擦 (发出刺⽿声) n. 苦差事，令⼈疲惫的⼯作
example: You can grind the beans into powder for coffee.
exampleChinese: 你可以把咖啡豆磨成粉来冲咖啡。

meaning: n. 办公室；要职；办事处；诊室
example: Her office is on the third floor.
exampleChinese: 她的办公室在三楼。

meaning: n. 军官；官员，⾼级职员；警官
example: The officer checked our IDs at the gate.
exampleChinese: 那位警官在门口检查了我们的证件。

meaning: n. 官员，⾼级职员 adj. 公务的；官⽅的；官⽅公布的
example: This is the official school notice.
exampleChinese: 这是一则官方的学校通知。

meaning: vi. vt. 恳求，哀求；乞讨，⾏乞
example: He went out to beg for food.
exampleChinese: 他出去乞讨食物。

meaning: prep. 在 (向)…后；⽐不上；⽀持 adv. 在后⾯；留在原处；拖⽋，拖延
example: She sat behind me in class.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上坐在我后面。

meaning: n. 存在；⽣物 (尤指⼈)；⾝⼼
example: Life is a journey of being and change.
exampleChinese: 生命是存在与变化的旅程。

meaning: det. pron. 所有，全部，⼀切，整个 adv. 完全；⾮常；太
example: All the lights were on.
exampleChinese: 所有的灯都亮着。

meaning: vt. 断⾔，声称，指控
example: The reporter will allege that the manager broke the rules.
exampleChinese: 记者将断言那位经理违反了规定。

meaning: n. 效忠，拥戴，忠诚
example: Her allegiance to her team never changed.
exampleChinese: 她对自己球队的忠诚从未改变。

meaning: vt. 减轻，缓解 (痛苦等)
example: A cold drink can alleviate the pain.
exampleChinese: 一杯冷饮可以减轻疼痛。

meaning: n. 联合，结盟；结盟团体，联盟
example: The two countries formed an alliance for trade and safety.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家结成了一个贸易和安全联盟。

meaning: n. 津贴，补助；零花钱；限额
example: My parents gave me a small allowance every week.
exampleChinese: 我父母每周给我一点零用钱。

meaning: n. 合⾦ vt. 把…铸成合⾦
example: The ring is made from an alloy of gold and silver.
exampleChinese: 这枚戒指是用金银合金制成的。

meaning: n. 同盟国；⽀持者，盟友 vt. vi. 与…结盟，与…联合
example: Our school will ally with the local museum for the project.
exampleChinese: 我们学校将与当地博物馆结盟开展这个项目。

meaning: adj. adv. 独⾃，单独；孤独地；只
example: He lives alone in a small apartment.
exampleChinese: 他独自住在一间小公寓里。

meaning: prep. 沿着，顺着；在沿…的某处 adv. 向前；与…⼀起
example: We walked along the river after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们沿着河边散步。

meaning: prep. 在…旁边；与…⼀起，与…同时 adv. 在旁边
example: She stood alongside her best friend in the photo.
exampleChinese: 照片里她站在最好的朋友旁边。

meaning: n. 字⺟表
example: The teacher wrote the alphabet on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师把字母表写在了黑板上。

meaning: vt. 谴责，指责；告发
example: The manager will denounce the false report at the meeting.
exampleChinese: 经理将在会议上谴责那份虚假报告。

meaning: adj. 密集的；浓的；笨的；密度⼤的
example: A dense fog covered the road before sunrise.
exampleChinese: 日出前，浓雾笼罩了道路。

meaning: n. 密度
example: The density of the water changed when salt was added.
exampleChinese: 加盐后，水的密度发生了变化。

meaning: adj. 同伴的，同类的 n. ⼩伙⼦；同事，伙伴；研究员
example: My fellow students helped me clean the classroom.
exampleChinese: 我的同学们帮我打扫了教室。

meaning: n. 友谊，交情；团体，协会 n. 研究⽣奖学⾦；(⼤学的) 研究员
example: The club builds fellowship among students from different grades.
exampleChinese: 这个社团增进了不同年级学生之间的友谊。

meaning: adj. ⼥性的；雌的，⺟的 n. ⼥性；雌性动植物
example: My sister is the only female in the club.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是俱乐部里唯一的女性。

meaning: adj. ⼥性的，⼥性化的；阴性的
example: Her dress has a soft, feminine style.
exampleChinese: 她的裙子有一种柔和的女性化风格。

meaning: n. 栅栏，篱笆，围栏；销赃犯 vt. (⽤栅栏、篱笆) 围住，隔开 vi. 参加击剑运动；搪塞，回避
example: They built a fence around the garden.
exampleChinese: 他们在花园周围建了一圈栅栏。

meaning: n. 渡船，渡轮 vt. vi. 渡运，运送，摆渡
example: We took a ferry across the river.
exampleChinese: 我们乘渡船过了河。

meaning: vt. 去拿，去取，去接；售得
example: Can you fetch my notebook from the desk?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我把我的笔记本从书桌上取来吗？

meaning: adj. 封建的，封建制度的
example: The town was once under feudal rule.
exampleChinese: 这个城镇曾经处于封建统治之下。

meaning: n. 发烧；热病；激动不安；狂热
example: He stayed home because he had a fever.
exampleChinese: 他因为发烧而待在家里。

meaning: vt. vi. (⽤⼒) 举起，拖，拉，抛 vi. 起伏；恶⼼，想吐 vt. 深叹，⻓舒(⼀⼝⽓) n. 举，拖，拉，抛；起伏
example: He had to heave the box onto the truck.
exampleChinese: 他不得不用力把箱子抬上卡车。

meaning: n. 天堂，极乐之地；天空
example: Some people believe heaven is a peaceful place.
exampleChinese: 有些人相信天堂是一个宁静的地方。

meaning: adj. 重的；程度⼤的；厚的；费⼒的
example: This box is too heavy for me to lift.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子太重了，我搬不起来。

meaning: adj. 室内的，⼾内的
example: We played an indoor game because it was raining.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨了，我们玩了一个室内游戏。

meaning: vt. 引诱，劝说；引起，导致；催产
example: The news may induce fear in young children.
exampleChinese: 这条新闻可能会引起小孩子的恐惧。

meaning: vt. vi. (使⾃⼰) 沉迷 (于) vt. 满⾜ (欲望等)；纵容，迁就
example: She likes to indulge in ice cream on weekends.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢在周末沉迷于吃冰淇淋。

meaning: n. (统称) 家属，亲戚
example: My kin live in a small village near the sea.
exampleChinese: 我的亲戚住在海边附近的一个小村庄里。

meaning: n. 仁慈，善良；友好的举动
example: Her kindness made the new student feel welcome.
exampleChinese: 她的善良让新同学感到受欢迎。

meaning: n. 国王；…之王
example: The king lived in a large stone castle.
exampleChinese: 国王住在一座巨大的石头城堡里。

meaning: n. 王国；(动物、植物、矿物) 界
example: The old kingdom once ruled this land.
exampleChinese: 这个古老的王国曾统治这片土地。

meaning: n. 成套⼯具；配套元件；全套装备
example: He opened the kit and checked every tool inside.
exampleChinese: 他打开了工具箱，检查了里面的每一件工具。

meaning: n. ⼩地毯；厚软垫；衬垫；团，簇
example: Please wipe your shoes on the mat.
exampleChinese: 请在垫子上擦擦你的鞋。

meaning: n. ⽕柴；⽐赛；相配的⼈或物 vt. vi. 般配，和…相配；相⼀致 vt. 配对；与…相匹敌
example: Our team won the match yesterday.
exampleChinese: 我们队昨天赢了比赛。

meaning: modal. 可能，也许；可以 n. ⼭楂花
example: My birthday is in May this year.
exampleChinese: 我今年的生日在五月。

meaning: n. 市⻓，镇⻓
example: The mayor opened the new library yesterday.
exampleChinese: 市长昨天为新图书馆揭幕了。

meaning: n. ⻦巢；巢⽳；家；⼀套物件 vi. 筑巢，巢居
example: A bird built a nest in the tree.
exampleChinese: 一只鸟在树上筑了巢。

meaning: n. ⽹；因特⽹；⽹眼织物；球⻔⽹ adj. 净赚的；净重的；最后的 vt. 净赚；成功获取；⽤⽹捕捉
example: The fisherman pulled in the net slowly.
exampleChinese: 渔夫慢慢收起了网。

meaning: n. ⽹络；关系⽹；⼴播⽹，电视⽹ vt. (使)(计算机) 联⽹ vi. 建⽴⼯作关系，交际
example: Our school has a fast network for online classes.
exampleChinese: 我们学校有一个快速的网络，用于在线课程。

meaning: adj. 中⽴的；中性的；素净的 n. (汽⻋排档) 空档；中⽴者
example: We stayed neutral in the argument.
exampleChinese: 我们在这场争论中保持中立。

meaning: adj. 新的；新来的；新开始的
example: She bought a new backpack yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天买了一个新书包。

meaning: vt. 省略，遗漏；未 (做)
example: Please omit the last sentence from your essay.
exampleChinese: 请从你的作文中省略最后一句。

meaning: adj. 不透明的；(⽂字或演讲) 难懂的
example: The glass is opaque, so you cannot see through it.
exampleChinese: 这块玻璃是不透明的，所以你看不穿过去。

meaning: vi. vt. 选择，作出抉择
example: I will opt for the blue shirt.
exampleChinese: 我会选择那件蓝衬衫。

meaning: adj. 视⼒的，光的，光学的
example: This optical lens makes the image clearer.
exampleChinese: 这个光学镜片让图像更清晰。

meaning: n. 灰泥；⽯膏；膏药，护创㬵布 vt. 给…涂抹；把头发梳平；贴满
example: He put plaster on the cut to stop the bleeding.
exampleChinese: 他在伤口上贴了膏药来止血。

meaning: n. 塑料，塑㬵；信⽤卡 adj. 塑料的；可塑的；不⾃然的
example: This box is made of plastic.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子是塑料做的。

meaning: n. 盘；⼀盘；⾦属牌；⻋牌；板块 vt. 电镀
example: She put the cake on a blue plate.
