exampleChinese: 她把蛋糕放在一个蓝色的碟子上。

meaning: n. ⾼原；平稳时期，停滞时期 vi. 达到稳定时期
example: The road climbed onto a high plateau.
exampleChinese: 这条路爬上了一片高原。

meaning: n. 平台；站台，⽉台；讲台，舞台 n. 纲领，政纲
example: The children stood on the platform and waited for the train.
exampleChinese: 孩子们站在平台上等火车。

meaning: vi. vt. 玩耍；参加；演奏；播放 vt. 捉弄，戏弄；扮演；发挥作⽤ vi. 佯装，假装 n. 玩耍；戏剧，剧本；活动，影响
example: The children play in the park after school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们放学后在公园里玩。

meaning: vt. 提炼，精炼；改善，改良
example: We refine the metal to remove impurities.
exampleChinese: 我们提炼金属以去除杂质。

meaning: vi. 克制，忍住，避免 n. 陈词滥调；副歌，叠句
example: Please refrain from talking during the test.
exampleChinese: 请在考试时克制，不要说话。

meaning: n. 庇护，避难；避难所，收容所
example: The cave became a refuge from the storm.
exampleChinese: 这个山洞成了躲避风暴的避难所。

meaning: n. 难⺠，避难者
example: The refugee found help at the shelter.
exampleChinese: 这名难民在收容所得到了帮助。

meaning: n. 退款，归还⾦额 vt. 退 (款)
example: You can get a refund if the shirt is damaged.
exampleChinese: 如果衬衫有损坏，你可以得到退款。

meaning: n. 拒绝，回绝，不接受
example: Their refusal surprised everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 他们的拒绝让屋里所有人都很惊讶。

meaning: vi. vt. 拒绝 vt. 推却，不接受；拒绝给予，不准 n. 废物，垃圾
example: She had to refuse the invitation politely.
exampleChinese: 她不得不礼貌地拒绝邀请。

meaning: n. 圆，圆形；圈，环；圈⼦，阶层 vi. vt. 盘旋，环⾏，绕…转圈 vt. 围绕…画圈
example: The children sat in a circle on the floor.
exampleChinese: 孩子们围成一圈坐在地板上。

meaning: n. 环⾏ (路线)；电路；巡回活动
example: The circuit stopped working after the wire broke.
exampleChinese: 电线断了以后，这个电路就停止工作了。

meaning: adj. 圆形的；循环的；循环论证的 n. ⼴告印刷品
example: The teacher handed out a circular about the school trip.
exampleChinese: 老师发了一张关于学校旅行的通知单。

meaning: vi. vt. 循环，流通；流传，散布 vt. 传递，传阅 vi. (在聚会上) 往来应酬
example: People circulate the rumor very quickly online.
exampleChinese: 人们在网上很快就传播了这个谣言。

meaning: n. 公⺠；居⺠，市⺠
example: Every citizen has the right to vote.
exampleChinese: 每个公民都有投票的权利。

meaning: adj. 公⺠的，国内的；⺠⽤的 adj. ⺠法的；⽂明的
example: She studied civil rights in history class.
exampleChinese: 她在历史课上学习了公民权利。

meaning: n. 平⺠，百姓 adj. ⺠⽤的，平⺠的，⾮军⽤的
example: The civilian area was kept safe.
exampleChinese: 平民区域被保护得很安全。

meaning: vt. 教化，使开化
example: The new leader tried to civilize the village.
exampleChinese: 新领导试图使这个村庄开化。

meaning: n. ⽂明；⽂明国家；⽂明社会
example: Ancient cities are part of human civilization.
exampleChinese: 古代城市是人类文明的一部分。

example: The goat is eating grass by the fence.
exampleChinese: 那只山羊正在栅栏旁吃草。

example: She wears a gold ring every day.
exampleChinese: 她每天都戴着一枚金戒指。

meaning: adj. ⾦的；⾦⾊的；绝好的
example: The field turned golden in the autumn sun.
exampleChinese: 田野在秋日阳光下变成了金色。

meaning: vt. vi. 抓住，夺取；抓住 (机会) vi. (试图) 抓住，夺取 vt. (尤指匆忙地) 取，吃，喝；抢占
example: She can grab the ball before it hits the ground.
exampleChinese: 她能在球落地前抓住它。

meaning: n. (动作) 优雅；⽂雅；⻛度；恩典 n. 宽限期；阁下 vt. 为…增⾊；使⽣辉，承蒙光临
example: The dancer moved with great grace.
exampleChinese: 那位舞者动作非常优雅。

meaning: adj. 优美的，优雅的
example: The cat landed in a graceful pose.
exampleChinese: 那只猫以优美的姿势落地。

meaning: adj. 和蔼慈祥的；尊贵的；舒适的 int. (表惊讶、不满) 天哪
example: Her gracious smile made everyone feel welcome.
exampleChinese: 她和蔼的微笑让每个人都感到受欢迎。

meaning: vi. 闲聊，聊天 n. 闲聊，聊天
example: We sat under a tree and chat for a while.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在树下闲谈了一会儿。

meaning: n. 链条；⼀连串；连锁店 vt. ⽤链⼦捆住，拴住
example: The dog wore a chain around its neck.
exampleChinese: 那只狗脖子上戴着一条链子。

meaning: n. 椅，椅⼦；主席；系主任 vt. 主持，担任 (会议等的) 主席
example: There is a chair by the window.
exampleChinese: 窗边有一把椅子。

meaning: n. (委员会) 主席；(会议) 主持⼈
example: The chairman opened the meeting on time.
exampleChinese: 主席准时宣布会议开始。

meaning: n. 房间；会议厅；议院 n. 腔，室
example: The committee met in a small chamber.
exampleChinese: 委员会在一个小会议室里开会。

meaning: n. ⾹槟
example: We opened a bottle of champagne to celebrate the win.
exampleChinese: 我们打开了一瓶香槟来庆祝胜利。

meaning: n. 冠军；拥护者，捍卫者 vt. 拥护，捍卫
example: She became the tennis champion last year.
exampleChinese: 她去年成了网球冠军。

meaning: n. 总理；财政⼤⾂；校⻓；⼤法官
example: The chancellor spoke to the students about the new policy.
exampleChinese: 总理向学生们谈到了这项新政策。

meaning: n. 混乱，⽆秩序状态
example: The room was in chaos after the party.
exampleChinese: 派对结束后，房间一片混乱。

meaning: n. (书的) 章，篇；阶段，时期
example: Please read chapter four before tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 请在明天前读完第四章。

meaning: n. 慈善机构；慈善；救济；仁爱
example: The school held a charity sale on Friday.
exampleChinese: 学校在周五举行了一场慈善义卖。

meaning: n. 图表；(唱⽚销量) 排⾏榜；海图 vt. 记录，跟踪 (进展)；制定计划
example: The teacher showed a chart of the class's reading progress.
exampleChinese: 老师展示了一张全班阅读进步的图表。

meaning: n. 章程，宪章；特许状；包租 vt. 包租 (⻜机、船只等) adj. (⻜机、船只等) 包租的
example: The company signed a charter to protect workers' rights.
exampleChinese: 公司签署了一份保护工人权利的章程。

meaning: n. 甲板；(⻋、船的) 层；⼀副 (牌) n. ⽊质平台；(录⾳机的) ⾛带装置 vt. 装饰，装点
example: The captain stood on the deck and watched the sea.
exampleChinese: 船长站在甲板上看着大海。

meaning: n. 宣布，宣⾔，声明；申报 (单)
example: The president made a declaration at the press conference.
exampleChinese: 总统在新闻发布会上发表了一份声明。

meaning: vt. 宣布，宣称；申报
example: The coach will declare the winner after the game.
exampleChinese: 教练会在比赛结束后宣布获胜者。

meaning: n. ⾏为；契约
example: Her kind deed made everyone smile.
exampleChinese: 她善意的举动让每个人都笑了。

meaning: n. 默认，系统设定值；违约 vi. 违约，不履⾏；默认，预设
example: The app uses the default setting unless you change it.
exampleChinese: 除非你更改，否则这个应用使用默认设置。

meaning: vt. 击败，战胜；挫败，使落空 n. 战败，失利；击败，战胜
example: Our team worked hard to defeat the visitors.
exampleChinese: 我们队努力击败了客队。

meaning: vt. 推迟，延缓 vi. 遵从，听从
example: We decided to defer the meeting until Monday.
exampleChinese: 我们决定将会议推迟到星期一。

meaning: n. 缺点，缺陷，瑕疵 vi. 背叛，变节，倒⼽
example: The small defect made the toy look damaged.
exampleChinese: 这个小缺陷让玩具看起来有损坏。

meaning: n. 缺乏，不⾜；缺陷
example: A lack of sleep can cause a serious deficiency.
exampleChinese: 睡眠不足会导致严重的缺乏。

meaning: n. 逆差，亏损，⾚字；缺乏，不⾜
example: The city faced a budget deficit last year.
exampleChinese: 这座城市去年面临预算赤字。

meaning: vi. 恶化，衰退，堕落 adj. 堕落的，腐化的 n. 堕落的⼈，腐化的⼈
example: Without help, the situation may degenerate quickly.
exampleChinese: 如果没有帮助，情况可能会迅速恶化。

meaning: det. pron. 两者中的任何⼀个 (或每⼀个) adv. (⽤于否定句中) 也 conj. 要么…要么
example: I don't like coffee, and my sister doesn't either.
exampleChinese: 我不喜欢咖啡，我妹妹也不喜欢。

meaning: vt. 把…逐出，驱逐 vt. vi. 弹出，喷出，射出
example: The guard can eject the guest from the club.
exampleChinese: 保安可以把那位客人赶出俱乐部。

meaning: vi. (时间) 流逝
example: Only a few minutes elapse before the train arrives.
exampleChinese: 只过了几分钟，火车就到了。

meaning: n. 弹性材料，松紧带 adj. 有弹性的；灵活的，能变通的
example: This elastic band can stretch very far.
exampleChinese: 这根橡皮筋可以拉得很长。

meaning: n. 肘；(⾐服的) 肘部 vt. ⽤肘推
example: He did not mean to elbow me in the crowd.
exampleChinese: 在人群中他不是故意用肘推我的。

meaning: adj. 可⾏的，⾏得通的
example: It is feasible to finish the project this week.
exampleChinese: 本周完成这个项目是可行的。

meaning: n. 盛宴；宗教节⽇；特别的享受 vi. 尽情享⽤ (美味佳肴)
example: We feast on fruit after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们尽情享用水果。

meaning: n. 壮举，技艺，功绩
example: Her exam score was a great feat for her class.
exampleChinese: 她的考试成绩对她的班级来说是一个很了不起的成就。

example: The bird lost a feather in the yard.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟在院子里掉了一根羽毛。

meaning: vi. 滑⾏，滑动；滑翔 n. 滑⾏，掠过，滑翔
example: The bird can glide over the lake with ease.
exampleChinese: 这只鸟可以轻松地滑翔过湖面。

meaning: adj. 昏暗的；沮丧的；前景黯淡的
example: The room felt gloomy after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，房间里显得很阴暗。

meaning: n. 荣誉，光荣；壮丽，辉煌
example: The team played with great glory in the final match.
exampleChinese: 这个队在决赛中光荣地比赛。

meaning: adj. 辉煌的；壮丽的；美好的
example: We saw a glorious sunrise on the mountain.
exampleChinese: 我们在山上看见了壮丽的日出。

meaning: n. 㬵，㬵⽔ vt. 㬵合，黏合
example: Use glue to fix the torn page back in the book.
exampleChinese: 用胶把撕破的页面粘回书里。

meaning: n. (报纸的) ⼤字标题；重要新闻 vt. 以…为标题，以…为主要故事 vt. vi. (演出等中的) 主演，主唱
example: The newspaper put a big headline on the story.
exampleChinese: 报纸给这篇报道加了一个醒目的大标题。

meaning: n. 总部，总公司，指挥部
example: The company moved its headquarters to Shanghai.
exampleChinese: 公司把总部搬到了上海。

meaning: n. 听⼒，听觉；听证会，审理
example: My hearing is better than it was last year.
exampleChinese: 我的听力比去年好多了。

meaning: n. ⼼脏；内⼼；重点；中央；⼼形
example: Running is good for your heart.
exampleChinese: 跑步对你的心脏有好处。

meaning: n. 热；热度；炎热天⽓；供暖 vt. vi. 加热，(使) 变暖
example: The summer heat made everyone tired.
exampleChinese: 夏天的高温让每个人都很疲惫。

meaning: n. 成员，会员，…的⼀分⼦
example: She is a member of the music club.
exampleChinese: 她是音乐社团的一名成员。

meaning: n. 会员⾝份；全体会员
example: Her membership in the club gives her access to the gym.
exampleChinese: 她的俱乐部会员身份让她可以使用健身房。

meaning: n. 危险的事物 (⼈)；威胁；捣蛋⻤ vt. 危及，威胁到
example: The storm was a menace to the small boats.
exampleChinese: 那场暴风雨对那些小船是个威胁。

meaning: vt. 修理，修补；解决 (争端) vi. vt. 愈合，康复，治愈
example: I need to mend my torn bag tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我得修补我破了的包。

meaning: vt. 迫害，残害，压迫；骚扰，打扰
example: The villagers refused to persecute anyone for their beliefs.
exampleChinese: 村民们拒绝因信仰而迫害任何人。

meaning: vi. 坚持不懈，锲⽽不舍
example: If you persevere, you will reach your goal.
exampleChinese: 如果你坚持不懈，你就会实现目标。

meaning: vi. vt. 顽强坚持，执着 vi. 持续，延续
example: The rain will persist all afternoon.
exampleChinese: 这场雨将持续整个下午。

meaning: vt. 劝说，说服；使信服，使相信
example: He tried to persuade me to join the team.
exampleChinese: 他试图说服我加入这个团队。

meaning: n. 说服，劝服；信仰，信念
example: Her persuasion helped me make a careful choice.
exampleChinese: 她的劝说帮助我做出了一个慎重的选择。

meaning: n. 害⾍，有害动物；讨厌⻤
example: A pest destroyed several plants in the garden.
exampleChinese: 一种害虫毁掉了花园里的几株植物。

meaning: n. 汽油
example: We filled the car with petrol.
exampleChinese: 我们给汽车加满了汽油。

meaning: n. ⽯油
example: Petroleum is used to make fuel and plastic.
exampleChinese: 石油被用来制造燃料和塑料。

meaning: adj. 琐碎的，不重要的；⼩⽓的
example: Don't worry about such petty arguments.
exampleChinese: 不要为这种琐碎的争论担心。

meaning: n. 药房，药店；药剂学，配药学
example: We bought the medicine at the pharmacy.
exampleChinese: 我们在药店买了药。

meaning: n. 电话，⼿机 vi. vt. 打电话
example: I will phone my mother after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后我会给妈妈打电话。

meaning: n. 摞，堆；⼤量，许多 vt. 堆放，摞起；放置，装⼊ vi. (许多⼈) 蜂拥，涌⼊
example: He put the books in a pile on the desk.
exampleChinese: 他把书堆在桌子上。

meaning: n. 朝圣者；清教徒前辈移⺠
example: A pilgrim walked slowly toward the shrine.
exampleChinese: 一位朝圣者缓缓走向神殿。

meaning: n. 药丸，药⽚ vi. (⽑织⾐服) 起球，结绒
example: Take one pill after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后吃一粒药丸。

example: That old tree is a pillar of the garden.
exampleChinese: 那棵老树是花园里的支柱。

meaning: n. ⻜⾏员；领航员；试播节⽬ vt. 驾驶，为…引航；试⾏ adj. 试验性的，试点的
example: The pilot landed the plane safely.
exampleChinese: 飞行员安全地让飞机着陆了。

meaning: n. 争吵，吵架；不同意的原因 vi. 争吵，吵架
example: The children quarrel over small things.
exampleChinese: 孩子们会为小事争吵。

meaning: n. 夸脱 (英美容量或液量单位)
example: The recipe calls for a quart of milk.
exampleChinese: 这份食谱需要一夸脱牛奶。

meaning: n. 四分之⼀；⼀刻钟；季度；群体
example: Only a quarter of the cake was left.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕只剩下四分之一了。

meaning: n. (为防传染的) 隔离期 vt. (对动物或⼈) 检疫，隔离
example: The doctor decided to quarantine the patient.
exampleChinese: 医生决定把病人隔离起来。

meaning: vi. 滑倒；滑落；溜⾛；变差；陷⼊ vt. 悄悄塞；摆脱，松开 vi. vt. (迅速且容易地) 穿或脱 n. 差错；纸条；滑倒；衬裙
example: Be careful not to slip on the wet floor.
exampleChinese: 小心别在湿滑的地板上滑倒。

meaning: n. 拖鞋
example: She bought a new pair of slipper for home.
exampleChinese: 她买了一双新的拖鞋在家里穿。

meaning: adj. 滑溜溜的；狡猾的；模棱两可的
example: The icy road is very slippery.
exampleChinese: 这条结冰的路非常滑。

meaning: n. ⼝号，标语
example: The poster showed a slogan about saving water.
exampleChinese: 海报上有一条关于节约用水的标语。

meaning: n. 斜坡，斜⾯；滑雪斜坡；坡度 vi. 倾斜，有坡度；悄悄⾛，溜⾛
example: The road begins to slope near the hill.
exampleChinese: 这条路在山附近开始倾斜。

meaning: n. 狭槽，投币⼝；时段，位置 vt. vi. 投放，(被) 塞进
example: Please slot the card into the machine.
exampleChinese: 请把卡插入机器的插槽。

meaning: n. 贫⺠窟，贫⺠区 vi. 体验贫苦⽣活
example: Many families had to slum in crowded rooms during the war.
exampleChinese: 战争期间，许多家庭不得不在拥挤的房间里过贫苦生活。

meaning: vi. 暴跌；猛地坐下 n. 暴跌；萧条期
example: The stock market began to slump after the news.
exampleChinese: 消息传出后，股市开始暴跌。

meaning: adj. 狡猾的，诡诈的；⼼照不宣的
example: He gave me a sly smile.
exampleChinese: 他冲我狡猾地一笑。

meaning: vt. vi. 打碎，粉碎；(使) 猛撞；撞开 vt. 捣毁，打败 n. 破碎 (声)；扣球；⾛红的歌曲等
example: He tried to smash the old plate with a hammer.
exampleChinese: 他试图用锤子把那个旧盘子打碎。

meaning: n. 雾霾，烟雾
example: The smog made the sky look gray.
exampleChinese: 烟雾让天空看起来灰蒙蒙的。

meaning: adj. 光滑的；顺利的；平稳的 vt. 使平整，使光滑
example: The road was smooth after the repair.
exampleChinese: 修好以后，这条路变得很平整。

meaning: vt. ⾛私，偷运，偷偷携带
example: They smuggle rare animals across the border at night.
exampleChinese: 他们在夜里把珍稀动物偷运过境。

meaning: vt. 承受，忍受；承担 (责任)；⽀撑 vt. 带有；⽣孩⼦；结果实 n. 熊
example: That tree will bear fruit in summer.
exampleChinese: 那棵树会在夏天结果。

meaning: n. 胡须，络腮胡⼦，(动物的) 须
example: My uncle has a long gray beard.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔留着长长的灰胡须。

meaning: n. 影响，关系；举⽌；⽅向；轴承
example: Her calm bearing made her look confident.
exampleChinese: 她沉着的举止让她看起来很自信。

meaning: n. 说唱；急敲；坏名声 vi. vt. 敲击，击打
example: The drummer gave the drum a quick rap.
exampleChinese: 鼓手快速敲了一下鼓。

meaning: vt. 强奸，强暴 n. 强奸罪
example: The court will punish anyone who tries to rape a child.
exampleChinese: 法庭会惩罚任何试图强奸儿童的人。

meaning: adj. 快速的，迅速的
example: There was a rapid change in the weather.
exampleChinese: 天气发生了迅速的变化。

meaning: adj. 轻率的，鲁莽的 n. 疹⼦，⽪疹；⼤量，许多
example: It was rash to leave without telling anyone.
exampleChinese: 没告诉任何人就离开，这太鲁莽了。

meaning: adj. ⽣的；未加⼯的；原始的
example: She ate raw carrots as a snack.
exampleChinese: 她把生胡萝卜当零食吃。

meaning: n. 光线，射线；⼀丝，少量；鳐
example: A ray of light came through the window.
exampleChinese: 一道光线透过窗户照了进来。

meaning: n. 读者；读本，简易读物；阅读器
example: The reader finished the story in one sitting.
exampleChinese: 这位读者一口气读完了这个故事。

meaning: n. 阅读；读物；(仪表的) 读数
example: Reading before bed helps me relax.
exampleChinese: 睡前阅读能帮助我放松。

meaning: adv. 轻⽽易举地；乐意地，欣然地
example: She answered readily when the teacher asked a question.
exampleChinese: 老师提问时，她轻而易举地回答了。

meaning: n. 领域，范围；王国
example: Online games are now a major realm of entertainment.
exampleChinese: 网络游戏现在是娱乐的一个重要领域。

meaning: vt. 获得，收获；收割 (庄稼)
example: Farmers reap the wheat in late summer.
exampleChinese: 农民在夏末收割小麦。

meaning: n. 后部 adj. 后⾯的，后部的 vt. 抚养，养育；饲养 vi. (尤指⻢) ⽤后腿直⽴；巍然耸⽴
example: We sat in the rear of the bus.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在公交车的后部。

meaning: vi. vt. 弯腰，低头；(使) (四肢) 弯曲 vt. 使…弯曲，把…弄弯 n. 转弯处；减压病
example: Please bend the wire into a circle.
exampleChinese: 请把这根铁丝弯成一个圆圈。

meaning: prep. 在…之下；配不上 (某⼈) adv. 在下⾯，往下
example: The cat slept beneath the table.
exampleChinese: 那只猫睡在桌子下面。

meaning: prep. 在…旁边；和…相⽐
example: My bag is beside the chair.
exampleChinese: 我的包在椅子旁边。

meaning: prep. 除…之外，此外 adv. ⽽且，再说；以及，也
example: Besides math, she also likes art.
exampleChinese: 除了数学，她还喜欢美术。

meaning: vt. 放⼤ (声⾳等) vi. vt. 详述，进⼀步阐述
example: The speaker will amplify her main point with an example.
exampleChinese: 演讲者会用一个例子进一步阐述她的要点。

meaning: adj. (技术) 模拟的；指针式的 n. 类似物，相似物
example: This watch is the analogue of the one my grandfather wore.
exampleChinese: 这块手表和我祖父戴过的那块很相似。

meaning: n. 类⽐，相似处
example: He used an analogy to explain the idea clearly.
exampleChinese: 他用类比来清楚地解释这个想法。

meaning: vt. 分析，剖析，解析
example: We need to analyze the data before class.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在上课前分析这些数据。

meaning: n. 分析；化验；精神分析
example: Her analysis showed that the plan would save time.
exampleChinese: 她的分析表明这个计划会节省时间。

meaning: adj. 分析性的；(⽤科学⽅法) 分析的
example: The report is analytical and carefully organized.
exampleChinese: 这份报告具有分析性，而且组织严谨。

meaning: n. 惯性；缺乏活⼒，惰性
example: The cart stopped because of inertia.
exampleChinese: 小车因为惯性停了下来。

meaning: n. 婴⼉；幼⼉学校的学⽣ adj. 供婴幼⼉⽤的；初期的，初创的
example: The infant slept quietly in the crib.
exampleChinese: 婴儿安静地睡在婴儿床里。

meaning: vt. 传染，使感染；(情绪等) 感染
example: Dirty water can infect people with disease.
exampleChinese: 脏水会使人感染疾病。

meaning: adj. 传染的；有感染⼒的
example: His infectious smile cheered everyone up.
exampleChinese: 他有感染力的笑容让每个人都振作起来。

meaning: adj. ⽆限的，⽆边的，极⼤的
example: The universe seems infinite to us.
exampleChinese: 对我们来说，宇宙似乎是无边无际的。

meaning: n. 通货膨胀 (率)；充⽓，膨胀
example: Rising prices caused inflation last year.
exampleChinese: 去年物价上涨导致了通货膨胀。

meaning: vt. 使遭受，施加，造成 (伤害等)
example: The hard lesson will inflict pain for a while.
exampleChinese: 这次惨痛的教训会让人难受一阵子。

meaning: adj. 红外线的，使⽤红外线的
example: The camera can detect infrared light.
exampleChinese: 这台相机可以探测红外线。

meaning: n. 基础建设，基础设施
example: The city is rebuilding its infrastructure.
exampleChinese: 这座城市正在重建基础设施。

meaning: n. 膝盖，膝关节；(裤⼦的) 膝部 vt. ⽤膝盖顶
example: He hurt his knee during the race.
exampleChinese: 他在比赛中伤到了膝盖。

meaning: vi. 跪下，跪着
example: The player had to kneel before the coach.
exampleChinese: 那个队员不得不在教练面前跪下。

meaning: n. 旋钮；球形把⼿；疙瘩；⼩块
example: Turn the knob to open the window.
exampleChinese: 转动旋钮打开窗户。

meaning: n. 结；发髻；节疤；痉挛 vt. 把…打成结(或扎牢) vi. 缠结 vi. vt. (因害怕等⽽) 痉挛，使痉挛
example: The rope made a tight knot.
exampleChinese: 绳子打了一个紧紧的结。

meaning: n. 知识，学问；知悉，知情
example: Reading gives us useful knowledge.
exampleChinese: 阅读给我们有用的知识。

meaning: n. 树叶，叶⼦；(尤指书的) ⻚ vt. 匆匆翻阅，浏览
example: A yellow leaf fell onto my book.
exampleChinese: 一片黄叶落在我的书上。

meaning: n. 传单，⼩册⼦ vi. vt. 散发传单 (或⼩册⼦)
example: We handed out a leaflet at the gate.
exampleChinese: 我们在大门口发了一张传单。

meaning: n. 联赛；联盟，同盟；级别；⾥格
example: Our school joined a local league last year.
exampleChinese: 我们学校去年加入了一个地方联盟。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 渗漏；泄露 (秘密等)，⾛漏 vi. (⽓体或液体) 漏出 n. 漏洞，裂缝；泄露
example: There is a leak in the roof above the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 厨房上方的屋顶有个漏水处。

meaning: vi. 倾斜⾝体；倚靠；依靠 vt. 使斜靠 adj. 精瘦的；贫乏的；精⼲的
example: You can lean on me when you feel tired.
exampleChinese: 你累的时候可以靠着我。

meaning: vi. vt. 跳，跳跃 vi. 突然做某事；激增，猛涨 n. 跳，跳跃；激增，猛涨
example: The bird can leap from branch to branch.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟可以在树枝间跳跃。

meaning: n. 租约，租契 vt. 租借，租⽤，出租
example: They signed a lease for the apartment.
exampleChinese: 他们签了那套公寓的租约。

example: She wore a leather jacket.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件皮夹克。

meaning: n. 技⼯；⼒学；机械学；机制
example: The mechanic fixed the broken engine.
exampleChinese: 那位技工修好了坏掉的发动机。

meaning: adj. 机械的；机械般的；机械学的
example: The machine has a mechanical arm.
exampleChinese: 这台机器有一个机械臂。

meaning: n. 机械装置；⽅法，途径；机制
example: The lock works by a simple mechanism.
exampleChinese: 这个锁通过简单的机械装置运作。

meaning: n. 绰号，外号 vt. 给…取绰号
example: His nickname at school was Red.
exampleChinese: 他在学校的绰号叫“红头发”。

meaning: n. 噩梦；令⼈恐怖的处境
example: The loud thunderstorm was a nightmare.
exampleChinese: 那场大雷暴简直是一场噩梦。

meaning: adj. 名义上的；象征性的，很少的
example: The fee was only nominal.
exampleChinese: 这笔费用只是象征性的。

meaning: vt. 提名；任命，指定
example: The committee will nominate a new chair.
exampleChinese: 委员会将提名一位新主席。

meaning: n. 愉快，满⾜；令⼈快乐的事
example: It is a pleasure to work with you.
exampleChinese: 和你一起工作是一件愉快的事。

meaning: n. 誓⾔，保证，诺⾔；抵押品 vt. (使) 保证，(使) 发誓；抵押
example: She gave her pledge to help the team.
exampleChinese: 她保证会帮助这个团队。

meaning: adj. 丰富的，充⾜的
example: The garden is plentiful in summer.
exampleChinese: 这个花园在夏天生机勃勃，果实也很丰富。

meaning: n. 肺炎
example: The doctor said the child has pneumonia.
exampleChinese: 医生说这个孩子得了肺炎。

meaning: n. ⼝袋；财⼒；⼩块地区 vt. 把…放进⾐袋
example: She put the key in her pocket.
exampleChinese: 她把钥匙放进了口袋里。

meaning: n. 毒药，毒物；极有害的思想 vt. 毒害；下毒；使恶化
example: Dirty water can poison a river.
exampleChinese: 脏水会污染一条河。

meaning: adj. 有毒的；恶毒的
example: The mushroom looked harmless, but it was poisonous.
exampleChinese: 这种蘑菇看起来无害，但它有毒。

meaning: vt. 认为，看待；注视，凝视 n. 关注，关⼼；尊重，敬佩；致意
example: We must regard safety as the first rule.
exampleChinese: 我们必须把安全视为第一条规则。

meaning: prep. 关于，⾄于
example: This article is regarding the new school rules.
exampleChinese: 这篇文章是关于新校规的。

meaning: adv. 不管；不管怎样，⽆论如何
example: We kept walking regardless of the rain.
exampleChinese: 尽管下雨，我们还是继续走。

meaning: n. 政权，政体；组织⽅法；养⽣法
example: The country changed its regime after the election.
exampleChinese: 这个国家在选举后更换了政权。

meaning: vt. vi. 注册，登记；流露出；注意到 vt. vi. 显⽰ (读数)，记录 vt. (正式地) 发表意⻅；挂号邮寄 n. 登记表；⾳区；现⾦收纳机
example: Please register your name at the front desk.
exampleChinese: 请在前台登记你的名字。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 排练，(使) 预演 vt. 默诵，默默练习；反复讲
example: We rehearse the play after school every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们每周五放学后排练这出戏。

meaning: n. 君主统治时期；任期，当政期 vi. 统治，当政；成为最佳；盛⾏
example: The queen will reign for many years.
exampleChinese: 女王将统治许多年。

meaning: n. 缰绳；控制，主宰；保护带 vt. 控制
example: He held the horse's rein tightly.
exampleChinese: 他紧紧拉住马的缰绳。

meaning: vt. 加强，增强；加固；增援
example: The extra walls reinforce the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 这些加固墙增强了这座旧桥的牢固性。

meaning: vt. 假装；(⽤计算机等) 模拟；冒充
example: The game can simulate a real flight.
exampleChinese: 这款游戏可以模拟真实飞行。

meaning: adj. 同步的，同时存在的
example: The two alarms rang at simultaneous times.
exampleChinese: 两个警报几乎同时响起。

meaning: n. 罪，罪孽；过错，恶⾏ vi. 犯戒律，犯过失
example: He thought lying was a sin.
exampleChinese: 他认为说谎是一种罪过。

meaning: adj. 由衷的，衷⼼的；真诚的
example: She gave me a sincere smile.
exampleChinese: 她真诚地对我笑了笑。

meaning: adj. 单个的；单⾝的；单⼈的 n. 单⼈房间；单程票；单曲 vt. 单独挑出
example: A single tree stood in the field.
exampleChinese: 田野里孤零零地立着一棵树。

meaning: adj. 单数的；⾮凡的；奇特的 n. 单数形式
example: In English, "cat" is a singular noun.
exampleChinese: 在英语里，cat 是单数名词。

meaning: vi. 下沉；(⼈) 倒下；降低 vt. 使下沉；挖，掘；埋⼊；使受挫 n. 洗碗槽；洗脸池 adj. 贫⺠窟的
example: The boat may sink in the storm.
exampleChinese: 这条船可能会在暴风雨中下沉。

meaning: vi. vt. ⼩⼝地喝，抿 n. (饮料) ⼀⼩⼝
example: He took a sip of cold water.
exampleChinese: 他喝了一小口冷水。

meaning: n. 汽笛，警报器；塞壬 (⼥妖)
example: The siren sounded near the school.
exampleChinese: 学校附近响起了警报器。

meaning: n. 拇指；(⼿套的) 拇指部分 vi. 快速翻阅 vi. vt. 翘起拇指请求搭乘；⽤拇指摸
example: She used her thumb to turn the page.
exampleChinese: 她用拇指翻页。

meaning: n. 雷，雷声；轰隆声 vi. 打雷；轰隆隆地响；轰隆隆地动 vi. vt. 怒喝，⼤声斥责
example: We heard thunder before the rain started.
exampleChinese: 下雨前我们听到了雷声。

meaning: vi. (钟表) 发出嘀嗒声 vt. 打钩，打对号 n. 嘀嗒声；对号；壁虱；⼀会⼉
example: Please tick the box beside your answer.
exampleChinese: 请在你的答案旁边打勾。

meaning: n. 票，券；彩票；罚款单；标签 vt. 售票；开交通违章罚单
example: I bought a train ticket online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上买了一张火车票。

meaning: n. 财富；⼤量
example: He spent his wealth helping poor families.
exampleChinese: 他把自己的财富用于帮助贫困家庭。

meaning: adj. 富有的，富裕的
example: The wealthy family lived in a large house.
exampleChinese: 那户富有的人家住在一栋大房子里。

meaning: n. 武器，兵器；⼯具，⼿段
example: A soldier carried a weapon in the movie.
exampleChinese: 电影里一名士兵带着武器。

meaning: vt. vi. 织，编；迂回⾏进，穿⾏ vt. 编造 (故事或设计)
example: Grandma can weave a basket from bamboo.
exampleChinese: 奶奶可以用竹子编一个篮子。

meaning: n. 蜘蛛⽹；⽹状物；万维⽹；蹼
example: A spider built a web between the trees.
exampleChinese: 一只蜘蛛在树之间织了一张网。

meaning: n. 楔⼦，楔形物 vt. 将…挤⼊；把…楔牢
example: They used a wedge to keep the door open.
exampleChinese: 他们用楔子把门顶开。

meaning: n. 热带丛林；弱⾁强⻝的环境
example: We heard birds in the dense jungle.
exampleChinese: 我们在茂密的丛林里听到了鸟叫声。

meaning: n. 汇合点，交叉路⼝
example: Turn left at the junction near the park.
exampleChinese: 在公园附近的交叉路口左转。

meaning: adj. 级别 (或职位) 低的；⻘少年的 n. 职位较低者；⻘少年；⼤三学⽣
example: My junior brother studies in middle school.
exampleChinese: 我的弟弟在上中学。

meaning: adj. 少年的；幼稚的；(动物) 幼⼩的 n. 少年；幼仔，雏⻦
example: The juvenile fox stayed close to its mother.
exampleChinese: 那只幼狐一直待在妈妈身边。

meaning: n. 废品，垃圾；垃圾⻝品；舢板 vt. 丢弃，抛弃，废弃
example: Don't junk that chair yet; it can be fixed.
exampleChinese: 先别丢弃那把椅子；它还能修。

meaning: vt. vi. 卸 (货)；倾诉，吐露，发泄 vt. 退出 (弹壳等)；推卸 (责任)
example: Please unload the boxes from the truck.
exampleChinese: 请把箱子从卡车上卸下来。

meaning: adj. 上⾯的；(靠) 上部的；上游的
example: Please put the books on the upper shelf.
exampleChinese: 请把书放在上面的架子上。

meaning: adj. 直⽴的；⽴式的；正直的 adv. 竖⽴地，直⽴地
example: The vase stood upright on the table.
exampleChinese: 花瓶直立地放在桌子上。

meaning: adv. 往楼上，在楼上 adj. 楼上的 n. ⼆楼及以上各层
example: My sister is studying upstairs.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐正在楼上学习。

meaning: adj. 向上的；上升的，升⾼的 adv. 向上；上升地；(某数字) …以上
example: The plane was moving upward into the clouds.
exampleChinese: 飞机正向上飞入云层。

meaning: n. 溜冰鞋，旱冰鞋 vi. vt. 溜冰，滑冰 vi. 滑滑板
example: They skate on the lake every winter.
exampleChinese: 他们每年冬天都在湖上滑冰。

meaning: n. 滑雪板，滑⽔板 adj. 滑雪的，滑⽔的 vi. 滑雪，滑⽔
example: They went to ski in the mountains.
exampleChinese: 他们去山里滑雪了。

meaning: n. 技能，技术
example: Cooking is a useful skill.
exampleChinese: 做饭是一项有用的技能。

meaning: adj. 有技术的；需要特殊技能的
example: She is a skilled driver who can handle long trips easily.
exampleChinese: 她是一名熟练的司机，能轻松应对长途旅行。

meaning: adj. 技术好的，熟练的；处理巧妙的
example: She is a skillful pianist.
exampleChinese: 她是一位熟练的钢琴演奏者。

meaning: vt. 撇去 (液体上漂浮物)；惯偷⼩钱 vi. vt. 略读，浏览；掠过，滑过；盗取
example: Can you skim the article before class?
exampleChinese: 你能在上课前浏览一下这篇文章吗？

meaning: n. ⽪肤；⽑⽪；果⽪，果壳 vt. 剥⽪，扒⽪；擦破⽪肤
example: Cold wind can dry out your skin.
exampleChinese: 冷风会使你的皮肤变干。

meaning: vt. 不做 (应做的事)；悄悄溜⾛ vi. vt. 跳过，略过；跳绳 vi. 蹦跳地⾛ n. 蹦跳；废料桶
example: Please skip the first question and answer the next one.
exampleChinese: 请跳过第一题，回答下一题。

meaning: n. 颅⻣，头⻣；脑袋，头脑
example: He wore a helmet to protect his skull.
exampleChinese: 他戴着头盔来保护自己的颅骨。

meaning: n. 摩天⼤楼
example: A skyscraper towered above the city.
exampleChinese: 一座摩天楼耸立在城市上空。

meaning: vi. vt. (使…) 砰地关上 vt. ⽤⼒⼀放，使劲⼀推；猛烈抨击 n. 猛关 (或推、摔、撞等) 的声⾳
example: Please slam the door gently.
exampleChinese: 请轻轻地关门，不要砰地一声。

meaning: vt. (⽤⼿掌) 打，掴；啪地放下 vi. 啪地击打 (或撞上) n. (⽤⼿掌) 打，掴；拍打声 adv. 猛然，径直；恰好，正好
example: She gave the box a quick slap.
exampleChinese: 她啪地拍了一下盒子。

meaning: vt. 屠杀，杀戮；(体育⽐赛) 使惨败 n. (对动物的) 屠宰；(对⼈的) 屠杀
example: The army did not slaughter the village.
exampleChinese: 军队没有屠杀那个村庄。

meaning: n. 袖⼦
example: The coat has a loose sleeve.
exampleChinese: 这件外套有一只宽松的袖子。

meaning: adj. 苗条的；细⻓的；微薄的
example: She has a slender figure.
exampleChinese: 她的身材很苗条。

meaning: n. 薄⽚；部分 vt. 把…切成 (薄) ⽚；⼤幅削减 vi. vt. 切，割，划
example: Please slice the bread for lunch.
exampleChinese: 请把面包切成片做午餐。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 滑⾏；悄悄移动 vi. 逐渐降低，贬值；逐渐衰退 (到) n. 衰落；滑⾏；滑梯；幻灯⽚
example: The kids love to slide down the playground slide.
exampleChinese: 孩子们喜欢从操场上的滑梯滑下来。

meaning: adj. 轻微的，微⼩的；纤细的 n. 轻视，冷落 vt. 轻视，冷落
example: She gave only a slight smile.
exampleChinese: 她只是微微一笑。

meaning: adj. 苗条的；单薄的；微⼩的 vi. 变苗条，减肥
example: The dress makes her look slim.
exampleChinese: 这条连衣裙让她看起来很苗条。

meaning: n. ⽓候；⽓候带；局势，⻛⽓
example: The climate here is warm and dry.
exampleChinese: 这里的气候温暖而干燥。

meaning: n. ⾼潮，极点，顶点 vi. vt. 达到顶点 (或⾼潮)
example: The story reaches its climax in the final scene.
exampleChinese: 这个故事在最后一幕达到高潮。

meaning: vt. vi. 爬，攀登 vi. 爬升，上升；增⻓ n. 攀登；增值
example: The kids love to climb trees in the park.
exampleChinese: 孩子们喜欢在公园里爬树。

meaning: n. 夹⼦，回形针；⽚段；⼦弹夹 vt. vi. 夹住，别住 vt. 修剪；从…剪下；(意外地) 斜撞
example: Please clip the note to the page.
exampleChinese: 请把便条别在这一页上。

meaning: n. ⽃篷，披⻛；遮盖物，掩盖物 vt. 遮盖，掩盖
example: He wore a cloak to stay warm.
exampleChinese: 他穿着斗篷保暖。

meaning: adv. adj. 按顺时针⽅向
example: Turn the knob clockwise.
exampleChinese: 把旋钮按顺时针方向转。

meaning: n. 克隆动植物；酷似的⼈或物 vt. 克隆，以⽆性繁殖技术复制
example: Scientists can clone some plants in a lab.
exampleChinese: 科学家可以在实验室里无性繁殖一些植物。

meaning: vi. vt. 下来，下降，向下 vi. (⿊夜等) 降临；是某⼈的后裔
example: The hikers will descend the hill by noon.
exampleChinese: 徒步旅行者将在中午前下山。

meaning: n. 后代，后裔；衍⽣物
example: She is a descendant of the old king.
exampleChinese: 她是那位老国王的后裔。

meaning: n. 下降，降落；⾎统；堕落；斜坡
example: The path had a steep descent.
exampleChinese: 这条路下坡很陡。

meaning: n. 沙漠，荒漠 vt. 抛弃；背离 vi. vt. 擅离 (部队)
example: No one should desert a friend in trouble.
exampleChinese: 谁也不该在朋友有困难时抛弃他。

meaning: vt. 向 (院校、医院等) 捐款；赋予
example: The scholarship will endow the school with new books.
exampleChinese: 这笔奖学金会给学校捐赠新书。

meaning: vt. 忍耐，忍受 vi. 持续，延续，持久
example: We must endure the cold winter.
exampleChinese: 我们必须忍受寒冷的冬天。

meaning: n. 耐⼒，忍耐⼒
example: Running this race takes great endurance.
exampleChinese: 跑这场比赛需要很强的耐力。

meaning: n. 图表，图解，曲线图
example: The graph shows sales rising in summer.
exampleChinese: 这张图表显示销售额在夏季上升。

meaning: adj. 绘画的，图像的；(描述) 形象的 n. 图形，图表
example: The teacher used a graphic chart to explain the idea.
exampleChinese: 老师用一张图表来解释这个想法。

meaning: adj. 感激的，表⽰感谢的
example: I am grateful for your help.
exampleChinese: 我很感谢你的帮助。

meaning: n. 感激之情，感谢
example: She wrote a letter to show her gratitude.
exampleChinese: 她写了一封信来表达感谢之情。

meaning: n. 坟墓，墓⽳；死亡，去世 adj. 严重的，严峻的；严肃的
example: His face became grave after the bad news.
exampleChinese: 听到坏消息后，他的脸色变得严肃起来。

meaning: n. 重⼒，地⼼引⼒；(事态的) 严重性
example: Gravity keeps the ball on the ground.
exampleChinese: 重力把球留在地面上。

meaning: vt. vi. (⽜、⽺等) 吃⻘草 vt. 放牧；擦伤 (⽪肤)；轻擦，蹭 n. (表⽪) 擦伤
example: The sheep graze on the hillside all morning.
exampleChinese: 这些羊整个上午都在山坡上吃草。

meaning: n. 动物油脂；润滑油；(⽪肤) 油脂 vt. 在…上涂油
example: Please grease the pan before you bake the cake.
exampleChinese: 烤蛋糕前，请给平底锅抹上油。

meaning: vt. 居住于，栖居在
example: Many birds inhabit the wetland near our town.
exampleChinese: 许多鸟类栖居在我们镇附近的湿地里。

meaning: n. 居⺠，栖居的动物
example: The island has one inhabitant in winter.
exampleChinese: 这个岛在冬天只有一位居民。

meaning: vt. vi. 吸⽓，吸⼊
example: Take a deep breath and inhale slowly.
exampleChinese: 深呼吸，然后慢慢吸气。

meaning: adj. 内在的，固有的，与⽣俱来的
example: A natural fear of loud noise is inherent in many animals.
exampleChinese: 对巨响的天生恐惧是许多动物固有的。

meaning: vt. vi. 继承 vt. 经遗传获得；接⼿
example: You may inherit your father's blue eyes.
exampleChinese: 你可能会遗传你父亲的蓝眼睛。

meaning: vt. 抑制，阻碍；使拘束
example: Too much fear can inhibit a child's speech.
exampleChinese: 过多的恐惧会抑制孩子说话。

meaning: n. 勋章，奖牌
example: She won a gold medal in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在赛跑中赢得了一枚金牌。

meaning: adj. 医学的，医疗的，医术的 n. 体格检查，体检
example: She needs medical help now.
exampleChinese: 她现在需要医疗帮助。

meaning: n. 药；医学
example: The doctor gave me medicine for my cough.
exampleChinese: 医生给了我治咳嗽的药。

meaning: adj. 中世纪的
example: We visited a medieval castle on our trip.
exampleChinese: 我们旅行时参观了一座中世纪城堡。

meaning: vt. vi. 遇⻅；开会；(与…) 会⾯；结识 vt. 迎接；遭遇，经历；满⾜
example: I often meet my teacher on the bus.
exampleChinese: 我经常在公交车上碰到老师。

meaning: n. 旋律，曲调，歌曲
example: The piano melody stayed in my mind all day.
exampleChinese: 那段钢琴旋律在我脑海里萦绕了一整天。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 融化，熔化；使⼼软
example: Ice will melt in the warm sun.
exampleChinese: 冰会在温暖的阳光下融化。

meaning: n. 困境，难关
example: She faced a difficult plight after losing her job.
exampleChinese: 失业后，她陷入了困境。

meaning: n. 犁 vt. vi. 犁 (地)，耕 (地)
example: Farmers plough the field before planting rice.
exampleChinese: 农民在种水稻前先犁地。

meaning: n. 插头；塞⼦；⽕花塞 vt. 堵塞；补⾜；推⼴；插插头
example: Please plug the charger into the wall socket.
exampleChinese: 请把充电器插头插到墙上的插座里。

example: The plumber fixed the broken pipe in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 水暖工修好了厨房里坏掉的管子。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 突然前冲 (或下落) vi. 暴跌；陡峭地向下倾斜 n. 暴跌；突然跌落；卷⼊；跳⽔
example: The boat will plunge into the waves.
exampleChinese: 那条船会猛地冲进浪里。

meaning: adj. 复数的，复数形式的 n. 复数，复数形式
example: “Books” is the plural of “book.”.
exampleChinese: books”是“book”的复数形式。

meaning: prep. (数量) 加；和，外加 n. 优势，⻓处；加号 adj. 零上的；优点的；(数字后) 多的 conj. 此外，况且
example: Two plus two equals four.
exampleChinese: 二加二等于四。

meaning: n. 纤维；纤维织物
example: Cotton fiber is soft and light.
exampleChinese: 棉纤维又柔软又轻。

meaning: n. ⽂件夹；⽂件；档案 vt. 把…归档；发送 (报道)；锉光滑 vi. vt. 提起 (诉讼)，提交 (申请) vi. 排成纵队⾏⾛
example: Please file the papers on my desk.
exampleChinese: 请把我桌上的文件归档。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 充满，装满 vt. 填补；使充满；担任；(使) 吃饱 n. 填满…的量；吃饱喝⾜的量
example: Please fill the bottle with water.
exampleChinese: 请把瓶子装满水。

meaning: n. 电影；电影业；纪实镜头；㬵⽚ n. 薄层，薄膜 vi. vt. 拍摄，录制，把…拍成电影
example: We watched a funny film last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚看了一部有趣的电影。

meaning: n. 过滤器；滤镜，滤声器 vt. 过滤 vi. (⼈) 缓⾏；(信息) ⾛漏；渗⼊
example: This filter removes dirt from the water.
exampleChinese: 这个过滤器能去除水中的泥沙。

meaning: vi. 放松，休息 vt. vi. (使) 冷静，放⼼；(使) 放松 vt. 放宽 (限制等)；放松精神
example: I like to relax with music after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我喜欢听音乐放松。

meaning: vt. 传递，转发；转播 n. 接⼒赛；接班⼈；中继设备
example: The station will relay the game live tonight.
exampleChinese: 电台今晚将直播转播这场比赛。

meaning: vt. 释放；松开；发泄；解雇；发布 n. 释放；公开，发⾏；排放；解脱
example: The teacher will release the test results tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 老师明天会公布考试结果。

meaning: n. 宽慰；减轻，缓和；救济 (⾦)
example: The money brought relief to the family.
exampleChinese: 这笔钱给这个家庭带来了救济。

meaning: vt. 减轻，缓和；给…换班；解⼿
example: A hot drink can relieve a sore throat.
exampleChinese: 热饮可以缓解喉咙痛。

meaning: vt. 享受，从…获得乐趣 n. 享受；调味酱，佐料
example: She can relish a quiet afternoon with a good book.
exampleChinese: 她能从一本好书和安静的下午中获得乐趣。

meaning: adj. 勉强的，不情愿的
example: He was reluctant to leave his friends after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后，他不情愿离开朋友们。

meaning: n. ⾦银财宝；珍品；⼼肝宝⻉ vt. 珍视，珍惜
example: I treasure the photo from my first school trip.
exampleChinese: 我很珍爱第一次学校旅行的那张照片。

meaning: vi. 颤抖，战栗；轻晃，震颤；恐惧 n. 颤抖，战栗
example: Her hands began to tremble in the cold.
exampleChinese: 她的手在寒冷中开始发抖。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼤量的；极好的
example: The lake looked tremendous in the morning light.
exampleChinese: 晨光下，这个湖显得非常大。

meaning: n. 沟渠；战壕；海沟
example: The soldiers moved through the trench in silence.
exampleChinese: 士兵们默默地穿过战壕。

meaning: n. (词语的) ⽤法；使⽤ (量)
example: This word has unusual usage in modern English.
exampleChinese: 这个词在现代英语中用法不常见。

meaning: adj. 有⽤的，有益的；出⾊的
example: This map is useful for visitors.
exampleChinese: 这张地图对游客很有用。

meaning: adj. 极度的，最⼤的 n. 极限，最⼤限度
example: She did her utmost to finish the project on time.
exampleChinese: 她尽了最大努力按时完成这个项目。

meaning: adj. ⼤胆的；醒⽬的；(字体) ⿊体的 n. 粗体字，⿊体字
example: He gave a bold answer in class.
exampleChinese: 他在课堂上给出了一个大胆的回答。

meaning: n. (⻔窗) 插销；螺栓；⼀道 (闪电) vt. vi. 闩上 (⻔、窗) vt. ⽤螺栓固定；狼吞虎咽 vi. (⻢等) 脱缰；(⼈) 跑开
example: The wind can bolt the door shut if it is strong enough.
exampleChinese: 如果风足够大，就能把门闩上。

meaning: vt. 加强，改善 n. ⻓枕，垫枕
example: We will bolster the team with two new members.
exampleChinese: 我们将通过两名新成员来加强这个团队。

meaning: n. 炸弹；核武器；彻底的失败 vt. 轰炸，对…投炸弹 vt. vi. (考试) 考砸 vi. (戏剧、电影等) 演砸，不卖座
example: The army planned to bomb the bridge at night.
exampleChinese: 军队计划在夜里轰炸那座桥。

meaning: n. 纽带；债券；保释⾦；枷锁；键 vt. vi. (使) 黏合，连结；增强信任
example: Their friendship created a strong bond.
exampleChinese: 他们的友谊建立了牢固的联系。

meaning: n. ⻣头；⻣质 vt. 挑刺，剔⻣
example: He felt a bone in the fish while eating.
exampleChinese: 他吃鱼时感觉到里面有一根骨头。

meaning: adj. ⽣病的；想呕吐的；对…厌倦的
example: I feel sick after eating too much cake.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕吃太多后，我觉得不舒服。

meaning: n. ⼀边；侧⾯；边缘；⼀⽅；⽅⾯ vi. ⽀持，站在…⼀边
example: On this side of the paper, write your name.
exampleChinese: 在这张纸的这一面写上你的名字。

meaning: adv. 往 (或从、向) ⼀侧；侧着 adj. 侧着的
example: The car moved sideways to avoid the hole.
exampleChinese: 汽车向侧面移动以避开那个洞。

meaning: n. 围困，封锁，包围
example: The city was under siege for many weeks.
exampleChinese: 这座城市被围困了好几个星期。

meaning: vi. 叹⽓，叹息；(⻛) 悲鸣 vt. 叹息着说 n. 叹⽓，叹息
example: He let out a sigh of relief.
exampleChinese: 他如释重负地叹了口气。

meaning: n. 视⼒；看⻅；视野；景象；名胜 vt. 看⻅，发现
example: My grandmother still has good sight.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶的视力仍然很好。

meaning: n. 游览，观光
example: We went sightseeing in Beijing during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假期里我们去北京观光了。

meaning: n. 寂静，⽆声；沉默；缄⼝不谈 vt. 使安静；压制 (反对意⻅) int. 安静，静下来
example: The room fell into silence after the bell rang.
exampleChinese: 铃响后，房间里陷入了沉默。

meaning: adj. 沉默的；寂静的；只字不提的
example: The room became silent after the bell rang.
exampleChinese: 铃响后，房间里变得安静无声。

meaning: n. 硅
example: Silicon is used to make computer chips.
exampleChinese: 硅用于制造电脑芯片。

meaning: adj. 愚蠢的，傻的 n. 傻⽠，笨蛋
example: It was silly to forget my umbrella on a rainy day.
exampleChinese: 下雨天忘带伞真傻。

meaning: n. 银；银器；银⾊；银币；银牌 adj. 银⾊的 vt. 给…镀银；使具有银⾊光泽
example: The ring is made of silver.
exampleChinese: 这枚戒指是银制的。

meaning: n. 线；线索，思路 vt. 穿 (针)；串在⼀起；⽤…线缝 vi. vt. (使) 穿过，通过，穿⾏
example: She used a red thread to fix the button.
exampleChinese: 她用一根红线把纽扣缝好了。

meaning: n. ⻔槛；起始点，临界点
example: You are past the threshold of the room.
exampleChinese: 你已经过了房间的门槛。

meaning: n. (君王的) 宝座；王位，王权
example: The prince sat on the throne.
exampleChinese: 王子坐在宝座上。

meaning: vt. vi. 投，抛，扔 vt. 丢，扔；猛推；猛动；使陷⼊ n. 抛，扔，投，掷；投掷距离
example: Do not throw paper on the ground.
exampleChinese: 不要把纸扔在地上。

meaning: vt. vi. 猛推，挤；刺，戳 n. 猛推，刺，戳；驱动⼒；要点
example: He gave the door a hard thrust.
exampleChinese: 他用力推了一下门。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 展开，打开；(使) 逐渐展现
example: She will unfold the map on the table.
exampleChinese: 她会在桌上把地图打开。

meaning: adv. 不幸的是，遗憾的是
example: Unfortunately, the train was delayed by two hours.
exampleChinese: 不幸地，火车晚点了两个小时。

meaning: n. 制服 adj. 始终如⼀的，⼀律的
example: Every student wears a school uniform on Monday.
exampleChinese: 每个学生周一都穿校服。

meaning: n. 单位；病区；(家具) 组件；单元
example: This unit is about animals.
exampleChinese: 这个单元是关于动物的。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 团结，(使) 联合
example: We unite lemon juice and honey for the drink.
exampleChinese: 我们把柠檬汁和蜂蜜混合做这杯饮料。

meaning: n. 团结⼀致，统⼀；统⼀体；协调
example: Our class showed great unity during the competition.
exampleChinese: 我们班在比赛中表现出很强的团结。

meaning: n. 紫罗兰；紫罗兰⾊ adj. 紫罗兰⾊的
example: The violet flower grew by the fence.
exampleChinese: 紫罗兰长在篱笆旁。

meaning: n. 处⼥，处男；圣⺟玛利亚 adj. 未开发的，原始状态的；童贞的
example: They walked through a virgin forest.
exampleChinese: 他们穿过一片原始森林。

meaning: n. 病毒；病毒性疾病；计算机病毒
example: A virus can spread from person to person.
exampleChinese: 病毒可以在人与人之间传播。

meaning: adj. 嗓⾳的，发声的；直⾔不讳的 n. (乐曲中的) 歌唱部分
example: Her vocal opinion surprised everyone.
exampleChinese: 她直言不讳的观点让每个人都很惊讶。

meaning: n. ⼯作，职业；使命感，神召
example: Teaching was his vocation.
exampleChinese: 教书是他的职业。

meaning: n. 嗓⾳，说话声；发⾔权；⼼声 vt. 表达，吐露
example: Her voice is calm and clear.
exampleChinese: 她的声音平静而清晰。

meaning: adj. 易变的；不稳定的；易挥发的
example: The market is volatile this week.
exampleChinese: 本周市场波动很大。

example: The volcano sent smoke high into the sky.
exampleChinese: 这座火山把烟雾喷到了高空中。

meaning: n. 航⾏，航海，航天 vi. 航⾏，航海
example: The voyage took three weeks across the sea.
exampleChinese: 这次航行横跨大海花了三周。

meaning: n. 瀑布
example: We stopped to take photos by the waterfall.
exampleChinese: 我们停下来在瀑布旁拍照。

meaning: adj. 防⽔的，不透⽔的
example: This waterproof bag kept my phone dry in the rain.
exampleChinese: 这个防水包让我手机在雨中保持干燥。

meaning: n. 海浪；⻛潮；…潮；挥⼿；波 vi. vt. 挥⼿；挥⼿⽰意 vt. 挥舞，挥动 vi. 飘扬，摇晃；呈波形
example: A big wave hit the boat.
exampleChinese: 一个大浪拍打了小船。

meaning: n. 蜡，蜂蜡，⽯蜡；⽿垢 vt. 给…打蜡；⽤蜡除⽑ vi. 说话变得…起来；(⽉亮) 渐圆
example: My father put wax on the wooden floor.
exampleChinese: 我父亲在木地板上打了蜡。

meaning: conj. 虽然，尽管；但是，然⽽
example: Although he was tired, he finished his homework.
exampleChinese: 尽管他很累，他还是完成了作业。

meaning: n. 海拔⾼度；⾼处，⾼地
example: The village sits at a high altitude.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄位于高地上。

meaning: adv. 完全地；总共；总之
example: The project was altogether a success.
exampleChinese: 这个项目总体上是成功的。

meaning: n. ⼤使
example: The ambassador visited our school today.
exampleChinese: 大使今天访问了我们学校。

meaning: adj. 和蔼可亲的，亲切友好的
example: Our new teacher is amiable and easy to talk to.
exampleChinese: 我们的新老师和蔼可亲，很容易交谈。

meaning: prep. 在…过程中；在…中
example: Amid the noise, she kept reading quietly.
exampleChinese: 在喧闹中，她仍然安静地读书。

meaning: n. 肚⼦，腹部；⿎起部分
example: My belly hurt after I ate too much candy.
exampleChinese: 我吃了太多糖后，肚子痛了。

meaning: adj. 钟爱的，挚爱的，被深爱的 n. ⼼爱的⼈，爱⼈
example: The beloved dog waited at the door every evening.
exampleChinese: 那只心爱的狗每天傍晚都在门口等着。

meaning: prep. 在…下⾯；低于，⼩于 adv. 在…下⾯；低于；零度以下
example: The shoes are below the bed.
exampleChinese: 鞋子在床下面。

meaning: n. 腰带，⽪带；传送带；地带 vt. 抽打，狠打
example: This town lies in a rice belt.
exampleChinese: 这个小镇位于水稻种植带。

meaning: n. ⻓椅；法官席；替补席；⼯作台 vt. 把 (运动员) 从⽐赛中撤下
example: We sat on a bench and watched the sunset.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在长凳上看日落。

meaning: vi. vt. ⿎掌；拍⼿ vt. (友好地) 轻拍某⼈；急速放置 n. ⿎掌，掌声；砰然巨响
example: Please clap for the school band.
exampleChinese: 请为学校乐队鼓掌。

meaning: vt. 阐明，阐释
example: Can you clarify your answer for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我澄清一下你的答案吗？

meaning: n. (表达) 清楚；(思路，图像) 清晰
example: The report needs more clarity before we present it.
exampleChinese: 这份报告在展示前需要更清晰一些。

meaning: n. 冲突；差别，分歧；争执 vi. 打⽃，冲突；抵触；(时间)冲突 vi. vt. 撞击出巨⼤的响声
example: There was a clash between the two teams over the final rule.
exampleChinese: 两队在最后一条规则上发生了冲突。

meaning: vt. 握紧，抓紧；抱紧，紧拥 n. 扣⼦，扣环；紧握，紧抱
example: She used both hands to clasp the box tightly.
exampleChinese: 她用双手紧紧抓住了盒子。

meaning: n. 班；课；阶级；种类；优雅 vt. 把…看作 (或分类)
example: She is in Class Three this year.
exampleChinese: 她今年在三班。

meaning: adj. 典型的；经典的；⼀流的 n. 经典作品，名著；典范
example: This song is a classic that many people still love.
exampleChinese: 这首歌是一首经典作品，很多人至今仍然喜爱。

meaning: adj. 经典的，古典的；典型的
example: My grandfather enjoys listening to classical music.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷喜欢听古典音乐。

meaning: n. 分类，分级，类别
example: The classification of these animals is part of our lesson.
exampleChinese: 这些动物的分类是我们课程的一部分。

meaning: vt. (将…) 分类；界定，划分
example: We classify the books by subject.
exampleChinese: 我们按学科给这些书分类。

meaning: n. 从句；(法律⽂书的) 条款
example: The clause explains when the payment must be made.
exampleChinese: 这个从句说明了付款必须在什么时候完成。

meaning: vi. vt. 离开，启程；离职 vi. 背离，违背
example: We will depart at dawn for the city.
exampleChinese: 我们将在黎明出发去那座城市。

meaning: n. 离开，出发；出发班次；违背
example: We said goodbye at the station before her departure.
exampleChinese: 我们在车站送别她启程前往别处。

meaning: vt. 描绘；描述，刻画
example: The report can depict the problem clearly.
exampleChinese: 这份报告可以清楚地描绘这个问题。

meaning: vt. ⼤量消耗，耗减
example: The long drought can deplete the lake quickly.
exampleChinese: 长期干旱会迅速耗减这个湖的水量。

meaning: vt. 公开谴责，强烈反对
example: Many people deplore violence in schools.
exampleChinese: 许多人强烈反对学校里的暴力行为。

meaning: vt. 部署，调度；有效运⽤，利⽤
example: The manager will deploy two teams to the site.
exampleChinese: 经理将把两支队伍部署到现场。

meaning: n. 深 (度)；深厚；渊博；最深处
example: The pool has a depth of two meters.
exampleChinese: 这个游泳池的深度是两米。

meaning: n. 副⼿，代理⼈；治安官助理
example: My deputy will lead the meeting today.
exampleChinese: 我的副手今天将主持会议。

meaning: vt. 围住；随信附上
example: Please enclose a photo with your application.
exampleChinese: 请在申请材料中附上一张照片。

meaning: n. 围场，圈占地；(信中的) 附件
example: The letter included an enclosure with the contract.
exampleChinese: 这封信附有一份合同附件。

meaning: adj. 极其漂亮的；令⼈⼗分愉快的
example: She wore a gorgeous dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条非常漂亮的裙子去参加派对。

meaning: n. 流⾔蜚语；闲聊；爱说闲话的⼈ vi. 闲聊，说⻓道短
example: They like to gossip after class.
exampleChinese: 他们喜欢在下课后说闲话。

meaning: n. ⼥礼服；礼袍；罩⾐
example: She wore a white gown at the ceremony.
exampleChinese: 她在典礼上穿了一件白色长袍。

meaning: n. 年级；成绩；等级 vt. 按…分级；给…评分
example: My sister is in the seventh grade.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐上七年级。

meaning: n. ⾕物，⾕粒；颗粒；少量；纹理
example: The field is full of grain.
exampleChinese: 田里长满了粮食。

meaning: n. 克 (重量单位)
example: The bag of rice weighs one gram.
exampleChinese: 这袋大米重一克。

meaning: n. 树篱；防⽌损失的⼿段 vi. 避免正⾯回答，拐弯抹⻆ vt. ⽤树篱围住；包围，限制 vi. vt. 防备，防范 (尤指⾦钱损失)
example: A tall hedge grew along the garden wall.
exampleChinese: 花园墙边长着一排高高的树篱。

meaning: n. 脚后跟；鞋跟；⼥⾼跟鞋 vi. 倾斜，倾侧
example: My new shoes hurt my heel.
exampleChinese: 我的新鞋磨脚后跟。

example: From that height, we could see the whole lake.
exampleChinese: 从那个高地上，我们能看见整个湖。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 加强，(使) 增加
example: The new lights will heighten the stage effect.
exampleChinese: 新的灯光会增强舞台效果。

meaning: n. 继承⼈；接班⼈，继承者
example: She is the only heir to the family farm.
exampleChinese: 她是这个家庭农场的唯一继承人。

meaning: n. 直升机
example: A helicopter flew over the river this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上，一架直升机飞过了河面。

meaning: n. 地狱；悲惨的境况 int. 该死，⻅⻤
example: We were stuck in hell during the long storm.
exampleChinese: 我们在那场漫长的暴风雨中吃尽了苦头。

meaning: n. 头盔，防护帽
example: He wore a helmet while riding his bike.
exampleChinese: 他骑自行车时戴着钢盔。

meaning: adj. 有帮助的；乐于助⼈的
example: Your notes were very helpful before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前，你的笔记很有帮助。

meaning: n. (地球的) 半球；(脑的) 半球
example: The Earth has one hemisphere in daylight at a time.
exampleChinese: 地球一次只有一个半球处于白天。

meaning: adv. 因此，由此；以后
example: The road was icy, hence the delay.
exampleChinese: 路面结冰了，因此才耽搁了。

meaning: adv. 从今以后，从现在起
example: From henceforth, we will meet on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 从今以后，我们将在周五见面。

meaning: vt. 是…的前兆；宣布 (好或重要) n. 预兆；信使，传令官
example: Dark clouds herald a coming storm.
exampleChinese: 乌云预示着暴风雨就要来了。

meaning: n. ⾹草，药草
example: This soup tastes good with fresh herb.
exampleChinese: 这汤加上新鲜香草后味道很好。

meaning: n. 兽群，牧群；⼀般⺠众 vi. vt. (把…) 赶到⼀起，聚到⼀起 vt. 放牧
example: The farmer will herd the sheep into the pen.
exampleChinese: 农夫会把羊群赶进围栏里。

meaning: n. (国家或社会的) 遗产，传统
example: We should protect our heritage for future generations.
exampleChinese: 我们应该为子孙后代保护好我们的文化遗产。

meaning: vi. vt. (乘船) 航⾏；驾驶 (船只) vi. 起航；(轻快地) 移动 n. 帆；乘船航⾏
example: They sail across the lake every summer.
exampleChinese: 他们每年夏天都在湖上航行。

meaning: n. ⽔⼿，船员，海员
example: The sailor waved from the ship.
exampleChinese: 那名水手在船上挥手。

meaning: n. 圣徒，圣⼈；圣⼈般的⼈
example: He is a saint in our neighborhood for helping everyone.
exampleChinese: 他帮助了每个人，在我们社区里像个圣人。

meaning: n. ⽬的，利益；缘故；⽇本清酒
example: I stayed home for the sake of my little sister.
exampleChinese: 为了我的小妹妹，我留在了家里。

meaning: n. 沙拉
example: I made a salad with tomatoes and eggs.
exampleChinese: 我用西红柿和鸡蛋做了一份色拉。

meaning: n. 薪⽔，⼯资
example: Her salary is enough to pay the rent.
exampleChinese: 她的薪水足够支付房租。

meaning: vt. vi. 敬礼 vt. 向…致敬 n. 致敬；鸣礼炮
example: The soldier gave a salute to the flag.
exampleChinese: 那名士兵向国旗敬礼。

meaning: n. 救赎；救助途径
example: The new road was seen as a possible salvation for the town.
exampleChinese: 这条新公路被视为这个镇的一个可能救星。

meaning: n. 腔调，⼝⾳；重⾳；变⾳符号 vt. 突出，强调
example: She speaks English with an American accent.
exampleChinese: 她说英语时带有美国口音。

meaning: n. (交通) 事故；意外，偶然
example: There was a small accident on the road.
exampleChinese: 路上发生了一起小事故。

meaning: n. 协议，条约；⼀致，符合 vt. 给予，赠予 vi. (与…) ⼀致，符合
example: The two schools reached an accord on the field trip.
exampleChinese: 两所学校就这次郊游达成了一致。

meaning: n. ⼀致，符合，按照，依据
example: The plan was approved in accordance with the rules.
exampleChinese: 该计划是按照规定批准的。

meaning: usage. 据…所说，按…所报道 usage. 依照，按照，根据
example: According to the teacher, the test is on Monday.
exampleChinese: 根据老师所说，考试在周一。

meaning: adv. 相应地，照着；因此，所以
example: The bus arrived late, and we left accordingly.
exampleChinese: 公交车晚点了，我们也相应地离开得晚了。

meaning: vi. 疼痛；渴望 n. 疼痛
example: My legs ache after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 走了很长一段路后，我的腿很疼。

meaning: n. 酸；迷幻药 adj. 酸性的；酸味的；尖酸刻薄的
example: Lemon juice contains acid.
exampleChinese: 柠檬汁里含有酸。

meaning: adj. 秃顶的；磨平的；直截了当的
example: He wore a bald cap for the school play.
exampleChinese: 他在学校戏剧里戴了个秃头头套。

meaning: n. 芭蕾舞；芭蕾舞剧；芭蕾舞团
example: She danced in the ballet last night.
exampleChinese: 她昨晚在那部芭蕾舞剧中跳舞。

meaning: n. ⽆记名投票；选票；投票总数 vi. ⽆记名投票
example: Each ballot was counted by hand.
exampleChinese: 每一张选票都是人工清点的。

meaning: n. 乐队；⼀伙⼈；带，细绳；范围 vt. 给…加彩条等 vi. 联⼿，团结
example: The school band played at the festival.
exampleChinese: 学校乐队在节日活动上演奏了。

meaning: n. 绷带 vt. ⽤绷带包扎
example: The nurse put a bandage on his arm.
exampleChinese: 护士在他的手臂上缠了绷带。

meaning: vi. vt. 重打，猛击；(使) 砰的⼀声关上 vt. 砰地⼀扔；撞伤 n. 突然的巨⼤响声；猛击；刘海 adv. 恰好，正好
example: Her bang fell over one eye.
exampleChinese: 她的刘海垂到了一只眼睛上。

meaning: adj. 破产的，倒闭的；彻底缺乏的 n. 破产者，破产企业 vt. 使某⼈破产
example: The company went bankrupt after losing many customers.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在失去许多客户后破产了。

meaning: n. 横幅，标语；旗帜，⼝号 adj. 特别成功的
example: A red banner hung across the street to welcome the team.
exampleChinese: 一条红色横幅挂在街上，欢迎这支队伍。

meaning: n. 宴会，宴席
example: The school held a banquet for the visiting scientists.
exampleChinese: 学校为来访的科学家们举办了一场宴会。

meaning: n. 烧烤；烤⾁架 vt. (⽤烤架) 烧烤
example: My family will barbecue fish in the yard tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我家人会在院子里烤鱼。

meaning: vi. (⽝) 吠 vt. 怒⽓冲冲地说，咆哮 n. ⽝吠声；树⽪；很⼤的响声
example: The dog began to bark at the stranger.
exampleChinese: 那只狗开始对陌生人吠叫。

meaning: n. ⾕仓，畜棚
example: The old barn was full of hay and tools.
exampleChinese: 那座旧谷仓里堆满了干草和工具。

meaning: n. 桶；枪管 vi. ⾼速⾏驶，⻜驰
example: The truck can barrel down the road too fast.
exampleChinese: 那辆卡车会在路上飞快地疾驰。

meaning: adj. 贫瘠的，荒芜的；不孕不育的
example: Nothing grew on the barren land.
exampleChinese: 这片贫瘠的土地上什么也长不出来。

meaning: n. 障碍，壁垒；障碍物；屏障
example: A wall formed a barrier between the two fields.
exampleChinese: 一堵墙在两块田地之间形成了屏障。

meaning: n. 骆驼；驼⽑，驼绒
example: The camel carried water across the desert.
exampleChinese: 那只骆驼驮着水穿过沙漠。

meaning: n. 度假营；营地；营房；阵营 vi. 扎营，露营
example: We plan to camp by the lake tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们打算今晚在湖边露营。

meaning: n. (⼤学) 校园
example: We met on the campus after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后在校园里见面。

meaning: modal. 能，会；懂得；可以 n. ⾦属罐；⼀罐的量 vt. 把 (⻝品) 装罐保存
example: I can swim across the small river.
exampleChinese: 我能游过这条小河。

meaning: vt. 取消，废除；盖销，注销
example: They may cancel the game because of rain.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，他们可能会取消比赛。

meaning: n. 癌症；社会恶习
example: His grandmother is receiving cancer treatment.
exampleChinese: 他的祖母正在接受癌症治疗。

meaning: n. 披肩，披⻛；海⻆，岬
example: She wore a warm cape in the cold wind.
exampleChinese: 她在寒风中披着一件保暖的披肩。

meaning: n. 船⻓，机⻓；上尉，上校；队⻓
example: Our team captain gave a short speech before the game.
exampleChinese: 我们队长在比赛前做了简短的讲话。

meaning: n. 碳⽔化合物
example: Rice is a common carbohydrate in many meals.
exampleChinese: 米饭是许多餐食中常见的碳水化合物。

meaning: n. 碳；复写纸
example: Carbon is found in all living things.
exampleChinese: 碳存在于所有生物中。

meaning: adj. 基本的，最重要的 n. 红⾐主教；基数
example: Safety is a cardinal rule in this lab.
exampleChinese: 安全是这个实验室最重要的规则。

meaning: n. (轮船、⻜机所装载的) 货物
example: The cargo was loaded onto the ship before dawn.
exampleChinese: 货物在黎明前被装上了船。

meaning: n. ⻢⻋；⽕⻋⻋厢；运费；仪态
example: The train carriage was full of passengers.
exampleChinese: 火车车厢里坐满了乘客。

meaning: n. 运输公司；病原携带者；搬运⼈ n. 军输⻋，航空⺟舰；通信公司
example: The truck is a carrier of goods.
exampleChinese: 这辆卡车是货物的载体。

meaning: vt. 拿，搬；携带；输送；记住 vt. 承担；具有；销售；怀胎 vi. (声⾳) 传到很远，传播很远
example: Can you carry this box for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我拿这个箱子吗？

meaning: n. 胡萝⼘；好处，回报
example: She put a carrot into the soup.
exampleChinese: 她把一根胡萝卜放进了汤里。

meaning: vt. vi. 雕刻；把 (熟⾁) 切成块 vt. 刻；成功获得；修 (路)
example: Dad can carve a bird from a piece of wood.
exampleChinese: 爸爸能用一块木头雕刻出一只鸟。

meaning: adj. 古怪的，怪异的 n. ⾏为古怪的⼈
example: His eccentric habits made everyone curious.
exampleChinese: 他古怪的习惯让大家都很好奇。

meaning: n. 回声，回⾳；⼗分相似的东西 vi. (声⾳) 回响，发出回声 vi. vt. (场所) 充满回声 vt. 附和 (想法等)；重复 (别⼈的话)
example: My voice can echo in the empty hall.
exampleChinese: 我的声音会在空荡荡的大厅里回响。

meaning: n. ⽣态 (学)
example: She is studying ecology at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学里学习生态学。

meaning: n. 边，边缘；⼑刃；优势；尖锐 vi. vt. (使) 慢慢移动 vt. 给…加边 vi. 略微增加 (或减少)
example: Be careful near the edge of the roof.
exampleChinese: 在屋顶边缘附近要小心。

meaning: adj. (光、声等) 微弱的；渺茫的 vi. 晕倒，昏厥 n. 昏厥
example: The light was so faint that I could barely see it.
exampleChinese: 光线很微弱，我几乎看不见。

meaning: n. 信⼼，相信；宗教信仰；诚意
example: Her faith helped her through hard times.
exampleChinese: 她的信仰帮助她度过了艰难时期。

meaning: adj. 忠诚的；忠贞的；如实的
example: She stayed faithful to her promise.
exampleChinese: 她忠实地遵守了自己的承诺。

meaning: adj. 温柔的；和煦的；轻柔的；平缓的
example: Her gentle voice made the baby calm down.
exampleChinese: 她温柔的声音让宝宝平静下来。

meaning: adv. 温柔地，温和地；⼩⼼点
example: He spoke gently to the frightened child.
exampleChinese: 他温柔地对受惊的孩子说话。

meaning: adj. 真正的；真诚的，可信赖的
example: This is a genuine leather bag.
exampleChinese: 这是一个真正的皮包。

meaning: n. 地理学；地貌，地势；布局
example: Geography helps us understand the world map.
exampleChinese: 地理帮助我们理解世界地图。

meaning: n. 地质学；地质状况
example: We learned about rocks in geology class.
exampleChinese: 我们在地质学课上学习了岩石知识。

meaning: n. ⼏何学；⼏何形状，⼏何结构
example: We studied geometry in math class today.
exampleChinese: 今天我们在数学课上学了几何学。

meaning: n. 细菌，病菌；起源，萌芽；胚胎
example: A germ can spread quickly in a crowded room.
exampleChinese: 病菌会在人多的房间里迅速传播。

meaning: n. ⼿势，姿势；姿态，表⽰ vi. vt. 打⼿势，⽤⼿势表⽰
example: She made a small gesture to call me over.
exampleChinese: 她做了一个小手势让我过去。

meaning: n. ⻤，⻤魂；⼀丝，⼀点；回忆 vt. vi. 代⼈写作
example: The old house was said to be haunted by a ghost.
exampleChinese: 据说这座老房子闹鬼。

meaning: n. 雄伟壮观，庄严；(尊称) 陛下
example: The castle stood in all its majesty on the hill.
exampleChinese: 那座城堡庄严壮观地矗立在山丘上。

meaning: adj. 男性的，雄的，公的 n. 男性，雄性动植物
example: The male students sat near the front.
exampleChinese: 男生们坐在前面附近。

meaning: adj. (肿瘤) 恶性的；恶意的，恶毒的
example: The doctor said the tumor was malignant.
exampleChinese: 医生说这个肿瘤是恶性的。

meaning: n. 章节，段落；通道；通过；流逝
example: Please read the passage aloud.
exampleChinese: 请大声朗读这段文章。

meaning: n. 路⼈，过路的⼈
example: A passerby called the police after seeing the accident.
exampleChinese: 一位路人在看到事故后报了警。

meaning: n. 护照；⼿段，途径
example: Please show your passport at the airport.
exampleChinese: 请在机场出示你的护照。

meaning: vt. 粘贴，黏合 vt. vi. 粘贴 (⽂本、图⽚等) n. 酱；⾯糊；糨糊
example: You can paste the photo into the report.
exampleChinese: 你可以把照片粘贴到报告里。

meaning: n. 消遣，娱乐
example: Reading is my favorite pastime.
exampleChinese: 阅读是我最喜欢的消遣。

meaning: vt. 轻拍 n. 轻拍；(⻩油等的) ⼩块 adj. (回答等) 过于简单的
example: He gave the dog a pat on the head.
exampleChinese: 他轻轻拍了拍狗的头。

meaning: n. ⼩路，⼩径；路线；途径
example: A narrow path leads to the lake.
exampleChinese: 一条狭窄的小路通向湖边。

meaning: adj. 可怜的，可悲的；差劲的
example: That was a pathetic excuse.
exampleChinese: 那是个可悲的借口。

meaning: n. 耐⼼；毅⼒，耐性
example: She showed great patience while teaching the child to read.
exampleChinese: 她教孩子读书时表现出极大的耐心。

meaning: adj. 爱国的
example: She gave a patriotic speech at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校发表了一场爱国的演讲。

meaning: vt. vi. 巡逻，巡查 vt. (尤指威胁性地) 逛荡，闲逛 n. 巡逻，巡查；巡逻队，巡逻⻋队
example: The guards patrol the streets at night.
exampleChinese: 警卫们在夜间巡逻街道。

meaning: n. 资助⼈，赞助⼈；顾客，常客
example: The cafe has a patron who comes every morning.
exampleChinese: 这家咖啡馆有一位每天早晨都来的常客。

meaning: vi. 暂停，停顿 vt. (使) 暂停播放 n. 停顿，暂停
example: The teacher gave us a short pause before the next question.
exampleChinese: 老师在下一个问题前让我们短暂暂停了一下。

meaning: vt. 铺，筑 (路或地⾯)
example: Workers will pave the road before winter.
exampleChinese: 工人们会在冬天前铺好这条路。

meaning: n. ⼈⾏道；(硬化) 路⾯
example: We walked along the pavement to the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 我们沿着人行道走到公交车站。

meaning: n. 舞蹈；舞会 vi. 跳舞 vt. 跳…舞
example: They dance in the park every evening.
exampleChinese: 他们每天傍晚都在公园跳舞。

meaning: vi. ⻜奔，猛冲 vt. vi. 猛摔，猛撞 n. ⻜奔，猛冲；少量；破折号
example: Please use a dash between the two words.
exampleChinese: 请在这两个单词之间使用一个破折号。

meaning: adj. 使⼈⽓馁的，吓⼈的
example: The climb looked daunting to the young hikers.
exampleChinese: 这次攀登对年轻的徒步者来说看起来很吓人。

meaning: n. 黎明，拂晓；开端，起始阶段 vi. 破晓，天亮；开始；变得明朗
example: Dawn came early, and birds began to sing.
exampleChinese: 黎明来得很早，鸟儿开始歌唱。

meaning: adj. 每天的，⽇常的 adv. 每⼀天 n. ⽇报
example: Exercise is part of my daily routine.
exampleChinese: 锻炼是我日常生活的一部分。

meaning: n. ⽇光，⽇间，⽩天
example: We left before daylight faded.
exampleChinese: 天光变暗前我们就离开了。

meaning: n. 战役，战⽃；较量，⽃争；抗争 vi. vt. 奋战，与…搏⽃
example: The battle lasted for three days.
exampleChinese: 这场战役持续了三天。

meaning: n. 电池；⼀系列，⼀批；排炮
example: My phone battery died before lunch.
exampleChinese: 我的手机电池在午饭前就没电了。

meaning: n. 湾，海湾；隔间；⽉桂；栗⾊⻢ vi. 发出⻓嗥；强烈要求 adj. (尤指⻢) 棕红⾊的，栗⾊的
example: The bay was calm in the evening light.
exampleChinese: 傍晚的灯光下，海湾很平静。

meaning: vi. 黏附，附着；遵循 (规章等)
example: The label will adhere to the bottle.
exampleChinese: 标签会粘附在瓶子上。

meaning: adj. 邻近的，毗连的
example: My desk is adjacent to the window.
exampleChinese: 我的书桌靠近窗户。

meaning: n. ⻘少年 adj. ⻘少年的；(成年⼈) 幼稚的
example: The adolescent boy was taller than his father.
exampleChinese: 那个青春期的男孩比他父亲还高。

meaning: vt. 爱慕，疼爱 (某⼈)；喜爱 (某物)
example: I adore my grandmother.
exampleChinese: 我崇拜我的奶奶。

meaning: n. 到来，出现；降临节
example: The advent of spring brought warm days.
exampleChinese: 春天的到来带来了温暖的日子。

meaning: n. 冒险，奇遇；冒险精神
example: Our class had an exciting adventure in the forest.
exampleChinese: 我们班在森林里经历了一次刺激的冒险。

meaning: adj. 不利的，有害的
example: The storm caused adverse effects on the crops.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴对庄稼造成了不利影响。

meaning: vi. vt. 为…做⼴告；(在报纸等上) 征聘 vt. 宣扬，宣传
example: The company will advertise its new app online.
exampleChinese: 这家公司将在网上为它的新应用做广告。

meaning: n. 天花板；上限；升限
example: A lamp hangs from the ceiling.
exampleChinese: 一盏灯挂在天花板上。

meaning: n. 细胞；单间牢房；⼿机；电池
example: A cell can grow and divide inside the body.
exampleChinese: 细胞可以在人体内生长并分裂。

meaning: n. ⽔泥；混凝⼟；㬵接剂 vt. 巩固，加强
example: Concrete will cement the bricks together.
exampleChinese: 混凝土会把砖块牢牢地粘合在一起。

meaning: n. 审查，审查制度
example: The film faced strict censorship.
exampleChinese: 这部电影受到了严格的审查。

meaning: n. 官⽅统计，⼈⼝普查
example: The census showed that the city was growing fast.
exampleChinese: 人口普查显示这座城市正在快速增长。

meaning: n. 分 (货币单位)
example: This candy costs fifty cent.
exampleChinese: 这块糖果值五十分。

meaning: n. 中⼼；(市镇的) 中⼼；活动中⼼ vt. 将…放在中央
example: Draw a dot at the center of the circle.
exampleChinese: 在圆的中心画一个点。

meaning: adj. 中⼼的；核⼼的；中央的
example: The meeting room is in the central building.
exampleChinese: 会议室在中心大楼里。

meaning: n. 世纪；⼀百年
example: People in the last century traveled more slowly.
exampleChinese: 上个世纪的人出行更慢。

meaning: adj. 摄⽒度的 n. 摄⽒温度
example: Water boils at 100 centigrade degrees.
exampleChinese: 水在100摄氏度时沸腾。

meaning: n. 厘⽶
example: The ruler is ten centimetre long.
exampleChinese: 这把尺子长十厘米。

meaning: n. ⻨⽚；⾕类植物；⾕物
example: I ate cereal with milk for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了加牛奶的谷物麦片。

meaning: n. 债务；负债 (状态)；⼈情债
example: He paid off his debt last month.
exampleChinese: 他上个月还清了债务。

meaning: n. ⾸次登台，初次亮相 vi. ⾸次登台，初次亮相 vt. ⾸次推出
example: The singer will debut her new song tonight.
exampleChinese: 这位歌手今晚将首次推出她的新歌。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 腐烂，朽烂 vi. (建筑等) 变破败；衰败，衰落 n. 腐烂，朽烂；衰败，衰落
example: Fruit will decay quickly in the heat.
exampleChinese: 水果在高温下会很快腐烂。

meaning: n. 欺骗，欺诈
example: There was deceit in his promise.
exampleChinese: 他的承诺里有欺骗。

meaning: vt. vi. 欺骗，蒙骗，误导
example: Do not deceive your friends.
exampleChinese: 不要欺骗你的朋友。

meaning: adj. 像样的，得体的；正派的
example: She wore a decent dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿了一条得体的裙子去参加聚会。

meaning: adj. ⼗进制的，⼩数的 n. ⼩数
example: We learned decimal numbers in math class.
exampleChinese: 我们在数学课上学习了十进制数。

meaning: n. ⾃尊，⾃我意识；(⼼理学) ⾃我
example: He has a strong ego.
exampleChinese: 他自尊心很强。

meaning: n. ⻋费，票价；乘客；饭菜 vi. 进展，进⾏
example: The shop does well because it knows how to fare in a tough market.
exampleChinese: 这家商店知道如何在艰难的市场中经营，所以生意不错。

meaning: n. 告别 int. (道别⽤语) 再⻅，再会
example: She said farewell to her classmates.
exampleChinese: 她向同学们告别。

meaning: adv. (时间、空间上) 更远 adj. (时间、空间上) 更远的
example: This road is farther than the other one.
exampleChinese: 这条路比另一条更远。

meaning: adj. 快的，迅速的；系牢的 adv. 快速地；牢固地，完全地 vi. 禁⻝，斋戒 n. 禁⻝期，斋戒期
example: This train is very fast.
exampleChinese: 这列火车非常快。

meaning: vt. vi. 扣紧，系牢；(使) 盖好；抓牢 vt. 使牢固，使固定
example: Fasten your seat belt before the car starts.
exampleChinese: 汽车启动前，请系好安全带。

meaning: n. 命运；宿命
example: His fate was to become a doctor.
exampleChinese: 他的命运是成为一名医生。

meaning: adj. 致命的；灾难性的，毁灭性的
example: The fall was fatal.
exampleChinese: 那次跌倒是致命的。

meaning: n. 疲惫，疲倦；(⼠兵的) 作训服
example: After the long hike, I felt fatigue.
exampleChinese: 长途徒步后，我感到疲惫。

meaning: n. 过错，责任；缺点，弱点；故障 vt. 发现错误，找出缺点
example: The fault was fixed before class began.
exampleChinese: 故障在上课前修好了。

meaning: adj. 出故障的，有缺陷的；错误的
example: The lamp has a faulty wire.
exampleChinese: 这盏灯的电线有故障。

meaning: n. 传真机，传真系统；传真件 vt. ⽤传真机发送
example: Please fax the form to our office today.
exampleChinese: 请今天把这份表格传真到我们办公室。

meaning: vt. vi. 咯咯笑，傻笑 n. 咯咯笑，傻笑；趣事
example: The children began to giggle at the joke.
exampleChinese: 孩子们听到这个笑话后开始咯咯笑。

meaning: n. 冰川，冰河
example: A glacier moved slowly through the valley.
exampleChinese: 一条冰川缓慢地穿过山谷。

meaning: vi. 瞪，怒视；发出强烈刺眼的光 n. 瞪，怒视；强烈刺眼的光
example: The sun caused a strong glare on the water.
exampleChinese: 太阳在水面上造成了强烈的刺眼光。

meaning: vi. ⼀瞥，扫视；浏览，粗略地看 n. ⼀瞥，扫视
example: He gave me a quick glance and smiled.
exampleChinese: 他匆匆看了我一眼，然后笑了。

meaning: n. ⼀瞥；短暂的感受，初步的认识 vt. 瞥⻅；开始理解，开始领悟
example: I caught a glimpse of the mountain.
exampleChinese: 我瞥见了那座山。

meaning: vi. 闪亮，闪耀；(眼睛) 闪现 n. 灿烂的光辉；吸引⼒；⼩发光物
example: The stars glitter in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 星星在夜空中闪闪发光。

meaning: vi. 发出微光；喜形于⾊；⽪肤发红 n. 微弱稳定的光；容光焕发；喜悦
example: The fire will glow in the dark.
exampleChinese: 火焰会在黑暗中发出微光。

meaning: n. 收获，收割；收成，收获量 vi. vt. 收获，收割 vt. 采集，搜集
example: Farmers celebrate the rice harvest in autumn.
exampleChinese: 农民们在秋天庆祝稻谷丰收。

meaning: n. 匆忙，仓促
example: They left in haste.
exampleChinese: 他们匆忙离开了。

meaning: adj. 仓促的，草率的，冲动的
example: His hasty decision caused trouble.
exampleChinese: 他草率的决定造成了麻烦。

meaning: vi. 孵出；(蛋) 孵化 vt. 使…孵出；策划，密谋 n. 舱⼝；⻜机舱⻔；开⼝，⻔
example: The eggs will hatch soon.
exampleChinese: 这些蛋很快就会孵化。

meaning: n. 仇恨，憎恶，敌意
example: There was hatred in his voice.
exampleChinese: 他的声音里充满了仇恨。

meaning: vt. (⽤⼒) 拖，拉；传讯 n. ⼤批赃物；旅程；⼀⽹⻥
example: The workers had to haul the old sofa up three flights of stairs.
exampleChinese: 工人们不得不把那张旧沙发拖上三层楼梯。

meaning: n. 鹰，隼；鹰派⼈⼠，主战派⼈⼠ vt. 叫卖，兜售
example: A hawk soared over the field.
exampleChinese: 一只鹰在田野上空盘旋。

meaning: n. 草料；少量的钱
example: The farmer stacked the hay in the barn.
exampleChinese: 农民把干草堆在谷仓里。

meaning: n. 危险，隐患，危害 vt. ⼤胆提出或猜测；使…冒⻛险
example: A loose wire can hazard a fire in the house.
exampleChinese: 一根松动的电线可能会给房子带来火灾隐患。

meaning: pron. 他，它 (指雄性动物) n. 男性，雄性
example: He is my new classmate.
exampleChinese: 他是我的新同学。

meaning: vi. 慢跑 vt. 轻撞，轻碰 n. 慢跑
example: I jog every morning before school.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上上学前慢跑。

meaning: adj. 联合的，共同的 n. 关节；接合处；⼤块⾁
example: The two schools held a joint sports day.
exampleChinese: 这两所学校举行了联合运动会。

meaning: adj. 愉快的，快乐的 adv. ⾮常，很 n. 旅游，游玩
example: She gave a jolly laugh at the funny story.
exampleChinese: 她听了这个有趣的故事，开心地笑了起来。

meaning: n. ⼩孩，年轻⼈ vi. vt. 戏弄，开玩笑 vt. 欺骗，哄骗
example: The kid is drawing a cat on the wall.
exampleChinese: 那个小孩正在墙上画一只猫。

meaning: vt. 劫持，绑架
example: The police stopped the car when they suspected someone would kidnap the child.
exampleChinese: 警方在怀疑有人会绑架那个孩子时拦下了那辆车。

meaning: n. 肾脏；腰⼦
example: He hurt his kidney in the accident.
exampleChinese: 他在事故中伤到了肾脏。

meaning: vt. vi. 杀死，弄死，导致死亡 vt. 使痛苦，使受折磨；毁坏，扼杀 n. 杀死，捕杀 (尤指动物)；猎物
example: The medicine can kill harmful bacteria.
exampleChinese: 这种药可以杀死有害细菌。

meaning: adj. 迟到的；接近末期的；已故的 adv. 迟，晚；接近末期，在晚年
example: I was late for class this morning.
exampleChinese: 我今天早上上课迟到了。

meaning: adv. 最近，不久前
example: I have been very busy lately.
exampleChinese: 我最近一直很忙。

meaning: adv. 后来，以后；再⻅ adj. 后来的，以后的；接近末期的
example: We can talk about it later.
exampleChinese: 我们以后可以再谈这件事。

meaning: adj. 潜在的，潜藏的
example: The disease may remain latent for years.
exampleChinese: 这种疾病可能会潜伏多年。

meaning: n. 纬度；纬度地区；余地，⾃由
example: The pilot checked the plane's latitude before landing.
exampleChinese: 飞行员在降落前查看了飞机所在的纬度。

meaning: n. 笑，笑声
example: The room filled with laughter after the joke.
exampleChinese: 笑话过后，房间里充满了笑声。

meaning: vt. 发起，发动；发射；启动 vt. vi. 推出，发布 (新产品) n. 发射；投放市场
example: The company will launch its new app next week.
exampleChinese: 这家公司下周将推出它的新应用。

meaning: n. (要洗或洗好的) ⾐物；洗⾐房
example: The laundry is open until 9 p.m.
exampleChinese: 这家洗衣房营业到晚上9点。

meaning: adj. 鲁莽的，不顾后果的
example: It was reckless to drive so fast in the rain.
exampleChinese: 在雨中开得这么快是鲁莽的。

meaning: vt. vi. 想，认为 vt. 看作，看待；估算，估计
example: I reckon we should leave early.
exampleChinese: 我认为我们应该早点出发。

meaning: vt. 取回，收回；开拓，开垦
example: They plan to reclaim the land near the river.
exampleChinese: 他们计划开垦河边那片土地。

meaning: n. 望远镜 vt. 缩短 (⻓度或时间)
example: We used a telescope to look at the moon.
exampleChinese: 我们用望远镜看月亮。

meaning: n. 电报，电报机 vi. vt. (给…) 发电报 vt. 流露，暴露
example: The captain used the telegraph to send a message.
exampleChinese: 船长用电报机发送了一条消息。

meaning: vt. 告诉；显⽰；表达；吩咐；分辨 vi. vt. 知道，看出 vi. 泄露 (秘密)，告发
example: Please tell me your new phone number.
exampleChinese: 请告诉我你的新电话号码。

meaning: n. 眼泪；破洞，裂⼝ vt. vi. 撕裂，扯破 vt. 撕开，扯掉；挣开；拉伤 vi. 狂奔，疾驰
example: The wind made her tear the paper.
exampleChinese: 风把她手里的纸扯破了。

meaning: vi. vt. 戏弄，取笑；挑逗 vt. 逗弄 (动物)；倒梳 (头发) n. 戏弄，取笑；爱戏弄⼈的⼈
example: Do not tease your little brother.
exampleChinese: 不要取笑你的小弟弟。

meaning: adj. 冗⻓的，乏味的
example: The lecture was so tedious that several students fell asleep.
exampleChinese: 那场讲座太冗长乏味了，几个学生都睡着了。

meaning: vt. 打开，解开；撤销，消除；毁掉
example: Press undo if you make a mistake.
exampleChinese: 如果你出错了，就按“取消”。

meaning: adv. 毫⽆疑问地，确实地
example: The test result is undoubtedly correct.
exampleChinese: 这个测试结果毫无疑问是正确的。

meaning: adj. 平静的；和平的；爱好和平的
example: The village is very peaceful at night.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄在夜里非常宁静。

meaning: n. 顶峰，巅峰；⼭顶；尖头；帽檐 vi. 到达最⾼值 adj. ⾼峰时期的
example: Sales reached their peak in December.
exampleChinese: 销售额在十二月达到峰值。

meaning: n. 珍珠；珠状物
example: She wore a pearl necklace to the party.
exampleChinese: 她戴着一条珍珠项链去参加聚会。

meaning: n. 踏板 vi. vt. 骑 (⾃⾏⻋)；踩 (踏板)
example: He learned to pedal his bike without help.
exampleChinese: 他学会了不用帮助就能踩自行车踏板。

meaning: n. ⾏⼈，步⾏者 adj. ⾏⼈的，步⾏的；乏味⽆趣的
example: The pedestrian waited for the light to turn green.
exampleChinese: 那位行人等着绿灯亮起。

meaning: n. 骚扰，侵扰
example: The school took action to stop harassment.
exampleChinese: 学校采取了行动来制止骚扰。

meaning: n. 港⼝，港湾 vt. 窝藏，庇护；⼼怀；包含，藏有
example: The harbor was full of fishing boats.
exampleChinese: 港湾里停满了渔船。

meaning: adj. 坚硬的；艰难的；费⼒的 adv. 努⼒地，艰难地；猛⼒地
example: She studies hard before every test.
exampleChinese: 她每次考试前都努力学习。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 变硬；(使) 更坚定 vt. (使) 变得冷酷⽆情
example: Heat can harden the clay quickly.
exampleChinese: 加热会使黏土很快变硬。

meaning: adv. ⼏乎没有；⼏乎不；刚刚
example: I hardly know anyone at the new school.
exampleChinese: 在这所新学校里我几乎谁都不认识。

meaning: n. 艰苦，贫困
example: The family faced great hardship during the war.
exampleChinese: 这家人在战争期间面临很大的困苦。

meaning: n. (电脑) 硬件；五⾦制品；重武器
example: This laptop has new hardware inside.
exampleChinese: 这台笔记本电脑里面装着新的硬件。

meaning: n. 英雄；男主⼈公；偶像
example: The firefighter was a hero to the children.
exampleChinese: 这位消防员对孩子们来说是一位英雄。

meaning: adj. 英雄的，英勇的；(关于) 英雄的
example: She gave a heroic speech to the team.
exampleChinese: 她向团队发表了鼓舞人心的英勇演讲。

meaning: n. 海洛因
example: The police found heroin in the bag.
exampleChinese: 警察在包里发现了海洛因。

meaning: n. ⼥英雄；⼥主⻆；⼥偶像
example: The heroine saved the village at the end of the story.
exampleChinese: 故事结尾，女主角拯救了那个村庄。

meaning: adj. 不耐烦的；迫不及待的；难忍的
example: He is impatient while waiting for the bus.
exampleChinese: 他等公交车时很不耐烦。

meaning: adj. 紧急的，⾄关重要的；祈使的 n. 重要紧急的事；祈使语⽓
example: It is imperative to finish the project today.
exampleChinese: 今天完成这个项目至关重要。

meaning: adj. 帝国的，皇帝的；英制的
example: We visited an imperial palace in the city.
exampleChinese: 我们参观了这座城市里的一座皇宫。

meaning: n. 动⼒，促进，刺激
example: The new plan gave fresh impetus to the project.
exampleChinese: 这个新计划给项目带来了新的动力。

meaning: n. ⼩路；⼩巷；⻋道；航线；跑道
example: Our school bus stops at the corner lane.
exampleChinese: 我们的校车停在街角的小巷。

meaning: n. 灯笼，提灯
example: We hung a red lantern outside the door.
exampleChinese: 我们在门外挂了一个红灯笼。

meaning: n. (坐着时的) ⼤腿部；(跑道) ⼀圈 vi. (⽔) 轻拍，轻打 vt. 舔⻝；领先⼀圈 (或数圈)
example: The cat slept on my lap.
exampleChinese: 那只猫睡在我的大腿上。

meaning: n. 疏忽，过失；时间间隔 vi. (合同等) 失效，衰退，背弃
example: The contract will lapse next month.
exampleChinese: 这份合同下个月将失效。

meaning: n. 激光；激光器
example: Doctors use laser tools in some surgeries.
exampleChinese: 医生在一些手术中使用激光工具。

meaning: vt. vi. 猛击，狠打；迅速摆动 vt. 鞭打，抽打；捆绑，绑紧 n. 睫⽑；鞭打，抽打
example: Strong wind can lash the windows at night.
exampleChinese: 夜里强风会猛击窗户。

meaning: n. ⼈类
example: Mankind has always looked up at the stars.
exampleChinese: 人类一直仰望着星空。

meaning: n. 策略；巧妙的移动；军事演习 vi. vt. (谨慎或熟练地) 移动；操纵
example: The pilot had to manoeuvre through the narrow gap.
exampleChinese: 飞行员不得不谨慎地穿过狭窄的空隙。

meaning: adj. ⼈⼒的，体⼒的；⼿动操作的 n. 使⽤⼿册，说明书
example: Please read the manual before you start the machine.
exampleChinese: 在启动机器之前，请先阅读说明书。

meaning: vt. ⼤量制造；编造；⽣成 (物质) n. ⼤量制造；商品
example: The factory can manufacture toys quickly.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂可以快速大量制造玩具。

meaning: n. ⼿稿，原稿，底稿；⼿抄本
example: She kept the manuscript in a locked drawer.
exampleChinese: 她把手稿锁在了抽屉里。

meaning: n. 阻碍；障碍物
example: A fallen tree was an obstacle on the road.
exampleChinese: 一棵倒下的树成了路上的障碍物。

meaning: vt. 堵塞，遮挡；阻挠，妨碍
example: Do not obstruct the emergency exit.
exampleChinese: 不要堵塞紧急出口。

meaning: n. 阻挡，阻碍；路障；梗阻，阻塞
example: The fallen branches caused an obstruction on the path.
exampleChinese: 倒下的树枝在小路上造成了阻碍。

meaning: n. 某次；特殊场合；时机
example: On one occasion, I missed the last train.
exampleChinese: 有一次，我错过了最后一班火车。

meaning: adj. 偶尔的，有时发⽣的
example: We have only occasional rain in this area.
exampleChinese: 这个地区只会偶尔下雨。

meaning: adj. 奇怪的；奇数的；偶尔发⽣的 adj. 不成对的；可得到的；⼤约
example: That is an odd shape for a window.
exampleChinese: 那是一个奇怪的窗户形状。

meaning: n. ⼏率，可能性；困难，不利条件
example: The odds of winning are very low.
exampleChinese: 获胜的几率很低。

meaning: n. (常指难闻的) ⽓味
example: There was a strange odor in the room.
exampleChinese: 房间里有一股奇怪的气味。

meaning: vt. vi. 训斥，责骂
example: Don't scold the child for making a mistake.
exampleChinese: 不要因为孩子犯了错就责骂他。

meaning: n. 童⼦军；侦察员，侦察机；星探 vt. vi. 侦察，搜寻 (某处)；物⾊
example: The scout reported the enemy camp.
exampleChinese: 侦察员报告了敌军营地的情况。

meaning: vi. 攀爬；争抢，争夺 vt. 仓促完成；扰乱；炒 (蛋) vt. vi. (使) 紧急起⻜ n. 争抢，争夺
example: We had to scramble up the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们不得不奋力爬上山坡。

meaning: n. 碎⽚；⼀丁点；剩饭；废品 vt. 废弃，取消，抛弃 vi. 打架
example: Please scrap that old plan.
exampleChinese: 请废弃那个旧计划。

meaning: vt. 刮掉 vt. vi. (使) 摩擦；艰难取得 n. 刮，刮擦声；擦伤，擦痕
example: He tried to scrape the mud off his shoes.
exampleChinese: 他试着把鞋上的泥刮掉。

meaning: vt. vi. 挠，搔；抓破，抓伤；取消 vt. (意外地) 擦破；刮出痕迹 vi. 刮出刺⽿声 n. 划痕，划伤；刮擦的声⾳；挠痒
example: He had a small Scratch on his arm.
exampleChinese: 他的胳膊上有一道小擦伤。

meaning: vi. vt. 尖叫；⾼声喊 vi. 发出⼤⽽尖的声⾳ n. 尖叫，呼啸声；可笑的⼈ (或物)
example: The child let out a loud scream.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子发出了一声大尖叫。

meaning: n. 屏幕；银幕；电影；隔板，屏⻛ vt. 放映；掩藏；筛查；审查
example: The movie started on the big screen.
exampleChinese: 电影在大屏幕上开始播放了。

meaning: n. 螺丝，螺丝钉；螺旋桨；狱警 vt. ⽤螺丝固定；旋紧，拧紧；诈骗 vi. 拧上去
example: Can you screw this lid on tightly?
exampleChinese: 你能把这个盖子拧紧吗？

meaning: n. 剧本，讲稿；笔迹；答卷；脚本 vt. 为电影等写剧本；事先准备
example: She wrote a script for the school play.
exampleChinese: 她为学校话剧写了剧本。

meaning: n. 彻底审查，仔细检查
example: The report is under close scrutiny.
exampleChinese: 这份报告正在接受仔细审查。

meaning: n. 雕刻作品，雕像；雕刻艺术
example: We saw a beautiful sculpture in the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们在博物馆里看到了一件漂亮的雕塑。

meaning: n. 海豹；章，印记；密封垫；封蜡 vt. 封上 (信封)；密封；确定；封锁
example: Please seal the bag before you put it away.
exampleChinese: 请先把袋子密封好再收起来。

meaning: n. 线缝，接缝；矿层，煤层；缝隙
example: The jacket has a seam along the back.
exampleChinese: 这件夹克的背后有一条缝线。

meaning: det. ord. 第⼆ (的)；居第⼆位的；另外的 adv. 以第⼆名；第⼆，其次 n. 秒；⽚刻，瞬间 vt. 赞成 (建议等)
example: She came in second in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中得了第二名。

meaning: adj. 中学的；次要的；继发的
example: Math is a secondary subject this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期数学是一门次要科目。

meaning: n. 秘书；书记员；部⻓，⼤⾂
example: The secretary answered the phone politely.
exampleChinese: 秘书礼貌地接了电话。

meaning: n. 部分，区域；部件；节段；阶层 vt. 切开；做切⽚；关进精神病院
example: We studied a section of the rock under the microscope.
exampleChinese: 我们在显微镜下研究了岩石的一个截面。

meaning: n. 部⻔，⾏业；军事管制区；扇形
example: The tech sector is growing quickly.
exampleChinese: 科技行业正在快速增长。

meaning: n. 部分；(节⽬等的) 节，段；瓣 vt. 分割，划分
example: We can divide the video into three segment s.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把视频分成三个部分。

meaning: vt. 实⾏ (种族等) 隔离；(使) 分离
example: They should not segregate students by race.
exampleChinese: 他们不应该按种族隔离学生。

meaning: vt. 抓住；攻占，控制；逮捕；没收
example: He tried to seize the ball before it fell.
exampleChinese: 他试图在球落地前抓住它。

meaning: n. ⾯纱，⾯罩；掩饰，借⼝ vt. 戴⾯纱，戴⾯罩；掩饰
example: She wore a veil at the ceremony.
exampleChinese: 她在仪式上戴着面纱。

meaning: n. 静脉；叶脉；矿层；⻛格，⽅式
example: The vein in his arm was easy to see.
exampleChinese: 他胳膊上的静脉很容易看见。

meaning: n. 速度，速率
example: The car was moving at high velocity.
exampleChinese: 这辆车正以很高的速度行驶。

meaning: n. 天鹅绒，丝绒
example: This coat feels as soft as velvet.
exampleChinese: 这件外套摸起来像天鹅绒一样柔软。

meaning: adj. 垂直的；纵向的 n. 垂直线，垂直⾯
example: The shelf must stay vertical to hold the books.
exampleChinese: 书架必须保持垂直才能承受这些书。

meaning: n. 路边；边缘，边界
example: We stood on the verge of the road.
exampleChinese: 我们站在路边。

meaning: adj. (⼈) 多才多艺的；多功能的
example: She is a versatile student who can sing, draw, and code.
exampleChinese: 她是一个多才多艺的学生，会唱歌、画画和编程。

meaning: prep. 以…为对⼿；与…相⽐
example: The blue team will play versus the red team tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 蓝队明天将对阵红队。

meaning: n. 展览馆，画廊；⾛廊，⻓廊
example: We visited a new art gallery on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们周六参观了一家新的美术馆。

meaning: n. 星系；银河系
example: The Milky Way is a galaxy with billions of stars.
exampleChinese: 银河系是一个拥有数十亿颗恒星的星系。

meaning: vt. 剥⽪，去⽪ vi. vt. (表层) 脱落，剥去 (表层) vi. 脱⽪，蜕⽪ n. 果⽪，外⽪
example: Please peel the apple before eating it.
exampleChinese: 吃苹果前请先削皮。

meaning: vi. 窥视，偷看；微露出，部分现出 vi. vt. (使) 发出尖细的声⾳ n. ⼀瞥；说话，出声⾳；啾啾声
example: I could peep through the window and see the garden.
exampleChinese: 我能透过窗户偷看，看到花园。

meaning: n. 处罚，罚⾦；判罚；罚球；害处
example: He had to pay a penalty for arriving late.
exampleChinese: 他因迟到而不得不缴纳罚款。

meaning: vt. vi. 穿过，进⼊；渗透 (组织、团体) vt. 透过…看⻅；发现，揭⽰
example: Water can penetrate the soil quickly after heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 大雨过后，水可以很快渗入土壤。

meaning: n. 半岛
example: Japan is an island country, and Hokkaido is a peninsula.
exampleChinese: 日本是一个岛国，北海道是一个半岛。

meaning: n. 便⼠；分
example: This candy costs only one penny.
exampleChinese: 这块糖只要一便士。

meaning: n. 养⽼⾦；膳宿公寓 vt. 给…发养⽼⾦，使…退休
example: My grandfather gets a pension every month.
exampleChinese: 我祖父每个月都领退休金。

example: Many people walk in the park every morning.
exampleChinese: 每天早上很多人在公园里散步。

meaning: n. ⾹⽔；芳⾹，⾹味 vt. 使⾹⽓弥漫；抹⾹⽔
example: She sprayed perfume on her wrist before school.
exampleChinese: 她在上学前把香水喷在手腕上。

meaning: adj. 永久的，永恒的
example: This old phone is still permanent.
exampleChinese: 这部旧手机仍然是永久保留的。

meaning: vt. vi. 渗透，弥漫；(感情等) 充斥
example: The smell of fresh bread can permeate the whole house.
exampleChinese: 新鲜面包的香味可以弥漫整个房子。

meaning: n. 许可 (证)，批准
example: You need permission to enter the lab.
exampleChinese: 进入实验室需要许可。

meaning: vt. 允许，准许 vi. vt. 使…有可能 n. 许可证，特许证
example: You must permit visitors to enter.
exampleChinese: 你必须允许访客进入。

meaning: vt. 量化，⽤数量来表⽰
example: We need to quantify the results before we compare them.
exampleChinese: 在比较之前，我们需要把结果量化。

meaning: adj. 数量的，量化的，定量的
example: The report uses quantitative data from a school survey.
exampleChinese: 这份报告使用了来自学校调查的定量数据。

meaning: n. 数量，数⽬；⼤量，⼤批
example: Please add a large quantity of water.
exampleChinese: 请加入大量的水。

meaning: n. 赛跑，竞速⽐赛；竞争；种族 vi. vt. 参加⽐赛；(使) 快速移动
example: The children race across the field.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在田野上赛跑。

meaning: adj. 种族间的；种族的，⼈种的
example: The school has a strict policy against racial discrimination.
exampleChinese: 学校对种族歧视有严格的规定。

meaning: n. ⽀架，架⼦；肋排 vt. 使…痛苦不堪，使受折磨
example: Please put the books on the rack by the door.
exampleChinese: 请把书放在门边的架子上。

meaning: n. 喧哗 (声)；勒索，敲诈；球拍
example: The racket from the construction site was too loud.
exampleChinese: 建筑工地的喧哗声太大了。

meaning: n. 收⾳机；⼴播；⽆线电 vi. vt. ⽤⽆线电发送
example: My grandpa listens to the radio every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷每天早上听收音机。

meaning: adj. 放射性的，有辐射的
example: Workers wore masks near the radioactive material.
exampleChinese: 工人在放射性材料附近戴着口罩。

meaning: n. 半径；半径范围；桡⻣
example: The circle has a radius of five centimeters.
exampleChinese: 这个圆的半径是五厘米。

meaning: n. 抹布，破布；破旧⾐服；⼩报 vt. 嘲笑，捉弄
example: He used a rag to clean the window.
exampleChinese: 他用一块破布擦窗户。

meaning: n. 暴怒，狂怒；流⾏⼀时的事物 vi. vt. 发怒，怒斥 vi. 猛烈地进⾏；迅速蔓延
example: The crowd began to rage after the referee's decision.
exampleChinese: 裁判的判决后，人群开始愤怒起来。

meaning: n. 突然袭击；突击检查；抢劫 vt. 突击搜捕；突袭，偷袭；打劫
example: The police will raid the warehouse tonight.
exampleChinese: 警方今晚将突袭这座仓库。

meaning: n. 学期，半学年
example: This semester is much busier than the last one.
exampleChinese: 这个学期比上一个学期忙得多。

meaning: n. 半导体
example: A semiconductor is used in many computers and phones.
exampleChinese: 半导体被用于许多电脑和手机中。

meaning: n. 研讨班，研讨课；专题讨论会
example: Our class will attend a science seminar this Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们班这周五将参加一个科学研究会。

meaning: n. 参议院；⼤学评事会；元⽼院
example: The senate approved the new law after a long debate.
exampleChinese: 参议院经过长时间辩论后通过了新法律。

meaning: n. 参议员
example: The senator spoke about education at the meeting.
exampleChinese: 这位参议员在会议上谈到了教育。

meaning: n. 句⼦；判决，宣判 vt. 判决，宣判
example: Please write one sentence about your family.
exampleChinese: 请写一个关于你家庭的句子。

meaning: n. 情绪，观点；伤感，柔情
example: I can understand your sentiment about moving away from home.
exampleChinese: 我能理解你离开家乡的那种情感。

meaning: n. ⼀场，⼀节；会议，开庭；学年
example: The meeting will start in ten minutes this session.
exampleChinese: 这次会议将在十分钟后开始。

meaning: vi. vt. 缝制，缝合，缝补
example: My grandmother can sew a button back on quickly.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶能很快把纽扣缝回去。

meaning: vi. 发光；出类拔萃 vt. 把…照向；擦亮 n. 光亮，光泽
example: The sun began to shine through the clouds.
exampleChinese: 太阳开始穿过云层照耀。

meaning: n. 运输，运送；(⼀批) 运输的货物
example: The shipment of new desks arrived this morning.
exampleChinese: 这批新书桌的货物今天早上到了。

meaning: vi. 哆嗦，发抖 n. 寒战，颤抖
example: I shiver when the cold wind blows.
exampleChinese: 冷风吹来时，我会发抖。

meaning: n. 震惊；休克；剧烈震动；触电 vt. 使震惊，使惊愕 vi. vt. 使⽓愤
example: The shock from the blast broke the windows.
exampleChinese: 爆炸的冲击震碎了窗户。

meaning: vi. vt. 射击，发射；打猎；⻜驰；拍摄 vt. 射杀，射伤；突然把…投向 n. 新芽；拍摄；狩猎 int. 呸；说吧，请讲
example: The soldier was trained to shoot straight.
exampleChinese: 那名士兵受过射击要准的训练。

meaning: n. 射击；投篮；尝试；镜头；注射 n. 射⼿；炮弹；照⽚；少量烈酒 adj. 杂⾊的；耗尽的，破旧的
example: The hunter fired a shot into the air.
exampleChinese: 猎人朝空中开了一枪。

meaning: n. 不⾜，缺少，短缺
example: There is a shortage of clean water in the town.
exampleChinese: 这个镇上缺少干净的水。

meaning: n. 缺点，短处
example: Every team has a shortcoming they need to fix.
exampleChinese: 每个团队都有需要改进的缺点。

meaning: n. 速记法；简略的表达⽅式
example: She took notes in shorthand during the lecture.
exampleChinese: 她在讲座中用速记法做笔记。

meaning: vi. vt. 猛推，乱挤，推撞 vt. 乱放，随⼿扔 n. 猛推
example: He gave the door a shove to open it.
exampleChinese: 他猛推了一下门，把门推开了。

meaning: n. 庙宇，寺院；太阳⽳
example: We visited an old temple on the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们参观了山上的一座古老庙宇。

meaning: n. (乐曲的) 节奏；(发展的) 速度
example: The conductor kept the tempo steady.
exampleChinese: 指挥让乐曲的节奏保持稳定。

meaning: n. 房客，租⼾ vt. 租⽤
example: The tenant paid the rent on time.
exampleChinese: 房客按时交了房租。

meaning: adj. 温柔的；嫩的；⼀碰就疼的 vt. 提议，提出 n. 投标；煤⽔⻋；补给船
example: The rose was soft and tender to the touch.
exampleChinese: 这朵玫瑰摸起来柔软而娇嫩。

meaning: adj. 紧张的；令⼈紧张的；绷紧的 vt. vi. (使肌⾁) 绷紧 n. (动词的) 时态
example: I felt tense before the piano competition.
exampleChinese: 钢琴比赛前我感到很紧张。

meaning: n. 紧张；对⽴；张⼒
example: There was tension in the room before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前，房间里气氛很紧张。

meaning: adv. 那时，到那时；然后；那么 adj. 当时的，时任的
example: Finish your homework, then watch TV.
exampleChinese: 先完成作业，然后再看电视。

meaning: adv. 之后，此后
example: She moved to the city, and thereafter she lived alone.
exampleChinese: 她搬到城里，此后就独自生活。

meaning: adv. 因此，由此，从⽽
example: He missed the bus, thereby arriving late.
exampleChinese: 他错过了公交车，因此迟到了。

meaning: adv. 所以，因此，因⽽
example: It was raining hard; therefore, we stayed inside.
exampleChinese: 雨下得很大，因此我们待在室内。

meaning: n. 背⼼；(特殊⽤途的) ⻢甲 vt. 授予，赋予
example: He wore a life vest on the boat.
exampleChinese: 他在船上穿着救生背心。

meaning: n. 有经验的⼈，⽼⼿；退伍军⼈
example: The coach is a veteran of many games.
exampleChinese: 这位教练是经历过许多比赛的老手。

meaning: vt. (正式) 否决；不同意 n. 否决权
example: The mayor will veto the new plan.
exampleChinese: 市长将否决这项新计划。

meaning: vi. vt. ⾏⾛，步⾏；徒步旅⾏，散步 vt. 陪伴…⾛；遛 (动物) vi. 不翼⽽⻜，被盗⾛ n. 步⾏，散步；步⾏的路径；步态
example: We took a short walk after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们散了一会儿步。

meaning: n. 病房；选区；受监护⼈ vt. 避开 (危险、疾病等)
example: The patient is resting in Ward 3.
exampleChinese: 病人正在3号病房休息。

meaning: n. ⾐柜；全部服装；服装部
example: Her clothes were hanging in the wardrobe.
exampleChinese: 她的衣服挂在衣柜里。

meaning: n. 仓库，货栈
example: The boxes are stored in the warehouse.
exampleChinese: 这些箱子存放在仓库里。

meaning: n. 战争；冲突
example: People should work to prevent warfare.
exampleChinese: 人们应该努力阻止战争。

meaning: n. 温暖；热情，友好
example: The blanket gave us warmth on the cold night.
exampleChinese: 那条毯子在寒冷的夜晚给了我们温暖。

meaning: vt. vi. 提醒，警告
example: The teacher warned us not to run in the hall.
exampleChinese: 老师提醒我们不要在走廊里跑。

meaning: n. 授权令；做某事的理由 vt. 使成为必要，使合理，使正当
example: Nothing can warrant such rude behavior.
exampleChinese: 没有什么能使这种粗鲁行为变得正当。

meaning: n. 保修单
example: The phone comes with a one-year warranty.
exampleChinese: 这部手机附带一年的保修单。

meaning: adj. 从⻜机上的；空中的 n. (电视等的) 天线
example: The aerial on the roof was broken.
exampleChinese: 屋顶上的天线坏了。

meaning: adj. 富裕的，富⾜的
example: They live in an affluent neighborhood.
exampleChinese: 他们住在一个富裕的社区。

meaning: adv. 之后，后来
example: We went home afterwards.
exampleChinese: 我们后来回家了。

meaning: prep. 反对，违反；对…不利；倚，撞 prep. 和…⽐赛；以防；衬托；和…相⽐
example: I am against wasting food.
exampleChinese: 我反对浪费食物。

meaning: n. 年龄 (段)；时期；⽼年；⻓时间 vi. vt. (使) 变⽼，(使) 显⽼
example: Her age is twelve.
exampleChinese: 她十二岁。
