meaning: n. 教练；客⻋；私⼈教师；经济舱 vt. 训练，培训；辅导；指⽰
example: Our basketball coach is very patient.
exampleChinese: 我们的篮球教练很有耐心。

meaning: n. 联合政府；联合体，联盟；联合
example: The two parties formed a coalition to govern.
exampleChinese: 这两个政党组成了联合政府来执政。

meaning: adj. 粗糙的；⼤颗粒的；粗鲁的
example: The coarse towel felt rough on my skin.
exampleChinese: 这条粗糙的毛巾摸起来很扎皮肤。

meaning: adj. 认知的，感知的，认识的
example: Cognitive skills improve with practice.
exampleChinese: 认知能力会随着练习而提高。

meaning: vt. 给…注射；给…添加；给…注⼊
example: The nurse can inject the medicine into the patient.
exampleChinese: 护士可以把药物注射到病人体内。

meaning: vt. 使受伤，弄伤；损害 (名誉等)
example: Be careful not to injure your knee during practice.
exampleChinese: 练习时小心不要伤到你的膝盖。

meaning: n. (⾝体的) 伤害；(对感情等) 损害
example: He had a knee injury from the soccer game.
exampleChinese: 他在足球比赛中膝盖受了伤。

meaning: n. 墨⽔，油墨，墨汁 vt. 给…上油墨；签订 (合同等)
example: There is blue ink on my finger.
exampleChinese: 我的手指上有蓝色墨水。

meaning: adv. 向 (或在) 内陆，向 (或在) 内地 adj. 内地的，内陆的
example: We moved inland after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，我们向内地搬去。

meaning: adj. 空⽩的；没表情的；(墙等) 空的 n. 空⽩处；(记忆的) 空⽩；空弹 vi. 突然忘掉，突然思路模糊
example: Leave the last page blank.
exampleChinese: 把最后一页空着。

meaning: n. 毯⼦，⽑毯；厚层，覆盖层 vt. 覆盖，笼罩 adj. 总括的，全⾯的
example: She wrapped herself in a warm blanket.
exampleChinese: 她把自己裹在一条温暖的毯子里。

meaning: n. 光；电灯；打⽕机 adj. 明亮的；浅⾊的；轻的；单薄的 vt. 点燃；照亮 vi. 开始燃烧
example: The bag is light and easy to carry.
exampleChinese: 这个包很轻，容易携带。

meaning: n. 闪电 adj. 闪电似的，极快的
example: A flash of lightning lit up the sky.
exampleChinese: 一道闪电照亮了天空。

meaning: vt. vi. 烘，烤，焙；(将某物) 烤硬 vi. (变得) 灼热，炎热
example: We bake bread every Sunday morning.
exampleChinese: 我们每周日早上烤面包。

meaning: n. ⻥饵；⽤作诱饵的⼈或物 vt. 给 (⻥钩或陷阱) 上诱饵；挑衅
example: He put bait on the hook and waited by the river.
exampleChinese: 他把鱼饵挂在钩子上，随后在河边等待。

meaning: n. 单⾝汉，未婚男⼦；学⼠
example: He earned a bachelor degree in history.
exampleChinese: 他获得了历史学学士学位。

meaning: adv. 向后，往回；倒退地 adj. 向后的，倒退的；落后的
example: He took a backward step to avoid the ball.
exampleChinese: 他向后退了一步，避开了球。

meaning: n. 细菌
example: Bacteria can grow quickly in warm, wet places.
exampleChinese: 细菌可以在温暖潮湿的地方快速生长。

meaning: adj. 坏的；差的；不擅⻓的；严重的
example: The milk smells bad.
exampleChinese: 这牛奶闻起来坏了。

meaning: adv. 不好地；严重地；⾮常；负⾯地
example: I miss my hometown badly.
exampleChinese: 我非常想念我的家乡。

meaning: n. 徽章；(制服上的) 标记；象征
example: The badge showed that she was a school captain.
exampleChinese: 那个徽章表明她是学校队长。

meaning: n. ⽻⽑球运动
example: We played badminton after school.
exampleChinese: 我们放学后打了羽毛球。

meaning: n. ⾏李；(思想) 负担，包袱
example: Please put your baggage on the cart.
exampleChinese: 请把你的行李放到推车上。

meaning: n. 保释，保释⾦ vi. (迅速地) 离开，撤
example: The thief tried to bail before the police arrived.
exampleChinese: 警察到达前，小偷试图迅速离开。

meaning: n. 腹部
example: The doctor checked his abdomen for pain.
exampleChinese: 医生检查了他的腹部是否疼痛。

meaning: prep. adv. 在船 (⻜机，⽕⻋) 上，上船 等
example: Please stay aboard until the plane stops.
exampleChinese: 请一直待在飞机上，直到飞机停下。

meaning: vi. ⼤量存在
example: Wildflowers abound on the hill in spring.
exampleChinese: 春天里，这座山上野花大量存在。

meaning: adv. prep. 在…上⽅；⾼于 adv. 上⽂ adj. 上述的
example: The picture hangs above my desk.
exampleChinese: 那幅画挂在我书桌上方。

meaning: adj. 突然的，意外的；唐突的
example: His abrupt reply surprised me.
exampleChinese: 他生硬的回答让我很惊讶。

meaning: adj. 荒唐的，荒谬的
example: His excuse sounded absurd.
exampleChinese: 他的借口听起来很荒谬。

meaning: adj. ⼤量的，丰富的，充⾜的
example: The garden is abundant with flowers in spring.
exampleChinese: 春天，这个花园里鲜花丰富。

meaning: n. 滥⽤；虐待；辱骂 vt. 滥⽤；虐待；辱骂
example: Smoking can abuse your health.
exampleChinese: 吸烟会滥用你的健康。

meaning: n. 出租⻋；(卡⻋、⽕⻋的) 驾驶室
example: The driver sat in the cab and checked the map.
exampleChinese: 司机坐在驾驶室里查看地图。

meaning: n. 储藏柜，陈列柜；内阁
example: She kept the plates in the cabinet.
exampleChinese: 她把盘子放在储藏柜里。

meaning: n. 缆绳，钢索；电缆；有线电视 vt. vi. (给…) 发电报
example: We need a strong cable to hold the bridge.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一根结实的缆绳来支撑这座桥。

meaning: n. ⽇历；⽇程表；历法
example: I marked the test date on my calendar.
exampleChinese: 我在日历上标出了考试日期。

meaning: n. 卡，卡路⾥ (热量单位)
example: This snack has only 100 calorie.
exampleChinese: 这种零食只有100卡路里。

meaning: n. 损害，损坏，伤害；损害赔偿⾦ vt. 损害，伤害
example: The storm caused damage to the roof.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨对屋顶造成了损害。

meaning: int. 该死，可恶 adj. 该死的，可恶的；完全的 vt. 该死，可恶；罚…⼊地狱；谴责 adv. 该死，可恶；⾮常
example: Damn, I left my keys at home.
exampleChinese: 该死，我把钥匙落在家里了。

meaning: adj. 潮湿的，湿⽓重的 n. 潮湿，湿⽓ vt. 使潮湿；抑制(感情等)
example: The floor was damp after the rain.
exampleChinese: 下雨后，地板是潮湿的。

meaning: adj. 热切的，渴望的
example: The children were eager to start the game.
exampleChinese: 孩子们急切地想开始游戏。

meaning: n. ⽿朵；辨⾳⼒；穗
example: My left ear still hurts.
exampleChinese: 我的左耳还在疼。

meaning: adj. 诚挚的，认真的
example: She gave an earnest answer to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 她认真地回答了老师的问题。

meaning: n. 地球；陆地；⼟，泥⼟
example: The earth moves around the sun.
exampleChinese: 地球围绕太阳转。

meaning: n. 容易，轻易；舒适，安逸 vi. vt. (使) 宽慰，缓解；(使) 缓缓移动 vt. 使…容易些
example: A short rest will ease your pain.
exampleChinese: 短暂休息会减轻你的疼痛。

meaning: n. 东；东⽅国家 adj. 东部的，向东的 adv. 向东，朝东
example: The sun rises in the east.
exampleChinese: 太阳从东方升起。

meaning: n. 退潮 (期)；低潮，衰退 vi. (海潮) 退，落；衰弱，衰退
example: The tide began to ebb after noon.
exampleChinese: 午后潮水开始退去。

meaning: n. 寓⾔；谎⾔，⽆稽之谈
example: The old fable taught a lesson about honesty.
exampleChinese: 这个古老的寓言讲述了诚实的重要性。

meaning: adj. 极好的；巨⼤的；传说中的
example: We had a fabulous time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里玩得非常开心。

meaning: vt. 促进，使便利
example: These new signs will facilitate travel in the city.
exampleChinese: 这些新标志将促进城市里的出行便利。

meaning: n. 设备，设施；特⾊功能；天资
example: The school has a sports facility near the river.
exampleChinese: 学校在河边有一个体育设施。

meaning: n. 全体教员；院系；机能；能⼒
example: The engineering faculty met after class.
exampleChinese: 工程学院的全体教师在课后开了会。

meaning: n. ⼀帮 (罪犯，混混等)；⼀伙朋友
example: A gang of boys was playing basketball outside.
exampleChinese: 一群男孩正在外面打篮球。

meaning: n. 监狱，看守所 vt. 使⼊狱，监禁
example: The police will jail the thief after the trial.
exampleChinese: 审判后，警察会把小偷关进监狱。

meaning: n. ⻋库；汽⻋修理⼚ vt. 把…送⼊⻋库 (或修⻋⼚)
example: My father keeps his tools in the garage.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸把工具放在车库里。

meaning: n. 垃圾；垃圾箱；废话
example: Please take the garbage out after dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭后把垃圾拿出去。

meaning: n. ⽓体；煤⽓；汽油；毒⽓，⽡斯 vt. 使吸⼊毒⽓
example: The car ran out of gas on the highway.
exampleChinese: 汽车在高速公路上没油了。

meaning: vi. vt. 倒吸⽓；喘不过⽓，⽓喘吁吁 vi. 渴望 (酒或⾹烟) n. 倒吸⽓，倒抽⽓
example: She had to gasp for air after running up the stairs.
exampleChinese: 她跑上楼梯后不得不喘着气吸气。

meaning: vi. vt. 聚集，召集；认为，推测 vt. 搜集，采集；收拢；收割；攒 vi. 逐渐增加，积聚
example: We gather leaves for the class project.
exampleChinese: 我们为班级项目收集树叶。

meaning: n. 测量仪器；宽度；⼝径；标准 vt. 判断 (尤指感受)；测量；估算
example: I used a ruler to gauge the width of the table.
exampleChinese: 我用尺子来测量桌子的宽度。

meaning: adj. 同性恋的；欢乐的 n. (男) 同性恋者
example: She was in a gay mood after hearing the good news.
exampleChinese: 听到好消息后，她心情很快乐。

meaning: vi. 注视，凝视 n. 注视，凝视
example: He stopped to gaze at the stars.
exampleChinese: 他停下来凝视星星。

meaning: n. 挡位；⻮轮；设备，装置；⾐服 vi. vt. (使) 适合；为…做好准备
example: Please gear up for the school trip tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 请为明天的学校旅行做好准备。

meaning: n. 性别；男性，⼥性；(语法中的) 性
example: The survey asked about age and gender.
exampleChinese: 这份调查询问了年龄和性别。

meaning: vt. 赞扬；招⼿ (停⻋)；朝…呼喊 vi. 下冰雹；来⾃，出⽣于 n. 冰雹；雹⼦般的⼀阵
example: The driver waved to hail a taxi.
exampleChinese: 司机挥手拦出租车。

meaning: n. ⻔厅；⾛廊；礼堂；学⽣宿舍
example: Please wait in the hall near the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门边的门厅等一下。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 停⽌ n. 停⽌，暂停
example: The rain will halt the game for a while.
exampleChinese: 这场雨会让比赛暂停一会儿。

meaning: n. ⼿；帮忙；影响；指针 vt. 递，给
example: Please hand me the red pen.
exampleChinese: 请把那支红笔递给我。

meaning: n. ⼿册，说明书
example: I keep the handbook on my desk.
exampleChinese: 我把手册放在书桌上。

meaning: n. ⼀把 (的量)；少数；难管的⼈
example: Only a handful of students stayed after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后只有少数学生留下来。

meaning: vt. 处理，应付；触，拿；驾驭 n. 把⼿；柄，把
example: Please handle the glass jar carefully.
exampleChinese: 请小心拿这个玻璃罐。

meaning: adj. 有⽤的，⽅便的；⼿边的；⼿巧的
example: This small bag is handy for travel.
exampleChinese: 这个小包旅行时很方便。

meaning: vt. vi. 悬挂，吊；(使) 低垂；(被) 绞死 vi. 垂下，垂落；悬浮 (在空中) vt. 挂…装饰；贴 (壁纸)
example: Please hang your coat by the door.
exampleChinese: 请把你的外套挂在门边。

meaning: n. ⽕腿；蹩脚演员
example: He put ham in the sandwich.
exampleChinese: 他在三明治里放了火腿。

meaning: n. 锤⼦；(拍卖⽤) ⽊槌；击铁 vi. vt. (⽤锤⼦) 敲，捶打；反复敲打 vt. 猛踢，猛击；轻易打败
example: He used a hammer to fix the broken chair.
exampleChinese: 他用铁锤修好了那把坏椅子。

meaning: n. 冰，冰块；溜冰场；⼀份冰淇淋 vt. 在 (糕饼上) 加糖霜
example: There is ice on the lake this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早晨湖面上有冰。

meaning: n. 习语，成语
example: The teacher explained the idiom clearly.
exampleChinese: 老师清楚地解释了这个成语。

meaning: adj. 不⼯作的；漫⽆⽬的的；懒散的 vi. 闲荡，⽆所事事 vi. (发动机) 挂空挡
example: The shop was idle on Monday morning.
exampleChinese: 这家商店在周一早上没有营业。

meaning: conj. 如果，假如；当；是否；即使
example: If it rains, we will stay inside.
exampleChinese: 如果下雨，我们就待在室内。

meaning: vt. vi. 点燃，(使) 燃烧 vt. 激起，引发
example: A spark can ignite the dry grass.
exampleChinese: 一个火星就能点燃干草。

meaning: adj. ⾮法的，违反规则的 n. ⾮法移⺠
example: It is illegal to park here.
exampleChinese: 在这里停车是违法的。

meaning: adj. ⽂盲的；外⾏的 n. ⽂盲
example: He felt illiterate in the new computer class.
exampleChinese: 在新的电脑课上，他觉得自己像个外行。

meaning: vt. 照亮，照明，照射；阐释，说明
example: The lamp will illuminate the dark hallway.
exampleChinese: 这盏灯会照亮黑暗的走廊。

meaning: n. 果酱；拥挤；卡住 vt. vi. (使) 卡住；塞进；即兴演奏 vt. (⽆线电) ⼲扰；⽤⼒推挤；挤满
example: I like toast with jam for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐喜欢吃涂了果酱的烤面包。

meaning: n. ⾏话，⾏业术语
example: The manual is full of technical jargon.
exampleChinese: 这本手册里满是专业术语。

meaning: n. 颌；下巴；⼝部，嘴 vi. 喋喋不休
example: He clenched his jaw when he was angry.
exampleChinese: 他生气时咬紧了下颌。

meaning: adj. 嫉妒的，吃醋的；⼩⼼守护的
example: She felt jealous when her friend got the prize.
exampleChinese: 当朋友得奖时，她感到嫉妒。

meaning: n. 喷⽓式⻜机；喷射流；⿊⽟ vi. 乘坐⻜机旅⾏ vi. vt. 喷射，喷出
example: A jet of water shot across the garden.
exampleChinese: 一道水柱喷射到花园里。

meaning: n. 宝⽯；珠宝，⾸饰；珍贵的东西
example: She wore a jewel on her necklace.
exampleChinese: 她在项链上戴着一颗宝石。

meaning: n. 珠宝，⾸饰
example: Her jewellery was kept in a small box.
exampleChinese: 她的珠宝首饰放在一个小盒子里。

meaning: adj. 裸体的；⽆遮盖的；毫不掩饰的
example: The baby was naked after the bath.
exampleChinese: 婴儿洗完澡后是光着身子的。

meaning: n. 钉，钉⼦；指甲，趾甲 vt. 钉牢；抓住并证明有罪；揭发
example: He used a hammer to nail the board to the wall.
exampleChinese: 他用锤子把木板钉到墙上。

meaning: adj. 幼稚的；天真的，率直的
example: It was naive to trust a stranger so quickly.
exampleChinese: 这么快就相信陌生人是很天真的。

meaning: adv. 即，也就是
example: There are two main causes, namely, hunger and poverty.
exampleChinese: 有两个主要原因，即饥饿和贫困。

meaning: n. ⼩睡，打盹；绒⽑ vi. ⼩睡，打盹
example: The cat took a nap on the sofa.
exampleChinese: 那只猫在沙发上打了个盹。

meaning: adj. 顽⽪的，淘⽓的；(书等) 下流的
example: The naughty boy hid his sister's pencil.
exampleChinese: 那个淘气的男孩把妹妹的铅笔藏了起来。

meaning: adj. 渴望的；热情的；(对…) 着迷的 adj. 机智的；强烈的；灵敏的 vi. (为死者) 恸哭
example: He is keen to help with the school show.
exampleChinese: 他很热心帮忙筹备学校演出。

meaning: n. 键盘；琴键；键盘乐器
example: I spilled juice on my keyboard.
exampleChinese: 我把果汁洒在了我的键盘上。

meaning: n. 劳动；劳动⼒；分娩；英国⼯党 vi. 努⼒做；⼲苦⼒活
example: Farm labour is hard work.
exampleChinese: 农场劳动力工作很辛苦。

meaning: n. 蕾丝，花边；鞋带，系带 vi. vt. (把…) ⽤带⼦系牢 vt. 给…掺 (酒或药等)；在…⾥夹杂
example: Her dress was trimmed with white lace.
exampleChinese: 她的连衣裙镶着白色花边。

meaning: n. 缺乏，不⾜ vt. 缺少，⽋缺
example: We lack time to finish the project today.
exampleChinese: 我们今天缺乏时间完成这个项目。

meaning: n. ⼩伙⼦，少年；哥们⼉；⻢夫
example: The lad helped his father carry the bags.
exampleChinese: 那个小伙子帮他父亲拎包。

example: The little lamb followed its mother.
exampleChinese: 小羊羔跟着它的妈妈。

meaning: adj. 瘸的；⽆说服⼒的；差劲的 vt. 使 (⼈或动物) 跛，使残废
example: After the accident, he walked with a lame leg.
exampleChinese: 事故后，他的一条腿跛了。

meaning: n. 机器；核⼼集团；机器般的⼈ vt. vi. (⽤机器) 制造，加⼯成型
example: This machine can wash clothes quickly.
exampleChinese: 这台机器可以很快洗衣服。

meaning: n. (统称) 机器；(国家) 机构，机制
example: The factory uses modern machinery to make parts quickly.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂用现代机器快速制造零件。

meaning: adj. 疯的；愤怒的；痴迷的；激动的
example: Dad was mad about the broken window.
exampleChinese: 爸爸因为窗户破了很生气。

example: Excuse me, madam, you dropped your glove.
exampleChinese: 打扰了，夫人，您掉了手套。

meaning: n. 魔法，法术；魔术；魔⼒，魅⼒ adj. 有魔⼒的；神奇的；好极了 vt. ⽤魔法变出或使消失
example: The trick looked like magic to me.
exampleChinese: 那个戏法在我看来像魔术一样。

meaning: n. 地⽅执法官
example: The magistrate listened carefully to both sides.
exampleChinese: 那位地方执法官仔细听取了双方的意见。

meaning: n. 磁铁，磁体；有吸引⼒的⼈或物
example: A magnet can attract small iron nails.
exampleChinese: 磁铁可以吸引小铁钉。

meaning: adj. 磁铁的，磁性的；有吸引⼒的
example: The magnetic lock opened with a card.
exampleChinese: 这个磁性锁用卡片就能打开。

meaning: n. 少⼥，姑娘 adj. 初次的，⾸次的
example: The maiden smiled at the crowd.
exampleChinese: 那位少女朝人群微笑。

meaning: adj. 主要的，最重要的 n. 主管道，⼲线电缆
example: The main reason was the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 主要原因是大雨。

meaning: n. ⼤陆 adj. ⼤陆的
example: They moved back to the mainland last year.
exampleChinese: 他们去年搬回了大陆。

meaning: n. 船桨，桨
example: He rowed the boat with one oar.
exampleChinese: 他用一只船桨划船。

meaning: n. 宣誓，誓⾔；咒骂，诅咒的话
example: He swore an oath to tell the truth.
exampleChinese: 他发誓要说真话。

meaning: n. 服从，驯服
example: The dog learned obedience quickly.
exampleChinese: 这只狗很快学会了服从。

meaning: adj. 服从的，顺从的，温驯的
example: The puppy is obedient and quiet.
exampleChinese: 这只小狗很听话，也很安静。

meaning: vt. vi. 服从，听从，遵守
example: Students must obey the school rules.
exampleChinese: 学生必须遵守校规。

meaning: n. 肥胖 (症)
example: Too much sugar can lead to obesity.
exampleChinese: 摄入过多糖分会导致肥胖。

meaning: vi. vt. 收拾 (⾏李)；塞进，挤满 vt. 打包，包装；保存，保藏；压实 n. (商品的) 纸包；背包；⼀群
example: Please pack your books in this box.
exampleChinese: 请把你的书打包放进这个箱子里。

meaning: n. 邮包；包，盒；⼀揽⼦交易 vt. 将…包装好；使改头换⾯
example: A package arrived at our door this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上一个包裹送到了我们门口。

meaning: n. 条约，协定，协议
example: The two countries signed a peace pact.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家签署了和平协定。

meaning: n. 软垫；便笺本；⽖垫；发射台 vi. 蹑⼿蹑脚地⾛ vt. (⽤软材料) 填充，覆盖
example: She put a soft pad on the chair.
exampleChinese: 她在椅子上放了一个软垫。

meaning: n. 船桨；(机具的) 桨状部分 vi. vt. ⽤桨划船 vi. 涉⽔，蹚⽔
example: He used a paddle to stir the thick paint.
exampleChinese: 他用搅拌棒搅拌浓稠的油漆。

meaning: n. 疼痛，痛苦；讨厌的⼈ (或事) vt. 使痛苦，使疼痛
example: I felt a sharp pain in my leg.
exampleChinese: 我感到腿上一阵剧痛。

meaning: adj. 疼痛的；痛苦的
example: He felt painful after the long race.
exampleChinese: 长跑结束后他感到很痛苦。

meaning: n. 油漆；绘画颜料 vt. vi. 在…上刷油漆；(⽤颜料) 画
example: We need to paint the door white.
exampleChinese: 我们需要把门漆成白色。

meaning: n. 画家，绘画者；油漆⼯
example: The painter drew a quiet country road.
exampleChinese: 这位画家画了一条安静的乡间小路。

meaning: n. ⼀双，⼀对，⼀副 vt. 使成对，配对
example: I need a new pair of shoes.
exampleChinese: 我需要一双新鞋。

meaning: adj. (肤⾊) 苍⽩的；浅的；黯淡的 vi. 变得苍⽩；黯然失⾊
example: His face turned pale when he heard the bad news.
exampleChinese: 听到这个坏消息时，他的脸变得苍白。

meaning: n. ⼿掌，⼿⼼；棕榈树 vt. 把…藏在⼿中 (尤指玩戏法)
example: He hid the coin in his palm.
exampleChinese: 他把硬币藏在手心里。

example: The teacher handed out a pamphlet about safety.
exampleChinese: 老师发了一本关于安全的小册子。

meaning: n. 恐慌，惊慌失措；恐慌局⾯ vi. vt. (使) 惊慌失措
example: There was panic when the fire alarm rang.
exampleChinese: 火警响起时，人们一阵恐慌。

meaning: vi. vt. ⽓喘吁吁，喘息
example: After the race, we could only pant for air.
exampleChinese: 比赛后，我们只能喘着气。

meaning: n. 纸；报纸；⽂件；试卷；论⽂
example: She wrote her name on a piece of paper.
exampleChinese: 她把自己的名字写在一张纸上。

meaning: n. 平装书
example: I bought a cheap paperback at the station.
exampleChinese: 我在车站买了一本便宜的平装书。

meaning: n. 降落伞 vi. 跳伞 vt. 伞投，空投
example: The pilot will parachute supplies to the village.
exampleChinese: 飞行员将向村庄空投物资。

meaning: n. (庆祝) 游⾏；检阅，阅兵；⼀系列 vi. 游⾏；招摇过市 vt. 展览，展⽰ vi. vt. (使) 列队⾏进，接受检阅
example: The parade passed through the city center.
exampleChinese: 游行队伍穿过了市中心。

meaning: n. 典范，范例，样式
example: This teaching method became a new paradigm in science.
exampleChinese: 这种教学方法成为科学领域的新典范。

meaning: n. 天堂，乐⼟；伊甸园
example: The quiet lake looked like paradise at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时分，宁静的湖面看起来像天堂一样。

meaning: n. ⽭盾的⼈ (或事物)；悖论
example: It is a paradox that the busiest people often have the most free time.
exampleChinese: 最忙的人往往有最多空闲时间，这是一种矛盾。

meaning: n. 参数，界限，范围
example: We changed the parameter to make the model work better.
exampleChinese: 我们修改了参数，让模型运行得更好。

meaning: n. 寄⽣⾍，寄⽣动植物
example: A parasite can live on another animal for food.
exampleChinese: 寄生虫可以靠另一种动物获取食物而生存。

meaning: n. 包裹，邮包；⼀块地
example: He carried the parcel to the front door.
exampleChinese: 他把包裹送到前门。

meaning: int. 请再说⼀遍；抱歉 n. 赦免；原谅 vt. 赦免；原谅
example: He asked for her pardon after the mistake.
exampleChinese: 犯错后他请求她的原谅。

meaning: n. 议会，国会
example: The parliament passed a new law last week.
exampleChinese: 议会在上周通过了一项新法律。

meaning: n. ⿇袋；⼀满袋；开除；劫掠；床 vt. 解雇；劫掠
example: He packed his clothes into a sack.
exampleChinese: 他把衣服装进了麻袋里。

meaning: adj. 上帝的，神圣的；受尊重的
example: This temple is a sacred place.
exampleChinese: 这座寺庙是一个神圣的地方。

meaning: n. 牺牲，献出；献祭，祭品 vt. 牺牲，献出 vt. vi. 献祭
example: He made a sacrifice for his team.
exampleChinese: 他为了团队做出了牺牲。

meaning: n. ⻢鞍；⻋座；脊⾁ vt. vi. 给…配鞍；使肩负重担
example: She put the saddle on the horse before the ride.
exampleChinese: 骑马前，她把马鞍放到了马背上。

meaning: n. 样本，样品；(化验的) 取样 vt. 品尝；抽样检验；选录
example: Please take a sample of the water for testing.
exampleChinese: 请取一份水样进行检测。

meaning: n. 制裁；许可，批准；处罚 vt. 许可，准许；惩罚，实施制裁
example: The manager will sanction the project tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 经理明天会批准这个项目。

meaning: n. 三明治 vt. 在…中夹⼊
example: I ate a sandwich for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了一个三明治。

meaning: adj. ⼼智健全的；明智的，理智的
example: I want to stay sane during this busy week.
exampleChinese: 我想在这个忙碌的星期里保持清醒理智。

meaning: adj. 讽刺的，挖苦的
example: Her sarcastic comment made everyone feel awkward.
exampleChinese: 她讽刺的话让每个人都感到很尴尬。

meaning: n. ⼈造卫星；卫星；卫星国
example: A satellite sent back clear pictures of Earth.
exampleChinese: 一颗卫星发回了地球的清晰照片。

meaning: adj. 丑陋的，难看的；令⼈不快的
example: The wall looked ugly after the paint peeled off.
exampleChinese: 油漆脱落后，这面墙看起来很丑。

meaning: adj. 紫外线的，利⽤紫外线的
example: Ultraviolet light can help kill germs.
exampleChinese: 紫外线可以帮助杀死细菌。

meaning: n. 伞；综合体；保护伞
example: She took an umbrella because it was raining.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，她带了一把雨伞。

meaning: adj. ⼀致通过的；意⻅⼀致的
example: The vote was unanimous in the end.
exampleChinese: 最后投票结果一致通过。

meaning: vt. 揭露，发现；揭开…的盖⼦
example: The reporter will uncover the truth behind the story.
exampleChinese: 记者会揭露这个故事背后的真相。

meaning: adj. 空的；(职位) 空缺的；茫然的
example: There is a vacant seat by the window.
exampleChinese: 窗边有一个空座位。

meaning: n. 假期；度假 vi. 度假
example: We went to the beach during summer vacation.
exampleChinese: 我们暑假去了海边。

meaning: n. 疫苗
example: The doctor gave him a vaccine to protect him from illness.
exampleChinese: 医生给他接种了疫苗，以保护他免受疾病侵害。

meaning: n. 真空；空虚，空⽩；真空吸尘器 vt. vi. ⽤真空吸尘器打扫
example: The room felt empty, like a vacuum.
exampleChinese: 这个房间空荡荡的，像一片真空。

meaning: n. 阀⻔，⽓⻔；瓣膜；(乐器) 阀键
example: A valve controls the flow of water.
exampleChinese: 阀门控制着水流。

meaning: n. 四轮运货⻢⻋；(⽕⻋)货⻋⻋厢
example: The wagon carried tools across the farm.
exampleChinese: 这辆四轮货车把工具运过了农场。

meaning: n. 腰，腰部；(⾐服的) 腰部
example: He tied a belt around his waist.
exampleChinese: 他在腰上系了一条皮带。

meaning: vi. vt. 醒，唤醒 vt. 唤起 (记忆) n. 守灵；(船的) 航迹
example: I usually wake at six on school days.
exampleChinese: 上学日我通常六点醒来。

meaning: vi. vt. 醒来，唤醒
example: I waken early when the birds start singing.
exampleChinese: 当鸟儿开始歌唱时，我就醒得很早。

meaning: n. X 射线；X 光照⽚；X 光检查 vt. 对…进⾏ X 光检查
example: The doctor ordered an x-ray exam for my arm.
exampleChinese: 医生让我给胳膊做一次X射线检查。

meaning: n. 码；院⼦，庭院；场地
example: The kids are playing in the yard.
exampleChinese: 孩子们正在院子里玩。

meaning: vi. 打哈⽋；(开⼝、洞⽳等) 豁开 n. 哈⽋；乏味的事情，⽆趣的想法
example: She gave a big yawn before bed.
exampleChinese: 她在睡前打了一个大哈欠。

meaning: adj. ⼀年⼀度的；年度的 adv. 年度地
example: The club holds a yearly science fair in May.
exampleChinese: 俱乐部每年五月都会举办一次科学展览会。

meaning: vi. vt. ⼤喊，吼叫 n. ⼤喊，吼叫
example: The kids began to yell when the game ended.
exampleChinese: 比赛结束时，孩子们开始大喊。

meaning: adv. 还没；⻢上；还；迄今为⽌ conj. 但是，然⽽
example: I haven't finished my homework yet.
exampleChinese: 我还没有完成作业。

meaning: n. 热情，激情，热忱
example: She studied with great zeal for the exam.
exampleChinese: 她怀着极大的热情为考试学习。

meaning: num. 零；毫⽆，最低程度 vt. 将 (测量仪器等) 调到零
example: The answer is zero.
exampleChinese: 答案是零。

meaning: n. 拉链，拉锁；速度，能量；零 vt. 拉上拉链 vi. vt. (使沿某⽅向) 快速移动
example: Pull the zip up before you go outside.
exampleChinese: 出门前把拉链拉上。

meaning: n. 代理机构；(政府的) 专⻔机构
example: The travel agency helped us book the trip.
exampleChinese: 这家旅行代理帮我们预订了行程。

meaning: n. 议事⽇程；待办事项；隐秘意图
example: The teacher wrote the agenda on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师把议程写在了黑板上。

meaning: n. 极度痛苦，剧痛
example: He was in agony after he twisted his ankle.
exampleChinese: 他扭伤脚踝后疼得厉害。

meaning: n. 洗澡；浴缸；浴室 vt. 给…洗澡
example: I took a bath before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我在晚饭前洗了个澡。

meaning: vi. vt. 洗澡，给…洗澡 vt. 清洗 (伤⼝等)；使沐浴在光中 vi. (到海、河、湖等中) 游泳消遣
example: You can bathe in warm water after the walk.
exampleChinese: 散步后你可以在温水里洗澡。

meaning: n. ⼀批，⼀组；⼀批⽣产量
example: The bakery made a fresh batch of bread this morning.
exampleChinese: 这家面包店今天早上做了一批新鲜面包。

meaning: vt. 使熟悉，使了解
example: I will acquaint you with the school rules.
exampleChinese: 我会让你熟悉校规。

meaning: n. 认识的⼈，泛泛之交；交情；了解
example: He is only an acquaintance, not a close friend.
exampleChinese: 他只是个熟人，不是亲密朋友。

meaning: adv. prep. 穿过，从⼀边到另⼀边；在 对⾯ prep. 遍及
example: We walked across the bridge together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走过了那座桥。

meaning: n. 满⾜，满意；妥善处理，补偿
example: Her hard work gave her great satisfaction.
exampleChinese: 她的努力工作让她感到很满足。

meaning: adj. 令⼈满意的，够好的
example: The teacher gave a satisfactory answer to our question.
exampleChinese: 老师对我们的问题给出了令人满意的答案。

meaning: vt. 使满意；满⾜
example: This meal will satisfy your hunger.
exampleChinese: 这顿饭会满足你的饥饿感。

meaning: n. 讽刺，讽刺作品
example: The play is a satire on modern life.
exampleChinese: 这部剧是对现代生活的讽刺。

meaning: vt. 浸透，渗透；使饱和，使充斥
example: The sponge can saturate the floor with water.
exampleChinese: 海绵会把地板浸满水。

meaning: n. 调味汁，酱汁
example: This pasta tastes better with tomato sauce.
exampleChinese: 这意大利面配番茄沙司更好吃。

meaning: n. 茶碟，茶托
example: She placed the cup on a saucer.
exampleChinese: 她把杯子放在茶托上。

meaning: n. ⾹肠，腊肠
example: He ate a sausage for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 他早餐吃了一根香肠。

meaning: n. 锯⼦ vi. vt. 锯
example: He used a saw to cut the wood.
exampleChinese: 他用锯子锯木头。

meaning: vt. 扫描；细看，审视 vt. vi. 粗略地读，浏览，翻阅 n. (医疗) 扫描检查；浏览
example: Please scan the QR code to pay.
exampleChinese: 请扫描二维码付款。

meaning: n. 丑闻，丑⾏；流⾔蜚语
example: The scandal shocked everyone in the town.
exampleChinese: 这桩丑闻震惊了镇上的每个人。

meaning: n. 伤疤；(精神) 创伤 vt. 在…上留下疤痕；留下精神创伤
example: The fall left a scar on his knee.
exampleChinese: 那次摔倒在他的膝盖上留下了伤疤。

meaning: adj. 缺乏的，不⾜的，稀少的 adv. 才，勉强
example: Fresh water is scarce in this desert.
exampleChinese: 在这片沙漠里，淡水很缺乏。

meaning: adv. ⼏乎不；刚…就…；⼀定不
example: We scarcely had time to eat lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们几乎没有时间吃午饭。

meaning: vt. 惊吓，使恐惧 vi. 受惊吓，害怕 n. 恐慌；惊吓
example: The loud noise gave me a scare.
exampleChinese: 那巨大的噪音把我吓了一跳。

meaning: n. 围⼱，头⼱，披⼱ vi. vt. 狼吞虎咽
example: She wore a warm scarf in the snow.
exampleChinese: 她在下雪时围着一条暖和的围巾。

meaning: vt. 撒，撒播 vi. vt. (使) 散开，(使) 散布在各处
example: The wind can scatter the leaves across the yard.
exampleChinese: 风会把树叶吹得到院子里到处都是。

meaning: n. 可能发⽣的事，设想；剧情梗概
example: The movie's scenario is simple and easy to follow.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的剧情梗概简单明了。

meaning: n. ⾹味；⽓味；⾹⽔；预感 vt. 闻到；预感到；使具有⾹味
example: I could smell the scent of coffee from the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 我能闻到厨房里咖啡的香味。

meaning: n. 学者；奖学⾦获得者
example: The scholar wrote a book about ancient art.
exampleChinese: 这位学者写了一本关于古代艺术的书。

meaning: n. 奖学⾦；学问，学术研究
example: She won a scholarship to study music abroad.
exampleChinese: 她获得了去国外学习音乐的奖学金。

meaning: n. 学校；学院；系；学派；⻥群 vt. 教育，培养
example: Our school is near the park.
exampleChinese: 我们学校在公园附近。

meaning: n. 平板电脑；药⽚；丸；牌，匾
example: The museum displayed an ancient tablet.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一块古老的碑。

meaning: n. 禁忌，忌讳 adj. 禁忌的，忌讳的
example: In some families, talking about money is still taboo.
exampleChinese: 在一些家庭里，谈论金钱仍然是个禁忌。

meaning: vt. 处理 (难题)；与某⼈交涉；抓获 vt. vi. 抢球，抢断；擒抱摔倒 n. 抢断球；阻截队员；体育器材
example: We need to tackle the problem before it gets worse.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在问题变得更糟之前处理它。

meaning: n. 策略，⼿段；战术，兵法
example: Their tactic was to wait and watch.
exampleChinese: 他们的策略是等待并观察。

meaning: n. 标签；外号，绰号；附加语 vt. 给…加上标签；把…称作
example: Please tag your bag with your name.
exampleChinese: 请给你的包贴上写有名字的标签。

meaning: n. 裁缝 vt. 定做
example: The tailor will tailor the jacket to fit me perfectly.
exampleChinese: 裁缝会把这件夹克剪裁得非常合身。

meaning: n. 故事，传说
example: Grandpa told us a tale about the sea.
exampleChinese: 爷爷给我们讲了一个关于大海的故事。

meaning: adj. 驯化的；乏味的；(⼈) 温顺的 vt. 驯服，使驯化；控制，驾驭
example: The horse is tame and easy to ride.
exampleChinese: 这匹马很温顺，容易骑。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 晒⿊ n. (晒出来的) 棕褐⾊ adj. 棕褐⾊的
example: He got a tan after a week at the beach.
exampleChinese: 他在海滩待了一周后晒黑了。

meaning: adj. 实际的，真实的；有形的
example: The photo gave a tangible sense of the old village.
exampleChinese: 这张照片让人感受到这个老村庄的真实存在。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 缠结在⼀起，(使) 乱成⼀团 n. 缠结的⼀团；混乱，纷乱
example: His long hair began to tangle in the wind.
exampleChinese: 他的长发开始在风中缠结起来。

meaning: n. 箱，罐；坦克 vi. 彻底失败，破产，倒闭 vt. vi. 故意输掉 (⽐赛)
example: They tank the water for the village during dry months.
exampleChinese: 在干旱的月份里，他们把水贮放在罐里供村子使用。

meaning: n. 油轮，油罐⻋
example: The tanker moved slowly through the harbor.
exampleChinese: 油轮缓缓驶过港口。

meaning: n. ⽔⻰头；轻敲，轻拍；电话窃听 vt. vi. 轻敲，轻拍；轻叩；利⽤，发掘 vt. (在电话上) 安装窃听器；委任
example: Please tap the screen to start the game.
exampleChinese: 请轻敲屏幕开始游戏。

meaning: n. 磁带，录像带；㬵带；窄布条 vt. 录⾳，录像；⽤㬵带粘
example: Please use tape to fix the torn page.
exampleChinese: 请用胶带把破掉的书页粘好。

meaning: n. 关税
example: The new tariff made imported toys more expensive.
exampleChinese: 新的关税让进口玩具更贵了。

meaning: n. 税，税款 vt. 对…征税；给…施压
example: The government may tax imported cars.
exampleChinese: 政府可能会对进口汽车征税。

meaning: n. 在校本科⽣，⼤学⽣
example: She is an undergraduate at a university in Beijing.
exampleChinese: 她是北京一所大学的本科生。

meaning: adv. 在地⾯下；秘密地，隐蔽地 adj. 地⾯下的；秘密的，地下的 n. 地铁；反政府地下组织
example: The train goes underground after this station.
exampleChinese: 火车过了这一站后就在地下行驶。

meaning: vt. 逐渐削弱，损害
example: Late-night rumors can undermine trust in a team.
exampleChinese: 深夜的谣言会逐渐削弱团队之间的信任。

meaning: prep. adv. 在…下⾯；在内⼼深处 n. 底层，底部
example: The keys were underneath the sofa.
exampleChinese: 钥匙在沙发下面。

example: We loaded the boxes into the van.
exampleChinese: 我们把箱子装上了货车。

meaning: n. ⾃负，虚荣；梳妆台
example: Her vanity made her care too much about praise.
exampleChinese: 她的虚荣心让她过分在意别人的夸奖。

meaning: n. 蒸⽓，⽔汽
example: Steam turned into vapour above the hot water.
exampleChinese: 热水上方升起了水汽。

meaning: n. 素⻝者 adj. ⽆⾁的，素的
example: My brother is a vegetarian, so he does not eat meat.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥是素食者，所以他不吃肉。

meaning: n. 植被，植物，草⽊
example: The hill was covered with thick vegetation.
exampleChinese: 山坡上覆盖着茂密的植被。

meaning: n. ⻋辆，交通⼯具；⼯具，⼿段
example: That vehicle is too large for this road.
exampleChinese: 那辆车对这条路来说太大了。

meaning: n. 现⾦；⾦钱 vt. 兑现⽀票
example: He paid in cash at the store.
exampleChinese: 他在商店里用现金付款。

meaning: n. 出纳员，收银员 vt. 开除，⾰除 (军职)
example: The cashier gave me the wrong change.
exampleChinese: 收银员找给我的零钱不对。

meaning: n. ⽬录，⽬录册；(坏事) ⼀连串 vt. 将…列⼊⽬录；列举，历数
example: We looked up the book in the catalogue.
exampleChinese: 我们在目录里查找了这本书。

meaning: n. 重⼤灾难，横祸
example: The flood was a catastrophe for the town.
exampleChinese: 那场洪水对小镇来说是一场大灾难。

meaning: adj. 死的；已废弃的；不运⾏的 adv. 完全地；⾮常
example: The plant is dead.
exampleChinese: 这株植物死了。

meaning: n. 最后期限，截⽌时间
example: We finished the project before the deadline.
exampleChinese: 我们在截止期限前完成了项目。

meaning: adj. 致命的；彻底的，⼗⾜的 adv. 彻底地，极其
example: The mountain road was deadly in the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 这条山路在大雨中非常危险，足以致命。

meaning: adj. ⽿聋的；不愿听的，不去注意的
example: My grandfather is deaf in one ear.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷一只耳朵聋了。

meaning: n. 院⻓，系主任；教⻓；泰⽃
example: The dean spoke to the students in the hall.
exampleChinese: 院长在礼堂里对学生们讲话。

meaning: adj. 可⻝⽤的，能吃的 n. ⻝品
example: This soup is made with only edible ingredients.
exampleChinese: 这道汤只用了可食用的食材。

meaning: vt. vi. 编辑，校订 (⽂章等) vt. 编纂，编集；剪辑 (视频) n. 编辑，校订，剪辑
example: Please edit this paragraph for grammar.
exampleChinese: 请编辑这段文字，检查语法。

meaning: n. 版本；版次；(节⽬) ⼀期
example: This is the latest edition of the book.
exampleChinese: 这是这本书的最新版本。

meaning: n. 主编，编辑；校订者；剪辑师
example: The editor checked the article carefully.
exampleChinese: 编辑仔细检查了这篇文章。

meaning: n. (报纸的) 社论 adj. 编辑的，主编的，编者的
example: The newspaper printed an editorial about school safety.
exampleChinese: 这家报纸刊登了一篇关于校园安全的社论。

meaning: adj. 假装的；假的，伪造的 n. 假货，赝品；冒充者 vt. 伪造，冒充 vt. vi. 假装，装出
example: The bag was fake, but it looked real.
exampleChinese: 这个包是假的，但看起来很真。

meaning: adj. 错误的；虚假的，伪造的
example: The rumor was FALSE.
exampleChinese: 这个谣言是错误的。

meaning: n. 名声，名⽓，声望
example: She became famous, but fame did not make her happy.
exampleChinese: 她成名了，但名声并没有让她快乐。

meaning: adj. 熟悉的；对…熟知的；随便的
example: This song sounds familiar to me.
exampleChinese: 这首歌我听着很熟悉。

meaning: n. 家庭，家族；(动植物) 科 adj. 家庭的，适合全家的
example: My family eats dinner together every night.
exampleChinese: 我家人每天晚上一起吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 饥荒
example: The drought caused a famine in the region.
exampleChinese: 这场旱灾给该地区造成了饥荒。

meaning: adj. 极好的；极⼤的；奇异的，荒诞的
example: The story has a fantastic creature in it.
exampleChinese: 这个故事里有一个奇异的生物。

meaning: n. 幻想，想象；幻想作品
example: The movie is a fantasy about a magic kingdom.
exampleChinese: 这部电影是一个关于魔法王国的幻想故事。

meaning: vt. 使安⼼，使消除疑虑
example: Her calm voice helped reassure the child.
exampleChinese: 她平静的声音帮助那个孩子放下心来。

meaning: n. 叛军；叛逆者 vi. 反抗，反对
example: The rebel refused to follow the orders.
exampleChinese: 那个叛逆者拒绝服从命令。

meaning: n. 叛乱；公开反抗；叛逆
example: The rebellion spread quickly through the city.
exampleChinese: 叛乱迅速蔓延到全城。

meaning: vi. 渐渐远离；减弱；(发际线) 后移
example: The smoke began to recede after the fire was put out.
exampleChinese: 大火扑灭后，烟雾开始渐渐散去。

meaning: n. 收据；收到；收⼊
example: Please keep the receipt for your records.
exampleChinese: 请保留收据以备记录。

meaning: n. 接待处；欢迎，接受；接收效果 n. 欢迎会，招待会
example: We waited at the hotel reception.
exampleChinese: 我们在酒店接待处等候。

meaning: n. 经济衰退，经济不景⽓
example: The company suffered during the recession.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在经济衰退期间受到了影响。

meaning: n. ⻝谱，烹饪法；原因，秘诀
example: This recipe uses only five simple ingredients.
exampleChinese: 这个食谱只用五种简单的食材。

meaning: n. 接受者，领受⼈
example: The recipient signed the form at the desk.
exampleChinese: 接受者在桌前签了表格。

meaning: adj. 互惠的，相互的
example: We need a reciprocal agreement that helps both sides.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一份对双方都有利的互惠协议。

meaning: vt. vi. 朗诵，背诵 vt. (⼝头) 列举，逐⼀详述
example: She can recite the poem from memory.
exampleChinese: 她能把这首诗背诵出来。

meaning: vi. 抽噎，啜泣 vt. 呜咽着说，哭诉 n. 啜泣 (声)
example: The little boy began to sob after he fell.
exampleChinese: 那个小男孩摔倒后开始啜泣。

meaning: adj. 未醉的，清醒的；冷静的；素净的 vt. vi. (使) 冷静，(使) 严肃
example: After the long trip, he felt sober and tired.
exampleChinese: 长途旅行后，他感到清醒而疲惫。

meaning: n. 软件
example: This software helps me edit photos.
exampleChinese: 这个软件帮助我编辑照片。

meaning: n. ⼟壤，⼟地；国⼟，领⼟ vt. 弄脏，玷污
example: Rain can soil your shoes on this muddy road.
exampleChinese: 这条泥泞的路上，雨水会弄脏你的鞋子。

meaning: adj. 太阳的；太阳能的
example: We installed solar panels on the roof.
exampleChinese: 我们在屋顶安装了太阳能板。

meaning: adj. 唯⼀的，仅有的；独占的 n. 脚掌；鞋底，袜底；⽐⽬⻥
example: She had only one sole reason to stay.
exampleChinese: 她留下来的唯一理由只有一个。

meaning: adj. 严肃的；郑重的；庄严的
example: The class stood in solemn silence.
exampleChinese: 全班庄严地静立着。

meaning: adj. 固体的；坚固的，坚实的；连续的 n. 固体；⽴体图形
example: Ice is a solid at low temperatures.
exampleChinese: 冰在低温下是固体。

meaning: n. 团结⼀致，相互⽀持
example: The students showed solidarity with their teacher.
exampleChinese: 学生们对老师表现出团结支持。

meaning: n. 独唱，独奏，独舞；单⼈活动 adj. 独⾃的，单独的；独唱的，独奏的 adv. 独⾃地，单独地；独唱地，独奏地 vi. 独唱，独奏；单独进⾏
example: She sang a solo at the school concert.
exampleChinese: 她在学校音乐会上独唱了一首歌。

meaning: adv. 有点⼉，有些，有⼏分
example: It is somewhat difficult, but I can finish it.
exampleChinese: 这有点儿难，但我能完成。

meaning: n. 等级制度；掌权集团；等级体系
example: The company has a strict hierarchy.
exampleChinese: 这家公司有严格的等级制度。

meaning: vt. 劫持 (⻜机、⻋辆等)；控制，操纵 n. (⻜机、⻋辆等的) 劫持事件
example: The thieves tried to hijack the truck.
exampleChinese: 小偷试图劫持那辆卡车。

meaning: n. 远⾜，徒步旅⾏；(价格等) 猛增 vi. vt. 去…远⾜，徒步旅⾏ vt. ⼤幅提⾼ (价格等)
example: We went on a hike in the mountains.
exampleChinese: 我们去山里徒步旅行了。

meaning: adj. 历史的，历史上的；基于史实的
example: The film is based on historical events.
exampleChinese: 这部电影以历史事件为基础。

meaning: n. 历史学家
example: A historian wrote this book about the ancient city.
exampleChinese: 一位历史学家写了这本关于古城的书。

meaning: n. 铰链，合⻚ vt. 给 (⻔、盖等) 装铰链
example: The door is held by a metal hinge.
exampleChinese: 这扇门由一个金属铰链固定。

meaning: n. 髋，臀部；野蔷薇果 adj. 新潮的，赶时髦的
example: She wore a hip jacket to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件时髦的夹克去参加聚会。

meaning: vt. 租⽤，租借；临时雇⽤ vt. vi. 聘⽤，录⽤ n. 租⽤，租借；新员⼯
example: They hire extra workers during the holiday season.
exampleChinese: 他们在假期期间雇用额外工人。

meaning: vt. 插⼊，嵌⼊；(在⽂本中) 插⼊ n. (杂志等的) ⼴告插⻚；插⼊物
example: Please insert the card into the machine.
exampleChinese: 请把卡插入机器里。

meaning: adv. prep. 在…⾥，向…内 prep. 少于 (某时间) n. ⾥⾯，内部，内侧 adj. 内部的，⾥⾯的；内幕的
example: The keys are inside the drawer.
exampleChinese: 钥匙在抽屉里面。

meaning: n. 深刻⻅解，洞悉；洞察⼒
example: Her insight helped the team solve the problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 她的深刻见解帮助团队很快解决了这个问题。

meaning: vt. vi. 坚持，坚决要求；坚称
example: They insist on paying for the meal.
exampleChinese: 他们坚持为这顿饭付钱。

meaning: vt. 检查，审视；视察，检阅
example: The teacher will inspect our science project.
exampleChinese: 老师会检查我们的科学项目。

meaning: n. 灵感；灵感来源；⿎舞⼈⼼的⼈
example: His teacher was a great inspiration to him.
exampleChinese: 他的老师给了他很大的鼓舞。

meaning: vt. 激励，⿎舞；赋予灵感；激起
example: Good teachers inspire students to try new things.
exampleChinese: 好老师能激发学生尝试新事物。

meaning: vt. 舔；轻松战胜，轻易对付 vt. vi. (⽕焰) 轻轻触及 (某物) n. 舔；⼀点⼉ (涂料)
example: The cat can lick the milk from the bowl.
exampleChinese: 这只猫可以把碗里的牛奶舔干净。

meaning: n. 盖，盖⼦
example: Please put the lid on the jar.
exampleChinese: 请把盖子盖在罐子上。

meaning: vi. 躺；平放；位于；在于；说谎 n. 谎⾔，假话
example: I like to lie on the grass and read.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢躺在草地上看书。

example: Clean water is important for life.
exampleChinese: 干净的水对生命很重要。

meaning: n. ⼀⽣，存在期，使⽤期
example: This painting is a lifetime treasure.
exampleChinese: 这幅画是一件一生珍藏的宝物。

meaning: vt. vi. (被) 提起；⾼兴起来；(使) 增⻓ vt. 移开；空运；解除 (限制)；偷盗 vi. 消散，消失 n. 电梯；搭便⻋；提，抬，举
example: We took the lift to the fifth floor.
exampleChinese: 我们乘电梯到了五楼。

meaning: n. 商品，货品 vt. 推销，(运⽤⼴告等进⾏) 销售
example: The store sells local merchandise at low prices.
exampleChinese: 这家商店以低价出售当地商品。

meaning: n. 商⼈，批发商 adj. 海上货运的，商船的
example: The merchant sold tea in the busy market.
exampleChinese: 那个商人在热闹的市场上卖茶。

meaning: n. 汞，⽔银
example: Mercury is a liquid metal at room temperature.
exampleChinese: 汞在室温下是一种液态金属。

meaning: n. 仁慈，宽恕；幸运，恩惠
example: The judge showed mercy to the child.
exampleChinese: 法官对那个孩子表现出宽容。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 合并 vi. 渐渐消失于…，逐渐融⼊…
example: The two companies will merge next month.
exampleChinese: 这两家公司下个月将合并。

meaning: n. 优秀品质，价值；优点，⻓处 vt. 值得，应受到
example: The report has merit because it uses real data.
exampleChinese: 这份报告有价值，因为它使用了真实数据。

meaning: adj. 欢乐的，愉快的
example: The children felt merry at the party.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在聚会上很愉快。

meaning: n. ⾦属
example: This spoon is made of metal.
exampleChinese: 这个勺子是金属做的。

meaning: n. ⽐喻，暗喻
example: The teacher used a metaphor to explain the idea.
exampleChinese: 老师用一个比喻来解释这个想法。

meaning: n. ⽶；计量器，计量表；格律 vt. ⽤仪表测量
example: The table is about one meter long.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子大约有一米长。

meaning: adj. ⽶制的，公制的 n. 度量⼯具，衡量指标
example: This chart uses a metric system.
exampleChinese: 这张图表使用的是公制系统。

meaning: adj. ⼤城市的，⼤都会的
example: They moved to a metropolitan area for work.
exampleChinese: 他们为了工作搬到一个大都市地区。

meaning: pron. 全⽆，⼀个都没有 adv. 绝不，不怎么
example: None of the answers was correct.
exampleChinese: 这些答案没有一个是正确的。

meaning: n. 胡说；愚蠢的举动；⽆意义的话
example: That excuse is nonsense.
exampleChinese: 那个借口简直是胡说。

meaning: adj. ⼝头的；⼝腔的，⼝的 n. ⼝试
example: The oral test starts at nine.
exampleChinese: 口试九点开始。

meaning: n. (天体等的) 运⾏轨道；影响范围 vt. vi. 环绕…的轨道运⾏
example: The moon goes around Earth in orbit.
exampleChinese: 月球沿着轨道绕地球运行。

meaning: n. 顺序；条理；秩序；命令；订单 vt. 命令；订购；安排，整理 vt. vi. 点餐
example: The captain gave the order to move.
exampleChinese: 队长下令移动。

meaning: adj. 整洁的，有条理的；有秩序的 n. (医院) 勤杂⼯，护理员；勤务兵
example: Please keep your desk orderly.
exampleChinese: 请把你的书桌整理得整整齐齐。

meaning: adj. 普通的，平常的，平凡的；平庸的
example: Her life seemed ordinary, but she had a kind heart.
exampleChinese: 她的生活看起来很普通，但她有一颗善良的心。

meaning: vt. 使朝向，针对；确定⽅位；使适应 n. 东⽅ (指东亚地区)
example: The map will orient you toward the north.
exampleChinese: 这张地图会帮你确定北方方向。

meaning: adj. 东⽅的，东亚的
example: She wore an oriental dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿了一件东方风格的连衣裙去参加派对。

meaning: n. ⽅向，定位；取向；迎新，培训
example: The school held an orientation for new students.
exampleChinese: 学校为新生举行了迎新活动。

meaning: n. 流⾏⾳乐；砰的⼀声；汽⽔；爸 vi. vt. (使) 发砰砰声；(使) 爆裂 vi. (突然地) 去；突然出现；(⽿) 胀 adj. 流⾏的，通俗的
example: A rabbit will pop out of the box.
exampleChinese: 一只兔子会突然从盒子里跳出来。

meaning: n. 教皇
example: The pope gave a short speech to the crowd.
exampleChinese: 教皇向人群发表了简短讲话。

meaning: adj. 流⾏的，受欢迎的；⼤众 (化) 的
example: That singer is very popular with teenagers.
exampleChinese: 那位歌手很受青少年欢迎。

meaning: n. 瓷，瓷器
example: This porcelain cup is very delicate.
exampleChinese: 这个瓷杯非常精致。

meaning: adj. 轻便的，⼿提式的 n. 便携设备，(尤指) ⼿提电脑
example: This portable speaker fits in my backpack.
exampleChinese: 这台便携式扬声器能放进我的背包里。

meaning: n. ⾏李员，搬运⼯；⻔房；乘务员
example: The porter carried our bags to the room.
exampleChinese: 门房把我们的行李送到了房间。

meaning: n. ⽂件夹；作品集；投资组合
example: She keeps all her drawings in a portfolio.
exampleChinese: 她把所有画作都放在一个文件夹里。

meaning: n. 肖像，半⾝画像；详细的描述 adj. (⽂件⻚⾯) 竖式的
example: The portrait shows a young girl smiling.
exampleChinese: 这幅肖像画描绘的是一个微笑的小女孩。

meaning: vt. 将…表现成；描绘，描写；扮演
example: The movie will portray the war in a realistic way.
exampleChinese: 这部电影将以真实的方式描绘这场战争。

meaning: n. 邮政；邮件；职位；哨所 n. 帖⼦，博⽂；柱，杆，桩 vt. 邮寄；派驻；张贴，公布 vt. vi. (在⽹站上) 发布
example: Please post the notice on the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把通知张贴在墙上。

meaning: n. 邮费，邮资
example: The postage for this letter is high.
exampleChinese: 这封信的邮资很高。

meaning: n. 海报，⼤幅⼴告
example: There is a concert poster on the wall.
exampleChinese: 墙上有一张音乐会招贴。

meaning: n. 邮递员，邮差
example: The postman brought a letter this morning.
exampleChinese: 邮递员今天早上送来了一封信。

meaning: vt. 推迟，延缓
example: We will postpone the meeting until Monday.
exampleChinese: 我们会把会议推迟到星期一。

meaning: n. 姿态，姿势；态度，⽴场 vi. 装腔作势
example: She kept a straight posture during the photo.
exampleChinese: 她拍照时一直保持着端正的姿势。

meaning: n. 残余部分
example: Only a remnant of snow was left on the hill.
exampleChinese: 山上只剩下一点残雪。

meaning: n. ⽂艺复兴 (时期)；重新流⾏
example: The city saw a renaissance of street art.
exampleChinese: 这座城市的街头艺术重新流行起来。

meaning: vt. 延⻓，使续期；重新开始；更换
example: You can renew your library card online.
exampleChinese: 你可以在网上续办图书卡。

meaning: vt. 修复，改造，翻新
example: They will renovate the old school next year.
exampleChinese: 他们明年将翻新这所老学校。

meaning: vt. vi. 租⽤，租借 vt. 出租 n. 租⾦，租⽤费
example: My family will rent a small apartment near the school.
exampleChinese: 我家要在学校附近租一套小公寓。

meaning: vt. 修理，修补；补救，弥补 n. 修理，修补
example: Can you repair my broken clock?
exampleChinese: 你能修理我坏掉的钟吗？

meaning: vt. 偿还，偿付；报答，回报
example: I will repay the loan next month.
exampleChinese: 我下个月会偿还这笔贷款。

meaning: vt. 重复，重写；转告；跟读 vt. vi. 重做，重复；再次发⽣ n. 重播的节⽬；重演的事件
example: Please repeat the last sentence.
exampleChinese: 请重复最后一句话。

meaning: adv. 重复地，再三地
example: He asked repeatedly for the same answer.
exampleChinese: 他一再要求同样的答案。

meaning: vt. 驱逐，赶⾛；使厌恶，使反感 vi. vt. (磁极等) 排斥，相斥
example: The smell of smoke can repel some insects.
exampleChinese: 烟味可以驱赶一些昆虫。

meaning: n. 全部节⽬，曲⽬；全部技能
example: Her repertoire includes songs, dances, and jokes.
exampleChinese: 她的节目单包括歌曲、舞蹈和笑话。

meaning: n. 重复；重复的事物
example: Too much repetition made the lesson boring.
exampleChinese: 过多的重复让这节课很无聊。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 疲劳，疲倦 n. 轮胎
example: My eyes tire after too much reading.
exampleChinese: 读太久后，我的眼睛会疲劳。

meaning: adj. 令⼈厌倦的，讨厌的
example: The long meeting was tiresome for everyone.
exampleChinese: 这场冗长的会议让每个人都觉得很烦人。

meaning: n. 纸⼱；(动植物的) 组织；薄纸
example: This tissue is too thin to use as a bandage.
exampleChinese: 这种纸巾太薄，不能当绷带用。

meaning: vi. 苦⼲，⾟勤劳作；跋涉 n. 苦⼯，劳累的⼯作
example: We had to toil through the muddy field.
exampleChinese: 我们不得不艰难地穿过那片泥泞的田地。

example: The knife blade was very sharp.
exampleChinese: 这把刀的刀刃非常锋利。

meaning: vt. 责怪，把…归咎于 n. (坏事或错事的) 责任，责备
example: Please don't blame yourself for the mistake.
exampleChinese: 请不要为这个错误责备自己。

meaning: n. 爆炸，⽓浪；强劲的⽓流；响声 vi. vt. 炸毁，爆破；发出刺⽿的⾼⾳ vt. 严厉批评；猛击；向…喷射
example: A loud blast shook the windows.
exampleChinese: 一声巨响震动了窗户。

meaning: n. ⽕灾，烈⽕；光辉，闪耀；迸发 vi. 熊熊燃烧；闪耀；怒视
example: The fire will blaze all night.
exampleChinese: 火焰会整夜熊熊燃烧。

meaning: vi. 跳跃；快速前往；换来换去 vt. 登上 (⻜机、汽⻋、⽕⻋等) n. 跳跃；短途旅⾏；啤酒花；舞会
example: We can hop on the bus and go downtown.
exampleChinese: 我们可以跳上公交车去市中心。

meaning: n. 钩，挂钩，⻥钩；勾拳；诱饵 vi. vt. (使) 钩住，挂住 vt. 钓 (⻥)；吸引
example: Hang your bag on the hook by the door.
exampleChinese: 把你的包挂在门边的挂钩上。

meaning: n. 激素，荷尔蒙
example: Hormone levels can change during puberty.
exampleChinese: 青春期时激素水平会发生变化。

meaning: n. (动物的) ⻆；(乐器) 号；喇叭
example: The horn sounded at the crossing.
exampleChinese: 十字路口响起了喇叭声。

meaning: adj. 糟透的；可怕的；不友好的
example: The noise from the factory was horrible.
exampleChinese: 工厂传来的噪音很可怕。

meaning: n. 震惊，恐惧；恐怖故事 (或电影等)
example: The horror in the movie made her cover her eyes.
exampleChinese: 电影里的恐怖场面让她捂住了眼睛。

meaning: n. ⻢⼒ (引擎的功率单位)
example: This engine has enough horsepower for a small boat.
exampleChinese: 这台发动机的马力足够小船使用。

meaning: n. 软管，㬵管；(旧时) 男式紧⾝裤 vt. ⽤软管洒⽔、清洗等
example: Please wash the car with a hose.
exampleChinese: 请用软管冲洗汽车。

meaning: vt. 指⽰，吩咐；教授，传授
example: The coach will instruct the players tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 教练明天会指导队员们。

meaning: n. 指⽰，指令；⽤法说明；指导
example: Please follow the instruction on the box.
exampleChinese: 请按照盒子上的指示去做。

meaning: n. 仪器；乐器；仪表；⼿段；⼯具
example: My favorite instrument is the piano.
exampleChinese: 我最喜欢的乐器是钢琴。

meaning: adj. 起重要作⽤的；⽤乐器演奏的
example: Her careful planning was instrumental in the team's success.
exampleChinese: 她周密的计划对团队的成功起了重要作用。

meaning: vt. 使隔热，使绝缘，使隔⾳
example: We insulate the house to keep it warm in winter.
exampleChinese: 我们给房子做隔热处理，让它冬天更保暖。

meaning: vt. 辱骂，侮辱 n. 辱骂，侮辱
example: Please do not insult your classmates.
exampleChinese: 请不要侮辱你的同学。

meaning: n. 液体，液态物 adj. 液体的；流动性好的 (资产)
example: The bottle is filled with a clear liquid.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子里装着一种透明的液体。

meaning: n. 酒精类饮料，尤指烈性酒
example: He ordered a glass of liquor after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后，他点了一杯烈性酒。

meaning: n. 垃圾；⼀窝 (幼崽)；杂物；猫砂 vt. 使乱七⼋糟；使遍布 vi. vt. 乱扔
example: Please do not litter in the park.
exampleChinese: 请不要在公园里乱丢垃圾。

meaning: n. 奇迹；神迹；精品，极佳的例⼦
example: Her recovery was a miracle.
exampleChinese: 她的康复简直是个奇迹。

meaning: n. 镜⼦；写照 vt. 反映，与…相似；映照，反射
example: I looked in the mirror before leaving home.
exampleChinese: 出门前，我照了照镜子。

meaning: n. 恶作剧；使坏的念头；损害
example: It was mischief to hide my keys.
exampleChinese: 把我的钥匙藏起来是恶作剧。

meaning: n. 不幸，厄运；不幸的事故
example: The delay was a misfortune for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这次延误对全班来说是一场不幸。

meaning: vt. vi. 未击中，未得到，未达到 vt. 未觉察；不懂；错过；思念 n. ⼩姐，⼥⼠；错过
example: Be careful not to miss the target.
exampleChinese: 小心不要打偏目标。

meaning: n. 导弹，⻜弹；(作为武器) 投掷物
example: The missile hit its target.
exampleChinese: 导弹击中了目标。

meaning: adj. (东西) 找不到的；(⼈) 失踪的
example: My missing backpack was in the library.
exampleChinese: 我找不到的背包在图书馆里。

meaning: n. 任务，使命；职责；宗旨；传教
example: Our mission is to keep the park clean.
exampleChinese: 我们的任务是保持公园清洁。

meaning: n. 传教⼠
example: The missionary spoke to the villagers with kindness.
exampleChinese: 那位传教士和村民们亲切交谈。

meaning: adj. 原⼦核的，核能的；核武器的
example: Scientists study nuclear energy carefully.
exampleChinese: 科学家们认真研究原子能。

meaning: n. (原⼦) 核；细胞核；(组织) 核⼼
example: The nucleus of the atom is very small.
exampleChinese: 原子的原子核非常小。

meaning: vt. 阻⽌，妨碍，排除
example: A bad cold will preclude me from going out tonight.
exampleChinese: 重感冒会阻止我今晚外出。

meaning: adj. 占主导地位的，最主要的
example: English is the predominant language in the city.
exampleChinese: 英语是这座城市的主要语言。

meaning: adj. 怀孕的；耐⼈寻味的
example: The doctor said she was pregnant.
exampleChinese: 医生说她怀孕了。

meaning: n. 其余的⼈，剩余部分；休息时间 vi. vt. 休息，放松；(被) ⽀撑，托 vi. 被搁置，中⽌；安息，⻓眠
example: You should rest after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 长时间步行后你应该休息。

meaning: adj. 坐⽴不安的；没有真正休息的
example: The baby was restless all night.
exampleChinese: 这个婴儿整晚都坐立不安。

meaning: vt. vi. 喷，喷洒；向…扫射，往…上撒 n. 喷雾；喷雾器；浪花，⻜沫
example: The nurse used a spray to clean the wound.
exampleChinese: 护士用喷雾清洗伤口。

meaning: n. 春天；弹簧，发条；泉 vi. 跳，蹦
example: Flowers spring up fast after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后花儿长得很快。

meaning: vt. 洒，撒；使零星分布，点缀 n. 少量，⼀点；⼩⾬
example: We sprinkle cheese on the soup.
exampleChinese: 我们在汤上撒一点奶酪。

meaning: vi. vt. 发芽，抽芽；⻓出 (⽑发等) vi. 涌现，⼤量出现 n. 新苗，嫩芽；球芽⽢蓝
example: Seeds will sprout after a few days in water.
exampleChinese: 种子放在水里几天后就会发芽。

meaning: n. 正⽅形；⼴场；平⽅ adj. 正⽅形的；⽅的；平⽅；两清的 vt. 使成正⽅形；使成平⽅ adv. 正对着地，径直地
example: The room is ten square meters.
exampleChinese: 这个房间有十平方米。

meaning: vt. vi. 挤压，捏；(使) 挤⼊，塞⼊ vt. 榨出；勒索；严格限制 n. 捏；挤出的液体；挤，塞；拮据
example: Please squeeze the juice from the lemon.
exampleChinese: 请把柠檬汁挤出来。

meaning: vt. (⽤⼑等锐器) 刺，捅 vt. vi. (⽤⼿指或尖物) 戳，刺 n. 刺，捅；突然⼀阵剧痛；企图
example: The knife can stab through thin cardboard.
exampleChinese: 这把刀能刺穿薄纸板。

meaning: n. (整⻬的) ⼀堆；⼤量；⼤烟囱 vt. vi. (使) 放成整⻬的⼀叠 vt. 使成叠地放在
example: Please stack the books on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 请把书整齐地叠放在书架上。

meaning: vi. vt. 蹒跚，摇摇晃晃地⾛动 vt. 使震惊；使错开；交错布置
example: The crowd began to stagger backward in surprise.
exampleChinese: 人群惊讶地开始摇摇晃晃地往后退。

meaning: adj. (⽔或空⽓) 不流动的；停滞的
example: The pond looked stagnant and dirty.
exampleChinese: 池塘看起来死水般停滞而且很脏。

meaning: vi. 停滞不前，变萧条；不流动
example: The local market began to stagnate after the factory closed.
exampleChinese: 工厂关闭后，当地市场开始停滞不前。

meaning: n. 贸易；⾏业；营业额；⼿艺 vi. vt. 做买卖；(在证券交易所) 交易 vi. 营业，营运 vt. 交换，以物易物
example: The two countries trade oil and rice.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家交易石油和大米。

meaning: n. 商标；标志，特征
example: The red trademark was easy to recognize on every box.
exampleChinese: 每个盒子上那个红色商标都很容易辨认。

meaning: n. 交通；流量；⾮法交易 vi. ⾮法交易
example: There is heavy traffic on this road in the morning.
exampleChinese: 这条路早上交通很拥堵。

meaning: prep. adv. 周围，环绕；附近，到处 adv. ⼤约
example: We walked around the park after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们在公园四处走了走。

meaning: vt. vi. 安排，筹备 vt. 整理，排列，布置；编曲，改编
example: They arrange the desks in a circle for group work.
exampleChinese: 他们把桌子摆成一个圆圈方便小组活动。

meaning: vt. 逮捕；阻⽌；吸引…的注意⼒ n. 逮捕；(⾝体部分) 突然停⽌⼯作
example: Police will arrest the thief soon.
exampleChinese: 警察很快会逮捕那个小偷。

meaning: vi. 到达，寄到；发⽣；出⽣
example: They will arrive at the station soon.
exampleChinese: 他们很快就会到达车站。

meaning: n. 到达，到来；到达者
example: The arrival of the train was delayed.
exampleChinese: 火车的到来晚点了。

meaning: adj. 傲慢的，⾃⼤的
example: His arrogant tone annoyed everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 他傲慢的语气让房间里的每个人都很恼火。

meaning: n. 箭，⽮；箭头，箭号
example: He drew an arrow on the sign.
exampleChinese: 他在标志上画了一个箭头。

meaning: n. 良⼼，良知；内疚
example: His conscience told him to return the lost wallet.
exampleChinese: 他的道德心告诉他要归还那个丢失的钱包。

meaning: adj. 认真的，勤勤恳恳的
example: She is conscientious about finishing her homework on time.
exampleChinese: 她认真负责，总是按时完成作业。

meaning: adj. 连续的，不间断的
example: We had three consecutive rainy days last week.
exampleChinese: 上周我们连续下了三天雨。

meaning: n. ⼀致看法，共识
example: After a long discussion, they reached a consensus.
exampleChinese: 经过长时间讨论，他们达成了一致。

meaning: n. 许可，准许，同意 vi. 许可，准许，同意
example: I will consent to the plan if everyone agrees.
exampleChinese: 如果大家都同意，我会同意这个计划。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 加强，(使) 巩固；(使) 合并
example: The new rules will consolidate the school's safety measures.
exampleChinese: 新规定将加强学校的安全措施。

meaning: adj. 易⻅的，明显的，惹⼈注意的
example: Her bright yellow coat was conspicuous in the crowd.
exampleChinese: 她那件亮黄色外套在人群中很显眼。

meaning: n. 密谋，阴谋
example: The police uncovered a conspiracy to steal the documents.
exampleChinese: 警方揭穿了一个偷文件的阴谋。

meaning: vt. vi. 向…咨询，求教；与…商量 vt. 查阅，参考
example: Please consult the dictionary.
exampleChinese: 请查阅这本词典。

meaning: n. 顾问；⾼级顾问医师，会诊医师
example: The consultant gave us clear advice.
exampleChinese: 这位顾问给了我们清晰的建议。

meaning: vt. 擦，拭；抹去，消除 n. 擦，拭；(湿) 纸⼱
example: Please wipe the table clean.
exampleChinese: 请把桌子擦干净。

meaning: n. ⾦属丝；电线；铁丝⽹；电报 vt. 为…接电线；安窃听器；发电报
example: He fixed the wire behind the desk.
exampleChinese: 他把电线固定在书桌后面。

meaning: adj. 睿智的，明智的 suff. 以…⽅式，朝…⽅向；在…⽅⾯
example: It was wise to bring an umbrella today.
exampleChinese: 今天带伞是明智的。

meaning: n. 智慧；明智；学识，学问
example: His wisdom helped us solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 他的智慧帮助我们解决了这个问题。

meaning: n. ⼥巫，巫婆；丑⽼太婆
example: The old witch lived alone in the forest.
exampleChinese: 那个老女巫独自住在森林里。

meaning: vt. 拒绝给予，扣留，隐瞒
example: The company may withhold payment until the work is checked.
exampleChinese: 公司可能会在检查工作之前扣留付款。

meaning: prep. 在…之内；在…内部，在…⾥ adv. 在⾥⾯，在内部
example: Keep the keys within this drawer.
exampleChinese: 把钥匙放在这个抽屉里面。

meaning: vt. 经受住，承受，顶住
example: This jacket can withstand heavy rain and strong wind.
exampleChinese: 这件夹克能经受住大雨和强风。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 断裂；(使啪地) 移动；拍照 vi. 咬；突然失去⾃制⼒ n. 啪嗒声，咔嚓声；照⽚；摁扣 adj. 匆忙的，仓促的，迅速的
example: The rope can snap if you pull it too hard.
exampleChinese: 如果你拉得太用力，这根绳子会断裂。

meaning: vt. vi. ⼀把抓起，迅速抓住 vt. 强抢，夺⾛；抓紧时间做某事 n. ⽚段，只⾔⽚语；抓，抢
example: The thief made a snatch for her bag.
exampleChinese: 小偷伸手抢她的包。

meaning: vi. 偷偷地⾛，潜⾏，溜⾛；告状 vt. 偷偷地做，偷拿；偷⾛，顺⾛ n. 告状的⼩孩 adj. 突然的，出其不意的
example: He tried to sneak out of the house quietly.
exampleChinese: 他试着悄悄溜出房子。

meaning: vi. 打喷嚏 n. 喷嚏 (声)
example: I sneeze when I am near dust.
exampleChinese: 我一靠近灰尘就会打喷嚏。

meaning: vt. vi. 嗅，闻 vi. 抽鼻⼦ n. 吸⽓ (声)，抽鼻⼦ (声)
example: The dog gave a quick sniff at the bag.
exampleChinese: 那只狗快速嗅了一下袋子。

meaning: adj. 势利的
example: A snobbish boy refused to play with the new student.
exampleChinese: 一个势利的男孩拒绝和新来的学生一起玩。

meaning: n. 侦探
example: The detective asked the driver a few careful questions.
exampleChinese: 那个侦探仔细地问了司机几个问题。

meaning: n. 探测器，侦察器
example: The metal detector found something under the sand.
exampleChinese: 金属探测器在沙子下面发现了东西。

meaning: vi. 背离，偏离
example: You should not deviate from the route in the forest.
exampleChinese: 你不应该在森林里偏离路线。

meaning: n. 魔⻤，恶魔；淘⽓⻤；家伙
example: The devil in the story wanted to trick the child.
exampleChinese: 故事里的恶魔想要欺骗那个孩子。

meaning: vt. 奉献，献⾝；把…⽤于
example: He will devote more time to his studies.
exampleChinese: 他会把更多时间致力于学习。

meaning: vt. 修理，解决；使固定；确定 n. (简单暂时的) 解决办法；困境
example: Can you fix this broken chair?
exampleChinese: 你能修好这把坏椅子吗？

meaning: n. 固定设施；体育活动；固定事物
example: The stadium is a popular fixture in this city.
exampleChinese: 这座体育场是这座城市里很受欢迎的固定设施。

meaning: n. ⽕焰；强烈的感情；橘红⾊ vi. 燃烧 vi. vt. (因强烈情绪⽽) 脸红
example: A flame rose from the candle.
exampleChinese: 火焰从蜡烛上升起。

meaning: vt. vi. 拍打 (翅膀)；摆动，挥动 vi. 忧虑，激动 n. ⽚状垂悬物；拍打 (声)；忧虑
example: The flag began to flap in the strong wind.
exampleChinese: 旗子在强风中开始拍打摆动。

meaning: vi. (短暂) 烧旺，燃烧；突发，加剧 vt. vi. 张⼤，张开 (鼻孔)；发怒地说 n. 闪光信号灯；旺⽕；喇叭裤 (复)
example: The campfire began to flare in the wind.
exampleChinese: 营火在风中开始旺了起来。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 闪光；⽤光发出信号；闪现 vt. (快速地) 出⽰；快速发送 (信息) vi. ⻜速运动；猛然想起；突然显露 n. 闪光；闪光灯；闪现；情感突发
example: A flash lit up the sky during the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨期间，一道闪光照亮了天空。

meaning: adj. 平的；枯燥的；单调的；断然的 n. 公寓；平⾯部分；瘪轮胎 adv. 平直地，平躺地；直截了当地
example: The road is flat after the bridge.
exampleChinese: 过了桥以后，这条路是平的。

meaning: vt. 奉承，讨好；使…显得更好
example: Your kind words did not flatter me.
exampleChinese: 你的好话并没有让我感到受宠若惊。

meaning: n. 味道，⻛味；特⾊；调味品 vt. 给…调味
example: The soup has a rich flavour.
exampleChinese: 这汤味道很浓。

meaning: vi. vt. 逃离，逃避
example: The villagers had to flee the fire.
exampleChinese: 村民们不得不逃离火灾。

meaning: n. ⾁；(⼈体的) ⽪肤；果⾁；⾁体 vt. 使具体，使充实
example: The chef will flesh the fish carefully.
exampleChinese: 厨师会小心地给鱼肉去骨取肉。

meaning: n. 航班；⻜⾏；⼀段 (楼梯)；逃跑
example: Our flight leaves at seven in the morning.
exampleChinese: 我们的航班在早上七点起飞。

meaning: det. pron. ⼀些，⼀点，任何⼀个 adv. ⼀点也 (不)
example: You can choose any seat in the room.
exampleChinese: 你可以选房间里的任何座位。

meaning: pron. 任何⼈
example: If anybody calls, tell them I am out.
exampleChinese: 如果有任何人打电话来，就告诉他们我出去了。

meaning: adv. ⽆论如何，反正；尽管如此 adv. 对了；⾄少
example: Anyhow, we need to finish the homework tonight.
exampleChinese: 总之，我们今晚得把作业做完。

meaning: pron. 任何事物，随便什么东西
example: Did you buy anything at the store?
exampleChinese: 你在商店买了什么东西吗？

meaning: adv. 反正，⽽且；⽆论如何，尽管如此
example: I was tired, but I went anyway.
exampleChinese: 我很累，但我还是去了。

meaning: adv. 在 (或去) 任何地⽅ pron. 任何地⽅
example: You can sit anywhere in the room.
exampleChinese: 你可以坐在房间里的任何地方。

meaning: n. 资产，财产；有⽤的物 (或⼈)
example: A good laptop is an important asset for a student.
exampleChinese: 一台好的笔记本电脑是学生的重要资产。

meaning: vt. 分配，分派；指派；为…设定
example: The teacher will assign each group a different task.
exampleChinese: 老师会给每个小组分配不同的任务。

meaning: n. 作业，任务；(任务等的) 分配
example: I finished my math assignment before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我在晚饭前完成了数学作业。

meaning: n. 参考书⽬，⽂献⽬录
example: Her essay included a long bibliography.
exampleChinese: 她的论文里列了一份很长的参考书目。

meaning: n. 垃圾箱；箱⼦，储物箱 vt. 扔掉
example: Please put the old papers in the bin.
exampleChinese: 请把旧纸张放进垃圾箱里。

meaning: vt. 捆绑；包扎；联合；约束；装订 vi. vt. (使) 凝结，(使) 黏合 n. 窘境，困境
example: The rope can bind the boxes together.
exampleChinese: 这根绳子可以把箱子绑在一起。

meaning: n. ⼈物传记，传记⽂学
example: I read a biography of Albert Einstein.
exampleChinese: 我读了一本关于阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦的传记。

meaning: n. ⽣物学；⽣理
example: Biology is her favorite subject this term.
exampleChinese: 生物学是她这学期最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 稍微；稍顷；⼩量；部分；⽐特
example: My phone has only a small bit of free space left.
exampleChinese: 我的手机只剩下一点点可用空间。

meaning: vi. vt. 咬；叮，蜇 vi. 上钩，咬钩；产⽣严重影响 n. 咬；(⻝物) ⼀⼝；(被叮后的) 包
example: The dog tried to bite my shoe.
exampleChinese: 那只狗试图咬我的鞋。

meaning: adj. 苦的；使⼈悲痛的；严寒的 adj. 激烈⽽不愉快的；愤愤不平的 n. 苦啤酒；苦酒原汁
example: The medicine has a bitter taste.
exampleChinese: 这种药有苦味。

meaning: adj. 奇异的，古怪的
example: He wore a bizarre hat to the party.
exampleChinese: 他戴着一顶古怪的帽子去参加派对。

meaning: adj. 连贯的；⾔谈条理清楚的
example: Her speech was clear and coherent.
exampleChinese: 她的发言清晰而连贯。

meaning: adj. 团结的，有凝聚⼒的；使团结的
example: The team is more cohesive after the workshop.
exampleChinese: 这支团队在工作坊之后更有凝聚力了。

meaning: n. 硬币 vt. 创造 (新词)
example: I found a coin under the sofa.
exampleChinese: 我在沙发下面找到了一枚硬币。

meaning: n. 可卡因；焦炭；可⼝可乐
example: The factory uses coke as fuel.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂用焦炭作燃料。

meaning: vi. 合作，协作；勾结，叛国
example: The two schools will collaborate on the project.
exampleChinese: 这两所学校将合作开展这个项目。

meaning: n. ⾐领，领⼦；(动物的) 项圈 vt. 抓住，逮住
example: He grabbed the dog by the collar.
exampleChinese: 他抓住了那只狗的项圈。

meaning: n. 上校
example: The colonel gave the soldiers their orders.
exampleChinese: 上校向士兵们下达了命令。

meaning: adj. 殖⺠地的；殖⺠地时期的 n. 殖⺠地居⺠
example: The colonial museum shows life in the past.
exampleChinese: 这家殖民地时期博物馆展示了过去的生活。

meaning: n. 殖⺠地；群体，群落
example: Ants live in a large colony underground.
exampleChinese: 蚂蚁在地下生活在一个很大的群落里。

meaning: n. 结合体；结合；号码组合
example: The combination of apples and cinnamon tastes great.
exampleChinese: 苹果和肉桂的组合味道很好。

meaning: n. 热爱，热情；热衷的活动
example: She showed great enthusiasm for music.
exampleChinese: 她对音乐表现出极大的热情。

meaning: adj. 热情的，热衷的，热⼼的
example: She was enthusiastic about the trip.
exampleChinese: 她对这次旅行很热情。

meaning: adj. 全部的，整个的
example: We stayed there for the entire afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我们在那里待了整整一个下午。

meaning: vt. 给予…权利 (或资格)；给…题名
example: This ticket will entitle you to free entry.
exampleChinese: 这张票将使你有权免费入场。

meaning: n. 实体
example: The lake is a separate entity from the river.
exampleChinese: 这个湖是一个独立的实体，不属于那条河。

meaning: n. 企业家
example: She wants to become an entrepreneur and start her own company.
exampleChinese: 她想成为一名企业家，并创办自己的公司。

meaning: n. ⼊⼝；登场；进⼊权；准许加⼊ vt. 使狂喜，使⼊迷
example: The main entrance is on the left.
exampleChinese: 正门在左边。

meaning: n. 进⼊；加⼊；参赛作品；条⽬
example: Your entry to the school is through that gate.
exampleChinese: 你进入学校要走那扇门。

meaning: n. 鲸 vi. 捕鲸 vi. vt. ⼤⼒击打
example: We saw a whale near the boat.
exampleChinese: 我们在船附近看到了一头鲸。

meaning: det. pron. 任何；⽆论什么；⽆所谓 ；随便 adv. (⽤于否定句后表强调)
example: You can choose whatever you like.
exampleChinese: 你可以选择任何你喜欢的东西。

meaning: conj. ⽆论何时，每当 adv. (⽤于强调) 什么时候
example: Whenever I feel tired, I take a short walk.
exampleChinese: 每当我感到累的时候，我就会短暂散步。

meaning: conj. 然⽽，但是；鉴于
example: I wanted to go out, whereas my sister preferred to stay home.
exampleChinese: 我想出去，而我妹妹更愿意待在家里。

meaning: adv. 凭此，借以
example: He signed a form whereby he agreed to the new rules.
exampleChinese: 他签了一份表格，借此同意了新规则。

meaning: conj. adv. ⽆论哪⾥；在任何情况下 adv. 究竟在哪⾥
example: Wherever you go, take your umbrella with you.
exampleChinese: 无论你去哪里，都要带上雨伞。

meaning: det. pron. ⽆论哪个
example: Choose whichever color you like.
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪个颜色就选哪个。

meaning: conj. 在…期间，当…时；然⽽；尽管 n. ⼀段时间
example: I listened to music for a while.
exampleChinese: 我听了一会儿音乐。

meaning: vt. 鞭打；突然地除去，抽出；搅打 vi. vt. (使朝某⼀⽅向) 猛然移动 n. 鞭⼦；纪律委员，党鞭
example: The farmer can whip the cream into soft peaks in minutes.
exampleChinese: 农夫能在几分钟内把奶油搅打成柔软的尖峰状。

meaning: n. 哨⼦；⼝哨声，汽笛声；汽笛 vt. vi. 吹⼝哨 vi. 吹哨⼦；鸣叫；嗖嗖地移动
example: He gave a short whistle to get our attention.
exampleChinese: 他吹了一声短口哨来引起我们的注意。

meaning: pron. ⽆论是谁；…的⼈；究竟是谁
example: Whoever finishes first can choose the game.
exampleChinese: 无论是谁先完成，都可以选择游戏。

meaning: vi. 开花，绽放；精神焕发，繁荣 n. 花，花朵；⻘春焕发
example: The flowers bloom in the warm spring sunlight.
exampleChinese: 这些花在温暖的春日阳光下绽放。

meaning: n. (树或灌⽊的) 花，花簇 vi. 开花；变得健康 (快乐等)，兴旺
example: The rose bushes blossom in May.
exampleChinese: 这些玫瑰灌木在五月开花。

meaning: vt. vi. 吹 (⽓)；刮 (⻛)；吹动；吹奏 vt. 擤；送⻜吻；炸开；挥霍；吹出 n. 猛击；打击；吹
example: Strong winds blow across the lake in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天强风会吹过湖面。

meaning: n. 蓝图；⾏动⽅案；(基因的) 模型
example: The teacher drew a blueprint for the class project.
exampleChinese: 老师为班级项目画了一份蓝图。

meaning: n. 愚蠢的错误，疏忽，失误 vi. 犯愚蠢的错误，失误
example: He made a blunder during the speech and forgot his lines.
exampleChinese: 他在演讲中犯了一个愚蠢的错误，忘了台词。

meaning: adj. 钝的，不锋利的；直⾔不讳的 vt. 使 (感觉等) 减弱；使变钝
example: Please use a blunt pencil until the point is sharpened.
exampleChinese: 在削尖之前，请用一支钝铅笔。

meaning: n. 模糊不清的事物；模糊的记忆 vt. vi. (使) 视线模糊；使 (想法等) 模糊
example: A thick fog can blur the lights on the road.
exampleChinese: 浓雾会使路上的灯光变得模糊。

meaning: vi. (因尴尬或害羞) 脸红；感到羞愧 n. ⾯部泛起的红晕；腮红
example: She tried to blush, but she still smiled at the joke.
exampleChinese: 她想脸红，但听了这个笑话还是笑了。

meaning: n. 称赞，赞美；(对上帝的) 称颂 vt. 称赞，赞美；称颂，感谢 (上帝)
example: The teacher gave her praise for the neat homework.
exampleChinese: 老师因她作业整洁而表扬了她。

meaning: vi. vt. 祈望，祈求；祈祷，祷告 adv. (⽤于提问或要求) 请问，请
example: They pray before dinner every night.
exampleChinese: 他们每天晚上饭前祈祷。

meaning: n. 祷词；祈祷；祈祷会；企盼的事
example: The prayer ended quietly.
exampleChinese: 祷告安静地结束了。

meaning: n. 相似，类似
example: There is a strong resemblance between the two sisters.
exampleChinese: 这两姐妹之间有很强的相似之处。

meaning: vt. 看起来像，与…相似
example: The twins resemble each other closely.
exampleChinese: 这对双胞胎长得非常像。

meaning: n. ⽔库；⼤量储备；储液器
example: The village gets water from a nearby reservoir.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄从附近的水库取水。

meaning: n. 住处，住宅；居住；居住权
example: Their residence is a small house near the school.
exampleChinese: 他们的住处是一所靠近学校的小房子。

meaning: n. 居⺠，住⼾；住院实习医⽣ adj. (在某地) 居住的
example: Every resident in the building has a key card.
exampleChinese: 这栋楼里的每位住户都有一张门卡。

meaning: vi. vt. 辞职 vt. 使顺从
example: She decided to resign after five years in the job.
exampleChinese: 她在这份工作上干了五年后决定辞职。

meaning: adj. 坚决的，坚定的，果断的
example: She stayed resolute and finished the hard climb.
exampleChinese: 她始终坚定不移，完成了这次艰难的攀登。

meaning: n. 决议；决⼼；解决；分辨率
example: The class passed a resolution to clean the park.
exampleChinese: 全班通过了一项清理公园的决议。

meaning: vt. 解决 vt. vi. 决⼼，决定 n. 决⼼，坚定的信念
example: We must resolve this problem before the meeting starts.
exampleChinese: 我们必须在会议开始前解决这个问题。

meaning: n. 标本，样本；具有…特性的⼈
example: The scientist examined a specimen under the microscope.
exampleChinese: 科学家在显微镜下检查了一份标本。

meaning: n. 眼镜；壮观的景象；奇特的现象
example: The fireworks created a beautiful spectacle in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 烟花在夜空中形成了一幅壮观的景象。

meaning: n. 观众
example: The spectator cheered when the team scored.
exampleChinese: 当球队得分时，观众欢呼起来。

meaning: n. 光谱；系列，范围；波谱
example: The scientist studied the spectrum of the light.
exampleChinese: 那位科学家研究了光的光谱。

meaning: n. 球 (体)，球形；范围，领域
example: Earth is a sphere in space.
exampleChinese: 地球是太空中的一个球体。

meaning: adj. 辣的，加⾹料的；刺激的
example: This soup tastes spicy but delicious.
exampleChinese: 这汤尝起来很辣，但很美味。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 溢出或洒出 vi. 蜂拥⽽出，涌出 n. 洒出 (量)，泼出 (量)；跌落
example: Be careful not to spill the milk.
exampleChinese: 小心别把牛奶洒出来。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 快速旋转；(使) 急转⾝；纺 vt. 吐丝，作茧；有倾向性地陈述 n. ⾼速旋转；兜⻛；旋转 (球)
example: The wheel started to spin quickly.
exampleChinese: 轮子开始快速旋转。

meaning: n. 脊椎；刺，棘；书脊；⻣⽓
example: She hurt her spine in the fall.
exampleChinese: 她在摔倒时伤到了脊椎。

meaning: n. 螺旋式；逐渐加速上升 (或下降) adj. 螺旋形的，螺旋式的 vi. 螺旋式上升 (或下降)；急剧增⻓
example: The river followed a spiral down the hill.
exampleChinese: 这条河沿着螺旋形蜿蜒流下山坡。

meaning: n. 精神；情绪；勇⽓，意志；灵魂 n. 本质；烈酒；(某种类型的) ⼈ vt. 偷偷带⾛
example: Team spirit helped them win the game.
exampleChinese: 团队精神帮助他们赢得了比赛。

meaning: adj. 精神的，⼼灵的；宗教的 n. 灵歌 (宗教歌曲)
example: We sang a spiritual at the school concert.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校音乐会上唱了一首圣歌。

meaning: vt. 吐，唾；怒斥 vi. 吐⼝⽔；劈啪作响；下⼩⾬ n. 唾液，⼝⽔；烤⾁扦
example: He tried not to spit on the sidewalk.
exampleChinese: 他尽量不往人行道上吐痰。

meaning: n. 怨恨，恶意 vt. 故意伤害，激怒
example: He helped her out, despite his spite.
exampleChinese: 尽管心怀怨恨，他还是帮了她。

meaning: vi. 泼洒，哗啦地溅；溅着⽔花⾏⾛ vt. 把 (⽔、泥等) 泼在…上 n. 溅泼声；引⼈注⽬的效果
example: The boat began to splash near the shore.
exampleChinese: 小船开始在岸边哗啦地溅起水花。

meaning: adj. 极好的，绝妙的；壮丽的 int. (表⽰赞同) 好极了
example: The sunset over the lake was splendid.
exampleChinese: 湖上的落日辉煌而美丽。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 分裂；(使) 分开；(使) 撕裂 vt. 分担，分摊；划破，割破 vi. (和某⼈) 断绝关系；(迅速) 离开 n. 分歧；划分，份额；裂缝；劈叉
example: The river can split the town into two parts.
exampleChinese: 这条河可以把小镇分成两部分。

meaning: adj. (⾏为) ⾃发的；率性的；⾃然的
example: Her spontaneous smile made everyone relax.
exampleChinese: 她自发的微笑让每个人都放松下来。

meaning: n. 地点；斑点；污渍；粉刺；排位 vt. 发现，看⻅ adj. 现货交易的，⽴即⽀付的
example: This spot under the tree is nice for a picnic.
exampleChinese: 树下这个地方很适合野餐。

meaning: n. 配偶
example: My spouse and I share the housework.
exampleChinese: 我的配偶和我一起分担家务。

meaning: n. 时间；时刻；时段；时期；次 vt. 为…安排时间；计时
example: We had a good time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园玩得很开心。

meaning: adj. 及时的，适时的
example: Her timely help saved the team from delay.
exampleChinese: 她及时的帮助避免了团队延误。

meaning: adj. 胆怯的，羞怯的
example: The timid boy spoke in a very soft voice.
exampleChinese: 那个胆怯的男孩说话声音很轻。

meaning: n. 锡；罐头；⾦属⻝品盒；烤盘
example: The box was made of tin.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子是锡制的。

meaning: adj. 极⼩的，微量的
example: A tiny bird sat on the fence.
exampleChinese: 一只小小的鸟停在篱笆上。

meaning: n. 塔，塔楼；信号发射塔 vi. 远⾼于，⾼耸于；胜过
example: The old tower stands by the river.
exampleChinese: 那座古塔矗立在河边。

meaning: adj. 有毒的；恶劣的，极其有害的
example: The factory released toxic waste into the river.
exampleChinese: 那家工厂把有毒废物排入了河流。

meaning: adj. 邪恶的；调⽪的；有害的；极好 adv. 极其，⾮常 n. 恶⼈，邪恶的⼈
example: The wicked thief took the old man's wallet.
exampleChinese: 那个邪恶的小偷偷走了老人的钱包。

meaning: n. 宽度，⼴度
example: The width of the desk is one meter.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子的宽度是一米。

meaning: adj. 野⽣的；荒凉的；⽆法⽆天的 n. 野⽣状态
example: We saw wild ducks by the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们在湖边看到了野鸭。

meaning: n. ⻛；胃⽓，肠⽓；管乐器 vi. vt. 蜿蜒，迂回；给 (钟表) 上发条 vt. 缠绕，绕成团
example: The wind blew the leaves across the road.
exampleChinese: 风把树叶吹过了马路。

meaning: vi. 眨⼀只眼，使眼⾊；闪烁，明灭 n. 眨⼀只眼，眨眼⽰意，眼⾊
example: He gave me a quick wink before the test started.
exampleChinese: 考试开始前，他朝我快速眨了一下眼。

meaning: n. ⼿臂；袖⼦；扶⼿；臂状物 vi. vt. 武装，装备，备战
example: He raised his arm to ask a question.
exampleChinese: 他举起手臂来提问。

meaning: n. 军队，陆军；⼀⼤群
example: Her brother joined the army at eighteen.
exampleChinese: 她哥哥十八岁时参了军。

meaning: vt. 祝贺；为⾃⼰感到⾼兴或⾃豪
example: We congratulate you on your success.
exampleChinese: 我们祝贺你取得成功。

meaning: n. 祝贺，贺辞；恭喜
example: Please accept my congratulation on your new job.
exampleChinese: 请接受我对你新工作的祝贺。

meaning: n. 结合，同时发⽣；连词
example: The conjunction of the two groups created a bigger team.
exampleChinese: 这两个小组的联合组成了一个更大的团队。

meaning: vt. 占领，征服；克服
example: You can conquer fear with practice.
exampleChinese: 你可以通过练习克服恐惧。

meaning: n. 征服，占领；爱情的俘虏
example: The team's victory was a great conquest.
exampleChinese: 这个团队的胜利是一场伟大的征服。

meaning: n. 灾难；不幸；失败的⼈ (或事物)
example: The flood was a terrible disaster.
exampleChinese: 那场洪水是一场可怕的灾难。

meaning: adj. 灾难性的，以失败告终的
example: The storm had a disastrous effect on the village.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴对村庄造成了灾难性的影响。

meaning: vt. 抛弃，丢弃 n. 被抛弃的⼈或物
example: Please discard the broken box.
exampleChinese: 请把那个破箱子丢掉。

meaning: vt. 觉察出，了解；(依稀) 分辨出
example: I can discern a bridge in the fog.
exampleChinese: 我能依稀分辨出雾中的一座桥。

meaning: vt. 准许离开，解雇；履⾏；开⽕ vi. vt. 排出，放出；放 (电) n. 排出 (物)；获准离开；履⾏
example: The nurse will discharge the patient tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 护士明天会让这位病人出院。

meaning: n. 时代，年代，时期
example: We live in an era of fast communication.
exampleChinese: 我们生活在一个快速通信的时代。

meaning: vt. 消灭，灭绝，根除
example: The new program aims to eradicate hunger.
exampleChinese: 这个新计划旨在消除饥饿。

meaning: vt. 消除，抹去；擦掉 (笔迹)；删除
example: Use a cloth to erase the marks on the table.
exampleChinese: 用一块布擦掉桌子上的痕迹。

meaning: adj. 竖起的，直⽴的 vt. 建造；使…竖起；创⽴
example: Workers will erect a new bridge here.
exampleChinese: 工人们将在这里建造一座新桥。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 侵蚀，(使) ⻛化；逐步削弱
example: Rain can erode soft rock over time.
exampleChinese: 雨水会随着时间侵蚀柔软的岩石。

meaning: n. 侵蚀，⻛化；逐渐削弱
example: The erosion of the cliff was slow but steady.
exampleChinese: 悬崖的侵蚀过程缓慢但持续。

meaning: adj. 错误的，出错的
example: His story turned out to be erroneous.
exampleChinese: 他的说法后来被证明是错误的。

meaning: n. 错误，差错
example: There is a small error in the measurement.
exampleChinese: 这个测量结果有一个小误差。

meaning: vi. vt. (⽕⼭) 爆发；突然发出 (叫喊) vi. 突然发⽣，爆发；(斑疹) 冒出
example: The volcano can erupt without warning.
exampleChinese: 火山可能会毫无预警地爆发。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 不断恶化；(使) 扩⼤，增加
example: The argument may escalate if nobody calms down.
exampleChinese: 如果没人冷静下来，这场争论可能会升级。

meaning: vt. 护卫，护送 n. 护卫者；社交伴侣
example: The guard will escort the visitors to the gate.
exampleChinese: 警卫将护送访客到大门。

meaning: n. 泡沫橡㬵；泡沫；泡沫剂 vi. (液体) 起泡沫
example: Sea water formed foam on the rocks.
exampleChinese: 海水在岩石上形成了泡沫。

meaning: vi. vt. 集中 (注意⼒等) 于；调节焦距 vt. 聚焦于 n. 焦点，中⼼；焦距，调焦
example: The teacher helped me focus on the main idea.
exampleChinese: 老师帮我把注意力集中在中心思想上。

meaning: n. 雾，雾⽓；迷惑，迷惘 vi. vt. (使) 起雾 vt. 使迷惘，使迷惑
example: A thick fog covered the road.
exampleChinese: 浓雾笼罩了道路。

meaning: vt. 给…提供营养；培养，助⻓
example: Good sleep helps nourish a growing child.
exampleChinese: 充足的睡眠有助于滋养正在成长的孩子。

meaning: n. ⻓篇⼩说 adj. 新颖的，新奇的
example: She borrowed a novel from the library.
exampleChinese: 她从图书馆借了一本小说。

meaning: n. 新奇；新奇的事物 adj. 新颖独特的
example: The museum added a novelty to attract children.
exampleChinese: 博物馆增加了一件新奇的展品来吸引孩子们。

meaning: adv. 如今，现今
example: Nowadays, many students use tablets for homework.
exampleChinese: 现今，许多学生用平板电脑做作业。

meaning: adv. ⽆处，哪⾥都不
example: The key was nowhere to be found.
exampleChinese: 钥匙哪儿也找不到。

meaning: n. 公寓；套房
example: We rented an apartment near the school.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校附近租了一套公寓。

meaning: n. 猿，类⼈猿 vt. 模仿
example: The ape swung from branch to branch.
exampleChinese: 那只猿在树枝之间荡来荡去。

meaning: vi. 道歉，认错
example: I need to apologize for being late.
exampleChinese: 我需要为迟到道歉。

meaning: n. 道歉，认错
example: Please accept my apology for being late.
exampleChinese: 请接受我迟到的道歉。

meaning: adj. 没有希望的；阴冷的；荒凉的
example: The field looked bleak after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，田野显得一片荒凉。

meaning: vi. 流⾎，出⾎；(颜⾊) 渗开 vt. 给 (某⼈) 放⾎
example: He cut his finger, but it did not bleed much.
exampleChinese: 他割破了手指，但没流多少血。

meaning: vt. 使混合，掺和；调制，配制 vi. 融合 vi. vt. (使) 协调，融合 n. 混合物；融合
example: These colors blend well together.
exampleChinese: 这些颜色融合得很好。

meaning: vt. 求上帝降福，祝福；称颂上帝 int. 哎呀，太好啦，太谢谢了
example: May God bless your family.
exampleChinese: 愿上帝保佑你的家人。

meaning: n. 舒服；安慰；令⼈感到安慰的⼈ n. 舒适的设施 (或条件) vt. 安慰
example: Her words brought me great comfort.
exampleChinese: 她的话给了我很大的安慰。

meaning: vi. 来；到达；⾏进；发⽣；达到 vt. vi. 成为，变成；处于 (某位置) prep. 当…到来时
example: Please come to my room after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后请来我的房间。

meaning: n. 喜剧，喜剧⽚；滑稽之处
example: This comedy made the whole class laugh.
exampleChinese: 这部喜剧把全班都逗笑了。

meaning: n. 彗星
example: A comet flashed across the night sky.
exampleChinese: 一颗彗星划过夜空。

meaning: adj. 滑稽的，好笑的；喜剧的 n. 喜剧演员；连环漫画
example: The comedian told a comic story.
exampleChinese: 那位喜剧演员讲了一个滑稽的故事。

meaning: vt. (⽤…) 纪念，作为…的纪念
example: The town will commemorate the fallen soldiers with a small ceremony.
exampleChinese: 这个小镇将通过一个小型仪式纪念阵亡的士兵。

meaning: vi. vt. 开始，着⼿
example: The meeting will commence at nine o'clock.
exampleChinese: 会议将于九点开始。

meaning: adj. 平常普通的，不⾜为奇的 n. 寻常事物；⽼⽣常谈
example: For him, the noisy street was just commonplace.
exampleChinese: 对他来说，喧闹的街道只是平常事。

meaning: n. 英联邦；⾃治政体；联合体
example: Canada is a member of the Commonwealth.
exampleChinese: 加拿大是英联邦成员国。

meaning: vi. 上下班往返，通勤 vt. 减刑 n. 每天上下班路程
example: I commute by train every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上乘火车通勤。

meaning: n. 糖尿病
example: My aunt has diabetes and must watch her diet.
exampleChinese: 我姑姑患有糖尿病，必须注意饮食。

meaning: vt. vi. 诊断 (病症)
example: The doctor can diagnose the illness quickly.
exampleChinese: 医生可以很快诊断出这种病。

meaning: n. 图表，⽰意图
example: The teacher drew a diagram on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师在黑板上画了一张图表。

meaning: vt. vi. 拨号 n. 表盘，刻度盘，仪表盘
example: Dial the number carefully.
exampleChinese: 仔细拨号码。

example: People in that village speak a local dialect.
exampleChinese: 那个村子里的人说一种地方方言。

meaning: n. 直径；放⼤倍数
example: The diameter of the circle is ten centimeters.
exampleChinese: 这个圆的直径是十厘米。

meaning: vt. vi. ⼝述；命令，规定；⽀配，决定 n. 命令，规定
example: The teacher will dictate the notes slowly.
exampleChinese: 老师会慢慢口述这些笔记。

meaning: n. ⼝述，⼝授；听写 (测试)
example: The teacher checked our dictation carefully.
exampleChinese: 老师仔细检查了我们的听写。

meaning: n. ⽇常饮⻝；(减肥等的) 特别饮⻝ vi. 节⻝ adj. 低糖的，低脂肪的
example: A healthy diet includes fresh vegetables.
exampleChinese: 健康的日常饮食包括新鲜蔬菜。

meaning: vi. vt. 区分，辨别 vt. 构成…间的差别
example: We can differentiate these two birds by their color.
exampleChinese: 我们可以通过颜色区分这两种鸟。

meaning: vi. vt. 掘 (地)，凿 (洞)；搜寻 (物品) vt. 赞成，看中，喜欢 n. (⽤⼿指或肘部) 轻碰；挖苦
example: They dig a hole to plant the tree.
exampleChinese: 他们挖了一个坑来种树。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 消化 vt. 理解，领会 n. 摘要，⽂摘
example: It takes time to digest a big meal.
exampleChinese: 消化一顿大餐需要时间。

meaning: adj. 数字的，数码的；以数字显⽰的
example: She keeps all her photos on a digital camera.
exampleChinese: 她把所有照片都保存在数码相机里。

meaning: n. 尊严，尊敬；⾃尊；庄重，体⾯
example: She spoke with dignity even after the mistake.
exampleChinese: 即使犯了错，她说话时仍保持尊严。

meaning: vt. 设想，展望
example: I can only envisage a better future for the family.
exampleChinese: 我只能设想这个家庭会有更美好的未来。

meaning: vt. 羡慕，忌妒 n. 羡慕，忌妒；令⼈羡慕的对象
example: I felt envy when my sister won the prize.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹获奖时，我心里有些嫉妒。

meaning: adj. 相等的；平等的；能胜任的 vlink. 与…相等，等于 vt. ⽐得上；导致，结果为 n. 同等的⼈，相等物
example: Both teams were equal in skill.
exampleChinese: 两支队伍的实力相当。

meaning: n. 平等
example: The class discussed equality and fair treatment.
exampleChinese: 全班讨论了平等和公平对待。

meaning: adj. 等同的，等值的，相当的 n. 等价物，等效物，对应词
example: This tablet is equivalent to the old model.
exampleChinese: 这款平板和旧型号是相当的。

meaning: n. 等式，⽅程式；等同 n. (必须考虑多种因素的) 复杂局⾯
example: The teacher showed us how to solve the equation.
exampleChinese: 老师教我们如何解这道方程式。

meaning: n. ⾚道
example: The equator divides the Earth into two halves.
exampleChinese: 赤道把地球分成两半。

meaning: vi. 漂浮；飘浮；轻盈⾛动 vt. 使浮动；提出 (想法或计划) vt. vi. (使货币汇率) ⾃由浮动 n. 彩⻋；⻥漂；浮板；备⽤零钱
example: The balloon will float on the water.
exampleChinese: 气球会漂浮在水面上。

meaning: n. (动物) 群；⼀⼤群(⼈) vi. 蜂拥，群集，涌向
example: A flock of birds flew over the lake.
exampleChinese: 一群鸟飞过了湖面。

meaning: n. 洪⽔，⽔灾；⼤批，⼤量 vi. vt. (被) 淹没；泛滥；涌上⼼头 vi. ⼤量涌向，蜂拥前往 vt. (使) 充斥，充满
example: Heavy rain can flood the streets quickly.
exampleChinese: 大雨会很快淹没街道。

meaning: n. 流，流动；不断供应；连贯 vi. 流，流动；流畅进⾏
example: Water began to flow through the pipe.
exampleChinese: 水开始通过管道流动。

meaning: n. 流⾏性感冒，流感
example: He stayed home because he had the flu.
exampleChinese: 他因为得了流感而待在家里。

meaning: vi. 波动，上下浮动
example: Prices can fluctuate during the holiday season.
exampleChinese: 价格在假期期间会波动。

meaning: adj. 流利的，流畅的；(动作) 娴熟的
example: She is fluent in both English and Chinese.
exampleChinese: 她的英语和汉语都很流利。

meaning: n. 液体，流体 adj. 流畅优美的；不稳定的；流动的
example: Water is a fluid that flows easily.
exampleChinese: 水是一种容易流动的液体。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 脸红；冲洗 (⻢桶) vt. 冲⾛ n. 脸红；⼀阵突如其来的强烈情感
example: Her face began to flush when she was embarrassed.
exampleChinese: 她感到尴尬时，脸开始发红。

meaning: vi. ⻜；航⾏，⻜⾏；疾驰；⻜逝 vt. vi. 驾驶 (⻜机等)；(旗) 飘扬 vt. 空运；乘⻜⾏器⻜越 n. 蝇，苍蝇
example: Birds fly south in winter.
exampleChinese: 鸟儿在冬天飞向南方。

meaning: n. 话筒，⻨克⻛
example: Please speak into the microphone.
exampleChinese: 请对着麦克风说话。

meaning: n. 显微镜
example: Look at the bacteria under the microscope.
exampleChinese: 用显微镜看这些细菌。

meaning: n. 当中，中间
example: The lost keys were found in the midst of the papers.
exampleChinese: 丢失的钥匙在这些文件当中找到了。

meaning: vi. 迁徙，移居；转移
example: Many birds migrate south in winter.
exampleChinese: 许多鸟类在冬天向南迁徙。

meaning: adj. 温和的；(疾病等) 轻微的；淡的
example: We had a mild winter this year.
exampleChinese: 今年我们经历了一个温和的冬天。

meaning: n. 百万富翁
example: The millionaire donated money to the school.
exampleChinese: 这位百万富翁给学校捐了钱。

meaning: n. 磨坊；⼯⼚；磨粉机 vt. 碾碎，磨成粉
example: The old mill still grinds grain for the village.
exampleChinese: 那座旧磨坊仍在为村子碾磨谷物。

meaning: adj. 怀旧的，念旧的
example: She felt nostalgic when she saw her childhood toy.
exampleChinese: 当她看到童年的玩具时，感到很怀旧。

meaning: adj. 显著的，显要的，值得注意的 n. 名⼈，重要⼈物
example: His notable progress surprised the teacher.
exampleChinese: 他显著的进步让老师感到惊讶。

meaning: pron. 没有什么，没有东西
example: There is nothing in the box.
exampleChinese: 盒子里什么都没有。

meaning: vi. vt. 注意到，意识到 n. 注意，理会；布告；预告；辞呈
example: The school posted a notice on the wall.
exampleChinese: 学校在墙上张贴了一则通知。

meaning: vt. 通知，告知
example: Please notify me if the plan changes.
exampleChinese: 如果计划有变，请通知我。

meaning: adj. 臭名昭著的，声名狼藉的
example: That bridge is notorious for heavy traffic.
exampleChinese: 那座桥因交通拥堵而臭名昭著。

meaning: prep. adv. conj. 尽管，虽然
example: Notwithstanding the rain, we went to the park.
exampleChinese: 尽管下雨了，我们还是去了公园。

meaning: n. 装饰品；⾸饰，饰物；点缀 vt. 装饰，点缀
example: We hung a bright ornament on the Christmas tree.
exampleChinese: 我们在圣诞树上挂了一个亮闪闪的装饰品。

meaning: adj. 正统的；东正教的；正统教派的
example: The school follows an orthodox teaching method.
exampleChinese: 这所学校采用正统的教学方法。

meaning: n. 锅；罐；壶；凑集的资⾦；⼤⿇ vt. 把…栽⼊盆中；击 (球) ⼊袋
example: Please put the soup in the pot.
exampleChinese: 请把汤放进壶里。

meaning: n. 英镑；磅 (重量单位) vi. vt. 反复击打，连续砰砰地猛击 vi. (⼼脏) 狂跳，怦怦地跳 vt. 捣碎，击碎
example: This book costs one pound.
exampleChinese: 这本书价值一英镑。

meaning: n. 粉末；⽕药 vt. 抹粉，涂粉
example: The sugar will powder easily in the grinder.
exampleChinese: 糖在研磨机里很容易被磨成粉末。

meaning: vt. 代表；体现；表⽰；描绘 vlink. 相当于，意味着
example: She will represent our class in the speech contest.
exampleChinese: 她将代表我们班参加演讲比赛。

meaning: n. 代表；(美国) 众议院议员 adj. 典型的，有代表性的；代议制的
example: He gave a representative answer for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 他给出了一个能代表全班的回答。

meaning: n. 压制，镇压；抑制，克制
example: The new law led to repression of the protest.
exampleChinese: 新法律导致了对抗议活动的镇压。

meaning: n. 责备，批评；丢脸 vt. 责备；为…感到内疚
example: He felt reproach after breaking the promise.
exampleChinese: 他因为违背承诺而感到内疚。

meaning: vt. 复制，翻印；使再现，再制造 vi. vt. 繁殖，⽣殖
example: Scientists can reproduce the experiment in the lab.
exampleChinese: 科学家可以在实验室里重复这个实验。

meaning: n. 共和国，共和政体
example: France is a republic.
exampleChinese: 法国是一个共和国。

meaning: n. 共和主义者；共和党⼈ adj. 共和国的，共和政体的
example: She is a Republican and votes in every election.
exampleChinese: 她是一名共和党人，每次选举都会投票。

meaning: adj. 疼痛的，酸痛的；恼⽕的 n. 痛处，伤处，疮
example: My sore arm needed a day of rest.
exampleChinese: 我酸痛的胳膊需要休息一天。

meaning: n. 悲伤，伤⼼；令⼈悲伤的事 vi. 感到悲伤
example: She felt great sorrow after losing her pet.
exampleChinese: 失去宠物后，她感到非常悲伤。

meaning: adj. 所谓的；号称…的
example: The so-called expert gave wrong advice.
exampleChinese: 那个所谓的专家给出了错误的建议。

meaning: n. ⽕花；⼀丁点；活⼒；诱因 vt. 引发，触发 vi. 产⽣电⽕花
example: The match can spark a larger conflict.
exampleChinese: 这场比赛可能引发更大的冲突。

meaning: vi. 闪闪发光，闪耀 n. 光亮，闪光；闪光点，亮点
example: Her eyes sparkle when she laughs.
exampleChinese: 她笑的时候眼睛会闪闪发光。

meaning: n. 空间；太空；空⽩处，空⾏ vt. 以⼀定间隔排列
example: There is not enough space on this desk.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子上没有足够的空间。

meaning: n. 宇宙⻜船，航天器
example: The spacecraft entered orbit around the moon.
exampleChinese: 那艘宇宙飞船进入了月球轨道。

meaning: adj. ⼴阔的，宽敞的
example: The hotel room was spacious and bright.
exampleChinese: 这间酒店房间宽敞又明亮。

meaning: vt. 系，捆；系牢；打结；使关联 vi. 打结系牢，系上 vi. vt. 打成平局，得分相同 n. 领带；联系；绳⼦；束缚；平局
example: Please tie your shoes before running.
exampleChinese: 跑步前请系好你的鞋带。

meaning: n. 潮汐；潮流，趋势；难控的浪潮
example: The tide was high at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时潮水涨得很高。

meaning: adj. 整洁的；爱整洁的；⾼额的 vi. vt. 使整洁，使有条理
example: Please keep your desk tidy.
exampleChinese: 请保持你的书桌整齐。

meaning: adj. 紧的；紧⾝的；严格的；拮据的 adv. 紧紧地，牢固地
example: Keep the rope tight.
exampleChinese: 把绳子拉紧。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 倾斜；使倾向于，偏向 n. 倾斜，倾侧
example: The hill will tilt if the ground moves.
exampleChinese: 如果地面移动，这座小山就会倾斜。

meaning: n. ⼯作⽇ adv. 在⼯作⽇
example: The bus is crowded on weekday mornings.
exampleChinese: 平日早晨公交车很拥挤。

meaning: adj. ⼀周⼀次的，每周的 adv. ⼀周⼀次地，每周 n. 周报，周刊
example: We receive a weekly newsletter from school.
exampleChinese: 我们每周都会收到一份学校简报。

meaning: n. 杂草；⽔草；⼤⿇ vt. vi. 除杂草
example: Weed the garden before the flowers grow.
exampleChinese: 在花长大前先给花园除草。

meaning: vi. vt. 哭泣，流泪 vi. (伤⼝) 流⾎，渗出液体 n. 哭泣，流泪
example: She began to weep after hearing the sad news.
exampleChinese: 听到这个悲伤的消息后，她开始哭泣。

meaning: adj. 著名的；为⼈所熟知的
example: She is a well-known singer in our town.
exampleChinese: 她是我们镇上一位家喻户晓的歌手。

meaning: adj. 湿的；有⾬的；(油漆等) 未⼲的 vt. 使潮湿，把…弄湿
example: My shoes got wet in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋在雨里淋湿了。

meaning: n. 祖先；(动物) 原种；原型
example: Her ancestor came to this village long ago.
exampleChinese: 她的祖先很久以前来到这个村庄。

meaning: adj. 古代的；古⽼的
example: We saw ancient walls in the old city.
exampleChinese: 我们在古城里看到了古代的城墙。

meaning: conj. 和，与，⼜；加上；然后；那么
example: Tom and Lucy walk to school together.
exampleChinese: 汤姆和露西一起走路去学校。

meaning: n. 轶事，趣闻
example: She told an anecdote about her first day at school.
exampleChinese: 她讲了一个关于自己第一天上学的轶事。

meaning: n. 天使；善良或美丽的⼈；⼤好⼈
example: The child said the old man was like an angel.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子说这位老人像天使一样。

meaning: n. ⻆；⻆度；⽴场，观点 vt. 斜移，斜置；以(某⻆度)报道
example: He tried to angle the hook toward the fish.
exampleChinese: 他试着把鱼钩朝鱼那边引。

meaning: n. 愤怒，怒⽕ vt. 使⽣⽓，激怒
example: His anger surprised everyone.
exampleChinese: 他的愤怒让每个人都很惊讶。

meaning: adj. ⽣⽓的；⿊压压的；红肿发炎的
example: She was angry about the broken cup.
exampleChinese: 她因为杯子打碎了而生气。

meaning: n. 脚踝，脚脖⼦
example: I twisted my ankle while running.
exampleChinese: 我跑步时扭伤了脚踝。

meaning: n. 周年纪念 (⽇)
example: Today is their wedding anniversary.
exampleChinese: 今天是他们的结婚纪念日。

meaning: vt. 宣布，通知；郑重地说；通报
example: The teacher will announce the test results tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 老师明天会宣布考试成绩。

meaning: n. 触⻆，触须；天线
example: The butterfly's antenna touched the flower.
exampleChinese: 蝴蝶的触角碰到了花朵。

meaning: n. 古董，古玩 adj. 古董的，古玩的
example: We saw an antique clock in the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们在博物馆里看到了一只古董钟。

meaning: vi. vt. ⽤…打赌，下赌注 vt. 敢说，可以肯定 n. 打赌，赌注；估计，猜想
example: I bet he will finish the project on time.
exampleChinese: 我敢说他会按时完成这个项目。

meaning: vt. 背叛，出卖；流露 (情感)
example: He refused to betray his friend.
exampleChinese: 他拒绝背叛自己的朋友。

meaning: adj. 更好的；更合适的；好转的 adv. 更好地；较⼤程度地 n. 更好的事物，较好者 vt. 胜过，超过
example: This chair is better for your back.
