exampleChinese: 这把椅子对你的背更好。

meaning: prep. 在…之间；往返于 adv. 在中间
example: The ball rolled between the chairs.
exampleChinese: 球滚到了两把椅子之间。

meaning: vi. vt. 当⼼，注意，提防
example: Beware of the wet floor near the door.
exampleChinese: 当心门口附近的湿滑地面。

meaning: vt. 使困惑，使糊涂
example: The loud noise can bewilder young children.
exampleChinese: 那种巨大的噪音会让小孩子困惑。

meaning: prep. 在更远处；超出；晚于；⽆法… adv. 在或往更远处
example: The river flows beyond the village.
exampleChinese: 这条河流经村庄那边更远的地方。

meaning: n. 布，布料；牧师
example: This cloth feels soft and warm.
exampleChinese: 这种布摸起来又柔软又暖和。

meaning: vt. 给…穿⾐；为…提供⾐服
example: Parents clothe their children every winter.
exampleChinese: 父母每年冬天都给孩子们添衣。

meaning: n. ⾐服，服装
example: His clothes are still wet from the rain.
exampleChinese: 他的衣服被雨淋后还是湿的。

meaning: n. ⾐服，服装
example: Winter clothing is on sale this week.
exampleChinese: 冬季服装本周正在打折。

meaning: n. 云；云状物 vt. 使难以理解，使模糊 vi. (天空) 布满云
example: A dark cloud moved across the sky.
exampleChinese: 一朵乌云飘过天空。

meaning: adj. 多云的；浑浊的；模糊的
example: The sky is cloudy this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上的天空多云。

meaning: n. 线索，迹象；提⽰ vt. 给…提供线索
example: The map gave us a clue about the hidden house.
exampleChinese: 这张地图给了我们关于那所隐藏房子的线索。

meaning: adj. 笨拙的；不得体的；笨重的
example: I felt clumsy when I dropped the tray.
exampleChinese: 我把托盘弄掉了，感觉自己很笨拙。

meaning: n. 群，组，串，簇，堆 vi. 群集，聚集
example: A cluster of stars shone in the dark sky.
exampleChinese: 一簇星星在黑夜里闪耀。

meaning: vt. vi. 抓紧；突然抓住 n. 离合器；⼀群，⼀窝；势⼒范围
example: She clutch the rail when the bus stopped suddenly.
exampleChinese: 公交车突然停下时，她紧紧抓住扶手。

meaning: adj. 荒⽆⼈烟的；孤独凄凉的 vt. 使感到凄凉
example: The cabin stood in a desolate place far from town.
exampleChinese: 小木屋坐落在远离城镇的荒凉地方。

meaning: n. 绝望 vi. 感到绝望
example: He fell into despair after losing the game.
exampleChinese: 输掉比赛后，他陷入了绝望。

meaning: adj. 绝望的；孤注⼀掷的；渴望的
example: She felt desperate and called for help.
exampleChinese: 她感到不顾一切，便大声求助。

meaning: n. ⽬的地，终点 adj. 将要去的，预订了的
example: Our destination is the city museum.
exampleChinese: 我们的目的地是城市博物馆。

meaning: n. 命运；神意，命运之神
example: She believed her destiny was to help others.
exampleChinese: 她相信自己的命运就是帮助别人。

meaning: n. 破坏，毁灭
example: The fire caused the destruction of the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 那场火灾造成了这座旧桥的毁坏。

meaning: adj. 毁灭性的，造成破坏的
example: This chemical is destructive to plants.
exampleChinese: 这种化学物质对植物有破坏性。

meaning: n. 发动机，引擎；⽕⻋头；推动⼒
example: The engine stopped, and the car rolled to a stop.
exampleChinese: 发动机停了，汽车慢慢停了下来。

meaning: n. ⼯程师；技师，技⼯ vt. 密谋；设计制造；改变基因结构
example: My sister is an engineer at a car company.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是一家汽车公司的工程师。

meaning: n. ⼯程，⼯程设计
example: He wants to study engineering at university.
exampleChinese: 他想在大学里学习工程学。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，庞⼤的
example: The box is enormous and needs two people to lift it.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子很大，需要两个人才能抬起来。

meaning: vi. vt. 询问，打听
example: I will enquire about the train times at the station.
exampleChinese: 我会在车站询问火车时刻。

meaning: vt. 充实，使丰富；使富有
example: Reading new books can enrich your knowledge.
exampleChinese: 阅读新书可以充实你的知识。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 加⼊，招收 (成员)，注册
example: You can enroll in the art class this week.
exampleChinese: 你这周可以报名参加美术课。

meaning: adj. 最后的，最终的；决定性的 n. 决赛；期末考试，结业考试
example: This is my final answer.
exampleChinese: 这是我最终的答案。

meaning: adv. 终于，最终；最后；彻底地
example: We finally reached the top of the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们终于到达了山顶。

meaning: adj. 精美的；健康的；满意的；细的 adv. 很好，不错 n. 罚⾦，罚款 vt. 对…处以罚款
example: The weather is fine today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气很好。

meaning: vt. vi. 完成；(使) 结束 vt. ⽤尽；使筋疲⼒尽 vi. 获…成绩 n. 结尾，结局；抛光
example: I need to finish this book today.
exampleChinese: 我今天需要读完这本书。

meaning: n. ⽕；⽕灾；炉⽕；取暖器；射击 vi. vt. 射击，开⽕；射出 (⼦弹) vt. 解雇，开除；激励，使充满热情
example: We sat near the fire to keep warm.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在火旁边取暖。

meaning: n. 消防队员
example: The fireman rescued the child from the smoke.
exampleChinese: 消防队员把那个孩子从浓烟中救了出来。

meaning: n. 壁炉，⽕炉
example: The family gathered around the fireplace on a cold night.
exampleChinese: 寒冷的夜晚，全家人围坐在壁炉旁。

meaning: adj. 国库的，财政的
example: The government announced a new fiscal policy.
exampleChinese: 政府宣布了一项新的财政政策。

example: We fish in the lake every summer.
exampleChinese: 我们每年夏天都在湖里钓鱼。

meaning: n. 渔⺠，钓⻥的⼈
example: The fisherman came back with a big net of fish.
exampleChinese: 渔夫带着满满一大网鱼回来了。

meaning: adj. ⾥⾯的，内部的；内⼼的
example: The cat hid in the inner room.
exampleChinese: 那只猫躲在里面的房间里。

meaning: adj. 多得数不清的
example: There are innumerable stars in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 夜空中有数不清的星星。

meaning: n. 投⼊；输⼊；输⼊端 vt. 输⼊ (信息)
example: Please input your name and phone number.
exampleChinese: 请输入你的姓名和电话号码。

meaning: n. 询问，打听；调查，探究
example: The police made an inquiry about the missing bike.
exampleChinese: 警方对那辆失踪的自行车进行了调查。

meaning: n. 讲座，讲课；训诫 vi. 开讲座，讲授 vt. 训诫，教训
example: Her lecture on animals was very interesting.
exampleChinese: 她关于动物的演讲非常有趣。

meaning: n. 遗产，遗赠；遗留问题 adj. (计算机系统等) 已停⽌更新的
example: That old bridge is a legacy from the past.
exampleChinese: 那座旧桥是过去留下的遗产。

meaning: n. 传说；传奇⼈物；图例
example: The old legend tells of a dragon in the lake.
exampleChinese: 那个古老的传说讲的是湖里有一条龙。

meaning: vt. 借给，借出；增添 (特⾊) vt. vi. 贷 (款)
example: Could you lend me your ruler for a minute?
exampleChinese: 你能把你的尺子借给我一分钟吗？

meaning: n. 镜⽚，镜头；隐形眼镜；晶状体
example: My camera lens is very clear.
exampleChinese: 我的相机镜头很清晰。

meaning: conj. 唯恐，以免
example: Take an umbrella, lest it rain.
exampleChinese: 带上雨伞，以免下雨。

meaning: vt. vi. 捅，戳，杵；伸出，探出 n. 捅，戳，拨，挑 vt. 把…戳进，把…插⼊
example: Don't poke the dog with a stick.
exampleChinese: 不要用棍子戳那只狗。

meaning: adj. 极地的；磁极的；完全相反的
example: Polar bears live in very cold places.
exampleChinese: 北极熊生活在非常寒冷的地方。

meaning: n. 杆⼦；地极；磁极，电极；极端 vt. vi. ⽤篙撑船，摆船
example: Please lean the pole against the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把杆靠在墙上。

meaning: vt. 污染，弄脏
example: Factories can pollute the river.
exampleChinese: 工厂会污染河流。

meaning: n. 污染；污染物
example: Air pollution is a serious problem in some cities.
exampleChinese: 空气污染在一些城市是个严重问题。

meaning: n. 游泳池；池塘；后备⼈员 n. ⼀滩 vt. 集中资源
example: The companies formed a pool to share costs.
exampleChinese: 这些公司组成了联营来分摊成本。

meaning: n. 评论，意⻅ vi. vt. 评论，谈到
example: He made a rude remark about my shoes.
exampleChinese: 他对我的鞋子说了一句无礼的话。

meaning: adj. ⾮凡的，不同寻常的
example: Her singing was truly remarkable.
exampleChinese: 她的歌声确实不同寻常。

meaning: adj. 贪婪的，贪吃的
example: The greedy dog wanted both bones.
exampleChinese: 那只贪婪的狗想要两根骨头。

meaning: adj. 绿⾊的；环保的；不成熟的 n. 绿⾊；绿叶蔬菜
example: The leaves turn green in spring.
exampleChinese: 树叶在春天变绿。

meaning: n. 温室，暖房 adj. 温室效应的
example: Tom grows tomatoes in a greenhouse.
exampleChinese: 汤姆在温室里种西红柿。

meaning: vt. 同…打招呼；回应；呈现在…前
example: The teacher will greet the new students today.
exampleChinese: 老师今天会迎接新学生。

meaning: n. 问候，招呼，祝词，贺词
example: He sent a warm greeting to his teacher.
exampleChinese: 他向老师送上了亲切的问候。

meaning: n. 野兽；残暴的⼈；某种东西
example: A beast roared in the dark forest.
exampleChinese: 一只野兽在黑暗的森林里吼叫。

meaning: vt. 打败；难倒；胜过；快速搅拌 vt. vi. 打，敲打；(使) 规律作响 n. 跳动；敲击；节拍；辖区
example: Rain beat against the classroom windows all morning.
exampleChinese: 雨整个上午都敲打着教室的窗户。

meaning: prep. 在…以前；在…前⾯；当⾯ conj. 在…以前；到…之前；以免 adv. 以前，已经
example: Wash your hands before dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭前要洗手。

meaning: adj. 失明的；视⽽不⻅的；盲⽬的 n. 窗帘，卷帘 vt. 使变瞎；使眼花；使失去判断⼒
example: The blind man crossed the street slowly.
exampleChinese: 那位盲人慢慢地穿过街道。

meaning: n. ⼤块；⼤楼；街区；⼀批；阻碍 vt. 堵塞；挡住；妨碍；拦截 (球等)
example: A fallen tree can block the road.
exampleChinese: 倒下的树会阻碍道路通行。

meaning: n. ⾎；⾎统，家世
example: There was blood on his knee after he fell.
exampleChinese: 他摔倒后，膝盖上有血。

meaning: adj. ⾎淋淋的；⾎腥的，残暴的 adj. adv. (⽤以加强语⽓) 该死的 vt. 使流⾎，使沾上鲜⾎
example: The bloody knife scared everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 那把带血的刀吓坏了房间里的每个人。

meaning: n. 坟墓，冢
example: They placed flowers near the tomb.
exampleChinese: 他们在坟墓旁边放了花。

meaning: n. ⾆头；语⾔；说话⽅式；⾆状物
example: The doctor asked me to stick out my tongue.
exampleChinese: 医生让我把舌头伸出来。

meaning: n. ⼯具；⼿段；被操控的⼈
example: This tool helps me open the box safely.
exampleChinese: 这个工具帮助我安全地打开盒子。

meaning: n. 顶端；上⾯；最⾼级别；盖 adj. 最⾼的；最好的 vt. ⾼于，超过；居…之⾸；胜过
example: The cat sat on top of the wall.
exampleChinese: 猫坐在墙顶上。

meaning: n. ⽕把；⼿电筒 vt. 放⽕烧，纵⽕烧 (建筑物或汽⻋)
example: He used a torch to see in the dark.
exampleChinese: 他用手电筒在黑暗中照明。

meaning: n. 折磨，痛苦，使⼈痛苦的⼈或物 vt. 使…痛苦，折磨…；戏弄，捉弄
example: Loud music can torment people who want to sleep.
exampleChinese: 吵闹的音乐会折磨想睡觉的人。

meaning: n. 拷打，拷问；折磨，煎熬 vt. 拷打，拷问；使痛苦，使受煎熬
example: He endured torture during the war.
exampleChinese: 他在战争中忍受了折磨。

meaning: n. 急流，湍流；迸发，狂潮
example: A torrent of water rushed down the mountain.
exampleChinese: 一股急流从山上奔涌而下。

meaning: adj. 全部的，整体的；完整的 n. 整体，全部 adv. 全新地，完全不同地
example: I read the whole book in one day.
exampleChinese: 我一天就读完了整本书。

meaning: adv. 完全地，完整地
example: The plan was wholly successful.
exampleChinese: 这个计划完全成功了。

meaning: adj. 有益健康的；在道德上有益的
example: The soup was fresh and wholesome.
exampleChinese: 这汤新鲜又有益健康。

meaning: vt. 使⼤为震惊，使惊骇
example: The noise appall everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 那阵噪音使房间里每个人都大为震惊。

meaning: n. 器械，仪器；机构，组织；器官
example: The doctor checked the apparatus before the test.
exampleChinese: 医生在测试前检查了那台仪器。

meaning: n. 附录；阑尾
example: The book's appendix lists the main sources.
exampleChinese: 这本书的附录列出了主要来源。

meaning: n. 胃⼝，⻝欲；强烈欲望，渴望
example: The smell of soup gave him an appetite.
exampleChinese: 汤的香味让他有了食欲。

meaning: vi. vt. (为…) ⿎掌 vt. 称赞，赞许
example: The audience began to applaud his idea.
exampleChinese: 观众开始赞同他的想法。

meaning: n. ⿎掌，掌声，喝彩
example: The audience broke into applause after the song.
exampleChinese: 歌曲结束后，观众爆发出掌声。

meaning: n. 评价，鉴定；(对员⼯的) 考核
example: Her teacher gave her a positive appraisal.
exampleChinese: 她的老师给了她积极的评价。

meaning: adj. ⼤约的，⼤致的 vt. vi. 近似，与…基本⼀致 vt. 粗略估计，近似计算
example: The result is approximate, but it is close enough.
exampleChinese: 结果是大致的，但已经足够接近了。

meaning: adj. 随意的，武断的；专制的
example: It was arbitrary to change the rule.
exampleChinese: 改变这条规则是任意的。

meaning: n. 拱；拱⻔；⾜⼸；拱形物 vt. vi. (使) 拱起，(使) 成拱形 adj. 调⽪的，淘⽓的 pref. 最⾼等级的，主要的
example: The old stone arch stood at the garden gate.
exampleChinese: 花园门口立着一个古老的石拱门。

meaning: adj. 紧凑的，紧密的；⼩型的 n. 协定，契约；⼩汽⻋；粉饼盒 vt. 把…紧压在⼀起
example: We packed a compact lunch for the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们为这次旅行准备了一份紧凑的午餐。

meaning: n. 同伴；成双的物品之⼀；陪护
example: He was a good companion on the trip.
exampleChinese: 他是这次旅行中很好的同伴。

meaning: n. 公司；陪伴；宾客；剧团；连队
example: She works for a food company in Shanghai.
exampleChinese: 她在上海一家食品公司工作。

meaning: n. ⻋厢，舱；分隔间，隔层
example: Please put your bag in the overhead compartment.
exampleChinese: 请把你的包放在头顶行李舱里。

meaning: n. 指南针，罗盘；圆规；范围
example: He used a compass to find north on the hike.
exampleChinese: 他在徒步旅行中用指南针找到了北方。

meaning: n. 同情，怜悯
example: She spoke with compassion for the injured dog.
exampleChinese: 她带着同情心谈起那只受伤的狗。

meaning: adj. 兼容的；可共存的；合得来的
example: This software is compatible with older phones.
exampleChinese: 这个软件与旧款手机兼容。

meaning: adj. 合成的，复合的 n. 合成物，混合物；罪犯画像
example: The artist made a composite image from several photos.
exampleChinese: 这位艺术家用几张照片做出了一幅合成图像。

meaning: n. 化合物；混合物；有围墙的⼤院 adj. 复合的 vt. 使恶化；混合
example: Water and oil do not form a stable compound.
exampleChinese: 水和油不会形成稳定的化合物。

meaning: adj. 强制性的，义务的
example: School uniforms are compulsory here.
exampleChinese: 这里的校服是强制性的。

meaning: vt. 计算
example: We can compute the total in a few seconds.
exampleChinese: 我们可以在几秒钟内算出总数。

meaning: vt. 掩盖，隐藏
example: He tried to conceal the note in his pocket.
exampleChinese: 他试图把纸条藏在口袋里。

meaning: vt. 承认…属实；(勉强地) 让与 vi. vt. 承认 (竞赛、选举等的失败)
example: I must concede that you were right.
exampleChinese: 我不得不承认你是对的。

meaning: n. ⾳乐会，演唱会
example: We went to a concert in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们去公园听了一场音乐会。

meaning: n. 让步，认输；特许；租地营业权
example: The company offered a concession to attract more customers.
exampleChinese: 公司为了吸引更多顾客而作出让步。

meaning: n. (进退两难的) 窘境，困境
example: She faced a dilemma about whether to stay or leave.
exampleChinese: 她面临着是留下还是离开的困境。

meaning: adj. 勤奋的，勤勉的
example: She is a diligent student who finishes her work on time.
exampleChinese: 她是个勤奋的学生，总能按时完成作业。

meaning: n. 尺⼨，维度；⽅⾯；规模，程度
example: The teacher explained every dimension of the project.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了这个项目的每个方面。

meaning: vi. 就餐，⽤餐
example: We often dine at home on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 我们经常在星期天在家进餐。

meaning: n. 恐⻰；落伍的⼈，⽼古董
example: The museum has a dinosaur skeleton.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆有一具恐龙骨架。

meaning: n. ⼆氧化物
example: Carbon dioxide is a gas in the air.
exampleChinese: 二氧化碳是空气中的一种气体。

meaning: vt. 蘸，浸 vi. vt. (使) 下降，(使) 下沉 n. 游泳；下降；低洼处；蘸酱
example: Dip the apple slices into the yogurt.
exampleChinese: 把苹果片蘸进酸奶里。

meaning: n. 毕业⽂凭，学位证书；⽂凭课程
example: She received her diploma at graduation.
exampleChinese: 她在毕业典礼上拿到了毕业证书。

meaning: adj. 外交的，外交官的；圆滑的
example: He handled the complaint in a diplomatic way.
exampleChinese: 他用圆滑的方式处理了投诉。

meaning: n. ⽅向；趋势；⽤法说明；指导
example: The road changed direction near the river.
exampleChinese: 这条路在河边改变了方向。

meaning: n. 导演；主任，主管；经理，董事
example: The director checked every report.
exampleChinese: 主管检查了每一份报告。

meaning: n. 名录，电话簿；(计算机) ⽬录
example: You can find the phone number in the directory.
exampleChinese: 你可以在目录里找到电话号码。

meaning: vt. 装备，配备；使有能⼒
example: The teacher will equip the lab with new tools.
exampleChinese: 老师会为实验室配备新工具。

meaning: n. 设备，装备，配备
example: The campers checked their equipment before the hike.
exampleChinese: 徒步前，露营者检查了他们的装备。

meaning: n. 公平；资产净值；股票
example: The manager said the project would improve equity in pay.
exampleChinese: 经理说这个项目会提高薪酬公平性。

meaning: vi. vt. 呻吟，哼哼 vi. (因重压⽽) 嘎吱作响；抱怨 n. 呻吟声，哼哼声，嘎吱声
example: He let out a groan after lifting the heavy box.
exampleChinese: 他抬起那只重箱子后发出了一声呻吟。

meaning: n. ⻝品杂货商；⻝物杂货店
example: The grocer opened the shop at six.
exampleChinese: 杂货店老板六点就开门了。

meaning: vi. vt. 摸索，寻找 vt. 猥亵，摸 n. 抚摸，猥亵
example: We had to grope for the light switch in the dark.
exampleChinese: 我们不得不在黑暗中摸索着找电灯开关。

meaning: n. 爱好
example: My hobby is collecting stamps.
exampleChinese: 我的嗜好是收集邮票。

meaning: adj. 空⼼的；虚假的；凹陷的 n. 凹陷处，坑洼处；洞，孔 vt. 挖空，挖出 (孔、洞)
example: The cave had a hollow space near the entrance.
exampleChinese: 洞口附近有一处凹陷的空洞。

meaning: adj. 由同种族⼈组成的，同类组成的
example: The class is now more homogeneous than it was before.
exampleChinese: 这个班现在比以前更同质化了。

meaning: adj. 诚实的，坦诚的；踏实认真的
example: He is honest and never tells lies.
exampleChinese: 他很诚实，从不说谎。

meaning: vt. 安装；把…装到计算机上；任命
example: Please install the new app on your phone.
exampleChinese: 请把这个新应用安装到你的手机上。

meaning: n. 安装；安装的设备；(军事) 设施
example: The installation took less than an hour.
exampleChinese: 这次安装不到一个小时就完成了。

meaning: n. ⼀期 (分期付款)；⼀期 (故事)
example: He paid the first installment on the bike yesterday.
exampleChinese: 他昨天付了自行车的第一期款。

meaning: n. 例⼦，事例 vt. 举…为例
example: This sentence is a good instance of polite language.
exampleChinese: 这个句子是礼貌用语的一个好例子。

meaning: adj. ⽴即的；即⻝的，速溶的 n. 刹那，顷刻
example: We got an instant reply.
exampleChinese: 我们立刻得到了回复。

meaning: adj. 瞬间的，即刻的
example: The change was instantaneous.
exampleChinese: 这个变化是瞬间发生的。

meaning: n. 肢，臂，腿；⼤树枝
example: A bird broke its wing, and the limb healed slowly.
exampleChinese: 一只鸟折断了翅膀，而这只肢体愈合得很慢。

meaning: adj. 疲软的，⽆⼒的 vi. ⼀瘸⼀拐地⾛；艰难地进展 n. ⼀瘸⼀拐，跛⾏
example: After the long run, he started to limp.
exampleChinese: 长跑后，他开始一瘸一拐地走。

meaning: adj. 直线的；线性的
example: The graph shows a linear increase in sales.
exampleChinese: 这张图表显示销售额呈线性增长。

meaning: n. 亚⿇布；亚⿇制品
example: My grandmother keeps her sheets made of linen.
exampleChinese: 我祖母把床单一直用亚麻布做。

meaning: n. 邮轮，客轮；衬⾥，内衬
example: We boarded a luxury liner for the trip to Alaska.
exampleChinese: 我们登上了一艘豪华客轮去阿拉斯加旅行。

meaning: vi. 继续存留；逗留，流连；奄奄⼀息
example: The sweet smell seemed to linger in the room.
exampleChinese: 那股甜味似乎一直留在房间里。

meaning: adj. 语⾔ (学) 的
example: She studies linguistic theory at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学里研究语言学理论。

meaning: pron. 我的 n. 矿，矿井；地雷，⽔雷 vt. vi. 开采，采矿 vt. 布雷
example: That blue backpack is mine.
exampleChinese: 那个蓝色背包是我的。

meaning: n. 矿物，矿物质，矿产
example: This rock contains a rare mineral.
exampleChinese: 这块岩石含有一种稀有矿物。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 混合，(使) 相混 vi. (社交场合) 应酬，交际
example: Guests began to mingle after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后，客人们开始互相交际。

meaning: adj. 很⼩的，微型的 n. 微型画，⼩画像；缩微模型
example: The child carried a miniature car in his pocket.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子把一辆微型汽车装在口袋里。

meaning: vt. 使减⾄最低程度；对…轻描淡写
example: We should minimize waste at school.
exampleChinese: 我们应该尽量减少学校里的浪费。

meaning: adj. 最⼩的，最低限度的 n. 最⼩值，最低限度 adv. ⾄少，最低
example: The minimum age to join is ten.
exampleChinese: 参加的最低年龄是十岁。

meaning: n. 部⻓，⼤⾂；牧师；公使 vi. 服侍，帮助
example: The minister visited the school yesterday.
exampleChinese: 那位部长昨天参观了这所学校。

meaning: n. (政府的) 部；(全体) 牧师
example: The ministry announced a new education plan.
exampleChinese: 该部门公布了一项新的教育计划。

meaning: adj. 较⼩的，次要的，轻微的；⼩调的 n. 未成年⼈；辅修课程 vi. 辅修
example: His injury was only minor.
exampleChinese: 他的伤势只是轻微的。

meaning: n. 少数；少数⺠族，少数群体
example: The school supports minority students.
exampleChinese: 学校支持少数族裔学生。

meaning: prep. 减去；缺少 adj. ⼩于零的，负的；负⾯的 n. 减号，负号；缺点
example: Ten minus four equals six.
exampleChinese: 十减四等于六。

meaning: n. 分钟；⽚刻；时刻；会议记录 adj. 极⼩的；细致⼊微的 vt. 将…记⼊会议记录
example: The class starts in five minute.
exampleChinese: 课还有五分钟开始。

meaning: n. 灰，灰烬；废墟；⻣灰
example: Ash covered the ground after the fire.
exampleChinese: 火灾后，地上覆盖着灰。

meaning: adj. 羞愧的；因尴尬⽽不愿…的
example: He felt ashamed after lying to his friend.
exampleChinese: 他对自己对朋友撒谎感到惭愧。

meaning: adv. 在岸上，向岸上
example: The boat drifted ashore after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，小船漂到了岸上。

meaning: n. ⽅⾯；外观；(建筑等的) 朝向
example: One important aspect of the plan is cost.
exampleChinese: 这个计划的一个重要方面是成本。

meaning: vi. 向往，渴望，有志于
example: Many students aspire to study abroad one day.
exampleChinese: 许多学生都渴望有一天出国学习。

meaning: n. ⽊材；废旧⼤件杂物 vi. 缓慢笨拙地移动 vt. 迫使担负 (⼯作，责任等)
example: They had to lumber the old boxes into the truck.
exampleChinese: 他们不得不把那些旧箱子笨重地搬上卡车。

meaning: n. 块；⽅糖；肿块；傻⼤个 vt. 把…归并⼀起 (或合起来考虑)
example: Please put a lump of sugar into my tea.
exampleChinese: 请往我的茶里放一块方糖。

meaning: adj. ⽉球的，⽉亮的，阴历的
example: The lunar surface looks bright in this photo.
exampleChinese: 这张照片里的月球表面看起来很明亮。

meaning: n. 肺
example: My lung hurt when I coughed.
exampleChinese: 我咳嗽时肺部疼痛。

meaning: n. 奢侈；奢侈品；难得的享受
example: A hot bath is a real luxury after a long day.
exampleChinese: 辛苦一天后，洗个热水澡真是一种难得的享受。

meaning: n. 歌词；抒情诗 adj. (诗歌) 抒情的
example: She wrote the lyric for the new song.
exampleChinese: 她为这首新歌写了歌词。

meaning: n. 括号；等级 (段)；(墙上的) 托架 vt. 把…视为同类，把…相提并论
example: Write the answer in the bracket on the right.
exampleChinese: 把答案写在右边的括号里。

meaning: n. 刹⻋，⻋闸；阻碍，阻碍物 vi. vt. 刹⻋
example: The driver had to brake suddenly at the crossing.
exampleChinese: 司机不得不在十字路口突然刹车。

meaning: n. ⻩铜；铜管乐器；要员
example: The band played brass instruments at the parade.
exampleChinese: 乐队在游行中演奏铜管乐器。

meaning: adj. 勇敢的 vt. 勇敢⾯对，冒⻛险，经受困难
example: The brave girl spoke up first.
exampleChinese: 那个勇敢的女孩第一个发言。

meaning: adj. 宇宙的；巨⼤且重要的
example: Scientists study cosmic events to learn more about the universe.
exampleChinese: 科学家研究宇宙事件，以便更多地了解宇宙。

meaning: n. 费⽤；成本；代价，损失 vt. 需付费，价钱为；使损失
example: The ticket cost fifty yuan.
exampleChinese: 这张票价格是五十元。

meaning: n. 演出服装；服装，装束；游泳⾐
example: The actor changed into a bright costume before the show.
exampleChinese: 演出前，演员换上了鲜艳的戏装。

meaning: adj. 温暖舒适的；亲密的；密切的
example: The small room felt cozy on a cold night.
exampleChinese: 寒冷的夜晚，这个小房间显得温暖舒适。

meaning: n. ⻓沙发；诊察台 vt. (以某种语⾔⻛格) 措辞
example: Dad fell asleep on the couch after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后，爸爸在长沙发上睡着了。

meaning: vi. (按顺序) 数数；重要，要紧 vt. vi. 计算…的总数；正式认可；算作 vt. 把…算⼊ n. 总数；数数；罪状；论点；伯爵
example: Please count the books on the desk.
exampleChinese: 请数一数桌子上的书。

meaning: n. 柜台；料理台；计算器 vt. vi. 反驳，驳斥 vt. 抵制，抵消 adv. 逆向地，反对地
example: Please pay at the counter.
exampleChinese: 请在柜台付款。

meaning: n. 职务相当的⼈，作⽤相当的事物
example: Her counterpart in Japan sent a similar report.
exampleChinese: 她在日本的对应负责人发来了一份类似的报告。

meaning: n. 国家；乡村；区域；全国⼈⺠ adj. 乡下的，农村的；乡村⾳乐的
example: China is a large country.
exampleChinese: 中国是一个大国。

meaning: n. 乡村，农村
example: We spent the weekend in the countryside.
exampleChinese: 我们在乡下度过了周末。

meaning: n. 郡，县
example: My county has many farms and small towns.
exampleChinese: 我们县有许多农场和小镇。

meaning: n. 兴奋，激动；令⼈兴奋的事物
example: There was great excitement before the school trip.
exampleChinese: 学校旅行前，大家都非常兴奋。

meaning: vi. vt. 呼喊，惊叫
example: He could not help but exclaim when he saw the prize.
exampleChinese: 当他看到奖品时，不禁惊叫起来。

meaning: n. (集体) 短途旅游；涉⾜，涉猎
example: Our class took an excursion to the science museum.
exampleChinese: 我们班进行了一次去科学博物馆的短途旅行。

meaning: n. 借⼝，理由；假条 vt. 原谅；为…辩解；准许…离开
example: Please excuse my mistake.
exampleChinese: 请原谅我的错误。

meaning: adj. 被免除 (义务、付款) 的 vt. 豁免，免除 (义务、付款)
example: Some students are exempt from the test.
exampleChinese: 一些学生被免除了这次考试。

meaning: n. 锻炼；练习；习题；运⽤；操练 n. (为达到特定结果的) 活动 vt. ⾏使，运⽤ vi. vt. 锻炼，训练
example: I exercise for thirty minutes every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上锻炼三十分钟。

meaning: adj. 最重要的，最好的 adv. 最重要地，⾸要地
example: The foremost problem is the lack of water.
exampleChinese: 最重要的问题是缺水。

meaning: vt. vi. 原谅，宽恕 vt. 对不起，请原谅；免除 (债务)
example: Please forgive me for being late.
exampleChinese: 请原谅我迟到了。

meaning: adv. (从某时) 往前，(从某处) 向外
example: The road went forth through the forest.
exampleChinese: 这条路向前穿过森林。

meaning: adj. 即将到来的；现成的
example: The report is forthcoming next week.
exampleChinese: 这份报告下周即将发布。

meaning: n. 两周，⼗四天
example: We will visit my aunt in a fortnight.
exampleChinese: 我们两星期后会去看望我姑妈。

meaning: n. 热情好客；招待茶点，款待
example: The family showed great hospitality to every guest.
exampleChinese: 这家人对每一位客人都表现出极大的热情好客。

meaning: n. 主⼈；主办者；主持⼈；许多 vt. 主办 (活动)；主持 (节⽬)；做东
example: The host welcomed us at the door.
exampleChinese: 主人在门口欢迎了我们。

meaning: n. ⼈质
example: The guards kept the hostage safe during the rescue.
exampleChinese: 在营救行动中，警卫确保了人质的安全。

meaning: n. ⼥主⼈；⼥招待；⼥主持⼈
example: The hostess greeted us at the door.
exampleChinese: 女主人在门口迎接了我们。

meaning: adj. 敌意的；反对的；(条件) 不利的
example: The hikers became hostile when strangers entered their camp.
exampleChinese: 陌生人进入营地时，徒步旅行者变得充满敌意。

meaning: n. 猎⽝ vt. 紧追，追踪，纠缠
example: The police used a trained hound to track the missing boy.
exampleChinese: 警察用一只训练有素的猎犬追踪失踪男孩。

meaning: vi. 盘旋，悬停；徘徊，摇摆不定
example: A hawk can hover above the field for several minutes.
exampleChinese: 一只鹰可以在田野上空盘旋好几分钟。

meaning: vi. 嗥叫，⻓嚎；⼤声叫喊；呼啸 vi. vt. 怒吼，怒声要求 n. 嗥叫，⻓嚎；喊叫声
example: The dog began to howl at midnight.
exampleChinese: 那只狗在午夜开始嗥叫。

meaning: n. 码头；港区；⽉台；被告席 vi. vt. (使船) 进港；(航天器) 对接 vt. 扣除 (⼯资等)
example: The boat will dock near the old harbor at noon.
exampleChinese: 这艘船中午会停靠在老港口附近的码头。

meaning: n. 信条，主义，教义
example: The teacher explained the doctrine in simple words.
exampleChinese: 老师用简单的话解释了这一教义。

meaning: vt. 捐赠；献 (⾎，器官等)
example: Many people donate books to the village library.
exampleChinese: 许多人向乡村图书馆捐赠书籍。

meaning: n. 剂量；⼀点 vt. 给…服药
example: Take one dose of the medicine after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后服用一剂这种药。

meaning: n. 点，⼩圆点 vt. 在…加点；遍布
example: She drew a small dot on the map.
exampleChinese: 她在地图上画了一个小圆点。

meaning: adj. 亲密的；隐私的；幽静舒适的 vt. 透露，(间接) 表⽰，暗⽰ n. 知⼰，密友，⾄交
example: She shared an intimate secret with her best friend.
exampleChinese: 她和最好的朋友分享了一个私密的秘密。

meaning: vt. 恐吓，威胁
example: Bullies often intimidate younger students.
exampleChinese: 欺负人的人常常恐吓年纪更小的学生。

meaning: adj. 错综复杂的
example: The necklace has an intricate pattern.
exampleChinese: 这条项链有着错综复杂的图案。

meaning: vt. 激起…的兴趣，引起…的好奇 vi. 密谋，施诡计 n. 密谋，阴谋；引⼈⼊胜的特质
example: The puzzle story will intrigue the readers.
exampleChinese: 这个谜团重重的故事会激起读者的兴趣。

meaning: adj. 本质的，内在的，固有的
example: Kindness is an intrinsic part of good manners.
exampleChinese: 善良是良好礼貌的内在组成部分。

meaning: vi. 闯⼊，侵⼊；打扰，⼲涉
example: Please do not intrude on our private conversation.
exampleChinese: 请不要打扰我们的私人谈话。

meaning: n. 直觉
example: My intuition told me to stay home.
exampleChinese: 我的直觉告诉我待在家里。

meaning: vi. vt. 武装⼊侵，侵略 vt. ⼤量涌⼊；侵扰，⼲预
example: The soldiers will invade the city at dawn.
exampleChinese: 士兵将在黎明时分入侵这座城市。

meaning: n. ⼊侵，侵略；涌⼊；侵犯
example: The invasion caused fear across the country.
exampleChinese: 这场入侵在全国引起了恐慌。

meaning: adj. ⽆法律效⼒的；站不住脚的 n. 病弱者，伤残者
example: The contract is invalid without a signature.
exampleChinese: 没有签名，这份合同无效。

meaning: adj. ⾮常宝贵的，极为有⽤的
example: Her advice was invaluable during the exam.
exampleChinese: 她的建议在考试期间极为宝贵。

meaning: n. 熟练，精通
example: He showed great proficiency in English.
exampleChinese: 他展现出了很高的英语熟练程度。

meaning: n. 概述，简介；侧⾯轮廓；形象 vt. 扼要介绍，概述，写简介
example: Her profile on the website lists her hobbies and school.
exampleChinese: 她在网站上的简介列出了她的爱好和学校。

meaning: vt. vi. 撕破，裂开 vt. 扯掉，扯下；(从⽹上) 撷取⾳频等 n. 撕开的⼤⼝⼦；离岸流
example: The sharp rock can rip my jacket.
exampleChinese: 那块锋利的石头会把我的夹克撕破。

meaning: adj. (⽔果等) 成熟的；时机成熟的
example: The peaches are ripe and ready to eat.
exampleChinese: 这些桃子熟了，可以吃了。

meaning: n. 仪式；惯例，⽼规矩 adj. 仪式的；例⾏公事的，⽼套的
example: We follow a morning ritual before class.
exampleChinese: 我们在上课前都会遵循一个晨间惯例。

meaning: vi. 吼叫，轰鸣；放声⼤笑 vi. vt. 咆哮，⼤声喊叫 n. 咆哮，吼叫；呼啸声，隆隆声
example: The crowd began to roar when the team scored.
exampleChinese: 当球队进球时，人群开始欢呼吼叫。

meaning: vt. vi. 烘，烤 (⾁等)；焙，炒 (坚果) vt. (对某⼈) ⾮常⽣⽓，严厉批评 n. 烤⾁；⼾外烧烤野餐会 adj. 烤的，焙的
example: We will roast the chicken for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们会把鸡肉烤来当晚饭。

meaning: vt. 抢劫，掠夺
example: The thief tried to rob a small shop.
exampleChinese: 小偷试图抢劫一家小商店。

meaning: adj. 强健的；结实的；坚定的
example: She is robust enough to finish the long hike.
exampleChinese: 她身体强健，足以完成这次长途徒步。

meaning: n. 岩⽯；⽯⼦；摇滚乐；靠⼭ vi. vt. (使) 轻轻摇晃；(使) 剧烈摇摆 vt. 使震惊，使害怕 vi. 随摇滚乐跳舞；很好
example: The boy sat on a large rock by the river.
exampleChinese: 那个男孩坐在河边的一块大岩石上。

meaning: n. 杆，竿，棒；藤杖
example: He used a rod to support the small tent.
exampleChinese: 他用一根杆子来支撑那个小帐篷。

meaning: n. 运动，移动；动作；提议 vi. vt. (以头或⼿) 做动作，⽰意
example: The motion of the train made the windows shake.
exampleChinese: 火车的移动使窗户都在晃动。

meaning: vt. 成为…的动机；激发，激励
example: The coach can motivate the players to work harder.
exampleChinese: 教练能激励球员更加努力。

meaning: n. (⾏动的) 动机，缘由 adj. 引起运动的，提供动⼒的
example: Her motive for helping was simple kindness.
exampleChinese: 她帮忙的动机很简单，就是善意。

meaning: n. 发动机，⻢达；汽⻋ adj. 机动的；汽⻋的；肌⾁运动的
example: The motor stopped suddenly.
exampleChinese: 马达突然停了下来。

meaning: vt. 安排，组织开展；登上；安置 vi. 逐步增加 vt. vi. 骑上，乘上 n. ⼭峰；坐骑；托架
example: They will mount a new campaign next week.
exampleChinese: 他们下周将组织开展一项新活动。

meaning: vt. vi. 哀悼；对…感到遗憾
example: Many people mourn the loss of their friend.
exampleChinese: 许多人哀悼失去朋友的痛苦。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 移动；搬家，搬迁；改变 vi. 前进，进展；采取⾏动，做 (事) vt. 使感动 n. ⾏动；移动；搬家；改变
example: One wrong move can drop the blocks.
exampleChinese: 一步走错就会让这些积木掉下来。

meaning: adj. 硬的；僵硬的；稠的；激烈的 adv. ⾮常，极其 n. 死⼫ vt. 不付钱给，不给…⼩费
example: My shirt feels stiff after it dries.
exampleChinese: 我的衬衫晾干后摸起来很硬。

meaning: adv. 还是，仍然；但，不过；还有 adj. 静⽌的，寂静的；⽆⻛的 vi. vt. (使) 静⽌ n. 定格画⾯，剧照
example: She is still reading by the window.
exampleChinese: 她仍然在窗边看书。

meaning: vt. vi. 蜇，叮；(使) 感觉刺痛 vt. 激怒，使不安；敲诈，欺诈 n. 螫针，刺；刺伤，蜇伤；痛苦
example: The bee can sting if you get too close.
exampleChinese: 如果你靠得太近，蜜蜂就会蜇人。

meaning: n. 缝合伤⼝的缝线；(缝纫的) 针脚 vt. 缝，缝补；缝合 (伤⼝)
example: Please stitch this tear before class starts.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前把这个破口缝好。

meaning: n. 浪漫，爱情 vt. 和 (某⼈) 谈情说爱
example: They went out to dinner for a little romance.
exampleChinese: 他们出去吃晚饭，享受了一点浪漫气氛。

meaning: adj. 浪漫的；有情调的；不切实际的 n. 浪漫的⼈；浪漫主义作家
example: The movie was romantic and full of soft music.
exampleChinese: 这部电影很浪漫，充满了轻柔的音乐。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 弹起，弹跳；拒付 (⽀票) vi. (在…上) 跳动，蹦；颠簸⾏进 vt. 把⼩孩放在膝上颠着玩；解雇 n. 弹跳，跳动；弹性；活⼒；蓬松
example: The ball began to bounce on the floor.
exampleChinese: 球开始在地板上弹跳。

meaning: adj. 肯定会的；受约束的；前往…的 vi. 跳跃着跑 vt. 形成…的边界 n. 界限，限度；蹦跳，跳跃
example: She is bound by the school rules.
exampleChinese: 她受学校规则约束。

meaning: n. 分界线，边界
example: A white line marked the boundary of the field.
exampleChinese: 一条白线标出了球场的边界。

meaning: n. 陷阱，圈套；困境，牢笼；嘴 vt. 使陷⼊困境；卡住；使陷⼊圈套 vt. 留存，储存(⽓、⽔等)
example: The net was set to trap the rabbit.
exampleChinese: 网被设好，用来捕捉兔子。

meaning: n. 垃圾，废物；劣质品；窝囊废 vt. 损坏，毁坏；抨击；把…抛弃
example: Please throw the trash in the bin.
exampleChinese: 请把垃圾扔进垃圾桶里。

meaning: vi. vt. 旅⾏，旅游 vi. 传播；宜于⻓途运输；⼴为流传 n. 旅⾏，旅游
example: My grandparents travel by train every spring.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母每年春天都坐火车旅行。

meaning: adj. ⽊制的
example: The table is made of wooden boards.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子是用木板做的。

meaning: vi. ⼯作，⼲活；争取；运转；奏效 vt. 使⼯作；管理，经营；操作 n. ⼯作，职业；⼯作成果；作品
example: My parents work in the same hospital.
exampleChinese: 我父母在同一家医院工作。

meaning: n. ⼯作者；⼯⼈，雇员
example: The worker fixed the broken door.
exampleChinese: 那位工人修好了坏掉的门。

meaning: n. 体育锻炼，体育训练
example: I need a short workout after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我需要做一会儿锻炼。

meaning: n. ⻋间，作坊；研讨会，研习班
example: The students met in the workshop to build model planes.
exampleChinese: 学生们在车间里集合，制作模型飞机。

meaning: prep. 像，如同；作为，当作 adv. 如同；和…⼀样 conj. 当…时；照…⽅式；因为；尽管
example: As it was raining, we stayed inside.
exampleChinese: 因为在下雨，我们待在室内。

meaning: vi. vt. 上升，攀登 vi. 晋升
example: We will ascend the hill before sunset.
exampleChinese: 我们将在日落前攀登那座小山。

meaning: vt. 弄清，查明
example: I need to ascertain the time of the next bus.
exampleChinese: 我需要查明下一班公交车的时间。

meaning: vt. 将…归因于；认为是…的特点
example: People often ascribe his success to hard work.
exampleChinese: 人们常把他的成功归因于勤奋。

meaning: adj. 凉的；冷静的；冷漠的；酷的 vt. vi. (使) 变凉，冷却 vi. 冷静下来
example: The evening air is cool after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后的傍晚空气很凉爽。

meaning: vi. 合作，协作；协助，配合
example: We can cooperate to finish the project on time.
exampleChinese: 我们可以合作，按时完成这个项目。

meaning: adj. 合作的；配合的；共同拥有的 n. 合作企业，合作机构
example: The class was cooperative during the group activity.
exampleChinese: 在小组活动中，这个班级很配合。

meaning: vt. 使…协调 vi. vt. (使⾐服等) 搭配 n. 坐标，坐标值 adj. (在句中) 并列的
example: Please coordinate your notes with the team plan.
exampleChinese: 请把你的笔记和团队计划协调一致。

meaning: vi. (成功地) 应付，处理
example: I can cope with a busy school day.
exampleChinese: 我能应付忙碌的上学日。

meaning: n. 复印件，副本；⼀份；稿件 vt. 复制；抄写；模仿 vi. 作弊，抄袭
example: Please make a copy of this page.
exampleChinese: 请把这一页复印一份。

meaning: n. 版权，著作权 adj. 受版权保护的
example: This song is still under copyright.
exampleChinese: 这首歌仍受版权保护。

meaning: n. 铜；铜币，铜板；警察
example: The old pot was made of copper.
exampleChinese: 那个旧锅是铜做的。

meaning: n. 粗线，细绳；电源线；灯芯绒裤
example: He tied the cord around the box.
exampleChinese: 他把绳子系在盒子上。

meaning: adj. 热情友好的，和蔼可亲的 n. 烈性甜酒
example: She gave us a cordial smile.
exampleChinese: 她向我们友好地笑了笑。

meaning: n. 果核；中⼼部分；核⼼ adj. 核⼼的，最重要的 vt. 去核
example: The core of the apple was brown.
exampleChinese: 苹果的果核变褐了。

example: The farmer planted corn in the field.
exampleChinese: 农民在田里种了玉米。

meaning: n. 冠状病毒
example: Coronavirus spread quickly around the world.
exampleChinese: 冠状病毒迅速在全世界传播。

meaning: adj. 准确⽆误的；合适的，恰当的 vt. 校正，矫正；批改
example: Please correct the mistake in this sentence.
exampleChinese: 请改正这个句子里的错误。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 相互关联 n. 相关的事物，互为关联的事物
example: Scientists correlate sleep and memory.
exampleChinese: 科学家把睡眠和记忆联系起来。

meaning: vi. 相符，⼀致；类似，相当；通信
example: Her actions correspond to her words.
exampleChinese: 她的行动与她的话一致。

meaning: n. 往来书信；通信；关系，联系
example: We keep correspondence with our old teacher.
exampleChinese: 我们和以前的老师保持通信。

meaning: n. 记者，通讯员；通信者
example: The correspondent sent a report from London.
exampleChinese: 那位记者从伦敦发来了一篇报道。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 腐蚀 vi. vt. 削弱，损害，破坏
example: Salt water can corrode metal.
exampleChinese: 盐水会腐蚀金属。

meaning: adj. 腐败的；不道德的；受损的 vt. 使腐化；败坏，破坏 vt. vi. 损坏(计算机⽂件)
example: The corrupt official lost his job.
exampleChinese: 那名腐败官员丢了工作。

meaning: vi. 跳⽔；潜⽔；俯冲；暴跌 n. 跳⽔；潜⽔；俯冲
example: The kids dive into the pool after school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们放学后跳进游泳池。

meaning: adj. 天赐的，神的；绝妙的，极棒的 vt. 猜测，揣度 vt. vi. (⽤探测棒) 探测
example: The sky looked divine at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时天空美极了。

meaning: n. 离婚；脱离，分离 vt. vi. 与 (某⼈) 离婚 vt. 使分离，使脱离
example: Their divorce was final last week.
exampleChinese: 他们的离婚在上周正式生效了。

meaning: adj. 眩晕的；快得令⼈眩晕的；笨的
example: The boat ride made me dizzy.
exampleChinese: 这次乘船让我感到头晕。

meaning: vt. 引起，唤起 (回忆或感情等)
example: The smell of bread can evoke happy memories.
exampleChinese: 面包的香味会唤起快乐的回忆。

meaning: adj. 精确的；严谨的；精密的 vt. 勒索，索取；迫使，强加…于
example: Please give the exact time of the meeting.
exampleChinese: 请给出会议的准确时间。

meaning: vt. 超出 (数量等)；超越 (规定等)
example: The teacher said we should not exceed the limit.
exampleChinese: 老师说我们不应该超过限制。

meaning: adv. 极其，⾮常
example: She was exceedingly kind to the new student.
exampleChinese: 她对新来的学生非常友善。

meaning: vi. 突出，擅⻓，胜过 (他⼈) vt. 胜过平时
example: He can excel in math competitions.
exampleChinese: 他能在数学竞赛中表现出色。

meaning: prep. 除…之外 conj. 只是，但是 vt. 不包括，把…排除在外
example: Everyone came except Tom.
exampleChinese: 除了汤姆，大家都来了。

meaning: n. 例外；规则的例外，例外的事物
example: There is one exception to the rule.
exampleChinese: 这条规则有一个例外。

meaning: adj. 杰出的，⾮凡的；罕⻅的，异常的
example: Her exceptional music talent impressed everyone in class.
exampleChinese: 她杰出的音乐天赋让全班都印象深刻。

meaning: n. 摘录，节选⽚段 vt. 摘录，节选
example: He read an excerpt from the novel to the class.
exampleChinese: 他给全班读了这部小说的一个节选。

meaning: n. 过多，过量；超过的部分 adj. 过多的，过量的
example: Too much sugar can cause excess weight.
exampleChinese: 糖分过多会导致体重超标。

meaning: n. ⼝⾹糖；⽛龈，⽛床；树㬵，树脂
example: She chewed gum during the long bus ride.
exampleChinese: 她在漫长的公交车上嚼着口香糖。

meaning: n. 枪，炮；喷枪；发令枪声
example: The police found a gun in the bag.
exampleChinese: 警方在包里发现了一把枪。

meaning: n. 直觉，本能；勇⽓；肠道；内脏 adj. 本能的，⾮理性的 vt. 取出…的内脏；损毁房屋内部
example: He trusted his gut and called his friend.
exampleChinese: 他相信自己的直觉，给朋友打了电话。

meaning: adj. 暂时的，过渡的；期中的 n. 期间
example: We will stay in the interim office until the repairs finish.
exampleChinese: 在维修结束前，我们将暂时待在临时办公室里。

meaning: adj. 中级的；居中的，中间的 n. 中级⽔平者
example: She is taking an intermediate English course this term.
exampleChinese: 她这学期在上中级英语课程。

meaning: adj. 间歇的，断断续续的
example: The train delays were intermittent all morning.
exampleChinese: 火车的延误整个上午断断续续地出现。

meaning: vi. vt. 打断，打扰 vt. 使中断，使暂停；遮挡，阻断
example: Do not interrupt me while I am speaking.
exampleChinese: 我说话的时候不要打断我。

meaning: n. 交点，道路交叉⼝；交叉
example: The road intersection was crowded with cars.
exampleChinese: 那个道路交叉口挤满了汽车。

meaning: n. 间隔；中场休息
example: There was a short interval between the two classes.
exampleChinese: 两节课之间有一段短暂的间隔。

meaning: n. ⾯试；采访；⾯谈 vt. 对 (某⼈) 进⾏⾯试；采访；⾯谈 vi. 接受⾯试
example: The reporter will interview the school artist.
exampleChinese: 记者将采访学校里的那位艺术家。

meaning: adj. 忠诚的，忠⼼的
example: He stayed loyal to his team for many years.
exampleChinese: 他多年来一直忠于自己的球队。

meaning: n. 忠诚，忠⼼；忠于…的强烈情感
example: Her loyalty to her friends never changed.
exampleChinese: 她对朋友的忠诚从未改变。

meaning: vt. 给…上润滑油，上油
example: You should lubricate the bike chain before the ride.
exampleChinese: 骑车前你应该给自行车链条上润滑油。

meaning: n. 好运，运⽓
example: I had the luck to find my lost keys.
exampleChinese: 我很走运，找到了丢失的钥匙。

meaning: adj. 幸运的；吉利的
example: You are lucky to catch the last bus.
exampleChinese: 你真幸运，赶上了最后一班公交车。

meaning: adj. 湿润的，潮湿的
example: The towel was still moist after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后毛巾还是湿润的。

meaning: n. 潮⽓，湿⽓，⽔分
example: There was moisture on the window in the morning.
exampleChinese: 早上窗户上有水汽。

meaning: n. 分⼦
example: A water molecule is very small.
exampleChinese: 一个水分子非常小。

meaning: n. 势头，冲劲；冲⼒；动量
example: The team kept its momentum after the first win.
exampleChinese: 球队在首胜后保持了势头。

meaning: n. 君主，国王，⼥王
example: The monarch lived in a large palace.
exampleChinese: 那位君主住在一座大宫殿里。

meaning: adj. 货币的，⾦融的
example: The country made a monetary reform last year.
exampleChinese: 这个国家去年进行了货币改革。

meaning: vt. 监视；监听 n. 显⽰器；监控器；班⻓；监督员
example: I use a large monitor for online classes.
exampleChinese: 我用一台大监视器上网课。

meaning: n. 怪物；庞然⼤物；恶棍；⼩坏蛋 adj. 巨⼤的，庞⼤的
example: A monster jumped out in the movie.
exampleChinese: 电影里跳出了一个怪物。

meaning: n. 纪念碑，纪念馆；名胜；典范
example: The monument honors brave soldiers.
exampleChinese: 这座纪念碑纪念勇敢的士兵。

meaning: n. ⾃豪；⾃尊⼼；傲慢；狮群 vt. 为…⽽骄傲
example: She felt pride when her team won the game.
exampleChinese: 当她的队赢得比赛时，她感到自豪。

meaning: n. 牧师，神⽗；神职⼈员
example: The priest gave a short prayer before dinner.
exampleChinese: 牧师在晚餐前作了简短的祷告。

meaning: n. 奖，奖品；难能可贵的事物 adj. 应得奖的；极好的 vt. 重视，珍视；撬开
example: She won first prize in the art contest.
exampleChinese: 她在美术比赛中获得了一等奖。

meaning: n. 可能性，概率；有可能发⽣的事
example: There is a high probability of rain tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 明天下雨的可能性很大。

meaning: adj. 可能的，也许的，⼤概的
example: It is probable that she will win the race.
exampleChinese: 她很可能会赢得这场比赛。

meaning: vi. 俯⾝，弯腰；(站⽴时) ⼸背 n. 驼背；⻔廊
example: He had to stoop to pick up the coin.
exampleChinese: 他不得不弯腰去捡那枚硬币。

meaning: n. 暴⻛⾬；(群情迸发的) 浪潮 vi. vt. 突袭，攻占 vi. ⽓呼呼地疾⾛ vt. 怒吼，⼤发雷霆
example: A strong storm hit the town at night.
exampleChinese: 夜里一场强烈的暴风雨袭击了小镇。

meaning: n. 股，缕；部分；海滨，海岸 vt. 使滞留，使⽆法脱⾝；使搁浅
example: The boat was left on a lonely strand after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，那艘船被搁在一片荒凉的海岸上。

meaning: adj. 奇怪的；陌⽣的；不舒服的
example: That noise sounds strange at night.
exampleChinese: 那种声音在夜里听起来很奇怪。

meaning: n. 陌⽣⼈；外地⼈，新来的⼈
example: The stranger asked me for directions.
exampleChinese: 那个陌生人向我问路。

meaning: n. 带⼦ vt. ⽤带⼦系 (或绑)；⽤绷带包扎
example: She used a strap to carry the heavy bag.
exampleChinese: 她用一根带子来提那个沉重的包。

meaning: n. ⻨秆，稻草；吸管
example: The roof was made of straw.
exampleChinese: 屋顶是用稻草做的。

meaning: n. ⼩溪；⽔流，⽓流；⼀连串 vi. vt. (⽔、⽓等) 流动 vi. (⼈或物) 涌向；飘扬，漂流 vt. 流媒体播放
example: A clear stream runs behind the village.
exampleChinese: 一条清澈的小溪流经村后。

meaning: vt. 精简；使…成流线型
example: The company will streamline its work process.
exampleChinese: 公司将精简它的工作流程。

meaning: n. 审判；试验，试⽤；预赛；考验 vt. vi. 试验，试⽤
example: The new medicine is still in trial.
exampleChinese: 这种新药仍在试验中。

meaning: n. 三⻆形；三⻆铁；三⻆关系
example: We drew a triangle on the paper.
exampleChinese: 我们在纸上画了一个三角形。

meaning: n. 部落；⼀伙⼈；(动植物的) 族
example: The tribe lived deep in the forest.
exampleChinese: 这个部落住在森林深处。

meaning: n. 致敬；是…的充分体现；贡品
example: The gift was a tribute to her hard work.
exampleChinese: 这份礼物是对她努力工作的致敬。

meaning: n. 诡计，花招；戏法；诀窍 vt. 欺骗，欺诈 adj. 意在欺骗的；虚弱的，有⽑病的
example: The boy played a trick on his sister and hid her pen.
exampleChinese: 那个男孩对妹妹耍了个诡计，把她的笔藏了起来。

meaning: n. ⼩事；稍微，⼀点；乳脂蛋糕 vi. 怠慢，⼩看
example: Don't trifle with the test rules.
exampleChinese: 不要轻视考试规则。

meaning: vt. 修剪；削减；装饰，点缀 n. 修剪；(⾐服等的) 饰物 adj. (⼈) 苗条的，修⻓的；整⻬的
example: Please trim the hedge before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前修剪一下树篱。

meaning: n. 旅⾏ vi. 绊，绊倒 vt. 绊倒 (某⼈)；触发 (开关)
example: We took a short trip to the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们去湖边进行了短途旅行。

meaning: adj. 三个的，三部分的；三倍的 vi. vt. (使) 变成三倍
example: The company will triple its sales this year.
exampleChinese: 公司今年的销售额将增长三倍。

meaning: adj. 遍及全世界的，世界各地的 adv. 遍及全世界，在世界各地
example: This company sells its products worldwide.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在世界各地销售它的产品。

meaning: n. 蠕⾍；寄⽣⾍；蠕⾍病毒；懦夫 vt. 蠕动，曲折⾏进；给…驱肠⾍
example: The worm moved slowly across the wet ground.
exampleChinese: 那条虫子在潮湿的地面上慢慢爬动。

meaning: vi. 担⼼，担忧 vt. 使担⼼，使发愁 n. 担⼼；令⼈担忧的事
example: His biggest worry is the exam tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 他最大的担心是明天的考试。

meaning: adj. 更坏的，更糟的，更严重的 adv. 更坏地，更糟地，更严重地
example: The weather got worse after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后天气变得更糟了。

meaning: n. 伤⼝；情感创伤 vt. 使 (⾝体) 受伤；伤害…的情感
example: The sharp branch wound his arm.
exampleChinese: 那根尖树枝弄伤了他的手臂。

meaning: vt. 包，裹；⽤…缠绕 (或围紧) n. 披肩，围⼱；包装材料；杀⻘
example: Please wrap the bread in a clean cloth.
exampleChinese: 请把面包用一块干净的布包起来。

meaning: n. (船、⻋等的) 残骸；(⻋辆) 碰撞 vt. 破坏，毁坏；使失事
example: The crash left the car a wreck.
exampleChinese: 那次撞车把汽车撞成了一堆残骸。

meaning: n. 乳房；胸部；胸脯⾁ vt. 以胸部推…，挺胸顶着…
example: He felt a sharp pain in his breast.
exampleChinese: 他胸部感到一阵剧痛。

meaning: n. 呼吸，⽓息
example: Take a deep breath before you speak.
exampleChinese: 说话前先深呼吸。

meaning: vi. vt. 呼吸 vt. 呼出；低声说 vi. (让酒) 通⽓飘⾹；透⽓
example: It was hard to breathe in the smoky room.
exampleChinese: 在那个烟雾弥漫的房间里很难呼吸。

meaning: n. 微⻛；轻⽽易举的事 vi. 轻盈⽽⾃信地⾛
example: A cool breeze blew through the open window.
exampleChinese: 一阵凉风从敞开的窗户吹了进来。

meaning: vt. 贿赂，收买 n. 贿赂，贿赂品
example: He refused to bribe the guard.
exampleChinese: 他拒绝贿赂那个警卫。

meaning: n. 桥，桥梁；纽带；桥牌；鼻梁 vt. 架桥，横跨；弥合 (差距)
example: A wooden bridge crosses the small river.
exampleChinese: 一座木桥横跨这条小河。

meaning: adj. 明亮的；鲜艳夺⽬的；聪明的 adv. 光亮地，明亮地
example: The classroom is bright and clean.
exampleChinese: 教室明亮又干净。

meaning: adj. 聪颖的；杰出的；明亮的；极好的
example: The lake looked brilliant in the morning light.
exampleChinese: 湖面在晨光下显得灿烂耀眼。

meaning: vt. 带来；引起；使处于某种状况
example: Please bring your notebook to class tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 请明天把你的笔记本带到课堂上。

meaning: n. 两个，⼏个；(⼀对) 夫妻，情侣 vt. 结合，将…与…联系起来
example: A couple sat quietly by the window.
exampleChinese: 一对夫妻安静地坐在窗边。

meaning: n. 优惠券，赠券
example: Use this coupon to get a free drink.
exampleChinese: 用这张优惠券可以免费领取一杯饮料。

meaning: n. 勇⽓，胆量，勇敢
example: It took courage to speak in front of the class.
exampleChinese: 在全班同学面前发言需要勇气。

meaning: n. 课程；跑道；航线；菜；进程 vi. 快速流动
example: Math is my favorite course this term.
exampleChinese: 数学是我这学期最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. ⺟⽜，奶⽜；⼤型雌兽 vt. 恐吓，威胁
example: The cow is eating grass by the fence.
exampleChinese: 那头奶牛正在栅栏旁吃草。

meaning: n. 胆⼩⻤，懦夫
example: He acted like a coward during the fight.
exampleChinese: 他在打架时表现得像个胆小鬼。

meaning: adv. 在市中⼼，往市中⼼ adj. 在市中⼼的，往市中⼼的 n. 市中⼼，城镇中⼼
example: We took the subway downtown after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我们乘地铁去了市中心。

meaning: adv. prep. 向下；下降；沿着；贯穿…时期 adj. 情绪低落的 vt. 使掉落，使倒地 n. (⻦的) 绒⽻
example: Please sit down and relax.
exampleChinese: 请坐下休息一下。

meaning: adj. 下降的，向下的 adv. 向下
example: The plane moved downward through the clouds.
exampleChinese: 飞机穿过云层向下飞行。

meaning: vi. 打瞌睡，打盹⼉，⼩睡 n. ⼩睡
example: I doze for ten minutes after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我打了十分钟盹。

meaning: vt. 拖，拉；⽣拉硬拽；⽤⿏标拖动 vi. vt. 缓慢⽽费⼒地移动 vi. (时间或活动) 过得很慢 n. 累赘；讨厌的⼈或事；空⽓阻⼒
example: The heavy bag began to drag him backward.
exampleChinese: 沉重的包开始把他往后拖。

example: The dragon in the story can fly and breathe fire.
exampleChinese: 故事里的龙会飞，还会喷火。

meaning: vt. vi. 排空，(使) 放⼲；(使) 流⾛ vt. 喝光；使 (精⼒、钱) 耗尽 n. 下⽔道；排⽔孔；消耗，耗竭
example: The sink will drain slowly if the pipe is blocked.
exampleChinese: 如果管道堵了，水槽排水就会很慢。

meaning: adj. 严厉的，极端的；(变化) 急剧的
example: We need drastic action to fix the problem.
exampleChinese: 我们需要采取严厉的措施来解决这个问题。

meaning: vt. vi. 画，描绘；拔出，抽出 vt. 拖动；拉帘；吸引；得出；⽀取 vi. 移动，⾏进 n. 抽奖，抽签；平局，和局
example: My little sister likes to draw cats.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹喜欢画猫。

meaning: n. 缺点，不利条件
example: One drawback of the plan is the high cost.
exampleChinese: 这个计划的一个缺点是成本太高。

meaning: n. 抽屉
example: The socks are in the top drawer.
exampleChinese: 袜子在最上面的抽屉里。

meaning: n. 图画，素描画；绘画
example: My drawing won first prize in the contest.
exampleChinese: 我的图画在比赛中得了第一名。

meaning: vt. vi. 展览，展出；表现出，显⽰出 n. 展品；展览会；证物，证据
example: The museum will exhibit ancient tools next week.
exampleChinese: 博物馆下周将展出古代工具。

meaning: n. 展览 (会)；表现，显露
example: We visited an art exhibition on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们周六参观了一个艺术展览。

meaning: n. 流放，流亡；被流放者 vt. 流放，放逐
example: The writer lived in exile for many years.
exampleChinese: 这位作家流亡了很多年。

meaning: n. 出⼝，通道；离去，退场 vi. vt. 离去，退场；退出 (计算机程序)
example: Take the exit on the right after the store.
exampleChinese: 过了商店后，走右边的出口。

meaning: n. 论坛，讨论会
example: Students asked their questions on the online forum.
exampleChinese: 学生们在网上论坛上提出了他们的问题。

meaning: adv. 向前；进展；向将来；提前 adj. 向前的，前进的；未来的 vt. 发送，寄；转寄 n. 前锋
example: Please step forward and say your name.
exampleChinese: 请向前走一步并说出你的名字。

meaning: vt. 培养，促进 vt. vi. 收养 adj. 收养的
example: The school will foster creativity through art classes.
exampleChinese: 学校将通过美术课来培养创造力。

meaning: adj. 难闻的，恶⼼的；很令⼈不快的 vt. (体育运动) 犯规 n. (体育运动) 犯规
example: The soup has a foul smell.
exampleChinese: 这汤闻起来很难闻。

meaning: n. 地基；基础；基⾦会；创办 n. 粉底
example: A strong foundation supports the whole house.
exampleChinese: 坚实的地基支撑着整栋房子。

meaning: n. 喷泉，喷⽔池；喷射；源泉
example: The fountain sprayed water into the air.
exampleChinese: 喷泉把水喷向空中。

meaning: n. 少量，⼀点⼉；(数学上的) 分数
example: Only a fraction of the cake was left.
exampleChinese: 只剩下一小部分蛋糕了。

meaning: n. 裂缝，裂痕，(尤指) ⻣折 vi. vt. (使) 断裂；(使)(组织等) 分裂
example: He suffered a fracture in his left arm.
exampleChinese: 他的左臂骨折了。

meaning: adj. 易碎的；脆弱的；精致的；虚弱的
example: Be careful with the fragile glass.
exampleChinese: 请小心这只易碎的玻璃杯。

meaning: n. 碎⽚，⽚段，⼩部分 vt. vi. (使) 成碎⽚，(使) 分裂
example: The vase fell and broke into a fragment.
exampleChinese: 花瓶掉下来，碎成了一片碎片。

meaning: adj. 芳⾹的，有⾹味的
example: The garden is full of fragrant flowers.
exampleChinese: 花园里满是芳香的花。

meaning: adj. 终有⼀死的；致命的；极度的 n. ⼈，凡⼈，普通⼈
example: Every mortal must face death someday.
exampleChinese: 凡人终有一死。

meaning: n. 房屋抵押贷款，按揭 vt. 抵押 (房屋、⼟地) 借款
example: They took out a mortgage to buy the house.
exampleChinese: 他们贷款买了这套房子。

meaning: n. ⻢赛克，拼花图案
example: The wall was decorated with a colorful mosaic.
exampleChinese: 这面墙上装饰着彩色马赛克图案。

meaning: n. ⾝体；躯⼲；⼫体；团体；⼤量
example: Exercise is good for your body.
exampleChinese: 锻炼对你的身体有好处。

meaning: n. 靴⼦；后备箱；猛踢 vt. 猛踢；给 (违停⻋辆) 上夹锁 vi. vt. 启动 (计算机)
example: Please boot the computer before class starts.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前启动这台电脑。

meaning: n. ⼩隔间；摊位；⽕⻋座，卡座
example: She bought fruit from the market booth.
exampleChinese: 她从市场货摊买了水果。

meaning: n. ⽼板，上司；领导，头⼉ vt. 对…颐指⽓使，对…指⼿画脚 adj. ⼀流的，卓越的
example: My boss asked me to finish the report today.
exampleChinese: 我的老板让我今天完成这份报告。

meaning: n. 植物学
example: We studied botany in science class this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期我们在科学课上学习了植物学。

meaning: n. 底部，底⾯；尽头；末位；臀部 adj. 底部的，尽头的
example: The coins are at the bottom of the bag.
exampleChinese: 硬币在包的底部。

meaning: n. 艺术；艺术品；⽂科；技艺；美术
example: My sister loves art and paints every weekend.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐喜欢艺术，每个周末都画画。

meaning: n. 动脉；主⼲路，⼲线
example: The artery carries blood from the heart.
exampleChinese: 动脉把血液从心脏输送出去。

meaning: n. ⽂章；条款；东西，物品；冠词
example: I read an interesting article this morning.
exampleChinese: 我今天早上读了一篇有趣的文章。

meaning: vt. 清楚地表达 vi. vt. ⼝⻮清楚；⽤关节连接 adj. 善于表达的；吐字清晰的
example: She can articulate her ideas clearly in class.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上能清楚地表达自己的想法。

meaning: n. ⼈⼯制品，⼿⼯艺品
example: The museum displayed an ancient artifact.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一件古代人工制品。

meaning: adj. ⼈造的；⼈为的；不真诚的
example: The flowers looked artificial, not real.
exampleChinese: 这些花看起来是人造的，不是真的。

meaning: n. 艺术家；艺⼈
example: The artist painted a mountain at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 这位画家画了一座日出时的山。

meaning: adj. 艺术的；有艺术天赋的；精美的
example: Her artistic work won first prize.
exampleChinese: 她的艺术作品获得了一等奖。

meaning: vt. 使中断，扰乱
example: Noise from the street can disrupt my study.
exampleChinese: 街上的噪音会打断我的学习。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 消散，消失，驱散 vt. 挥霍，浪费 (时间、⾦钱等)
example: The fog began to dissipate after sunrise.
exampleChinese: 日出后，雾开始消散。

meaning: n. 距离，间距；差异；疏远 vt. 与…疏远，拉开距离
example: The distance from my home to school is three kilometers.
exampleChinese: 从我家到学校的距离是三公里。

meaning: adj. 遥远的；远亲的；疏远的
example: Our hotel is in a distant town.
exampleChinese: 我们的酒店在一个遥远的小镇上。

meaning: vt. 蒸馏；提炼 (信息)
example: The reporter will distill the report into three main points.
exampleChinese: 记者会把这份报告提炼成三个要点。

meaning: n. 悲伤，忧虑；贫困；遇险 vt. 使忧虑，使悲伤，使苦恼
example: She felt great distress when her dog ran away.
exampleChinese: 她的狗跑掉时，她感到非常忧虑。

meaning: n. 地区，区域；⾏政区，管辖区
example: This district has many small parks.
exampleChinese: 这个地区有很多小公园。

meaning: vt. 打扰，⼲扰；使烦恼；弄乱
example: Please do not disturb my little brother.
exampleChinese: 请不要打扰我弟弟。

meaning: n. ⼲扰；骚乱；失调，紊乱
example: The disturbance woke everyone in the dormitory.
exampleChinese: 这场骚动把宿舍里所有人都吵醒了。

meaning: n. 前⼣，前⼀段时间；傍晚
example: We stayed up late on the eve of the holiday.
exampleChinese: 我们在假期前夕熬夜了。

meaning: adv. 甚⾄，连，即使；甚⾄更 adj. 平坦的；均匀的；偶数的 vt. vi. 使平均
example: Even my little brother could do it.
exampleChinese: 甚至我弟弟都能做到。

meaning: n. 事件；公开活动；体育项⽬
example: The school event starts at nine.
exampleChinese: 学校活动九点开始。

meaning: adv. 终于，最终
example: We will eventually reach the top.
exampleChinese: 我们最后会到达山顶。

meaning: adv. 在任何时候；曾经；始终
example: This is the best cake I have ever eaten.
exampleChinese: 这是我吃过的最好吃的蛋糕。

meaning: prep. 对；为了；关于；代表；因为 prep. ⽀持；就…⽽⾔；往，向 conj. 因为
example: This gift is for you.
exampleChinese: 这份礼物是给你的。

meaning: vt. 禁⽌，不准；妨碍，阻碍
example: My parents forbid me to stay out late.
exampleChinese: 我父母不许我在外面待到很晚。

meaning: n. 前额，额头
example: He wiped the sweat from his forehead.
exampleChinese: 他擦掉了额头上的汗。

meaning: adj. 外国的；涉外的；陌⽣的
example: He likes to watch foreign films.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢看外国电影。

meaning: n. 外国⼈
example: As a foreigner, he asked for help at the station.
exampleChinese: 作为一个外国人，他在车站寻求帮助。

meaning: vi. 看，瞧；寻找，寻求 n. 看；神情；外观，相貌；式样
example: Look at the blackboard, please.
exampleChinese: 请看黑板。

meaning: vi. 隐约显现，赫然出现；逐渐逼近 n. 织布机
example: A storm cloud began to loom over the hill.
exampleChinese: 一片暴风雨云开始在山上方隐约出现。

meaning: n. 环形，圆圈；循环㬵⽚ (或磁带) vt. 使成环，使绕成圈 vi. 成环形移动
example: The cable formed a loose loop on the floor.
exampleChinese: 电缆在地板上形成了一个松散的环。

meaning: adj. 松动的；零散的；不受约束的 adj. 宽松的；不结实的；不严密的 vt. 释放，发泄；松开；射出 (箭等)
example: These jeans are too loose for me.
exampleChinese: 这条牛仔裤我穿太宽松了。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 变松，松开 vt. 松开 (⼿等)；放宽 (限制或控制)
example: Please loosen the cap before you open the bottle.
exampleChinese: 请先把瓶盖拧松，再打开瓶子。

meaning: n. (英国) 贵族；勋爵；阁下；上帝
example: The lord greeted the guests at the castle gate.
exampleChinese: 那位勋爵在城堡门口迎接客人。

meaning: n. 卡⻋，货⻋
example: The lorry blocked the road for an hour.
exampleChinese: 那辆卡车把路堵了一个小时。

meaning: n. 乐透，彩票抽奖；碰运⽓的事
example: Winning the lottery felt like pure luck.
exampleChinese: 中彩票感觉完全是运气。

meaning: vi. vt. 呻吟；抱怨 vi. 呼啸，发出萧萧声 n. 呻吟声；抱怨；呼啸声
example: He gave a soft moan after the long run.
exampleChinese: 长跑后，他发出了一声轻轻的呻吟。

meaning: n. 暴⺠；⼀伙⼈；⿊帮；⼀群动物 vt. (动物) 围攻；把…团团围住
example: A mob gathered outside the store.
exampleChinese: 一群暴民聚集在商店外面。

meaning: adj. 可移动的；⾏动⽅便的；流动的 n. ⼿机；⻛铃，悬挂饰物
example: This table is made of mobile parts.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子是由可移动的部件组成的。

meaning: vt. vi. 动员，⿎动 vt. 调动，调⽤
example: The teacher can mobilize the class quickly.
exampleChinese: 老师可以很快动员全班。

meaning: n. 单元，组件；模块；分离舱
example: Each module in the app has one clear job.
exampleChinese: 这个应用中的每个模块都有一个明确的功能。

meaning: n. 模具，铸模；(独特) 类型；霉菌 vt. (⽤模具) 浇铸；将…塑造成 vi. vt. (使) 紧贴于，(使) 与…吻合
example: The pot was made from a clay mould.
exampleChinese: 这个陶罐是用黏土模具做出来的。

meaning: n. 借⼝，托辞
example: She left early on the pretext of a headache.
exampleChinese: 她借口头痛早早离开了。

meaning: adv. 相当，⾮常 adj. 漂亮的；赏⼼悦⽬的，动听的
example: Your new dress is pretty.
exampleChinese: 你的新裙子很漂亮。

meaning: vi. 盛⾏；占优势，占上⻛
example: Good manners still prevail in many homes.
exampleChinese: 良好的礼貌在许多家庭里仍然盛行。

meaning: adj. 流⾏的，盛⾏的，普遍的
example: Smartphones are prevalent among teenagers.
exampleChinese: 智能手机在青少年中很普遍。

meaning: n. 花⾔巧语，华⽽不实的⾔语；修辞
example: His speech was full of rhetoric but short on facts.
exampleChinese: 他的演讲满是华丽辞藻，却缺少事实。

meaning: n. 节奏，韵律；规律性变化
example: The drummer kept a fast rhythm.
exampleChinese: 鼓手保持着很快的节奏。

meaning: n. 肋⻣；排⻣；肋材；罗纹 vt. (友善地) 开…的玩笑
example: The boys like to rib their friend about his funny hat.
exampleChinese: 这些男孩喜欢拿朋友那顶滑稽的帽子开玩笑。

meaning: n. 丝带；带状物；绶带，勋带
example: A red ribbon tied the gift box.
exampleChinese: 一个红丝带系着礼盒。

meaning: vt. 使摆脱，使消除，使丢弃 adj. 摆脱了的，丢弃了的
example: I want to rid my room of old junk.
exampleChinese: 我想把房间里的旧杂物清理掉。

meaning: n. 谜，谜语；谜团，费解的事 vt. 使…满是窟窿
example: The teacher told us a riddle in class.
exampleChinese: 老师在课堂上给我们讲了一个谜语。

meaning: n. ⼭脊；隆起 vt. 使隆起
example: We climbed the ridge before sunset.
exampleChinese: 我们在日落前爬上了山脊。

meaning: adj. 荒谬的，可笑的
example: It is ridiculous to wear a coat in this heat.
exampleChinese: 这么热的天气还穿外套太可笑了。

meaning: adj. 严格的，死板的；固执的；僵硬的
example: The school has a rigid rule about phones.
exampleChinese: 学校对手机有一条严格的规定。

meaning: adj. 严格的，严厉的；缜密的，细致的
example: The school has rigorous rules about attendance.
exampleChinese: 学校在出勤方面有严格的规定。

meaning: n. (圆形物体的) 边缘；轮圈 vt. 形成…的边沿
example: The water splashed over the rim of the glass.
exampleChinese: 水溅出了玻璃杯的边缘。

meaning: n. 暴乱，骚乱；丰富多彩 vi. (⼈群) 发⽣骚乱，闹事
example: The riot broke out after midnight.
exampleChinese: 骚乱在午夜后爆发了。

meaning: adj. 静⽌的，停滞的；静电的 n. 静电⼲扰；静电；指责，抱怨
example: The radio had too much static to hear clearly.
exampleChinese: 收音机里的静电干扰太大，听不清楚。

meaning: n. ⻋站；站，所，局；电视台 vt. 派驻，使驻扎；置⾝于
example: We will meet at the bus station.
exampleChinese: 我们将在公交车站见面。

meaning: adj. 静⽌的；不变的，稳定的
example: The boat stayed stationary in the calm water.
exampleChinese: 船在平静的水面上一动不动。

meaning: n. ⽂具；信纸，信笺
example: I bought new stationery for school.
exampleChinese: 我买了新的文具去上学。

example: He ordered a steak for dinner.
exampleChinese: 他晚餐点了一块牛排。

meaning: n. 蒸汽；蒸汽动⼒；⽔汽 vi. 冒蒸汽；以蒸汽为动⼒⾏驶 vt. vi. 蒸
example: Steam rose from the hot soup.
exampleChinese: 热汤冒出了蒸汽。

meaning: adj. 陡的；急剧的；(价格等) 过⾼的 vt. 浸泡 (⻝物)
example: The path up the hill is very steep.
exampleChinese: 这条上山的路非常陡峭。

meaning: n. 成⻅，刻板印象 vt. 对…有成⻅
example: We should not stereotype people by appearance.
exampleChinese: 我们不应该根据外表给人贴上刻板印象。

meaning: n. 乘务员，服务员；统筹⼈；管家
example: The steward showed us to our seats.
exampleChinese: 管家把我们领到座位上。

meaning: vt. 超出，超越
example: Great art can transcend borders and languages.
exampleChinese: 伟大的艺术可以超越国界和语言。

meaning: n. 晶体管
example: The transistor helped make small radios possible.
exampleChinese: 晶体管让小型收音机成为可能。

meaning: n. 运输；交通系统；过境，中转 vt. vi. 经过，穿过 (某⼀地区)
example: We took a train in transit to the next city.
exampleChinese: 我们乘坐中转列车去了下一座城市。

meaning: n. 过渡，转变 vi. 过渡，转变
example: The transition from primary school was exciting.
exampleChinese: 从小学到初中的过渡让人兴奋。

meaning: vt. vi. 翻译；(使) 转变；将…理解为… vi. 被翻译为
example: Can you translate this sentence into Chinese?
exampleChinese: 你能把这个句子翻译成中文吗？

meaning: adj. 透明的；明显的；公开的
example: The bottle is made of transparent glass.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子是用透明玻璃做的。

meaning: adj. 完整⽆缺的，未受损伤的
example: The box was intact after the move.
exampleChinese: 箱子搬完后还是完好无损的。

meaning: n. 交互界⾯；接⼝；交界⾯ vi. vt. (使)(与…) 相互联系
example: The app has a simple interface for children.
exampleChinese: 这个应用有一个适合儿童的简单界面。

meaning: vi. ⼲涉，介⼊；妨碍，⼲扰；弄坏
example: Please do not interfere with my work.
exampleChinese: 请不要干扰我的工作。

meaning: n. ⼲涉，介⼊；(电波等的) ⼲扰
example: The microphone picked up a lot of interference.
exampleChinese: 麦克风接收到了很多干扰。

meaning: vi. ⼲涉，介⼊；⼲扰；介于…之间 vt. vi. 打断，插嘴
example: The teacher had to intervene when the argument grew louder.
exampleChinese: 争论越来越激烈时，老师不得不介入。

meaning: vt. 打算，考虑，沉思；端详，凝视
example: I contemplate my future every evening.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上都会考虑我的未来。

meaning: vi. 设法做到 vt. 图谋，策划；发明，创造
example: He contrive a plan to finish the project on time.
exampleChinese: 他设法想出一个按时完成项目的计划。

meaning: n. ⽅便，便利；便利设施
example: The store is near for your convenience.
exampleChinese: 这家商店离这里很近，方便你。

meaning: adj. ⽅便的；附近的，⽅便到达的
example: It is convenient to pay by phone here.
exampleChinese: 在这里用手机付款很方便。

meaning: n. 交谈，谈话
example: We had a long conversation after class.
exampleChinese: 我们课后进行了一次长谈。

meaning: adv. 相反地，反过来说
example: She likes math; conversely, I prefer history.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢数学；相反，我更喜欢历史。

meaning: n. 转变，改变；(信仰的) 改变
example: The conversion of the room into a study took one day.
exampleChinese: 把房间改成书房花了一天。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 转变，改变；使改变 (信仰) vi. 可转变为，可变化成 n. 皈依者，改变信仰的⼈
example: The city will convert the old factory into a museum.
exampleChinese: 这座城市将把旧工厂改造成博物馆。

meaning: vt. 宣判有罪 n. 已决犯，囚犯
example: The judge will convict the thief if the evidence is clear.
exampleChinese: 如果证据确凿，法官将判那个小偷有罪。

meaning: n. 定罪；坚定的信念；坚信
example: Her strong conviction helped her keep trying.
exampleChinese: 她坚定的信念帮助她不断努力。

meaning: vt. 使确信，使信服；说服，劝服
example: The teacher tried to convince me to join the club.
exampleChinese: 老师试图说服我参加这个社团。

meaning: adj. 有活⼒的，活泼的，⽣动的 adj. 充满趣味的
example: The lively girl told us a funny story.
exampleChinese: 那个活泼的女孩给我们讲了一个有趣的故事。

meaning: n. 肝脏
example: The doctor checked the patient's liver carefully.
exampleChinese: 医生仔细检查了病人的肝脏。

meaning: adj. 活的，活着的；在使⽤的 n. ⽣计，收⼊；⽣活⽅式
example: The garden is full of living plants.
exampleChinese: 花园里长满了活的植物。

meaning: n. (⾯包的) ⼀条 vi. 游荡，闲逛
example: We shared a loaf of bread.
exampleChinese: 我们分吃了一条面包。

meaning: n. 贷款；暂借 vt. 借出
example: She asked the bank for a loan to buy a car.
exampleChinese: 她向银行申请了一笔贷款买车。

meaning: n. ⻔廊，⼤厅；游说团体；游说 vt. vi. 游说 (从政者或政府)
example: The lobby was full of people waiting for the meeting.
exampleChinese: 大厅里挤满了等着开会的人。

meaning: n. 机⻋，⽕⻋头 adj. 移动的，运动的
example: The locomotive pulled the train through the tunnel.
exampleChinese: 火车头把列车拉过了隧道。

meaning: n. 乡间⼩屋；⻔房；传达室；⽳ vi. (付款) 寄宿，租住 vt. 为…提供住宿；正式提出 (声明) vi. vt. (被) 固定，卡住
example: We stayed in a small lodge near the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们住在湖边的一间小屋里。

meaning: adj. ⾼耸的；崇⾼的；⾼傲的
example: A lofty mountain rose above the valley.
exampleChinese: 一座高耸的山峰矗立在山谷之上。

meaning: n. 原⽊；正式记录，⽇志 vt. 记录；⾏驶；伐⽊ vi. 登录，注册
example: Please log your study time every night.
exampleChinese: 请每天晚上记录你的学习时间。

meaning: adj. ⻓的；⻓时间的 adv. ⻓久地；很久地 vi. 渴望
example: I long to see my grandparents again.
exampleChinese: 我渴望再次见到我的祖父母。

meaning: n. 经度
example: The plane crossed the Atlantic at a longitude of 30 degrees west.
exampleChinese: 这架飞机在西经30度的经线上飞越大西洋。

meaning: n. 减价，折扣 vt. 不相信，不重视；打折出售
example: Students get a discount with this card.
exampleChinese: 学生凭这张卡可以享受折扣。

meaning: vt. 打消…的念头，阻⽌；使灰⼼
example: Do not let a bad score discourage you.
exampleChinese: 不要让一次差成绩使你气馁。

meaning: adj. (⾔⾏) 谨慎的；不显眼的
example: She gave a discreet answer in front of everyone.
exampleChinese: 她在众人面前给出了谨慎的回答。

meaning: adj. 分开的，分离的，各⾃的
example: The class was divided into three discrete groups.
exampleChinese: 这个班被分成了三个分开的组。

meaning: n. ⾃主决定权；谨慎，慎重
example: The teacher used her discretion to let us leave early.
exampleChinese: 老师行使自主决定权，让我们提前离开。

meaning: n. 差异，不符合
example: There was a discrepancy between the two reports.
exampleChinese: 这两份报告之间有不一致之处。

meaning: vt. 装扮，假扮；掩盖，掩饰 n. 伪装物，化装⽤具；伪装 (⾏为)
example: He wore a hat to disguise himself.
exampleChinese: 他戴了一顶帽子来伪装自己。

meaning: n. 厌恶，反感 vt. 使厌恶，使反感
example: The smell of the trash filled me with disgust.
exampleChinese: 垃圾的味道让我感到厌恶。

meaning: vt. 不喜爱，厌恶 n. 厌恶感，反感；不喜欢的东西
example: I dislike rainy days in summer.
exampleChinese: 我不喜欢夏天的雨天。

meaning: n. (因惊愕⽽) 沮丧，忧虑 vt. 使担⼼，使失望
example: The bad news caused dismay in the whole family.
exampleChinese: 这个坏消息让全家都感到沮丧。

meaning: n. 丢掉，处理；(财产等) 处置，变卖
example: We put the old sofa up for disposal.
exampleChinese: 我们把旧沙发拿去处理了。

meaning: vi. 丢掉；处理 vt. 布置，安排；使倾向于
example: Please dispose of the empty bottles properly.
exampleChinese: 请妥善处理这些空瓶子。

meaning: n. 性情；倾向；布置，安排；处置
example: Her friendly disposition makes her easy to work with.
exampleChinese: 她友好的性情让人很容易与她共事。

meaning: n. 庄园，地产；财产，遗产 n. 住宅区，⼯业区
example: They bought a small estate near the river.
exampleChinese: 他们在河边买了一处小庄园。

meaning: n. 尊重，敬重 vt. 尊重，敬重
example: She has a high esteem for her science teacher.
exampleChinese: 她非常尊敬她的科学老师。

meaning: adj. 永恒的，永远的；没完没了的
example: People often hope for eternal peace.
exampleChinese: 人们常常希望拥有永恒的和平。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 撤离，疏散，转移 vt. 排泄 (粪便)
example: We had to evacuate the school after the fire alarm rang.
exampleChinese: 火警响起后，我们不得不疏散学校。

meaning: vt. 躲避 (追捕)；逃避，规避；回避 vt. 难倒，使困惑
example: He tried to evade the question.
exampleChinese: 他试图回避这个问题。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 蒸发，(使) 挥发 vi. 逐渐消失
example: The water will evaporate in the hot sun.
exampleChinese: 水会在烈日下蒸发。

meaning: adj. 喜爱…的；深情的；难以实现的
example: I am fond of reading before bed.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢睡前读书。

meaning: n. 傻⽠，笨蛋；⼩丑，弄⾂ vt. 欺骗，愚弄 vi. 说蠢话，⼲傻事 adj. 傻的，愚蠢的
example: You cannot fool me with that simple trick.
exampleChinese: 你不能用那个简单的把戏骗我。

meaning: adj. 愚蠢的，傻的；困窘的
example: It was foolish to leave the door open at night.
exampleChinese: 晚上把门开着是愚蠢的。

meaning: n. 脚，⾜；底部；英尺 vt. 负担费⽤
example: My foot got wet in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的脚在雨里淋湿了。

meaning: n. 脚步声，⾜迹
example: I heard a footstep behind me.
exampleChinese: 我听到身后有脚步声。

meaning: n. 薄雾，雾霭，⽔汽；液体喷雾 vt. vi. (使) 结雾；被泪⽔模糊 vt. 向…喷雾
example: The mist hid the road in the morning.
exampleChinese: 早晨的薄雾遮住了道路。

meaning: n. 错误 vt. 误解，误认为
example: I made a mistake in the last question.
exampleChinese: 我在最后一道题上犯了一个错误。

meaning: n. 情妇；⼥教师；⼥主⼈
example: The mistress opened the classroom door.
exampleChinese: 女教师打开了教室的门。

meaning: vt. vi. 误解，误会
example: Please do not misunderstand my words.
exampleChinese: 请不要误解我的话。

meaning: n. 讨厌的⼈，⿇烦的事；⾮法妨害
example: The loud music was a nuisance to the neighbors.
exampleChinese: 那刺耳的音乐让邻居很烦。

meaning: adj. 失去知觉的；⿇⽊的，迟钝的 vt. 使失去知觉；使⿇⽊，使迟钝
example: My fingers felt numb in the cold.
exampleChinese: 我的手指在寒冷中变得麻木。

meaning: adj. 数字的，以数字表⽰的
example: The report gives a numerical answer.
exampleChinese: 这份报告给出了一个数字答案。

meaning: adj. 众多的，许多的
example: There were numerous stars in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 夜空中有无数星星。

meaning: n. 托⼉所；婴⼉室；⼉童室；苗圃 adj. 幼⼉教育的
example: The nursery has many young trees and flowers.
exampleChinese: 苗圃里有许多小树和花。

meaning: vt. 培养，养育；培养 (想法等) n. 培养，养育
example: Parents should nurture their children's curiosity.
exampleChinese: 父母应该培养孩子的好奇心。

meaning: n. 坚果；怪⼈，疯⼦；…迷；螺⺟
example: I tightened the nut with a wrench.
exampleChinese: 我用扳手拧紧了螺帽。

meaning: n. 营养，滋养
example: Good nutrition helps children grow strong.
exampleChinese: 良好的营养有助于孩子健康成长。

meaning: modal. 应该
example: You ought to finish your homework first.
exampleChinese: 你应该先完成作业。

meaning: n. (暴⼒活动、疾病等的) 爆发
example: An outbreak of flu closed the school.
exampleChinese: 流感爆发导致学校停课。

meaning: adj. ⼾外的，室外的
example: The kids played outdoor games after lunch.
exampleChinese: 孩子们午饭后玩了户外游戏。

meaning: n. 全套服装；团队 vt. 给…配置设备，供给服装
example: He wore a warm outfit for the trip.
exampleChinese: 他为这次旅行穿了一套保暖的衣服。

meaning: n. 远⾜，短途旅⾏
example: Our class went on an outing to the zoo.
exampleChinese: 我们班去动物园远足了。

meaning: n. 市郊，郊区
example: They live on the outskirts of the city.
exampleChinese: 他们住在市郊。

meaning: adj. 杰出的；显著的；未⽀付的
example: She did an outstanding job on the science project.
exampleChinese: 她在科学项目中做得非常出色。

meaning: n. 零售 adv. 以零售⽅式 vt. 零售；(详细地) 讲述 vi. 以…价格零售
example: The store will retail these shoes at a low price.
exampleChinese: 这家店将以低价零售这些鞋子。

meaning: vt. 保持，保留；储存；预聘 (律师)
example: Please retain a copy of the receipt.
exampleChinese: 请保留一份收据。

meaning: n. 保持，保留；记忆⼒
example: Good sleep helps memory retention.
exampleChinese: 良好的睡眠有助于记忆力保持。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 退休 vi. 退出，离开；退出⽐赛，退役
example: My grandfather plans to retire next year.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷打算明年退休。

meaning: vt. 反驳，回嘴 n. 回应，反驳；曲颈瓶，蒸馏器
example: She gave a quick retort and left.
exampleChinese: 她迅速回嘴，然后离开了。

meaning: vi. 撤退；后退；撤回 (计划)；躲避 n. 撤退；逃避；僻静处；静修
example: The army had to retreat after heavy losses.
exampleChinese: 军队在伤亡惨重后不得不撤退。

meaning: vt. 取回，找回；检索数据；挽回
example: Can you retrieve the file from the computer?
exampleChinese: 你能从电脑里取回那个文件吗？

meaning: n. 回顾，回想
example: In retrospect, we should have left earlier.
exampleChinese: 回顾起来，我们本该早点出发。

meaning: n. 反叛，造反 vi. 反叛，造反 vt. 使惊骇，令⼈厌恶
example: The workers staged a revolt against the unfair rules.
exampleChinese: 工人们对不公平的规定发动了反叛。

meaning: n. ⾰命；变⾰；旋转；旋转⼀周
example: The French Revolution changed the country forever.
exampleChinese: 法国革命永远改变了这个国家。

meaning: adj. ⾰命的；⾰命性的，突破性的 n. ⾰命者，⾰命家
example: The school needs a revolutionary idea to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 学校需要一个突破性的想法来解决这个问题。

meaning: vi. 旋转；围绕；以…为中⼼
example: The Earth will revolve around the Sun.
exampleChinese: 地球将围绕太阳旋转。

meaning: n. 茎，秆，梗；柄状物 vt. vi. 跟踪；出没，作祟 vi. ⾼视阔步，怒⽓冲冲地⾛
example: The cat can stalk its prey quietly in the grass.
exampleChinese: 猫会在草丛中悄悄跟踪猎物。

meaning: vt. vi. 弄脏 vt. 给…染⾊；玷污，败坏 (名声) n. 污点，污渍；染⾊剂，着⾊剂
example: The red juice stain was hard to remove.
exampleChinese: 那块红色果汁污渍很难去掉。

meaning: n. 股份；重⼤利益；赌注；桩 vt. 以…打赌，拿…冒险
example: The family has a big stake in the new business.
exampleChinese: 这个家庭在这家新公司里有很大的股份。

meaning: adj. 不新鲜的；没有新意的；厌倦的 vi. vt. (使)变得不新鲜
example: The bread has gone stale.
exampleChinese: 面包已经不新鲜了。

meaning: n. 货摊，摊位；牲畜棚；⼩隔间 vi. vt. (使) 熄⽕，抛锚；暂缓，搁置 vi. 故意拖延 (以赢得时间) vt. 拖住 (以赢得时间做某事)
example: Please do not stall the meeting any longer.
exampleChinese: 请不要再拖延会议了。

meaning: adj. 主要的，基本的，重要的 n. 订书钉；基本⻝物；⽀柱产品 vt. ⽤订书钉装订
example: Rice is a staple food in many countries.
exampleChinese: 大米是许多国家的主食。

meaning: n. 邮票；印章，印记 vt. vi. 跺 (脚)，重踩；迈着重步⾛ vt. 在…上盖 (字样或图案等)
example: I put a stamp on the envelope.
exampleChinese: 我在信封上贴了一张邮票。

meaning: vi. 盯着看，凝视 n. 盯着看，凝视
example: She gave him a long stare.
exampleChinese: 她盯着他看了很久。

meaning: n. 不幸，惨剧；悲剧 (作品)
example: The fire was a tragedy for the whole town.
exampleChinese: 这场火灾对整个小镇来说是一场惨事。

meaning: adj. 悲惨的；悲剧的
example: It was a tragic accident on the highway.
exampleChinese: 那是高速公路上的一场悲惨事故。

meaning: n. 有轨电⻋
example: We took the tram to the city center.
exampleChinese: 我们乘电车去了市中心。

meaning: vi. 鞠躬；屈从于 vt. 低 (头)，垂 (⾸) n. 鞠躬；船头；⼸；蝴蝶结；琴⼸
example: We bow to thank the audience at the end.
exampleChinese: 结束时我们鞠躬感谢观众。

meaning: n. 肠；深处，内部
example: The doctor examined the bowel carefully.
exampleChinese: 医生仔细检查了肠道。

meaning: n. 碗；物体的碗状部分
example: He ate rice from a blue bowl.
exampleChinese: 他用一个蓝色的碗吃米饭。

meaning: vt. 抵制 n. 抵制⾏动
example: The workers decided to boycott the new store.
exampleChinese: 工人们决定联合抵制这家新店。

meaning: n. 联系；接触；熟⼈；隐形眼镜 vt. 联系
example: Please contact me after class.
exampleChinese: 请在下课后联系我。

meaning: adj. 接触性传染的；有感染⼒的
example: This disease is highly contagious.
exampleChinese: 这种疾病的传染性很强。

meaning: vt. 容纳，包含；控制，遏制；克制
example: This box can contain all my books.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子可以装下我所有的书。

meaning: vt. 污染，弄脏；玷污，毒害
example: Dirty water can contaminate the lake.
exampleChinese: 脏水会污染湖泊。

meaning: adj. 依情况⽽定的 n. 代表团；分遣队
example: The trip is contingent on the weather.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行要视天气而定。

meaning: vi. vt. 猛碰，撞；颠簸⾏进 n. 碰撞 (声)；肿块；隆起，凸块
example: The car gave a bump when it hit the curb.
exampleChinese: 汽车撞到路缘时猛地颠了一下。

meaning: vi. 燃烧；发烫；发亮 vt. vi. 烧毁；烧焦；晒伤，烫伤 n. 烧伤，烫伤
example: Be careful not to burn the toast.
exampleChinese: 小心别把吐司烤糊了。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 爆裂，胀开 vi. 猛冲；爆满，涨满；突然爆发 n. 迸发，爆发；爆裂，裂⼝
example: The crowd began to burst into applause.
exampleChinese: 人群开始突然爆发出掌声。

meaning: vt. 埋葬；埋藏；覆盖；掩藏
example: We bury the time capsule in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们把时间胶囊埋在公园里。

meaning: n. 犯罪活动，罪⾏；罪过
example: He was charged with a serious crime.
exampleChinese: 他被指控犯了一项严重罪行。

meaning: adj. 犯罪的；刑事的；不道德的 n. 罪犯，犯⼈
example: The criminal was caught by the police.
exampleChinese: 那个罪犯被警察抓住了。

meaning: n. 残疾⼈，瘸⼦ vt. 使残废，使成瘸⼦；严重毁坏
example: The injury can cripple a person's leg.
exampleChinese: 这种伤可能会使人的腿残废。

meaning: adj. 脆的，酥脆的；挺括的；凉爽的 n. 炸薯⽚；⽔果酥 vi. vt. (使) 变脆
example: The cookies are crisp and sweet.
exampleChinese: 这些饼干又脆又甜。

meaning: n. 标准，准则
example: The teacher used one clear criterion for grading.
exampleChinese: 老师用了一个明确的评分标准。

meaning: n. 庄稼；收成；⼀批；短⻢鞭 vt. 剪短 (头发)；剪裁；啃吃 vi. 有收成；(意外地) 出现，发⽣
example: This field can crop rice every year.
exampleChinese: 这片田地每年都能种植水稻。

meaning: vi. vt. 越过，渡过；相交 vt. 使交叉；反对 n. 叉号；⼗字架 adj. 恼怒的，⽣⽓的
example: Be careful when you cross the street.
exampleChinese: 你过马路时要小心。

meaning: n. 乌鸦 vi. 啼叫，打鸣；(婴⼉) 欢叫 vi. vt. ⾃鸣得意
example: The crow sat on the fence and called loudly.
exampleChinese: 乌鸦停在栅栏上大声叫着。

meaning: n. ⼈群，观众；⼀伙⼈；群众 vt. 挤满，塞满；挤，靠近
example: A crowd waited outside the stadium.
exampleChinese: 一群人在体育场外等着。

meaning: n. 王冠；王国；王权；冠军宝座；⽛冠 vt. 为…加冕；给…加顶；使圆满
example: The queen wore a gold crown at the ceremony.
exampleChinese: 女王在典礼上戴着一顶金色王冠。

meaning: adj. 精美的；(感觉) 强烈的；敏锐的
example: The ring had an exquisite design.
exampleChinese: 这枚戒指有着精美的设计。

meaning: n. 外部，外观；外表，外貌 adj. 外⾯的，外部的
example: The building's exterior was painted blue.
exampleChinese: 这座建筑的外部被刷成了蓝色。

meaning: adj. 外部的；对外的
example: The company opened an external office in Beijing.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在北京开设了一个对外办事处。

meaning: adj. 额外的，附加的 adv. 额外，另外；特别，格外 n. 另外收费的事物；临时演员
example: We need an extra chair for our guest.
exampleChinese: 我们需要给客人多准备一把椅子。

meaning: n. 摘录，引⽂；浓缩物，精华 vt. 提取；拔出；摘录；设法获取
example: Please extract the key facts from the article.
exampleChinese: 请从这篇文章中摘出关键信息。

meaning: adj. ⾮凡的，出⾊的；⾮常奇特的
example: It was an extraordinary result for a small team.
exampleChinese: 这对一个小团队来说是一个非凡的结果。

meaning: adj. 友好的；亲切的；⽆害的
example: Our new neighbor is very friendly.
exampleChinese: 我们的新邻居非常友好。

meaning: n. 友谊，朋友关系；友情，友爱
example: Their friendship grew stronger over time.
exampleChinese: 他们的友谊随着时间变得更加深厚。

meaning: n. 惊骇，恐惧；惊吓，恐怖的体验
example: The loud noise gave her a fright.
exampleChinese: 那阵巨响把她吓了一跳。

meaning: vt. vi. 使害怕，吓唬
example: The loud noise can frighten small children.
exampleChinese: 这巨大的噪音会吓到小孩。

meaning: n. 刘海；(地区等的) 边缘；流苏 adj. 边缘的，⾮主流的 vt. 形成…的边缘
example: The dress had a red fringe along the hem.
exampleChinese: 这条裙子的裙边有一圈红色流苏。

meaning: n. 国界，边界；(知识的) 前沿
example: Scientists are exploring the frontier of space.
exampleChinese: 科学家们正在探索太空的前沿。

meaning: n. 霜冻，严寒天⽓；霜 vt. vi. (使) 结霜
example: Frost covered the grass this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早晨，霜覆盖了草地。

meaning: vi. vt. 皱眉 n. 皱眉
example: She gave a small frown when she heard the news.
exampleChinese: 她听到这个消息时轻轻皱了皱眉。

meaning: vt. vi. 油炸，油煎，油炒 vi. (被阳光) 灼伤，晒伤 n. 炸薯条；⻥苗
example: My mother will fry the fish for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭会煎鱼。

meaning: n. 燃料；刺激因素 vt. 给…提供燃料；助⻓，加剧 vt. vi. 加油
example: The car needs fuel before the long trip.
exampleChinese: 这辆车在长途旅行前需要加燃料。

meaning: vi. vt. (因…) 恼⽕，⽣⽓ vi. 冒烟 (或雾等) n. (有害、难闻的) ⽓体，烟雾
example: The factory began to fume after the fire.
exampleChinese: 火灾后，工厂开始冒烟。

meaning: n. 葬礼，丧礼
example: We wore black clothes to the funeral.
exampleChinese: 我们穿着黑色衣服去参加葬礼。

meaning: adj. 潮湿的，湿热的
example: It feels humid in the subway during summer.
exampleChinese: 夏天的地铁里感觉很潮湿。

meaning: n. (空⽓) 湿度；潮湿
example: The humidity made the clothes stick to his skin.
exampleChinese: 湿度让衣服紧贴在他的皮肤上。

meaning: vt. (尤指公开) 羞辱，使丢脸
example: Do not humiliate your classmates in public.
exampleChinese: 不要在公共场合羞辱你的同学。

meaning: n. 幽默，幽默感；⼼情，情绪 vt. 迎合，迁就
example: She used humour to make the class laugh.
exampleChinese: 她用幽默逗得全班大笑。

meaning: adj. 滑稽有趣的，幽默的
example: The teacher told a humourous story to the class.
exampleChinese: 老师给全班讲了一个幽默有趣的故事。

meaning: vi. vt. 打猎，猎取；追踪，追捕；猎狐 vi. 搜寻，搜索 n. 搜寻，搜索；打猎
example: The fox was hard to hunt in the forest.
exampleChinese: 那只狐狸在森林里很难打猎到。

meaning: vt. 猛投；⼤声说出或喊出 vi. 呕吐
example: He can hurl the ball very far.
exampleChinese: 他能把球猛地扔得很远。

meaning: n. 飓⻛
example: The hurricane damaged many houses along the coast.
exampleChinese: 这场飓风沿海岸摧毁了许多房屋。

meaning: n. 卫⽣，保健
example: Good hygiene helps you stay healthy.
exampleChinese: 良好的卫生习惯有助于保持健康。

meaning: n. 伪善，虚伪
example: Many people were angry at the hypocrisy of his words.
exampleChinese: 许多人对他言语中的虚伪感到愤怒。

meaning: n. 假说，假设
example: Our hypothesis is that plants grow faster in sunlight.
exampleChinese: 我们的假设是植物在阳光下生长得更快。

meaning: adj. 歇斯底⾥的；极其可笑的
example: The children became hysterical with laughter.
exampleChinese: 孩子们笑得前仰后合。

meaning: vt. 发明，创造；捏造，虚构
example: They want to invent a better bike lock.
exampleChinese: 他们想发明一种更好的自行车锁。

meaning: n. 发明物；发明；编造；创造⼒
example: The wheel is an important invention.
exampleChinese: 轮子是一项重要的发明。

meaning: n. 存货清单；储备，存货，库存 vt. 开列…的清单，把…编⼊⽬录
example: The store keeps a daily inventory of books.
exampleChinese: 这家店会每天登记图书库存。

meaning: adj. 成反⽐的，相反的 n. 与…相反的事物，对⽴⾯
example: The inverse of addition is subtraction.
exampleChinese: 加法的相反运算是减法。

meaning: vt. (使) 颠倒，逆转，倒置
example: Please invert the bowl and place it on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把碗倒过来放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 邀请；请帖；招致
example: I got an invitation to my cousin's party.
exampleChinese: 我收到了表弟聚会的邀请。

meaning: adj. 内⼼的，内在的；向内的 adv. 向内地；向内⼼地
example: She felt an inward calm after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 长途散步后，她感到内心很平静。

meaning: adj. 椭圆形的 n. 椭圆形，椭圆形物体
example: The teacher drew an oval on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师在黑板上画了一个椭圆形。

meaning: vt. vi. 溢出，漫出；扩展出界 vi. 充满，挤满 n. 容纳不下的⼈或物；溢出(物)
example: Water began to overflow the sink.
exampleChinese: 水开始从水槽里溢出来。

meaning: n. 检修，改造 vt. 彻底检修；赶上 (赛跑对⼿)
example: The mechanic will overhaul the old engine.
exampleChinese: 机械师将彻底检修这台旧发动机。

meaning: adv. 在头顶上，在空中 adj. 在头顶上，在空中的；经营开⽀的 n. 经营开⽀
example: A plane flew overhead as we sat in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在公园里时，一架飞机从头顶飞过。

meaning: vt. 偶然听到，⽆意中听到
example: I overhear my parents talking about the trip.
exampleChinese: 我无意中听到父母在谈论这次旅行。

meaning: adv. 在夜间；突然，⼀夜之间 adj. 夜间的；突然的，⼀夜之间的
example: The news spread overnight.
exampleChinese: 这个消息在一夜之间传开了。

meaning: adj. 公开的，明显的
example: There was no overt sign of anger.
exampleChinese: 没有明显的愤怒迹象。

meaning: vt. vi. 超 (⻋)，追上 (前⾯的⼈) vt. 赶超；(不幸等) 突然降临于
example: Our car will overtake the truck soon.
exampleChinese: 我们的车很快会超过那辆卡车。

meaning: vt. 推翻，打倒，将…赶下台 n. (尤指⽤武⼒的) 推翻，打倒
example: The rebels tried to overthrow the government.
exampleChinese: 叛乱者试图推翻政府。

meaning: n. 加班；加班费；加时赛
example: She stayed at work for overtime.
exampleChinese: 她为了加班一直待在公司。

meaning: adj. 有…倾向的；俯卧的
example: He is prone to headaches when he is tired.
exampleChinese: 他累的时候容易头痛。

meaning: vt. 发⾳；正式宣布，宣告
example: Can you pronounce this word clearly?
exampleChinese: 你能清楚地发这个单词的音吗？

meaning: vt. 宣传，传播 vt. vi. (动植物) 繁殖，繁衍
example: Plants can propagate through seeds.
exampleChinese: 植物可以通过种子繁殖。

meaning: n. 宣传，⿎吹
example: The poster looked like propaganda.
exampleChinese: 那张海报看起来像宣传品。

meaning: n. 预⾔家；先知；宣扬者，倡导者
example: The prophet spoke to the crowd.
exampleChinese: 那位先知对人群讲话。

meaning: n. 屋顶，⻋顶；洞顶；颚部 vt. 给…盖顶，盖上屋顶
example: The rain leaked through the roof.
exampleChinese: 雨水从屋顶漏了进来。

meaning: n. 粗绳，线缆 vt. ⽤绳⼦捆 (或绑、系)
example: Please tie the box with a rope.
exampleChinese: 请用绳子把这个箱子绑好。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 旋转；轮流做；轮换 (位置)
example: The wheel will rotate slowly.
exampleChinese: 轮子会慢慢旋转。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 腐烂 n. 腐烂，腐烂物；衰败；废话
example: The old apple left on the table began to rot.
exampleChinese: 桌上那个旧苹果开始腐烂了。

meaning: adj. 腐烂的；恶劣的；腐败的
example: The milk smells rotten.
exampleChinese: 这牛奶闻起来变质了。

meaning: adj. 粗糙的；⼤致的；粗暴的 adj. 艰难的 n. 草稿，草图 adv. 粗鲁地，粗野地
example: The road was rough after the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 大雨过后，这条路很粗糙。

meaning: adj. 圆形的，环形的；整数的 adv. 旋转；周围；到处；调转⽅向 prep. 环绕；绕过；在…周围 n. 阶段；⽐赛阶段；回合
example: We sat at a round table for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在一张圆桌旁吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 环岛；(游乐园的) 旋转圆台 adj. 绕远的；(说话) 拐弯抹⻆的
example: We took a roundabout way to avoid the traffic.
exampleChinese: 我们绕了一条迂回的路来避开交通拥堵。

meaning: vt. 唤醒，叫醒；使…活跃；激发
example: The alarm will rouse everyone at dawn.
exampleChinese: 闹钟会在黎明时叫醒所有人。

meaning: n. (酒店) 套房；⼀套家具；组曲
example: The suite in our guest room is old but comfortable.
exampleChinese: 我们客房里的这套家具又旧又舒适。

meaning: n. ⾦额；总和，总数；全部；算数 vi. vt. 总结，概括
example: Please sum the numbers on the page.
exampleChinese: 请把这一页上的数字加起来并总结。

meaning: n. 总结，概要，概括 adj. 总结的；⽴即的，速决的
example: Here is a summary of the story.
exampleChinese: 这里是这个故事的概要。

meaning: n. ⼭顶，顶峰；峰会，⾸脑会议
example: We watched the sunset from the summit.
exampleChinese: 我们在山顶看日落。

meaning: vt. 召唤；传唤出庭；召开；请求
example: The police will summon the witness tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 警方明天将传唤那位证人。

meaning: n. ⽇出 (时分)
example: We woke up early to watch the sunrise.
exampleChinese: 我们早起去看日出。

meaning: n. ⽇落 (时分)，傍晚；晚霞 adj. 定期废⽌的
example: We watched the sunset from the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们在山上观看了日落。

meaning: n. 阳光，⽇光
example: Warm sunshine filled the garden.
exampleChinese: 温暖的阳光洒满了花园。

meaning: vt. vi. 拥抱，搂抱 vt. 抱紧；紧挨；(⾐物) 贴 (⾝) n. 拥抱，搂抱
example: She gave her little brother a hug.
exampleChinese: 她拥抱了她的小弟弟。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，极多的，程度深的
example: They live in a huge house.
exampleChinese: 他们住在一座大房子里。

meaning: vi. vt. 哼 (歌) vi. 发嗡嗡声；(地⽅) 热闹，繁忙 n. 嗡嗡声，持续低沉的噪⾳
example: She likes to hum while cooking.
exampleChinese: 她做饭时喜欢哼曲子。

meaning: n. 拍卖 vt. 拍卖
example: The house will be sold at auction.
exampleChinese: 这栋房子将通过拍卖出售。

meaning: n. 观众，听众，读者；正式会⻅
example: The audience clapped after the song ended.
exampleChinese: 歌曲结束后，观众鼓起了掌。

meaning: adj. 录⾳的，⾳频的 n. 声⾳，⾳频
example: The app can play high-quality audio on any phone.
exampleChinese: 这个应用可以在任何手机上播放高质量的音频。

meaning: n. 审计；审查，检查 vt. 审计；旁听 (⼤学的课)
example: The company will audit its books this month.
exampleChinese: 公司这个月将审计账目。

meaning: n. 礼堂，会堂，⾳乐厅；观众席
example: The choir waited in the auditorium before the show.
exampleChinese: 合唱团在演出前等在礼堂里。

meaning: vt. 增⼤，增加，加强
example: Good training can augment your skills.
exampleChinese: 良好的训练可以增强你的技能。

meaning: adj. 听觉的，听⼒的
example: The doctor checked her aural health during the exam.
exampleChinese: 医生在检查中查看了她的听力健康。

meaning: adj. 真品的；真实的；正宗的
example: The museum displayed an authentic painting.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一幅真迹。

meaning: adj. 宽阔的；概括的；⼴泛的
example: The road is broad enough for two cars.
exampleChinese: 这条路宽到足以容纳两辆车并行。

meaning: n. ⼴播节⽬，电视节⽬ vt. vi. ⼴播，播送 (节⽬) vt. 散布，使⼴为传播
example: The station will broadcast the news at noon.
exampleChinese: 电台将在中午播送新闻。

meaning: n. ⻘肿，瘀伤 vt. vi. (使) 出现伤痕，擦伤 vt. 打击，挫伤 (信⼼)
example: He got a bruise on his knee after the fall.
exampleChinese: 他摔倒后膝盖上出现了瘀伤。

meaning: n. 刷⼦，画笔；刷；冲突；灌⽊丛 vt. 刷，涂；拂，掸 vi. vt. 轻擦，掠过
example: She uses a small brush to clean her shoes.
exampleChinese: 她用一把小刷子刷她的鞋。

meaning: adj. 野蛮的，残暴的；直⾔不讳的
example: The officer gave a brutal answer to the rude comment.
exampleChinese: 那名警官对那句无礼的话给出了直言不讳的回答。

meaning: n. 芽，苞，花蕾；⽼兄，伙计 vi. 发芽，⻓出花蕾
example: A small bud appeared on the rose bush.
exampleChinese: 玫瑰丛上长出了一个小花苞。

meaning: n. 缓冲物，起缓冲作⽤的⼈ vt. 缓冲，缓解，缓和；【计】缓存
example: The foam pad acted as a buffer between the box and the floor.
exampleChinese: 泡沫垫在箱子和地板之间起了缓冲作用。

meaning: n. ⾃助餐；(⽕⻋上的) 餐⻋ vt. (⻛、⾬等) 连续猛击，打击
example: We ate lunch at a buffet near the hotel.
exampleChinese: 我们在酒店附近的一家自助餐厅吃了午饭。

meaning: n. ⾍⼦；故障；窃听器；⼩病 n. 热衷，着迷 vt. 装窃听器；使烦恼，使恼怒
example: My phone has a bug that closes the app.
exampleChinese: 我的手机有一个会让应用关闭的故障。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 破裂，裂开；砸开，破开 vt. 重击，猛击；找到解决⽅法 n. 裂缝；缝隙；爆裂声；尝试 adj. 训练有素的，⼀流的
example: The ice can crack if it gets warmer.
exampleChinese: 如果天气变暖，冰面可能会裂开。

meaning: n. 摇篮；发源地；(电话的) 听筒架 vt. 轻抱，轻托
example: She rocked the baby in the cradle.
exampleChinese: 她把婴儿轻轻摇在摇篮里。

meaning: n. ⼿艺；技巧；船；⻜⾏器；诡计 vt. 精⼼制作
example: He can craft a simple wooden chair.
exampleChinese: 他能精心制作一把简单的木椅。

meaning: n. 撞⻋，坠机；碰撞声；暴跌 vi. vt. 碰撞，撞击；崩溃 vi. 使发出巨响；暴跌，贬值；睡觉 adj. 应急的，速成的
example: The car will crash if the road is too slippery.
exampleChinese: 如果路面太滑，汽车就会撞毁。

meaning: adj. 疯狂的；狂热的；精神错乱的
example: It is crazy to walk home in a storm.
exampleChinese: 在暴风雨中走回家太疯狂了。

meaning: n. 奶油；乳膏，乳霜；淡⻩⾊；精髓 adj. 淡⻩⾊的 vt. 把…搅成糊状；彻底打败
example: She spread cream on the cake.
exampleChinese: 她把奶油抹在蛋糕上。

meaning: n. ⽣物；(具有某种特征的) ⼈
example: The panda is a gentle creature.
exampleChinese: 熊猫是一种温和的生物。

meaning: n. 资格，资历；资格证书
example: Please show your credentials at the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门口出示你的资格证书。

meaning: vi. 爬，爬⾏；缓慢⾏进；巴结 n. 缓慢的速度；⾃由泳
example: The baby can crawl across the floor.
exampleChinese: 宝宝可以在地板上爬行。

meaning: vi. 悄悄⾏进；匍匐⾏进；渐渐出现 n. 讨厌⻤；(对既定⽬标的) 偏离
example: A mouse can creep along the wall at night.
exampleChinese: 老鼠晚上可以沿着墙悄悄爬行。

meaning: n. 全体船员，机组⼈员；专业团队 vt. vi. (在…) 当船员
example: The film crew worked late at night.
exampleChinese: 电影摄制组工作到深夜。

meaning: n. 草稿；征兵；汇票；穿堂⻛ vt. 起草，草拟；征募；选派
example: She wrote a draft of her report last night.
exampleChinese: 她昨晚起草了报告的初稿。

meaning: vt. ⾮常害怕，极为担⼼ n. 恐惧，令⼈惧怕的事物
example: I dread the final exam.
exampleChinese: 我非常害怕期末考试。

meaning: n. 连⾐裙；服装 vi. vt. (给…) 穿⾐服 vi. 穿正式服装 vt. 清洗，包扎；给…加调味酱
example: She wore a red dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条红色连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: vi. 漂流，漂；缓缓移动 vt. 使漂流，使漂浮 n. 雪堆；⽔流，⽓流；主旨；偏航
example: The clouds drift slowly over the lake.
exampleChinese: 云朵缓缓飘过湖面。

meaning: n. 钻机；练习；演习；军事训练 vt. vi. 钻 (孔)；培训；进⾏军事训练
example: The students practiced a fire drill at school.
exampleChinese: 学生们在学校进行了消防演练。

meaning: vi. (液体) 滴下 vi. vt. 滴 (⽔)，滴下 (液体)；充满 n. 滴落，滴⽔声；滴液；点滴瓶
example: Water will drip from the tap if it is not fixed.
exampleChinese: 如果水龙头没修好，水就会滴下来。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 落下；(使) 降低，减少 vt. 中途卸客；寄送；省略；终⽌ n. 滴，⽔珠；微量；下降；滴剂
example: A tear began to drop from her eye.
exampleChinese: 一滴眼泪开始从她眼中落下。

meaning: n. ⽆⼈机；雄蜂；嗡嗡声 vi. 嗡嗡响；唠叨
example: A drone hovered above the field.
exampleChinese: 一架无人机悬停在田野上空。

meaning: n. ⼲旱，旱灾
example: The drought killed many crops last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年的干旱毁掉了许多庄稼。

meaning: vi. vt. (使…) 溺死，淹死 vt. (指声⾳) 盖过
