exampleChinese: 一名警察帮助走失的孩子找到了父母。

meaning: n. ⻆；拐⻆；困境；(偏僻) 区域 vt. 把…逼⼊绝境
example: There is a small shop on the corner.
exampleChinese: 拐角处有一家小商店。

meaning: n. ⾛廊，过道
example: We walked quietly down the corridor.
exampleChinese: 我们安静地走过走廊。

meaning: adj. 昂贵的；代价⼤的
example: That watch is too costly for me.
exampleChinese: 那块手表对我来说太贵了。

meaning: n. 乡间⼩屋，村舍
example: We spent the night in a small cottage by the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们在湖边的一间小屋里过夜。

meaning: n. 棉花；棉布；棉线；药棉
example: She wore a soft cotton shirt.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件柔软的棉衬衫。

meaning: vi. 咳嗽 n. 咳嗽，咳嗽声 vt. 咳出 (⾎等)
example: He has a bad cough this morning.
exampleChinese: 他今天早上咳嗽得很厉害。

meaning: modal. 能，可以
example: She could swim at age six.
exampleChinese: 她六岁时就会游泳了。

meaning: n. 庭院，院⼦
example: We sat in the courtyard and ate lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在庭院里吃午饭。

meaning: n. 堂 (表) 兄弟姐妹；远亲；同类
example: My cousin visits us every summer.
exampleChinese: 我的堂兄弟姐妹每年夏天都会来看我们。

meaning: n. 螃蟹；螃蟹⾁
example: A crab moved across the sand.
exampleChinese: 一只螃蟹在沙滩上爬过。

meaning: n. 起重机，吊⻋；鹤 vi. vt. 伸⻓ (脖⼦) 看，探头看
example: The crane lifted the heavy box.
exampleChinese: 起重机吊起了那个重箱子。

meaning: n. 板球运动；蟋蟀
example: We watched a cricket in the grass.
exampleChinese: 我们看见草丛里有一只蟋蟀。

meaning: vi. vt. 哭；喊叫 vi. 嗥叫 n. 叫喊，喊声；嗥叫；哭
example: I heard someone cry for help outside.
exampleChinese: 我听见外面有人大声呼救。

example: She sliced a cucumber for the salad.
exampleChinese: 她切了一根黄瓜做沙拉。

meaning: n. 橱柜
example: The cups are in the kitchen cupboard.
exampleChinese: 杯子在厨房的柜橱里。

meaning: n. 窗帘，⻔帘；幕布；覆盖物
example: We closed the curtain to block the bright sun.
exampleChinese: 我们拉上窗帘挡住明亮的阳光。

meaning: n. 坐垫，靠垫；起缓冲作⽤的事物 vt. 起缓冲作⽤；减轻…的影响
example: She put a soft cushion on the chair.
exampleChinese: 她在椅子上放了一个柔软的垫子。

meaning: n. 监护权；拘留，羁押
example: The judge ordered that the child stay in custody.
exampleChinese: 法官下令让孩子继续被监护。

meaning: n. 顾客，客⼾；家伙
example: The customer asked for a receipt.
exampleChinese: 那位顾客要了一张收据。

meaning: n. 乳制品；⽜奶场；乳品公司 adj. 乳品的；⽣产乳品的
example: We bought fresh milk and cheese from the dairy.
exampleChinese: 我们从乳品店买了新鲜牛奶和奶酪。

meaning: n. ⽔坝，堤坝；⺟兽，⺟⻢ vt. 在 (河) 上筑坝；阻⽌，抑制
example: They dam the river to create a small lake.
exampleChinese: 他们用坝拦住河水，形成一个小湖。

meaning: n. 危险；(坏事发⽣的) 可能性
example: The thin ice is a real danger.
exampleChinese: 薄冰是真正的危险。

meaning: adj. 危险的
example: It is dangerous to swim here.
exampleChinese: 在这里游泳很危险。

meaning: modal. 敢，敢于 vt. 激将，问…敢不敢 (做) n. 挑战，激将
example: I dare to try the high diving board.
exampleChinese: 我敢尝试那个高跳板。

meaning: n. 亲爱的；好⼼的⼈；宠⼉ adj. 可爱的，迷⼈的
example: Good night, darling.
exampleChinese: 晚安，亲爱的。

meaning: adj. ⿊暗的；深⾊的；⽆望的 n. ⿊暗，暗处
example: It gets dark early in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天黑得很早。

meaning: adj. 亲爱的；昂贵的 n. 亲爱的，乖乖 int. 哎呀，天哪
example: She is a dear friend of mine.
exampleChinese: 她是我的一位亲爱的朋友。

meaning: n. 死亡；终结，灭亡；死神
example: The old king's death changed the country.
exampleChinese: 老国王的去世改变了这个国家。

example: School ends in late December.
exampleChinese: 学校在十二月下旬放假。

meaning: adj. 深的；低沉的；严重的；深切的 adv. 深深地，⾄深处
example: The lake is very deep near the bridge.
exampleChinese: 桥附近的湖水很深。

example: A deer crossed the road at dusk.
exampleChinese: 黄昏时，一只鹿穿过了马路。

meaning: n. 保卫；防御物；国防；辩护
example: Strong walls improve the defence of the city.
exampleChinese: 坚固的城墙加强了这座城市的防御。

meaning: adj. ⽛⻮的，⽛科的
example: She had a dental checkup this morning.
exampleChinese: 她今天上午做了牙科检查。

meaning: vt. 派遣；派送；迅速处理；处决 n. 派遣，调遣；急件，快信；电讯
example: The company will dispatch the package today.
exampleChinese: 公司今天会派送这个包裹。

meaning: n. (饭后) 甜点
example: We had ice cream for dessert.
exampleChinese: 我们甜点吃了冰淇淋。

meaning: vt. 毁坏，摧毁；杀死，消灭
example: Strong winds can destroy old houses.
exampleChinese: 强风会破坏旧房子。

meaning: n. 露，露⽔，露珠
example: Dew covered the leaves early in the morning.
exampleChinese: 清晨，露珠覆盖了叶子。

meaning: n. 对话，对⽩
example: The dialogue in the play sounded natural.
exampleChinese: 这部戏里的对话听起来很自然。

meaning: n. 钻⽯，⾦刚⽯；菱形；(牌) ⽅块
example: She wore a diamond ring to the party.
exampleChinese: 她戴着一枚钻石戒指去参加派对。

meaning: n. ⽇记；⽇程簿，记事簿
example: She writes in her diary every evening.
exampleChinese: 她每天晚上都写日记。

meaning: n. 词典，字典
example: I use a dictionary to check new words.
exampleChinese: 我用字典查生词。

meaning: vi. vt. 死亡，凋谢 vi. 消亡；(机器) 停⽌运转 n. 模具，压模
example: Many flowers die without enough water.
exampleChinese: 没有足够的水，许多花会枯死。

meaning: adj. 不同的
example: The two bags are different in color.
exampleChinese: 这两个包颜色不同。

meaning: adj. 困难的；⿇烦的；难以讨好的
example: This math problem is very difficult.
exampleChinese: 这道数学题很难。

meaning: n. 困难；难题；困境
example: She had difficulty opening the jar.
exampleChinese: 她打开那个罐子有困难。

meaning: n. 晚餐；宴会，晚宴
example: We had fish and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚餐吃了鱼和米饭。

meaning: adj. 直接的；径直的；坦率的 vt. 对准；指导；指路；指⽰ vt. vi. 导演，指挥 adv. 直接
example: This is the most direct way home.
exampleChinese: 这是回家最直接的路。

meaning: adv. 直接地，坦率地；正好；⽴即 conj. ⼀…就…
example: Call me directly if you need help.
exampleChinese: 如果你需要帮助，直接给我打电话。

meaning: n. 灰尘，污物；(泥) ⼟；丑闻
example: There was dirt on the floor.
exampleChinese: 地板上有污垢。

meaning: n. 话语，语篇；演讲，论述；对话 vi. 讲述，论述
example: The teacher gave a short discourse on space travel.
exampleChinese: 老师做了一次关于太空旅行的简短论述。

meaning: n. 圆盘；磁盘；光盘
example: I saved the file on a disk.
exampleChinese: 我把文件保存到了磁盘上。

meaning: n. 沟，渠 vt. 丢弃，抛弃；逃学 vt. vi. (在海上) 迫降
example: Please do not ditch your homework.
exampleChinese: 请不要把作业扔掉。

meaning: n. 穹顶，圆顶；半球形物
example: The old church had a tall dome.
exampleChinese: 那座老教堂有一个高高的穹顶。

meaning: n. 驴，驴⼦
example: The donkey carried bags of vegetables.
exampleChinese: 那头驴驮着几袋蔬菜。

example: We stood at the doorway and waited.
exampleChinese: 我们站在门口等着。

meaning: n. 宿舍，宿舍楼
example: She returned to the dormitory after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后她回到了宿舍。

meaning: n. 鸽⼦；(政治) 温和派⼈物，鸽派
example: A dove flew across the yard.
exampleChinese: 一只鸽子飞过院子。

meaning: adv. 往楼下，在楼下 adj. 在楼下的，在底楼的 n. 底楼，楼下
example: My shoes are downstairs by the door.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋子在楼下门边。

meaning: det. n. ⼀打，⼗⼆个；⼗⼏个；许多
example: She bought a dozen eggs at the store.
exampleChinese: 她在商店买了一打鸡蛋。

meaning: n. 梦；梦想；恍惚，出神 vi. vt. 做梦；梦想
example: Her dream is to become a doctor.
exampleChinese: 她的梦想是成为一名医生。

meaning: adj. 喝醉的；沉醉的 n. 醉⻤，酗酒者
example: He was drunk after drinking too much beer.
exampleChinese: 他因为喝了太多啤酒而喝醉了。

meaning: prep. 在…期间
example: No one talked during the movie.
exampleChinese: 看电影的时候没有人说话。

meaning: n. 尘埃；沙⼟，尘⼟；粉末 vi. vt. 擦去…的灰尘 vt. 把 (粉末) 撒于
example: Dust covered the old shelf.
exampleChinese: 灰尘覆盖了那只旧书架。

meaning: n. 住宅，住所
example: The old dwelling was built of stone.
exampleChinese: 那座古老的住宅是用石头建成的。

meaning: n. 鹰，雕
example: An eagle flew high above the mountain.
exampleChinese: 一只鹰在山上空高高飞过。

meaning: n. 地震
example: The earthquake damaged many old houses.
exampleChinese: 这场地震毁坏了许多老房子。

meaning: n. 复活节
example: We paint eggs at Easter.
exampleChinese: 我们在复活节给鸡蛋涂色。

meaning: n. ⽇⻝，⽉⻝；(权势等的) 丧失 vt. 遮住…的光；使黯然失⾊
example: A solar eclipse made the sky dark.
exampleChinese: 一次日食让天空变黑了。

meaning: adj. 较年⻓的 n. ⽐…年⻓的⼈；⻓者；接⻣⽊
example: My elder brother lives in Shanghai.
exampleChinese: 我的哥哥住在上海。

meaning: n. 电，电⼒；紧张激动的情绪
example: The city needs more electricity at night.
exampleChinese: 这座城市夜里需要更多电力。

meaning: n. 电⼦
example: An electron is smaller than an atom.
exampleChinese: 电子比原子还小。

meaning: adj. 电⼦的
example: She bought a new electronic keyboard for music class.
exampleChinese: 她为音乐课买了一架新的电子键盘。

meaning: adv. adj. 其他，别的，另外
example: Do you need anything else from the store?
exampleChinese: 你还需要商店里的别的东西吗？

meaning: n. ⼤使馆，使馆官员
example: We waited outside the embassy.
exampleChinese: 我们在大使馆外面等着。

meaning: n. 皇帝，君主
example: The emperor lived in a great palace.
exampleChinese: 皇帝住在一座宏伟的宫殿里。

meaning: n. 百科全书
example: She looked up the word in the encyclopedia.
exampleChinese: 她在百科全书里查那个词。

meaning: n. 结局，结尾；最后部分；词尾
example: I liked the ending of the story.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢这个故事的结局。

meaning: n. 敌⼈，反对者；敌军；⼤敌
example: The two countries were once enemy states.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家曾经是敌对国家。

meaning: vt. 享受；玩得痛快；享有 vi. 请尽情享⽤，好好享⽤
example: I enjoy reading by the window on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在下雨天坐在窗边看书。

meaning: det. 充⾜的，⾜够的 adv. 相当 pron. 充⾜，⾜够
example: Do we have enough chairs for everyone?
exampleChinese: 我们的椅子够大家坐吗？

meaning: vi. vt. 进⼊；报名参加 vt. 加⼊；开始进⼊；登记，输⼊
example: Please enter the classroom quietly.
exampleChinese: 请安静地进入教室。

meaning: n. 信封；外裹物，外层
example: I put the letter in an envelope.
exampleChinese: 我把信放进了一个信封里。

meaning: n. 考试；体检
example: I have a math exam tomorrow morning.
exampleChinese: 我明天早上有一场数学考试。

meaning: adj. 极好的，优秀的；棒极了
example: She did an excellent job on the project.
exampleChinese: 她在这个项目上做得非常出色。

meaning: adj. 过分的，过多的
example: Too much salt is excessive for this soup.
exampleChinese: 这道汤放太多盐就过分了。

meaning: vt. 使激动，使兴奋；激起，引起
example: Good news can excite the whole class.
exampleChinese: 好消息能让全班兴奋起来。

meaning: adj. 令⼈激动的，令⼈兴奋的
example: The concert was exciting for everyone.
exampleChinese: 那场音乐会让每个人都很兴奋。

meaning: adj. 昂贵的
example: This bag is too expensive for me.
exampleChinese: 这个包对我来说太贵了。

meaning: vt. vi. 阐明；解释
example: Can you explain this rule to me?
exampleChinese: 你能给我说明一下这条规则吗？

meaning: n. 眉⽑
example: A small cut made her eyebrow bleed.
exampleChinese: 一个小伤口让她的眉毛流了血。

meaning: n. 视⼒
example: Reading in the dark can hurt your eyesight.
exampleChinese: 在黑暗中看书会伤害你的视力。

meaning: adj. 著名的，有名的
example: This writer is famous around the world.
exampleChinese: 这位作家在全世界都很著名。

meaning: n. ⼩仙⼦，⼩精灵
example: The fairy left a shiny coin on the table.
exampleChinese: 小仙子在桌上留下了一枚闪亮的硬币。

meaning: adv. 远；久远；很⼤程度上 adj. 较远的；远端的；遥远的
example: My grandparents live far from the city center.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母住得离市中心很远。

meaning: n. 农场，牧场；农场住宅；养殖场 vi. vt. 耕种，养殖
example: My grandparents farm near the river.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母在河边务农。

meaning: n. 农⺠，农场主
example: The farmer feeds the chickens every morning.
exampleChinese: 这位农夫每天早上都喂鸡。

meaning: n. 肥料，化肥
example: Farmers spread fertilizer on the soil.
exampleChinese: 农民把肥料撒在土壤上。

meaning: n. 节⽇；节庆
example: The Spring Festival is my favorite holiday.
exampleChinese: 春节是我最喜欢的节日。

meaning: det. adj. 不多，很少，⼏个，⼀些 pron. 很少⼈ (物)，⼀些⼈ (物)
example: Few students were late today.
exampleChinese: 今天迟到的学生很少。

meaning: n. ⼿指；狭⻓物 vt. ⽤⼿指触摸；告发，告密
example: He cut his finger while cooking dinner.
exampleChinese: 他做晚饭时割伤了手指。

meaning: n. 拳头
example: She closed her fist tightly.
exampleChinese: 她紧紧地握起拳头。

meaning: n. 旗，旗帜 vt. 标记，标注 vi. 疲乏，衰弱
example: Please flag the important page in the book.
exampleChinese: 请把书里重要的那一页标记出来。

meaning: n. 舰队；捕⻥船队；⻋队 adj. 快速的，敏捷的
example: The fleet sailed across the sea.
exampleChinese: 舰队驶过了大海。

meaning: n. 地板，地⾯；楼层；(海) 底 vt. 使惊奇；给…铺设地板
example: The kids sat on the floor to play cards.
exampleChinese: 孩子们坐在地板上打牌。

meaning: n. ⾯粉 vt. 给…裹上⾯粉，在…上撒以⾯粉
example: She dusted the table with a little flour.
exampleChinese: 她在桌子上撒了一点面粉。

meaning: n. 花，花朵 vi. 开花；繁荣，兴旺
example: This flower smells very sweet.
exampleChinese: 这朵花闻起来很香。

meaning: n. 森林；(森林般的) ⼀⽚
example: A small path goes through the forest.
exampleChinese: 一条小路穿过森林。

meaning: adv. 永恒地；⻓久地；没完没了地
example: I will remember this day forever.
exampleChinese: 我会永远记住这一天。

meaning: vi. vt. 忘记，不再想 vt. (举⽌) 不得体
example: Do not forget your homework at home.
exampleChinese: 不要把你的家庭作业忘在家里。

meaning: n. 餐叉；叉，耙；分岔处；叉状物 vi. (道路等) 分叉 vt. ⽀付，付 (钱)
example: She ate noodles with a fork.
exampleChinese: 她用叉子吃面条。

meaning: n. 化⽯；⽼古董，⽼顽固
example: We found a fossil in the rock.
exampleChinese: 我们在岩石里发现了一块化石。

meaning: vt. 创⽴；兴建；基于
example: They plan to found a new school here.
exampleChinese: 他们计划在这里创立一所新学校。

meaning: n. 狐狸；狐⽪；狡猾的⼈；美⼈ vt. 难住，使迷惑
example: The fox ran across the field.
exampleChinese: 那只狐狸跑过了田野。

meaning: n. 冰箱
example: The milk is in the fridge.
exampleChinese: 牛奶在冰箱里。

meaning: n. 蛙，⻘蛙；(蔑称) 法国佬
example: A green frog jumped into the pond.
exampleChinese: 一只绿色的青蛙跳进了池塘。

meaning: n. 正⾯；正前⽅；前部；前线 adj. 前⾯的，前部的，正⾯的 vt. vi. ⾯向，在…前⾯
example: There is a small shop at the front of the school.
exampleChinese: 学校前面有一家小商店。

meaning: adj. 满的；完整的；尽量多的；忙的 adj. 吃饱了的；(数量) ⾜⾜的；圆的 adv. 直接地
example: Please give me the full story.
exampleChinese: 请把完整的事情经过告诉我。

meaning: n. 乐趣，有趣的事 (或⼈) adj. 令⼈快乐的，有趣的
example: Swimming in the lake is fun.
exampleChinese: 在湖里游泳很有乐趣。

meaning: adj. 暴怒的；激烈的，⾼速的
example: He became furious when he saw the damage.
exampleChinese: 他看到损坏时非常愤怒。

meaning: n. 熔炉；暖⽓炉，锅炉
example: The furnace warmed the whole house.
exampleChinese: 暖气炉让整栋房子都暖和起来。

meaning: n. 家具
example: We bought new furniture for the living room.
exampleChinese: 我们给客厅买了新家具。

meaning: n. ⼩器具，⼩装置，精巧的⼩玩意
example: This gadget can open a bottle in seconds.
exampleChinese: 这个小器具几秒钟就能开瓶。

meaning: n. 加仑 (液量单位)；⼤量液体
example: The bottle holds one gallon of milk.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子能装一加仑牛奶。

meaning: n. 花园；公园 vi. 做园艺⼯作
example: My grandparents garden in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母在春天栽培花木。

meaning: n. ⼤蒜
example: She added garlic to the soup for more flavor.
exampleChinese: 她往汤里加了大蒜来增加风味。

meaning: n. ⾐服，服装
example: The tailor made a warm garment for the child.
exampleChinese: 裁缝给孩子做了一件保暖的衣服。

meaning: n. 汽油
example: The car needs gasoline before we can drive it.
exampleChinese: 汽车在开走前需要加汽油。

example: Please close the gate before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把大门关上。

meaning: adj. 遗传的，基因的
example: Scientists study genetic differences in plants.
exampleChinese: 科学家研究植物的遗传差异。

meaning: n. 绅⼠；先⽣；有⾝份的⼈
example: That gentleman held the door for us.
exampleChinese: 那位先生为我们扶住了门。

meaning: n. 玻璃；玻璃杯；眼镜
example: The glass on the door is very clean.
exampleChinese: 门上的玻璃非常干净。

meaning: n. ⼿套
example: I lost one glove on the bus.
exampleChinese: 我把一只手套落在公交车上了。

meaning: n. 上帝，天主；神；被崇拜的偶像
example: In the story, the sea god protects the island.
exampleChinese: 在这个故事里，海神保护着这座岛。

meaning: n. ⾼尔夫球 (运动)
example: He likes to golf with his grandfather on weekends.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢周末和祖父一起打高尔夫球。

meaning: n. 善良，美德；(⻝物中的) 营养 int. (表⽰惊讶) 天哪
example: Goodness, I forgot my homework at home!
exampleChinese: 天哪，我把作业忘在家里了！

meaning: n. 鹅；鹅⾁；傻⽠ vt. 推动，促进
example: The driver had to goose the engine to climb the hill.
exampleChinese: 司机不得不突然加大油门才能爬上山坡。

meaning: n. 语法；语法书
example: Good grammar makes your writing clear.
exampleChinese: 好的语法会让你的写作更清楚。

meaning: n. 草，⻘草；草地，草坪 vi. (向警⽅) 告密，告发
example: The grass is wet after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后草是湿的。

meaning: adj. 灰⾊的；头发花⽩的；昏暗的 n. 灰⾊，灰⽩⾊ vi. (头发) 变花⽩
example: The gray sky looked cold and quiet.
exampleChinese: 灰色的天空看起来冷冷清清。

meaning: vi. vt. 猜测；猜对；想，以为 vt. (引出令⼈惊奇或激动的事) 你猜 n. 猜测，猜想
example: Can you guess the answer?
exampleChinese: 你能猜出答案吗？

meaning: n. 宾客；旅客，房客；特邀嘉宾
example: We made tea for our guest.
exampleChinese: 我们给客人泡了茶。

meaning: n. 吉他
example: He can play the guitar very well.
exampleChinese: 他能把吉他弹得很好。

meaning: n. 海湾；海湾地区；鸿沟，分歧
example: There is a narrow gulf between the two islands.
exampleChinese: 这两座岛屿之间有一片狭窄的海湾。

meaning: n. 男⼈，⼩伙⼦；兄弟们，姐妹们
example: That guy helped me carry the box.
exampleChinese: 那个小伙子帮我搬了箱子。

meaning: n. 健⾝房，体育馆
example: We play basketball in the gymnasium after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后，我们在体育馆里打篮球。

meaning: n. 汉堡包
example: He ordered a hamburger and juice.
exampleChinese: 他点了一个汉堡包和一杯果汁。

meaning: n. ⼿帕，纸⼱
example: She folded the handkerchief and put it in her pocket.
exampleChinese: 她把手帕叠好，放进口袋里。

meaning: adj. (男⼈) 帅⽓的；美观的；巨额的
example: The actor looks handsome in the black suit.
exampleChinese: 那位演员穿着黑色西装看起来很英俊。

meaning: vt. 控制，利⽤；给 (⻢等) 上挽具 n. ⻢具，挽具；保护带，背带
example: Farmers can harness the wind to make electricity.
exampleChinese: 农民可以利用风力来发电。

meaning: vt. 厌恶，憎恨 vi. 不愿，不想 n. 厌恶，憎恨
example: I hate getting up so early on Sunday.
exampleChinese: 我讨厌星期天起这么早。

meaning: n. 头痛；令⼈头痛的⼈ (或物)
example: I have a headache after reading too long.
exampleChinese: 看书太久后我头痛。

meaning: n. 校⻓
example: The headmaster spoke to the students in the hall.
exampleChinese: 校长在大厅里和学生们讲话。

meaning: n. ⺟鸡；雌⻦
example: The hen laid an egg this morning.
exampleChinese: 那只母鸡今天早上下了一个蛋。

meaning: int. (⽤于打招呼) 喂，嗨
example: Hi, can you help me carry this box?
exampleChinese: 嗨，你能帮我搬这个盒子吗？

meaning: vt. 藏；遮住，遮挡；掩盖，隐瞒 vi. vt. 躲避，隐匿 n. 隐蔽处；⽑⽪；⼈⾝安全
example: Please hide the gift under the bed.
exampleChinese: 请把礼物藏在床底下。

meaning: adj. ⾼的；含某物多的；地位⾼的 adv. 在⾼处，向⾼处；(数量等) ⼤地 n. 最⾼⽓温；极⼤欢乐
example: The kite flew high in the sky.
exampleChinese: 风筝高高地飞在天空中。

meaning: adj. 有重⼤历史意义的；古⽼的
example: The bridge is a historic building in our city.
exampleChinese: 这座桥是我们城市里一座有重大历史意义的建筑。

meaning: n. 历史，历史学；(某⼈的) 经历
example: I enjoy studying history at school.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在学校学习历史。

meaning: n. 洞，孔，坑；裂⼝；洞⽳；漏洞
example: There is a hole in my sock.
exampleChinese: 我的袜子上有个洞。

meaning: n. 家；房⼦；家乡；家庭；栖息地 adj. 家庭的；家⽤的；本国的 adv. 到家，回家，在家
example: I stayed home and read a book.
exampleChinese: 我待在家里看书。

meaning: n. 蜂蜜；(爱称) 亲爱的
example: She put honey in her tea.
exampleChinese: 她在茶里加了蜂蜜。

meaning: adj. 有希望的 n. 希望获得成功的⼈
example: She felt hopeful after hearing the good news.
exampleChinese: 听到好消息后，她感到很有希望。

meaning: n. 医院
example: She works at the city hospital.
exampleChinese: 她在市医院工作。

meaning: adj. 热的；⾟辣的；激烈的；性感的
example: The soup is too hot to drink.
exampleChinese: 这汤太热了，不能喝。

meaning: n. 家庭主妇
example: The housewife prepared dinner for the family.
exampleChinese: 这位家庭主妇为家人准备了晚饭。

meaning: n. 家务活
example: We share the housework on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我们在周末分担家务。

meaning: adj. 饥饿的；渴望…的
example: I am hungry after basketball practice.
exampleChinese: 篮球训练后我饿了。

meaning: vi. 赶快，匆忙 (做某事)；迅速移动 vt. 催促 (某⼈)；仓促 (做某事) n. 匆忙，急忙
example: We must hurry or we will miss the bus.
exampleChinese: 我们得快点，不然会错过公交车。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 受伤，(使) 疼痛；使伤⼼ vt. 伤害，损害 adj. 受伤的 n. ⼼灵创伤，委屈
example: Be careful not to hurt your knee.
exampleChinese: 小心别弄伤你的膝盖。

meaning: n. (简陋的) ⼩屋
example: They slept in a small hut near the river.
exampleChinese: 他们睡在河边的一间小屋里。

meaning: n. 杂交动物或植物；合成物 adj. 杂交的；合成的；混合动⼒的
example: This hybrid car uses both gas and electricity.
exampleChinese: 这辆混合动力汽车既用汽油又用电。

meaning: n. 氢，氢⽓
example: Hydrogen is the lightest gas.
exampleChinese: 氢是最轻的气体。

meaning: n. 冰淇淋，雪糕
example: We ate ice cream in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里吃了冰淇淋。

meaning: n. 图标；偶像；圣像
example: Click the home icon to go back.
exampleChinese: 点击主页图标返回。

meaning: n. 想法，主意；概念；看法；感觉
example: That is a great idea.
exampleChinese: 那是个很棒的想法。

meaning: n. ⽩痴，笨蛋
example: Don't be an idiot and touch the hot stove.
exampleChinese: 别犯傻去碰那只热炉子。

meaning: n. 英⼨；少量，短距离 vi. vt. (使朝某⽅向) 谨慎移动
example: The picture is only six inch wide.
exampleChinese: 这张图片只有六英寸宽。

meaning: n. ⼩旅馆，⼩客栈，⼩酒馆
example: We stayed at a small inn near the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们住在湖边一家小客栈里。

example: This insect has bright green wings.
exampleChinese: 这只昆虫有鲜绿色的翅膀。

meaning: adv. 作为替代，反⽽
example: We stayed home instead.
exampleChinese: 我们反而待在家里。

meaning: adj. 有趣的，有吸引⼒的
example: This science book is very interesting.
exampleChinese: 这本科普书很有趣。

meaning: vt. 邀请；招致 n. 邀请，请柬
example: I will invite my best friend to dinner.
exampleChinese: 我会邀请我最好的朋友共进晚餐。

meaning: n. 玻璃罐；缸，坛⼦；撞击 vt. vi. (使) 撞击；(使) 不快，(使) 吃惊 vi. (与…) 不和谐，不相配
example: The loud noise made the window jar.
exampleChinese: 那阵巨响使窗户震动了。

meaning: n. 爵⼠乐曲 vi. vt. 使某事更令⼈兴奋
example: My uncle listens to jazz on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔周末听爵士乐。

meaning: vt. vi. 成为…的⼀员；连接；汇合 vt. 参与，加⼊到…中，与…⼀道去
example: Do you want to join the basketball team?
exampleChinese: 你想加入篮球队吗？

meaning: n. 笑话，玩笑；笑料，笑柄 vi. vt. 说笑话，开玩笑
example: That joke made the whole class laugh.
exampleChinese: 那个笑话把全班都逗笑了。

meaning: n. 喜悦；令⼈⾼兴的事 (或⼈)
example: The children's laughter filled the room with joy.
exampleChinese: 孩子们的笑声让房间充满了欢乐。

meaning: n. (有柄有嘴的) 罐，壶
example: Please pour the water into the jug.
exampleChinese: 请把水倒进罐子里。

meaning: adv. 正好；正当…时；只是；完全 adv. 同样；刚好；刚才；正准备 adj. 公正的，正义的；合适的
example: I just want a glass of water.
exampleChinese: 我只是想要一杯水。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 保持，处于 vt. 保留；放；遵守；记；养 vi. 继续 n. ⽣活费⽤；城堡主楼
example: Keep the window open for fresh air.
exampleChinese: 让窗户保持开着，好让空气流通。

meaning: n. 烧⽔壶
example: The kettle is boiling on the stove.
exampleChinese: 水壶正在炉子上烧开。

meaning: vt. vi. 踢，踹；踢蹬，踢腿 n. 踢，踢腿；极⼤的乐趣
example: Do not kick the ball into the window.
exampleChinese: 不要把球踢到窗户上。

meaning: n. 千⽶，公⾥
example: My school is one kilometer away.
exampleChinese: 我的学校有一公里远。

meaning: n. 幼⼉园
example: My little sister goes to kindergarten near our home.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹在我们家附近上幼儿园。

meaning: vi. 敲，击 vt. 猛⼒击打，撞 vt. vi. 碰上，撞上 n. 敲击声；打击，敲击，撞击
example: Please knock before you enter the room.
exampleChinese: 进房间前请先敲门。

meaning: n. 实验室
example: We did the test in the lab.
exampleChinese: 我们在实验室里做了这个测试。

meaning: n. 梯⼦；(晋升) 阶梯；(裤袜) 抽丝
example: The fire truck had a long ladder.
exampleChinese: 消防车上有一架很长的梯子。

meaning: n. 灯；发热灯，射线照射器
example: There is a lamp on my desk.
exampleChinese: 我的书桌上有一盏灯。

meaning: n. 陆地；⼟地；地产；国家，地区 vi. 降落，着陆；降临，使陷⼊ vt. 使…降落，使…登岸；成功得到
example: The pilot will land the plane at noon.
exampleChinese: 飞行员将在中午让飞机降落。

meaning: n. ⼥房东；(酒吧等的) ⼥店主
example: My landlady is very kind to the tenants.
exampleChinese: 我的女房东对房客很和善。

meaning: n. 房东，地主；(酒吧等的) 店主
example: The landlord fixed the broken heater quickly.
exampleChinese: 房东很快修好了坏掉的暖气。

meaning: n. ⻛景，景观；乡村⻛景画；形势 vt. 美化…的环境
example: We enjoyed the landscape from the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们在山上欣赏了风景。

meaning: n. 笔记本电脑
example: I use my laptop to do my homework.
exampleChinese: 我用笔记本电脑做作业。

meaning: n. 拉丁语；拉丁语系国家的⼈ adj. 拉丁语的；拉丁语系国家的
example: She studies Latin at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校学习拉丁语。

meaning: n. 厕所，洗⼿间
example: Please show me where the lavatory is.
exampleChinese: 请告诉我洗手间在哪里。

meaning: n. 草坪，草地
example: The children ran across the green lawn.
exampleChinese: 孩子们跑过绿色的草坪。

meaning: n. 律师
example: My lawyer explained the contract.
exampleChinese: 我的律师解释了这份合同。

meaning: n. 解雇，裁员；歇⼯期，停⼯期
example: The company announced a layoff last week.
exampleChinese: 公司上周宣布裁员。

meaning: det. pron. 最⼩的，最少的，最低程度 的
example: This is the least expensive bag in the store.
exampleChinese: 这是店里最便宜的包。

meaning: n. 柠檬；浅⻩⾊；废物 adj. 浅⻩⾊的
example: She drank lemon water after the game.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛后喝了柠檬水。

meaning: n. ⻓度；时间的⻓短；篇幅，⽚⻓
example: The length of the rope is two meters.
exampleChinese: 这根绳子的长度是两米。

meaning: vt. 允许；让；出租 (房屋等) n. 租借
example: My parents let me stay up late on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 我父母允许我周五晚一点睡。

meaning: n. ⾃由；(某种) 合法权利；失礼
example: The children enjoyed their liberty.
exampleChinese: 孩子们享受着自由。

meaning: n. 图书馆馆⻓，图书馆管理员
example: The librarian helped me find a book.
exampleChinese: 图书馆员帮我找到了那本书。

meaning: n. 嘴唇；边沿；⽆礼的话
example: She bit her lip when she was nervous.
exampleChinese: 她紧张时咬了咬嘴唇。

meaning: n. 升 (公制容量单位)
example: This bottle holds one liter of juice.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子能装一升果汁。

meaning: n. 识字，读写能⼒
example: Reading helps build literacy.
exampleChinese: 阅读有助于提高读写能力。

meaning: n. 客厅，起居室
example: We watched a movie in the living room.
exampleChinese: 我们在客厅里看了电影。

meaning: n. 负载，负荷；装载量；⼤量 vt. vi. (把…) 装⼊；输⼊，载⼊ vi. 承载，装载
example: The truck can carry a heavy load.
exampleChinese: 这辆卡车可以运载很重的货物。

meaning: vt. vi. 锁上，被锁住 vt. 把…锁起来；陷⼊，卷⼊ n. 锁；⻋锁，制动器；(⼀绺) 头发
example: Do not forget to lock the door.
exampleChinese: 别忘了锁门。

meaning: n. 寄物柜，储物柜
example: I put my bag in the locker.
exampleChinese: 我把书包放进了储物柜。

meaning: adj. 孤独的；偏僻的
example: He felt lonely in the new city.
exampleChinese: 他在这座新城市里感到很寂寞。

meaning: n. 休息室；躺椅，沙发 vi. 懒洋洋地坐，躺，消磨时间
example: We waited in the airport lounge.
exampleChinese: 我们在机场休息室等候。

meaning: adj. 可爱的，美丽的；令⼈愉快的
example: What a lovely little garden!
exampleChinese: 多么可爱的小花园啊！

meaning: n. 爱⼈，情⼈；爱好者
example: She is my lover and my best friend.
exampleChinese: 她是我的爱人，也是我最好的朋友。

meaning: n. ⾏李
example: We packed our luggage before the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们在旅行前把行李打包好了。

meaning: vt. 引诱，诱惑 n. 诱惑⼒，魅⼒；诱饵
example: The bright ad will lure children into the store.
exampleChinese: 这则醒目的广告会诱惑孩子们走进商店。

meaning: n. 杂志；专题节⽬；弹匣；军⽕库
example: She read a travel magazine on the train.
exampleChinese: 她在火车上看了一本旅行杂志。

meaning: n. 邮政；邮件，邮包；电⼦邮件 vt. 邮寄；通过电⼦邮件发送
example: I will mail the card tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天会把这张卡片寄出去。

meaning: n. 哺乳动物
example: A whale is a mammal that feeds its babies with milk.
exampleChinese: 鲸是一种用乳汁喂养幼崽的哺乳动物。

meaning: n. 经理；经纪⼈；主教练
example: The manager called a short meeting.
exampleChinese: 经理召开了一个简短的会议。

meaning: adj. 男⼦⽓概的；(词语) 阳性的
example: He walked with a masculine confidence.
exampleChinese: 他走路时带着一种男子气概的自信。

meaning: n. 数学；数学运算
example: Mathematics is my favorite subject.
exampleChinese: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 草地，牧场
example: We sat on the grass in the meadow.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在草地上。

meaning: n. ⼀餐 (饭)
example: We eat our evening meal at six.
exampleChinese: 我们六点吃晚饭。

example: We cut a melon for dessert.
exampleChinese: 我们切了一个瓜当甜点。

meaning: n. 菜单；(显⽰器上的) 选单
example: I looked at the menu before ordering lunch.
exampleChinese: 我点午饭前先看了菜单。

meaning: n. 当中，中间，中部；腰部 adj. 当中的，中间的，中部的
example: She sat in the middle of the room.
exampleChinese: 她坐在房间中央。

meaning: n. 毫⽶
example: The stone is only one millimeter thick.
exampleChinese: 这块石头只有一毫米厚。

meaning: det. pron. 数量更多的 adv. 更；(程度上) 更强
example: I need more time to finish the model.
exampleChinese: 我需要更多时间完成这个模型。

meaning: n. 蚊⼦
example: A mosquito bit me last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚有一只蚊子咬了我。

example: We climbed the mountain before sunrise.
exampleChinese: 我们在日出前爬上了那座山。

meaning: n. ⽼⿏；⿏标；安静畏缩的⼈
example: A small mouse ran under the table.
exampleChinese: 一只小老鼠跑到了桌子下面。

meaning: n. 动作；移动；运动；⾏踪；转变
example: The movement is growing among young people.
exampleChinese: 这场运动在年轻人中正在扩大。

meaning: n. 电影
example: We watched a movie after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们看了一部电影。

meaning: n. 博物馆
example: We visited the museum on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期六参观了博物馆。

meaning: n. 蘑菇 vi. 迅速成⻓，⼤量涌现
example: Mushroom soup is my favorite lunch.
exampleChinese: 蘑菇汤是我最喜欢的午餐。

meaning: n. 餐⼱，餐⼱纸
example: Please wipe your mouth with a napkin.
exampleChinese: 请用餐巾擦一下嘴。

meaning: n. 脖⼦；⾐领；细⻓的部分
example: The scarf around my neck is very warm.
exampleChinese: 我脖子上的围巾很暖和。

meaning: n. 邻居；邻国；⾝边的⼈；世⼈
example: Our neighbor brought us some fresh oranges.
exampleChinese: 我们的邻居给我们送来了一些新鲜橙子。

meaning: det. pron. 两者都不 adv. 也不，也没 conj. 既不…也不
example: Neither answer is correct.
exampleChinese: 两个答案都不对。

meaning: n. 侄⼦，外甥
example: My nephew is coming to visit this weekend.
exampleChinese: 我侄子这个周末要来拜访。

meaning: n. 镍；(美国和加拿⼤) 五分硬币
example: I found a nickel in my pocket.
exampleChinese: 我在口袋里找到了一枚五分硬币。

meaning: n. 氮，氮⽓
example: Nitrogen makes up most of the air.
exampleChinese: 氮气占空气的大部分。

meaning: n. 侄⼥，外甥⼥
example: My niece drew a picture for me.
exampleChinese: 我的外甥女给我画了一幅画。

meaning: pron. 没有⼈ n. ⼩⼈物，⽆名⼩卒
example: Nobody answered the phone.
exampleChinese: 没有人接电话。

meaning: vi. vt. 点头，点头致意 vi. 打盹，打瞌睡 n. 点头
example: She gave a nod and walked away.
exampleChinese: 她点了点头，然后走开了。

meaning: adj. 吵闹的，发出噪⾳的；嘈杂的
example: The classroom was noisy during the break.
exampleChinese: 课间教室里很吵闹。

meaning: conj. 也不，也不是
example: He does not like coffee, nor does he drink tea.
exampleChinese: 他不喜欢咖啡，也不喝茶。

meaning: n. 西北⽅，西北地区 adj. 西北部的；(⻛) 从西北⽅吹来的 adv. 向西北地；在西北
example: We live in the northwest part of the city.
exampleChinese: 我们住在城市的西北部。

meaning: n. 鼻⼦；嗅觉，觉察⼒；前端 vi. (⽤鼻⼦) 嗅
example: My nose gets cold in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天我的鼻子会变冷。

meaning: n. 名词
example: A noun names a person, place, or thing.
exampleChinese: 名词用来表示人、地点或事物。

meaning: n. 护⼠ vt. 照料 (病⼈)；怀有；培养
example: My aunt is a nurse at the town hospital.
exampleChinese: 我阿姨是镇医院的一名护士。

meaning: n. 尼⻰；尼⻰⻓袜
example: This bag is made of nylon.
exampleChinese: 这个包是尼龙做的。

meaning: n. 橡树，栎树；橡⽊，栎⽊
example: The old oak stands by the river.
exampleChinese: 那棵老橡树立在河边。

meaning: n. 海洋
example: They sailed across the ocean last summer.
exampleChinese: 他们去年夏天航行穿过了海洋。

meaning: adj. 冒犯的；令⼈不快的；攻击性的 n. 进攻，攻击；攻势
example: That was an offensive comment.
exampleChinese: 那是句冒犯人的话。

meaning: n. ⽯油；燃油；润肤油；⻝⽤油 vt. 给…加润滑油
example: There is oil on the kitchen floor.
exampleChinese: 厨房地板上有油。

meaning: n. 洋葱，洋葱头
example: She chopped an onion for the soup.
exampleChinese: 她切了一个洋葱做汤。

meaning: n. 果园
example: We picked apples in the orchard.
exampleChinese: 我们在果园里摘苹果。

meaning: n. 管弦乐队；(剧场) 正厅前排座位
example: The orchestra played a soft song.
exampleChinese: 管弦乐队演奏了一首柔和的曲子。

meaning: n. 矿⽯，矿砂
example: The miners found ore deep underground.
exampleChinese: 矿工们在地下深处发现了矿石。

meaning: n. 孤⼉ vt. 使…成为孤⼉
example: The kind family will orphan the child.
exampleChinese: 这户善良的人家会收养这个孤儿。

meaning: n. 盎司；很少量，⼀点点
example: Add just an ounce of salt.
exampleChinese: 只加一小撮盐。

meaning: n. 烤箱，烤炉
example: She baked bread in the oven.
exampleChinese: 她在烤箱里烤面包。

meaning: n. ⼤⾐，厚外套
example: He put on an overcoat before going out.
exampleChinese: 他出门前穿上了大衣。

meaning: n. 猫头鹰
example: An owl hooted in the dark tree.
exampleChinese: 一只猫头鹰在黑暗的树上发出叫声。

meaning: n. 氧化物
example: The metal turned into oxide after a long time.
exampleChinese: 这种金属经过很长时间后变成了氧化物。

meaning: n. 氧⽓
example: Plants need oxygen to live.
exampleChinese: 植物需要氧气才能生存。

meaning: n. ⼩包，⼩盒；⼩件包裹
example: The network packet reached the server in a second.
exampleChinese: 这个网络数据包在一秒内到达了服务器。

meaning: n. (书刊的) ⻚；(计算机的) ⻚⾯ vt. ⽤扩⾳器呼叫；⽤传呼机传呼
example: Please turn to page ten.
exampleChinese: 请翻到第十页。

meaning: n. 画作；绘画；粉刷
example: Her painting hangs in the school hallway.
exampleChinese: 她的绘画挂在学校走廊里。

meaning: n. 宫殿，总统府；王室；豪宅
example: The king lived in a large palace.
exampleChinese: 国王住在一座大宫殿里。

meaning: n. 平底锅；烤盘 vt. 严厉批评；淘 (⾦) vi. vt. 追拍，摇摄
example: She cooked eggs in a small pan.
exampleChinese: 她在一个小平底锅里煎了鸡蛋。

meaning: n. 裤⼦；内裤 adj. 糟糕的，劣质的
example: My pants are blue and very comfortable.
exampleChinese: 我的裤子是蓝色的，而且很舒服。

meaning: n. 聚会，派对；政党；群；⼀⽅ vi. 寻欢作乐
example: He joined a new party last year.
exampleChinese: 他去年加入了一个新政党。

meaning: n. 乘客，旅客
example: Every passenger showed a ticket.
exampleChinese: 每位旅客都出示了车票。

meaning: n. 牧场；(⽣活或⼯作的) 条件 vt. 放牧
example: The sheep grazed in the pasture all afternoon.
exampleChinese: 羊群整个下午都在牧场上吃草。

meaning: n. 病⼈，患者 adj. 有耐⼼的
example: Our teacher is patient with new students.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师对新学生很有耐心。

meaning: n. ⽖⼦；⼿ vi. vt. ⽤⽖⼦抓 (或扒) vt. 猥亵地摸，动⼿动脚
example: The cat used its paw to tap the toy.
exampleChinese: 猫用爪子轻轻拍了一下玩具。

meaning: n. 豌⾖
example: She added a pea to her salad.
exampleChinese: 她在沙拉里加了一颗豌豆。

meaning: n. 和平；平和，安静；和睦，融洽
example: Everyone hopes for peace in the world.
exampleChinese: 每个人都希望世界和平。

meaning: n. 桃⼦；⾮常迷⼈的⼈ (或事物) adj. 桃红⾊的
example: I ate a sweet peach after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我吃了一个甜桃子。

meaning: n. 花⽣；少得可怜的钱
example: He spent only a peanut on the small gift.
exampleChinese: 他给这份小礼物只花了很少的钱。

meaning: n. 农⺠，佃农
example: The peasant worked hard in the field all day.
exampleChinese: 那个农民整天在田里辛勤劳作。

meaning: n. 鹅卵⽯，砾⽯
example: I found a smooth pebble on the beach.
exampleChinese: 我在海滩上找到了一块光滑的鹅卵石。

meaning: n. 钟摆；摇摆不定的事态或局⾯
example: The pendulum moved back and forth slowly.
exampleChinese: 钟摆慢慢地来回摆动。

meaning: n. 胡椒粉；甜椒，柿⼦椒 vt. (⼩物体) 密集地击打；⼤量加⼊
example: She likes to pepper her soup with black pepper.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢在汤里加黑胡椒。

meaning: n. 百分之… adv. adj. 每⼀百中
example: Only ten percent of the class was late.
exampleChinese: 全班只有百分之十的人迟到了。

meaning: adv. 可能，也许
example: Perhaps we can go after lunch.
exampleChinese: 或许我们可以午饭后去。

example: Each person got a free ticket.
exampleChinese: 每个人都得到了一张免费票。

meaning: n. 宠物；(昵称) 宝⻉ vt. 抚摸，爱抚 adj. 特别喜爱的
example: My pet rabbit loves carrots.
exampleChinese: 我的宠物兔子喜欢胡萝卜。

meaning: n. 物理学家
example: The physicist explained how light travels.
exampleChinese: 这位物理学家解释了光是如何传播的。

meaning: n. 物理学
example: She studies physics at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校学习物理学。

meaning: n. ⽣理学；⽣理机能
example: She studied physiology in college.
exampleChinese: 她在大学里学习生理学。

meaning: vt. 挑选，选择；采，摘；剔除 n. 挑选，选择；选中的⼈或物
example: Please pick a seat near the window.
exampleChinese: 请选择一个靠窗的座位。

meaning: n. ⽚，块；碎⽚；⼀个；⼀件 vi. 组合资料；拼凑，组合
example: He took a piece of cake from the plate.
exampleChinese: 他从盘子里拿了一块蛋糕。

meaning: n. 鸽⼦
example: A pigeon sat on the roof.
exampleChinese: 一只鸽子停在屋顶上。

meaning: n. 枕头 vt. 把 (头) 枕在
example: He put his pillow under his head and fell asleep.
exampleChinese: 他把枕头垫在头下，然后睡着了。

meaning: n. 松树；松⽊ vi. (因死亡、离别⽽) 悲伤
example: Many young people pine for their hometown when they move away.
exampleChinese: 许多年轻人搬走后会思念家乡。

meaning: adj. 粉⾊的 n. 粉⾊；⽯⽵
example: She wore a pink sweater yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天穿了一件粉红色的毛衣。

meaning: n. 同情，怜悯；遗憾，可惜 vt. 同情，怜悯
example: I felt pity for the lost dog.
exampleChinese: 我对那只走失的狗感到同情。

meaning: n. 原告，起诉⼈
example: The plaintiff spoke clearly in court.
exampleChinese: 原告在法庭上说得很清楚。

meaning: n. 计划，⽅案 vt. vi. 计划，打算
example: Our plan is to visit the museum tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我们的计划是明天去参观博物馆。

meaning: n. ⻜机；平⾯；⽔平；刨⼦ adj. 平的，平坦的
example: The plane landed safely at noon.
exampleChinese: 飞机在中午安全降落了。

meaning: n. 操场，运动场；娱乐场地
example: The children are running in the playground.
exampleChinese: 孩子们正在操场上跑步。

meaning: adj. 令⼈愉快的；礼貌⽽友善的
example: We had a pleasant walk by the river.
exampleChinese: 我们在河边愉快地散了步。

meaning: pron. ⼤量，充⾜ adv. ⾮常，相当 n. 富裕，充裕 det. ⼤量，充⾜
example: We have plenty of time before the train leaves.
exampleChinese: 火车出发前我们还有 plenty 的时间。

meaning: n. 诗
example: She wrote a short poem for her mother.
exampleChinese: 她为妈妈写了一首短诗。

meaning: n. 诗⼈
example: The poet read his poem aloud to the class.
exampleChinese: 那位诗人把他的诗朗读给全班听。

meaning: n. 诗，诗歌；诗意
example: We read poetry in English class.
exampleChinese: 我们在英语课上读诗歌。

meaning: n. 池塘
example: There are small fish in the pond.
exampleChinese: 池塘里有小鱼。

meaning: n. ⼈⼝；某地某类⼈或动物的总数
example: The city's population is growing fast.
exampleChinese: 这座城市的人口增长很快。

meaning: n. ⻔廊，⻔厅
example: They sat on the porch and drank tea.
exampleChinese: 他们坐在门廊上喝茶。

meaning: n. 猪⾁
example: We had pork and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了猪肉和米饭。

meaning: n. 港⼝；港⼝城市；(计算机) 端⼝ vt. 转移，移植 (软件)
example: The ship entered the port at noon.
exampleChinese: 这艘船在中午驶入港口。

meaning: n. 明信⽚
example: She sent me a postcard from Beijing.
exampleChinese: 她从北京寄给我一张明信片。

meaning: n. 陶器；陶艺；制陶⼚
example: The museum displayed old pottery.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了古老的陶器。

meaning: n. 家禽；禽⾁
example: We had roast poultry for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚餐吃了烤家禽肉。

meaning: adj. 有权势的；强效的；有感染⼒的
example: The storm was powerful enough to shake the windows.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴强大到足以震动窗户。

meaning: n. 捕⻝者，捕⻝性动物；掠夺者
example: The predator chased the small rabbit.
exampleChinese: 那只捕食者追赶那只小兔子。

meaning: vt. 更喜欢，偏好
example: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
exampleChinese: 早上我更喜欢喝茶，不喜欢喝咖啡。

meaning: vt. 使做好准备；做 (饭)；配制 (药) vt. vi. 使 (⾃⼰) 有准备，防范
example: We need to prepare for the test.
exampleChinese: 我们需要为考试做准备。

meaning: n. 介词，前置词
example: The sentence starts with a preposition.
exampleChinese: 这个句子以一个介词开头。

meaning: n. 总统；会⻓，主席，校⻓
example: The president gave a speech on TV.
exampleChinese: 总统在电视上发表了讲话。

meaning: vi. vt. 假装；(游戏中) 假扮；⾃诩 adj. 假装的，想象的，假想的
example: He tried to pretend that nothing happened.
exampleChinese: 他试图假装什么都没发生。

meaning: n. 价格，物价；代价 vt. 给…定价
example: The store will price the shoes at fifty dollars.
exampleChinese: 这家商店会把这双鞋定价为五十美元。

meaning: n. 王⼦；(⼩国) 国君；⼤师，名家
example: The prince greeted the visitors politely.
exampleChinese: 王子礼貌地迎接了来访者。

meaning: n. 公主；王妃；被宠坏的⼤⼩姐
example: The princess wore a blue dress.
exampleChinese: 公主穿着一条蓝色连衣裙。

meaning: vt. vi. 印，印刷 vt. 刊登；洗印，冲洗 n. 印刷字体；版画；相⽚；指纹
example: This shop can print our class photos.
exampleChinese: 这家店可以印刷我们班的照片。

meaning: n. 监狱；关押制度；难以脱⾝之处
example: The man was sent to prison.
exampleChinese: 那个男人被送进了监狱。

meaning: n. 囚犯，犯⼈；俘虏，战俘
example: The story was about a prisoner who escaped.
exampleChinese: 这个故事讲的是一名逃跑的囚犯。

meaning: n. 教授；讲师
example: Our professor gave us a clear answer.
exampleChinese: 我们的教授给了我们一个清楚的答案。

meaning: n. 进步，进展；前进 vi. 取得进步；前进；(时间) 流逝
example: The class made good progress this term.
exampleChinese: 这个班这学期取得了很大进步。

meaning: n. 投影仪，放映机
example: The teacher turned on the projector.
exampleChinese: 老师打开了投影仪。

meaning: n. 代词，代名词
example: In this sentence, "she" is a pronoun.
exampleChinese: 在这个句子里，she 是一个代词。

meaning: n. 发⾳
example: Her English pronunciation is clear and natural.
exampleChinese: 她的英语发音清晰自然。

meaning: n. 散⽂
example: He prefers prose to poetry.
exampleChinese: 比起诗歌，他更喜欢散文。

meaning: n. 酒馆，酒吧
example: We met friends at the pub.
exampleChinese: 我们在酒馆见了朋友。

meaning: n. ⼩学⽣；弟⼦；瞳孔
example: Each pupil has a desk in the classroom.
exampleChinese: 每个学生在教室里都有一张课桌。

meaning: n. 紫⾊ adj. 紫⾊的；辞藻华丽的
example: She wore a purple dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条紫色的连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: n. ⾦字塔；棱锥体
example: The stones formed a small pyramid in the yard.
exampleChinese: 院子里的石头堆成了一个小金字塔。

meaning: n. ⼥王；(为群体产卵的) 雌性昆⾍
example: The queen waved to the crowd.
exampleChinese: 女王向人群挥手。

meaning: n. 被⼦ vi. vt. 缝被⼦
example: She slept under a warm quilt.
exampleChinese: 她睡在一条温暖的被子下面。

meaning: n. 兔⼦；兔⾁
example: The rabbit is eating a carrot.
exampleChinese: 这只兔子正在吃胡萝卜。

meaning: n. 雷达
example: The pilot checked the radar before landing.
exampleChinese: 飞行员在降落前检查了雷达。

meaning: n. 彩虹
example: A rainbow appeared after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后出现了一道彩虹。

example: A rat ran across the old yard.
exampleChinese: 一只老鼠跑过了旧院子。

meaning: adv. 相当；确切地说；⽽是；宁愿 int. (表⽰同意) 当然
example: I would rather stay home tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我宁愿待在家里。

meaning: n. 剃须⼑，刮脸⼑
example: He used a razor to shave this morning.
exampleChinese: 他今天早上用剃刀刮胡子。

meaning: adj. 真的，真正的，真实的 adv. ⾮常，很
example: This is the real reason I came early.
exampleChinese: 这才是我早来的真正原因。

meaning: adv. 真正地，实际上；很，⾮常
example: I really like this science book.
exampleChinese: 我真的很喜欢这本科学书。

meaning: n. 记录，记载；纪录；唱⽚；前科 vt. 记录，记载 vt. vi. 录制，录 (⾳)
example: Please record the meeting time in your notebook.
exampleChinese: 请把会议时间记在你的笔记本上。

meaning: vt. 为…感到后悔；对…感到抱歉 n. 懊悔，遗憾
example: I regret saying those rude words.
exampleChinese: 我后悔说了那些无礼的话。

meaning: n. 爬⾏动物
example: A reptile can live in hot places.
exampleChinese: 爬行动物可以生活在炎热的地方。

meaning: n. ⻓⽅形，矩形
example: She drew a rectangle on the paper.
exampleChinese: 她在纸上画了一个矩形。

meaning: vi. 返回；重新出现，恢复；重提 vt. 退还；回报，回应 n. 返回；退还；收益；往返票
example: We will return home before dark.
exampleChinese: 我们会在天黑前返回家。

meaning: n. 来复枪，步枪 vi. vt. 快速翻找，搜寻
example: The hunter carried a rifle through the woods.
exampleChinese: 猎人扛着一支来复枪穿过树林。

meaning: n. 戒指；环状物；铃声；团伙 vt. vi. 给…打电话；(使) 响起铃声 vi. 发出铃声；回响；嗡嗡作响
example: She wears a silver ring on her left hand.
exampleChinese: 她左手戴着一枚银戒指。

meaning: n. ⻓袍；浴袍；晨袍
example: She put on a soft robe after her bath.
exampleChinese: 她洗完澡后穿上了一件柔软的长袍。

meaning: n. ⽕箭；⽕箭弹；焰⽕；芝⿇菜 vi. 快速增⻓，猛增；迅速移动
example: Toy sales often rocket before the holiday season.
exampleChinese: 玩具销量常常在节日前迅速上升。

meaning: n. 玫瑰花；玫瑰红 adj. 玫瑰红的
example: She put a red rose in a glass.
exampleChinese: 她把一朵红玫瑰放进玻璃杯里。

meaning: n. ⼩地毯；男⽤假发
example: A small rug made the room feel warm.
exampleChinese: 一块小地毯让房间感觉很温暖。

meaning: n. 销售；销售量；⼤减价
example: The store made a big sale before the holiday.
exampleChinese: 这家商店在假日前进行了一次大销售。

meaning: n. 男推销员，男售货员
example: The salesman showed us a model of the new car.
exampleChinese: 那位推销员给我们看了新车的模型。

meaning: adj. 显著的，重要的，突出的
example: The most salient point was easy to see.
exampleChinese: 最突出的要点很容易看出来。

meaning: n. 盐，⻝盐 vt. ⽤盐腌 (⻝物) adj. 含盐的，⽤盐腌制的
example: Please add a little salt to the soup.
exampleChinese: 请在汤里加一点盐。

meaning: n. 沙；沙滩 vt. (⽤砂纸) 打磨
example: The children played in the sand.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在沙子里玩耍。

meaning: n. 剪⼑
example: Please use the scissors to cut the paper.
exampleChinese: 请用剪刀把纸剪开。

meaning: n. 寻找，搜寻；搜索，检索 vi. vt. 搜寻，搜索 vt. 搜⾝ vi. 思索
example: The police search the area at night.
exampleChinese: 警察在夜里搜寻这个地区。

meaning: n. 座位；席位；所在地 vt. 向…提供座位
example: Is this seat taken?
exampleChinese: 这个座位有人吗？

meaning: n. 种⼦；起源；种⼦选⼿ vt. (种⼦) 繁殖；在…播种
example: Farmers seed the field in early spring.
exampleChinese: 农民在早春给田地播种。

meaning: adv. 很少，难得
example: He seldom eats fast food.
exampleChinese: 他很少吃快餐。

meaning: n. 性，性别；性⾏为
example: The film does not include sex scenes.
exampleChinese: 这部电影没有性场景。

meaning: n. 壳；炮弹；壳体，框架 vt. vi. 炮击 vt. 给…去壳
example: The child picked up a shell on the beach.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子在海滩上捡起了一个贝壳。

meaning: n. 海岸，河岸；沿海国家 vi. ⽀撑；⽀持
example: The old wall can shore up the roof for now.
exampleChinese: 这堵旧墙目前可以支撑屋顶。

meaning: adj. 短的；矮的；短缺的；简称的 adv. 缺少；不及；中断 n. 电影短⽚；短路；少量烈酒 vt. vi. (使) 短路
example: Her hair is short and neat.
exampleChinese: 她的头发又短又整齐。

meaning: vi. vt. ⼤声说，嚷 vi. ⼤叫，喊叫 n. 喊叫 (声)
example: Please do not shout in the library.
exampleChinese: 请不要在图书馆里大声喊叫。

meaning: vi. vt. 耸肩 n. 耸肩；带袖短披肩
example: He gave a shrug and walked away.
exampleChinese: 他耸了耸肩就走开了。

meaning: n. 兄弟姐妹
example: My sibling and I share a bedroom.
exampleChinese: 我和我的兄弟姐妹共用一个卧室。

meaning: n. 丝绸；蚕丝；皇家律师
example: She wore a silk scarf in spring.
exampleChinese: 她在春天戴了一条丝绸围巾。

meaning: n. 奴⾪；完全被…控制的⼈ vi. ⾟苦地⼯作，卖命地⼲
example: The children were forced to slave all day in the fields.
exampleChinese: 孩子们被迫在田里整天苦干。

meaning: adj. 缓慢的；慢吞吞的；迟钝的 adj. 不忙碌的，冷清的 adv. 慢速地，缓慢地 vi. vt. (使) 放慢速度，减缓
example: The bus is too slow this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上的公交车太慢了。

meaning: n. 烟；吸烟 vt. vi. 吸烟 vi. 冒烟 vt. 熏制 (⾁或⻥)
example: Smoke came out of the kitchen window.
exampleChinese: 烟从厨房窗户里冒出来。

meaning: n. 零⻝，⼩吃 vi. 吃⼩吃，吃点⼼
example: I bought a snack after school.
exampleChinese: 我放学后买了一份小吃。

meaning: n. 肥皂；肥皂剧 vt. ⽤肥皂擦洗
example: He used soap to wash his hands.
exampleChinese: 他用肥皂洗手。

meaning: n. ⾜球运动
example: We play soccer after school on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 我们星期五放学后踢足球。

meaning: n. 苏打⽔；汽⽔；苏打，纯碱
example: She ordered a soda with her lunch.
exampleChinese: 她午餐时点了一杯汽水。

meaning: n. ⻓沙发
example: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
exampleChinese: 那只猫正在沙发上睡觉。

meaning: adj. 软的；柔的；不够严厉的
example: This pillow is soft and comfortable.
exampleChinese: 这个枕头又软又舒服。

meaning: n. ⼠兵，战⼠，军⼈
example: The soldier wrote a letter to his family.
exampleChinese: 那名军人给家人写了一封信。

meaning: adj. 独⾃的；孤零零的；仅有的 n. 单独监禁
example: He felt solitary on the empty beach.
exampleChinese: 他在空荡荡的海滩上感到孤单。

meaning: adv. 不久，很快，⻢上；早，快
example: The bus will be here soon.
exampleChinese: 公交车很快就会到。

meaning: n. (⾼中或⼤学的) ⼆年级学⽣
example: The sophomore joined the school newspaper.
exampleChinese: 那名二年级学生加入了校报。

meaning: n. 汤，羹
example: The soup is hot, so blow on it first.
exampleChinese: 汤很烫，所以先吹一吹。

meaning: n. 东南⽅；东南部 adv. 向东南⽅ adj. 东南部的
example: The birds flew southeast for the winter.
exampleChinese: 这些鸟向东南飞去过冬。

meaning: n. 西南⽅；西南部 adv. 向西南 adj. 西南部的；(⻛) 从西南来的
example: The village lies to the southwest of the city.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄位于城市的西南方。

meaning: n. 铲，锹；⿊桃牌；⿊桃
example: He used a spade to dig the garden.
exampleChinese: 他用铁锹挖花园。

meaning: n. 发⾔者；讲…语⾔的⼈；扬声器
example: The speaker began with a short story.
exampleChinese: 演讲者以一个简短的故事开场。

meaning: n. ⽭，标枪；嫩枝，幼芽 vt. ⽤尖物刺穿
example: The hunter carried a spear through the forest.
exampleChinese: 猎人带着一支矛穿过森林。

meaning: adj. 壮观的，盛⼤的，令⼈惊叹的 n. 壮观的表演，盛⼤的演出
example: We watched a spectacular fireworks show.
exampleChinese: 我们观看了一场壮观的烟花表演。

meaning: n. 演讲；说话能⼒或⽅式；⼝语
example: She gave a short speech at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校做了一个简短的演讲。

meaning: n. 速度；迅速 vt. 快速运送；加速 vi. 快速前⾏；超速驾驶
example: Please slow down and do not speed.
exampleChinese: 请慢一点，不要超速。

meaning: n. 蜘蛛
example: A small spider is on the wall.
exampleChinese: 墙上有一只小蜘蛛。

meaning: n. 发⾔⼈
example: The spokesman answered the reporter's question.
exampleChinese: 发言人回答了记者的问题。

meaning: n. 海绵；海绵动物；海绵蛋糕 vt. ⽤海绵擦拭 vi. 吃⽩⻝，揩油
example: Can you sponge the table clean?
exampleChinese: 你能用海绵把桌子擦干净吗？

meaning: n. 勺，匙 vt. ⽤勺舀
example: Use a spoon to eat the soup.
exampleChinese: 用勺子喝汤。

meaning: n. 松⿏ vt. 贮藏
example: The squirrel buried nuts in the ground.
exampleChinese: 那只松鼠把坚果埋在地里。

meaning: n. 露天体育场
example: The stadium was full of cheering fans.
exampleChinese: 体育场里坐满了欢呼的球迷。

meaning: n. 楼梯；⼀级楼梯
example: He stopped on the last stair.
exampleChinese: 他停在最后一级台阶上。

meaning: n. 楼梯
example: The cat slept on the staircase.
exampleChinese: 那只猫睡在楼梯上。

meaning: n. 楼梯，阶梯
example: They climbed the stairway to the second floor.
exampleChinese: 他们沿着楼梯走到二楼。

meaning: n. 钢；钢铁⼯业；兵器 vt. 下决⼼应付
example: The bridge is made of steel.
exampleChinese: 这座桥是用钢铁建成的。

meaning: n. ⽴体声⾳响；⽴体声 adj. ⽴体声的
example: We bought a new stereo for the living room.
exampleChinese: 我们为客厅买了一台新的立体声音响。

meaning: n. ⻓筒袜
example: She hung her stocking by the bed.
exampleChinese: 她把长袜挂在床边。

meaning: n. 胃，腹部 vt. 承受，忍受；吃得下
example: My stomach hurts after eating too much.
exampleChinese: 吃太多后我的胃疼。

meaning: n. ⽯头，⽯块；结⽯；果核 vt. 向…扔⽯头，⽤⽯头掷击
example: The child picked up a stone by the river.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子在河边捡起一块石头。

meaning: n. 凳⼦；粪便
example: Please sit on the stool and wait here.
exampleChinese: 请坐在凳子上在这里等。

meaning: n. 楼层
example: The storey above us was quiet.
exampleChinese: 我们楼上的楼层很安静。

meaning: n. 草莓
example: She put a strawberry on top of the cake.
exampleChinese: 她在蛋糕上放了一颗草莓。

meaning: n. 炉⼦，⽕炉；厨灶，炉灶
example: We put the soup on the stove to heat it.
exampleChinese: 我们把汤放在火炉上加热。

meaning: adj. 严格的；严厉的；恪守教规的
example: Our math teacher is strict but fair.
exampleChinese: 我们的数学老师很严格，但很公平。

meaning: adj. 愚蠢的，糊涂的；讨厌的 n. 傻⽠，蠢货
example: It was stupid to leave my bag there.
exampleChinese: 把我的包落在那里真是太愚蠢了。

meaning: n. 补贴，津贴
example: The government gave a subsidy to local farmers.
exampleChinese: 政府给当地农民发放了补贴。

meaning: n. 城郊，郊区
example: Many families live in the suburb now.
exampleChinese: 现在许多家庭住在郊区。

meaning: n. 糖 vt. 在…中加糖，给…裹上糖⾐
example: I take sugar in my coffee.
exampleChinese: 我喝咖啡时加糖。

meaning: n. 硫，硫磺
example: Sulfur has a strong smell when it burns.
exampleChinese: 硫在燃烧时有一股刺鼻的气味。

meaning: vt. vi. 总结，概括，概述
example: Can you summarize the story in three sentences?
exampleChinese: 你能用三句话总结这个故事吗？

meaning: adj. 确信的，有把握的；⼀定会…的 adv. 当然；的确；不⽤客⽓
example: I am sure this key opens the front door.
exampleChinese: 我确信这把钥匙能打开前门。

meaning: n. 天鹅 vi. 悠游，闲逛
example: A swan floated quietly across the lake.
exampleChinese: 一只天鹅静静地漂过湖面。

meaning: n. ⽑⾐，针织衫
example: She wore a warm sweater to school.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件暖和的毛线衣去上学。

meaning: n. 剑
example: The knight carried a sword.
exampleChinese: 那位骑士拿着一把剑。

meaning: n. 桌⼦，台⼦；表格；乘法表 vt. (正式) 提出；(将计划等) 搁置
example: The cups are on the table.
exampleChinese: 杯子在桌子上。

meaning: n. 尾巴；尾部；尾状物；末尾部分 vt. (⻋辆) 跟踪，尾随
example: The dog wagged its tail.
exampleChinese: 那只狗摇了摇尾巴。

meaning: n. ⼯作，任务 vt. 给…委派任务
example: My first task is to clean the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的第一个任务是清理桌子。

meaning: n. 队，团队 vt. 合作，协作
example: Our team won the school match.
exampleChinese: 我们队赢了学校的比赛。

meaning: n. ⽓质，性情
example: Her calm temperament makes her easy to work with.
exampleChinese: 她平静的性情使她很容易相处。

meaning: n. 帐篷
example: We slept in a tent by the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们睡在湖边的帐篷里。

meaning: n. 测验；检查，化验；试验；考验 vt. vi. 测验，考查；检查，化验 vt. (产品) 检验，测试；考验
example: The new bridge passed the safety test.
exampleChinese: 这座新桥通过了安全试验。

meaning: n. 证词，⼝供；证据，证明
example: The witness gave clear testimony in court.
exampleChinese: 这位证人在法庭上提供了清楚的证词。

meaning: n. 教科书，课本，教材 adj. 典范的，范例的，规范的
example: We opened the textbook to page ten.
exampleChinese: 我们把教科书翻到第十页。

meaning: n. ⼩偷，窃贼
example: The thief ran away with her bag.
exampleChinese: 小偷带着她的包跑了。

meaning: n. 咽喉，喉咙
example: My throat hurts when I speak loudly.
exampleChinese: 我大声说话时咽喉会疼。

meaning: adv. 因此；以此种⽅式
example: It rained all day, thus the game was canceled.
exampleChinese: 雨下了一整天，因此比赛被取消了。

meaning: n. 瓷砖，地砖；⽡⽚ vt. 贴瓷砖，铺⽡
example: They will tile the bathroom floor this week.
exampleChinese: 他们这周会给浴室地板铺瓷砖。

meaning: prep. conj. 直到…时 n. 收银机 (抽屉)，收银台，收银处 vt. 耕，犁
example: Wait here till I come back.
exampleChinese: 你在这里等到我回来。

meaning: n. 树林；⽊材，⽊料；⼤梁
example: The old house was built with strong timber.
exampleChinese: 这座老房子是用结实的木材建成的。

meaning: n. 烟叶，烟草 (制品)
example: Tobacco smoke can harm your health.
exampleChinese: 烟草烟雾会损害你的健康。

meaning: n. 脚趾；⾜尖部；有…脚趾的
example: He stood on his toe to reach the shelf.
exampleChinese: 他踮起脚尖去够那层架子。

meaning: n. 抽⽔⻢桶；厕所；梳洗打扮
example: The toilet is next to the stairs.
exampleChinese: 厕所就在楼梯旁边。

meaning: n. ⽛⻮；⻮状部分
example: My tooth hurts when I eat ice cream.
exampleChinese: 我吃冰淇淋时牙齿会疼。

meaning: n. 旅⾏；游览；巡回演出 (⽐赛等) vt. vi. 旅⾏，游览，作巡回活动
example: We plan to tour the old city by bus.
exampleChinese: 我们计划乘公交车游览这座古城。

meaning: n. 游客，观光客
example: The tourist took photos of the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 那位游客拍了那座老桥的照片。

example: He used a towel to dry his hair.
exampleChinese: 他用毛巾擦干头发。

meaning: n. 镇，城镇；(城镇的) 商业区
example: My grandparents live in a small town.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母住在一个小镇上。

meaning: n. 玩具；⼩玩意⼉ adj. 玩具的；(狗) 个头很⼩的
example: The child hugged his new toy.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子抱着他的新玩具。

meaning: n. 拖拉机
example: The tractor pulled the heavy load slowly.
exampleChinese: 拖拉机慢慢拉着沉重的货物。

meaning: n. 托盘，浅盘
example: Please put the cups on the tray.
exampleChinese: 请把杯子放在托盘上。

meaning: n. 购物⼿推⻋；⼩推⻋；有轨电⻋
example: We took the trolley to the top of the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们乘坐有轨电车到了山顶。

meaning: n. 裤⼦
example: These trousers are too long for me.
exampleChinese: 这条裤子对我来说太长了。

meaning: n. 卡⻋，货⻋ vt. ⽤卡⻋ (或货⻋) 运送
example: A red truck stopped outside the store.
exampleChinese: 一辆红色卡车停在商店外面。

meaning: n. 喇叭，⼩号；喇叭形的东西 vt. 吹嘘，宣扬 vi. (⼤象) 吼叫
example: The band will trumpet their new album on TV.
exampleChinese: 这支乐队会在电视上大力宣传他们的新专辑。

meaning: n. 真相，事实；真实性；真理
example: The truth is sometimes hard to hear.
exampleChinese: 真相有时很难让人接受。

meaning: n. 盆，桶；(盛⻝物的) ⼩盒；浴缸
example: She left the apples in a plastic tub.
exampleChinese: 她把苹果放在一个塑料盆里。

meaning: n. 肿瘤
example: The doctor found a small tumor during the exam.
exampleChinese: 医生在检查中发现了一个小肿瘤。

meaning: n. 打字机
example: My grandfather still keeps an old typewriter.
exampleChinese: 我祖父还保留着一台旧打字机。

meaning: n. 打字的⼈；打字员
example: The typist typed the letter quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个打字员很快打好了这封信。

meaning: n. 台⻛
example: The typhoon damaged several boats near the coast.
exampleChinese: 台风损坏了海边的几艘船。

meaning: prep. conj. 到…时，直到…为⽌
example: Wait here until I come back.
exampleChinese: 你在这里等到我回来。

meaning: prep. 在…上；⼜ (表⽰数量多)
example: A cat jumped upon the wall.
exampleChinese: 一只猫跳到了墙上。

meaning: adj. ⽤过的，⼆⼿的；习惯于…的
example: I am used to getting up early now.
exampleChinese: 我现在已经习惯早起了。

example: The valley was covered with soft green grass.
exampleChinese: 山谷里长满了柔软的绿色青草。

meaning: n. 蔬菜；植物⼈
example: We grow vegetable plants in the yard.
exampleChinese: 我们在院子里种蔬菜。

meaning: n. 花瓶
example: She put fresh flowers in the vase.
exampleChinese: 她把鲜花插进花瓶里。

meaning: n. (举办) 地点，场所
example: The school chose a large venue for the concert.
exampleChinese: 学校为音乐会选择了一个大场地。

meaning: n. 动词
example: Run is a common verb in English.
exampleChinese: run 是英语中常见的动词。

meaning: n. 胜利，成功
example: The team celebrated its victory loudly.
exampleChinese: 球队大声庆祝它们的胜利。

meaning: adj. 精⼒旺盛的；强有⼒的，积极的
example: He is a vigorous runner who trains every day.
exampleChinese: 他是个精力旺盛的跑步者，每天都训练。

meaning: n. 村庄，乡村；乡村居⺠，村⺠
example: My grandparents live in a small village.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母住在一个小村庄里。

meaning: n. 签证
example: I need a visa to enter the country.
exampleChinese: 我需要签证才能进入这个国家。

meaning: vt. vi. 拜访，参观，(短暂地) 作客 vt. 访问 (⽹站)；视察，巡视 n. 访问，参观；(到⽹站的) 访问
example: Her visit to the museum lasted two hours.
exampleChinese: 她参观博物馆的访问持续了两个小时。

meaning: n. 来访者，参观者，游客
example: Every visitor must sign their name here.
exampleChinese: 每位来访者都必须在这里签名。

meaning: n. 词汇，词汇量；专业词汇
example: Reading daily can improve your vocabulary.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读能提高你的词汇量。

meaning: n. 维⽣素，维他命
example: Milk and eggs are rich in vitamin.
exampleChinese: 牛奶和鸡蛋富含维生素。

meaning: n. 伏特，伏 (电压单位)
example: The battery gives off ten volt of power.
exampleChinese: 这个电池输出十伏的电压。

meaning: n. 电压，伏特数
example: The voltage is too high for this device.
exampleChinese: 这个电压对这台设备来说太高了。

meaning: vi. vt. 等待；希望，盼望 vi. (事物) 准备妥；搁置，延缓 n. 等待，等待的时间
example: Thank you for your wait at the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你在公交车站的等待。

meaning: n. 男侍者，男服务员
example: The waiter brought us some water.
exampleChinese: 侍者给我们端来了一些水。

meaning: n. ⼥侍者，⼥服务员
example: The waitress brought us soup and tea.
exampleChinese: 女服务员给我们端来了汤和茶。

meaning: n. 墙，围墙 vt. ⽤墙把…围住
example: There is a clock on the wall.
exampleChinese: 墙上有一个钟。

meaning: n. 钱包，⽪夹⼦
example: He keeps his bus card in his wallet.
exampleChinese: 他把公交卡放在皮夹子里。

meaning: adj. 温暖的；保暖的；温情的 vt. vi. (使) 温暖 adv. 使⼈暖和地，温暖地
example: The sun feels warm on my face.
exampleChinese: 阳光照在我脸上，感觉很温暖。

meaning: adj. ⼩⼼的，提防的
example: Be wary of strangers online.
exampleChinese: 对网上的陌生人要小心。

meaning: n. ⽡，⽡特 (电的功率单位)
example: The lamp uses only ten watt.
exampleChinese: 这盏灯只消耗十瓦。

meaning: n. 婚礼
example: We watched the wedding in the garden.
exampleChinese: 我们在花园里观看了婚礼。

meaning: n. 西，西⽅，西部；西⽅国家 adj. 西⽅的；西⻛的 adv. 向西，朝西
example: The sun sets in the west.
exampleChinese: 太阳从西边落下。

meaning: adj. 西部的；西⽅国家的 n. 西部⽚，西部⼩说
example: This book explains western history.
exampleChinese: 这本书讲解西方历史。

example: The farmers grow wheat in this field.
exampleChinese: 农民们在这块地里种小麦。

meaning: n. 轮⼦，⻋轮；⽅向盘；机轮；汽⻋ vi. 旋转，盘旋
example: The front Wheel of the bike is loose.
exampleChinese: 这辆自行车的前轮松了。

meaning: conj. 是否；不论，不管
example: I do not know whether he will come today.
exampleChinese: 我不知道他今天是否会来。

meaning: n. 威⼠忌酒
example: He ordered a glass of whisky after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后他点了一杯威士忌。

meaning: adj. ⽩⾊的；⽩种⼈的；苍⽩的 n. ⽩⾊；⽩种⼈；蛋⽩，蛋清
example: She wore a white dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条白色的连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: adj. 宽的；…宽的；⼴泛的；睁⼤的 adv. 尽可能远地，充分地
example: The river is wide in summer.
exampleChinese: 这条河在夏天很宽。

meaning: n. 寡妇，遗孀 vt. 使成寡妇，使成鳏夫
example: The widow lived alone after her husband died.
exampleChinese: 她的丈夫去世后，这位寡妇独自生活。

meaning: adj. 乐意的；⾃愿的，热⼼的
example: She is willing to help her classmates.
exampleChinese: 她乐意帮助同学。

meaning: n. 翅膀；机翼；侧翼；派，翼
example: The bird hurt its wing on the fence.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟的翅膀在篱笆上弄伤了。

meaning: n. 狼 vt. 狼吞虎咽地吃
example: The wolf disappeared into the dark forest.
exampleChinese: 那只狼消失在黑暗的森林里。

example: This scarf is made of soft wool.
exampleChinese: 这条围巾是用柔软的羊毛做的。

meaning: adj. 最坏的，最差的，最糟的 adv. 最坏地，最差地，最糟地
example: That was the worst storm of the year.
exampleChinese: 那是今年最糟糕的一场暴风雨。

meaning: n. ⼉童，年轻⼈，幼⼩动物
example: The youngster ran after the ball.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子追着球跑。

meaning: det. ⼀ (个)，任何⼀ (个)
example: Please write the letter a clearly.
exampleChinese: 请把字母 a 写清楚。

meaning: n. 副词
example: Quickly is an adverb.
exampleChinese: quickly是一个副词。

meaning: n. 航空公司
example: The airline canceled our flight this morning.
exampleChinese: 这家航空公司今天早上取消了我们的航班。

meaning: n. 机场
example: We arrived at the airport early.
exampleChinese: 我们很早就到了机场。

meaning: pron. 任何⼈
example: Anyone can join the school club.
exampleChinese: 任何人都可以加入学校社团。

meaning: n. 苹果
example: She put an apple in her school bag.
exampleChinese: 她把一个苹果放进书包里。

meaning: adj. 睡着的
example: The baby is asleep in the car.
exampleChinese: 宝宝在车里睡着了。

example: My family will travel in August.
exampleChinese: 我家人将在八月旅行。

meaning: n. 阿姨，姑妈，伯⺟，舅妈
example: My aunt makes delicious noodles.
exampleChinese: 我阿姨做的面条很好吃。

meaning: n. 婴⼉，幼崽；宝⻉ adj. (蔬菜) 迷你的
example: The baby is sleeping in the small bed.
exampleChinese: 婴儿正在小床上睡觉。

meaning: n. 背部，腰背；脊柱；后⾯；靠背 adv. 向后，在后；回原处 adj. 背后的，后⾯的；拖⽋的 vi. vt. (使) 后退；帮助，⽀持
example: My grandparents moved back to the village.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母以前搬回了村子。

meaning: n. 球；球状物；(⼤型正式的) 舞会 vi. vt. 使…成球状
example: He kicked the ball into the goal.
exampleChinese: 他把球踢进了球门。

example: He rides his bicycle to school every day.
exampleChinese: 他每天骑自行车去上学。

meaning: n. ⼩船，⾈；轮船
example: The boat moved slowly across the lake.
exampleChinese: 那只小船慢慢地穿过湖面。

meaning: n. 书；本⼦；簿，册；账簿 vt. vi. 预订，预约 vt. ⽴案 (控告某⼈)；记名警告
example: We need to book a hotel for the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们需要为这次旅行预订一家酒店。

meaning: n. 瓶⼦ vt. 把…装⼊瓶中
example: She filled the bottle with water.
exampleChinese: 她把瓶子装满了水。

meaning: n. ⾯包；钱财
example: I ate bread and soup for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了面包和汤。

meaning: n. 教室
example: Our classroom is clean and bright.
exampleChinese: 我们的教室干净又明亮。

meaning: n. 钟；⾥程表，计程器 vt. 达到 (某时间或速度)；注意到
example: There is a clock on the classroom wall.
exampleChinese: 教室的墙上有一个时钟。

meaning: n. 颜⾊；彩⾊；肤⾊；脸红；颜料 vi. vt. (⽤颜料) 为…着⾊ vi. (因尴尬⽽) 脸红 vt. (尤指负⾯地) 影响
example: Blue is my favorite color.
exampleChinese: 蓝色是我最喜欢的颜色。

meaning: n. 计算机，电脑
example: My computer is on the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的电脑在书桌上。

meaning: n. 杯⼦；杯状物；奖杯
example: She poured milk into a cup.
exampleChinese: 她把牛奶倒进了一个杯子里。

example: His daughter started school this year.
exampleChinese: 他的女儿今年开始上学了。

meaning: n. ⼀天；⽩天；⼯作⽇；时期
example: I read for one hour every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天阅读一小时。

meaning: n. ⽛医；⽛医诊所
example: I have an appointment with the dentist tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天约了牙科医生。

meaning: n. 书桌；问询台；(报社等的) 部⻔
example: My books are on the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的书在书桌上。

meaning: adj. 肮脏的；下流的；卑鄙的
example: My shoes got dirty in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋子在雨里弄脏了。

meaning: n. 盘⼦；(待清洗的) 餐具；菜肴
example: She put some fruit on a dish.
exampleChinese: 她把一些水果放在一个盘子里。

meaning: vt. 做；从事；制作 vi. 进⾏ aux. ⽤于肯定或否定回答

exampleChinese: 我晚饭后做作业。

meaning: n. 医⽣；博⼠ vt. 篡改，伪造

exampleChinese: 医生给我量了体温。

meaning: n. 狗，⽝ vt. 困扰，纠缠；跟踪
example: Their dog sleeps by the door.
exampleChinese: 他们家的狗睡在门边。

meaning: n. 玩偶，玩具娃娃
example: The little girl hugged her doll at bedtime.
exampleChinese: 小女孩睡觉前抱着她的洋娃娃。

meaning: n. 元 (美国等国的货币单位)
example: This apple costs one dollar.
exampleChinese: 这个苹果一美元。

example: Please close the door before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把门关上。

meaning: vt. vi. 喝，饮；喝酒 n. 饮料；酒

exampleChinese: 我通常早上喝牛奶。

meaning: n. 司机，驾驶员；驱动程序；驱动⼒
example: The bus driver stopped at the corner.
exampleChinese: 公交车司机在拐角处停了下来。

meaning: adj. ⼲的；⼲旱的；⼲性的；枯燥的 vi. vt. (使) 变⼲
example: Please dry the dishes after washing them.
exampleChinese: 洗完碗后请把它们擦干。

meaning: n. 鸭；鸭⾁ vi. vt. 低下头，弯下⾝；回避，推脱 vt. 躲闪，躲避
example: He had to duck when the ball flew toward him.
exampleChinese: 球朝他飞来时，他不得不闪避。

meaning: det. pron. adv. 各⾃，各个，每个
example: Each student got a library card.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都拿到了一张借书证。

meaning: adj. 早期的；提前的 adv. 在早期；提前，早些时候
example: We arrived early for the train.
exampleChinese: 我们提早到了火车站。

meaning: vt. vi. 挣得，赚得 vt. 应得，赢得；⽣ (利)，获 (利)
example: She works after school to earn money for a new bike.
exampleChinese: 她放学后打工为新自行车赚钱。

meaning: adj. 东部的，向东的；东⽅国家的
example: The eastern sky turned pink at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 日出时，东方的天空变成了粉红色。

meaning: adj. 容易的；舒适的；容易吃亏的 adv. ⼩⼼，慢些，轻点
example: This question is easy for me.
exampleChinese: 这道题对我来说很容易。

meaning: vi. vt. 吃 vi. 吃饭，⽤餐

exampleChinese: 我们每天晚上六点吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 蛋；卵
example: I ate a boiled egg for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了一个煮鸡蛋。

meaning: num. ⼋
example: There are eight apples in the bowl.
exampleChinese: 碗里有八个苹果。

meaning: num. ⼗⼋
example: My brother is eighteen this year.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥今年十八岁。

meaning: num. ⼋⼗
example: My grandpa is eighty years old.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷八十岁了。

meaning: n. ⼤象
example: The elephant used its trunk to pick up water.
exampleChinese: 大象用鼻子吸起了水。

meaning: num. ⼗⼀
example: There are eleven players on the team.
exampleChinese: 这支队里有十一名队员。

meaning: n. 电⼦邮件 vt. vi. 发电⼦邮件

exampleChinese: 我今晚会把作业用电子邮件发给你。

meaning: n. 晚上，傍晚；晚会，晚间活动
example: We often take a walk in the evening.
exampleChinese: 我们经常在晚上散步。

meaning: det. 每个；所有可能的；每逢
example: Every student needs a notebook.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都需要一本笔记本。

meaning: pron. 每个⼈，⼈⼈
example: Everybody smiled at the good news.
exampleChinese: 每个人听到这个好消息都笑了。

meaning: adj. 每天的，⽇常的
example: Walking is part of my everyday routine.
exampleChinese: 散步是我日常生活的一部分。

meaning: pron. 每⼈，⼈⼈，所有⼈

exampleChinese: 我们班每个人都喜欢这位新老师。

meaning: pron. 所有事物，⼀切

exampleChinese: 聚会的一切都准备好了。

meaning: adv. 到处，各个地⽅

exampleChinese: 我到处找我的钥匙。

meaning: n. 例⼦，范例；榜样，楷模
example: Can you give me an example?
exampleChinese: 你能给我举个例子吗？

meaning: n. 眼睛；视⼒；眼光；针眼；⻛眼 vt. 注视，审视
example: The baby has big brown eye s.
exampleChinese: 那个宝宝有一双棕色的大眼睛。

meaning: n. 现实；事实，真相；真实情况
example: It is a fact that water freezes in winter.
exampleChinese: 水在冬天会结冰，这是事实。

example: My uncle works in a car factory.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔在一家汽车工厂工作。

meaning: adj. 肥胖的；很厚的；⼤量的 n. 脂肪；(⻝物⾥的) 油脂
example: The fat cat slept on the sofa.
exampleChinese: 那只胖猫睡在沙发上。

meaning: n. ⽗亲，爸爸；祖辈；创始⼈ vt. 成为…的⽗亲
example: My father drives me to school every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸每天早上开车送我去上学。

example: My birthday is in February.
exampleChinese: 我的生日在二月。

meaning: vt. vi. 觉得，感到；触，摸；认为 vt. (深深) 体验到 vi. (⽤⼿、⾜等) 摸索 n. 触觉；触摸；感受
example: I can feel the sun on my face.
exampleChinese: 我能感觉到阳光照在脸上。

meaning: num. ⼗五

exampleChinese: 我的小表弟今年十五岁。

meaning: num. 五⼗ n. 五⼗年代
example: The box holds fifty crayons.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子里装着五十支蜡笔。

meaning: vt. 找到；发现；查明；感到 vt. vi. 裁决，判决 n. 发现物，被发现的⼈
example: I was happy to find my lost watch.
exampleChinese: 我很高兴找到了我丢失的手表。

meaning: num. 五
example: There are five apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有五个苹果。

meaning: n. ⻝物
example: We bought fresh food at the market.
exampleChinese: 我们在市场买了新鲜食物。

meaning: n. ⾜球，橄榄球
example: The boys are playing football after school.
exampleChinese: 男孩们放学后在踢足球。

meaning: num. 四⼗
example: There are forty students in my class.
exampleChinese: 我们班有四十名学生。

meaning: num. 四；四个⼀组
example: We saw four birds in the tree.
exampleChinese: 我们看见树上有四只鸟。

meaning: num. ⼗四
example: My sister is fourteen this year.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹今年十四岁。

meaning: adj. ⾃由的；免费的；空闲的 vt. 释放，使⾃由；松开；解除 adv. 免费；脱离束缚
example: The museum is free on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆周日免费开放。

meaning: n. 朋友；⾃⼰⼈，同盟
example: My best friend sits next to me at school.
exampleChinese: 我最好的朋友在学校坐在我旁边。

meaning: n. 星期五
example: We have a music class on Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期五有一节音乐课。

meaning: prep. 从…起；从…开始；来⾃；由…
example: This letter is from my cousin in Beijing.
exampleChinese: 这封信来自我在北京的表弟。

meaning: n. ⽔果，果实；⾃然的产物；成果 vi. 结果实
example: We bought fresh fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 我们在市场买了新鲜水果。

meaning: adj. 好笑的，有趣的；奇怪的；可疑的
example: The monkey in the video looks funny.
exampleChinese: 视频里的猴子看起来很滑稽。

meaning: n. 将来，将来的事；前途；期货 adj. 将来的，未来的
example: She wants to be a doctor in the future.
exampleChinese: 她将来想当医生。

meaning: n. 游戏，⽐赛；运动会；⾏业 n. 猎物，野味 adj. 敢于冒险的
example: We played a game after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们玩了一个游戏。

meaning: vt. 得到；去取；患上；乘坐；理解 vi. 达到…地步；抵达 vlink. (使) 达到，处于，变得
example: I need to get some milk after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我得去弄点牛奶。

example: The girl is reading by the window.
exampleChinese: 那个女孩正在窗边看书。

meaning: adj. ⾼兴的；乐意的；感激的
example: I am glad to see you again.
exampleChinese: 我很高兴再次见到你。

meaning: vi. 去；移动；离开；通向；进展
example: We must go now if we want to catch the bus.
exampleChinese: 如果我们想赶上公共汽车，就必须现在走。

meaning: adj. 好的；擅⻓的；愉快的；合适的 n. 善⾏；好处，⽤处 adv. 好
example: It was a good day for a picnic.
exampleChinese: 那是一个适合野餐的好日子。

meaning: int. n. 再⻅
example: We waved goodbye at the gate.
exampleChinese: 我们在大门口挥手告别。

meaning: n. (外) 祖⺟，奶奶，外婆
example: My grandmother lives in the next town.
exampleChinese: 我的外婆住在隔壁镇。

meaning: n. 葡萄
example: She put a grape in her lunch box.
exampleChinese: 她在午餐盒里放了一颗葡萄。

meaning: adj. ⼤的；⾮常的；伟⼤的；美妙的 n. 伟⼈，伟⼤的事物 adv. 极好地，很棒地
example: She is a great teacher.
exampleChinese: 她是一位伟大的老师。

meaning: n. ⽑发，尤指头发；(植物的) 茸⽑
example: Her hair is very long.
exampleChinese: 她的头发很长。

meaning: n. ⼀半；半场，半局 det. pron. adj. 半数；绝⼤部分 adv. 部分地，不完全地
example: Half the cake is gone.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕的一半没了。

meaning: n. 笔迹；书写，⼿写
example: I can read her handwriting clearly.
exampleChinese: 我能清楚地认出她的笔迹。

meaning: adj. 快乐的，幸福的，满意的
example: I feel happy when I play with my dog.
exampleChinese: 和我的狗玩时，我感到很幸福。

meaning: n. 帽⼦；职位，⻆⾊
example: He wore a black hat in the rain.
exampleChinese: 他下雨时戴着一顶黑帽子。

meaning: vt. 有；患病；举办；吃，喝；进⾏ aux. 已经
example: I have a blue backpack.
exampleChinese: 我有一个蓝色的背包。

meaning: n. 头；头脑；⾸脑，⾸领；顶端 vi. 朝…⾏进 vt. 领导；排在前头；添加标题
example: She nodded her head and smiled.
exampleChinese: 她点了点头，笑了。

meaning: vi. vt. 听⻅，注意听；听说，得知 vt. 审理，听审
example: Can you hear the birds outside the window?
exampleChinese: 你能听见窗外的鸟叫声吗？

meaning: int. n. 哈喽，你好
example: I said hello to my new neighbor.
exampleChinese: 我向我的新邻居打了声你好。

meaning: vt. vi. 帮助，协助；改善状况，促进 vt. 搀扶；为 (⾃⼰或某⼈) 取⽤ n. 帮助；有助益的东西；救助
example: Can you help me carry this box?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我搬这个箱子吗？

meaning: pron. 她，它 (指雌性动物) det. 她的，它的 (指雌性动物)
example: I saw her at the library after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我在图书馆看见了她。

meaning: adv. 在这⾥，向这⾥
example: Please wait here for your teacher.
exampleChinese: 请在这里等你的老师。

meaning: pron. 她的
example: My pen is blue, and hers is black.
exampleChinese: 我的钢笔是蓝色的，她的是黑色的。

meaning: pron. 她⾃⼰
example: She made the cake herself.
exampleChinese: 她自己做了这个蛋糕。

meaning: n. 公路；公共道路
example: We drove along the highway for two hours.
exampleChinese: 我们沿着公路开了两个小时。

meaning: n. ⼩⼭丘，⼩⼭；(道路的) 斜坡
example: A small house stood on the hill.
exampleChinese: 小山上有一座小房子。

meaning: pron. 他，它 (指雄性动物)
example: I saw him at the school gate.
exampleChinese: 我在校门口看见了他。

meaning: pron. 他⾃⼰
example: He made the model airplane himself.
exampleChinese: 他自己做了这架飞机模型。

meaning: det. 他的，它的 (雄性动物)；上帝的 pron. 他的
example: That blue bicycle is his.
exampleChinese: 那辆蓝色自行车是他的。

meaning: vt. 打；碰撞；击中；达到；使想起 vt. vi. 产⽣不良影响，打击；袭击 n. 打；击中；很受欢迎的⼈ (或物)
example: Be careful not to hit the window with the ball.
exampleChinese: 小心别让球击中窗户。

meaning: n. 假期，节⽇ vi. 度假
example: We will visit my grandparents during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假日期间我们要去看望祖父母。

meaning: n. 家庭作业；准备⼯作
example: I finished my homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我在晚饭前完成了家庭作业。

meaning: vi. vt. 希望，期望 n. 希望，期望
example: There is still hope for success.
exampleChinese: 成功仍然有希望。

example: The horse ran across the field.
exampleChinese: 那匹马跑过了田野。

meaning: n. 宾馆，酒店
example: Our hotel is near the train station.
exampleChinese: 我们的旅馆在火车站附近。

meaning: n. ⼩时；固定时间；⻓时间；整点
example: The class lasts for one hour.
exampleChinese: 这节课持续一小时。

meaning: n. 房屋；全家⼈；议院；公司 vt. 给…提供住处；收藏，安置
example: Their house is near the river.
exampleChinese: 他们的房子在河边。

meaning: adv. 怎样，如何；多少
example: Can you show me how to use this camera?
exampleChinese: 你能告诉我如何使用这台相机吗？

meaning: num. ⼀百
example: The jar holds one hundred marbles.
exampleChinese: 这个罐子能装一百颗弹珠。

meaning: n. 饥饿，饥荒；饥饿感；渴望
example: After the long hike, we all felt hunger.
exampleChinese: 长途步行后，我们都感到饥饿。

meaning: n. 丈夫 vt. 节约地使⽤ (资源等)
example: She worked hard to support her husband.
exampleChinese: 她努力工作来养家支持她的丈夫。

meaning: adj. 不可能的；难应付的
example: It is impossible to finish this in one minute.
exampleChinese: 在一分钟内完成这件事是不可能的。

meaning: prep. 在…某⼀点；在…之中；进⼊ adv. 在⾥⾯，在内；进⼊；在家⾥ adj. 流⾏的，时髦的
example: Please write the answer in pencil.
exampleChinese: 请用铅笔写答案。

meaning: n. 互联⽹，因特⽹
example: We use the Internet to find information.
exampleChinese: 我们用因特网查找信息。

meaning: prep. 进⼊；朝，向；指状态变化
example: She walked into the room quietly.
exampleChinese: 她安静地走进了房间。

meaning: n. 岛
example: The small island is full of birds.
exampleChinese: 这座小岛上满是鸟。

meaning: pron. 它
example: I found a watch on the desk, but it was not mine.
exampleChinese: 我在桌子上发现了一块手表，但它不是我的。

meaning: det. (指事物、动物或婴⼉) 它的
example: The cat cleaned its paws.
exampleChinese: 那只猫清理了它的爪子。

meaning: pron. 它⾃⼰
example: The cat cleaned itself after dinner.
exampleChinese: 那只猫晚饭后给自己舔毛清洁。

meaning: n. 夹克，短上⾐；书套
example: He zipped up his jacket before going outside.
exampleChinese: 他出门前拉上了夹克的拉链。

example: School starts again in January.
exampleChinese: 学校在一月又开学了。

meaning: n. ⼯作，职位；任务，事情；职责
example: My first job was in a small shop.
exampleChinese: 我的第一份工作是在一家小商店。

meaning: n. 果汁，蔬菜汁；⾁汁；胃液 vt. 榨…的汁
example: Would you like some orange juice?
exampleChinese: 你想喝点橙汁吗？

meaning: n. 七⽉
example: My summer course starts in July.
exampleChinese: 我的暑期课程七月开始。

meaning: vi. 跳；突然快速移动；激增；略过 vt. 跳过，越过；跳上 (⻋辆) n. 跳，跃；突升，激增
example: That horse can make a high jump.
exampleChinese: 那匹马能跳得很高。

meaning: n. 六⽉
example: Our summer trip starts in June.
exampleChinese: 我们的暑假旅行从六月开始。

meaning: n. 千克，公⽄
example: The bag of rice weighs one kilo.
exampleChinese: 这袋米重一千克。

meaning: n. 同类的⼈ (或事物)，种类 adj. 体贴的，友好的，宽容的
example: Our new teacher is very kind to us.
exampleChinese: 我们的新老师对我们很和蔼。

meaning: vi. vt. 亲吻，接吻 n. 吻
example: The baby tried to kiss her mother.
exampleChinese: 那个宝宝试着亲吻她的妈妈。

meaning: n. 厨房
example: My mother is cooking in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈正在厨房做饭。

meaning: n. ⻛筝；鸢 vt. ⽤空头⽀票骗钱
example: The children are flying a kite in the park.
exampleChinese: 孩子们正在公园里放风筝。

meaning: n. ⼑ vt. ⽤⼑攻击某⼈
example: He cut the apple with a knife.
exampleChinese: 他用刀切苹果。

meaning: vt. vi. 知道，了解 vt. 把…看作是；把…叫做；能认出
example: I know his name.
exampleChinese: 我知道他的名字。

example: The lady at the desk gave me a map.
exampleChinese: 服务台的那位女士给了我一张地图。

meaning: n. 湖，湖泊
example: We swam in the lake last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天我们在湖里游泳。

meaning: n. 语⾔；语⾔⻛格；计算机语⾔
example: English is an international language.
exampleChinese: 英语是一种国际语言。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼤量的，⼤的
example: They live in a large house near the park.
exampleChinese: 他们住在公园附近的一所大房子里。

meaning: det. 最后的；最近的；最不可能的 adv. 最后，最终；最近，上⼀次 n. 最后来的⼈或事；仅剩下的部分 vi. vt. 持续；保持良好状态；够⽤
example: The movie will last two hours.
exampleChinese: 这部电影将持续两个小时。

meaning: vi. vt. 笑，发笑 n. 笑声；引⼈发笑的⼈或事 vi. (尤因成功⽽) 处于有利地位
example: Her laugh filled the room.
exampleChinese: 她的笑声充满了整个房间。

meaning: adj. 懒惰的；懒洋洋的；不⾛⼼的
example: He is lazy on Sunday mornings.
exampleChinese: 他在星期天早上很懒。

meaning: vt. vi. 学习，学到；得知；意识到
example: I want to learn how to swim this summer.
exampleChinese: 我想在今年夏天学习游泳。

meaning: vi. vt. 离开；离职，离校 vt. 遗弃；使发⽣；忘了带；剩余 n. 假期，休假
example: We should leave home early for the train.
exampleChinese: 我们应该早点离家去赶火车。

meaning: adj. 左边的 adv. 向左 n. 左边；左转弯；左派；左⼿拳
example: Turn left at the next street.
exampleChinese: 在下一条街向左转。

meaning: n. 腿；腿⾁；裤腿；(桌椅等的) 腿 n. ⼀段路程 (或赛程)
example: His leg was hurt during the game.
exampleChinese: 他的腿在比赛中受伤了。

meaning: det. pron. 更少的，更⼩的 adv. 程度较低地，更⼩地，较少地 prep. 减去，扣除
example: I drink less coffee now.
exampleChinese: 我现在喝更少的咖啡了。

meaning: n. 课程，⼀节课；经验，教训
example: Missing the bus taught me a lesson.
exampleChinese: 错过公交车给了我一个教训。

meaning: n. 信，信件；字⺟ vt. ⽤字⺟标明；把字⺟印刷于
example: I got a letter from my cousin.
exampleChinese: 我收到了我表亲的一封信。

meaning: n. 图书馆；书房；系列丛书
example: I return these books to the library every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我每周五把这些书还到图书馆。

meaning: vt. 喜欢；想，要，希望 prep. 像，相似；像…⼀样；例如 conj. 如同；似乎 n. 喜好；类似的⼈或物；类型
example: I like this song very much.
exampleChinese: 我非常喜欢这首歌。

meaning: n. 线；界线；排；队列；字⾏ vt. 沿…形成⾏；做衬⾥
example: This bus line goes to the airport.
exampleChinese: 这条公交线路通往机场。

meaning: n. 狮⼦
example: The lion slept in the shade.
exampleChinese: 狮子在阴凉处睡觉。

meaning: vi. 听，倾听；听信，听从
example: Please listen to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 请听老师讲。

meaning: adj. ⼩的；年幼的；短暂的 det. pron. 不多的；少量的 adv. 稍许，略微；少量，⼀点
example: The little dog ran to its owner.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗跑向它的主人。

meaning: vi. 居住；⽣存，活着；继续存在 vt. vi. ⽣活 adj. 活的；现场直播的；通电的 adv. 现场直播地
example: Many fish cannot live out of water.
exampleChinese: 许多鱼离开水就不能存活。

meaning: pron. det. ⼤量，许多 adv. 很，⾮常 n. ⼀块地；命运；组，群
example: We still have a lot of time.
exampleChinese: 我们还有很多时间。

meaning: adj. ⼤声的，响亮的；花哨的 adv. 喧闹地，⼤声地
example: The music is too loud.
exampleChinese: 音乐太大声了。

meaning: n. 爱；爱⼈ vt. 爱；很愿意
example: I love reading by the window on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在下雨天坐在窗边读书。

meaning: n. 午饭，午餐 vi. 吃午饭
example: We usually eat lunch at noon.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在中午吃午餐。

meaning: n. ⼥仆，侍⼥；少⼥
example: The maid cleaned the room quickly.
exampleChinese: 女仆很快打扫了房间。

meaning: n. 男⼈；⼈ int. (表⽰惊奇、⽓愤等) 嘿，天哪 vt. 操纵 (机器)，配备 (⼈员)
example: A tall man opened the door for us.
exampleChinese: 一位高个子男子为我们开了门。

meaning: det. pron. 许多
example: Many of my classmates ride bikes to school.
exampleChinese: 我的许多同学骑自行车上学。

meaning: n. 地图 vt. 绘制…的地图；发现，表⽰出
example: I opened the map on my phone.
exampleChinese: 我在手机上打开了地图。

meaning: n. 三⽉
example: The soldiers began to march at dawn.
exampleChinese: 士兵们在黎明时开始行军。

meaning: n. 市场 vt. 推销，促销
example: My mother bought fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈在市场买了水果。

meaning: n. 婚姻，已婚状态；婚礼
example: Their marriage began in a small town church.
exampleChinese: 他们的婚姻始于小镇的一座教堂。

meaning: vt. vi. (和某⼈) 结婚 vt. 为…主持婚礼；把…嫁给
example: She will marry a kind man.
exampleChinese: 她将嫁给一个善良的男人。

meaning: n. 事情，问题；事态；物质 vi. vt. 要紧
example: It does not matter who goes first.
exampleChinese: 谁先去都不要紧。

example: My birthday is in May this year.
exampleChinese: 我今年的生日在五月。

meaning: adv. 也许，可能，⼤概
example: Maybe it will rain this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 今天下午也许会下雨。

meaning: pron. 我
example: Please call me after school.
exampleChinese: 请放学后给我打电话。

meaning: n. ⾁；重要内容，有趣内容
example: We had meat and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了肉和米饭。

meaning: n. 会议；⻅⾯；运动会
example: We have a meeting at ten o'clock.
exampleChinese: 我们十点钟开会。

meaning: modal. 可能；可以 n. 强⼤⼒量，威⼒
example: You might try asking the teacher for help.
exampleChinese: 你可以试着向老师求助。

meaning: n. 英⾥；⼤⾯积，⻓距离
example: Our school is one mile from the park.
exampleChinese: 我们学校离公园有一英里。

meaning: n. 奶，乳汁 vt. 挤奶
example: I drink a glass of milk every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上喝一杯牛奶。

meaning: num. ⼀百万；许多，⽆数
example: The city has over one million people.
exampleChinese: 这座城市有一百多万人。

meaning: n. ⽚刻，瞬间；某个时刻；时机
example: For a moment, the whole room became quiet.
exampleChinese: 有那么一瞬间，整个房间都安静了下来。

meaning: n. 星期⼀
example: We have a math test on Monday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期一有数学考试。

meaning: n. 钱
example: She saves her money in a small box.
exampleChinese: 她把钱存放在一个小盒子里。

example: The monkey climbed the tree quickly.
exampleChinese: 那只猴子很快爬上了树。

example: I will visit my grandparents next month.
exampleChinese: 我下个月会去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: n. ⽉球，⽉亮；卫星
example: The moon looks bright tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚的月亮看起来很明亮。

meaning: n. 早晨，上午
example: I go for a walk every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早晨都去散步。

meaning: det. pron. 最多的，最⼤量的；⼤多数 adv. 最；(程度上) 最⼤，最多，最⾼
example: Most students walk to school.
exampleChinese: 大多数学生步行去上学。

meaning: n. 汽⻋旅馆
example: We stayed at a motel near the highway.
exampleChinese: 我们住在高速公路旁的一家汽车旅馆。

meaning: n. ⺟亲，妈妈 vt. 作为⺟亲照顾，像⺟亲般关爱
example: My mother makes soup for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭做汤。

meaning: n. 嘴；⼊⼝；河⼝；⻝客；⾔谈 vt. (动嘴唇) 不出声地说
example: The baby opened his mouth for a spoon of rice.
exampleChinese: 宝宝张开嘴吃一勺米饭。

meaning: n. ⾳乐 (艺术)；乐谱
example: Soft music filled the room.
exampleChinese: 轻柔的音乐充满了房间。

meaning: modal. 必须；⼀定，肯定；应该 n. 必须做的事，必须有的东西
example: You must finish your homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 你必须在晚饭前完成作业。

meaning: det. 我的
example: My bag is under the chair.
exampleChinese: 我的书包在椅子下面。

meaning: pron. 我⾃⼰
example: I made the model plane myself.
exampleChinese: 这个飞机模型是我自己做的。

meaning: n. 名字，名称；名声；名⼈ vt. 命名；说出…的名称；确定
example: Please name your new cat.
exampleChinese: 请给你的小猫起个名字。

meaning: adj. 距离近的；不久后的；差不多的 prep. adv. 接近 (地)，靠近 (地) adv. 不久以后；⼏乎，差不多 vt. vi. (时间或空间上) 接近
example: The supermarket is near my home.
exampleChinese: 超市在我家附近。

meaning: vt. 需要，有必要 n. 需要；需要的事物；缺乏 modal. 需要
example: I need a pencil for the test.
exampleChinese: 考试时我需要一支铅笔。

meaning: adv. 从未，决不 int. (表⽰惊讶或怀疑) 不会吧
example: I have never seen snow in July.
exampleChinese: 我从未在七月见过雪。

meaning: n. 消息，新闻报道
example: The news made everyone smile.
exampleChinese: 这个消息让大家都笑了。

meaning: n. 报纸；报社
example: My grandpa reads the newspaper every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷每天早上都看报纸。

meaning: adj. 下⼀个的，接下来的 adv. 紧接着，随后；其次地 pron. 下⼀个
example: Finish your homework, and next clean your desk.
exampleChinese: 做完作业，然后整理你的书桌。

meaning: adj. 令⼈愉快的；友好的
example: The watch has a nice and precise design.
exampleChinese: 这块手表有一个精密的设计。

meaning: n. 夜晚
example: We saw many stars in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 我们在夜空中看到了很多星星。

meaning: num. 九
example: There are nine candles on the cake.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕上有九支蜡烛。

meaning: num. ⼗九
example: She is nineteen years old this year.
exampleChinese: 她今年十九岁。

meaning: num. 九⼗
example: My grandfather is ninety years old.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷九十岁了。

meaning: int. 不，没有，不是；不，不要 det. ⽆，没有；不准，禁⽌；不是 adv. 不 n. 否定的回答；投反对票者
example: There is no milk left in the fridge.
exampleChinese: 冰箱里没有牛奶了。

meaning: n. 噪⾳，响声；电⼦⼲扰讯号
example: The noise outside kept me awake.
exampleChinese: 外面的噪音让我睡不着。

meaning: adv. 尽管如此
example: It was raining hard; nonetheless, we went out.
exampleChinese: 雨下得很大；尽管如此，我们还是出去了。

meaning: n. ⾯条
example: I ate a bowl of noodle soup for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了一碗汤面。

meaning: n. 正午，中午
example: We usually eat lunch at noon.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在中午吃午饭。

meaning: n. 北，北⽅，北部 adj. 北⽅的，向北的 adv. 朝北地
example: Birds fly north in spring.
exampleChinese: 鸟在春天向北飞。

meaning: n. 东北，东北⽅ adj. 东北部的 adv. 向东北
example: A cold wind blew from the northeast.
exampleChinese: 一阵冷风从东北方向吹来。

meaning: adj. 北⽅的，向北的
example: The northern wind was cold and strong.
exampleChinese: 北风又冷又强。

meaning: adv. 不，没有
example: I am not ready to leave yet.
exampleChinese: 我还没准备好离开。

meaning: n. 笔记本；笔记本电脑
example: She wrote my phone number in her notebook.
exampleChinese: 她把我的电话号码写在她的笔记本里。

example: The weather gets colder in November.
exampleChinese: 十一月天气变得更冷了。

meaning: adv. 现在，⽬前；⻢上 conj. 既然，由于
example: I need to leave now.
exampleChinese: 我现在得走了。

meaning: n. 数字；编号；号码；数量 vt. 给…编号 vi. 总计，共计 vt. vi. 把…算作
example: We number the pages from one to ten.
exampleChinese: 我们把页码从一编到十。

meaning: adv. (表⽰整点)…点钟
example: The meeting starts at eight o'clock.
exampleChinese: 会议八点钟开始。

example: The trees turn red in October.
exampleChinese: 树木在十月变红。

meaning: prep. 属于，关于；在，当
example: We are talking of our summer plans.
exampleChinese: 我们正在谈论我们的暑假计划。

meaning: adv. 离开；被取消；未连接；休息 prep. (时空上) 离，距；从…去掉；从 adj. 变质的；不礼貌的；不能接受的
example: Please turn off the light before you leave.
exampleChinese: 离开前请把灯关掉。

meaning: adv. 经常，多次；往往
example: I often walk to school with my sister.
exampleChinese: 我常常和姐姐一起走路去学校。

meaning: int. 对，好，⾏；好了；好吗 adj. adv. 安然⽆恙；可以，可⾏ n. 允许，同意
example: Okay, let's begin the lesson.
exampleChinese: 好的，我们开始上课吧。

meaning: adj. ⽼的；陈旧的；原先的；旧交的
example: The old bridge is still strong.
exampleChinese: 这座古老的桥仍然很坚固。

meaning: prep. 在…上；由…⽀撑；在 (某⼀天) adv. 向前 (移动)；穿着，戴着
example: Please keep the lights on at night.
exampleChinese: 请在晚上让灯开着。

meaning: adv. ⼀次；曾经；(⽤于否定句) 根本 conj. ⼀…就，⼀旦
example: I go to the library once a week.
exampleChinese: 我每周去一次图书馆。

meaning: det. num. ⼀ pron. (⽤于指代) ⼀个东西，⼀个⼈
example: Only one was left in the box.
exampleChinese: 盒子里只剩下一个了。

example: One should believe in oneself.
exampleChinese: 一个人应该相信自己。

meaning: adj. 仅有的，唯⼀的；最适当的 adv. 只，仅仅；仅在…情况下；不料 conj. 不过，但是
example: This is the only seat left on the bus.
exampleChinese: 这是公交车上仅剩的一个座位。

meaning: prep. 到…上，向…上；(⻔或窗等) 朝
example: He stepped onto the stage and began to sing.
exampleChinese: 他走到舞台上，开始唱歌。

meaning: adj. 开着的；开阔的；营业的 vt. vi. 打开；张开；展开；开业；启动 vt. 开启；翻开；让…通⾏ vi. 准备接待；以…开篇
example: The museum is open to the public on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆在星期天对公众开放。

meaning: conj. 或者，还是；也不；否则；⼤约
example: You can have tea or juice.
exampleChinese: 你可以喝茶或果汁。

meaning: n. 橙⼦，柑橘；橙汁；橙⾊ adj. 橙⾊的
example: She wore an orange hat today.
exampleChinese: 她今天戴了一顶橙色的帽子。

meaning: det. 我们的
example: Our classroom is on the second floor.
exampleChinese: 我们的教室在二楼。

meaning: pron. 我们的
example: These books are ours.
exampleChinese: 这些书是我们的。

meaning: pron. 我们⾃⼰
example: We made the cake ourselves.
exampleChinese: 我们自己做了这个蛋糕。

meaning: adv. prep. 出来；外出；远离；除掉 ；缺少
example: The stars came out after the rain stopped.
exampleChinese: 雨停后，星星出来了。

meaning: prep. 在…之上；穿越；在远端；遍及 prep. 在…期间；关于 adv. ⼤于；结束；落下；翻转；穿过
example: The game is over now.
exampleChinese: 比赛现在结束了。

meaning: adj. pron. ⾃⼰的 vt. 拥有，有
example: They own a small shop near the school.
exampleChinese: 他们在学校附近拥有一家小商店。

meaning: n. 阉⽜，(泛指) ⽜
example: The ox pulled the heavy cart across the field.
exampleChinese: 那头牛把沉重的车拉过了田地。

meaning: n. ⼤熊猫；⼩熊猫
example: The panda is eating bamboo.
exampleChinese: 那只熊猫正在吃竹子。

meaning: n. ⽗亲，⺟亲；⺟公司 vi. vt. 做…的⽗亲 (或⺟亲)
example: Each parent signed the school notice.
exampleChinese: 每位家长都在学校通知上签了字。
