meaning: n. 公园；专⽤区，园区 vi. vt. 停⻋，泊⻋
example: The children are playing in the park.
exampleChinese: 孩子们正在公园里玩。

meaning: vi. vt. 经过；传球；及格，合格 vi. 沿某⽅向移动；流逝；结束 vt. 给，递；⼤于；消磨；通过 n. 及格，合格；通⾏证；传球；关⼝
example: We pass the library on our way to school.
exampleChinese: 我们上学路上会经过图书馆。

meaning: adj. 过去的 n. 过去；过去的经历 prep. 晚于，…之后；在另⼀边；超过 adv. 经过；(时间) 逝去
example: We walked past the library in silence.
exampleChinese: 我们默默地走过了图书馆。

meaning: n. 梨
example: The pear tree is full of fruit.
exampleChinese: 这棵梨树结满了果实。

meaning: n. 笔，钢笔；围栏，畜栏 vt. 写；(把…) 关起来
example: He signed his name with a blue pen.
exampleChinese: 他用一支蓝色钢笔签了名。

meaning: n. 铅笔 vt. ⽤铅笔写 (或画)
example: I need a pencil for this test.
exampleChinese: 这次考试我需要一支铅笔。

meaning: n. 照⽚，相⽚
example: I put your photo on my desk.
exampleChinese: 我把你的照片放在我的桌子上。

meaning: n. 钢琴
example: There is a piano in our music room.
exampleChinese: 我们的音乐教室里有一架钢琴。

meaning: n. ⼩货⻋；接⼈，提货；改进 adj. (体育⽐赛) 临时拼凑的
example: The pickup carried the boxes to the farm.
exampleChinese: 那辆小货车把箱子运到了农场。

meaning: n. 野餐；野餐吃的⻝物 vi. 去野餐
example: We had a picnic by the lake on Sunday.
exampleChinese: 星期天我们在湖边野餐了。

meaning: n. ⽔果派；⾁或蔬菜馅的馅饼
example: Grandma baked an apple pie for dessert.
exampleChinese: 奶奶烤了一个苹果馅饼当甜点。

meaning: n. 图画，绘画；照⽚；描绘；状况 vt. 想象，忆起；描述，描写
example: She drew a picture of her house.
exampleChinese: 她画了一张自己房子的图画。

meaning: n. 猪；讨⼈厌的⼈，贪婪的⼈
example: The pig is sleeping under the tree.
exampleChinese: 那头猪正在树下睡觉。

meaning: n. 位置，地⽅；座位；名次；⾝份 vt. 放置；以某种态度对待；下指⽰
example: Please place the cup on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把杯子放在桌子上。

meaning: int. 请，请问；请务必；太感谢了 vt. vi. 使满意，使愉快 vi. 想，喜欢
example: Please close the window.
exampleChinese: 请把窗户关上。

meaning: n. 警察，警⽅ vt. 在…巡查以维护治安；管制
example: The police arrived a few minutes later.
exampleChinese: 几分钟后警察到了。

meaning: n. (男) 警察
example: A policeman helped the lost child find his mother.
exampleChinese: 一名警察帮助走失的孩子找到了他的妈妈。

meaning: adj. 贫穷的；可怜的；差劲的
example: The poor family lived in a small house.
exampleChinese: 那个贫穷的家庭住在一间小房子里。

example: I put a potato in the soup.
exampleChinese: 我把一个土豆放进汤里。

meaning: n. 问题，困难；逻辑题，数学题 adj. 找⿇烦的，成问题的
example: This math problem is hard.
exampleChinese: 这道数学难题很难。

meaning: vt. vi. 推动，移动；推进，挤开；说服 vt. 推动，促使；按，摁；敦促 n. 推；进攻，挺进；坚定的努⼒
example: Please push the door gently.
exampleChinese: 请轻轻推门。

meaning: vt. 放；(在…上) 书写；使处于；说
example: Please put your bag under the chair.
exampleChinese: 请把你的包放在椅子下面。

meaning: n. 问题；考题；议题，课题；困惑 vt. 问，质询；表⽰疑问，怀疑
example: I have a question about the last math problem.
exampleChinese: 我对最后一道数学题有个问题。

meaning: adj. 安静的；僻静的；⽂静的 vi. vt. (使) 平静，安静 vt. 使 (情绪) 缓解，使减轻
example: The library is quiet in the morning.
exampleChinese: 图书馆在早上很安静。

meaning: adv. 相当
example: The math test was quite easy.
exampleChinese: 这次数学考试很容易。

meaning: n. ⾬，⾬⽔；(热带地区的) ⾬季 vi. 下⾬ vt. vi. (使) ⼤量降落，⾬点般落下
example: Heavy rain stopped the game.
exampleChinese: 大雨使比赛停止了。

meaning: vi. vt. 阅读，读懂；朗读；读到；攻读 vt. 猜测；读唇语；理解；写着 vi. 读起来 (给⼈以某种印象) n. 好的读物
example: I like to read before going to bed.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在睡觉前阅读。

meaning: adj. 准备好的；现成的；乐意的
example: I am ready for the math test.
exampleChinese: 我准备好参加数学考试了。

meaning: vt. 收到；受到；回应；接待；收看 vt. vi. 购买，接受 (赃物)
example: Did you receive my email yesterday?
exampleChinese: 你昨天收到我的电子邮件了吗？

meaning: adj. 红⾊的 n. 红⾊
example: She wore a red hat.
exampleChinese: 她戴了一顶红色的帽子。

meaning: n. 餐厅
example: We had lunch at a small restaurant.
exampleChinese: 我们在一家小餐馆吃了午饭。

example: We had rice and vegetables for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午饭吃了米饭和蔬菜。

meaning: vt. vi. 骑⻢，骑⻋；搭乘，乘坐 n. (骑⻢、骑⻋或乘⻋的) 旅程 vt. 数落，嘲弄
example: I ride my bike to the park on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我周末骑自行车去公园。

meaning: adj. 正确的；适当的；右边的 adv. 正好地；⼀直；⽴即；往右 n. 公正，正义；权利；版权；右边 vt. 把…扶正；纠正
example: Your answer is right.
exampleChinese: 你的答案是正确的。

meaning: n. 河，江；巨流，涌流
example: A narrow river runs behind the village.
exampleChinese: 一条狭窄的河流从村子后面流过。

meaning: n. 路；途径，⽅法
example: There are many trees along this road.
exampleChinese: 这条马路两旁有很多树。

meaning: n. 机器⼈
example: The robot can clean the floor by itself.
exampleChinese: 这个机器人可以自己清扫地板。

meaning: n. 房间；客房；空间；可能性
example: She cleaned her room this morning.
exampleChinese: 她今天早上打扫了她的房间。

meaning: n. 垃圾；劣质物品；胡说⼋道 vt. 将…说得⼀⽂不值 adj. 差劲的，糟糕的
example: Please throw the rubbish in the bin.
exampleChinese: 请把垃圾扔进垃圾桶里。

meaning: adj. 悲伤的；令⼈难过的；糟糕的
example: She felt sad after the movie ended.
exampleChinese: 电影结束后她感到很难过。

meaning: adj. 安全的；⽆害的；平安⽆事的 n. 保险箱
example: Keep your passport in the safe.
exampleChinese: 把你的护照放在保险箱里。

meaning: adj. 相同的，⼀模⼀样的 pron. 同样的事物 (或⼈)
example: We wear the same school uniform.
exampleChinese: 我们穿着相同的校服。

meaning: n. 星期六
example: We usually clean the house on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在星期六打扫房子。

meaning: vi. vt. 说，告诉；表达 (⻅解) vt. ⽐⽅说；表明；指⽰；念，朗诵 n. 决定权，发⾔权
example: Please say your name clearly.
exampleChinese: 请清楚地说出你的名字。

meaning: n. 海洋；⼤量
example: We saw the sun sink into the sea.
exampleChinese: 我们看见太阳落入海中。

meaning: n. 季节；旺季；演出期；流⾏期 vt. vi. 加调料调味
example: Spring is my favorite season.
exampleChinese: 春天是我最喜欢的季节。

meaning: adj. 秘密的；对…保密的 n. 秘密；秘诀；奥秘
example: Can you keep a secret?
exampleChinese: 你能保守秘密吗？

meaning: n. 九⽉
example: Our new term starts in September.
exampleChinese: 我们的新学期在九月开始。

meaning: num. 七
example: There are seven days in a week.
exampleChinese: 一周有七天。

meaning: modal. 将要；好吗；⼀定
example: Shall we meet at the school gate at eight?
exampleChinese: 我们八点在校门口见好吗？

meaning: n. 鲨⻥；坑蒙拐骗的⼈
example: We saw a shark in the sea show.
exampleChinese: 我们在海洋表演中看见了一条鲨鱼。

meaning: pron. 她，它 (指雌性动物) n. ⼥性，雌性
example: She is my best friend.
exampleChinese: 她是我最好的朋友。

example: The farmer keeps sheep on the hill.
exampleChinese: 那位农夫在山坡上养羊。

meaning: n. 架⼦；暗礁，⼤陆架
example: Put the storybooks back on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 把故事书放回书架上。

meaning: n. ⼤船，舰 vt. 运输，运送 vi. vt. (使) 上市
example: We ship the books every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们每周五运送这些书。

meaning: n. 衬衫
example: He bought a new white shirt.
exampleChinese: 他买了一件新的白衬衫。

meaning: n. 鞋
example: I need a new shoe for gym class.
exampleChinese: 我上体育课需要一只新鞋。

meaning: n. 商店；⼯⼚，⻋间；购物 vi. vt. 购物
example: My aunt owns a flower shop near the school.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈在学校附近开了一家花店。

meaning: modal. 应当，应该；假如，万⼀
example: You should drink more water.
exampleChinese: 你应该多喝水。

meaning: prep. conj. ⾃从…以来，⾃从…之后 conj. 由于，既然 adv. 此后，后来
example: I have lived here since 2020.
exampleChinese: 我从2020年起就住在这里。

meaning: vi. vt. 唱 (歌) vi. (⻦) 鸣，啼
example: The children sing after class.
exampleChinese: 孩子们课后唱歌。

meaning: n. 先⽣；爵⼠
example: Yes, sir, I understand the question.
exampleChinese: 是的，先生，我明白这个问题。

meaning: n. 姐妹；护⼠⻓；修⼥ adj. 如同姐妹的，同类的
example: My sister helps me with my homework.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐帮我做作业。

meaning: num. 六
example: There are six apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有六个苹果。

meaning: n. ⼤⼩；⼤量，⼤规模；尺码，号
example: What size shoes do you wear?
exampleChinese: 你穿多大码的鞋？

meaning: n. 裙⼦；下摆，边缘 vt. vi. 环绕…的边缘；回避 (困难等)
example: She wore a blue skirt to school.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条蓝色裙子去上学。

meaning: n. 天空
example: The sky is clear after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后天空很晴朗。

meaning: vi. 睡觉，⼊睡 vt. 可供…⼈住宿 n. 睡觉，睡眠
example: Babies sleep for many hours each day.
exampleChinese: 婴儿每天要睡很多个小时。

meaning: adj. ⼩的；年幼的；不重要的
example: The box is too small for all my books.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子太小了，装不下我所有的书。

meaning: vi. 微笑 vt. 微笑着说；现出 (某种) 笑容 n. 微笑，笑容
example: Babies often smile when they see their mothers.
exampleChinese: 婴儿看见妈妈时常常会微笑。

meaning: n. 蛇 vi. vt. 蜿蜒，蛇⾏
example: A snake moved slowly through the grass.
exampleChinese: 一条蛇缓缓地穿过草地。

meaning: n. 雪 vi. 下雪
example: The children played in the snow.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在雪地里玩耍。

meaning: adv. 这样，如此；很；也 conj. 因此，所以；为了，以便
example: The bag was heavy, so I put it down.
exampleChinese: 这个包很重，所以我把它放下了。

meaning: n. 短袜；重击 vt. 重击
example: The boxer tried to sock his opponent in the arm.
exampleChinese: 那名拳击手试图重击对手的手臂。

meaning: det. ⼀些；某些；好些 pron. 有些⼈或事物；若⼲ adv. ⼤约
example: I need some paper for my homework.
exampleChinese: 我做作业需要一些纸。

meaning: pron. 某⼈，有⼈ n. 重要⼈物
example: Somebody left a notebook on the chair.
exampleChinese: 有人把一本笔记本落在椅子上了。

meaning: adv. 以某种⽅式；不知为何
example: Somehow, she found her keys in the dark room.
exampleChinese: 她不知怎么地在黑暗的房间里找到了钥匙。

meaning: pron. 某⼈，有⼈；⼤⼈物
example: Someone left a bag on the bus.
exampleChinese: 有人把一个包落在公交车上了。

meaning: pron. 某物，某事；重要的事 (或⼈)
example: I heard something outside the door.
exampleChinese: 我听见门外有声音。

meaning: adv. 在某时 adj. 曾经的，以前的
example: We can meet sometime next week.
exampleChinese: 我们下周某个时间可以见面。

meaning: adv. 有时
example: I sometimes read in the library after school.
exampleChinese: 我有时放学后在图书馆看书。

meaning: adv. 在 (或到) 某处
example: My keys must be somewhere in the room.
exampleChinese: 我的钥匙一定在房间里的某个地方。

example: Her son starts school this year.
exampleChinese: 她的儿子今年开始上学。

meaning: n. 歌曲；(⻦的) 鸣啭
example: This song makes me feel happy.
exampleChinese: 这首歌曲让我感到快乐。

meaning: int. 很抱歉，请原谅 adj. 惋惜的；歉疚的；遗憾的
example: Sorry, I stepped on your foot.
exampleChinese: 对不起，我踩到你的脚了。

meaning: n. 南，南⽅，南部 adj. 南⽅的，向南的，南⽅来的 adv. 朝南，向南
example: My grandparents live in the south of China.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母住在中国南方。

meaning: adj. 南⽅的，向南的，南部的
example: They traveled through southern China last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天他们游览了中国南方。

meaning: vi. 交谈；说话；发⾔，演说；提起 vt. 会说 (某种语⾔)；讲述 vi. vt. ⽤ (某种语⾔) 说话
example: Please speak slowly so everyone can understand.
exampleChinese: 请说慢一点，这样每个人都能听懂。

meaning: vt. vi. 拼写，⽤字⺟拼出 vt. (字⺟) 拼成；招致；顶替 n. ⼀段时间；咒语
example: In the story, the witch used a spell to open the door.
exampleChinese: 在故事里，女巫用了一个咒语打开门。

meaning: n. 拼写，拼写能⼒；(单词的) 拼法
example: Her spelling is very accurate.
exampleChinese: 她的拼写非常准确。

meaning: vi. vt. 花 (钱) vt. 花 (时间)；消耗 (精⼒、努⼒等)
example: I spend two hours on homework every night.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上花两个小时做作业。

meaning: n. 体育运动
example: Swimming is my favorite sport.
exampleChinese: 游泳是我最喜欢的运动。

meaning: n. 运动员；⼾外运动爱好者
example: He is a good sportsman and plays fairly.
exampleChinese: 他是一名优秀的运动员，而且比赛很公平。

meaning: n. 星；星号；明星；主演；星级 vi. 主演，担任主⻆ vt. 由…担任主⻆
example: The first star appeared in the sky.
exampleChinese: 天空中出现了第一颗星星。

meaning: vt. vi. 偷，窃取
example: It is wrong to steal from others.
exampleChinese: 偷别人的东西是不对的。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 停⽌，(使) 结束 vt. 阻⽌；暂停 vi. 逗留，留下 n. 停⽌，阻⽌；⻋站
example: Please stop talking in the library.
exampleChinese: 请停止在图书馆里说话。

meaning: n. 故事，叙述；报道；楼层
example: My grandmother told me a funny story.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶给我讲了一个有趣的故事。

meaning: n. 街，街道 adj. 街头的
example: There is a small cafe on this street.
exampleChinese: 这条街上有一家小咖啡馆。

meaning: n. 学⽣；学者，研究者
example: Each student needs a notebook.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都需要一个笔记本。

meaning: n. 学习；功课；审视；研究；书房 vt. vi. 学习，攻读 vt. 审视，端详；研究，调查
example: I study English for an hour every night.
exampleChinese: 我每晚学习一小时英语。

meaning: n. 地铁；地下通道
example: We take the subway to the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们乘地铁去博物馆。

meaning: det. pron. 这样的，类似的；这么，如 此
example: Why did you ask such a strange question?
exampleChinese: 你为什么问这样一个奇怪的问题？

meaning: n. 夏天，夏季
example: We often go swimming in summer.
exampleChinese: 我们夏天经常去游泳。

meaning: n. 太阳；太阳的光和热；恒星 vt. 晒太阳
example: The sun was warm on my face.
exampleChinese: 太阳照在我脸上，暖洋洋的。

meaning: n. 星期⽇
example: We usually visit Grandma on Sunday.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在星期日去看望奶奶。

meaning: n. 晚饭，夜宵
example: We had rice and fish for supper.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了米饭和鱼。

meaning: adj. 甜的；芳⾹的，悦⽿的；愉快的 n. 糖果；甜点
example: This tea is too sweet for me.
exampleChinese: 这杯茶对我来说太甜了。

meaning: vi. vt. 讲话；谈论；(⽤某种语⾔) 讲 vt. 说；指的是 vi. 说闲话；供认，招认 n. 交谈，谈话；洽谈；演讲；空谈
example: We need to talk after class.
exampleChinese: 我们课后需要谈一谈。

meaning: adj. ⾼的；有…⾼的，⾝⾼…的
example: That tall tree is over the roof.
exampleChinese: 那棵高大的树比屋顶还高。

meaning: n. 出租⻋ vi. vt. (⻜机) 滑⾏
example: We took a taxi to the train station.
exampleChinese: 我们乘出租车去了火车站。

meaning: n. 茶⽔；茶叶；⼀杯茶；茶点
example: My grandma drinks tea every afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶每天下午都喝茶。

meaning: vi. vt. 教，教授，教导 vt. 教训，惩戒
example: My father can teach me to swim.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸可以教我游泳。

meaning: n. ⽼师，教师
example: Our teacher gave us a math quiz.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师给我们进行了数学小测验。

meaning: n. 电话，电话系统 vi. vt. (给…) 打电话
example: I will telephone my aunt tonight.
exampleChinese: 我今晚要给姑妈打电话。

meaning: num. ⼗
example: There are ten apples in the basket.
exampleChinese: 篮子里有十个苹果。

meaning: n. ⽹球
example: They play tennis after school on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 他们每周五放学后打网球。

meaning: n. 正⽂；短信；原⽂，⽂章；课本 vt. vi. 发短信
example: Please text me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家后请给我发短信。

meaning: prep. conj. ⽐ (⽤于两个事物的⽐较 )；⽴即
example: My bag is heavier than yours.
exampleChinese: 我的包比你的重。

meaning: vt. 感谢，向…致谢
example: I want to thank you for your help.
exampleChinese: 我想感谢你的帮助。

meaning: n. 感恩节
example: We eat turkey on Thanksgiving.
exampleChinese: 我们在感恩节吃火鸡。

meaning: det. pron. 那，那个 adv. 那样，那么 conj. (引导从句)
example: That is my new schoolbag.
exampleChinese: 那是我的新书包。

meaning: det. 这，那
example: The more you read, the better you write.
exampleChinese: 你读得越多，写得就越好。

meaning: det. 他们的，她们的，它们的
example: Their classroom is on the third floor.
exampleChinese: 他们的教室在三楼。

meaning: pron. 他们的，她们的，它们的
example: Our seats are here, and theirs are by the window.
exampleChinese: 我们的座位在这里，他们的在窗边。

meaning: pron. 他们，她们，它们
example: I saw them in the library.
exampleChinese: 我在图书馆看见了他们。

meaning: pron. 他们⾃⼰，她们⾃⼰，它们⾃⼰
example: The children cleaned the room themselves.
exampleChinese: 孩子们自己打扫了房间。

meaning: adv. 在那⾥，到那⾥，往那⾥ int. 你瞧，好啦
example: My school is over there by the park.
exampleChinese: 我的学校就在公园旁边那里。

meaning: det. pron. 这些
example: These apples are very sweet.
exampleChinese: 这些苹果很甜。

meaning: pron. 他们，她们，它们；⼈们
example: They play basketball every Saturday.
exampleChinese: 他们每个星期六都打篮球。

meaning: adj. 薄的，细的；瘦的；稀疏的 vi. (头发) 变稀疏 vi. vt. (使) 变稀薄，变稀疏，变少
example: The ice on the lake is very thin.
exampleChinese: 湖上的冰非常薄。

meaning: n. 东西，事物；事情，情况；⽣物
example: The best thing is to ask for help.
exampleChinese: 最好的事情是寻求帮助。

meaning: vt. vi. 认为；想，思考；想象；打算 vt. 有…想法；预料；记得，想起
example: I think this answer is correct.
exampleChinese: 我认为这个答案是对的。

meaning: ord. 第三 n. 三分之⼀
example: She finished third in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中得了第三名。

meaning: adj. ⼝渴的；渴求的；⼲旱缺⽔的
example: After the game, I felt very thirsty.
exampleChinese: 比赛结束后，我觉得很渴。

meaning: num. ⼗三
example: There are thirteen students in the room.
exampleChinese: 房间里有十三名学生。

meaning: num. 三⼗
example: There are thirty students in my class.
exampleChinese: 我们班有三十名学生。

meaning: det. pron. 这，这个 adv. 这么
example: This is my favorite book.
exampleChinese: 这是我最喜欢的书。

meaning: det. pron. 那些
example: Those shoes look very comfortable.
exampleChinese: 那些鞋子看起来很舒服。

meaning: num. 三
example: We need three chairs for the room.
exampleChinese: 这个房间我们需要三把椅子。

meaning: n. 星期四
example: Our music class is on Thursday.
exampleChinese: 我们的音乐课在星期四。

meaning: n. ⽼虎
example: The tiger slept under the tree.
exampleChinese: 老虎在树下睡觉。

meaning: adj. 疲倦的；厌倦的；⽼⼀套的
example: After the long walk, I felt tired.
exampleChinese: 走了很长一段路后，我觉得很疲倦。

meaning: prep. 向，朝；到，达；给；对于
example: We walked to school together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走路去学校。

meaning: adv. 在今天；如今，当今 n. 今天；如今，当今
example: I have a piano lesson today.
exampleChinese: 我今天有一节钢琴课。

meaning: n. 西红柿，番茄
example: She put a sliced tomato on the sandwich.
exampleChinese: 她在三明治里放了一片番茄。

meaning: adv. 在明天 n. 明天；未来
example: Tomorrow is my brother's birthday.
exampleChinese: 明天是我弟弟的生日。

meaning: n. 吨；⼤量
example: The truck can carry one ton of sand.
exampleChinese: 这辆卡车可以运载一吨沙子。

meaning: adv. 在今晚，在今夜 n. 今晚，今夜
example: We will watch a movie tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们今晚要看电影。

meaning: adv. 太，过于；也；很，⼗分
example: This bag is too heavy for me.
exampleChinese: 这个包对我来说太重了。

meaning: n. 树
example: A tall tree stands by the road.
exampleChinese: 路边立着一棵高树。

meaning: n. 问题，苦恼；疾病；故障；困境 n. ⿇烦；动乱 vt. 使烦恼；劳驾，⿇烦；使疼痛 vi. 费神，费事，费⼒
example: If you lie again, you will be in trouble.
exampleChinese: 如果你再说谎，你就会有麻烦。

meaning: n. 星期⼆
example: We have art class on Tuesday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期二有美术课。

meaning: n. 电视
example: I watched TV after dinner.
exampleChinese: 我晚饭后看了电视。

meaning: num. ⼗⼆
example: There are twelve eggs in the box.
exampleChinese: 盒子里有十二个鸡蛋。

meaning: num. ⼆⼗ n. ⼆⼗年代
example: The class has twenty students.
exampleChinese: 这个班有二十名学生。

meaning: adv. 两次；两倍
example: I have visited Beijing twice.
exampleChinese: 我去过北京两次。

meaning: num. ⼆
example: Two students answered the question correctly.
exampleChinese: 两名学生正确回答了这个问题。

meaning: n. 叔叔，伯伯，舅舅，姑⽗，姨⽗
example: My uncle drives a bus in the city.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔在城里开公交车。

meaning: prep. 在…下⾯；少于 prep. 根据；在…过程中 adv. 在下⾯；在⽔下；少于；在昏迷 adj. 较低的，下⾯的
example: The cat is sleeping under the table.
exampleChinese: 猫正在桌子下面睡觉。

meaning: n. ⼤学
example: My sister wants to study medicine at university.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐想在大学学习医学。

meaning: conj. 除⾮…，如果不…
example: You will miss the bus unless you hurry.
exampleChinese: 除非你快点，否则你会错过公交车。

meaning: adv. 向上，在上；加⼤，增⾼；发⽣ prep. 向 (⾼处)；沿着；向…上游 adj. 向上的；⾼兴的；在运⾏的 vt. 提⾼
example: Please stand up when the teacher comes in.
exampleChinese: 老师进来时请站起来。

meaning: pron. 我们
example: The teacher gave us more time.
exampleChinese: 老师多给了我们一些时间。

meaning: vt. 使⽤，利⽤；消耗 vt. vi. 吸 (毒) n. 使⽤，利⽤；⽤途；使⽤权
example: We use this room for music class.
exampleChinese: 我们用这个房间上音乐课。

meaning: adj. 通常的，平常的，惯常的 n. 通常会发⽣的事；(常点的) 酒
example: He took his usual seat by the window.
exampleChinese: 他坐在窗边那个惯常的位置。

meaning: adv. 通常地，惯常地
example: We usually eat dinner at six.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在六点吃晚饭。

meaning: adv. 很，⾮常；完全，最，正是 adj. 正是的，恰好的 (加强语⽓)
example: This is the very book I wanted.
exampleChinese: 这正是我想要的那本书。

meaning: n. 醋
example: Add a little vinegar to the salad.
exampleChinese: 在沙拉里加一点醋。

meaning: n. ⼩提琴
example: My sister plays the violin every day.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐每天拉小提琴。

meaning: n. 排球 (运动)
example: We played volleyball after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后打了排球。

meaning: n. 战争；竞争；⻓期⽃争
example: Many families suffered during the war.
exampleChinese: 许多家庭在战争期间受了苦。

meaning: n. ⽔；⽔域；⽔⾯；领海 vt. 灌溉；给…⽔喝；给…供⽔ vi. 充满眼泪；流⼝⽔
example: Please water the plants every two days.
exampleChinese: 请每两天给这些植物浇一次水。

meaning: pron. 我们
example: We have a math test this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上我们有一场数学考试。

meaning: n. 天⽓；⽓象预报 vi. vt. (受⻛吹⾬打⽽) 褪⾊，变形 vt. 平安地渡过 (难关)
example: The weather is warm and sunny today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气温暖又晴朗。

meaning: n. 星期三
example: We have a music class on Wednesday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期三有一节音乐课。

meaning: n. 周，星期
example: I visit my grandparents every week.
exampleChinese: 我每周都去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: n. 周末 vi. 过周末
example: We will visit my grandparents this weekend.
exampleChinese: 这个周末我们要去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: int. vi. vt. 欢迎 vt. 乐意接纳，欣然接受 adj. 受欢迎的 n. 迎接，欢迎
example: Your ideas are always welcome here.
exampleChinese: 你的想法在这里总是受欢迎的。

meaning: adv. 好，对；彻底地；很 int. 哎呀，好啦 adj. 健康的；状态良好的 n. ⽔井；油井
example: She sings well even without a microphone.
exampleChinese: 即使没有麦克风，她也唱得很好。

meaning: pron. det. 什么；…的事物；多么
example: What is your favorite subject?
exampleChinese: 你最喜欢的科目是什么？

meaning: adv. 丝毫，任何
example: She was not afraid whatsoever.
exampleChinese: 她丝毫不害怕。

meaning: adv. pron. 什么时候 conj. 在…时；既然；虽然
example: Tell me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家时告诉我。

meaning: adv. conj. 在哪⾥；在那个地⽅
example: Do you know where my glasses are?
exampleChinese: 你知道我的眼镜在哪里吗？

meaning: pron. det. 哪⼀个，哪些；…的那个
example: Which book do you want to borrow?
exampleChinese: 你想借哪一本书？

meaning: pron. 谁
example: Who left this bag on the chair?
exampleChinese: 谁把这个包放在椅子上了？

meaning: pron. 谁，什么⼈
example: To whom did you send the email?
exampleChinese: 你把这封电子邮件发给谁了？

meaning: det. pron. 谁的
example: Whose bag is on the chair?
exampleChinese: 椅子上的包是谁的？

meaning: adv. conj. 为什么
example: Why are you crying outside the classroom?
exampleChinese: 你为什么在教室外面哭？

meaning: n. 妻⼦，太太
example: His wife works at a hospital.
exampleChinese: 他的妻子在一家医院工作。

meaning: modal. 将会；愿意；请…好吗 n. 意志；意愿；遗嘱 vt. ⽴定志向；⽴遗嘱赠与 vi. 想要，希望
example: I will finish my homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我会在晚饭前完成作业。

meaning: n. 窗⼾；橱窗；窗⼝；(⽇程) 空当
example: Please close the window.
exampleChinese: 请把窗户关上。

meaning: n. 葡萄酒；果蔬酒
example: My parents bought a bottle of wine for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我父母买了一瓶葡萄酒配晚餐。

meaning: n. 冬天 vi. 过冬
example: Winter is very cold here.
exampleChinese: 这里的冬季很冷。

meaning: vt. vi. 希望；祝愿 n. 愿望；(书信中的) 祝福
example: I wish you a happy birthday.
exampleChinese: 祝你生日快乐。

meaning: prep. 和…⼀起；具有，带有；以，⽤
example: I went to the library with my brother.
exampleChinese: 我和哥哥一起去了图书馆。

meaning: prep. adv. 没有，⽆
example: He left without his umbrella.
exampleChinese: 他没带伞就离开了。

example: The woman at the desk helped me.
exampleChinese: 桌子旁的那位成年女子帮了我。

meaning: adj. 极好的，精彩的
example: We had a wonderful time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里玩得非常开心。

meaning: n. ⽊头，⽊材；树林，林⼦
example: This chair is made of wood.
exampleChinese: 这把椅子是木材做的。

meaning: n. 单词，字；话语；诺⾔；消息 vt. 措辞，⽤词
example: I looked up the word in a dictionary.
exampleChinese: 我在词典里查了这个单词。

meaning: n. 世界；界
example: People around the world watch the game.
exampleChinese: 世界各地的人都看这场比赛。

meaning: modal. 将，将会；想；但愿；⽼是
example: I would help if I had more time.
exampleChinese: 如果我有更多时间，我会帮忙的。

meaning: adj. 错误的；搞错的；有⽑病的 adv. 错误地，不正确地 n. 恶⾏；犯罪，罪恶 vt. 不公正地对待
example: The answer is wrong.
exampleChinese: 这个答案是错误的。

meaning: n. 年；⼀年时间；年岁；年级
example: This year feels very busy.
exampleChinese: 今年感觉很忙。

meaning: adj. ⻩⾊的；⻩⽪肤的 n. ⻩⾊ vi. vt. (使) 变⻩
example: The yellow flower stands out in the garden.
exampleChinese: 那朵黄色的花在花园里很显眼。

meaning: int. 是；好；对了 n. 表⽰同意的答复或⼈
example: She smiled and said yes.
exampleChinese: 她笑着说是的。

meaning: adv. 在昨天 n. 昨天；近⽇，往昔 adj. 过去的，过时的
example: Yesterday was rainy and cold.
exampleChinese: 昨天又下雨又冷。

meaning: pron. 你，你们
example: I will help you with your homework.
exampleChinese: 我会帮你做作业。

meaning: adj. 年轻的；年轻⼈的 n. 年轻⼈；幼崽，幼⻦
example: My teacher looks young and energetic.
exampleChinese: 我的老师看起来年轻又有活力。

meaning: det. 你的，你们的
example: Is this your backpack by the door?
exampleChinese: 门边这个背包是你的吗？

meaning: pron. 你的，你们的
example: This blue pen is yours.
exampleChinese: 这支蓝色钢笔是你的。

meaning: pron. 你⾃⼰
example: You should trust yourself more.
exampleChinese: 你应该更相信你自己。

meaning: n. 动物园
example: We saw pandas at the zoo.
exampleChinese: 我们在动物园看到了熊猫。

meaning: n. 王牌；佼佼者；擅长…的人 vt. 在考试中取得优异成绩，考得极好
example: He is the ace of the team.
exampleChinese: 他是队里的王牌。

meaning: n. 缩写，缩写形式
example: An abbreviation can save space in a text.
exampleChinese: 缩写可以节省文本空间。

meaning: vi. vt. 退位，逊位，让位 vt. 放弃 (责任)，失 (职)
example: The king chose to abdicate the throne.
exampleChinese: 国王选择退位。

meaning: n. 专制主义者，绝对主义者 adj. 专制主义的；绝对主义的
example: He was an absolutist who trusted no compromise.
exampleChinese: 他是一个不相信妥协的专制主义者。

meaning: n. 学术界
example: She works in academia and writes research papers.
exampleChinese: 她在学术界工作，并撰写研究论文。

meaning: n. 容易到达，⽅便进⼊；易得性
example: The app improves accessibility for older users.
exampleChinese: 这款应用提高了老年用户的可访问性。

meaning: n. 适应
example: Acclimation to the cold took a few days.
exampleChinese: 适应寒冷花了几天时间。

meaning: n. 有义务，有责任
example: The teacher stressed accountability in every group project.
exampleChinese: 老师强调每个小组项目都要有责任心。

meaning: vi. (利益等) 逐渐形成 vt. vi. 积累 (钱款或债务)
example: Savings can accrue interest over time.
exampleChinese: 储蓄会随着时间逐渐产生利息。

meaning: n. 指控，谴责
example: The police denied the false accusation.
exampleChinese: 警方否认了那项虚假的指控。

meaning: adj. 令⼈钦佩的，值得赞美的
example: Her help during the storm was admirable.
exampleChinese: 她在暴风雨中的帮助令人钦佩。

meaning: n. 装饰品，饰物
example: She wore a small gold adornment in her hair.
exampleChinese: 她在头发上戴着一件小小的金色饰品。

meaning: adj. 对⽴的，敌对的
example: Their debate turned into an adversarial exchange.
exampleChinese: 他们的辩论变成了一场对立的交锋。

meaning: adj. 顾问的，提供咨询的 n. 警报，警告，通告
example: We received an advisory about the storm.
exampleChinese: 我们收到了一则关于暴风雨的警告。

meaning: adj. 经济上周转得开的；漂浮的
example: The small bakery stayed afloat during the slow season.
exampleChinese: 这家小面包店在淡季仍然维持了运转。

meaning: n. 攻击性，好⽃；进取⼼，积极
example: Her aggressiveness on the field surprised the coach.
exampleChinese: 她在场上的进取心让教练感到惊讶。

meaning: adj. (动作) 敏捷的；(头脑) 机敏的
example: The agile cat jumped onto the shelf.
exampleChinese: 那只敏捷的猫跳上了架子。

meaning: adj. 在空中的；空⽓传播的；空降的
example: Dust from the fire was airborne for hours.
exampleChinese: 火灾扬起的灰尘在空中飘浮了好几个小时。

meaning: n. ⽓流
example: The room had good airflow from the open windows.
exampleChinese: 房间因为窗户打开而有良好的气流。

meaning: adj. 通⻛的；漫不经⼼的
example: The house felt airy and bright.
exampleChinese: 这座房子感觉通风而明亮。

meaning: adj. 近似的，类似的
example: Her idea is akin to my own plan.
exampleChinese: 她的想法和我的计划很相似。

meaning: adv. 令⼈担⼼地，令⼈惊恐地
example: He was alarmingly pale after the long run.
exampleChinese: 长跑后，他的脸色令人担心地苍白。

meaning: vt. 减轻 (尤指情绪)
example: A few kind words helped allay her fear.
exampleChinese: 几句安慰的话减轻了她的恐惧。

meaning: n. 断⾔，指控
example: The manager rejected the allegation immediately.
exampleChinese: 经理立即驳斥了那项指控。

meaning: vt. 分配，摊派 (时间，钱等)
example: The coach will allot ten minutes for questions.
exampleChinese: 教练会分配十分钟来回答问题。

meaning: vi. 间接提到，暗指，影射
example: He tried to allude to the problem without naming it.
exampleChinese: 他试图在不点名的情况下暗指那个问题。

meaning: adj. 利他主义的，⽆私的
example: Her altruistic actions helped many people.
exampleChinese: 她无私的行为帮助了很多人。

meaning: vt. 积累，⼤量收集
example: They amass enough data to support the report.
exampleChinese: 他们积累了足够的数据来支持这份报告。

meaning: n. 过时的⼈或事；年代误植
example: The time machine prop in the movie was an anachronism.
exampleChinese: 这部电影里的时间机器道具是一个年代误植。

meaning: n. 分析者，分析家；⼼理分析医⽣
example: The analyst explained the sales report in simple terms.
exampleChinese: 这位分析师用简单的话解释了销售报告。

meaning: n. 祖先，祖宗，世系，⾎统
example: She is proud of her ancestry and family traditions.
exampleChinese: 她为自己的祖先和家族传统感到自豪。

meaning: n. 动画；动画制作；⽣⽓，活⼒
example: The animation in the lesson made the science topic easier to understand.
exampleChinese: 课中的动画让这个科学话题更容易理解。

meaning: adj. 对抗的，敌对的，反对的
example: The two teams were antagonistic during the debate.
exampleChinese: 这两个小组在辩论中彼此对立。

meaning: n. 蚜⾍
example: The aphid covered the young rose leaves.
exampleChinese: 蚜虫爬满了玫瑰嫩叶。

meaning: vt. 平息，安抚；绥靖
example: A short walk can appease his bad mood.
exampleChinese: 散步一会儿能缓和他的坏情绪。

meaning: n. 申请⼈
example: Each applicant must fill out the form carefully.
exampleChinese: 每位申请人都必须认真填写表格。

meaning: adj. ⽔⽣的；⽔的，⽔上的
example: Penguins are aquatic birds that live near the sea.
exampleChinese: 企鹅是生活在海边的水生鸟类。

meaning: adj. 适于耕种的，可耕作的
example: The farm has rich arable land.
exampleChinese: 这座农场有肥沃的可耕地。

meaning: n. 权威⼈⼠，仲裁⼈，公断⼈
example: The judge acted as arbiter in the dispute.
exampleChinese: 法官在这场争端中充当了仲裁人。

meaning: adj. 考古学的，和考古有关的
example: We visited an archaeological site near the old city.
exampleChinese: 我们参观了古城附近的一处考古遗址。

meaning: n. 考古学家
example: An archaeologist found ancient pottery in the soil.
exampleChinese: 一位考古学家在土里发现了古代陶器。

meaning: adj. 贵族的
example: The hotel has an aristocratic style with tall columns.
exampleChinese: 这家酒店带有贵族式风格，还有高大的柱子。

meaning: n. 被逮捕者
example: The police officer spoke briefly with the arrestee.
exampleChinese: 警察和被逮捕者简短交谈了几句。

meaning: n. 艺术作品；(图书) 插图
example: Her artwork hung in the school library.
exampleChinese: 她的艺术作品挂在学校图书馆里。

meaning: adj. 不与⼈来往的，不合群的
example: He was so asocial that he never joined group games.
exampleChinese: 他非常不合群，从不参加集体游戏。

meaning: n. 断⾔，声明，主张
example: Her assertion was supported by clear facts.
exampleChinese: 她的断言得到了明确事实的支持。

meaning: vt. 缓和，减轻 (不快)
example: A kind teacher can assuage a student's fear.
exampleChinese: 一位和蔼的老师可以减轻学生的恐惧。

meaning: n. ⼩⾏星
example: The telescope spotted a small asteroid near Mars.
exampleChinese: 望远镜发现了火星附近的一颗小行星。

meaning: n. 哮喘
example: His asthma gets worse in cold weather.
exampleChinese: 他的哮喘在寒冷天气里会加重。

meaning: adj. 令⼈震惊的
example: The view from the mountain was astounding.
exampleChinese: 山上的景色令人震惊。

meaning: adj. 专⼼的，留意的；体贴的
example: Our teacher is always attentive in class.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师上课时总是很专心。

meaning: vi. vt. 证明，证实
example: The new evidence will attest to his honesty.
exampleChinese: 新的证据将证明他的诚实。

meaning: adj. 熟悉的，适应的，习惯的
example: She is attuned to the needs of young children.
exampleChinese: 她很熟悉并能适应幼儿的需要。

meaning: vt. 证明…是真的，鉴定…的真实性
example: Experts can authenticate the old painting.
exampleChinese: 专家可以鉴定这幅古画的真实性。

meaning: n. ⾃传
example: He wrote an autobiography about his life as a doctor.
exampleChinese: 他写了一本关于自己医生生涯的自传。

meaning: vt. 使…⾃动化
example: The factory will automate the packing process.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂将使包装流程自动化。

meaning: n. 雪崩
example: A sudden avalanche covered the road with snow.
exampleChinese: 一场突如其来的雪崩把道路埋在了雪下。

meaning: adj. 前卫的，激进的，先锋派的
example: The museum displayed an avant-garde sculpture.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆展出了一座前卫的雕塑。

meaning: adj. 不喜欢的，反对做的
example: He is averse to loud music.
exampleChinese: 他不喜欢吵闹的音乐。

meaning: n. 厌恶，讨厌，反感
example: She feels an aversion to smoking.
exampleChinese: 她对吸烟感到反感。

meaning: n. 背景幕布；周围景物；背景
example: The mountains formed a beautiful backdrop for the house.
exampleChinese: 群山为这所房子构成了美丽的背景。

meaning: n. 积压待办的事务
example: The office has a backlog of unfinished work.
exampleChinese: 办公室里积压了许多未完成的工作。

meaning: n. 后院
example: The children played in the backyard after dinner.
exampleChinese: 孩子们晚饭后在后院玩耍。

meaning: n. 栏杆柱
example: A wooden baluster broke on the old stairs.
exampleChinese: 旧楼梯上的一个木栏杆柱断了。

meaning: n. 银⾏业务，银⾏业
example: She works in banking and handles loans.
exampleChinese: 她在银行业工作，负责贷款业务。

meaning: n. 灯塔；⽆线电信标；烽⽕
example: The lighthouse served as a beacon in the storm.
exampleChinese: 灯塔在暴风雨中像一座明灯。

meaning: vt. 美化，使更美
example: They will beautify the park with new flowers.
exampleChinese: 他们将用新花美化公园。

meaning: vt. 和…交朋友，友好对待
example: The family decided to befriend the shy new student.
exampleChinese: 这家人决定和那个害羞的新同学交朋友。

meaning: adj. ⾏为的，⾏为研究的
example: The study looked at behavioral changes in teenagers.
exampleChinese: 这项研究考察了青少年的行为变化。

meaning: n. 捐助者，赞助⼈
example: The school library thanked its benefactor for the new books.
exampleChinese: 学校图书馆感谢那位捐助者送来的新书。

meaning: adj. 有偏⻅的，偏袒的；有偏重的
example: We should not be biased when we judge other people's ideas.
exampleChinese: 当我们评判别人的想法时，不应该有偏见。

meaning: n. ⼤幅⼴告牌
example: A bright billboard advertised the new movie near the highway.
exampleChinese: 高速公路附近的一块醒目大幅广告牌宣传这部新电影。

meaning: n. 传记作者
example: The biographer spent months researching the writer's life.
exampleChinese: 这位传记作者花了几个月研究那位作家的生平。

meaning: adj. ⽣物的；⽣物性的；亲⽣的
example: The doctor explained the biological changes in the body.
exampleChinese: 医生解释了人体的生物变化。

meaning: n. ⽣物学家，⽣物学者
example: The biologist studied insects under a microscope.
exampleChinese: 这位生物学家在显微镜下研究昆虫。

meaning: adj. ⽣物医学的
example: The hospital bought new biomedical equipment.
exampleChinese: 这家医院购买了新的生物医学设备。

meaning: n. ⼈类亲近⼤⾃然的天性
example: Her biophilia made her happiest in a garden.
exampleChinese: 她热爱大自然的天性让她在花园里最开心。

meaning: n. ⽣物技术，⽣物科技
example: Biotech can help farmers grow stronger crops.
exampleChinese: 生物技术可以帮助农民种出更健壮的作物。

meaning: adj. ⽣物的，⽣命的
example: The pond has a rich biotic environment.
exampleChinese: 这个池塘拥有丰富的生物环境。

meaning: n. 与⽣俱来的权利，基本⼈权
example: Education is a basic birthright for every child.
exampleChinese: 受教育是每个孩子与生俱来的基本权利。

meaning: n. 野⽜
example: A bison crossed the road in the national park.
exampleChinese: 一头野牛穿过了国家公园的道路。

meaning: n. 铁匠
example: The blacksmith shaped the hot metal with a hammer.
exampleChinese: 铁匠用锤子锻打滚烫的金属。

meaning: n. 幸事，好事；上帝的保佑；赞同
example: It was a blessing to have warm food on a cold night.
exampleChinese: 寒冷的夜晚能吃上热饭真是一件幸事。

meaning: n. ⾎液，⾎流
example: The medicine entered his bloodstream quickly.
exampleChinese: 药物很快进入了他的血液。

meaning: adj. ⾝体的，⼈体的 adv. 全⾝地，移动全⾝地
example: He made a bodily turn to avoid the ball.
exampleChinese: 他全身一转，躲开了球。

meaning: n. 华⽽不实的⾔辞，⼤话
example: The speech was full of bombast but little real meaning.
exampleChinese: 这篇演讲充满了华而不实的大话，却没什么真正的内容。

meaning: n. 傻⽠；鲣⻦
example: Don't act like a booby and forget your keys again.
exampleChinese: 别再像个傻瓜一样，把钥匙又忘了。

meaning: adj. 中产阶级的；世俗的；资本家的 n. 中产阶级
example: The bourgeois family valued comfort and routine.
exampleChinese: 那个中产阶级家庭重视舒适和日常规律。

meaning: n. 品牌创建
example: Good branding can make a small shop easy to remember.
exampleChinese: 好的品牌创建可以让一家小店更容易被记住。

meaning: n. 宽度；⼴泛，⼴度
example: The breadth of the river made it hard to cross.
exampleChinese: 这条河的宽度使人很难渡过。

meaning: n. 突破，重⼤进展 adj. 突破性的，取得重⼤成功的
example: The new battery was a major breakthrough.
exampleChinese: 这块新电池是一次重大突破。

meaning: n. (容器的) 边，沿；帽檐 vi. 盛满 (液体)，充满 (容器)
example: The cup was filled to the brim with water.
exampleChinese: 杯子里的水装到了边沿。

meaning: n. 宽带
example: We use broadband to download videos quickly.
exampleChinese: 我们用宽带快速下载视频。

meaning: n. 西兰花
example: My sister added broccoli to the soup.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐在汤里加了西兰花。

meaning: n. ⼩溪，⼩河 vt. 容许，容忍
example: The small brook ran behind our school.
exampleChinese: 那条小溪流经我们学校后面。

meaning: n. (⼀) 美元；雄⿅，公兔；⼩伙⼦ vt. 抵制，反抗 vi. (⻢) ⼸背四蹄跳起
example: He can buck the old habit and start again.
exampleChinese: 他可以反抗旧习惯，重新开始。

meaning: n. 佛教徒 adj. 佛教的
example: The Buddhist monk spoke quietly to the visitors.
exampleChinese: 那位佛教徒僧人安静地对游客们说话。

meaning: n. ⼩阉⽜
example: The farmer led the bullock back to the field.
exampleChinese: 农夫把小阉牛赶回了田里。

meaning: adj. 负担沉重的，累赘的
example: The work felt burdensome after a long day.
exampleChinese: 经过漫长的一天后，这项工作让人觉得负担很重。

meaning: vt. 打碎；突击搜捕 n. 半⾝像；胸部；萧条期；搜捕 adj. 破碎的，毁坏的；破产的
example: He bust the toy by accident.
exampleChinese: 他不小心把玩具打碎了。

meaning: n. 时髦⽤语，流⾏术语
example: The teacher used a new buzzword in class.
exampleChinese: 老师在课堂上用了一个新的时髦用语。

meaning: n. 副产品；意外收获，附带的结果
example: The soup was a by-product of making chicken stock.
exampleChinese: 这锅汤是熬鸡汤时的副产品。

meaning: n. 咏礼司铎；准则；真作；卡农
example: This rule is part of the canon of the school.
exampleChinese: 这条规则属于学校的准则。

meaning: n. 旅⾏拖⻋；⼤篷⻋；旅⾏队
example: The caravan stopped near the desert camp.
exampleChinese: 大篷车队停在了沙漠营地附近。

meaning: n. 动物⼫体；(⻋辆、建筑等的) 残骸
example: The carcase of the old bus was still in the yard.
exampleChinese: 那辆旧公交车的残骸还在院子里。

meaning: n. 护理员
example: The caregiver checked on the patient every hour.
exampleChinese: 护理员每小时都去查看病人。

meaning: n. ⼩瀑布；倾泻的东西；⼀连串事 vi. 倾泻⽽下，⼤量垂下
example: Water will cascade down the rocks after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后，水会从岩石上倾泻而下。

meaning: n. ⼩⼼，谨慎
example: Her cautiousness helped her avoid a mistake.
exampleChinese: 她的谨慎帮助她避免了错误。

meaning: n. 警告，告诫
example: The warning came with a caveat about the deadline.
exampleChinese: 这份提醒附带了一个关于截止日期的警告。

meaning: n. 㬵⽚
example: The old film was made on celluloid.
exampleChinese: 这部老电影是用胶片拍摄的。

meaning: adj. 仪式的，礼节的
example: The ceremony had a very ceremonial tone.
exampleChinese: 这场仪式带有很强的礼仪感。

meaning: n. ⼩教堂，⼩礼拜堂
example: We lit candles in the small chapel.
exampleChinese: 我们在那座小教堂里点了蜡烛。

meaning: n. (古代的) 双轮敞篷⻢⻋
example: The old chariot rolled slowly across the field.
exampleChinese: 那辆古老的双轮敞篷马车慢慢驶过田野。

meaning: vi. 喋喋不休；(⽛) 打颤；鸣叫 n. 唠叨的话；鸣叫声，啼啭声
example: The baby began to chatter before bedtime.
exampleChinese: 宝宝睡前开始喋喋不休地说话。

meaning: adj. ⽆⼦⼥的，⽆后代的
example: They lived a childless life in the city.
exampleChinese: 他们在这座城市里过着无子女的生活。

meaning: n. 恐怖电影，恐怖⼩说；冷却器
example: She watched a chiller late at night.
exampleChinese: 她深夜看了一部恐怖电影。

meaning: adj. 挑剔的，过分讲究的
example: My sister is choosy about her shoes.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹对鞋子很挑剔。

meaning: n. 编年史 vt. 按时间顺序记事
example: The teacher will chronicle the class trip in a journal.
exampleChinese: 老师会按时间顺序记录这次班级旅行。

meaning: adj. 厚重的；⼤块的；壮实的
example: He wore a chunky sweater in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天他穿了一件厚厚的毛衣。

meaning: n. 公⺠⾝份，国籍；公⺠义务
example: Citizenship gives you both rights and duties.
exampleChinese: 公民身份既赋予你权利，也要求你承担义务。

meaning: n. 要求者，索赔⼈
example: The claimant waited for the court decision.
exampleChinese: 索赔人等待着法院的裁决。

meaning: vt. vi. 紧紧抓住，被抓住，被夹紧 vt. 夹紧，固定；⽤夹锁锁住 n. 夹具，夹⼦
example: Please clamp the board to the table.
exampleChinese: 请把木板夹紧在桌子上。

meaning: adj. 明确的，易辨识的
example: The rules are clear-cut and easy to follow.
exampleChinese: 这些规则很明确，也很容易遵守。

meaning: n. 影响⼒，势⼒；重击 vt. 重击
example: The team has real clout in the league.
exampleChinese: 这支队伍在联赛中很有影响力。

meaning: vt. 劝诱，哄劝
example: She tried to coax the cat out from under the bed.
exampleChinese: 她试着哄猫从床底下出来。

meaning: vt. 把…编成法典
example: The school will codify its safety rules.
exampleChinese: 学校会把安全规则编成正式条例。

meaning: n. 共存，和平共处
example: Peaceful coexistence is important in a diverse society.
exampleChinese: 在多元社会中，和平共处很重要。

meaning: adj. 合作的，协作的
example: We worked on a collaborative project in class.
exampleChinese: 我们在课堂上做了一个合作项目。

meaning: n. 承诺；献⾝，投⼊；义务
example: Her hard work showed great commitment to the team.
exampleChinese: 她的努力体现了对团队的坚定承诺。

meaning: n. 共同特点，共性，共通性
example: The two songs share a commonality in rhythm.
exampleChinese: 这两首歌在节奏上有一个共同点。

meaning: adj. 共⽤的；(集体中) 不同群体的
example: The dorm has a communal kitchen.
exampleChinese: 这间宿舍有一个共用厨房。

meaning: adv. 相对地，⽐较地
example: The weather is comparatively warm today.
exampleChinese: 今天的天气相对比较暖和。

meaning: n. 能⼒，才⼲；技能
example: Her competence made her the best choice for the job.
exampleChinese: 她的能力让她成为这份工作的最佳人选。

meaning: n. 作曲家
example: The composer wrote a song for the school concert.
exampleChinese: 这位作曲家为学校音乐会写了一首歌。

meaning: n. 沉着，镇定
example: She kept her composure during the difficult interview.
exampleChinese: 她在这次艰难的面试中保持了镇定。

meaning: adj. ⾃负的，骄傲⾃满的
example: His conceited smile annoyed everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 他那自负的笑容惹恼了房间里的每个人。

meaning: adv. 可能地，可以想象地
example: It is conceivably possible to finish the project today.
exampleChinese: 今天把这个项目完成，可能是可以想象的。

meaning: vi. vt. (与某⼈) 意⻅⼀致，同意
example: I concur with your plan to start early.
exampleChinese: 我同意你们早点开始的计划。

meaning: n. 知⼰，密友
example: She told her deepest secret to her confidant.
exampleChinese: 她把最深的秘密告诉了她的知己。

meaning: n. 企业集团；聚集物；砾岩
example: The conglomerate owns several airlines and hotels.
exampleChinese: 这家企业集团拥有几家航空公司和酒店。

meaning: adj. 代表⼤会的，国会的
example: The congressional hearing lasted all morning.
exampleChinese: 这场国会听证会持续了整个上午。

meaning: vi. 密谋，图谋；导致，造成
example: The two workers conspire to steal the keys.
exampleChinese: 那两个工人密谋偷走钥匙。

meaning: n. 警察，警员
example: A constable helped the lost child find her mother.
exampleChinese: 一名警员帮迷路的孩子找到了她的母亲。

meaning: n. 稳定性，持久不变；忠诚，忠贞
example: Her constancy made her a trusted friend.
exampleChinese: 她的忠贞使她成了一位值得信赖的朋友。

meaning: adv. 持续不断地，经常地
example: He is constantly checking his phone.
exampleChinese: 他一直不停地看手机。

meaning: adj. 宪法的，章程的；宪法允许的 n. 健⾝散步
example: The constitutional rule protects free speech.
exampleChinese: 这项宪法规定保护言论自由。

meaning: n. 符合宪法，合宪性
example: The court will review the constitutionality of the law.
exampleChinese: 法院将审查这项法律是否合宪。

meaning: n. 限制，束缚；⾏为约束
example: Loud noise can be a constraint on study time.
exampleChinese: 大声噪音会对学习时间形成一种限制。

meaning: n. 争执，争论；看法，观点
example: There is some contention about the best answer.
exampleChinese: 关于最佳答案有一些争论。

meaning: adv. 持续地，不停地
example: She continually asks questions in class.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上不停地提问。

meaning: n. 连续性；(电影等的) 镜头衔接
example: The editor checked the continuity of the story.
exampleChinese: 编辑检查了这个故事的连续性。

meaning: adj. 促成的，促进的，起作⽤的
example: Good sleep is contributory to better focus.
exampleChinese: 良好的睡眠有助于更好地集中注意力。

meaning: adj. 可管理的，可操纵的，可控制的
example: This bike is controllable even for a beginner.
exampleChinese: 这辆自行车即使对初学者来说也容易控制。

meaning: adj. ⼤量的，丰富的
example: The garden produced copious tomatoes this summer.
exampleChinese: 这个花园今年夏天结出了大量的西红柿。

meaning: n. 腐败，受贿；堕落，道德败坏
example: The report exposed corruption in the city office.
exampleChinese: 这份报告揭露了市政府办公室里的腐败。

meaning: n. 宇宙
example: Scientists study the cosmos to learn how the universe began.
exampleChinese: 科学家研究宇宙，以了解宇宙是如何起源的。

meaning: vt. 抵制，抵消，抵抗
example: These filters can counteract the bad smell in the room.
exampleChinese: 这些过滤器可以抵消房间里的异味。

meaning: vt. 使…平衡，抗衡，抵消 n. 平衡⼒，抗衡⼒
example: A heavy box can counterbalance the weight on the other side.
exampleChinese: 一个沉重的盒子可以平衡另一边的重量。

meaning: adj. 勇敢的，⽆畏的
example: She gave a courageous answer in front of the crowd.
exampleChinese: 她在众人面前给出了勇敢的回答。

meaning: n. 求爱期，恋爱期；求偶
example: Their courtship lasted two years before they got married.
exampleChinese: 他们的恋爱期持续了两年才结婚。

meaning: n. ⼀时的狂热，⻛⾏
example: The new phone became a craze among teenagers.
exampleChinese: 这款新手机在青少年中一度风靡一时。

meaning: adj. 可信的，可靠的；可接受的
example: Her explanation sounded credible and clear.
exampleChinese: 她的解释听起来可信而清楚。

meaning: n. ⼩溪，⼩河；⼩海湾
example: We crossed the creek on a small wooden bridge.
exampleChinese: 我们从一座小木桥上穿过小溪。

meaning: n. 评论，评论⽂章 vt. 对…发表评论，批判
example: The teacher wrote a short critique of the essay.
exampleChinese: 老师给这篇文章写了一篇简短的评论。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 粉碎，(使) 破裂 vi. 崩塌，破裂；衰落，崩溃
example: The old cookie will crumble if you touch it.
exampleChinese: 这块旧饼干一碰就会碎。

meaning: n. 关键，难点，症结
example: The crux of the problem is poor communication.
exampleChinese: 问题的症结在于沟通不畅。

meaning: n. 隔间
example: He worked in a small cubicle near the window.
exampleChinese: 他在窗边的一个小隔间里工作。

meaning: adj. 烹饪的，⻝物的
example: We learned some culinary skills in home economics class.
exampleChinese: 我们在家政课上学了一些烹饪技巧。

meaning: adj. ⽂化的；与⽂艺有关的
example: The museum hosts many cultural events each year.
exampleChinese: 这座博物馆每年举办许多文化活动。

meaning: n. 万灵药，灵丹妙药
example: This medicine is no cure-all for every illness.
exampleChinese: 这种药不是治疗所有疾病的万灵药。

meaning: adj. 粗略的，仓促的
example: She gave only a cursory look at the map.
exampleChinese: 她只是粗略地看了一眼地图。

meaning: adj. 可爱的；性感的；抖机灵的
example: That puppy looks so cute in the basket.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗待在篮子里看起来真可爱。

meaning: n. 餐具；⼑具
example: Please put the cutlery on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把餐具放到桌子上。

meaning: n. 愤世嫉俗的⼈，认为⼈皆⾃私者
example: A cynic thinks people are kind only when it helps them.
exampleChinese: 愤世嫉俗的人认为，人们只有在对自己有利时才会善良。

meaning: vt. 减弱，抑制 (热情等)；弄湿
example: Heavy rain can dampen the outdoor picnic.
exampleChinese: 大雨会弄湿户外野餐。

meaning: adv. 耀眼地；令⼈赞叹地
example: The stage lights shone dazzlingly in the dark hall.
exampleChinese: 舞台灯光在黑暗的大厅里耀眼地闪着。

meaning: n. 缺乏，缺少，不⾜
example: There is a dearth of fresh water in this area.
exampleChinese: 这个地区缺少淡水。

meaning: n. 欺骗，受骗；诡计，骗局
example: Her smile hid a deception that fooled everyone.
exampleChinese: 她的微笑掩盖了一个骗过所有人的骗局。

meaning: n. 毁灭，⼤量杀戮，⼤幅削减
example: The storm caused the decimation of the small village.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴几乎摧毁了那个小村庄。

meaning: vt. vi. 慷慨陈词，⾼声朗诵
example: He will declaim his speech with great passion.
exampleChinese: 他将满怀激情地慷慨陈词。

meaning: n. 装饰品；装饰⻛格；勋章
example: We put up bright decoration for the party.
exampleChinese: 我们为派对挂上了鲜艳的装饰。

meaning: adj. 根深蒂固的，难以改变的
example: He has a deep-seated fear of speaking in public.
exampleChinese: 他对公开演讲有根深蒂固的恐惧。

meaning: vt. 诬蔑，诽谤，中伤
example: Do not defame a person without any proof.
exampleChinese: 没有任何证据时，不要诽谤别人。

meaning: n. 被告
example: The defendant denied all the charges in court.
exampleChinese: 被告在法庭上否认了所有指控。

meaning: adj. 合乎情理的；可防御的
example: Your reason for leaving early is defensible.
exampleChinese: 你提前离开的理由是合乎情理的。

meaning: vt. 有辱…的⼈格；使恶化 vi. vt. (使) 降解
example: Constant stress can degrade your health over time.
exampleChinese: 持续的压力会让你的健康随着时间恶化。

meaning: n. 错觉，谬⻅；妄想，幻想
example: It is a delusion to think you can finish it in one minute.
exampleChinese: 认为你能在一分钟内完成它是一种错觉。

meaning: n. ⺠主党党员；⺠主⼈⼠
example: The democrat spoke about education and jobs.
exampleChinese: 这位民主党党员谈到了教育和就业。

meaning: n. 摧毁，拆除；完胜
example: The old building faced demolition next month.
exampleChinese: 这座旧建筑下个月将被拆除。

meaning: n. ⽰威游⾏；演⽰；证明，说明
example: The teacher gave a clear demonstration of the experiment.
exampleChinese: 老师对这个实验做了清楚的演示。

meaning: n. 泄⽓，⼠⽓低落
example: The team felt deep demoralization after the loss.
exampleChinese: 失利后，这支队伍感到非常士气低落。

meaning: n. 依赖；瘾；附属国
example: Too much screen time can create dependency on your phone.
exampleChinese: 过多的屏幕时间会让你对手机产生依赖。

meaning: n. 掠夺，劫掠，破坏
example: The depredation of the forest harmed many animals.
exampleChinese: 对森林的掠夺破坏了许多动物的家园。

meaning: n. 设计师，设计者 adj. 由著名设计师设计的
example: The designer made a beautiful chair for the living room.
exampleChinese: 这位设计师为客厅设计了一把漂亮的椅子。

meaning: adj. 有危害的，不利的
example: Smoking is detrimental to your lungs.
exampleChinese: 吸烟对你的肺有害。

meaning: n. 勤奋，勤勉
example: Her diligence helped her finish the project early.
exampleChinese: 她的勤奋帮助她提前完成了这个项目。

meaning: adj. …维的，…维度的
example: The model shows a dimensional shape with four sides.
exampleChinese: 这个模型展示了一个四边的维度形状。

meaning: n. 外交；⼿腕，⼿段，策略
example: The manager used diplomacy to solve the conflict.
exampleChinese: 经理用外交手腕解决了这场冲突。

meaning: adj. 极其严重的，危急的；极糟的
example: The weather report gave a dire warning.
exampleChinese: 天气预报发出了极其严重的警告。

meaning: n. 不赞同，反对
example: The teacher showed disapproval of the noisy behavior.
exampleChinese: 老师对这种吵闹的行为表示不赞同。

meaning: n. 不信，怀疑
example: She stared in disbelief at the final score.
exampleChinese: 她不敢相信地盯着最终比分。

meaning: vt. 使不安，使困惑
example: His sudden question can disconcert even confident speakers.
exampleChinese: 他突如其来的问题甚至会使自信的发言者感到不安。

meaning: vt. 终⽌，中断；停⽌ (⽣产)
example: The company will discontinue the old software next month.
exampleChinese: 公司将于下个月停止旧软件的销售。

meaning: n. 耻辱，丢脸 vt. 使蒙受耻辱；违背，违反
example: He refused to dishonor his promise.
exampleChinese: 他拒绝违背自己的诺言。

meaning: vt. 给…消毒；给(计算机)杀毒
example: Please disinfect the cut before you bandage it.
exampleChinese: 请在包扎前给伤口消毒。

meaning: adj. 忧郁的，凄凉的；差劲的
example: The room looked dismal on a cold, rainy day.
exampleChinese: 在寒冷多雨的日子里，这个房间看起来很凄凉。

meaning: n. (尤指不公正的) 不同，差异
example: There was a huge disparity between the two incomes.
exampleChinese: 这两种收入之间存在巨大的差异。

meaning: adj. ⼀次性的；可⾃由⽀配的 n. ⼀次性⽤品
example: Use a disposable cup for the picnic.
exampleChinese: 野餐时用一次性杯子。

meaning: vt. 不理会，不顾，忽视 n. 忽视，轻视
example: We should disregard the rumor until we know the facts.
exampleChinese: 在知道事实之前，我们不应理会这个谣言。

meaning: adj. 破坏性的，制造混乱的，捣乱的
example: Loud music can be disruptive in a library.
exampleChinese: 在图书馆里，响亮的音乐会造成干扰。

meaning: n. 不满意
example: She expressed her dissatisfaction with the meal.
exampleChinese: 她表达了对这顿饭的不满意。

meaning: n. 多样性；各种各样的⼈或事
example: The city is known for its cultural diversity.
exampleChinese: 这座城市以文化多样性而闻名。

meaning: adj. 博⼠的，博⼠学位的
example: He is working on his doctoral thesis.
exampleChinese: 他正在写博士论文。

meaning: n. 教条，教义，教理
example: The class discussed the dogma behind the rule.
exampleChinese: 全班讨论了这条规则背后的教条。

meaning: n. 优势，⽀配地位
example: The team gained dominance in the second half.
exampleChinese: 这支球队在下半场占据了优势。

meaning: adj. 休眠的，蛰伏的
example: The volcano stayed dormant for centuries.
exampleChinese: 这座火山休眠了几个世纪。

meaning: vt. 给…安装双层玻璃
example: They will double-glaze the old windows this winter.
exampleChinese: 他们今年冬天会给旧窗户安装双层玻璃。

meaning: adv. ⽆疑地，⼏乎肯定地
example: The train will doubtless arrive on time.
exampleChinese: 这列火车无疑会准时到达。

meaning: vt. 下载 n. 下载 (的⽂件)
example: I will download the app before class.
exampleChinese: 我会在上课前下载这个应用。

meaning: n. 缺点，不利⽅⾯
example: The downside of the job is the long commute.
exampleChinese: 这份工作的缺点是通勤时间很长。

meaning: n. (计算机的) 停机时间；休息
example: The server needs downtime for updates.
exampleChinese: 这台服务器需要停机时间来更新。

meaning: n. (商业经济的) 衰退，衰退期
example: A sudden downturn hurt local shops.
exampleChinese: 经济突然下滑伤害了当地商店。

meaning: n. 排⽔，排⽔系统
example: The new drainage system stopped the street from flooding.
exampleChinese: 新的排水系统阻止了这条街道被淹。

meaning: adv. 急剧地，剧烈地；戏剧性地
example: Her grades improved dramatically after she changed her study habits.
exampleChinese: 她改变学习习惯后，成绩急剧提高了。

meaning: adj. 拖得太久的，冗⻓的
example: The meeting was long and drawn-out.
exampleChinese: 这次会议又长又拖沓。

meaning: n. 辍学者
example: A dropout can still return to school later.
exampleChinese: 辍学者以后仍然可以重返学校。

meaning: vt. 将…戏称为；为…配⾳
example: They dub the tiny village “Sunshine Town.”.
exampleChinese: 他们戏称这个小村庄为“阳光小镇”。

meaning: n. (城堡⾥的) 地牢
example: The hero was trapped in a dungeon.
exampleChinese: 那位英雄被困在地牢里。

meaning: n. ⼆⼈组合，⼀对搭档
example: The duo sang beautifully on stage.
exampleChinese: 这对搭档在舞台上唱得很动听。

meaning: n. 热切，渴望，热⼼
example: She showed eagerness to learn new skills.
exampleChinese: 她表现出学习新技能的热切。

meaning: n. 经济学家
example: The economist explained why prices were rising.
exampleChinese: 这位经济学家解释了物价上涨的原因。

meaning: n. ⽣态系统
example: A healthy ecosystem depends on every living thing.
exampleChinese: 一个健康的生态系统依赖于每一种生物。

meaning: n. 教师，教育⼯作者；教育家
example: The educator gave the class a clear lesson.
exampleChinese: 这位教育家给全班上了一堂清晰的课。

meaning: adv. 有效地；实际上
example: We can solve the problem effectively with better planning.
exampleChinese: 我们可以通过更好的规划有效地解决这个问题。

meaning: n. 有效性，功效
example: The doctor checked the efficacy of the medicine.
exampleChinese: 医生检查了这种药的疗效。

meaning: n. 电⼦学；电⼦技术；电⼦设备
example: He studies electronics at school.
exampleChinese: 他在学校学习电子技术。

meaning: n. 海拔，⾼度；提拔，晋升，提升
example: The mountain town sits at a high elevation.
exampleChinese: 这个山镇位于很高的海拔。

meaning: n. 精英统治，精英主义
example: His criticism of elitism made the discussion more open.
exampleChinese: 他对精英主义的批评让讨论更加开放。

meaning: n. 某事物的化⾝ (体现)
example: The old bridge is the embodiment of the city's history.
exampleChinese: 这座旧桥是这座城市历史的化身。

meaning: n. 特使，密使
example: The president sent an emissary to discuss peace.
exampleChinese: 总统派了一名特使去讨论和平问题。

meaning: n. 排放物；(光、热等的) 排放
example: The factory must reduce its emission to protect the air.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂必须减少排放物以保护空气。

meaning: vt. 通过 (法案)；演出；使发⽣
example: The school will enact the new rule next term.
exampleChinese: 学校将在下学期实施这项新规定。

meaning: adv. 迷⼈地，令⼈陶醉地，使⼈喜悦地
example: She smiled enchantingly at the audience.
exampleChinese: 她对观众迷人地微笑。

meaning: vt. 危及，使处于险境
example: The broken fence can endanger the children.
exampleChinese: 这道破损的栅栏可能会危及孩子们。

meaning: vt. 产⽣，引起 ，导致
example: Fear can engender more fear in a crowd.
exampleChinese: 恐惧会在一群人中引发更多恐惧。

meaning: vt. 在…上雕刻
example: He can engrave his initials on the metal ring.
exampleChinese: 他可以把自己的姓名首字母刻在金属戒指上。

meaning: n. 难解之谜，费解的⼈
example: The old letter was an enigma to the researchers.
exampleChinese: 那封旧信对研究人员来说是个谜。

meaning: vt. 激怒，触怒
example: The loud noise can enrage the sleeping baby.
exampleChinese: 那刺耳的噪音会激怒正在睡觉的婴儿。

meaning: n. 随⾏⼈员，随从
example: The singer arrived with her entourage.
exampleChinese: 那位歌手带着她的随行人员来了。

meaning: adj. 令⼈羡慕的，引起忌妒的
example: She has an enviable job in a famous company.
exampleChinese: 她在一家著名公司有一份令人羡慕的工作。

meaning: vt. 设想，展望
example: We can envision a cleaner and safer city.
exampleChinese: 我们可以设想一个更清洁、更安全的城市。

meaning: n. 差事，跑腿
example: My errand was to buy milk for my grandma.
exampleChinese: 我的差事是给奶奶买牛奶。

meaning: adv. 本质上，根本上，基本上
example: The plan is essentially the same as before.
exampleChinese: 这个计划本质上和以前一样。

meaning: adj. 伦理的，道德的；合乎道德的
example: The teacher asked us to make an ethical choice.
exampleChinese: 老师要求我们做出合乎道德的选择。

meaning: n. 种族渊源，种族特点
example: The survey asked about age and ethnicity.
exampleChinese: 这项调查询问了年龄和种族背景。

meaning: n. 精神特质，道德思想
example: Teamwork is part of the school's ethos.
exampleChinese: 团队合作是这所学校的精神特质之一。

meaning: adj. 永久的，永恒的；没完没了的
example: They promised everlasting friendship.
exampleChinese: 他们承诺永恒的友谊。

meaning: vt. 使恶化，使加剧
example: Stress can exacerbate headaches and make sleep worse.
exampleChinese: 压力会使头痛加剧，并让睡眠变得更差。

meaning: n. 发掘，挖掘；挖掘现场
example: The excavation uncovered ancient pottery near the river.
exampleChinese: 这次发掘在河边发现了古代陶器。

meaning: adj. 排斥 (性) 的，排除在外的
example: The new rule felt exclusionary to students from small clubs.
exampleChinese: 这项新规定让小社团的学生感到被排斥在外。

meaning: adj. 典范的，可作榜样的
example: Her exemplary behavior set a good example for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 她典范的行为为全班树立了好榜样。

meaning: adj. 解释的，说明的
example: The teacher gave an explicatory note after the difficult lesson.
exampleChinese: 这位老师在难课后给出了一段解释性的说明。

meaning: n. 探索，勘探；研究，探究
example: Space exploration helps scientists learn more about our universe.
exampleChinese: 太空探索帮助科学家更多地了解我们的宇宙。

meaning: adj. 课外的；婚外的
example: He spends most of his time on extracurricular activities after school.
exampleChinese: 他放学后把大部分时间都花在课外活动上。

meaning: adv. 极其，特别地
example: The room was extraordinarily quiet during the final exam.
exampleChinese: 期末考试期间，这个房间安静得出奇。

meaning: adj. ⾯部的，脸上的 n. ⾯部护理
example: She booked a facial at the spa before the wedding.
exampleChinese: 她在婚礼前在水疗中心预约了美容。

meaning: n. 有趣消息；仿真陈述
example: The online rumor turned out to be a factoid, not a real fact.
exampleChinese: 网上的那条传闻原来只是个有趣消息，并不是真正的事实。

meaning: n. ⼀时的⻛尚，短暂的狂热
example: The toy became a fad among children for a few months.
exampleChinese: 这种玩具在孩子中间流行了一阵子。

meaning: n. 公正，公平，合理
example: Fairness matters when the teacher gives grades.
exampleChinese: 老师给分时，公平很重要。

meaning: n. 虚假；谎⾔；说谎
example: The article contained a falsehood about the accident.
exampleChinese: 那篇文章里有一条关于事故的虚假说法。

meaning: adj. 荒唐的，荒谬的，可笑的
example: The plan was so farcical that everyone laughed.
exampleChinese: 这个计划荒唐得让所有人都笑了。

meaning: adj. 很可怕的，⼗分吓⼈的
example: The fearsome dog barked loudly at the gate.
exampleChinese: 那只吓人的狗在大门口大声吠叫。

meaning: vt. 避开 vi. 照料，谋⽣
example: You can fend off insects with this spray.
exampleChinese: 你可以用这种喷雾避开蚊虫。

meaning: adj. 发烧的；狂热的，焦虑不安的
example: She looked feverish and needed to rest.
exampleChinese: 她看起来有点发烧，需要休息。

meaning: n. 存档；存档档案；锉屑
example: Please put the filing on my desk by noon.
exampleChinese: 请在中午前把存档文件放到我的桌上。

meaning: n. 健康；就某事⽽⾔的适合
example: Regular exercise improves fitness and energy.
exampleChinese: 经常锻炼能增强健康和精力。

meaning: n. 迷恋，痴迷；直视，注视；固定
example: His fixation on winning made him ignore his friends.
exampleChinese: 他对获胜的痴迷让他忽视了朋友。

meaning: n. 旗舰；旗舰产品，旗舰商店
example: The company opened its flagship store in the city center.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在市中心开了它的旗舰店。

meaning: n. 灵活性，可变性；柔韧性
example: The design offers more flexibility for different users.
exampleChinese: 这种设计为不同用户提供了更大的灵活性。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 快速翻转 vt. 弹，抛；按；迅速转售 vi. ⼗分⽓愤，异常激动，神志不清 n. 空翻，筋⽃
example: The gymnast will flip over the bar and land safely.
exampleChinese: 那名体操运动员将从单杠上翻过去，并安全落地。

meaning: n. 慌乱，慌张 vt. 使紧张，使慌乱
example: The noise can fluster even a confident speaker.
exampleChinese: 这种噪音甚至会让一个自信的演讲者慌乱。

meaning: n. 敌⼈，仇敌
example: The hero defeated his foe in the final battle.
exampleChinese: 英雄在最后的战斗中打败了他的敌人。

meaning: n. ⺠间传说，⺠俗
example: The village has many stories in its folklore.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄的民间传说很多。

meaning: n. 祖先，祖辈
example: Her forefather came to this country a century ago.
exampleChinese: 她的一位祖先一百年前来到这个国家。

meaning: n. 先⻅之明，预⻅，深谋远虑
example: He showed foresight by saving money for college.
exampleChinese: 他因为存钱上大学而表现出先见之明。

meaning: adj. 直率的，坦诚的
example: Please be forthright about what you think.
exampleChinese: 请直率地说出你的想法。

meaning: n. 创办⼈，创⽴者 vi. 失败；沉没
example: The old bridge began to founder in the storm.
exampleChinese: 那座老桥在暴风雨中开始下沉。

meaning: n. 筹划者，构想者；镶框者
example: The framer chose a dark wood frame for the photo.
exampleChinese: 那位镶框工人为这张照片选了一个深色木框。

meaning: n. (⾼中或⼤学的) ⼀年级学⽣
example: The freshman was nervous on the first day of school.
exampleChinese: 这名大一新生在开学第一天很紧张。

meaning: vt. 把…烫卷曲，把…烤焦
example: The sun can frizzle the grass in summer.
exampleChinese: 夏天太阳会把草烤焦。

meaning: adj. 节约的，节俭的；(饭菜) 简单的
example: We ate a frugal meal of rice and soup.
exampleChinese: 我们吃了一顿简单节俭的米饭和汤。

meaning: adv. 完全地，充分地；⾜⾜，⾄少
example: She studied fully before the exam.
exampleChinese: 她在考试前做了充分的复习。

meaning: n. 资⾦，拨款
example: The school received funding for new computers.
exampleChinese: 学校得到了购买新电脑的资金。

meaning: n. 停薪休假；(⼠兵) 休假；出狱假 vt. 准许…休假
example: The soldier was sent home on furlough.
exampleChinese: 这名士兵获准休假回家。

meaning: n. 未来学家
example: The futurologist predicted longer lives and smarter cars.
exampleChinese: 这位未来学家预测人们寿命会更长，汽车会更智能。

meaning: vi. ⽬瞪⼝呆地凝视；张开，裂开
example: The child began to gape at the giant dinosaur model.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子开始目瞪口呆地看着巨大的恐龙模型。

meaning: n. 看⻔⼈；把关者，把关系统
example: The gatekeeper checked our tickets at the entrance.
exampleChinese: 看门人在入口处检查了我们的票。

meaning: adj. 能⽣产的，有⽣产能⼒的
example: The generative model can create new images quickly.
exampleChinese: 这种生成式模型可以快速生成新图像。

meaning: adv. 与遗传有关地，从基因⽅⾯
example: The disease is genetically linked to the family.
exampleChinese: 这种疾病从遗传上与这个家族有关。

meaning: n. 遗传学家
example: The geneticist explained how a single gene can affect eye color.
exampleChinese: 这位遗传学家解释了单个基因如何影响眼睛颜色。

meaning: n. 基因组
example: Scientists mapped the genome of the new plant species.
exampleChinese: 科学家绘制了这种新植物的基因组图谱。

meaning: adj. 以地球为中⼼的
example: The old model assumed a geocentric universe.
exampleChinese: 旧模型假设宇宙以地球为中心。

meaning: adj. 地理的，地理学的
example: We studied the geographic features of the mountain region.
exampleChinese: 我们研究了这个山区的地理特征。

meaning: n. 现场演出；临时⼯作；轻便⻢⻋ vi. 公开演奏
example: Her band will play a gig at the school festival tonight.
exampleChinese: 她的乐队今晚会在学校节日上进行一场现场演出。

meaning: adv. 热情赞扬地
example: The teacher spoke glowingly about her students' hard work.
exampleChinese: 老师热情赞扬了学生们的努力。

meaning: n. 福⾳书；福⾳；绝对真理
example: Many people turn to the gospel for comfort and guidance.
exampleChinese: 许多人转向《福音书》寻求安慰和指引。

meaning: n. 花岗岩
example: The path was lined with smooth granite.
exampleChinese: 这条小路两旁是光滑的花岗岩。

meaning: n. 奶奶，姥姥
example: My granny tells funny stories.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶讲有趣的故事。

meaning: vi. vt. 扭打，搏⽃ vi. 努⼒设法解决
example: The two teams had to grapple with a difficult problem.
exampleChinese: 两支队伍不得不努力解决一个难题。

meaning: n. 草地，草场
example: Wild horses ran across the open grassland.
exampleChinese: 野马在开阔的草原上奔跑。

meaning: adj. 草根的，⺠众的 n. 普通⺠众，草根阶层
example: The grassroots campaign won strong support from local families.
exampleChinese: 这场草根运动得到了当地家庭的大力支持。

meaning: n. 满⾜，满意，令⼈喜悦的事物
example: She felt great gratification after finishing the project.
exampleChinese: 完成这个项目后，她感到非常满足。

meaning: n. 蔬菜⽔果店；果菜商
example: The greengrocer sells fresh apples and carrots.
exampleChinese: 这位蔬菜水果商出售新鲜的苹果和胡萝卜。

meaning: n. 不平的事，委屈
example: He raised a grievance about the unfair rules.
exampleChinese: 他对不公平的规则提出了不满。

meaning: vt. 洗刷 (动物)；训练，栽培 n. 新郎；⻢夫，⻢倌
example: The farmer will groom the horse before the show.
exampleChinese: 农夫会在表演前给马刷洗。

meaning: n. 监护⼈的⾝份，监护地位
example: The court gave her guardianship of the child.
exampleChinese: 法院把孩子的监护权交给了她。

meaning: adv. 习惯性地，惯常地
example: He habitually wakes up early on school days.
exampleChinese: 他在上学日习惯性地早起。

meaning: vi. vt. 劈，砍；⾮法侵⼊ (计算机) vi. 骑⻢ n. 雇佣⽂⼈；杂务⼈员；出租⻋
example: A hacker tried to hack the game server last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚有人试图非法侵入这个游戏服务器。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 减半 vt. 将…对半分
example: We can halve the cake so everyone gets a piece.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把蛋糕对半分，这样每个人都能分到一块。

meaning: n. ⼩村庄，⼩村⼦
example: The bus stopped in a small hamlet near the river.
exampleChinese: 公共汽车停在了河边的一个小村庄里。

meaning: adj. ⽴场坚定的，强硬的
example: The hard-line leader refused to change his position.
exampleChinese: 这位立场强硬的领导人拒绝改变自己的立场。

meaning: vt. 加速，加快 vi. 急忙做 (某事)；赶往 (某处)
example: We must hasten to finish before dark.
exampleChinese: 我们必须加快速度，赶在天黑前完成。

meaning: n. 灾害，祸患，浩劫
example: The storm caused havoc in the small town.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴给这个小镇造成了浩劫。

meaning: n. 烟雾，霾；迷糊，懵懂 vt. 欺凌 (新⽣)
example: A haze covered the city in the early morning.
exampleChinese: 清晨，烟霾笼罩了这座城市。

meaning: n. 猎头，物⾊⼈才的⼈
example: A headhunter called her about a new job.
exampleChinese: 一位猎头给她打电话，介绍一份新工作。

meaning: adj. 热情的；精⼒充沛的；丰盛的
example: She gave us a hearty welcome at the door.
exampleChinese: 她在门口热情地欢迎了我们。

meaning: adv. ⾮常，⼤量地，严重地；沉重地
example: He walked heavily up the stairs.
exampleChinese: 他脚步沉重地走上楼梯。

meaning: n. ⻝草动物
example: A herbivore eats only plants.
exampleChinese: 草食动物只吃植物。

meaning: n. 宗教异端；离经叛道的观点
example: His idea sounded like heresy to the old group.
exampleChinese: 他的想法对那个老派团体来说听起来像异端。

meaning: n. 异教徒，异端分⼦
example: The heretic was punished for his beliefs.
exampleChinese: 这个异教徒因其信仰而受到惩罚。

meaning: adj. 等级制的，按等级划分的
example: The school has a hierarchical structure.
exampleChinese: 这所学校有一种等级制结构。

meaning: adj. 引⼈注⽬的，⾼调的
example: The singer made a high-profile appearance on TV.
exampleChinese: 这位歌手高调地在电视上露面。

meaning: n. 阻碍，妨碍者
example: Lack of sleep was a hindrance to his studies.
exampleChinese: 睡眠不足成了他学习的阻碍。

meaning: vi. vt. 贮藏，囤积 n. 贮藏物
example: They hoard food before a long winter.
exampleChinese: 他们会在漫长的冬天来临前囤积食物。

meaning: adj. 整体的，全⾯的；整体治疗的
example: We need a holistic plan for the whole project.
exampleChinese: 我们需要一个针对整个项目的整体方案。

meaning: adj. ⾃家种的；本国产的，本地产的
example: The farm sells homegrown vegetables.
exampleChinese: 这家农场出售自家种的蔬菜。

meaning: adj. ⽆家可归的 n. ⽆家可归的⼈
example: The city opened a shelter for homeless people.
exampleChinese: 这座城市为无家可归的人开设了一个收容所。

meaning: n. ⼈科动物
example: Scientists found a hominid fossil in the cave.
exampleChinese: 科学家在洞穴里发现了一块人科动物化石。

meaning: int. 好极了，好哇
example: The fans shouted hooray when their team scored.
exampleChinese: 当他们的队进球时，球迷们高呼万岁。

meaning: vt. 使惊恐，使震惊
example: The news will horrify many people.
exampleChinese: 这条新闻会让许多人感到震惊。

meaning: adj. 园艺的
example: She studies horticultural design at college.
exampleChinese: 她在大学学习园艺设计。

meaning: n. (某地或活动的) 中⼼；轮毂
example: The train station is the hub of the city.
exampleChinese: 火车站是这座城市的中心。

meaning: n. 预感，直觉 vi. vt. ⼸⾝，⼸背
example: I had a hunch that the answer was wrong.
exampleChinese: 我有一种直觉，觉得答案错了。

meaning: n. 猎⼈；搜寻者；猎狐⻢
example: The hunter followed the tracks through the forest.
exampleChinese: 猎人沿着足迹穿过森林。

meaning: n. 障碍，难关；跳栏；跨栏赛跑 vt. vi. (奔跑中) 跳跃，跨越
example: The runner had to hurdle the barrier quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个跑步者必须快速跨过障碍。

meaning: n. 农牧业；节俭使⽤，精打细算
example: Good husbandry helps farmers save water and feed.
exampleChinese: 良好的农牧业管理有助于农民节约水和饲料。

meaning: n. 炒作，天花乱坠的⼴告宣传 vt. ⼤肆宣传 (或吹捧)
example: The movie got so much hype that many people went to see it.
exampleChinese: 这部电影被大肆炒作，很多人都去看了。

meaning: n. 理想主义；唯⼼主义，唯⼼论
example: Her idealism made her believe the world could change.
exampleChinese: 她的理想主义让她相信世界可以改变。

meaning: vt. 将…视为理想，将…理想化
example: Some fans idealize the singer and ignore her flaws.
exampleChinese: 有些粉丝把这位歌手理想化，忽视了她的缺点。

meaning: adj. 不开明的，(⾔论等) 不⾃由的 adj. 吝啬的，⼩⽓的
example: His illiberal comments upset many people in the room.
exampleChinese: 他不开明的言论让房间里的许多人感到不快。

meaning: n. 移⺠，移⺠⼈数；移⺠局检查处
example: Immigration increased in the city last year.
exampleChinese: 去年这个城市的外来移民增加了。

meaning: adj. 不道德的
example: Cheating on the test was an immoral act.
exampleChinese: 考试作弊是不道德的行为。

meaning: vt. 促使，驱策，迫使
example: A loud siren can impel drivers to slow down.
exampleChinese: 刺耳的警报声会促使司机减速。

meaning: vi. 即将发⽣；(坏事) 逼近
example: Dark clouds impend over the mountains before the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨来临前，乌云逼近群山。

meaning: vi. 对…不利，妨碍，侵犯
example: The new road will impinge on the park's quiet area.
exampleChinese: 这条新公路会妨碍公园的安静区域。

meaning: adj. 似乎不合情理的，难以置信的
example: His explanation sounded implausible to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 他的解释让老师觉得难以置信。

meaning: n. 不可能，不可能的事
example: Winning the game against that team seemed an impossibility.
exampleChinese: 战胜那支队伍似乎是不可能的事。

meaning: adj. 贫困的，⾚贫的；贫瘠的
example: The impoverished village needed clean water and food.
exampleChinese: 这个贫困的村庄需要干净的水和食物。

meaning: adj. 不切实际的；(⼈) 不务实的
example: It would be impractical to walk ten miles in the rain.
exampleChinese: 在雨中走十英里是不切实际的。

meaning: vt. 监禁，禁锢
example: The police can imprison a criminal after a fair trial.
exampleChinese: 警方可以在公正审判后将罪犯监禁。

meaning: adj. 不合适的；不正当的；错误的
example: It was improper to shout during the class.
exampleChinese: 在课堂上大喊大叫是不合适的。

meaning: adj. 不准确的，有错误的
example: The map was inaccurate, so we took the wrong road.
exampleChinese: 地图不准确，所以我们走错了路。

meaning: n. 不⾜，不充分；不称职；缺点
example: Her lack of sleep showed an inadequacy in the schedule.
exampleChinese: 她睡眠不足说明日程安排有缺陷。

meaning: adj. 不适当的，不合适的
example: Wearing a swimsuit to school is inappropriate.
exampleChinese: 穿泳衣去学校是不合适的。

meaning: adj. 不善⾔辞的；发⾳不清楚的
example: He became inarticulate when he had to speak in public.
exampleChinese: 他在公共场合讲话时变得不善言辞。

meaning: adj. 天⽣的，⽣来就有的
example: Her inborn talent for music impressed everyone.
exampleChinese: 她与生俱来的音乐天赋给每个人都留下了深刻印象。

meaning: vt. 煽动，⿎动
example: The rumor could incite a fight between the two groups.
exampleChinese: 这个谣言可能会煽动两个群体之间的冲突。

meaning: adj. 严寒的，狂⻛暴⾬的
example: We stayed indoors because of the inclement weather.
exampleChinese: 由于天气严寒且风雨交加，我们待在室内。

meaning: n. 意向，倾向；斜坡，斜度；点头
example: She has an inclination to read before bed.
exampleChinese: 她有睡前阅读的倾向。

meaning: adj. 不相容的；合不来的；不兼容的
example: These two devices are incompatible with each other.
exampleChinese: 这两种设备彼此不兼容。

meaning: adj. ⽆能⼒的，⽆法胜任的 n. ⽆能的⼈，⽆法胜任的⼈
example: The manager fired the incompetent clerk.
exampleChinese: 经理解雇了那个无能的职员。

meaning: adj. 不完整的，不完全的，未完成的 n. (课程) 未修毕
example: The report is incomplete, so we cannot make a decision yet.
exampleChinese: 这份报告不完整，所以我们还不能做决定。

meaning: adj. ⽆定论的，不确定的
example: The test results were inconclusive.
exampleChinese: 测试结果没有定论。

meaning: adv. 不正确地，不真实地，错误地
example: He answered the question incorrectly.
exampleChinese: 他错误地回答了这个问题。

meaning: adj. 站不住脚的；⽆法防御的
example: His excuse was indefensible.
exampleChinese: 他的借口站不住脚。

meaning: adv. ⽆限期地
example: The meeting was postponed indefinitely.
exampleChinese: 会议被无限期推迟了。

meaning: adv. 独⽴地；分别地，单独地
example: She can work independently on this project.
exampleChinese: 她可以独立完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 指标；指⽰器，指针；转向灯
example: This gauge is a useful indicator of temperature.
exampleChinese: 这个仪表是温度的一个有用指标。

meaning: n. 控告；起诉书；衰败迹象
example: The indictment was filed in court yesterday.
exampleChinese: 起诉书昨天已提交法庭。

meaning: n. 不感兴趣，不关⼼，冷淡
example: His indifference to the problem upset his friends.
exampleChinese: 他对这个问题的冷淡让朋友们很不高兴。

meaning: adj. 间接的；拐弯抹⻆的；绕远的
example: She gave an indirect answer to the question.
exampleChinese: 她对这个问题作了间接回答。

meaning: vt. 使正式就职；吸收为成员
example: The school will induct new members next week.
exampleChinese: 学校下周将正式接纳新成员。

meaning: n. ⼯业化
example: Industrialization changed the city very quickly.
exampleChinese: 工业化迅速改变了这座城市。

meaning: adj. 不能吃的，不宜⻝⽤的
example: This fruit is inedible when it is raw.
exampleChinese: 这种水果生吃时不能食用。

meaning: adj. ⽆效果的，不起作⽤的
example: The medicine was ineffective against the infection.
exampleChinese: 这种药对感染没有效果。

meaning: adj. 效率低的，能⼒差的
example: The old machine is slow and inefficient.
exampleChinese: 这台旧机器又慢又低效。

meaning: adv. 不可避免地，不容忽视地
example: The old bridge is inescapably part of the town’s history.
exampleChinese: 这座老桥不可避免地成了小镇历史的一部分。

meaning: adv. 不可避免地，必然地
example: The sun will inevitably set before we finish the game.
exampleChinese: 我们还没打完比赛，太阳就必然会落山。

meaning: adj. 不可阻挡的，⽆法改变的
example: The river’s inexorable current carried the boat downstream.
exampleChinese: 河水不可阻挡的急流把船冲向下游。

meaning: adj. (感情) 难以⾔传的，⽆法形容的
example: She felt an inexpressible joy when she saw her family again.
exampleChinese: 她再次见到家人时，感到一种难以言传的喜悦。

meaning: n. 婴⼉期；初期，初创期
example: The company is still in its infancy and has only five workers.
exampleChinese: 这家公司还处于初创期，只有五名员工。

meaning: n. 低等，劣等
example: He felt a sense of inferiority next to his skilled classmates.
exampleChinese: 和那些熟练的同学相比，他感到有些自卑。

meaning: adj. 年⽼体弱的，病弱的
example: The infirm man walked slowly with a cane.
exampleChinese: 那个病弱的老人拄着拐杖慢慢走。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 充⽓，膨胀；(物价) 涨⾼ vt. 夸⼤，吹嘘
example: Do not inflate the balloon too much.
exampleChinese: 不要把气球充得太满。

meaning: n. 信息，消息
example: Please send me the info by email tonight.
exampleChinese: 请今晚把信息通过电子邮件发给我。

meaning: adj. ⾮正式的；休闲的，⽇常穿的
example: We wore informal clothes for the school picnic.
exampleChinese: 我们穿着休闲的衣服去学校野餐。

meaning: n. ⾮正式；不正式的举动
example: The teacher spoke with unusual informality during lunch.
exampleChinese: 老师在午餐时说话出奇地随意。

meaning: vt. 使具有；全⾯影响；输注 vt. vi. 泡，沏
example: The tea will infuse the water with a light smell.
exampleChinese: 茶叶会让水带上一点清香。

meaning: n. 聪明才智，独创⼒
example: The engineer showed great ingenuity in solving the problem.
exampleChinese: 这位工程师在解决问题时表现出极大的聪明才智。

meaning: adv. 内在地，固有地
example: This design is inherently simple and easy to use.
exampleChinese: 这种设计本质上很简单，也很容易使用。

meaning: adj. 遗传的；继承的，继承得来的
example: She wore her inherited watch every day.
exampleChinese: 她每天都戴着那块继承来的手表。

meaning: adj. 不⼈道的；⾮⼈类的
example: The prisoners faced inhuman treatment in the camp.
exampleChinese: 那些囚犯在营地里遭受了不人道的对待。

meaning: n. 创始，发起；⼊会，加⼊，⼊⻔
example: His initiation into the club took place on Friday.
exampleChinese: 他于周五正式加入了这个俱乐部。

meaning: n. 创始⼈，发起者；引爆装置
example: She was the initiator of the recycling project.
exampleChinese: 她是这个回收项目的发起人。

meaning: adj. 有害的，致伤的
example: Eating too much junk food is injurious to your health.
exampleChinese: 吃太多垃圾食品有害健康。

meaning: adj. 天⽣的，与⽣俱来的
example: Hard work feels innate to her.
exampleChinese: 勤奋似乎是她与生俱来的特质。

meaning: adj. 内⼼深处的；最接近中⼼的
example: Her innermost fear was that she would fail the test.
exampleChinese: 她内心深处最害怕的是考试不及格。

meaning: adj. 创新的，⾰新的，新颖的
example: The company launched an innovative app for students.
exampleChinese: 这家公司推出了一款面向学生的创新应用。

meaning: n. ⾰新者，创新者
example: She became an innovator in clean energy.
exampleChinese: 她成了清洁能源领域的创新者。

meaning: adj. 不知⾜的，⽆法满⾜的
example: The puppy had an insatiable appetite.
exampleChinese: 这只小狗胃口大得无法满足。

meaning: adj. 漠然的，⽆动于衷的；⽆知觉的
example: He seemed insensitive to her worries.
exampleChinese: 他似乎对她的担忧漠然无动于衷。

meaning: adj. 潜伏的，隐藏的，暗中为害的
example: The disease is insidious and hard to notice at first.
exampleChinese: 这种疾病很隐蔽，起初很难被察觉。

meaning: adj. 富有洞察⼒的，有深刻⻅解的
example: The teacher gave an insightful answer.
exampleChinese: 老师给出了富有洞察力的回答。

meaning: adj. 不重要的，⽆⾜轻重的
example: His warning turned out to be insignificant.
exampleChinese: 他的警告结果证明是无足轻重的。

meaning: n. 坚持，坚决要求，坚称
example: She made an insistence on paying the bill.
exampleChinese: 她坚持要付账。

meaning: n. 检查；视察
example: The car passed the inspection yesterday.
exampleChinese: 这辆车昨天通过了检查。

meaning: adv. ⽴即地，即刻地
example: The lights changed instantaneously.
exampleChinese: 灯光立刻就变了。

meaning: adj. 机构的；制度化的，根深蒂固的
example: The school offers strong institutional support.
exampleChinese: 这所学校提供强有力的机构支持。

meaning: adj. 不充分的，不⾜的
example: We had insufficient time to finish the project.
exampleChinese: 我们没有足够的时间完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 摄取量；征召⼈数；进⼝
example: His daily intake of water is high.
exampleChinese: 他每天的饮水量很高。

meaning: n. 综合，整合；同化，融⼊；融合
example: The integration of the two classes went well.
exampleChinese: 两个班级的融合进行得很顺利。

meaning: n. 智⼒，领悟⼒；才智⾮凡的⼈
example: She has the intellect to solve hard problems.
exampleChinese: 她有解决难题的才智。

meaning: adv. 极其；(活动) 激烈地；强烈地
example: The students listened intensely to the story.
exampleChinese: 学生们极其专注地听着这个故事。

meaning: adv. 有意地，故意地
example: He intentionally left his phone at home.
exampleChinese: 他故意把手机留在家里。

meaning: adv. 专⼼地，专注地
example: The dog stared intently at the ball.
exampleChinese: 那只狗专注地盯着球。

meaning: adj. (⼈机) 交互的；互动的
example: The game has an interactive map.
exampleChinese: 这个游戏有一个互动地图。

meaning: n. 互相依赖
example: The two countries depend on each other, showing strong interdependence.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家相互依赖，体现出很强的互相依赖关系。

meaning: n. 通婚；近亲结婚
example: The story discussed intermarriage between two neighboring families.
exampleChinese: 这个故事讲述了两个邻近家庭之间的通婚。

meaning: adj. ⼈际的
example: Good communication is important for strong interpersonal relationships.
exampleChinese: 良好的沟通对良好的人际关系很重要。

meaning: n. 相互作⽤，相互影响
example: The interplay of light and shadow made the photo beautiful.
exampleChinese: 光与影的相互作用让这张照片很美。

meaning: n. 解释，解读，说明；表演，演绎
example: Her interpretation of the poem was thoughtful and clear.
exampleChinese: 她对这首诗的解读很有见地，也很清楚。

meaning: adj. 省与省之间的，省际的
example: The interprovincial train was full of students going home for the holiday.
exampleChinese: 这列省际火车上坐满了放假回家的学生。

meaning: n. 被⾯试者，被采访者
example: The interviewee answered every question calmly and politely.
exampleChinese: 被面试者平静而礼貌地回答了每个问题。

meaning: n. ⾯试官，采访者
example: The interviewer asked about her school project.
exampleChinese: 面试官问了她关于学校项目的情况。

meaning: adj. 序⾔的；⼊⻔的；(新品) 试销的
example: We read an introductory chapter before starting the course.
exampleChinese: 我们在开始这门课之前先读了一章入门内容。

meaning: n. 闯⼊；⼲扰，侵扰
example: The guard stopped the intrusion into the private garden.
exampleChinese: 警卫阻止了对私人花园的闯入。

meaning: adv. 直觉地，直观地
example: She knew intuitively that the answer was wrong.
exampleChinese: 她直觉地知道这个答案是错的。

meaning: vt. 使⽆效，使作废；证明…错误
example: A spelling error will invalidate the form.
exampleChinese: 拼写错误会使这份表格无效。

meaning: n. 有创造⼒，有创意
example: His inventiveness helped him build a clever model car.
exampleChinese: 他的创造力帮助他做出了一辆巧妙的模型车。

meaning: n. 发明者，发明家
example: The inventor spent years testing his idea.
exampleChinese: 这位发明家花了好几年测试他的想法。

meaning: n. 投资者，投资机构
example: The investor bought shares in a new technology company.
exampleChinese: 这位投资者买入了一家新科技公司的股票。

meaning: adv. ⾮⾃愿地，不⾃觉地
example: She involuntarily stepped back when she heard the loud noise.
exampleChinese: 她听到巨响时不由自主地往后退了一步。

meaning: adj. (情况) 有讽刺意味的；讽刺的
example: It was ironic that the fire station burned down.
exampleChinese: 讽刺的是，消防站竟然着火烧毁了。

meaning: adv. 具有讽刺意味的是；讽刺地
example: Ironically, he failed the test after studying all night.
exampleChinese: 具有讽刺意味的是，他通宵学习后还是考试失败了。

meaning: adj. 不整⻬的；不规则的；不正常的 n. ⾮正规军军⼈
example: The floor was irregular, so the table wobbled.
exampleChinese: 地面不平整，所以桌子晃动了。

meaning: adj. 劲头⼗⾜的，难以遏制的
example: The child had an irrepressible laugh during the movie.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子在电影中发出了抑制不住的笑声。

meaning: n. 灌溉；(对伤⼝的) 冲洗
example: The farm uses irrigation to help the crops grow.
exampleChinese: 这个农场用灌溉来帮助庄稼生长。

meaning: adj. ⽆业的，失业的
example: Many jobless people were looking for work in the city.
exampleChinese: 许多失业的人在城市里寻找工作。

meaning: n. 求职者
example: A jobseeker should bring a clear resume to the interview.
exampleChinese: 求职者应该带一份清晰的简历去面试。

meaning: adv. 开玩笑地，戏谑地
example: She laughed jokingly and said he was late again.
exampleChinese: 她开玩笑地笑着说他又迟到了。

meaning: adj. 新闻业的，新闻⼯作 (者) 的
example: The report was written in a very journalistic style.
exampleChinese: 这篇报道写得很有新闻风格。

meaning: n. 司法部，司法系统
example: The judiciary must stay independent from political pressure.
exampleChinese: 司法系统必须保持独立，不受政治压力影响。

meaning: vi. vt. 玩抛接杂耍；(尤指艰难地) 兼顾 vt. 改动，重新安排
example: He can juggle three balls at once.
exampleChinese: 他能同时玩抛接三个球。

meaning: n. (检索) 关键词；中⼼词
example: Please type the keyword into the search box.
exampleChinese: 请把关键词输入搜索框。

meaning: n. 亲属关系；亲密联系，亲切感
example: There is a strong kinship between the two families.
exampleChinese: 这两家人之间有很强的亲属关系。

meaning: n. 指节，指关节；肘，蹄
example: He hurt his knuckle while playing basketball.
exampleChinese: 他打篮球时弄伤了指节。

meaning: adj. 层压的，粘合的；覆膜的
example: The book is protected by a laminated cover.
exampleChinese: 这本书有一层覆膜封面保护。

meaning: n. ⼿术⼑，柳叶⼑
example: The lancet was placed carefully on the tray.
exampleChinese: 手术刀被小心地放在托盘上。

meaning: n. 地标，标志性建筑；⾥程碑
example: The old bridge is now a famous landmark.
exampleChinese: 那座老桥现在是著名地标。

meaning: adj. ⽆精打采的，懒洋洋的
example: After lunch, he felt languid and sleepy.
exampleChinese: 午饭后，他感到无精打采，还想睡觉。

meaning: n. ⽴法者
example: The lawmaker proposed a new education bill.
exampleChinese: 这位立法者提出了一项新的教育法案。

meaning: n. 吃剩的⻝物；遗留物 adj. 剩余的，未吃完的
example: We ate the leftover soup.
exampleChinese: 我们喝了剩下的汤。

meaning: adv. 依据法律，法律上
example: The company can act legally only with a permit.
exampleChinese: 这家公司只有获得许可才能合法经营。

meaning: n. ⽴法机关，⽴法机构
example: The legislature passed the budget late at night.
exampleChinese: 立法机构在深夜通过了预算。

meaning: n. 放款⼈
example: The lender agreed to extend the loan.
exampleChinese: 放款人同意延长贷款期限。

meaning: n. 宽⼤，仁慈
example: The teacher showed leniency after the honest mistake.
exampleChinese: 老师在这次诚实的失误后表现得很宽容。

meaning: adj. 仁慈的，宽⼤的
example: Her lenient rule gave students a second chance.
exampleChinese: 她宽大的规定给了学生们第二次机会。

meaning: n. 影响⼒，⼿段；杠杆作⽤ vt. 充分利⽤
example: We can leverage our experience to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 我们可以利用经验来解决这个问题。

meaning: vi. vt. 更加放宽，使…更⾃由
example: The country plans to liberalize its trade rules.
exampleChinese: 这个国家计划放宽贸易规则。

meaning: adj. 逼真的，⽣动的，栩栩如⽣的
example: The artist made a lifelike model of the bird.
exampleChinese: 那位艺术家做了一个栩栩如生的鸟模型。

meaning: n. ⽣活⽅式
example: A healthy lifestyle includes enough sleep.
exampleChinese: 健康的生活方式包括充足的睡眠。

meaning: adj. 逗乐的，⾮严肃的；⽆忧⽆虑的
example: We watched a light-hearted movie after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们看了一部轻松有趣的电影。

meaning: adj. 边缘系统的；边缘的
example: The doctor studied the limbic system in class.
exampleChinese: 医生在课堂上学习了边缘系统。

meaning: n. 世系，家族，⾎统
example: Her family has a long lineage of teachers.
exampleChinese: 她的家族有着悠久的教师世系。

meaning: n. 语⾔学家；通晓多⻔语⾔的⼈
example: The linguist spoke five languages fluently.
exampleChinese: 这位语言学家能流利地说五种语言。

meaning: n. 衬⾥，内衬；(⾝体器官的) 内膜
example: The jacket has a warm wool lining.
exampleChinese: 这件夹克有一层保暖的羊毛衬里。

meaning: n. 倾听者；收听，听众
example: The listener nodded and asked a helpful question.
exampleChinese: 那位倾听者点了点头，还问了一个有帮助的问题。

meaning: adj. 有读写能⼒的；通晓…的 adj. 受过良好教育的
example: She is literate in both English and Chinese.
exampleChinese: 她具备英语和中文的读写能力。

meaning: n. 精⼒充沛；热闹，有趣
example: The liveliness of the class made everyone smile.
exampleChinese: 课堂上的活跃气氛让每个人都笑了。

meaning: n. 牲畜，牲⼝
example: The farm has cows, sheep, and other livestock.
exampleChinese: 这个农场有奶牛、绵羊和其他牲畜。

meaning: n. 闭⼚，停⼯
example: The factory lockout lasted for two weeks.
exampleChinese: 这场工厂停工持续了两周。

meaning: n. 阁楼，顶楼；套房，公寓 vi. 向⾼处击 (或踢、掷)
example: We slept in the loft during the summer.
exampleChinese: 夏天我们睡在阁楼里。

meaning: n. 标志，标识
example: The company changed its logo last year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司去年更换了标志。

meaning: n. (深海钓⻥⽤) 延绳
example: The fisherman checked the longline before dawn.
exampleChinese: 那位渔民在黎明前检查了延绳。

meaning: adj. 存在已久的，悠久的
example: They have a long-standing friendship.
exampleChinese: 他们有着悠久的友谊。

meaning: adj. 低成本的
example: This is a low-cost way to travel.
exampleChinese: 这是一种低成本的旅行方式。

meaning: adj. 密度低的
example: The city plans more low-density housing.
exampleChinese: 这座城市计划建设更多低密度住宅。

meaning: adj. 低级别的；微弱的；离地⾯近的
example: We heard a low-level sound outside the door.
exampleChinese: 我们听到门外有微弱的声音。

meaning: adj. 临时替代的，权宜的
example: We used a makeshift table for the picnic.
exampleChinese: 我们用一张临时替代的桌子野餐。

meaning: adj. 男性占主导地位的
example: The male students sat near the front.
exampleChinese: 男生们坐在前面附近。

meaning: n. 玩忽职守，渎职
example: The court punished the doctor for malpractice.
exampleChinese: 法庭因那位医生的渎职行为进行了处罚。

meaning: n. 宣⾔
example: The party published a manifesto before the election.
exampleChinese: 该政党在选举前发表了一份宣言。

meaning: vt. 使显得微不⾜道，使边缘化
example: The new policy can marginalize small rural schools.
exampleChinese: 这项新政策会使农村小学校边缘化。

meaning: adv. 明显地，显著地
example: Her opinion changed markedly after the meeting.
exampleChinese: 她在会后观点明显改变了。

meaning: n. 市场；(常指) 露天市场
example: The farmers sold fresh fruit in the marketplace.
exampleChinese: 农民们在市场上卖新鲜水果。

meaning: n. (家具等的) 镶嵌艺术
example: The cabinet showed fine marquetry on the doors.
exampleChinese: 这个柜子的门上有精美的镶嵌装饰。

meaning: n. 湿地，沼泽
example: A marsh lay beside the quiet river.
exampleChinese: 一片沼泽地位于那条安静的河边。

meaning: n. (英国) 陆军元帅，空军元帅 vt. 整理 (思路、想法等)；调集
example: The officer can marshal the team for the drill.
exampleChinese: 这名军官可以调集队伍进行演练。

meaning: n. 媒⼈，红娘
example: The matchmaker introduced the two families at dinner.
exampleChinese: 媒人在晚餐时介绍了这两家人。

meaning: n. 物质主义；唯物主义
example: The novel criticizes materialism in modern life.
exampleChinese: 这部小说批评了现代生活中的物质主义。

meaning: adj. 物质主义的，拜⾦的
example: His materialistic attitude made him chase expensive clothes.
exampleChinese: 他拜金的态度让他一味追求昂贵的衣服。

meaning: adj. ⺟亲的，⺟亲般的；⺟系的
example: She felt a warm maternal love for the child.
exampleChinese: 她对这个孩子感到一种温暖的母爱。

meaning: n. 成熟；到期
example: He showed maturity by admitting his mistake.
exampleChinese: 他承认错误，表现出了成熟。

meaning: vt. 使…最⼤化；充分利⽤
example: We can maximize the use of this small room.
exampleChinese: 我们可以最大限度地利用这间小屋子。

meaning: adj. 有意义的；易懂的；意味深⻓的
