example: A meaningful smile can calm a nervous friend.
exampleChinese: 一个有意义的微笑能让紧张的朋友平静下来。

meaning: adj. ⽆意义的；意思不明的
example: The answer was meaningless without the question.
exampleChinese: 如果没有问题，这个答案就是没有意义的。

meaning: adj. 可测量的；明显的，显著的
example: The chart shows a measurable increase in sales.
exampleChinese: 这张图表显示销售额有了可测量的增长。

meaning: adj. 机械论的
example: The theory sounds mechanistic to many scientists.
exampleChinese: 在许多科学家看来，这个理论带有机械论色彩。

meaning: vi. 管闲事，⼲涉；瞎搞，乱弄
example: Don't meddle in other people's private affairs.
exampleChinese: 不要干涉别人的私事。

meaning: n. 药物
example: The doctor prescribed medication for the fever.
exampleChinese: 医生为发烧开了药。

meaning: n. 平庸，平凡；平庸的⼈
example: He accepted mediocrity and stopped trying to improve.
exampleChinese: 他接受了平庸，不再努力提升自己。

meaning: adj. 地中海的，地中海地区的 n. 地中海，地中海地区
example: We spent our vacation on the Mediterranean coast.
exampleChinese: 我们在地中海沿岸度过了假期。

meaning: n. (尤指作纪念碑⽤的) 史前巨⽯
example: The park has a megalith standing near the entrance.
exampleChinese: 公园入口附近立着一块史前巨石。

meaning: vt. 熟记，记住
example: We must memorize these new words before the test.
exampleChinese: 我们必须在考试前把这些新单词记住。

meaning: adv. 精神上，智⼒上，思想上
example: She was mentally tired after the long exam.
exampleChinese: 长时间考试后，她精神上很疲惫。

meaning: adv. ⽆情地，冷酷地
example: The coach criticized the team mercilessly after the loss.
exampleChinese: 输球后，教练无情地批评了全队。

meaning: n. 精英领导体制，英才管理制度
example: The company tried to build a meritocracy based on skill.
exampleChinese: 这家公司试图建立一个以能力为基础的英才管理制度。

meaning: n. 冶⾦学
example: She chose metallurgy because she loved working with metals.
exampleChinese: 她选择了冶金学，因为她喜欢研究金属。

meaning: adj. 形⽽上学的，⽞学的
example: His question about time felt deeply metaphysical.
exampleChinese: 他关于时间的问题显得非常形而上学。

meaning: n. ⽓象学家
example: The meteorologist predicted heavy rain for tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 那位气象学家预测明天会有大雨。

meaning: n. ⽅法论
example: Our teacher explained the methodology before the experiment.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师在实验前讲解了方法论。

meaning: n. 微⽣物学家
example: The microbiologist studied bacteria under a powerful microscope.
exampleChinese: 那位微生物学家用高倍显微镜研究细菌。

meaning: n. (⼈的) 移居，(⻦或兽的) 迁徙
example: Bird migration begins when the weather turns cold.
exampleChinese: 天气变冷时，鸟类开始迁徙。

meaning: adv. 稍稍，轻微地；温和地，和⽓地
example: The doctor spoke mildly to calm the frightened child.
exampleChinese: 医生温和地说话，安抚那个受惊的孩子。

meaning: n. ⾥程碑，重⼤事件
example: Winning the science fair was a big milestone for her.
exampleChinese: 赢得科学展是她的一个重要里程碑。

meaning: adv. 好战地，好⽃地，激进地
example: The protesters marched militantly through the city center.
exampleChinese: 抗议者激进地穿过市中心游行。

meaning: n. 千禧⼀代的⼈ adj. 千禧年的，千年的；千禧⼀代的
example: Many millennial workers value flexible schedules.
exampleChinese: 许多千禧一代的员工重视灵活的工作时间。

meaning: n. ⼀千年；千禧年
example: People have dreamed of peace for a millennium.
exampleChinese: 人们已经憧憬和平一千年了。

meaning: adv. 不动脑筋地，盲⽬地
example: He mindlessly scrolled through his phone during dinner.
exampleChinese: 他在晚饭时不动脑筋地刷着手机。

meaning: n. 思维模式，⼼态
example: A positive mindset can help you handle stress.
exampleChinese: 积极的心态能帮助你应对压力。

meaning: n. ⼩型化，微型化
example: Miniaturization made phones smaller and lighter.
exampleChinese: 小型化让手机更小更轻了。

meaning: adj. 最⼩的，极少的，最低限度的
example: We had only minimal homework last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚只有很少的作业。

meaning: adj. 极简抽象派的，简约主义的 n. 极简抽象派艺术家，简约主义者
example: The room has a minimalist design with clean white walls.
exampleChinese: 这个房间采用极简主义设计，墙面洁白整洁。

meaning: n. 采矿 (业)
example: Many workers left the town for mining in the north.
exampleChinese: 许多工人为了北方的采矿业离开了这座城镇。

meaning: adj. 调⽪捣蛋的；恶意的
example: The puppy looked mischievous when it hid my shoes.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗把我的鞋藏起来时，看起来很调皮。

meaning: n. 错误观念，误解
example: There is a common misconception that bats are blind.
exampleChinese: 人们常有一个错误观念，以为蝙蝠是看不见的。

meaning: vt. 错误地引导，把…引⼊歧途
example: A false rumor can misguide people very easily.
exampleChinese: 一个错误的谣言很容易把人引入歧途。

meaning: n. 错误信息，错误情报
example: The report spread misinformation about the new rule.
exampleChinese: 那份报告传播了有关新规则的错误信息。

meaning: vt. 误解，曲解
example: You may misinterpret his silence as anger.
exampleChinese: 你可能会把他的沉默误解为生气。

meaning: n. 误解，曲解
example: Their argument came from a misinterpretation of the letter.
exampleChinese: 他们的争论源于对那封信的误解。

meaning: vt. 随意搁置，乱放 (⽽⼀时找不到)
example: I always misplace my keys on the desk.
exampleChinese: 我总是把钥匙乱放在桌上，一时找不到。

meaning: n. 错⽤，误⽤，滥⽤ vt. 错⽤，误⽤，滥⽤；虐待
example: He does not misuse his tools.
exampleChinese: 他没有把工具用错。

meaning: vt. 减轻，缓和
example: Warm water can mitigate the pain.
exampleChinese: 温水可以减轻疼痛。

meaning: n. 流动性；活动能⼒，移动能⼒
example: This bus line improves mobility for older people.
exampleChinese: 这条公交线路提高了老年人的出行能力。

meaning: n. 谦虚，谦逊；(尤指⼥性的) 端庄
example: Her modesty made everyone like her.
exampleChinese: 她的谦逊让大家都喜欢她。

meaning: n. ⼤亨，有权势的⼈
example: The mogul owns several movie studios.
exampleChinese: 这位大亨拥有几家电影制片厂。

meaning: adj. 分⼦的，与分⼦有关的
example: The class studied the molecular structure of water.
exampleChinese: 全班学习了水的分子结构。

meaning: adv. ⽚刻地，短暂地；⽴即，⻢上
example: The train will arrive momentarily.
exampleChinese: 火车马上就到。

meaning: n. 掌握单⼀语⾔者 adj. 掌握单⼀语⾔的
example: She is a monoglot and speaks only Chinese.
exampleChinese: 她是单一语言使用者，只会说中文。

meaning: n. 吗啡
example: The doctor used morphine to ease the severe pain.
exampleChinese: 医生用吗啡来缓解剧烈疼痛。

meaning: n. 死亡率；死亡；必死性
example: Global mortality has fallen because of better medicine.
exampleChinese: 由于医疗条件更好，全球死亡率下降了。

meaning: n. 电话话筒；乐器吹⼝；发⾔⼈
example: The mayor used the radio as his mouthpiece.
exampleChinese: 市长把广播当作自己的发言渠道。

meaning: vt. vi. 割，刈 (草等)
example: We will mow the grass this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我们今天下午会割草。

meaning: adj. 跨国的；多国的；多⺠族的 n. 跨国公司
example: The company opened a new plant in a multinational market.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在一个跨国市场开设了新工厂。

meaning: n. 多样性，多种多样
example: There is a multiplicity of reasons for her success.
exampleChinese: 她成功的原因多种多样。

meaning: adj. 平凡的，单调的，世俗的
example: After lunch, the work felt boring and mundane.
exampleChinese: 午饭后，这项工作显得乏味而单调。

meaning: n. 可变性
example: Scientists discussed the mutability of the virus.
exampleChinese: 科学家们讨论了这种病毒的可变性。

meaning: adv. 相互地，彼此，共同地
example: The two teams agreed to share the costs mutually.
exampleChinese: 双方同意共同分担费用。

meaning: adj. 神话的，神话中的；虚构的
example: The children loved the mythical dragon in the story.
exampleChinese: 孩子们很喜欢故事里那条神话中的龙。

meaning: adv. 勉强地；有限地；仔细地
example: She narrowly missed the train by one minute.
exampleChinese: 她差一分钟才赶上火车。

meaning: adj. 鼻⼦的；带鼻⾳的；鼻腔发出的 n. 鼻⾳
example: He spoke in a nasal voice after catching a cold.
exampleChinese: 他感冒后说话带着鼻音。

meaning: adj. 全国性的，全国范围的 adv. 在全国范围内
example: The school held a nationwide reading contest.
exampleChinese: 这所学校举办了一场全国范围的阅读比赛。

meaning: adj. 本地⽣的，⼟⽣⼟⻓的
example: She is native-born in this city and knows it well.
exampleChinese: 她是这座城市的土生土长的人，对这里很熟悉。

meaning: n. 博物学家，⾃然学家
example: The naturalist studied birds in the forest.
exampleChinese: 这位博物学家在森林里研究鸟类。

meaning: adj. 航海的，海员的
example: They took a nautical map on the trip.
exampleChinese: 他们在旅途中带了一张航海地图。

meaning: adv. 整洁地，整⻬地；简单⽽聪明地
example: Please write your name neatly on the paper.
exampleChinese: 请把你的名字整齐地写在纸上。

meaning: adv. 必然地，不可避免地，必定地
example: A small mistake does not necessarily mean failure.
exampleChinese: 一个小错误并不一定意味着失败。

meaning: adv. 不必要地
example: He apologized for speaking needlessly harshly.
exampleChinese: 他为自己不必要地说得太刻薄而道歉。

meaning: adj. 贫苦的；需要情感⽀持的
example: The shelter helps needy families with food and clothes.
exampleChinese: 这家收容所为贫困家庭提供食物和衣物。

meaning: n. 疏忽，⼤意，玩忽职守
example: The accident happened because of negligence.
exampleChinese: 这起事故是由于疏忽造成的。

meaning: n. ⽆挡板篮球
example: We played netball after school yesterday.
exampleChinese: 我们昨天下课后打了无挡板篮球。

meaning: adj. 神经的，神经系统的
example: The doctor checked the neural signals in the test.
exampleChinese: 医生在检查中检测了神经信号。

meaning: n. 神经学，神经病学
example: She wants to study neurology at university.
exampleChinese: 她想在大学里学习神经学。

meaning: n. 神经科学家
example: The neuroscientist explained how the brain stores memory.
exampleChinese: 那位神经科学家解释了大脑如何储存记忆。

meaning: n. 新闻纸，⽩报纸
example: The newspaper was printed on cheap newsprint.
exampleChinese: 这份报纸是用廉价新闻纸印刷的。

meaning: n. 新闻编辑室
example: The reporter rushed back to the newsroom after the interview.
exampleChinese: 记者采访结束后赶回了新闻编辑室。

meaning: n. 报摊，书报亭
example: We bought a magazine at the newsstand.
exampleChinese: 我们在报摊买了一本杂志。

meaning: n. 合适的定位，称⼼的⼯作；商机 n. 壁龛；⽣态位 adj. 针对特定⼩群体的，⼩众的
example: This shop has found a niche in handmade toys.
exampleChinese: 这家商店在手工玩具方面找到了合适的定位。

meaning: n. 贵族 (阶层)；⾼尚的品质
example: Her kindness showed the nobility of her character.
exampleChinese: 她的善良体现了她高尚的品格。

meaning: adv. 吵闹地，喧闹地
example: The children were talking noisily in the hall.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在大厅里吵闹地说着话。

meaning: n. 不循规蹈矩的⼈；(英) 新教教徒
example: As a nonconformist, he always dresses in his own style.
exampleChinese: 作为一个不循规蹈矩的人，他总是按自己的风格穿衣。

meaning: adj. ⾮物质的
example: The filter removes non- particles from the sample.
exampleChinese: 这个过滤器会去除样品中的非物质颗粒。

meaning: adj. 不标准的；(语⾔)不规范的
example: The teacher corrected the student's non-standard grammar.
exampleChinese: 老师纠正了这个学生不规范的语法。

meaning: adj. 不涉及⾔语的，⾮⾔语的
example: The class used nonverbal clues to communicate.
exampleChinese: 这节课使用了非语言线索来交流。

meaning: adv. 特别，尤其；明显地，显著地
example: The road was notably quieter after midnight.
exampleChinese: 午夜过后，这条路明显安静了很多。

meaning: adj. 值得注意的，显著的
example: Her effort was noteworthy and impressed the judges.
exampleChinese: 她的努力值得注意，给评委留下了深刻印象。

meaning: n. 正式通知，正式通告
example: You will receive a notification when the form is ready.
exampleChinese: 表格准备好后，你会收到一条正式通知。

meaning: n. 新星
example: A nova can suddenly become very bright in the sky.
exampleChinese: 一颗新星会突然在天空中变得非常明亮。

meaning: vt. 轻推；(使) 达到，接近；劝说 vi. vt. ⽤胳膊肘挤开往前⾛ n. (肘部的) 轻推，碰
example: He gave the door a gentle nudge.
exampleChinese: 他轻轻推了推门。

meaning: adj. 令⼈不快的，令⼈反感的
example: The loud joke was objectionable to many people.
exampleChinese: 那个大声的笑话让许多人感到不快。

meaning: adj. 下流的；骇⼈听闻的，不道德的
example: The movie was banned for its obscene language.
exampleChinese: 这部电影因其下流的语言而被禁止上映。

meaning: adj. 能看得⻅的，能察觉到的
example: There was an observable change in her mood.
exampleChinese: 她的情绪有了明显的变化。

meaning: n. 观察者，观察员；⽬击者
example: The observer watched the game from the side.
exampleChinese: 观察员在一旁观看了比赛。

meaning: vt. 使痴迷，使迷恋，使着迷 vi. 唠叨，牵挂，念念不忘
example: He can obsess over small mistakes for hours.
exampleChinese: 他会为一些小错误念念不忘好几个小时。

meaning: adj. 可获得的，可得到的
example: Fresh water is obtainable in the village.
exampleChinese: 这个村子里可以获得淡水。

meaning: adj. 海洋的，与海洋有关的
example: The ship entered oceanic waters before sunrise.
exampleChinese: 这艘船在日出前进入了海洋水域。

meaning: adj. 未联⽹的，脱机的 adv. 未联⽹地，离线地
example: You can work offline when the internet is down.
exampleChinese: 网络中断时，你可以离线工作。

meaning: adj. 未经准备的，当场的，即兴的
example: He made an off-the-cuff remark during the meeting.
exampleChinese: 他在会议上即兴说了一句。

meaning: n. 杂⻝动物，杂⻝的⼈
example: An omnivore can eat both plants and meat.
exampleChinese: 杂食动物既能吃植物也能吃肉。

meaning: n. 致癌基因
example: Researchers found an oncogene linked to the tumor.
exampleChinese: 研究人员发现了一个与肿瘤有关的致癌基因。

meaning: adj. ⼀次性的，仅⼀次的
example: This one-shot vaccine is designed for easy use.
exampleChinese: 这种一次性疫苗设计得很容易使用。

meaning: adj. 在线的，联⽹的 adv. 从⽹上，在⽹上
example: Our online class starts at eight.
exampleChinese: 我们的在线课程八点开始。

meaning: adj. 向前的，前进的，继续的 adv. 向前；从 (某时) 起⼀直
example: From this point onward, we will follow the new rules.
exampleChinese: 从此以后，我们将遵守新规则。

meaning: adj. 开源的，开放获取的
example: The journal is open-access, so anyone can read it.
exampleChinese: 这份期刊是开放获取的，所以任何人都能阅读。

meaning: adv. 公开地，坦率地
example: She spoke openly about her fears.
exampleChinese: 她坦率地说出了自己的担忧。

meaning: n. 反对；对⼿；反对党；对⽴
example: The proposal met strong opposition from parents.
exampleChinese: 这项提议遭到了家长们的强烈反对。

meaning: n. 压迫，压制
example: The community protested the oppression of workers.
exampleChinese: 社区抗议对工人的压迫。

meaning: n. 球体
example: A silver orb hung in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 一颗银色的球体悬在夜空中。

meaning: adj. 管弦乐的，管弦乐队的
example: We heard an orchestral version of the song.
exampleChinese: 我们听到了一首交响乐队版本的歌曲。

meaning: adj. 组织的；有关组织 (或机构) 的
example: The company changed its organizational structure.
exampleChinese: 公司改变了组织结构。

meaning: adj. 华美的，豪华的
example: The palace had ornate gold doors.
exampleChinese: 那座宫殿有华美的金色大门。

meaning: n. 鸵⻦；逃避现实的⼈
example: The ostrich ran across the field.
exampleChinese: 鸵鸟跑过了田野。

meaning: n. (公众的) 强烈抗议，呐喊
example: There was a public outcry after the park was closed.
exampleChinese: 公园关闭后，公众强烈抗议。

meaning: vt. 使过时，使废弃
example: New software can quickly outdate old systems.
exampleChinese: 新软件会很快使旧系统过时。

meaning: vt. ⽐…活得⻓；⽐…经久
example: Her stories will outlive her fame.
exampleChinese: 她的故事会比她的名气流传得更久。

meaning: adj. 外来的，在外地的；城郊的
example: The hotel is popular with out-of-town visitors.
exampleChinese: 这家酒店很受外地游客欢迎。

meaning: adj. 特⼤号的，超⼤的
example: She wore an outsize hat to the party.
exampleChinese: 她戴着一顶特大号的帽子去参加聚会。

meaning: vt. vi. 外包，外办
example: The company decided to outsource its customer service.
exampleChinese: 公司决定将客服外包出去。

meaning: vt. 重于，⼤于，超过
example: The benefits outweigh the costs.
exampleChinese: 这些好处大于成本。

meaning: adj. 夸张的，过分渲染的
example: His apology sounded overblown and hard to believe.
exampleChinese: 他的道歉听起来夸张得有些难以相信。

meaning: adj. 过期未做的；早该做的
example: This homework is overdue.
exampleChinese: 这份作业早就该交了。

meaning: vt. ⾼估，过⾼估计 n. 过⾼的评估
example: Do not overestimate your strength.
exampleChinese: 不要高估你的实力。

meaning: adv. 过于地，过度地
example: She was overly worried about the test.
exampleChinese: 她对这次考试过于担心了。

meaning: vt. 给 (某⼈) 薪酬过多 vi. vt. 多付，付款过多
example: The factory may overpay skilled workers.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂可能会给熟练工人薪酬过高。

meaning: vt. (以权⼒) 推翻，否决，更改决定
example: The judge can overrule the earlier decision.
exampleChinese: 法官可以推翻先前的决定。

meaning: vt. 使黯然失⾊；使扫兴；将…遮暗
example: A tall tree can overshadow the house.
exampleChinese: 一棵高树会把房子遮住。

meaning: adj. 特⼤号的，硕⼤的，太⼤的
example: He bought an oversize jacket.
exampleChinese: 他买了一件特大号夹克。

meaning: vt. 夸⼤，夸张，⾔过其实
example: She tends to overstate her role in the project.
exampleChinese: 她常常夸大自己在项目中的作用。

meaning: vt. 僭越，逾越
example: Do not overstep your authority.
exampleChinese: 不要越权。

meaning: adj. (药品) ⾮处⽅的
example: Many people buy over-the- medicine at the pharmacy.
exampleChinese: 许多人会在药店购买非处方药。

meaning: vt. 过⾼估计，过于重视
example: He can overvalue praise from others.
exampleChinese: 他会过于看重别人的表扬。

meaning: adv. 强烈地，压倒性地，势不可挡地
example: The plan was overwhelmingly supported by students.
exampleChinese: 这项计划得到了学生们压倒性的支持。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 过度⼯作，过度劳累 vt. 把…做过头 n. 过于繁重的⼯作
example: Long hours can overwork anyone.
exampleChinese: 长时间工作会让任何人过度劳累。

meaning: n. 催产素
example: Oxytocin helps the body during labor.
exampleChinese: 催产素有助于分娩过程中的身体反应。

meaning: n. ⼉科学
example: She wants to study paediatrics after medical school.
exampleChinese: 她想在医学院毕业后学习儿科学。

meaning: n. 流⾏病，疾病⼤流⾏ adj. (疾病) ⼤规模流⾏的
example: The pandemic changed how people worked and studied.
exampleChinese: 这场流行病改变了人们的工作和学习方式。

meaning: adv. ⾃相⽭盾地，反常地
example: It was paradoxically easier to finish the project after the deadline changed.
exampleChinese: 反常的是，截止日期改变后，完成这个项目反而更容易了。

meaning: vt. vi. (⽤更易理解的⽂字) 解释，改述 n. 解释，释义，意译
example: Can you paraphrase the last paragraph in simpler words?
exampleChinese: 你能用更简单的话改述最后一段吗？

meaning: n. (对⼦⼥的) 养育
example: Good parenting takes patience, time, and love.
exampleChinese: 良好的养育需要耐心、时间和爱。

meaning: n. 平等，相同，对等
example: We should aim for parity in pay for the same work.
exampleChinese: 我们应该争取同工同酬。

meaning: adj. 偏袒的，盲⽬拥护的 n. 坚定的⽀持者；游击队员
example: He gave a partisan speech that ignored the other side.
exampleChinese: 他的演讲带有偏袒性，完全忽视了另一方。

meaning: n. 路⼈，过路的⼈
example: A passerby helped the child find his mother.
exampleChinese: 一位路人帮孩子找到了他的妈妈。

meaning: n. 彩⾊蜡笔；蜡笔画；淡⾊彩 adj. (⾊彩) 淡的，柔和的
example: She used pastel colors to make the room feel calm.
exampleChinese: 她用了柔和的淡色让房间显得很安静。

meaning: n. 拼布⼯艺 (品)；拼凑之物
example: The quilt was made from patchwork pieces of old cloth.
exampleChinese: 这床被子是用旧布块拼接做成的。

meaning: adj. ⽗亲的；⽗系的
example: His paternal grandfather lives in the village.
exampleChinese: 他的祖父住在村里。

meaning: n. ⼩路，⼩径；神经通道；途径
example: The forest pathway led to a small lake.
exampleChinese: 森林小路通向一个小湖。

meaning: n. 资助；恩惠；惠顾，光顾
example: Her early support gave the young artist valuable patronage.
exampleChinese: 她早期的资助给了这位年轻艺术家宝贵的支持。

meaning: vt. vi. 以⾼⼈⼀等的态度对待 vt. 经常光顾；资助
example: Do not patronize me just because I am younger.
exampleChinese: 不要因为我年纪小就以高人一等的态度对待我。

meaning: n. ⼯资⽀票；收⼊，进项
example: He saved part of his paycheck for college.
exampleChinese: 他把工资的一部分存起来交大学学费。

meaning: vt. 处罚，惩罚；(体育运动中) 判罚
example: The referee will penalize a player for a dangerous tackle.
exampleChinese: 裁判会因危险的铲球而处罚球员。

meaning: adj. 洞察⼒强的；感知的
example: She gave a perceptive answer to the question.
exampleChinese: 她对这个问题给出了很有洞察力的回答。

meaning: adj. 知觉的，感知的
example: The study looked at the perceptual effects of light and color.
exampleChinese: 这项研究考察了光和颜色的知觉效应。

meaning: adj. 表述⾏为的
example: The speaker's performative style made the crowd cheer.
exampleChinese: 演讲者带有表演性的风格让人群欢呼起来。

meaning: adv. 周期性地，定期地
example: The doctor checks the patients periodically.
exampleChinese: 医生定期检查这些病人。

meaning: adj. 纵容的，放任的，姑息的
example: A permissive rule can make students careless.
exampleChinese: 过于放任的规定会让学生变得粗心。

meaning: adj. 有害的，恶性的
example: Smoking is pernicious to your health.
exampleChinese: 吸烟对健康有害。

meaning: vt. 使持续 (尤指不好的事物)
example: Bad rumors can perpetuate fear in a community.
exampleChinese: 不好的谣言会使社区里的恐惧持续下去。

meaning: n. 毅⼒，锲⽽不舍；持续存在
example: Her persistence helped her finish the long project.
exampleChinese: 她的毅力帮助她完成了这个漫长的项目。

meaning: adj. 执着的，锲⽽不舍的；持续的
example: He remained persistent until he solved the problem.
exampleChinese: 他一直坚持不懈，直到解决了这个问题。

meaning: adj. 有说服⼒的，令⼈信服的
example: Her persuasive speech changed my mind.
exampleChinese: 她那番有说服力的演讲改变了我的想法。

meaning: adj. 遍布的，到处弥漫的
example: The city has a pervasive smell of fresh bread in the morning.
exampleChinese: 这座城市早晨弥漫着一股普遍的面包香味。

meaning: n. 花瓣
example: A white petal fell onto the table.
exampleChinese: 一片白色的花瓣落在了桌子上。

meaning: n. (古埃及的) 法⽼
example: The pharaoh ordered workers to build a grand tomb.
exampleChinese: 法老下令工人建造一座宏伟的陵墓。

meaning: adj. 制药的 n. 药品
example: The company makes a pharmaceutical product for coughs.
exampleChinese: 这家公司生产一种治疗咳嗽的药品。

meaning: adj. (⽤于乐队等名称中) 爱好⾳乐的 n. 爱乐乐团
example: We heard the philharmonic perform at the new hall.
exampleChinese: 我们在新的音乐厅听了爱乐乐团的演出。

meaning: adj. 哲学的；豁达的，达观的
example: She took a philosophical view of the small mistake.
exampleChinese: 她对这个小错误持一种豁达的看法。

meaning: adj. 假的，冒充的，欺骗的 n. 不诚实的⼈，冒牌货
example: The watch turned out to be a phony.
exampleChinese: 结果证明那块表是个冒牌货。

meaning: n. ⽤语，措辞；乐句划分
example: The teacher explained the phrasing of the poem.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了这首诗的措辞。

meaning: adv. ⾝体上，外貌上；实际上
example: He was physically tired after the race.
exampleChinese: 比赛后，他在身体上感到很累。

meaning: n. 体格，体形
example: She has an athletic physique.
exampleChinese: 她有运动员般的体格。

meaning: adj. adv. 逐步的 (地) ，零散的 (地)
example: The repairs were done piecemeal over several months.
exampleChinese: 这些修理是分几个月零零散散完成的。

meaning: vt. 确定…的位置或时间；查明 adj. 精确的，准确的 n. 极⼩的点
example: The map can pinpoint the old village exactly.
exampleChinese: 这张地图可以精确地确定那个古老村庄的位置。

meaning: n. 枢轴，⽀点；中⼼，核⼼ vi. vt. 在枢轴上旋转
example: At the center of the wheel is a small pivot.
exampleChinese: 轮子的中心有一个小枢轴。

meaning: vt. 摘，拔；拔⽑；使 (某⼈) 脱离 vt. vi. 弹拨 (乐器的弦) n. 胆识，胆量
example: She can pluck a guitar string with ease.
exampleChinese: 她能轻松拨动吉他的琴弦。

meaning: n. 李⼦，梅⼦ adj. 紫红⾊的；(⼯作等) 称⼼的
example: He ate a juicy plum for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 他早餐吃了一个多汁的李子。

meaning: vi. (价值或数量) 暴跌；坠落，掉下
example: Sales plummet when prices rise too fast.
exampleChinese: 当价格涨得太快时，销量就会暴跌。

meaning: vt. vi. ⾮法偷猎；盗⽤，挖⾛ (⼈员等) vt. ⽤⽂⽕煮，煨；⽔煮 (荷包蛋)
example: Illegal hunters poach animals in the forest at night.
exampleChinese: 非法猎人在夜里于森林中偷猎动物。

meaning: n. ⼿提包，钱夹；财⼒；⼩笔记本
example: She kept her ticket in her pocketbook.
exampleChinese: 她把票放在手提包里。

meaning: adj. ⽆意义的，⽆益的，⽆⽬的的
example: A long argument about the color was pointless.
exampleChinese: 关于颜色的那场长时间争论毫无意义。

meaning: n. 聚合物，聚合体
example: This plastic tube is made from a strong polymer.
exampleChinese: 这根塑料管是由一种坚固的聚合物制成的。

meaning: adj. ⼈⼝众多的，⼈⼝稠密的
example: India is a populous country with many large cities.
exampleChinese: 印度是一个人口众多、拥有许多大城市的国家。

meaning: n. 钾碱
example: Farmers use potash to help some crops grow.
exampleChinese: 农民使用钾碱来帮助一些作物生长。

meaning: adv. 强有⼒地，有效地；结实地
example: The speaker explained the idea powerfully and clearly.
exampleChinese: 演讲者有力而清楚地阐述了这个观点。

meaning: adj. ⽆权的，⽆能的，⽆影响⼒的
example: Without money, the family felt powerless to move.
exampleChinese: 没有钱，这家人觉得无力搬家。

meaning: n. 实际情况；实⽤性；实际，务实
example: Her design showed both style and practicality.
exampleChinese: 她的设计兼具风格和实用性。

meaning: n. (北美的) ⼤草原
example: The bison crossed the prairie at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时，野牛穿过大草原。

meaning: adj. 捕⻝性的；(⼈) 掠夺性的
example: The lion is a predatory animal that hunts deer.
exampleChinese: 狮子是一种捕食鹿类的食肉动物。

meaning: adv. 预料中地
example: Predictably, the bus arrived late in the rain.
exampleChinese: 不出所料，公交车在雨中晚点了。

meaning: adj. 额叶前部的
example: The doctor studied the prefrontal part of the brain.
exampleChinese: 医生研究了大脑的额叶前部。

meaning: adj. 史前的
example: We found prehistoric tools near the cave.
exampleChinese: 我们在洞穴附近发现了史前工具。

meaning: n. 全神贯注，使⼈专注的事物
example: Her main preoccupation was the final exam.
exampleChinese: 她最关心的是期末考试。

meaning: n. 先决条件，前提 adj. 作为先决条件的
example: A science lab is a prerequisite for this course.
exampleChinese: 这个课程的先决条件是有科学实验室。

meaning: adj. ⾃负的，冒昧的
example: It was presumptuous to speak for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 代表全班发言是很冒昧的。

meaning: vt. 以…为前提，预先假定
example: You cannot presuppose that everyone has the same answer.
exampleChinese: 你不能预先假定每个人都有相同的答案。

meaning: n. 预防，防范
example: Good sleep is important for disease prevention.
exampleChinese: 良好的睡眠对疾病预防很重要。

meaning: adj. 战前的，(尤指) ⼆战以前的
example: They restored a prewar house near the station.
exampleChinese: 他们修复了一座车站附近的战前房屋。

meaning: adj. 神职⼈员的
example: The priestly voice sounded calm and gentle.
exampleChinese: 那位神职人员的声音听起来平静而温和。

meaning: adv. 主要地
example: The team worked primarily after school.
exampleChinese: 这个团队主要在放学后活动。

meaning: n. 打印机；印刷⼯⼈，印刷公司
example: The printer is out of paper again.
exampleChinese: 打印机又没纸了。

meaning: n. 处理器；加⼯者，加⼯机器
example: The processor in this laptop is very fast.
exampleChinese: 这台笔记本电脑里的处理器很快。

meaning: n. (不好的) 倾向，嗜好
example: He has a proclivity for breaking the rules.
exampleChinese: 他有违规的倾向。

meaning: n. ⽣殖，⽣育，繁衍
example: Procreation is a natural part of life for many species.
exampleChinese: 繁衍是许多物种生命中的自然部分。

meaning: vt. vi. 使专业化，使职业化
example: The school plans to professionalize its sports program.
exampleChinese: 学校计划让它的体育项目更加专业化。

meaning: n. 教授的级别 (或职位等)
example: She earned a professorship at a top university.
exampleChinese: 她在一所顶尖大学获得了教授职位。

meaning: adj. 熟练的，精通的
example: He is proficient in English and math.
exampleChinese: 他英语和数学都很熟练。

meaning: adj. 营利的，能赚钱的
example: The company launched a profit-making service.
exampleChinese: 这家公司推出了一项营利性服务。

meaning: n. 进展，发展，演变
example: There has been steady progression in her reading skills.
exampleChinese: 她的阅读能力一直在稳步进步。

meaning: n. 预测；投影；投射；突起；体现
example: The teacher used a chart to show the projection of future growth.
exampleChinese: 老师用图表展示了未来增长的预测。

meaning: n. 筹办⽅；倡导者；推销者
example: The promoter organized a music festival for the town.
exampleChinese: 这位筹办方为小镇组织了一场音乐节。

meaning: n. 晋升；促销；促进；晋级
example: Her promotion came after five years of hard work.
exampleChinese: 她在努力工作五年后得到了晋升。

meaning: n. 声明，公告，宣告
example: The principal made a pronouncement about the new rules.
exampleChinese: 校长就新规定发表了声明。

meaning: n. 相称原则，恰当性
example: The judge considered proportionality before deciding the penalty.
exampleChinese: 法官在决定处罚前考虑了相称原则。

meaning: n. 保护，防卫；保护物；保障
example: Helmets give riders extra protection.
exampleChinese: 头盔能给骑车人额外的保护。

meaning: adj. 省的；外省的；守旧的，迂腐的 n. 乡巴佬，外乡⼈
example: He moved from a provincial town to the capital.
exampleChinese: 他从一个外省小镇搬到了首都。

meaning: adj. 挑衅的，煽动的；挑逗的
example: Her provocative comment started an argument.
exampleChinese: 她那句挑衅的话引发了一场争论。

meaning: n. 代理权；代理⼈，代表；指标
example: The writer used a proxy to vote at the meeting.
exampleChinese: 这位作家在会议上使用了代理人投票。

meaning: n. 谈性⾊变，过分正经
example: His prudery made everyone uncomfortable.
exampleChinese: 他过分正经的态度让大家都不自在。

meaning: adj. (药物) 致幻的；光怪陆离的
example: The poster had a psychedelic design with bright colors.
exampleChinese: 那张海报有一种色彩鲜艳、光怪陆离的设计。

meaning: adj. (药) 作⽤于精神的
example: Doctors warned that the drug is psychoactive.
exampleChinese: 医生警告说这种药物会作用于精神。

meaning: adj. ⼼理的；⼼理学的
example: The movie explores the psychological effects of stress.
exampleChinese: 这部电影探讨了压力带来的心理影响。

meaning: n. ⼼理学家
example: The psychologist listened carefully to the child's fears.
exampleChinese: 那位心理学家认真倾听了孩子的恐惧。

meaning: vt. 宣传，推⼴
example: The school will publicize the art contest on its website.
exampleChinese: 学校将在网站上宣传这次美术比赛。

meaning: n. 南⽠
example: We carved a pumpkin for Halloween.
exampleChinese: 我们为万圣节雕了一个南瓜。

meaning: n. 标点符号，标点⽤法
example: Please check your punctuation before you hand in the essay.
exampleChinese: 交作文前请检查你的标点。

meaning: n. 禁欲者，苦⾏者；清教徒 adj. 清教徒的，禁欲苦⾏的
example: In the story, the puritan refused all luxury.
exampleChinese: 在这个故事里，这位清教徒拒绝了一切奢侈。

meaning: vi. 声称，⾃称，标榜 n. 主旨⼤意
example: The report purport to explain the delay, but it gives no clear reason.
exampleChinese: 这份报告声称要解释延误，但没有给出明确原因。

meaning: n. 反对，抵制
example: The proposal met strong pushback from the parents.
exampleChinese: 这项提议遭到了家长们的强烈反对。

meaning: adj. 有问题的，不确定的，可疑的
example: The plan is questionable because it lacks evidence.
exampleChinese: 这个计划有问题，因为它缺乏证据。

meaning: adj. 聪颖的，机敏的，机智的
example: The quick-witted boy answered the joke in seconds.
exampleChinese: 那个机敏的男孩很快就接住了这个笑话。

meaning: n. 葡萄⼲
example: She added a raisin to the salad.
exampleChinese: 她往沙拉里加了一颗葡萄干。

meaning: vi. 闲逛；闲聊；(植物) 蔓⽣ n. 漫步，散步；闲扯，随笔
example: We can ramble through the park after dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭后可以在公园里漫步。

meaning: adv. 随机地，随意地，任意地
example: He chose the answers randomly.
exampleChinese: 他是随机选择答案的。

meaning: n. 罕⻅的⼈ (或物)；稀有，罕⻅
example: A blue diamond is a rarity in that museum.
exampleChinese: 那座博物馆里的一颗蓝钻石很罕见。

example: He ate a rasher of bacon with toast.
exampleChinese: 他吃了一片培根和吐司。

meaning: n. 核反应堆
example: The reactor was shut down for maintenance.
exampleChinese: 核反应堆因维护而关闭了。

meaning: vt. 重申，再次确定
example: The company reaffirm its commitment to safety.
exampleChinese: 这家公司重申了对安全的承诺。

meaning: n. 房地产经纪⼈
example: The realtor showed us a small apartment downtown.
exampleChinese: 那位房地产经纪人带我们看了一套市中心的小公寓。

meaning: vt. 重建，重造；使恢复
example: They will rebuild the old bridge next year.
exampleChinese: 他们明年将重建那座旧桥。

meaning: n. (⼤声) 朗诵，背诵；逐个列举
example: The teacher asked for a recitation of the poem.
exampleChinese: 老师要求背诵这首诗。

meaning: vt. vi. 重新考虑
example: Please reconsider your decision before tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 请在明天前重新考虑你的决定。

meaning: vt. 重建，重造；使重现，使再现
example: Engineers will reconstruct the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 工程师们将重建这座旧桥。

meaning: n. 招聘⼈员，征召⼈员
example: The recruiter called me to schedule an interview.
exampleChinese: 招聘人员打电话给我安排面试。

meaning: vt. 重新定义，重新界定
example: The company will redefine its goals next year.
exampleChinese: 公司明年将重新定义它的目标。

meaning: vt. 使改变⽤途；使改变⽅向或路线
example: Please redirect the call to my office.
exampleChinese: 请把电话转到我的办公室。

meaning: n. 裁员；多余，累赘
example: The factory cut jobs because of redundancy.
exampleChinese: 工厂因为裁员而削减了岗位。

meaning: n. 红杉，红⽊
example: A tall redwood grew beside the trail.
exampleChinese: 一棵高大的红杉长在小路旁。

meaning: vt. 重新考虑，再评价，再评估
example: We need to re-evaluate the plan before Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在周五前重新评估这个计划。

meaning: n. 反驳，驳斥，辩驳
example: Her refutation made the rumor seem false.
exampleChinese: 她的驳斥让这个谣言显得不可信。

meaning: vt. 重新得到，恢复；返回，重返
example: The medicine helped him regain his strength.
exampleChinese: 这药帮助他恢复了体力。

meaning: adv. 令⼈遗憾地，使⼈懊悔地
example: Regrettably, the train was already gone.
exampleChinese: 令人遗憾的是，火车已经开走了。

meaning: adv. 相对地，相较⽽⾔地
example: This town is relatively quiet at night.
exampleChinese: 这个小镇夜里相对安静。

meaning: n. 遗物，遗迹，遗⻛；圣⻣，圣物
example: The museum displayed an ancient relic.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一件古代遗物。

meaning: vi. 再婚
example: My aunt will remarry next spring.
exampleChinese: 我姑姑明年春天将再婚。

meaning: adj. 持续恶化的；残酷⽆情的
example: The remorseless storm destroyed several homes.
exampleChinese: 这场持续恶化的风暴毁掉了几所房子。

meaning: vi. ⻝⾔，违约
example: He did not renege on his promise.
exampleChinese: 他没有违背自己的承诺。

meaning: adj. 有名的，闻名的，受尊敬的
example: The renowned doctor visited our school.
exampleChinese: 那位著名的医生来我们学校参观了。

meaning: vt. vi. 再订购 vt. 重新排列，重新安排
example: Please reorder the books on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 请重新排列书架上的书。

meaning: n. 影响，反响，恶果
example: The new rule had a bad repercussion.
exampleChinese: 这条新规定产生了不良后果。

meaning: adj. 可替换的，可代替的
example: This phone case is replaceable if it breaks.
exampleChinese: 如果这个手机壳坏了，它是可以更换的。

meaning: adj. 记者的，新闻报道的
example: The article has a reportorial tone.
exampleChinese: 这篇文章带有新闻报道的语气。

meaning: adj. (艺术⻛格) 具象派的；代表性的
example: The painting has a representational style.
exampleChinese: 这幅画采用了具象派风格。

meaning: adj. 繁殖的，⽣殖的；翻印的，复制的
example: The reproductive system changes during puberty.
exampleChinese: 生殖系统会在青春期发生变化。

meaning: vt. 改变…的形状 (或结构)，重塑
example: The artist can reshape the clay into a small bowl.
exampleChinese: 这位艺术家可以把黏土重新塑成一个小碗。

meaning: n. 辞职信，辞职；屈从，顺从
example: She handed in her resignation after ten years at the company.
exampleChinese: 她在公司工作十年后递交了辞呈。

meaning: adj. 值得尊敬的；可观的，相当好的
example: The old teacher is a respectable man in our town.
exampleChinese: 这位老教师在我们镇上是一位受人尊敬的人。

meaning: n. 修复，整修；恢复
example: The restoration of the painting took six months.
exampleChinese: 这幅画的修复花了六个月。

meaning: adj. 限制性的，约束性的
example: The school has restrictive rules about mobile phones.
exampleChinese: 学校对手机有严格的限制性规定。

meaning: n. 修订，修改；修订稿；复习
example: The teacher made a revision to the report.
exampleChinese: 老师对这份报告做了修正。

meaning: vt. 给予…新的活⼒，使复兴
example: The new park will revitalize the downtown area.
exampleChinese: 新的公园将为市中心地区注入新的活力。

meaning: n. 复兴，复苏，再流⾏；重新上演
example: The revival of the old play drew a large crowd.
exampleChinese: 这部旧戏的重新上演吸引了大批观众。

meaning: n. 丰富，富饶，浓烈
example: The richness of the soil helps the crops grow well.
exampleChinese: 土壤的肥沃有助于庄稼长得很好。

meaning: adj. 正义的，正直的，正派的
example: She is known for her righteous behavior.
exampleChinese: 她因正直的行为而闻名。

meaning: n. 机器⼈学
example: He wants to study robotics at university.
exampleChinese: 他想在大学里学习机器人学。

meaning: n. ⽆赖，捣蛋⻤；骗⼦，流氓 adj. 暴戾的；(动物) 离群的
example: The rogue stole the wallet from the tourist.
exampleChinese: 那个无赖偷走了游客的钱包。

meaning: adj. 玫瑰⾊的；乐观的
example: The sky looked rosy after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后天空看起来一片玫瑰色。

meaning: n. 圆形建筑，圆形⼤厅
example: We met in the rotunda near the museum entrance.
exampleChinese: 我们在博物馆入口附近的圆形大厅见面。

meaning: n. 碎⽯，碎砖，⽡砾
example: The road was covered with rubble after the earthquake.
exampleChinese: 地震后，道路上满是瓦砾。

meaning: vt. vi. (使) 沙沙作响 vt. 偷窃 (牲⼝) n. 轻轻的摩擦声，沙沙声
example: I heard the leaves rustle in the wind.
exampleChinese: 我听见树叶在风中沙沙作响。

meaning: n. ⻋辙；⼀成不变的状态；发情期
example: He felt stuck in a rut at his job.
exampleChinese: 他觉得自己的工作陷入了墨守成规的状态。

meaning: n. ⿏尾草；智者，圣⼈ adj. 睿智的，贤明的
example: The sage gave us calm and wise advice.
exampleChinese: 这位智者给了我们冷静而明智的建议。

meaning: adj. 含盐的，咸的 n. 盐⽔
example: The doctor used saline to clean the wound.
exampleChinese: 医生用盐水清洗了伤口。

meaning: n. (尤指⾮洲的) 稀树草原
example: Giraffes were grazing on the savannah.
exampleChinese: 长颈鹿正在稀树草原上吃草。

meaning: n. 分裂，教会分裂
example: A schism split the church into two groups.
exampleChinese: 一次分裂使教会分成了两个派别。

meaning: adj. 学校的，学业的，教育的
example: The school library has a scholastic poster about famous writers.
exampleChinese: 学校图书馆里有一张关于著名作家的教育海报。

meaning: n. 学校教育
example: She got her schooling in a small town.
exampleChinese: 她在一个小镇接受了学校教育。

meaning: n. 勺，铲 (的量)；独家新闻 vt. vi. ⽤勺舀；(敏捷地) 抱起 vt. 抢先报道
example: He used a scoop to serve the rice.
exampleChinese: 他用勺子盛米饭。

meaning: vt. vi. 擦洗，刷洗 vt. 取消 (原有安排) n. 擦洗，刷洗；灌⽊丛；⼿术⾐
example: Please scrub the floor before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前把地板擦洗干净。

meaning: adj. 灼热的，⽕辣辣的；猛烈批评的
example: The searing heat made it hard to walk outside.
exampleChinese: 灼热的高温让人很难在外面行走。

meaning: adj. 季节性的；合时令的
example: We buy seasonal fruit in summer.
exampleChinese: 我们夏天买当季水果。

meaning: adj. 世俗的，⾮宗教的；⻓期性的
example: The museum is secular and open to everyone.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆是非宗教性的，对所有人开放。

meaning: n. 煽动叛乱的⾔⾏
example: The police arrested him for sedition.
exampleChinese: 警察因他煽动叛乱而逮捕了他。

example: She learned self-help from a book.
exampleChinese: 她从一本书里学会了自助。

meaning: adj. ⾃私的
example: A self-interested plan helps no one in the long run.
exampleChinese: 从长远看，自私的计划对谁都没有好处。

meaning: adj. 轰动的；耸⼈听闻的；极好的
example: The team made a sensational comeback.
exampleChinese: 这支队伍完成了轰动性的逆转。

meaning: n. 体贴；敏感性；过敏性；敏感
example: He showed great sensitivity to her feelings.
exampleChinese: 他对她的感受表现出很强的体贴。

meaning: n. 传感器
example: The sensor on the door can detect movement.
exampleChinese: 门上的传感器可以检测到移动。

meaning: adj. 感官的，感觉的
example: The therapist studied sensory response in children.
exampleChinese: 治疗师研究了儿童的感官反应。

meaning: adj. 愉悦感官的，(尤指) ⾁欲的
example: The restaurant offered a sensual dessert.
exampleChinese: 这家餐厅提供了一道令人愉悦感官的甜点。

meaning: n. 布道，讲道；说教，训导
example: The preacher gave a long sermon on kindness.
exampleChinese: 传教士就善良作了长篇布道。

meaning: adj. 性的；⽣殖的；性别的
example: The school has strict sexual education lessons.
exampleChinese: 学校有严格的性教育课程。

meaning: n. 胫部，⼩腿 vi. 快速地爬
example: He hurt his shin while playing soccer.
exampleChinese: 他踢足球时伤到了小腿。

meaning: n. 船只运载量
example: The shipload of food arrived at the port this morning.
exampleChinese: 这船货食物今天早上抵达了港口。

meaning: n. 近路；(做某事的) 快捷办法
example: Take the shortcut through the park.
exampleChinese: 走公园里的近路吧。

meaning: n. 短期效益主义
example: Short-termism can hurt a company's long-term growth.
exampleChinese: 短期效益主义会损害公司的长期增长。

meaning: n. 裹⼫布，寿⾐；覆盖物，遮蔽物 vt. 覆盖，遮蔽；隐瞒，保密
example: A white shroud covered the old statue.
exampleChinese: 一块白色覆盖物盖住了那座旧雕像。

meaning: vt. 筛 (⾯粉、沙⼦等) vt. vi. 筛查，仔细查找
example: We can sift the flour before baking the cake.
exampleChinese: 我们可以在烤蛋糕前筛一下面粉。

meaning: adj. 能看⻅的；视⼒…的
example: The sighted guide led the group safely across the street.
exampleChinese: 那位能看见的向导带领大家安全过了马路。

meaning: n. 淤泥，(沉积的) 泥沙 vi. 淤塞
example: Mud and silt blocked the small canal.
exampleChinese: 泥和淤泥堵住了那条小运河。

meaning: vt. vi. ⽤⽂⽕炖，煨 vi. 充满 (怒⽕)；(争论等) 即将爆发 n. 即将沸腾的状态，⽂⽕炖
example: The soup will simmer for ten minutes.
exampleChinese: 这锅汤会用文火炖十分钟。

meaning: n. 简化
example: The teacher made a simplification of the math rule.
exampleChinese: 老师对这条数学规则做了简化。

meaning: n. 模仿，模拟，仿真
example: The flight simulator gives a realistic simulation of landing.
exampleChinese: 这个飞行模拟器提供了逼真的着陆模拟。

meaning: adv. 同时地，同步地
example: The two bells rang simultaneously.
exampleChinese: 两个铃同时响了。

meaning: adj. 不祥的，有凶兆的，邪恶的
example: There was a sinister shadow near the empty house.
exampleChinese: 空房子附近有一个不祥的影子。

meaning: adj. 没钱的，⾝⽆分⽂的
example: He was skint after paying the rent.
exampleChinese: 他付完房租后身无分文了。

meaning: n. 船⻓ vt. 当船⻓ (或运动队队⻓等)
example: My uncle will skipper the boat on the lake.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔会担任这条湖上小船的船长。

meaning: n. (房顶的) 天窗
example: A skylight filled the room with bright morning light.
exampleChinese: 天窗让阳光照亮了房间。

meaning: vt. 挂，吊；(随便地) 扔；撵⾛ n. 悬带；吊索；婴⼉吊兜；投⽯器
example: Can you sling that bag over your shoulder?
exampleChinese: 你能把那个包挂到肩上吗？

meaning: n. 疏漏，差错
example: I made a slip-up in my spelling test.
exampleChinese: 我在拼写测试中犯了一个疏漏。

meaning: n. 烂泥；⼯业污物
example: The pipe was full of sludge.
exampleChinese: 管道里满是烂泥。

meaning: adj. 缓慢的，迟钝的，⽆精打采的
example: After lunch, I felt sluggish and sleepy.
exampleChinese: 午饭后，我感到迟钝又困倦。

meaning: n. 照⽚，快照；简介，简要说明
example: This snapshot shows our class trip to the museum.
exampleChinese: 这张快照展示了我们的班级博物馆之旅。

meaning: n. 运动鞋
example: He bought a new pair of sneaker for basketball.
exampleChinese: 他买了一双新的运动鞋打篮球。

meaning: n. 逗留，暂住 vi. 逗留，暂住
example: They made a short sojourn in Paris before returning home.
exampleChinese: 他们回家前在巴黎短暂逗留了一段时间。

meaning: n. 奏鸣曲
example: She practiced a sonata on the piano.
exampleChinese: 她在钢琴上练习了一首奏鸣曲。

meaning: n. 垃圾邮件；(斯帕姆) 午餐⾁ vt. 向…滥发垃圾邮件
example: My inbox was full of spam after I posted my email online.
exampleChinese: 我把邮箱地址发到网上后，收件箱里全是垃圾邮件。

meaning: n. ⿇雀
example: A sparrow landed on the window.
exampleChinese: 一只麻雀落在窗台上。

meaning: adj. 空间的，与空间有关的
example: The map uses spatial data to show where the buildings are.
exampleChinese: 这张地图使用空间数据来显示建筑物的位置。

meaning: n. 专业，专⻓；专⻔化，专业化
example: His specialization in biology helped him find a good job.
exampleChinese: 他在生物学方面的专长帮他找到了一份好工作。

meaning: adv. 明确地；专⻔地；确切地说
example: Please state your question specifically.
exampleChinese: 请明确地说出你的问题。

meaning: adj. (信息) 推测性的；(⽣意) 投机的
example: The report was based on speculative ideas, not facts.
exampleChinese: 这份报告基于推测性的想法，而不是事实。

meaning: adj. ⽤过的；精疲⼒竭的
example: After the long hike, she felt completely spent.
exampleChinese: 长途徒步后，她感到精疲力竭。

meaning: n. 尖状物；激增；(防滑) 鞋钉 vt. ⽤尖物刺⼊；在…中偷偷掺⼊ vi. 激增
example: A sudden spike in water use worried the city leaders.
exampleChinese: 用水量的突然激增让市政领导很担心。

meaning: n. ⾃发性，⾃然
example: We liked the spontaneity of their trip to the beach.
exampleChinese: 我们喜欢他们去海滩旅行时的自然随性。

meaning: n. 聚光灯；媒体和公众的注意 vt. ⽤聚光灯照；突出报道
example: A bright spotlight shone on the singer.
exampleChinese: 一盏明亮的聚光灯照在歌手身上。

meaning: n. 作乐，狂欢；⼀阵 (犯罪活动)
example: The class went on a shopping spree after the exam ended.
exampleChinese: 考试结束后，全班去尽情购物了一番。

meaning: n. 春季，春天
example: Springtime is the best season for planting flowers.
exampleChinese: 春天是种花的最佳季节。

meaning: n. 股东，利益相关者
example: Every stakeholder agreed to support the new plan.
exampleChinese: 每位利益相关者都同意支持这个新计划。

meaning: vt. 使标准化，使合乎标准
example: The school will standardize the test format next year.
exampleChinese: 学校明年将使考试格式标准化。

meaning: adj. 站着的；常设的，永久的 n. ⾝份，名声；名次表；存在时间
example: Her standing in the class improved after the project.
exampleChinese: 完成这个项目后，她在班里的名声提高了。

meaning: n. 停⽌，停顿，停滞
example: Traffic came to a standstill after the big storm.
exampleChinese: 大暴风雨过后，交通完全停滞了。

meaning: adj. 满天繁星的；像星星的
example: We slept under a starry sky on the camping trip.
exampleChinese: 露营旅行时，我们睡在满天繁星的天空下。

meaning: vt. 存放，藏匿 (贵重物品) n. ⼀批 (贮藏物)；藏匿处
example: He kept a stash of old letters in a desk drawer.
exampleChinese: 他在书桌抽屉里藏着一叠旧信。

meaning: adv. 统计地，统计学上地
example: The results were statistically significant in the study.
exampleChinese: 这项研究的结果在统计学上具有显著性。

meaning: n. 统计学家，统计员
example: The statistician checked the numbers twice before publishing them.
exampleChinese: 那位统计学家在发表前把数据核对了两遍。

meaning: adj. 坚定的，不动摇的
example: She remained steadfast even when the work got hard.
exampleChinese: 即使工作变得艰难，她依然坚定不移。

meaning: n. 模版，蜡纸 vt. vi. ⽤模板印(⽂字或图案)
example: Can you stencil your name on the box?
exampleChinese: 你能用模板把你的名字印在盒子上吗？

meaning: n. 速记员
example: The stenographer typed every word in the meeting quickly.
exampleChinese: 速记员快速记录下了会议中的每一个词。

meaning: n. 炖菜 vt. vi. 炖，煨 vi. 思考，担忧
example: We ate a hot beef stew for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚餐吃了一份热腾腾的牛肉炖菜。

meaning: n. 黏性，黏黏糊糊
example: The stickiness of the tape made it hard to remove.
exampleChinese: 这卷胶带的黏性让它很难撕下来。

meaning: n. (物资的) ⼤量的储备，囤积 vt. ⼤量贮备，囤积 (物资)
example: The farmer kept a stockpile of grain for winter.
exampleChinese: 那位农民囤了一大批粮食过冬。

meaning: n. 仓库；(信息等的) 宝库
example: The old barn served as a storehouse for tools.
exampleChinese: 那座旧谷仓被用作工具仓库。

meaning: vt. 骑，跨坐；横跨
example: He can straddle the fence with both feet on the posts.
exampleChinese: 他可以双脚踩在木桩上跨坐在栅栏上。

meaning: adv. 奇怪地，不寻常地
example: She looked strangely quiet during the meeting.
exampleChinese: 她在会议上显得异常安静。

meaning: adj. 战略性的
example: The team made a strategic plan before the game.
exampleChinese: 球队在比赛前制定了战略计划。

meaning: vi. ⾛失；离题，⾛神；有外遇 adj. ⾛失的，离群的；零星的 n. ⾛失的宠物；离群的⼈或物
example: The cat may stray from home if the door is open.
exampleChinese: 如果门开着，这只猫可能会走失。

meaning: adv. 严格地；仅限于，完全地
example: Please stay strictly within the rules.
exampleChinese: 请严格遵守规则。

meaning: adv. 引⼈注⽬地，显著地，突出地
example: The mountain view was strikingly beautiful at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时分，山景美得格外引人注目。

meaning: adj. (法规等) 严格的；(财政)紧缩的
example: The school has stringent rules about attendance.
exampleChinese: 这所学校对出勤有严格的规定。

meaning: adj. 结构上的，构造上的
example: The bridge needed structural repairs after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，这座桥需要结构修复。

meaning: adj. 卡住的；困于…的；甩不掉的
example: My bike is stuck in the mud.
exampleChinese: 我的自行车卡在泥里了。

meaning: adv. 刻意地，成⼼
example: He studiously ignored the noisy crowd.
exampleChinese: 他故意无视那群吵闹的人。

meaning: adj. 有格调的，时尚的
example: She wore a stylish coat to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件很时尚的大衣去参加派对。

meaning: n. 发型师，造型师；⽂体家
example: The stylist gave her a new haircut.
exampleChinese: 造型师给她剪了一个新发型。

meaning: adj. 潜意识的 n. 潜意识
example: The fear was buried in her subconscious.
exampleChinese: 那种恐惧埋藏在她的潜意识里。

meaning: n. 副标题，⼦标题
example: A subheading can make a long article easier to read.
exampleChinese: 副标题可以让长文章更容易阅读。

meaning: n. 屈服，投降；提交 (的⽂件或建议)
example: His submission was accepted by the teacher.
exampleChinese: 他的提交内容被老师接受了。

meaning: n. (报纸杂志等的) 订阅者，⽤⼾
example: Each subscriber receives the magazine by email.
exampleChinese: 每位订阅者都会通过电子邮件收到这本杂志。

meaning: adv. 随后，后来，接着
example: She arrived on Monday and subsequently moved to Beijing.
exampleChinese: 她周一到了，随后搬到了北京。

meaning: vt. 给…发补贴，补助
example: The city will subsidize the new bus route for students.
exampleChinese: 这个城市将为学生补贴新的公交线路。

meaning: adv. ⾮常，⼤量地；⼤体上
example: The price dropped substantially after the holiday sale.
exampleChinese: 假日促销后，价格大幅下降。

meaning: vt. 证实，证明
example: The photos substantiate his story about the accident.
exampleChinese: 这些照片证明了他关于事故的说法。

meaning: n. 字幕；副标题 vt. 给…加字幕
example: The movie has a Chinese subtitle for young viewers.
exampleChinese: 这部电影有给小观众看的中文字幕。

meaning: adj. 郊区的；平淡乏味的，古板的
example: They moved to a suburban neighborhood last year.
exampleChinese: 他们去年搬到了郊区的一个社区。

meaning: adv. 成功地，顺利地
example: She successfully finished the race in under two hours.
exampleChinese: 她成功地在两小时内完成了比赛。

meaning: adv. 突然地，出乎意料地
example: Suddenly, the lights went out in the classroom.
exampleChinese: 突然，教室里的灯灭了。

meaning: n. 适合，适宜
example: We checked the suitability of the room for a meeting.
exampleChinese: 我们检查了这个房间是否适合开会。

meaning: conj. 假设，假定，设想
example: Supposing it rains, we can play board games indoors.
exampleChinese: 假设会下雨，我们可以在室内玩棋盘游戏。

meaning: adj. 外科⼿术的；精确的
example: The surgeon used a surgical tool to remove the stone.
exampleChinese: 外科医生用外科器械取出了结石。

meaning: adv. 令⼈吃惊地，出⼈意料地
example: Surprisingly, the small team won the championship.
exampleChinese: 令人吃惊的是，这支小队赢得了冠军。

meaning: adv. 怀疑地；可疑地
example: He looked at me suspiciously when I entered the room.
exampleChinese: 我进房间时，他怀疑地看着我。

meaning: adj. 可持续的
example: Wind power is a sustainable source of energy.
exampleChinese: 风能是一种可持续的能源。

meaning: vi. vt. 交换；换班 vt. 替换 n. 交换
example: We made a swap of seats after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们交换了座位。

meaning: n. 讨厌的⼈；猪
example: The old swine chased food around the pen.
exampleChinese: 那头老猪在围栏里追着食物跑。

meaning: adj. (⾝体) 肿胀的；(河⽔) 上涨的
example: His ankle was swollen after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 他走了很久后，脚踝肿了。

meaning: adj. 象征性的，作为象征的
example: The candle was symbolic of hope and peace.
exampleChinese: 这支蜡烛象征着希望与和平。

meaning: n. 标语，⼝号
example: “Just do it” is a famous tagline.
exampleChinese: Just do it”是一句著名的标语。

meaning: adj. 话多的，健谈的
example: My sister is very talkative and loves to chat.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐很健谈，喜欢聊天。

meaning: n. 纳税⼈
example: Every taxpayer should know where the money goes.
exampleChinese: 每个纳税人都应该知道钱花到哪里去了。

meaning: n. 技师，技术⼈员
example: The technicist fixed the broken machine quickly.
exampleChinese: 那位技师很快修好了坏掉的机器。

meaning: n. 范例，样板；(切割⽤的) 模板
example: Use this template to make the poster.
exampleChinese: 用这个范例来制作海报。

meaning: n. 地形，地势，地带
example: The road crossed rough terrain.
exampleChinese: 这条路穿过了崎岖的地形。

meaning: adj. ⽂本的，篇章的
example: The teacher asked for a textual analysis.
exampleChinese: 老师要求做文本分析。

meaning: vi. vt. 从理论上说明，形成理论
example: Scientists will theorize about the cause of the storm.
exampleChinese: 科学家们将从理论上说明这场风暴的原因。

meaning: n. 温度⾃动调节器，恒温器
example: She turned the thermostat down before bed.
exampleChinese: 她在睡前把恒温器调低了。

meaning: n. 智库
example: The think tank studied the new education policy.
exampleChinese: 这个智库研究了新的教育政策。

meaning: adj. 粗⼼⼤意的，⽋考虑的
example: It was thoughtless of him to leave the door open.
exampleChinese: 他把门开着就走了，真是太粗心了。

meaning: n. 惊险⼩说 (或电影等)
example: He read a thriller before bed.
exampleChinese: 他睡前读了一本惊险小说。

meaning: adj. 永恒的，不受时间影响的
example: The painting has a timeless beauty.
exampleChinese: 这幅画有一种永恒的美。

meaning: n. 做某事所需要的时间，期限
example: The project has a tight timescale.
exampleChinese: 这个项目的期限很紧。

meaning: n. 羞怯，胆⼩
example: Her timidity kept her from speaking up.
exampleChinese: 她因为羞怯而不敢开口。

meaning: adj. 巨⼤的，⼒⼤⽆⽐的，重⼤的
example: The titanic bridge crossed the river.
exampleChinese: 这座巨大的桥横跨了河流。

meaning: n. 学步的⼉童
example: The toddler held his mother's hand.
exampleChinese: 那个学步的儿童拉着妈妈的手。

meaning: adj. (打给服务部⻔的电话) 免费的
example: Call our toll-free number for help.
exampleChinese: 请拨打我们的免费电话寻求帮助。

meaning: n. 侵权⾏为
example: The company faced a tort case after the accident.
exampleChinese: 事故发生后，这家公司面临侵权案件。

meaning: n. 锦标赛；(中世纪骑⼠的) ⽐武
example: Our school won the tournament last year.
exampleChinese: 我们学校去年赢得了锦标赛。

meaning: n. 城镇居⺠
example: The townsfolk gathered in the square.
exampleChinese: 城镇居民聚集在广场上。

meaning: adj. 可追溯的，可追踪的
example: The package is traceable online.
exampleChinese: 这个包裹可以在线追踪。

meaning: n. 轨迹，弹道；发展轨迹
example: The rocket's trajectory was easy to track.
exampleChinese: 这枚火箭的轨迹很容易追踪。

meaning: n. 流浪汉；沉重的脚步声 vi. vt. (⻓时间地) ⽤沉重的脚步⾛
example: A tramp walked slowly down the road.
exampleChinese: 一个流浪汉慢慢地走在路上。

meaning: adj. 超验论的，与超验主义相关的 n. 超验论者，超验主义者
example: The transcendentalist wrote about nature and the soul.
exampleChinese: 这位超验主义者写了关于自然和灵魂的内容。

meaning: vt. 记录，抄录，转录；改编 (乐曲)
example: Please transcribe the speech into text.
exampleChinese: 请把这段演讲转录成文字。

meaning: n. 艰苦劳动，艰⾟
example: The mountain climb was a true travail for the team.
exampleChinese: 这次登山对这个团队来说是一场真正的艰苦劳动。

meaning: vt. 横越，横渡 n. (在陡坡上的)侧向移动
example: The hikers will traverse the valley before sunset.
exampleChinese: 徒步旅行者将在日落前横越山谷。

meaning: adj. 部落的
example: The museum displayed a tribal mask from Africa.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一张来自非洲的部落面具。

meaning: vi. vt. (使) 滴，(使) 淌；(使) 慢慢移动 n. 涓涓细流；缓慢移动的⼀⼩群
example: A small trickle of water ran down the rock.
exampleChinese: 一股细细的水流顺着岩石流下来。

meaning: n. 闹事者，捣蛋⻤
example: The troublemaker kept disrupting the class.
exampleChinese: 那个捣蛋鬼一直在扰乱课堂。

meaning: n. 巡回剧团，戏班⼦，歌舞团
example: The troupe performed for the school children.
exampleChinese: 这个巡回剧团为孩子们进行了演出。

meaning: n. 值得信赖，可靠
example: Her trustworthiness made her a good leader.
exampleChinese: 她的可靠让她成了一位很好的领导者。

meaning: n. 周转期，时限；好转；彻底转变
example: The company saw a quick turnaround after the new plan.
exampleChinese: 公司在新计划实施后很快出现了好转。

meaning: adv. 最终，最后；归根结底，根本上
example: Ultimately, hard work leads to success.
exampleChinese: 归根结底，努力工作会带来成功。

meaning: adj. 不能接受的
example: That rude comment was unacceptable in class.
exampleChinese: 那句粗鲁的话在课堂上是不能接受的。

meaning: adv. 难以解释地，莫名其妙地
example: He looked up unaccountably and smiled.
exampleChinese: 他莫名其妙地抬起头来笑了。

meaning: adj. 未被认可的
example: The prize remained unacknowledged for years.
exampleChinese: 这个奖项多年未被认可。

meaning: adj. 未受影响的；真诚⾃然的
example: She stayed unaffected by the noise outside.
exampleChinese: 外面的噪音没有影响到她。

meaning: adj. 买不起的，负担不起的
example: That apartment is unaffordable for most students.
exampleChinese: 那套公寓对大多数学生来说都买不起。

meaning: adj. 未解答的；未回复的
example: His message went unanswered all day.
exampleChinese: 他的消息一整天都没有得到回复。

meaning: adj. 不吸引⼈的，难看的
example: The old building looked dark and unattractive.
exampleChinese: 那座旧建筑看起来昏暗又不吸引人。

meaning: adj. 不知道的，没意识到的
example: She was unaware of the surprise party.
exampleChinese: 她并不知道有这个惊喜派对。

meaning: adv. 不能忍受地，⽆法容忍地
example: It was unbearably hot in the small room.
exampleChinese: 这个小房间里热得让人无法忍受。

meaning: adj. 公正的，⽆偏⻅的
example: The judge tried to be unbiased in the case.
exampleChinese: 法官在这个案件中努力做到公正。

meaning: adj. 异常的，难以解释的
example: He had an uncanny sense of direction.
exampleChinese: 他有种异常准确的方向感。

meaning: adj. 不确定的，⽆把握的；不清楚的
example: The weather is uncertain this week, so bring an umbrella.
exampleChinese: 这周天气无常，所以带把伞吧。

meaning: adj. 地图上未标明的，全新未知的
example: The hikers crossed an uncharted valley on their first trip.
exampleChinese: 这些徒步者在第一次旅行中穿过了一片地图上未标明的山谷。

meaning: adj. 邪恶的，不洁的；肮脏的
example: The room smelled unclean after the long storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，这个房间闻起来很脏。

meaning: adj. ⽆法控制的，难以防⽌的
example: The child had an uncontrollable fit of laughter.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子忍不住大笑起来。

meaning: adj. 不因循守旧的，新奇的
example: Her unconventional style made the project stand out.
exampleChinese: 她不因循守旧的风格让这个项目显得很突出。

meaning: adj. 不时髦的，不帅的，不潇洒的
example: Some students think glasses are uncool, but I like them.
exampleChinese: 有些学生觉得戴眼镜不时髦，但我喜欢。

meaning: vt. 削价竞争；削弱，使降低效⼒
example: The new store will undercut local prices.
exampleChinese: 这家新店会压低当地价格进行竞争。

meaning: adj. 不良的，不合⼼意的，不想要的 n. 不良分⼦，不受欢迎的⼈
example: The manager said the rumor was undesirable and false.
exampleChinese: 经理说这个谣言既不受欢迎又不真实。

meaning: adj. 未开发的；不发达的，落后的 adj. 不成熟的，未充分发育的
example: That undeveloped town still has only one small road.
exampleChinese: 那个未开发的小镇仍然只有一条小路。

meaning: adj. 毫⽆疑问的，千真万确的
example: It is undoubted that practice improves skill.
exampleChinese: 毫无疑问，练习会提高技能。

meaning: adj. 不适当的，过度的
example: He took undue risks during the race.
exampleChinese: 他在比赛中冒了过度的风险。

meaning: adj. 没有利润的，不赚钱的
example: The factory closed because the line was uneconomic.
exampleChinese: 由于这条生产线不赚钱，工厂关闭了。

meaning: adj. 未受雇的，失业的
example: My uncle was unemployed for six months.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔失业了六个月。

meaning: adj. 不平坦的；不规则的；不平衡的
example: The road was uneven after the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 大雨过后，这条路变得坑洼不平。

meaning: n. 不公平，不公正
example: The class talked about unfairness in the game.
exampleChinese: 全班讨论了这场比赛中的不公平现象。

meaning: adj. 不熟悉的；对…不了解的
example: The street was unfamiliar to me.
exampleChinese: 这条街对我来说很陌生。

meaning: adj. 不时髦的，过时的
example: That hat looks unfashionable now.
exampleChinese: 那顶帽子现在看起来已经过时了。

meaning: adj. 不利的，恶劣的；不赞成的
example: The weather was unfavorable for our picnic.
exampleChinese: 天气对我们的野餐很不利。

meaning: adj. 不可⾏的，难以实现的
example: It is unfeasible to finish the job in one day.
exampleChinese: 一天内完成这项工作是不可行的。

meaning: adj. (眼睛) 未聚焦的；漫⽆⽬的的
example: Her eyes looked unfocused after she stayed up late.
exampleChinese: 她熬夜后眼神显得很涣散。

meaning: n. 联合，统⼀，合⼀
example: The unification of the two clubs took months.
exampleChinese: 这两个俱乐部的统一花了几个月时间。

meaning: adv. ⼀致地，均匀地
example: The seeds were planted uniformly in each row.
exampleChinese: 这些种子在每一行都均匀地种下了。

meaning: adj. 单⽅⾯的，单边的
example: The company made a unilateral decision to close the old factory.
exampleChinese: 公司单方面决定关闭那家旧工厂。

meaning: adj. 难以想象的
example: The mountain view was so beautiful that it seemed unimaginable.
exampleChinese: 这座山的景色太美了，简直难以想象。

meaning: adj. ⾮故意的，⽆⼼的
example: His apology was unintentional, but it still hurt her feelings.
exampleChinese: 他的道歉是无心的，但还是伤害了她的感情。

meaning: vt. vi. 组织 (或成⽴、加⼊) ⼯会
example: The workers will unionize if the new policy lowers their pay.
exampleChinese: 如果新政策降低工资，工人们就会组织工会。

meaning: n. 普遍性，通⽤性
example: The universality of music helps people from different countries connect.
exampleChinese: 音乐的普遍性帮助了来自不同国家的人们建立联系。

meaning: adj. 不公平的，不公正的
example: The teacher said the punishment was unjust.
exampleChinese: 老师说这个惩罚是不公平的。

meaning: adj. ⽆法知道的，不可知的
example: The cause of the strange light remains unknowable.
exampleChinese: 那道奇怪光亮的原因仍然无法知道。

meaning: adj. 未受教育的；天⽣就会的
example: She was unlearned in history, but she loved to ask questions.
exampleChinese: 她没有受过历史教育，但她喜欢提问。

meaning: vt. 释放，发泄 (感情等)；放 (动物)
example: Strong wind can unleash a lot of dust in the field.
exampleChinese: 强风会把田里的很多灰尘卷起来。

meaning: adj. 反常的；反⾃然的；做作的
example: His unnatural smile made everyone at the table nervous.
exampleChinese: 他那不自然的微笑让桌边的每个人都紧张了。

meaning: adv. 不必要地，不需要地
example: Please do not worry unnecessarily about the small mistake.
exampleChinese: 请不要为这个小错误不必要地担心。

meaning: adj. 史⽆前例的，空前的
example: The team won an unprecedented number of medals.
exampleChinese: 这支队伍获得了史无前例数量的奖牌。

meaning: n. 不可预测性
example: The unpredictability of the weather surprised the campers.
exampleChinese: 天气的不可预测性让露营者感到惊讶。

meaning: adj. 难以预料的；(⼈) 善变的
example: The mountain road is unpredictable after heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 大雨过后，这条山路变得难以预料。

meaning: adj. 谦虚谨慎的，不爱炫耀的
example: She is talented and unpretentious, so everyone likes her.
exampleChinese: 她很有才华，又谦虚谨慎，所以大家都喜欢她。

meaning: adj. 不实际的，不现实的
example: It is unrealistic to finish all the homework in ten minutes.
exampleChinese: 想在十分钟内做完所有作业是不现实的。

meaning: adj. 不合理的，不公正的
example: Your request is unreasonable, so I cannot agree.
exampleChinese: 你的要求不合理，所以我不能同意。

meaning: adj. 未被认出的；⽆⼈赏识的
example: The young singer was still unrecognized when she first started.
exampleChinese: 这位年轻歌手刚开始时还没有被人赏识。

meaning: adj. ⽆关联的；⾮亲属的
example: The two stories are unrelated.
exampleChinese: 这两个故事没有关联。

meaning: adj. 不典型的，⽆代表性的
example: The sample was unrepresentative of the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这个样本没有代表整个班级的特点。

meaning: vt. 罢免，使…下台；使摔下
example: The voters may unseat the mayor after the scandal.
exampleChinese: 这起丑闻之后，选民可能会罢免这位市长。

meaning: vt. 使⼼绪不宁，使担忧
example: The loud noise can unsettle a sleeping baby.
exampleChinese: 这阵响声会使正在睡觉的婴儿心绪不宁。

meaning: adv. 不令⼈惊奇地，不出所料地
example: Unsurprisingly, the team won after it practiced every day.
exampleChinese: 不出所料，球队每天训练后赢了。

meaning: adj. 未经试验 (或考验) 的
example: The plan is still untested in real emergencies.
exampleChinese: 这个计划在真正的紧急情况下还未经考验。

meaning: adj. 庞⼤⽽笨重的；难控制的
example: The old desk was too unwieldy to move alone.
exampleChinese: 那张旧桌子太笨重了，一个人搬不动。

meaning: adj. 不值得的；与…不相称的
example: He felt unworthy of the prize.
exampleChinese: 他觉得自己不配得这个奖。

meaning: adj. 即将发⽣的
example: We are planning for an upcoming exam next week.
exampleChinese: 我们正在为下周即将到来的考试做准备。

meaning: adj. 坦率的；预付的 adv. 预付地
example: Please be upfront about the cost before we agree.
exampleChinese: 在我们同意之前，请坦率说明费用。

meaning: n. 剧变，动乱，动荡
example: The sudden upheaval forced many families to move.
exampleChinese: 这场突如其来的动荡迫使许多家庭搬迁。

meaning: vt. 为 (椅⼦等) 装软垫
example: They can upholster the chair with blue fabric.
exampleChinese: 他们可以用蓝色布料给椅子加软垫。

meaning: n. 养护 (费)；抚养 (费)
example: Regular upkeep keeps the house in good condition.
exampleChinese: 定期养护能让房子保持良好状态。

meaning: adj. 令⼈振奋的，⿎舞⼈⼼的
example: Her speech was uplifting and gave us hope.
exampleChinese: 她的演讲令人振奋，给了我们希望。

meaning: vt. 上传 n. 上传 (的⽂件)
example: I will upload the photo after dinner.
exampleChinese: 我会在晚饭后上传这张照片。

meaning: adj. ⾼档的，⾼级的
example: They stayed at an upscale hotel near the lake.
exampleChinese: 他们住在湖边一家高档酒店。

meaning: n. (不利局⾯中的) 有利的⼀⾯ prep. 在或对着某⼈的头或脸的⼀侧
example: The upside of the delay is more time to prepare.
exampleChinese: 延误的好处是我们有更多时间准备。

meaning: n. ⾃命不凡的新贵；新兴公司
example: The young company was no longer seen as an upstart.
exampleChinese: 这家年轻公司不再被看作自命不凡的新贵了。

meaning: vt. 把…引往，引领 vi. vt. 开创，开启 n. 引座员
example: The guide will usher us to our seats.
exampleChinese: 导游会领我们去座位。

meaning: n. 乌托邦，空想的完美世界
example: Many people dream of a peaceful utopia.
exampleChinese: 许多人梦想着一个和平的乌托邦。

meaning: n. 保险库；墓⽳；拱顶；撑杆跳 vi. vt. (⽤⼿撑或撑杆) 跳跃
example: The athlete can vault over the bar with ease.
exampleChinese: 这名运动员可以轻松跃过横杆。

meaning: n. 复仇，报复
example: He wanted vengeance for his brother's death.
exampleChinese: 他想为哥哥的死报仇。

meaning: vt. 使形象化，想象，设想
example: I can visualize the map in my mind.
exampleChinese: 我能在脑海中把这张地图形象化。

meaning: n. 活⼒，⽣命⼒，热情
example: The team's vitality helped them finish the game strongly.
exampleChinese: 这支队伍的活力帮助他们以强劲的状态完成了比赛。

meaning: adj. ⽕⼭的，由⽕⼭引发的
example: We saw a volcanic island rising from the sea.
exampleChinese: 我们看见一座由火山形成的岛屿从海中升起。

meaning: vi. vt. 涉，蹚 (⽔) vi. 介⼊，插⼿；艰难地处理
example: Please wade across the shallow stream carefully.
exampleChinese: 请小心蹚过这条浅溪。

meaning: n. 作…⽤的器⽫；…制品；货品
example: The market sold handmade ware from local artists.
exampleChinese: 这家市场出售当地艺术家的手工制品。

meaning: n. 勇⼠，武⼠
example: The warrior stood bravely at the front of the crowd.
exampleChinese: 那位勇士勇敢地站在队伍前面。

meaning: n. 转折点；分⽔岭；流域
example: The new school library was a watershed for the town.
exampleChinese: 这座新的学校图书馆是这个小镇的一个转折点。

meaning: n. 幸福，健康，成功
example: Good sleep is important for your well-being.
exampleChinese: 良好的睡眠对你的幸福和健康很重要。

meaning: n. 旋⻛，旋流；⼀⽚忙乱 adj. 快速的，旋⻛似的
example: The meeting ended in a whirlwind of questions.
exampleChinese: 会议在一片忙乱中结束了，大家纷纷提问。

meaning: adj. 批发的；⼤规模的 adv. 以批发⽅式；⼤规模地 n. 批发
example: The factory sells shoes wholesale to small shops.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂以批发方式把鞋卖给小商店。

meaning: n. 荒野，荒漠；荒芜的地⽅
example: We camped in the wilderness for two days.
exampleChinese: 我们在荒野里露营了两天。

meaning: n. 野⽣动物，野⽣物种
example: We saw wildlife near the river.
exampleChinese: 我们在河边看到了野生动植物。

meaning: n. ⽊版画，⽊刻
example: The museum displayed a woodcut by a famous artist.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一位著名艺术家的木版画。

meaning: n. 树林，林地，林区
example: Deer often live in the woodland near our town.
exampleChinese: 鹿常常生活在我们镇附近的树林里。

meaning: adj. 话多的，冗⻓的
example: His report was so wordy that I lost interest.
exampleChinese: 他的报告太冗长了，以至于我失去了兴趣。

meaning: n. 全体员⼯；劳动⼒，劳动⼈⼝
example: The company needs more workers in its workforce.
exampleChinese: 这家公司需要更多劳动力。

meaning: n. ⼯作量，⼯作负担
example: My workload is light this week.
exampleChinese: 我这周的工作量很轻。

meaning: n. ⼯作场所
example: Our workplace has a quiet room for breaks.
exampleChinese: 我们的工作场所设有一个安静的休息室。

meaning: adj. 令⼈担⼼的，使⼈焦虑的
example: The dark clouds are worrisome to the farmers.
exampleChinese: 这些乌云让农民们感到担心。

meaning: vt. 造成 (严重破坏或伤害)
example: The storm can wreak damage on small boats.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴会对小船造成严重破坏。

meaning: n. 违法⾏为，坏事
example: The school had a strict rule against wrongdoing.
exampleChinese: 学校对违法行为有严格规定。

meaning: n. 渴望，向往
example: She felt a yearning to see the mountains again.
exampleChinese: 她渴望再次去看那些群山。
